artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙暴胀模型普遍预测存在微弱但可探测的原初非高斯性（PNG），这有助于理解暴胀期间的自由度及其相互作用。最简单的PNG类型包括局域、非局域（等边和正交）形状的三点关联函数，分别由多轻场模型和单场暴胀中的导数相互作用预测。本文利用暗能量光谱巡天（DESI）首次公开发布的数据，通过功率谱和双谱对局域、等边和正交非高斯性进行约束。分析采用一致的微扰有效场论（EFT）模型，在单圈阶同时处理功率谱和双谱。在EFT描述有效的稳健尺度截断下，我们得到PNG振幅的约束：$f^{\rm loc}_{\rm NL}=-0.1\pm 7.4$，$f^{\rm equil}_{\rm NL}=719\pm 390$，$f^{\rm orth}_{\rm NL}=-200\pm 100$（68%置信水平）。通过结合高红移DESI与遗留BOSS数据，并采用基于模拟的偏差参数先验，非局域PNG约束进一步改善，得到迄今最强的大尺度结构约束：$f^{\rm equil}_{\rm NL}=200\pm 230$，$f^{\rm orth}_{\rm NL}=-24\pm 86$。对$f^{\rm loc}_{\rm NL}$的约束与宇宙微波背景（CMB）限值相当；两者结合给出$f^{\rm loc}_{\rm NL}=-0.0\pm 4.1$，比仅用CMB的结果强18%，这是迄今为止对多场暴胀的最强约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：DESI数据为原初非高斯性提供了强有力的约束，特别是局域非高斯性约束与CMB相当，结合后得到迄今为止最强的多场暴胀约束，展示了DESI数据在宇宙学参数约束中的强大潜力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Upper panel: Power spectrum and bispectrum measurements for the DESI DR1 LRG2 sample at z eff = 0.7 z_{eff}=0.7 . The bispectrum quadrupole measurements are offset vertically for better visibility, and the Poisson shot noise contribution is subtracted from all relevant statistics. The bispectrum dataset includes bins with centers ranging from k min = 0.0075 ​ h ​ Mpc − 1 k_{min}=0.0075\,h{\text{Mpc}}^{-1} to k max = 0.15 ​ h ​ Mpc − 1 {k_{\text{max}}}=0.15\,h{\text{Mpc}}^{-1} . Lower panel: Bispectrum multipoles for the squeezed ( k min = 0.0075 ​ h ​ Mpc − 1 k_{min}=0.0075\,h{\text{Mpc}}^{-1} ) and equilateral configurations. The measurements are offset horizontally for better visibility.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上图为DESI DR1 LRG2样本在z_eff=0.7处的功率谱和双谱测量。双谱四极矩测量值在垂直方向上偏移以便于观察，所有相关统计量均已减去泊松散粒噪声贡献。双谱数据集包含中心从k_min=0.0075 h Mpc^{-1}到k_max=0.15 h Mpc^{-1}的区间。下图为挤压（k_min=0.0075 h Mpc^{-1}）和等边构型的双谱多极矩。测量值在水平方向上偏移以便于观察。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: As Fig. 1 , but for the QSO-all sample (including quasars up to z = 3.1 z=3.1 ). Here, we set k min = 0.0025 ​ h ​ Mpc − 1 k_{min}=0.0025\,h{\text{Mpc}}^{-1} for the squeezed bispectra in the lower left panel. Since the primary use-case of this sample is for local PNG studies, we omit the power spectrum hexadecapole and bispectrum quadrupole for this sample, and restrict to k ≤ 0.10 ​ h ​ Mpc − 1 k\leq 0.10\,h{\text{Mpc}}^{-1} .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：与图1相同，但针对QSO-all样本（包括红移z=3.1以内的类星体）。此处，左下图中挤压双谱的k_min设为0.0025 h Mpc^{-1}。由于该样本主要用于局域PNG研究，我们省略了功率谱十六极矩和双谱四极矩，并将分析限制在k≤0.10 h Mpc^{-1}。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Constraints on local, equilateral, and orthogonal PNG templates from DESI DR1 power spectrum and bispectrum full-shape data. First panel : main results from the galaxy and quasar samples, including the high-redshift quasar sample ‘QSO-all’. Second panel : additional results for local PNG, including splits by tracer population, restricting to the QSO-all power spectrum alone (matching (Chaussidon et al. , 2025 ) ) and adding the Planck PR4 constraints from Jung et al. ( 2025 ) . Third panel : additional results for non-local PNG, including restriction to the tree-level bispectrum ( B tree B_{tree} ), addition of simulation-based priors (SBP), and limiting to high-redshift galaxies (galaxies-hz, or DESI-hz including QSO-all). Unless otherwise stated, we jointly vary f NL equil f_{NL}^{equil} and f NL orth f_{NL}^{orth} , include both the power spectrum and bispectrum, and use conservative priors on EFT parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：来自DESI DR1功率谱和双谱全形数据的局域、等边和正交PNG模板约束。第一面板：星系和类星体样本的主要结果，包括高红移类星体样本‘QSO-all’。第二面板：局域PNG的附加结果，包括按示踪体种群划分、仅使用QSO-all功率谱（与Chaussidon等人2025年结果匹配）以及加入Jung等人2025年Planck PR4约束。第三面板：非局域PNG的附加结果，包括仅使用树级双谱（B_tree）、加入基于模拟的先验（SBP）以及限制在高红移星系（galaxies-hz，或包含QSO-all的DESI-hz）。除非另有说明，我们联合变化f_NL^{equil}和f_NL^{orth}，同时包含功率谱和双谱，并使用保守的EFT参数先验。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Constraints on the local PNG amplitude, f NL loc f_{NL}^{loc} , from various combinations of DESI galaxies and quasars. Much of our constraining power comes from the QSO-all power spectrum (which refers to the full DESI catalog up to z max = 3.1 z_{max}=3.1 ), with constraints tightening when adding the bispectrum and other galaxy samples. The full DESI constraint (blue) is close to the CMB bound from Planck ; their combination (red) yields the tightest constraints on f NL loc f_{NL}^{loc} obtained to date. Numerical results are given in Tab. 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：来自DESI星系和类星体不同组合的局域PNG振幅f_NL^{loc}约束。我们的约束能力主要来自QSO-all功率谱（指完整DESI星表，红移最高至z_max=3.1），加入双谱和其他星系样本后约束进一步收紧。完整的DESI约束（蓝色）接近Planck的CMB限值；两者结合（红色）得到迄今为止对f_NL^{loc}的最强约束。数值结果见表1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Constraints on single-field non-local PNG amplitudes from the DESI galaxy and quasar clustering data. Whilst the constraints from the power spectrum (gray) are weak, we find improved results when adding the large-scale bispectrum (blue) and when extending to shorter scales with the one-loop theory (red). Numerical results are given in Tab. 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自DESI星系和类星体成团数据的单场非局域PNG振幅约束。虽然功率谱（灰色）的约束较弱，但加入大尺度双谱（蓝色）以及扩展到更短尺度并采用单圈理论（红色）后，结果得到改善。数值结果见表1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Constraints on the single-field non-local PNG from DESI galaxy and quasar clustering data at high redshift, z > 0.6 z>0.6 (DESI-hz), BOSS DR12, and their combination. Simulation-based priors are applied in all three analyses.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：来自高红移（z>0.6）DESI星系和类星体成团数据（DESI-hz）、BOSS DR12及其组合的单场非局域PNG约束。所有三项分析均应用了基于模拟的先验。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们基于大质量星系团丰度，对Dvali-Gabadadze-Porrati (nDGP) 膜世界引力模型的正常分支给出了约束。在nDGP交叉尺度$r_{\rm c}$以下，该模型具有一种类似引力的有效第五力，它改变了结构的增长，导致星系团尺度上的晕质量函数（HMF）增强。增强的星系团丰度使得可以利用星系团样本对nDGP模型进行约束。我们采用了SPT星系团样本，该样本通过南极望远镜（SPT）的热Sunyaev-Zel'dovich效应（tSZE）选出，并利用暗能量巡天（DES）和哈勃空间望远镜（HST）的弱引力透镜数据进行质量标定。该样本包含1005个红移$0.25 < z < 1.78$的星系团，这些星系团通过多分量匹配滤波（MCMF）算法并利用光学和近红外数据得到确认。DES和HST的弱引力透镜数据使得能够对星系团样本进行稳健的质量测量。我们使用了DES第三年数据（覆盖688个红移$z < 0.95$的星系团）和HST数据（覆盖39个红移$0.6 < z <1.7$的星系团）。我们通过一个半解析修正因子（该因子源自nDGP模型中的球状坍缩模型，应用于$νΛ$CDM HMF）来考虑HMF的增强。随后，我们利用$N$体模拟进一步标定了该模型。此外，我们首次在nDGP模型框架内分析了Planck PR4对原初宇宙微波背景（CMB）温度和极化各向异性的测量。通过对SPT星系团丰度与Planck PR4数据的联合分析，我们得到了具有竞争力的约束，并在假设宇宙学包含大质量中微子的情况下，报告了$1/\sqrt{H_0r_{\rm c}}< 1.41$（95%置信度）的上限。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结，星系团丰度数据结合CMB观测能够对nDGP引力模型提供强有力的约束，为测试修正引力理论提供了有效方法。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Enhancement of the nDGP HMF with respect to the corresponding Λ \Lambda CDM cosmology from Eq. ( 15 ) in colored lines for different strengths of the nDGP model at mean cluster sample redshift z = 0.6 z=0.6 . The enhancement depends on the strength of the nDGP model and grows exponentially with mass. The black dashed line shows the Λ \Lambda CDM limit with no enhancement, i. e. ℛ = 1 \mathcal{R}=1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：不同强度的nDGP模型在平均星系团样本红移z=0.6时，相对于相应ΛCDM宇宙学的nDGP HMF增强（来自公式(15)），以彩色线条表示。增强程度取决于nDGP模型的强度，并随质量呈指数增长。黑色虚线表示无增强的ΛCDM极限，即ℛ=1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison between the HMF enhancement predicted by the BRIDGE simulations, ℛ BRIDGE \mathcal{R}_{BRIDGE} , and the semi-analytical model, ℛ SAM \mathcal{R}_{SAM} , across various redshifts. The data points are color-coded by log ⁡ ( H 0 ​ r r ​ m ​ c ) \log(H_{0}r_{rmc}) values. Gray dashed lines indicate ± 10 % \pm 10\% deviation as a visual reference. The top four panels present the uncorrected comparison based on Eq. ( 15 ), while the bottom four panels show the results after applying the correction factor from Eq. ( 19 ), resulting in improved agreement. Error bars reflect the jackknife covariance estimated from the BRIDGE simulation.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：BRIDGE模拟预测的HMF增强ℛ_BRIDGE与半解析模型ℛ_SAM在不同红移下的比较。数据点按log(H0r_rmc)值着色。灰色虚线表示±10%偏差，作为视觉参考。上面四个面板显示基于公式(15)的未修正比较，下面四个面板显示应用公式(19)修正因子后的结果，一致性得到改善。误差棒反映了从BRIDGE模拟估计的刀切协方差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Posterior distribution on Ω m \Omega_{m} , log 10 ⁡ A s \log_{10}A_{s} , σ 8 \sigma_{8} and 1 / H 0 ​ r c {1/\sqrt{H_{0}r_{c}}} ( 68 % 68\,\% and 95 % 95\,\% credible regions) for the nDGP SPT-clusters × \times WL analysis in red and for reference the ν ​ Λ \nu\Lambda CDM analysis from SB24b in blue. The cluster dataset alone cannot meaningfully constrain the nDGP parameter 1 / H 0 ​ r c {1/\sqrt{H_{0}r_{c}}} . Compared to the ν ​ Λ \nu\Lambda CDM analysis, the constraint on Ω m \Omega_{m} remains the same while σ 8 \sigma_{8} (which is computed using the nDGP linear growth equation) is shifted to higher values due to the enhanced growth in nDGP.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：nDGP SPT-星系团×WL分析（红色）和SB24b的νΛCDM分析（蓝色）对Ω_m、log10A_s、σ_8和1/√(H0rc)的后验分布（68%和95%置信区域）。仅星系团数据集无法有意义地约束nDGP参数1/√(H0rc)。与νΛCDM分析相比，Ω_m的约束保持不变，而σ_8（使用nDGP线性增长方程计算）由于nDGP中增强的增长而移至更高值。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Constraints on the cosmological parameters Ω m \Omega_{m} , σ 8 \sigma_{8} , ∑ m ν \sum m_{\nu} and 1 / H 0 ​ r c {1/\sqrt{H_{0}r_{c}}} for the three datasets used in this work (mean and 68% credible intervals, or 95% limit). The nDGP parameter 1 / H 0 ​ r c {1/\sqrt{H_{0}r_{c}}} and the total neutrinos mass ∑ m ν \sum m_{\nu} are not a meaningful constraint by the SPT-cluster × \times WL dataset alone (missing entries (…) in the table), and we only quote the constraints from Planck PR4 and the combination for these parameters. For comparison to other literature results, we also quote in the last row the result from the combination with massless neutrinos.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中三个数据集对宇宙学参数Ω_m、σ_8、∑m_ν和1/√(H0rc)的约束（均值和68%置信区间，或95%上限）。nDGP参数1/√(H0rc)和总中微子质量∑m_ν无法由SPT-星系团×WL数据集单独给出有意义的约束（表中缺失项(…)），我们仅引用Planck PR4及其组合对这些参数的约束。为与其他文献结果比较，我们在最后一行也引用了无质量中微子组合的结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Posterior distribution on Ω m \Omega_{m} , A s A_{s} , σ 8 \sigma_{8} and 1 / H 0 ​ r c {1/\sqrt{H_{0}r_{c}}} ( 68 % 68\,\% and 95 % 95\,\% credible regions) for the nDGP SPT-cluster × \times WL analysis in red, Planck PR4 in green and the combination in purple. The joint analysis places a competitive constraint on the nDGP parameter 1 / H 0 ​ r c < 1.41 {1/\sqrt{H_{0}r_{c}}}<1.41 at 95 % 95\,\% credibility.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：nDGP SPT-星系团×WL分析（红色）、Planck PR4（绿色）及其组合（紫色）对Ω_m、A_s、σ_8和1/√(H0rc)的后验分布（68%和95%置信区域）。联合分析对nDGP参数给出了具有竞争力的约束：1/√(H0rc)<1.41（95%置信度）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Posterior distribution for all (non prior dominated) parameters in the SPT-cluster × \times WL analysis in the nDGP and ν ​ Λ \nu\Lambda CDM analyses ( 68 % 68\,\% and 95 % 95\,\% credible regions). All scaling relation parameters are consistent between the analysis with wider posteriors from the nDGP analysis due to the extra degree of freedom. Only the constraint of the correlations between tSZE significance and richness changes due to a different scatter model applied to the mean richness–mass scaling relation. The shift in n s n_{s} come from the different Planck prior applied to our analysis and the analysis from [ SB24b ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：nDGP和νΛCDM分析中SPT-星系团×WL分析的所有（非先验主导）参数的后验分布（68%和95%置信区域）。由于额外的自由度，nDGP分析中所有标度关系参数的后验分布更宽，但结果一致。仅tSZE显著性与富度之间相关性的约束因应用于平均富度-质量标度关系的不同散射模型而改变。n_s的偏移源于我们的分析与[SB24b]分析所采用的不同Planck先验。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系尺度的外流是星系演化的关键组成部分，然而它们在早期宇宙中的性质仍知之甚少。我们首次对从z≈1到z≈10的广阔宇宙时间跨度内星系中的冷气体外流进行了统计研究。利用数千个公开的JWST/NIRSpec光谱，我们对Mg II λλ2796, 2803吸收双线采用了信噪比加权的光谱叠加技术。我们在所有恒星质量和红移区间内稳健地探测到了蓝移的Mg II吸收。在所有时期，外流等效宽度与恒星质量（M_*）均呈现强的正相关，从M_*≈10^9 M_⊙时的约1 Å增加到M_*>10^{10.5} M_⊙时的超过3 Å。我们的工作首次对低质量（M_*≲10^{9.5} M_⊙）、高红移（z>3）区域的冷外流提供了统计约束，这对于约束典型现今星系的众多前体的反馈至关重要。关键的是，外流性质与恒星质量之间的标度关系在z>3时没有显著演化。这表明在早期宇宙中存在一种持久、不变的反馈机制控制着重子循环，这对那些假设在宇宙黎明时期反馈物理发生根本变化的模型（如无反馈星暴模型）提出了强约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 外流性质与恒星质量的标度关系在z>3时没有显著演化，表明早期宇宙中存在持久、不变的反馈机制控制着重子循环。这对那些假设在宇宙黎明时期反馈物理发生根本变化的模型（如无反馈星暴模型）提出了强约束。（基于可用摘要翻译）

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Sample selection and stellar mass distribution. The left panel displays the distribution of our galaxy samples in the stellar mass-redshift plane. The grey contours and scatter points represent the parent sample of 24,927 galaxies, while the blue and red contours and points show the subsamples with valid spectral coverage of the Mg II and Na I D doublets, respectively. The three contour levels for each sample are derived from a Kernel Density Estimate (KDE) and correspond to iso-density boundaries enclosing 16%, 50%, and 84% of the distribution. Individual galaxies located in low-density regions (outside the 84% contour) are plotted as scatter points to illustrate the full extent of the sample. The middle and right panels present the Probability Density Functions (PDFs) of the stellar mass distributions for the Mg II- and Na I D-available subsamples. The colored histograms correspond to the different redshift bins as labeled. To assess the representativeness of our sample, we overlay the evolving Galaxy Stellar Mass Function (GSMF) from Weaver et al. ( 2023 ) . The brown shaded region represents the envelope of the GSMF across the redshift range 1.1 < z < 7.5 1.1<z<7.5 , derived from the Schechter function parameters (double for z < 3 z<3 and single for z > 3 z>3 ) presented in their work.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：样本选择与恒星质量分布。左图展示了我们的星系样本在恒星质量-红移平面上的分布。灰色等高线和散点代表包含24,927个星系的母样本，而蓝色和红色等高线及散点分别表示具有Mg II和Na I D双线有效光谱覆盖的子样本。每个样本的三个等高线水平来自核密度估计，对应包围分布16%、50%和84%的等密度边界。位于低密度区域（84%等高线外）的单个星系以散点形式绘出，以展示样本的完整范围。中图和右图分别展示了Mg II和Na I D可用子样本的恒星质量分布的概率密度函数。彩色直方图对应标注的不同红移区间。为评估样本的代表性，我们叠加了来自Weaver等人（2023）的演化星系恒星质量函数。棕色阴影区域代表红移范围1.1<z<7.5内恒星质量函数的包络，源自他们工作中给出的Schechter函数参数（z<3时为双函数，z>3时为单函数）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Stacked absorption feature in redshift bins. The left and right columns show the continuum-normalized stacked spectra centered on the Mg II λ ​ λ ​ 2796 , 2803 \lambda\lambda 2796,2803 and Na I D λ ​ λ ​ 5890 , 5896 \lambda\lambda 5890,5896 doublets, respectively. Each row corresponds to a different redshift bin, as indicated in the bottom-left corner of each panel. The blue solid line represents the weighted median spectrum, while the shaded region shows the 1σ \sigma uncertainty derived from bootstrap resampling. The horizontal dashed line is the continuum level at unity, and the vertical red dashed lines mark the rest-frame wavelengths of the doublet components. The number of spectra in each stack ( N N ) and the derived outflow velocity and EW are also annotated.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：红移区间内的叠加吸收特征。左列和右列分别展示了以Mg II λλ2796, 2803和Na I D λλ5890, 5896双线为中心的连续谱归一化叠加光谱。每一行对应不同的红移区间，如每个面板左下角所示。蓝色实线代表加权中值光谱，阴影区域表示通过自助重采样得到的1σ不确定性。水平虚线是单位连续谱水平，垂直红色虚线标记双线分量的静止波长。每个叠加中的光谱数量（N）以及推导出的外流速度和等效宽度也已标注。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Stacked Mg II feature in stellar mass and redshift bins. Each colored box corresponds to a specific redshift bin, as indicated by the legend on the right. Within each box, the panels are arranged in order of increasing stellar mass from top to bottom. The stellar mass range and the number of spectra in each stack are annotated in each panel. The blue solid line, shaded uncertainty region, and dashed lines are the same as in Figure 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：恒星质量和红移区间内的叠加Mg II特征。每个彩色框对应一个特定的红移区间，如右侧图例所示。在每个框内，面板按恒星质量递增的顺序从上到下排列。每个面板中标注了恒星质量范围和叠加中的光谱数量。蓝色实线、阴影不确定区域和虚线含义与图2相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Scaling relations for the Mg II absorption EW. Left panel: The outflow EW as a function of stellar mass. Our stacked measurements are shown as star symbols, color-coded by their weighted mean redshift. The grey line marks the best-fit linear relation for the stacked data points, with the shaded region denoting the 1σ \sigma uncertainty. For comparison, small circles show the measurements from the individual galaxies presented in the Appendix B , color-coded by their redshift. Right panel: The outflow EW as a function of redshift, with an additional top axis showing cosmic time. The star symbols again represent our stacked results, but all data points are now color-coded by their weighted mean stellar mass, as indicated by the colorbar.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：Mg II吸收等效宽度的标度关系。左图：外流等效宽度作为恒星质量的函数。我们的叠加测量结果以星形符号显示，颜色编码表示其加权平均红移。灰色线条标记了叠加数据点的最佳拟合线性关系，阴影区域表示1σ不确定性。作为比较，小圆圈显示了附录B中呈现的单个星系的测量结果，颜色编码表示其红移。右图：外流等效宽度作为红移的函数，顶部附加坐标轴显示宇宙时间。星形符号再次代表我们的叠加结果，但现在所有数据点根据其加权平均恒星质量进行颜色编码，如色标所示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The outflow velocity versus stellar mass relation. Our measurements from the weighted stacking are shown as star symbols. The color of our data points corresponds to the weighted mean redshift of the stack, as indicated by the color bar on the right. We compare our results with literature data from Weiner et al. ( 2009 ) , Bordoloi et al. ( 2014 ) , Sugahara et al. ( 2019 ) , Davis et al. ( 2023 ) , Yu et al. ( 2025 ) , Liboni et al. ( 2025 ) , Valentino et al. ( 2025 ) , Cooper et al. ( 2025 ) , Wu ( 2025 ) and Xu et al. ( 2025 ) , as detailed in the legend. The colored solid curves represent the estimated escape velocities ( v esc ≈ 3 ​ v circ v_{esc}\approx 3v_{circ} ) as a function of stellar mass at different redshifts ( z = 1 z=1 to z = 6 z=6 , color-coded), derived using the SHMR of Moster et al. ( 2013 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：外流速度与恒星质量的关系。我们的加权叠加测量结果以星形符号显示。数据点的颜色对应叠加的加权平均红移，如右侧色标所示。我们将结果与文献数据进行比较，包括Weiner等人（2009）、Bordoloi等人（2014）、Sugahara等人（2019）、Davis等人（2023）、Yu等人（2025）、Liboni等人（2025）、Valentino等人（2025）、Cooper等人（2025）、Wu（2025）和Xu等人（2025），详见图例。彩色实线代表在不同红移（z=1至z=6，颜色编码）下作为恒星质量函数的估计逃逸速度（v_esc≈3v_circ），基于Moster等人（2013）的恒星-暗物质晕质量关系推导得出。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Properties of Stacked Samples and Outflow Measurements. The columns are as follows: (1) Redshift bin. (2) Weighted mean redshift of the bin. (3) Stellar mass bin. For rows with a dash, measurements correspond to the entire redshift bin. (4) Weighted mean of the logarithm of the stellar mass. (5) Number of spectra in the stack. (6) Weighted mean outflow velocity derived from the Mg II doublet. (7) Outflow equivalent width of the Mg II doublet. (8) Lower limit on mass outflow rate.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：叠加样本与外流测量的性质。各列如下：(1) 红移区间。(2) 区间的加权平均红移。(3) 恒星质量区间。对于带有破折号的行，测量对应整个红移区间。(4) 恒星质量对数的加权平均值。(5) 叠加中的光谱数量。(6) 从Mg II双线推导出的加权平均外流速度。(7) Mg II双线的外流等效宽度。(8) 质量外流率的下限。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison with equal-weight stacking. The left panels show the resulting stacked Mg II profiles for each redshift bin when using an unweighted (equal-weight) median stacking method. These profiles should be directly compared with the results from our fiducial S/N-weighted method (right panels, the same as in the left panels in Figure 2 ). Note the significantly lower S/N and less-defined absorption features compared to the weighted stacks, which demonstrates the superiority of the fiducial method.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：与等权重叠加的比较。左图展示了使用未加权（等权重）中值叠加方法时每个红移区间得到的叠加Mg II轮廓。这些轮廓应直接与我们基准的S/N加权方法的结果（右图，与图2左图相同）进行比较。注意与加权叠加相比，其信噪比显著降低且吸收特征不够清晰，这证明了基准方法的优越性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Individual Mg II absorption detections. Each panel shows the continuum-normalized spectrum of an individual galaxy from our sample, centered on the Mg II doublet region, with the panels arranged in order of increasing redshift. The shaded regions are 1σ \sigma uncertainties and the dashed lines mark the rest-frame Mg II doublet. Each spectrum is annotated with its spectroscopic redshift ( z z ), stellar mass ( log ⁡ ( M ∗ / M ⊙ ) \log(M_{*}/{M_{\odot}}) ), and the boxcar -measured velocity ( v out v_{out} ) and equivalent width ( EW out {EW_{out}} ). While most objects show blueshifted absorption indicative of outflows, a few exhibit visually redshifted absorption (marked by green color), which may be a signature of gas inflow.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：单个Mg II吸收探测。每个面板展示我们样本中一个单个星系的以Mg II双线区域为中心的连续谱归一化光谱，面板按红移递增顺序排列。阴影区域为1σ不确定性，虚线标记静止的Mg II双线。每个光谱标注了其光谱红移（z）、恒星质量（log(M_*/M_⊙)）以及通过箱形测量得到的速度（v_out）和等效宽度（EW_out）。虽然大多数天体显示出指示外流的蓝移吸收，但少数天体显示出视觉上的红移吸收（以绿色标记），这可能是气体内流的信号。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 暗物质晕中心是尖峰状还是核状是区分不同暗物质模型的关键判据。最近有研究基于动力学论证声称，完全核状的恒星系统无法在尖峰状暗物质晕中存活，这将使得在超暗弱矮星系中观测到恒星核（其中暗物质核无法通过重子过程形成）成为冷暗物质范式的直接证伪。本文通过理想化模拟明确展示，像矮星系中观测到的核状恒星系统可以在尖峰状暗物质晕中稳定存在至少数个哈勃时间。我们还证明，超暗弱矮星系的观测无法区分轻微正、平坦或负的内密度斜率，进一步排除了从恒星构型动力学推断引力势的可能性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要的结论：核状恒星系统在尖峰暗物质晕中可以长期稳定存在，因此观测到恒星核不能作为冷暗物质范式的直接证伪证据。此外，从恒星构型推断引力势的动力学方法在超暗弱矮星系中不可行。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Evolution of the binned stellar density ρ ⋆ \rho_{\star} , velocity dispersion σ r \sigma_{r} , and velocity anisotropy β ani \beta_{{ani}} as functions of radius r r . The dotted line shows r S , P = 0.2 ​ kpc r_{{S,P}}=0.2\,{kpc} , and the dash-dotted line shows r S , G = 0.028 ​ kpc r_{{S,G}}=0.028\,{kpc} . Left column: one simulation of the fiducial system for selected times. Right column: seven simulations with unequal mass ratios M ext / M IC M_{{ext}}/M_{{IC}} at t = 50 ​ Gyr t=50\,{Gyr} . First row: stellar density profile, with the zoomed-in region showing the inner region within r = 0.075 ​ kpc r=0.075\,{kpc} , and the dashed line showing the analytic Plummer profile ρ P \rho_{{P}} . Second row: the ratio of ρ ⋆ \rho_{\star} to ρ P \rho_{{P}} , with the dashed line showing ρ ⋆ / ρ P = 1 \rho_{\star}/\rho_{{P}}=1 . Third row: velocity dispersion profile, with the triangles showing the time-average of σ r \sigma_{r} within (on the left) and outside (on the right) r S , P r_{{S,P}} . Fourth row: velocity anisotropy profile, with the dashed line showing β ani = 0 \beta_{{ani}}=0 , and the triangles showing the time-averaged β ani \beta_{{ani}} .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：分箱恒星密度ρ⋆、速度弥散σr和速度各向异性βani随半径r的演化。虚线表示rS,P=0.2 kpc，点划线表示rS,G=0.028 kpc。左列：选定时刻的基准系统一次模拟。右列：t=50 Gyr时七个不同质量比Mext/MIC的模拟。第一行：恒星密度轮廓，放大区域显示r=0.075 kpc以内的内部区域，虚线表示解析Plummer轮廓ρP。第二行：ρ⋆与ρP的比值，虚线表示ρ⋆/ρP=1。第三行：速度弥散轮廓，三角形表示rS,P内部（左）和外部（右）σr的时间平均值。第四行：速度各向异性轮廓，虚线表示βani=0，三角形表示βani的时间平均值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Similar to the left panel of the second row of Figure 1 , but for 10 realizations of the fiducial system, at times t = 0 ​ Gyr t=0\,{Gyr} ( left ) and t = 50 ​ Gyr t=50\,{Gyr} ( right ). The orange line shows the average ratio of all runs.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：与图1第二行左列类似，但针对基准系统的10次实现，时间分别为t=0 Gyr（左）和t=50 Gyr（右）。橙色线显示所有运行的平均比值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : The ratio of the Lagrangian radii r 35 r_{35} in simulations to that of the Plummer profile r 35 , P r_{35,{P}} , as a function of time t t for eight different mass ratios M ext / M IC M_{{ext}}/M_{{IC}} . The lighter fluctuating lines show the evolution at each output, while the darker horizontal lines corresponds to the time-averaged value across the whole simulation. The t t -axis is divided into two ranges separated by the black dotted line: the left side shows the evolution within the first 1 Gyr {Gyr} and the right side within the remaining 99 Gyr {Gyr} .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：模拟中拉格朗日半径r35与Plummer轮廓r35,P的比值，作为时间t的函数，针对八个不同质量比Mext/MIC。较浅的波动线显示每个输出时刻的演化，较深的水平线对应整个模拟的时间平均值。t轴被黑色虚线分为两个范围：左侧显示前1 Gyr内的演化，右侧显示剩余99 Gyr内的演化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Results of the stellar density fitting. Top-left panel: the distribution of γ \gamma for selected times (as in the left column of Figure 1 ) for the hierarchical fit. The orange lines show the median of the fit at each time, and the dotted line shows γ = 0 \gamma=0 . Top-right panel: the PDF of γ \gamma at t = 0 ​ Gyr t=0\,{Gyr} . The orange line shows the hierarchical fit, and the remaining lines show the nonhierarchical fits for the 10 fiducial simulations. Bottom panels: correlation of γ \gamma with the parameters α , β , r S , and ​ ρ S \alpha,\,\beta,\,r_{{S}},\,{and}\,\rho_{{S}} , respectively. The contours show the 68% and 95% confidence intervals, and the dashed crossing lines show the true parameters of the underlying Plummer distribution.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：恒星密度拟合结果。左上图：选定时刻（如图1左列）γ的分层拟合分布。橙色线显示每个时刻拟合的中位数，虚线表示γ=0。右上图：t=0 Gyr时γ的概率密度函数。橙色线显示分层拟合，其余线显示10次基准模拟的非分层拟合。下图：γ分别与参数α、β、rS和ρS的相关性。等高线显示68%和95%置信区间，虚线交叉线显示底层Plummer分布的真实参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Directed acyclic graph showing the model parameters in the fit to the density profile. Single-line circle nodes represent fit parameters, double-line circles represent measured quantities (the data), and diamond nodes represent deterministic quantities. Parameters outside the inner rectangle do not depend on the measured radius.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：密度轮廓拟合中模型参数的有向无环图。单线圆圈节点表示拟合参数，双线圆圈表示测量量（数据），菱形节点表示确定性量。内矩形外部的参数不依赖于测量半径。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Weakly informative prior distributions for the ( α , β , γ ) (\alpha,\beta,\gamma) double power-law density profile. The parameter distributions refer to the single-line circle node variables in Figure 5 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：(α, β, γ)双幂律密度轮廓的弱信息先验分布。参数分布对应图5中的单线圆圈节点变量。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个新的理论框架用于描述暗物质晕质量函数（HMF），该框架能够在极宽的质量和红移范围内精确预测暗物质晕的丰度。基于广义的Press & Schechter模型和三轴坍缩（GPS+），我们以线性密度场的方差为变量预测HMF，仅对晕质量有微弱的显式依赖，且不显式依赖红移。GPS+模型自然地提供了正确的归一化和高质量端行为，无需经验拟合。我们利用Uchuu N体模拟套件对GPS+模型进行校准和验证，该套件结合了普朗克宇宙学下的大宇宙学体积和高质量分辨率。通过使用多达300次实现的六个模拟，我们在6.5 < log($M_{\rm 200m}$/[h$^{-1}$ $M_{\odot}$]) <16的质量范围和0 < z < 20的红移范围内获得了高精度的HMF测量，并降低了宇宙方差。在整个范围内，GPS+模型再现了模拟HMF，偏差通常低于10-20%。与Sheth-Tormen（ST）模型相比，在z < 2时两者表现相似，但在更高红移时GPS+模型显著改进，ST模型偏差可达70-80%，而我们的模型保持在约20%以内。最后，我们评估了晕质量定义的影响：采用Bryan & Norman（1998）的演化维里过密度在低红移和高质量端会降低一致性，而M200m则产生更普遍、几乎与红移无关的HMF。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，GPS+模型提供了一个准确、理论驱动的暗物质晕质量函数框架，在极宽的质量和红移范围内都有效。研究还发现使用M200m质量定义比使用Bryan & Norman的演化维里过密度能产生更普遍、几乎与红移无关的质量函数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Multiplicity function f ​ ( M , z ) f(M,z) (Eq. 1 ) from Uchuu simulations (markers) vs GPS+ predictions (solid lines) at z = 0 z=0 –20 (right to left; see Table 7 ). The y y -axis shows the normalised differential halo abundance including d ​ ln ⁡ M / d ​ ln ⁡ σ d\ln M/d\ln\sigma . Only bins with > 200 >200 halos are shown.

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : HMF at z = 0.0 z=0.0 from different cosmological simulations. 6 6 6 Columns list: M 200 ​ m M_{200m} , the halo mass within overdensity 200 ​ ρ b 200\rho_{b} ; f ​ ( M ) f(M) , the mass function; Δ ​ f ​ ( M ) \Delta f(M) , its uncertainty; the number of halos in each mass bin; and the name the name of the simulation contributing that bin. figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Top panel: Multiplicity function f ​ ( σ , z ) f(\sigma,z) as a function of σ \sigma at different redshifts, as predicted by the GPS+ model presented in this work. Bottom panel: Ratio of the model at each redshift to z = 0 z=0 prediction.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：上方面板：本文提出的GPS+模型在不同红移下作为σ函数的多重性函数f(σ,z)。下方面板：每个红移下模型与z=0预测的比值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Comparison of the ratio between the simulated HMF and the GPS+ model at different redshifts, for two halo mass definitions in the data: the mass enclosed within overdensity 200 ρ b \rho_{b} , M 200m , and the mass within the virial radius, M vir .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：不同红移下模拟HMF与GPS+模型比值的比较，针对数据中两种晕质量定义：过密度200ρ_b内的质量M_200m，以及维里半径内的质量M_vir。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Comparison of halo mass function ratios using two different theoretical predictions. Each panel shows the ratio of the data to the GPS+model prediction and to the Dark Emulator prediction, highlighting relative differences between the two approaches. The panels correspond to redshifts z = 0.0 z=0.0 (left), z = 0.49 z=0.49 (middle), and z = 1.03 z=1.03 (right).

artifacts.abstract_zh: 阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）的偏振模式观测是研究星周盘中尘埃颗粒分布的有力工具。许多源显示出与排列尘埃颗粒一致的偏振特征，但这种排列的物理起源仍不确定。其中一个源是BHB07-11，它是管状星云中的一个I类原双星天体，其星周盘具有复杂的旋臂结构。虽然磁场常被用来解释星际介质中的颗粒排列，但星周盘环境中的不同条件要求进一步研究颗粒排列机制。为了确定BHB07-11的主要偏振机制，我们利用ALMA在波段3（λ=3.1毫米）、波段6（λ=1.3毫米）和波段7（λ=0.87毫米）的偏振模式尘埃连续谱观测，并结合波段6的高分辨率尘埃连续谱和谱线观测。每个波段中观测到的偏振矢量与排列颗粒的发射一致，并遵循高分辨率观测中显示的旋臂结构。考虑到观测到的偏振矢量方向与旋臂之间的关系，我们发现偏振形态最符合通过旋臂中气体和尘埃之间的相对速度流排列的颗粒，正如最近发展的羽毛球状排列机制所设想的那样，而不是与磁场或其他已知排列机制对齐。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，BHB07-11的偏振主要由螺旋臂内气尘相对速度流引起的羽毛球状排列机制主导，这一发现对理解星周盘环境中尘埃排列机制具有重要意义，表明在特定条件下速度梯度驱动的排列可能比磁场排列更为重要。

The beam size and position angle on the sky are shown in the bottom left corner of each image. All masked emission is shown in black as indicated by the colorbar arrow.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：BHB07-11的ALMA波段3（左）、6（中）和7（右）尘埃连续谱图。每个面板中显示高于3σ截止的斯托克斯I发射。每个图像左下角显示波束大小和天空位置角。所有掩蔽发射如色标箭头所示以黑色显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: A high-resolution ALMA Band 6 dust continuum map of BHB07-11. BHB07-11A and BHB07-11B are labelled. Stokes I emission is shown above a 3σ \sigma cutoff. The beam size and position angle on the sky is shown in the bottom left corner of the map.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：BHB07-11的高分辨率ALMA波段6尘埃连续谱图。标记了BHB07-11A和BHB07-11B。显示高于3σ截止的斯托克斯I发射。图左下角显示波束大小和天空位置角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: ALMA Band 3 (left), 6 (middle), and 7 (right) polarization mode dust continuum maps of BHB07-11. Polarized emission is shown above a 3σ P \sigma_{P} cutoff. Polarization vectors are shown in each frame, with their length proportional to the polarization percentage. Vectors are shown where polarized emission is above 4σ P \sigma_{P} in Band 3, 10σ P \sigma_{P} in Band 6, and 20σ P \sigma_{P} in Band 7, which limits the locations of the polarization vectors to lie within the disk. Vectors are Nyquist sampled across the beam major and minor axis in each map. A representative 4 % 4\% polarization vector key is shown in the top right of each frame, and the beam size and position angle on the sky are shown in the bottom left.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：BHB07-11的ALMA波段3（左）、6（中）和7（右）偏振模式尘埃连续谱图。显示高于3σ_P截止的偏振发射。每个帧中显示偏振矢量，其长度与偏振百分比成正比。矢量显示在偏振发射高于波段3的4σ_P、波段6的10σ_P和波段7的20σ_P的位置，这限制了偏振矢量位于盘内。每个图中矢量沿波束主轴和次轴进行奈奎斯特采样。每个帧右上角显示代表性的4%偏振矢量键，左下角显示波束大小和天空位置角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The high-resolution Band 6 dust continuum map shown in Fig. 2 with polarization vectors from the Band 7 image shown in Fig. 3 overlaid. As with Figure 3 , polarization vectors are cropped above 20σ \sigma in polarized emission to restrict them to the disk. Vectors are shown at the same intervals as in Fig. 3 . The Band 7 (white) and high-resolution Band 6 (purple) beam sizes and position angles on the sky are shown in the bottom left, and a green vector representing 4 % \% polarization is shown in the top right.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：图2所示的高分辨率波段6尘埃连续谱图，叠加了图3所示的波段7偏振矢量。与图3一样，偏振矢量在偏振发射高于20σ时被裁剪以限制在盘内。矢量以与图3相同的间隔显示。左下角显示波段7（白色）和高分辨率波段6（紫色）的波束大小和天空位置角，右上角显示代表4%偏振的绿色矢量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Polarization percentage maps constructed from the ALMA Band 3, 6, and 7 Stokes I and polarized intensity images. The same polarized emission cuts from Figure 3 are used to spatially restrict the polarization percentage. White pixels reflect masked data. The beam size and position angle are shown in the bottom left corner of each map.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：由ALMA波段3、6和7的斯托克斯I和偏振强度图像构建的偏振百分比图。使用与图3相同的偏振发射截止来空间限制偏振百分比。白色像素表示掩蔽数据。每个图左下角显示波束大小和位置角。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 恒星反馈作为调节重子循环的关键过程，被认为会极大地重新分布暗物质晕内部和外部的重子物质，然而观测证据尚缺乏。通过对暗能量光谱仪约40万个星系光谱的叠加分析，我们在Mg II吸收线中发现了由恒星形成驱动的冷外流。假设发射的气体仅受引力作用，我们的计算表明，来自低质量星系（log M*<10）的外流能够逃逸出暗物质晕，这与我们利用背景类星体沿星系短轴观测到的星系周介质吸收结果高度一致。本研究为恒星反馈导致低质量晕中重子保留率低提供了间接证据，表明星系内的重子过程与暗物质晕外的弥散物质存在联系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：恒星反馈驱动的外流能够将重子物质从低质量星系中排出，解释了低质量暗物质晕中重子保留率低的现象，表明星系内的重子过程与暗物质晕外的弥散物质存在联系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Outflow properties of samples with 0.6 < z < 1.7 0.6<z<1.7 on the M ∗ M_{*} - SFR SFR diagram. (A) The distribution of samples, where colors of the hexagons indicate the total galaxy count per bin (including adjacent bins for stacking). Grey hexagons are excluded from color mapping due to insufficient neighboring bins, but the sample within them are used in the stacking of adjacent inner bins. Some of the stacked spectra are plotted over the hexagons with the two vertical dashed lines indicating the rest-frame wavelengths of Mg ii λ \lambda 2796 and Mg ii λ \lambda 2803, highlighting the prevalence of blueshifted outflow absorption features. The inset illustrates the stacked spectrum derived from galaxies within the black contour. (B) The map of outflow equivalent width ( EW out EW_{out} ) derived from the stacked spectra. (C) The map of mean outflow velocity ( v out v_{out} ) derived from the stacked spectra. (D) The map of mass outflow rate ( M ˙ out \dot{M}_{out} ). (E) The map of mass-loading factor ( η ≡ M ˙ out / SFR \eta\equiv\dot{M}_{out}/{SFR} ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在M*-SFR图上，0.6<z<1.7样本的外流特性。(A)样本分布，六边形颜色表示每格的总星系计数（包括用于叠加的相邻格）。灰色六边形因相邻格不足而未参与颜色映射，但其内的样本用于相邻内格的叠加。部分叠加光谱绘制在六边形上，两条垂直虚线表示Mg II λ2796和Mg II λ2803的静止波长，突出显示蓝移外流吸收特征。插图显示了黑色轮廓内星系得到的叠加光谱。(B)从叠加光谱导出的外流等值宽度图。(C)从叠加光谱导出的平均外流速度图。(D)质量外流率图。(E)质量负载因子图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Scaling relations between outflow properties and galaxy properties at different redshifts. (A) v out v_{out} as a function of log ⁡ M ∗ \log M_{*} . The samples are divided into three bins by redshift. The blue, green and yellow points represent the samples with 0.6 ≤ z < 0.9 0.6\leq z<0.9 , 0.9 ≤ z < 1.2 0.9\leq z<1.2 and 1.2 ≤ z < 1.7 1.2\leq z<1.7 , respectively. The open symbols denote Mg ii outflow velocity measurements ( ?, ? ) from the literature. The value of each point is derived with a composite spectrum of 10,000 spectra, with the shaded area indicating 1σ \sigma uncertainties from bootstrapping analysis. The dashed line is the best-fit relation, see Equation 1 . The Pearson correlation coefficient computed using data points across all redshift bins is displayed at the bottom-right corner of the panel. (B) v out v_{out} as a function of log ⁡ SFR \logSFR . (C) M ˙ out \dot{M}_{out} as a function of log ⁡ M ∗ \log M_{*} . The shaded area indicates 1σ \sigma uncertainties propagated from the uncertainty in EW out EW_{out} derived from bootstrap sampling and the uncertainty in estimating H i column density from EW out EW_{out} . (D) M ˙ out \dot{M}_{out} as a function of log ⁡ SFR \logSFR . The dashed line is the best-fit relation, see Equation 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：不同红移下外流特性与星系特性之间的标度关系。(A) v_out作为log M*的函数。样本按红移分为三组。蓝色、绿色和黄色点分别代表0.6≤z<0.9、0.9≤z<1.2和1.2≤z<1.7的样本。空心符号表示文献中的Mg II外流速度测量值。每个点的值由10,000条光谱的复合光谱导出，阴影区域表示自举分析得到的1σ不确定性。虚线是最佳拟合关系，见方程1。面板右下角显示所有红移区间数据点计算的皮尔逊相关系数。(B) v_out作为log SFR的函数。(C) M_dot_out作为log M*的函数。阴影区域表示从自举抽样得到的EW_out不确定性和从EW_out估计H I柱密度的不确定性传播得到的1σ不确定性。(D) M_dot_out作为log SFR的函数。虚线是最佳拟合关系，见方程2。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : The mass-loading factor. (A) The mass-loading factor as a function of outflow velocity, distinguishing energy-driven and momentum-driven outflow regimes. The data points colored by redshift are taken from the left panels of Figure 2 . To mitigate potential contamination from AGN activity in massive galaxies, we exclude data points with M ∗ > 10 10 ​ M ⊙ M_{*}>10^{10}\,M_{\odot} . The solid and dashed lines show best-fit models assuming fixed power-law exponents of − 2 -2 (energy-driven scenario) and − 1 -1 (momentum-driven scenario), respectively. (B) The derived mass-loading factor as a function of stellar mass in comparison with simulations and other observations. The open stars and shaded area represent η \eta and the 1σ \sigma uncertainties derived in this work, with blue, green and yellow indicating 0.6 ≤ z < 0.9 0.6\leq z<0.9 , 0.9 ≤ z < 1.2 0.9\leq z<1.2 and 1.2 ≤ z < 1.7 1.2\leq z<1.7 , respectively. The lines are taken from papers of corresponding simulations, the M ∗ M_{*} values of which are converted from M halo M_{halo} through M ∗ M_{*} - M halo M_{halo} relation ( ? ). The other open symbols represent results from observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：质量负载因子。(A)质量负载因子作为外流速度的函数，区分能量驱动和动量驱动外流区域。按红移着色的数据点取自图2的左面板。为减轻大质量星系中AGN活动的潜在污染，我们排除了M*>10^10 M⊙的数据点。实线和虚线分别表示假设固定幂律指数为-2（能量驱动情景）和-1（动量驱动情景）的最佳拟合模型。(B)导出的质量负载因子作为恒星质量的函数，与模拟和其他观测比较。空心星和阴影区域代表本工作导出的η和1σ不确定性，蓝色、绿色和黄色分别表示0.6≤z<0.9、0.9≤z<1.2和1.2≤z<1.7。线条取自相应模拟的论文，其M*值通过M*-M_halo关系从M_halo转换而来。其他空心符号代表观测结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : The alignment of hosting gravitational bound outflows and minor-axes CGM suppresion at M ∗ ∼ 10 10 ​ M ⊙ M_{*}\sim 10^{10}\,M_{\odot} . (A) The velocity decay of outflows. The diagonal crosses represent the observed outflow velocities, which are obtained through Equation 1 according to the given M ∗ M_{*} of galaxies. The four curves with increasing launching velocity represent velocity decay of outflows in galaxies with stellar masses of 10 9.3 ​ M ⊙ 10^{9.3}\,M_{\odot} , 10 9.6 ​ M ⊙ 10^{9.6}\,M_{\odot} , 10 10.0 ​ M ⊙ 10^{10.0}\,M_{\odot} and 10 10.4 ​ M ⊙ 10^{10.4}\,M_{\odot} . (B) Total Mg ii absorption equivalent width in the 20-150 kpc CGM surrounding galaxies derived using background quasars. The green (red) symbols represents CGM at the minor (major)-axes of the galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在M*~10^10 M⊙处，引力束缚外流与短轴CGM抑制的对齐。(A)外流的速度衰减。对角叉表示观测到的外流速度，根据给定星系的M*通过方程1获得。四条具有递增发射速度的曲线代表恒星质量为10^9.3 M⊙、10^9.6 M⊙、10^10.0 M⊙和10^10.4 M⊙的星系中外流的速度衰减。(B)利用背景类星体导出的星系周围20-150 kpc CGM中的总Mg II吸收等值宽度。绿色（红色）符号代表星系短轴（长轴）处的CGM。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Sample parameter distribution. (A) log ⁡ M ∗ \log M_{*} - z z distribution. The inner and outer black contours enclose 68% and 95% of the sample, respectively. For visual clarity, only 10% of the points falling outside the outer contour are plotted. The histogram at the top of this panel shows the one-dimensional distribution of the sample redshifts. (B) log ⁡ M ∗ \log M_{*} - log ⁡ SFR \logSFR distribution. The blue, green and yellow contours indicate the distribution of samples with 0.6 < z < 0.9 0.6<z<0.9 , 0.9 < z < 1.2 0.9<z<1.2 and 1.2 < z < 1.7 1.2<z<1.7 , respectively. Similar to the black contours, these enclose 68% and 95% of the corresponding redshift subsamples. The black histogram at the top of this panel displays the distribution of SFR for the samples, while the black histogram on the right shows the distribution of M ∗ M_{*} . This histograms in the color of blue, green and yellow indicates the distribution of sample at different redshift bins.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：样本参数分布。(A) log M*-z分布。内部和外部黑色轮廓分别包含样本的68%和95%。为清晰起见，仅绘制了落在外部轮廓外的10%的点。面板顶部的直方图显示样本红移的一维分布。(B) log M*-log SFR分布。蓝色、绿色和黄色轮廓分别表示0.6<z<0.9、0.9<z<1.2和1.2<z<1.7样本的分布。与黑色轮廓类似，这些轮廓包含相应红移子样本的68%和95%。面板顶部的黑色直方图显示样本的SFR分布，右侧的黑色直方图显示M*分布。蓝色、绿色和黄色的直方图表示不同红移区间样本的分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Illustration of the Boxcar method for measuring outflow properties on the stacked spectra. The color of the curves corresponds to the M ∗ M_{*} of the galaxies. The dashed and dotted lines indicate the rest-frame wavelengths of Mg ii λ \lambda 2796 and Mg ii λ \lambda 2803, respectively. All composite spectra presented here are obtained by stacking 20,000 individual galaxy spectra. The blue and orange shaded regions correspond to velocity range of − 700 -700 to 0 ​ km ​ s − 1 0\,km\,s^{-1} relative to Mg ii λ \lambda 2796 and 0 to 400 ​ km ​ s − 1 400\,km\,s^{-1} relative to Mg ii λ \lambda 2803, respectively. These two wavelength intervals are used to calculate outflow properties throughout this work. Labels at the top of the figure indicate the rest-frame wavelengths, while those at the bottom show velocities relative to Mg ii λ \lambda 2803.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：用于测量叠加光谱中外流特性的Boxcar方法示意图。曲线的颜色对应星系的M*。虚线和点线分别表示Mg II λ2796和Mg II λ2803的静止波长。此处展示的所有复合光谱均由20,000条单个星系光谱叠加得到。蓝色和橙色阴影区域分别对应相对于Mg II λ2796的速度范围-700至0 km/s和相对于Mg II λ2803的速度范围0至400 km/s。这两个波长区间用于计算本工作中的外流特性。图顶部的标签表示静止波长，底部的标签显示相对于Mg II λ2803的速度。

figures.caption_en: Figure S1 : Example multicomponent fitting results. (A) Composite spectrum of low mass galaxies in which the scattered emission is significant. The black curve represents data from the composite spectra. The red, blue and green curve represent systemic absorption, blueshifted absorption and emission components, respectively. The orange curve represents the model spectrum, and the pink curve represents residual which is data − - model spectrum. The shaded region around flux=0 indicates 1σ \sigma uncertainty inferred from MCMC fitting. (B) Composite spectrum of medium mass galaxies in which the emission is moderate. (C) Composite spectrum of massive galaxies, displaying no emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图S1：多分量拟合结果示例。(A)低质量星系的复合光谱，其中散射发射显著。黑色曲线代表复合光谱数据。红色、蓝色和绿色曲线分别代表系统吸收、蓝移吸收和发射分量。橙色曲线代表模型光谱，粉色曲线代表残差（数据减去模型光谱）。通量=0附近的阴影区域表示从MCMC拟合推断的1σ不确定性。(B)中等质量星系的复合光谱，发射适中。(C)大质量星系的复合光谱，无发射显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure S2 : Outflow properties of samples with 0.6 < z < 1.7 0.6<z<1.7 on the M ∗ M_{*} - SFR SFR diagram, after removing the fitted emission components. (A) EW out EW_{out} map. The binning is identical to that in Figure 1 in the maintext, but the outflow properties are derived by first removing the fitted emission lines and then applying the Boxcar method. The bins at the right side of the grey line are derived with emission line flux ratios of Flux ​ ( model ) Flux ​ ( data ) > 3 \frac{Flux(model)}{Flux(data)}>3 , indicating that the emission component could be overfit and the results are unreliable. (B) v out v_{out} map. (C) M ˙ out \dot{M}_{out} map. (D) η \eta map, where the grey diagnal crosses denotes the exact bins where the emission is potentially overfit.
figures.caption_zh: 图S2：在去除拟合的发射分量后，0.6<z<1.7样本在M*-SFR图上的外流特性。(A) EW_out图。分格与正文图1相同，但外流特性是通过先去除拟合的发射线，然后应用Boxcar方法导出的。灰色线右侧的分格是通过发射线通量比Flux(model)/Flux(data)>3导出的，表明发射分量可能被过度拟合，结果不可靠。(B) v_out图。(C) M_dot_out图。(D) η图，其中灰色对角叉表示发射可能被过度拟合的确切分格。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 轴子夸克块（AQN）是宏观暗物质候选体，质量在几克到一公斤之间，半径小于微米，被认为是在量子色动力学时期通过轴子诱导的电荷分离形成的。该框架自然地将暗物质与可见物质丰度联系起来（Ω_DM ~ Ω_visible），并提供了一种产生重子-反重子不对称性的机制，其中暗物质由物质AQN和反物质AQN组成。尽管在宇宙学尺度上表现为冷暗物质，但重子与反物质AQN湮灭，产生电离高能光子。由此产生的能量注入可能会在宇宙微波背景（CMB）上留下谱畸变印记，并改变再电离历史。我们使用修改版的CLASS玻尔兹曼代码计算了这种能量注入对μ和y谱畸变参数以及光学深度的影响。我们发现：（1）CMB各向异性基本上不受重子湮灭的影响；（2）相关的谱畸变信号在拟议的CMB谱畸变探测任务的灵敏度范围内。最后，我们讨论了AQN情景与湮灭或衰变暗物质模型的异同。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要的翻译：轴子夸克块暗物质模型的重子-反物质湮灭过程虽然对CMB各向异性影响很小，但产生的谱畸变信号有望被未来的CMB谱畸变探测器探测到。该研究还讨论了AQN情景与湮灭或衰变暗物质模型的异同，为通过CMB谱畸变约束AQN暗物质提供了理论基础。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Spectral distortion ( Δ ​ I ν \Delta I_{\nu} ) contributions from Axion Quark Nugget (AQN) models compared to a dark matter annihilation model with p ann = 4 × 10 − 27 ​ cm 3 ​ s − 1 ​ GeV − 1 p_{ann}=4\times 10^{-27}~{cm^{3}\,s^{-1}\,GeV^{-1}} . While the annihilation scenario exceeds Planck’s upper bound and is observationally ruled out, its resulting distortions remain significantly smaller than those from AQN models. This illustrates that even observationally excluded levels of dark matter annihilation lead to weaker spectral distortion signatures than physically viable AQN scenarios, underlining the strong thermal visibility of AQN-induced distortions.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：轴子夸克块（AQN）模型产生的谱畸变（ΔI_ν）贡献，与湮灭率p_ann = 4×10^{-27} cm^3 s^{-1} GeV^{-1}的暗物质湮灭模型比较。虽然湮灭情景超过了普朗克的上限并在观测上被排除，但其产生的畸变仍显著小于AQN模型。这表明，即使在观测上被排除的暗物质湮灭水平，其产生的谱畸变信号也比物理上可行的AQN情景弱，凸显了AQN诱导畸变的强热可见性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Spectral distortions in the CMB predicted by the AQN model. Left: Projected sensitivities to μ \mu -type distortions. The solid red line shows the μ \mu -distortion spectrum from the AQN model, while the dashed and dash-dotted lines represent the expected detection thresholds of PIXIE ( μ = 5 × 10 − 8 \mu=5\times 10^{-8} ) and Voyage2050 ( μ = 1 × 10 − 9 \mu=1\times 10^{-9} ), respectively. Right: Predicted y y -type distortion signal from the AQN model (solid blue), shown in comparison to the projected sensitivities of PIXIE ( y = 5 × 10 − 9 y=5\times 10^{-9} , dashed green) and Voyage2050 ( y = 1 × 10 − 9 y=1\times 10^{-9} , dash-dotted magenta). In both panels, the AQN signal remains above the lower bounds, indicating detectability within the safe observational region.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：AQN模型预测的CMB谱畸变。左图：μ型畸变的预期灵敏度。红色实线显示AQN模型的μ畸变谱，虚线和点划线分别代表PIXIE（μ=5×10^{-8}）和Voyage2050（μ=1×10^{-9}）的预期探测阈值。右图：AQN模型预测的y型畸变信号（蓝色实线），与PIXIE（y=5×10^{-9}，绿色虚线）和Voyage2050（y=1×10^{-9}，品红色点划线）的预期灵敏度比较。在两个面板中，AQN信号均高于下限，表明在安全观测区域内具有可探测性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Corner plots showing the posterior distributions for six cosmological parameters under four different models: the standard Basic Classy run, the AQN model with an average mass of 10g, and two dark matter annihilation scenarios with p ann = 4 × 10 − 28 ​ cm 3 ​ s − 1 ​ GeV − 1 p_{ann}=4\times 10^{-28}~{cm^{3}\,s^{-1}\,GeV^{-1}} and p ann = 4 × 10 − 30 ​ cm 3 ​ s − 1 ​ GeV − 1 p_{ann}=4\times 10^{-30}~{cm^{3}\,s^{-1}\,GeV^{-1}} . Among these, only the red curve corresponding to the p ann = 4 × 10 − 28 p_{ann}=4\times 10^{-28} cm 3 ​ s − 1 ​ GeV − 1 {cm^{3}\,s^{-1}\,GeV^{-1}} case exceeds the observational upper bound from Planck, while the others remain within the allowed region.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：角点图显示了四种不同模型下六个宇宙学参数的后验分布：标准Basic Classy运行、平均质量为10克的AQN模型，以及湮灭率p_ann = 4×10^{-28} cm^3 s^{-1} GeV^{-1}和p_ann = 4×10^{-30} cm^3 s^{-1} GeV^{-1}的两种暗物质湮灭情景。其中，只有对应于p_ann = 4×10^{-28} cm^3 s^{-1} GeV^{-1}情况的红色曲线超过了普朗克的观测上限，而其他曲线仍在允许区域内。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Corner plots showing the posterior distributions for six cosmological parameters under three scenarios: the standard Basic Classy model, and three Axion Quark Nugget (AQN) models with nugget average masses of 10 g and 100 g and 1 kg. All cases remain consistent with the Planck upper limit on p ann p_{ann} , supporting the viability of AQN dark matter within current observational bounds.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：角点图显示了三种情景下六个宇宙学参数的后验分布：标准Basic Classy模型，以及块平均质量分别为10克、100克和1千克的三种轴子夸克块（AQN）模型。所有情况均与普朗克对p_ann的上限一致，支持AQN暗物质在当前观测界限内的可行性。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Parameters in Q ˙ i / Q ˙ 0 \dot{Q}_{i}/\dot{Q}_{0}
figures.caption_zh: 表1：Q̇_i / Q̇_0中的参数

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Exact and approximate numerical values of F ​ ( X e , Y p ) F(X_{e},Y_{p}) and G ​ ( X e , Y p ) G(X_{e},Y_{p}) in three specific cosmological epochs ( Y p = 0.245 Y_{p}=0.245 ).
figures.caption_zh: 表2：在三个特定宇宙学时期（Y_p = 0.245）中F(X_e, Y_p)和G(X_e, Y_p)的精确和近似数值

artifacts.abstract_zh: 大质量恒星和星团是由大质量致密团块在引力、湍流和磁场驱动下碎裂形成的。ALMAGAL项目以约1000天文单位的分辨率观测了约1000个团块，使得在广泛的团块物理参数和演化阶段中对该过程进行统计显著的表征成为可能。在本工作中，我们研究了514个拥有至少4个核心的潜在成团大质量团块中致密核心的空间分布，以追踪碎裂的初始条件和早期演化。我们使用了定量描述符，并以团块热光度与质量比作为演化指标进行评估。通过最小生成树方法测量核心间距，并与金斯引力碎裂理论进行比较。我们利用Q参数和质量分离比Λ_MSR来评估核心是否具有特定排列或质量差异。ALMAGAL核心通常排列成轴比e~2.2的椭圆群，但也观测到e≥5的情况。约76%的案例中每个团块存在单一特征核心间距，但多重碎裂长度的迹象并不罕见。典型核心间距与团块平均热金斯长度λ_J^th一致，但有一类低碎裂/年轻团块具有更宽的间距，l≈3×λ_J^th。核心间距平均从年轻系统中的约22000天文单位减小到更演化系统中的约7000天文单位。核心通常分布在分形子星团中，仅在后期阶段出现中心聚集模式，但无渐进演化转变。最后，在110个系统中发现了质量分离，其发生率随演化而增加。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，大质量团块的碎裂过程显示核心间距随演化减小，与热金斯碎裂理论一致。质量分离现象在演化后期更显著，表明恒星团形成过程中质量分布随演化发生变化。这些发现为理解大质量恒星和星团形成的早期阶段提供了重要观测约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of the ratio L / M L/M and average surface density as function of the clump heliocentric distance for the ALMAGAL sample, and comparison of these two properties one versus the other. Each panel includes the 2D density distribution computed dividing the intervals of L / M L/M , Σ c ​ l \Sigma_{cl} and in d c ​ l d_{cl} with bins of width 0.3 dex, 0.2 dex and 500 pc, respectively. The solid light gray lines indicate the contour levels of the 2D density distribution derived with Kernel Density Estimation corresponding to 10, 30, 50, 70, 95 percentage of the sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：ALMAGAL样本中L/M比值和平均面密度随团块日心距离的分布，以及这两个性质之间的对比。每个面板包括二维密度分布，通过将L/M、Σ_cl和d_cl的区间分别以0.3 dex、0.2 dex和500 pc的宽度分箱计算得出。浅灰色实线表示通过核密度估计得出的二维密度分布的等高线，对应样本的10%、30%、50%、70%和95%。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Sizes of statistical subsample (number of clumps, N c ​ l ​ u ​ m ​ p N_{clump} , and cores, N c ​ o ​ r ​ e ​ s N_{cores} ) studied in this work, selected with different cuts on the degree of fragmentation . 1 1 1 Statistics from the ALMAGAL catalog by Coletta2025 . The subsamples are divided into “near” and “far” group, referring to systems with different heliocentric distances, which are observed with different array configurations, see text and Molinari2025 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中研究的统计子样本大小（团块数N_clump和核心数N_cores），根据碎裂程度的不同截断进行选择。1 来自Coletta2025的ALMAGAL目录统计。子样本分为“近”和“远”两组，指具有不同日心距离的系统，这些系统使用不同的阵列配置进行观测，详见正文和Molinari2025。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Examples of the distribution of cores found in four ALMAGAL clumps overlapped on the dust continuum map at 1.4 mm from which they were extracted. These fields show examples of clustered systems with circular and elliptical patterns and cases of aligned cores. The contour levels correspond to 4 ​ n × σ 4n\times\sigma level and σ \sigma equal to the noise level measured on the image. The positions of the cores from the ALMAGAL catalog extracted by Coletta2025 are indicated with gray star symbols. In each field, we indicate the cluster geometrical center and its radius (see the definition in the text) with a black cross and a dark blue circle, respectively. We also show the convex hull polygon (cyan segments) and the corresponding best-fitting ellipse (black dashed line) adopted for the morphological characterization of the system. The solid thick black segments are the MST edges determined with Prim’s algorithm ( Prim1957 ) , connecting all the cores in the field.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在四个ALMAGAL团块中发现的核心分布示例，叠加在提取它们的1.4毫米尘埃连续谱图上。这些场展示了具有圆形和椭圆模式的成团系统以及核心对齐的案例。等高线对应4n×σ水平，σ等于图像上测量的噪声水平。来自Coletta2025的ALMAGAL目录提取的核心位置用灰色星号表示。在每个场中，我们用黑色十字和深蓝色圆圈分别表示星团几何中心及其半径（定义见正文）。我们还展示了凸包多边形（青色线段）和相应的最佳拟合椭圆（黑色虚线），用于系统的形态学表征。粗黑实线段是使用Prim算法（Prim1957）确定的MST边，连接场中所有核心。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: As in Fig. 2 . These fields shows examples of cores distributed over filamentary features and in well-separated, local substructures, both patterns that are sometimes found in ALMAGAL continuum images.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：与图2相同。这些场展示了核心分布在纤维状特征上以及分离良好的局部子结构中的示例，这两种模式有时在ALMAGAL连续谱图像中发现。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Top panel : Distribution of the cluster radius measured from the average core positions for the sample of 514 ALMAGAL clumps with N c ​ o ​ r ​ e ≥ 4 N_{core}\geq 4 (in gray) and the subsample composed 347 clumps with d c ​ l ≥ 3.7 d_{cl}\,\geq\,3.7 kpc (magenta). Bottom panel : Clump heliocentric distance vs measured cluster radius. The dashed line shows the physical size of the ALMAGAL FoV, while the dotted one indicates the area where the sensitivity is constant within a factor of two, i.e. angular sizes ∼ 13.5 \sim 13.5 ″. Cluster radii exceeding the FoV sizes are possible in systems with a substantial offset between the cluster and the image center.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：上方面板：对于514个N_core≥4的ALMAGAL团块样本（灰色）和由347个d_cl≥3.7 kpc团块组成的子样本（品红色），根据平均核心位置测量的星团半径分布。下方面板：团块日心距离与测量的星团半径的关系。虚线表示ALMAGAL视场的物理大小，点线表示灵敏度在2倍内恒定的区域，即角大小约13.5角秒。在星团与图像中心存在显著偏移的系统中，星团半径可能超过视场大小。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Distribution of the ratio between the radius of the core cluster and the clump one (gray histogram). The dot-dashed line, which refers to the top and right axes, shows the distribution of the clump radius derived from Herschel Hi-GAL data at 250 μ \mu m from Elia2021 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：核心星团半径与团块半径之比的分布（灰色直方图）。点划线（参考顶部和右侧坐标轴）显示了来自Elia2021的Herschel Hi-GAL 250微米数据得出的团块半径分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Cluster radius as a function of the clump-averaged properties: the ratio L / M L/M (left panel), and surface density Σ c ​ l \Sigma_{cl} (right panel), color coded by the clump distance. Black lines indicate the contours of the 2D probability density distribution corresponding to 10, 25, 50, 75 and 95% levels.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：星团半径作为团块平均性质（左面板：L/M比值；右面板：面密度Σ_cl）的函数，按团块距离着色。黑线表示二维概率密度分布的等高线，对应10%、25%、50%、75%和95%水平。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Whiskers plots showing the distribution of the two measured estimates of the cluster elongation for the different classes of ALMAGAL clumps identified by number of cores inside the CH polygon: sparse, where no further core lies inside it; intermediate, where there are less cores than the ones defining the polygon itself; clustered, where there are more cores than the ones at polygon vertices. The left panel presents the elongation e CH e_{{CH}} , defined as the ratio between the major and minor axis of the best fitted ellipse to the CH polygon, while the right panel refers to the ratio ξ \xi between the circular area of the cluster and the area of the CH polygon. The first and third quartiles, and the 10th and 90th percentiles of the distribution are indicated by the boxes and the segment extremes, respectively, while the central segment corresponds to the median.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：箱线图显示了根据CH多边形内部核心数量识别的不同ALMAGAL团块类别（稀疏：内部无额外核心；中等：核心数少于定义多边形自身的核心数；成团：核心数多于多边形顶点核心数）的两种星团伸长率测量值的分布。左面板展示了伸长率e_CH，定义为CH多边形最佳拟合椭圆的长轴与短轴之比；右面板展示了比值ξ，即星团圆形面积与CH多边形面积之比。箱体表示第一和第三四分位数，线段端点表示第10和第90百分位数，中心线段表示中位数。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 利用晚期宇宙观测数据，我们证明释放暗能量和暗物质状态方程（EoS）会显著改变它们之间相互作用的推断强度和方向。当暗区状态方程固定为$w_{\mathrm{de}}=-1$和$w_{\mathrm{dm}}=0$时，数据一致支持暗能量向暗物质的能量转移，且这种支持在各种相互作用形式下均成立。然而，这种看似明确的证据对状态方程假设高度敏感：将$w_{\mathrm{de}}$作为自由参数会显著削弱相互作用的证据，其值收敛到精粹场区域（$w_{\mathrm{de}}>-1$）。相反，释放$w_{\mathrm{dm}}$则保持对相互作用的偏好，并揭示出相关性：正的$w_{\mathrm{dm}}$与暗能量向暗物质的能量转移相关，负的$w_{\mathrm{dm}}$与暗物质向暗能量的能量转移相关。这些发现警告不要为了检测可能的相互作用而简单假设ΛCDM状态方程值。尽管存在这些基本简并性，使用Akaike和偏差信息准则进行的模型比较表明，所有测试的相互作用暗能量场景均获得比ΛCDM模型更显著的支持。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要翻译：研究结论警告不要简单假设ΛCDM状态方程值来检测可能的暗物质-暗能量相互作用，因为这种假设会引入显著的简并性。尽管存在这些基本简并性，相互作用暗能量模型在统计上仍优于标准ΛCDM模型，表明相互作用可能是真实存在的物理现象。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Graphical representation of model comparison results. In this work, we choose the Λ \Lambda CDM model as a comparison baseline. Left: The Δ \Delta AIC and Δ \Delta DIC values. A negative Δ \Delta AIC/ Δ \Delta DIC value within the range [ − 2 , 0 ) [-2,0) indicates weak evidence in favor of the model, a value within [ − 6 , − 2 ) [-6,-2) indicates positive evidence in favor, and a value within [ − 10 , − 6 ) [-10,-6) indicates strong evidence in favor. Right: The logarithmic Bayes factors. A positive ln ⁡ ℬ i ​ j \ln{\mathcal{B}}_{ij} value within the range ( 0 , 1 ) (0,1) indicates inconclusive evidence in favor of the model, and a value within [ 1 , 2.5 ) [1,2.5) indicates weak evidence in favor of the model.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：模型比较结果的图形表示。在本工作中，我们选择ΛCDM模型作为比较基线。左图：ΔAIC和ΔDIC值。ΔAIC/ΔDIC值在[-2,0)范围内表示支持该模型的弱证据，在[-6,-2)范围内表示正面证据，在[-10,-6)范围内表示强证据。右图：对数贝叶斯因子。lnℬ_ij值在(0,1)范围内表示支持该模型的不确定证据，在[1,2.5)范围内表示弱证据。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们研究了基于变异山顶势并插入小台阶特征的单场暴胀模型中原初黑洞的形成、自旋和丰度。该台阶诱导了短暂的超慢滚动暴胀阶段，从而产生标量功率谱的大幅增强，以满足可观的原初黑洞丰度要求。我们通过数值求解Mukhanov-Sasaki方程精确计算原初功率谱，而非使用常用的解析功率谱。利用所得功率谱，我们将∇²ζ视为高斯随机场，应用峰值理论，并通过其振幅μ和特征宽度K参数化曲率轮廓。在仅考虑I型原初黑洞的情况下，使用两种稳健方法（压实函数的平均值和q函数方法）计算阈值。基于此，在线性阶计算了所得原初黑洞的无量纲自旋参数，发现⟨a_⋆²⟩^(1/2) ~ 10^(-3)；但对于较小质量的黑洞，该值可能更高。我们给出了两组代表性参数的详细预测，计算了当前原初黑洞质量函数f_PBH(M)以及相关的标量诱导引力波。第一组参数产生质量M ≃ 10^(-13) M_⊙的原初黑洞，可解释100%的暗物质；第二组参数产生质量M ≃ 10^(-2) M_⊙的原初黑洞，贡献约2.4%的暗物质密度。预测的标量诱导引力波信号位于未来实验（如LISA、DECIGO、BBO和SKA）的灵敏度范围内。特别地，第二组参数产生的标量诱导引力波与近期NANOGrav发现的低频引力波证据相符。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：带台阶特征的变异山顶势单场暴胀模型能够有效产生原初黑洞，既可以作为暗物质候选者，又能产生可观测的标量诱导引力波信号。该模型为原初黑洞的形成和观测提供了理论框架，预测的信号与当前和未来引力波实验的观测能力相匹配。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The plot displays the power spectrum as a function of wavenumber k k for 2 different sets of parameters: i) ( c , ϕ s , δ ) = ( 7.0043 × 10 − 4 , 3.7 , 1.26 × 10 − 2 ) (c,\phi_{s},\delta)=(7.0043\times 10^{-4},3.7,1.26\times 10^{-2}) , and ii) ( c , ϕ s , δ ) = ( 2.3658 × 10 − 4 , 4.22 , 7.2548 × 10 − 3 ) (c,\phi_{s},\delta)=(2.3658\times 10^{-4},4.22,7.2548\times 10^{-3}) . The other parameter are taken as α = 1 \alpha=1 , ϕ ⋆ = 4.75 \phi_{\star}=4.75 , and V 0 = 9.48 × 10 − 11 V_{0}=9.48\times 10^{-11} . The parameters are chosen to yield approximately N = 60 N=60 e-folds of expansion for the inflationary phase and to reproduce the power spectrum 𝒫 s = 2.1 × 10 − 9 \mathcal{P}_{s}=2.1\times 10^{-9} at the crossing time of the pivot mode. The different constraints on the power spectrum are also plotted Planck [ 103 ] , FIRAS [ 104 ] , SKA [ 105 , 106 ] , PTA [ 107 ] and LISA [ 106 ] . Plot legends are self-explanatory. We have obtained r = 0.0024 r=0.0024 and n s = 0.975 n_{s}=0.975 , which are consistent with the recent ACT observations [ 108 , 109 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：该图显示了对于两组不同参数，功率谱随波数k的变化：i) (c, φ_s, δ) = (7.0043×10^(-4), 3.7, 1.26×10^(-2))，以及ii) (c, φ_s, δ) = (2.3658×10^(-4), 4.22, 7.2548×10^(-3))。其他参数取为α=1，φ_⋆=4.75，V_0=9.48×10^(-11)。参数选择使得暴胀阶段膨胀约N=60 e-fold，并在枢轴模式穿越时刻再现功率谱P_s=2.1×10^(-9)。图中还绘制了来自Planck [103]、FIRAS [104]、SKA [105,106]、PTA [107]和LISA [106]对功率谱的不同约束。图例自明。我们得到r=0.0024和n_s=0.975，这与最近的ACT观测[108,109]一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 计算了在宇宙密度扰动谱中存在额外功率（即“凸起”）的情况下，中性氢21厘米谱线对宇宙微波背景辐射的吸收强度。主要的吸收增强效应是第一代恒星更早诞生，它们形成了紫外辐射背景。这种辐射降低了中性氢的自旋温度，从而增强了21厘米谱线的吸收。通过比较不同宇宙学模型（有和没有密度扰动谱凸起），表明可以根据吸收频率轮廓的位置确定扰动谱中凸起可能的位置，从而重建尺度k>1 Mpc⁻¹上的宇宙扰动谱。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：21厘米线吸收观测可以作为探测小尺度宇宙密度扰动谱的有效工具，特别是对扰动谱中的“凸起”结构敏感，为重建早期宇宙扰动谱提供了新方法。

figures.caption_en: Рис. 1: Fraction of matter in the Universe in virialized dark matter halos versus redshift z z . The red color indicates the curves constructed from the results of our numerical simulations; the criterion for the selection of halos was their virial temperature above 10 4 10^{4} K. The solid curve corresponds to the density perturbation spectrum with a bump; the dashed curve corresponds to the spectrum of the standard Λ \Lambda CDM model. The blue color indicates the curves constructed from the Press–Schechter formalism for the minimum-mass boundary M b = 10 8 ​ M ⊙ M_{b}=10^{8}M_{\odot} . The parameters of the bump are A = 20 A=20 , k 0 = 4.69 k_{0}=4.69 Mpc -1 and σ 0 = 0.1 \sigma_{0}=0.1 (the g ​ a ​ u ​ s ​ s ​_ ​ 1 gauss\_1 model).

Top : in the presence of a bump with A = 20 A=20 , k 0 = 4.69 k_{0}=4.69 Mpc -1 and σ 0 = 0.1 \sigma_{0}=0.1 (the g ​ a ​ u ​ s ​ s ​_ ​ 1 gauss\_1 model) (solid curves) and without a bump (the standard Λ \Lambda CDM model) (dashed curves). The parameter f esc = 0.025 f_{esc}=0.025 , 0.05, and 0.1 (the blue, red, and green curves, respectively). In all three cases f ∗ = 0.1 f_{*}=0.1 . Bottom : the same, but for f esc = 0.05 f_{esc}=0.05 and three cases: f ∗ = 0.025 f_{*}=0.025 , 0.05, and 0.1 (the green, blue, and red curves, respectively).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：中性氢吸收导致的温度偏移。上图：存在凸起（A=20，k₀=4.69 Mpc⁻¹，σ₀=0.1，gauss_1模型，实线）和无凸起（标准ΛCDM模型，虚线）的情况。参数f_esc=0.025、0.05和0.1（分别对应蓝色、红色和绿色曲线）。所有三种情况下f_*=0.1。下图：相同，但f_esc=0.05，三种情况：f_*=0.025、0.05和0.1（分别对应绿色、蓝色和红色曲线）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 尽管高红移星系中紫外发射的变红暗示了尘埃的存在，但在红移z > 8.3以上的（亚）毫米波段尚未探测到尘埃发射。本研究结合了阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列（ALMA）和北方扩展毫米阵列（NOEMA）对十个z > 8星系的约两百小时观测，在静止框架158微米、88微米以及所有数据中，分别未探测到显著的尘埃发射，1σ深度分别为2.0、2.0和1.5微央斯基。这限制了平均尘埃质量在3σ水平上低于10^5太阳质量，尘埃与恒星质量比低于3.7×10^{-4}（假设尘埃温度T_dust = 50 K，尘埃发射率指数β_dust = 2.0）。按红移（8 < z < 9.5和9.5 < z < 15）、紫外连续谱斜率（β_UV ≶ -2）和恒星质量（log10 M_*/M_⊙ ≶ 9）进行分箱分析，也得出了同样严格的限制。结合其他研究，这些结果与z > 8宇宙中尘埃积累效率低下的情况一致，可能原因包括超新星产生效率低、星际尘埃生长受限和/或外流导致的尘埃抛射。我们在线提供数据和工具，以促进社区范围内的高红移尘埃搜索。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：结合其他研究，结果表明z>8宇宙中尘埃积累效率低下，可能原因包括超新星产生效率低、星际尘埃生长受限和/或外流导致的尘埃抛射。研究提供了在线数据和工具以促进高红移尘埃搜索。

These results are compared against individually-detected galaxies at 4.4 < z < 6 4.4<z<6 indicated with grey circles ( Sommovigo2022 ) and 6 < z < 8 6<z<8 galaxies indicated with grey squares ( Bakx2021 ; Sommovigo2022REBELS ; Witstok2022 ; Fudamoto2022DustTemperatures ; Algera2024 ; Algera2024REBELS25 ; Valentino2024 ) . The sole source with a dust detection at z = 8.3 z=8.3 is shown as a blue star ( Tamura2019 ; Tamura2023 ; Bakx2020CII ) . Dust estimates from stacking experiments are shown as thin blue upper limits ( Ciesla2024 ) , and scaling relations from semi-analytical and hydrodynamical models that account for dust production are shown as trend lines between z = 7 z=7 to 9.5 9.5 ( Popping2017Dustproduction ; Imara2018 ; Vijayan2019 ; DiCesare2023 ; Esmerian2024 ; Triani2021 ; Dayal2022 ) . For two dust production models ( Popping2017Dustproduction ; Vijayan2019 ) , we show the maximum and average dust production scenarios in solid and dash-dotted lines respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图和右图分别显示单个星系（黑色圆圈）和两个不同恒星质量分箱（log10 M_*/M_⊙ ≶ 9；红色上限）的叠加结果中尘埃质量和尘埃与恒星质量比随恒星质量的变化。上限以3σ绘制，尘埃和恒星质量已修正透镜效应。这些结果与4.4 < z < 6的单个探测星系（灰色圆圈；Sommovigo2022）和6 < z < 8的星系（灰色方块；Bakx2021；Sommovigo2022REBELS；Witstok2022；Fudamoto2022DustTemperatures；Algera2024；Algera2024REBELS25；Valentino2024）进行比较。唯一在z=8.3处有尘埃探测的源以蓝色星号表示（Tamura2019；Tamura2023；Bakx2020CII）。来自叠加实验的尘埃估计以细蓝色上限表示（Ciesla2024），来自半解析和流体动力学模型（考虑尘埃产生）的比例关系以z=7至9.5的趋势线显示（Popping2017Dustproduction；Imara2018；Vijayan2019；DiCesare2023；Esmerian2024；Triani2021；Dayal2022）。对于两个尘埃产生模型（Popping2017Dustproduction；Vijayan2019），分别以实线和点划线显示最大和平均尘埃产生情景。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了已知最亮的z>6星系（AB星等23），即强引力透镜星系MACS0308-zD1（称为“宇宙之矛”，光谱红移z=6.2）中恒星族群的 spatially resolved 分析。新的JWST NIRCam成像和高分辨率NIRSpec IFU光谱覆盖了从紫外到光学的静止系波段。NIRCam成像揭示了明亮的恒星形成团块和一个由三个截然不同、极其致密的星团组成的尾状结构，这些星团因引力透镜效应而成像。这些星团的有效半径约为5秒差距，恒星质量约为10^6至10^7太阳质量，恒星质量面密度超过10^4太阳质量每平方秒差距。尽管它们的恒星族群非常年轻（约5-9百万年），但它们的动力学年龄超过1，这与星团是引力束缚系统一致。将这些星团置于大小与恒星质量面密度的平面中，我们发现它们占据了与最近JWST观测到的其他高红移星系中星团相似的区域，比本地星团显著更大质量和更致密。对最亮团块的 spatially resolved 分析揭示了一个致密、强烈恒星形成的核心。该中心区域的电离光子产生效率略有抑制，可能表明由反馈驱动的通道促进了局部莱曼连续谱逃逸分数。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，早期宇宙中存在比本地星团更致密、质量更大的极端致密星团，这些星团在很年轻时就能形成引力束缚系统。中心区域的电离光子产生效率抑制可能暗示着反馈机制促进了LyC光子的逃逸，这对理解早期宇宙的再电离过程具有重要意义。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: NIRCam color image (red: F277W+F356W, green: F150W+F200W, and blue: F090W+F115W) of the Cosmic Spear, at z = 6.2 z=6.2 , in the background of galaxy cluster MACS J0308+2645 at z = 0.356 z=0.356 . The strongly-lensed galaxy (shown in the two right panels) is resolved into two main components: a pair of large, bright star-forming clumps (1 and 2), and an arc containing three distinct star clusters (3, 4, and 5) which are multiply imaged into seven sources (3a, 3b, 3c, 4a, 4b, 5a, and 5b). The top-left corner inset shows a counter-image identified from the lens model. It reveals a clumpy morphology, with three distinct substructures (lower limit). The red line represents a lensing critical curve at z = 6.2 z=6.2 , while the white lines show contours of constant magnifications.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：宇宙之矛（红移z=6.2）的NIRCam彩色图像（红色：F277W+F356W，绿色：F150W+F200W，蓝色：F090W+F115W），背景为红移z=0.356的星系团MACS J0308+2645。强透镜星系（右侧两图所示）分解为两个主要成分：一对大而明亮的恒星形成团块（1和2），以及一个包含三个不同星团（3、4和5）的弧，这些星团被多重成像为七个源（3a、3b、3c、4a、4b、5a和5b）。左上角插图为透镜模型识别出的对应像，显示团块形态，具有三个不同的子结构（下限）。红线表示红移z=6.2的透镜临界曲线，白线显示恒定放大率等高线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Results of morphological modeling using GALFIT applied to eleven NIRCam filters. In the modeling, the galaxy is decomposed into ten components: the diffuse light of the host galaxy underlying the arc (i.e., tail), two bright clumps, and seven compact sources associated with the multiple images of the star clusters. In the residual images, red, white, and blue colors are for positive, zero, and negative values, respectively. The reduced chi-square ( χ ν 2 \chi_{\nu}^{2} ) values are shown in the bottom-right corner of the residual maps.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：使用GALFIT对十一个NIRCam滤光片进行形态建模的结果。在建模中，星系被分解为十个成分：弧下宿主星系的弥散光（即尾状结构）、两个明亮团块，以及与星团多重像相关的七个致密源。在残差图像中，红色、白色和蓝色分别表示正值、零值和负值。约化卡方值显示在残差图的右下角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Spectrophotometric data cube constructed by combining NIRCam imaging and NIRSpec IFU data using piXedfit . This data cube is used for spatially resolved SED fitting of the clumps. To create the data cube, the datasets were spatially and spectrally aligned through PSF matching to the spatial resolution of the longest-wavelength grid of the NIRSpec G395H/F290LP data, resampling to a pixel scale of 0 ​ . ′ ′ ​ 1 0\farcs 1 , and aligning normalization between the spectra and the photometry for consistency. The top-left panel displays the [OIII] λ ​ 5007 \lambda\,5007 map, derived from the NIRSpec IFU data by integrating the spectra accross a narrow ( 100 ​ Å 100\,\AA ) wavelength grids centered at the emission line wavelength. The remaining panels show the NIRCam images following spatial alignment and PSF matching to the NIRSpec IFU resolution. The IFU’s FoV is apparent in the top-left panel and is outlined by the white box in the rest of the panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：使用piXedfit结合NIRCam成像和NIRSpec IFU数据构建的光谱光度数据立方体。该数据立方体用于团块的 spatially resolved SED拟合。为创建数据立方体，数据集通过PSF匹配在空间和光谱上对齐至NIRSpec G395H/F290LP数据最长波长网格的空间分辨率，重采样至0.1角秒的像素尺度，并调整光谱与测光之间的归一化以确保一致性。左上图显示[OIII] λ5007图，由NIRSpec IFU数据在发射线波长中心窄波段（100埃）上积分光谱得到。其余图显示空间对齐和PSF匹配至NIRSpec IFU分辨率后的NIRCam图像。IFU的视场在左上图中可见，并在其他图中由白色方框标出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Results of the SED fitting for the clumps, star clusters (using stacked photometry), and the counter-image, performed with bagpipes . The SED of the star clusters (3, 4, and 5) are obtained from stacking the photometry of their multiple images. In each panel, the observed photometry is shown as green circles. The best-fit model is represented by the blue squares (photometry) and the black line (spectrum).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：使用bagpipes对团块、星团（使用堆叠测光）和对应像进行SED拟合的结果。星团（3、4和5）的SED来自其多重像测光的堆叠。在每个图中，观测测光以绿色圆圈显示。最佳拟合模型以蓝色方块（测光）和黑色线（光谱）表示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Reconstructed SFH of the clumps 1, 2, and counter-image, obtained from fitting photometry with bagpipes using multiple SFH models: non-parametric SFH with continuity prior (J. Leja et al., 2019 ) , delayed tau, double-power law, and exponentially declining. In each panel, different colors represent different SFH models applied in the SED fitting, and the purple line and shaded region show SFH inferred by prospector for comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：团块1、2和对应像的重建恒星形成历史，通过使用多种SFH模型（具有连续性先验的非参数SFH (J. Leja et al., 2019)、延迟tau模型、双幂律模型和指数衰减模型）拟合bagpipes测光得到。在每个图中，不同颜色代表SED拟合中应用的不同SFH模型，紫色线和阴影区域显示prospector推断的SFH以作比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Spectrophotometric SED fits of clumps 1 and 2, and star clusters 3a and 4a, obtained using piXedfit . The black and red spectra represent the observed and best-fit model spectra, respectively, while the green circles and blue open-squares show the corresponding observed and best-fit model photometry. The vertical dashed cyan lines indicate the detected emission lines: HeII λ \lambda 1640, C iii ] λ ​ λ \lambda\lambda 1907,1909, [O ii ] λ ​ λ \lambda\lambda 3726,3729, [Ne iii ] λ \lambda 3870, [Ne iii ] λ \lambda 3969, H δ \delta , H γ \gamma , [O iii ] λ \lambda 4363, H β \beta , [O iii ] λ \lambda 4959, [O iii ] λ \lambda 5007, HeI λ \lambda 5877, and H α \alpha . The emission lines are fitted with a single Gaussian profile. The vertical shaded regions indicate the gaps between the detector chips. The cyan ellipses and circles denote the apertures used for calculating the integrated spectrophotometric SEDs.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：使用piXedfit获得的团块1和2以及星团3a和4a的光谱光度SED拟合。黑色和红色光谱分别表示观测和最佳拟合模型光谱，绿色圆圈和蓝色空心方块显示相应的观测和最佳拟合模型测光。垂直虚线青色线表示检测到的发射线：HeII λ1640、C iii] λλ1907,1909、[O ii] λλ3726,3729、[Ne iii] λ3870、[Ne iii] λ3969、Hδ、Hγ、[O iii] λ4363、Hβ、[O iii] λ4959、[O iii] λ5007、HeI λ5877和Hα。发射线使用单高斯轮廓拟合。垂直阴影区域表示探测器芯片之间的间隙。青色椭圆和圆圈表示用于计算积分光谱光度SED的孔径。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 背景：近期，JWST/NIRSpec观测首次在红移z>3的高红移低质量星系中探测到温暖电离外流，其出现率取决于发射线强度，约为25-40%。这一比例低于模拟预测，模拟表明快速外流气体应是早期宇宙中所有恒星形成星系的普遍特征。目的：为了更好地理解模拟与观测之间的差异，我们利用TNG50宇宙学模拟和SERRA zoom-in模拟识别并表征高红移星系中的外流。我们的研究考察了外流可探测性如何依赖于视线方向，探索了快速气体的性质，并研究了其与关键星系属性的关系。方法：我们分析了红移范围z=3-5的TNG50中约60000个星系和红移范围z=4-5的SERRA中约3000个星系，其恒星质量范围为Mstar=10^7.5-10^11 Msun。使用高斯混合模型算法，以气体速度、恒星形成率和位置为输入参数，识别每个星系附近的外流。随后，我们将模拟外流与JWST/JADES NIRSpec巡天观测到的外流进行比较。结果：TNG50和SERRA中的外流质量大致在约0.5 dex范围内重现了JWST/JADES的测量结果，尽管模拟倾向于预测略高的值，这表明光学发射线仅捕获了多相外流的一部分。然而，模拟的外流速度通常比观测推断的低一个数量级。TNG50显示出明显的方向依赖性：正面星系中外流的可探测性比边缘星系高约15%，对于质量更大、盘状星系，这一差异增加到近40%。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：模拟与观测在外流质量上基本一致，但速度存在显著差异，可能反映了观测推断方法或模拟物理的局限性。外流可探测性强烈依赖于视线方向，这有助于解释观测发生率低于模拟预测的现象。研究强调了考虑观测几何效应对于正确比较模拟与观测的重要性。

Black stars represent galaxy observations from JADES.
