figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Surface mass density profiles Δ ​ Σ \Delta\Sigma obtained from weak lensing measurements and the results of fitting the inner profiles. Different panels show results for different stellar mass bins. The green points show the observational results from stacked weak gravitational lensing. The magenta dash-dotted, the orange dashed, and the red solid lines indicate the stellar matter component, the dark matter component, and the total mass, respectively. The shaded region denotes the fitting range.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：从弱透镜测量获得的表面质量密度轮廓ΔΣ以及内轮廓拟合结果。不同面板显示不同恒星质量区间的结果。绿色点显示来自叠加弱引力透镜的观测结果。品红点划线、橙色虚线和红色实线分别表示恒星物质成分、暗物质成分和总质量。阴影区域表示拟合范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison of best-fit stellar masses M ⋆ , fit M_{\star,{fit}} with those measured from the HSC-SSP photometric data, M ⋆ , in M_{\star,{in}} . The blue points show our results and the dashed line shows M ⋆ , fit = M ⋆ , in M_{\star,{fit}}=M_{\star,{in}} . Points shown by the lighter color might be affected by systematic errors and therefore should be interpreted with caution (see the text for more details).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：最佳拟合恒星质量M⋆,fit与从HSC-SSP测光数据测量的M⋆,in的比较。蓝色点显示我们的结果，虚线显示M⋆,fit = M⋆,in。颜色较浅的点可能受系统误差影响，因此应谨慎解读（详见正文）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The projected constraint on parameters from the inner profile fitting in the γ \gamma - r c r_{{c}} plane. Different panels show results for different stellar mass bins.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在γ - r_c平面内轮廓拟合参数的投影约束。不同面板显示不同恒星质量区间的结果。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Parameters used in the outer profile fitting. Here, M NFW M_{{NFW}} corresponds to M M in Section 2.3 . The errors are shown at the 1 ​ σ 1\sigma level.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：外轮廓拟合中使用的参数。这里，M_NFW对应于第2.3节中的M。误差显示在1σ水平。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison between the dark matter density profile obtained from the inner profile fitting and the NFW profile fitted to the outer lensing profile, where the NFW profile includes additional contributions from the satellite component as well as 2-halo term (see Equation 21 ). Different panels show results for different stellar mass bins. The orange dashed and blue solid lines indicate the dark matter distribution inferred from inner profile fitting and the NFW profile from the outer profile fitting, respectively. The magenta-shaded region denotes the inner-fitting range, and the light-blue shaded region shows the outer-fitting range.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：内轮廓拟合得到的暗物质密度轮廓与拟合外透镜轮廓的NFW轮廓的比较，其中NFW轮廓包括卫星成分和2-晕项的额外贡献（见方程21）。不同面板显示不同恒星质量区间的结果。橙色虚线和蓝色实线分别表示内轮廓拟合推断的暗物质分布和外轮廓拟合的NFW轮廓。品红阴影区域表示内拟合范围，浅蓝色阴影区域表示外拟合范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The ratio of the surface mass densities f Σ ​ ( r ) f_{\Sigma}(r) defined in Equation ( 28 ). The shaded regions represent the 1 ​ σ 1\sigma , 2 ​ σ 2\sigma , and 3 ​ σ 3\sigma confidence intervals from darker to lighter colors. The vertical dashed line shows r = 5 ​ r e r=5r_{{e}} . Different panels show results for different stellar mass bins.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：方程(28)定义的表面质量密度比fΣ(r)。阴影区域从深到浅表示1σ、2σ和3σ置信区间。垂直虚线表示r = 5r_e。不同面板显示不同恒星质量区间的结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Same as Figure 5 , but for f Δ ​ Σ ​ ( r ) f_{\Delta\Sigma}(r) defined in Equation ( 29 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：与图5相同，但针对方程(29)定义的fΔΣ(r)。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 恒星和活动星系核驱动的反馈过程影响从星系内部到星系际介质广泛尺度上的气体分布。然而，反馈如何通过其与关键星系属性的联系来塑造宿主晕中的径向气体密度剖面仍不清楚。我们利用EAGLE、IllustrisTNG和Simba宇宙学流体动力学模拟套件（涵盖多种反馈模型）来探讨这一问题。我们开发了一种随机森林算法，该算法根据总晕质量和中心星系的五个全局属性（气体质量、恒星质量、恒星形成率、中心黑洞质量及吸积率）预测晕内径向气体密度剖面。该算法在晕质量范围10^9.5 M_sun < M_200c < 10^15 M_sun和红移区间0<z<4内，以约80-90%的平均精度再现了模拟的气体密度剖面。我们首次将Sobol统计敏感性分析应用于完整的宇宙学流体动力学模拟，量化了每个特征如何随距晕中心距离影响气体密度。在所有模拟和红移中，总晕质量和中心星系的气体质量与晕气体分布关联最强，而恒星和黑洞属性通常信息量较少。不同特征的确切相对重要性取决于反馈情景和红移。我们的框架可以轻松嵌入星系形成的半解析模型中，以纳入与不同流体动力学模拟一致的晕气体密度剖面。我们的工作也为利用未来对星系属性和周围气体分布的观测来约束反馈模型提供了概念验证。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: （基于可用摘要翻译）该框架可嵌入星系形成的半解析模型，纳入与不同流体动力学模拟一致的晕气体密度剖面。为利用未来星系属性和周围气体分布观测约束反馈模型提供了概念验证。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Properties of the simulations utilised in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中使用的模拟属性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Spherically averaged radial profiles of the total gas density around haloes in the test sets extracted from the EAGLE-100, IllustrisTNG, and Simba-100 simulations (top, middle, and bottom panels, respectively) at redshift z = 0 z=0 . The solid lines show the mean gas density profile of haloes in the M 200 ​ c M_{200c} bin indicated on top of every panel. The corresponding number of haloes is reported in the upper-right corner. The error bars represent the 16 th − 84 th 16^{th}-84^{th} percentile spread across the halo sample. The dotted vertical lines mark the 0.05 ​ R 200 ​ c − R 200 ​ c 0.05\,R_{200c}-R_{200c} radial range, wherein we aim to recover the simulated density profiles through our RF algorithm. The mean of the predicted density profiles is shown by the dashed lines, and the shaded areas represent the 16 th − 84 th 16^{th}-84^{th} spread in the predictions. In all flagship simulations considered, the RF algorithm accurately recovers both the mean and scatter of the gas density profiles around haloes over several orders of magnitude in M 200 ​ c M_{200c} . It performs less accurately in Simba-100 at the high-mass end.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在红移z=0时，从EAGLE-100、IllustrisTNG和Simba-100模拟（分别对应上、中、下面板）的测试集中提取的晕周围总气体密度的球平均径向剖面。实线显示每个面板顶部指示的M_200c区间内晕的平均气体密度剖面。相应晕的数量显示在右上角。误差棒表示晕样本的16th-84th百分位分布。垂直虚线标记0.05 R_200c至R_200c的径向范围，我们旨在通过RF算法在此范围内恢复模拟密度剖面。虚线显示预测密度剖面的平均值，阴影区域表示预测的16th-84th分布。在所有考虑的旗舰模拟中，RF算法在M_200c的几个数量级上准确恢复了晕周围气体密度剖面的平均值和离散度。在Simba-100的高质量端，其表现稍差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Modified inverse hyperbolic sine function (solid line) as defined in equation ( 1 ), which we applied to a subset of the input features ( M ˙ ⋆ \dot{M}_{\star} , M ˙ BH \dot{M}_{BH} , M BH M_{BH} ) to improve the performance of the RF algorithm (see § 3.2 for details). For masses above ∼ 7 ​ M ⊙ \sim 7\>{M}_{\odot} (or accretion rates above ∼ 7 ​ M ⊙ ​ yr − 1 \sim 7\>{M}_{\odot}\,yr^{-1} ), the function asymptotes to the decimal logarithm. As the property in question approaches zero, the function is well approximated by a linear relationship. In this figure, we zoom in the region where the smooth transition from linear to logarithmic regimes occurs. Crucially for properties such as the SFR, BH mass and accretion rate, the function is well defined at zero, thus making it preferable over a pure logarithmic function. At the same time, the scaling will be effectively logarithmic for large values of the input features. For example, the black hole mass can assume values ranging from zero to as large as ∼ 10 10 ​ M ⊙ \sim 10^{10}\>{M}_{\odot} ; the modified inverse hyperbolic sine is well defined in zero, while effectively scaling the BH mass logarithmically for M BH ≫ 7 ​ M ⊙ M_{BH}\gg 7\,\>{M}_{\odot} .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：方程(1)中定义的修正反双曲正弦函数（实线），我们将其应用于部分输入特征（M_dot_star、M_dot_BH、M_BH）以提高RF算法的性能（详见§3.2）。对于质量大于约7 M_sun（或吸积率大于约7 M_sun/yr）的情况，该函数渐近于常用对数。当所考虑属性趋近于零时，该函数近似为线性关系。本图放大了从线性到对数区域平滑过渡的区域。对于恒星形成率、黑洞质量和吸积率等属性至关重要的是，该函数在零处定义良好，因此优于纯对数函数。同时，对于大的输入特征值，该缩放将有效地呈对数形式。例如，黑洞质量可以从零变化到高达约10^10 M_sun；修正反双曲正弦函数在零处定义良好，同时对于M_BH >> 7 M_sun，有效地对黑洞质量进行对数缩放。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Spherically averaged comoving radial profiles of the total gas density around haloes in the test set extracted from IllustrisTNG simulations at redshift z = 0 z=0 . Each panel refers to the gas density profiles of haloes within the M 200 ​ c M_{200c} bin indicated in the top of the column, hosting a central galaxy with total gas mass in the range annotated within the panel itself. The number of haloes falling within the 2D bin is reported in the upper-left corner of the panel. The profiles obtained directly from the simulations, and the predictions of the RF algorithm, following the same colour coding, line styles, and error bars as in the middle panel of Figure 1 . The inset within every panel shows the ratio between the predicted and true gas density profiles in the corresponding M 200 ​ c M_{200c} – M gas M_{gas} bin, over the relevant radial range. Our RF algorithm generally recovers the true gas density profiles within 10%. Considering the low statistics of input features, and the wide dynamic range of the gas density profiles, spanning up to four orders of magnitude, this is a remarkable achievement.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在红移z=0时，从IllustrisTNG模拟测试集中提取的晕周围总气体密度的球平均共动径向剖面。每个面板对应列顶部指示的M_200c区间内的晕的气体密度剖面，这些晕的中心星系总气体质量在面板内标注的范围内。落在二维区间内的晕的数量显示在面板左上角。直接从模拟获得的剖面和RF算法的预测遵循与图1中间面板相同的颜色编码、线型和误差棒。每个面板内的插图显示了相应M_200c-M_gas区间内预测与真实气体密度剖面在相关径向范围内的比值。我们的RF算法通常在10%以内恢复真实气体密度剖面。考虑到输入特征数量较少以及气体密度剖面跨越高达四个数量级的宽动态范围，这是一项显著的成就。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Average accuracy of the RF algorithm, as defined in § 4 , at reproducing the gas density profiles in the test sets of the EAGLE-100, IllustrisTNG, and Simba-100 simulations at redshift z = 0 z=0 , as a function of the radial distance from the centre of the halo. The error bars indicate the 16 th − 84 th 16^{th}-84^{th} percentile spread of the accuracy within each 2D-bin of M 200 ​ c M_{200c} and M gas M_{gas} , the bounds of which are indicated in the upper part of the figure and in the annotation within each panel, respectively. The highest mean accuracy is above 90% for EAGLE-100 and IllustrisTNG, and about 85% for Simba-100. In general, the accuracy does not vary significantly over radial distance, although it can decay closer to the halo centre in specific 2D bins.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：RF算法在红移z=0时，在EAGLE-100、IllustrisTNG和Simba-100模拟测试集中再现气体密度剖面的平均精度（如§4所定义），作为距晕中心径向距离的函数。误差棒表示每个M_200c和M_gas二维区间内精度的16th-84th百分位分布，区间边界分别显示在图的上部和每个面板的注释中。EAGLE-100和IllustrisTNG的最高平均精度超过90%，Simba-100约为85%。总体而言，精度随径向距离变化不大，但在特定二维区间内，靠近晕中心时精度可能下降。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Overall accuracy of the RF algorithm at reproducing the gas density profiles in all simulations considered, averaged over all radial bins and all haloes, as a function of redshift (see § 4 for details). The left panel shows the results for the training set: the accuracy is above 92% for all simulations, highlighting the self-consistency of the algorithm. The right panel shows the results for the test set: all flagship simulations maintain a high accuracy ( ∼ \sim 85% for Simba-100, ∼ \sim 90% for EAGLE-100 and IllustrisTNG) down to z = 1 z=1 , with a few-percent decay at z = 0 z=0 . Nevertheless, this test proves that the algorithm can reproduce with high fidelity density profiles over which it was not trained, hence underscoring its predictive power.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：RF算法在所有考虑的模拟中再现气体密度剖面的总体精度，对所有径向区间和所有晕进行平均，作为红移的函数（详见§4）。左面板显示训练集的结果：所有模拟的精度均高于92%，突出了算法的自洽性。右面板显示测试集的结果：所有旗舰模拟在红移z=1时保持高精度（Simba-100约85%，EAGLE-100和IllustrisTNG约90%），在z=0时下降几个百分点。尽管如此，该测试证明算法能够高保真地再现其未训练过的密度剖面，从而强调了其预测能力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Sampling of the parameter space of the input features obtained from generating a Saltelli sequence (Saltelli et al., 2010 ) This technique, combined with the modified inverse hyperbolic sine function applied to certain features ( M ˙ ⋆ \dot{M}_{\star} , M ˙ BH \dot{M}_{BH} , M BH M_{BH} ; see § 3.2 and Figure 2 ), ensures unbiased sampling over several orders of magnitudes, including null values. For illustrative purposes, this figure refers to a Saltelli sequence with index N S = 2 7 N_{S}=2^{7} , but we adopted N S = 2 14 N_{S}=2^{14} in our analysis, to more finely sample the parameter space (see § 5.2 for details). In this figure, the boundaries each feature matches the ranges found for the Simba-100 simulation. We change them accordingly when we apply sensitivity analysis to other simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：通过生成Saltelli序列（Saltelli等人，2010）对输入特征参数空间进行采样。该技术结合应用于某些特征（M_dot_star、M_dot_BH、M_BH；见§3.2和图2）的修正反双曲正弦函数，确保了在几个数量级上的无偏采样，包括零值。为便于说明，本图参考了指数N_S=2^7的Saltelli序列，但我们在分析中采用了N_S=2^14，以更精细地采样参数空间（详见§5.2）。在本图中，每个特征的边界与Simba-100模拟中发现的取值范围相匹配。当我们将敏感性分析应用于其他模拟时，会相应更改这些边界。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Results of the Sobol sensitivity analysis applied to our RF algorithm. Each row of panels refers to a different flagship simulation, as indicated in the left part of the figure. Every column corresponds to a different redshift, as reported in the top of the figure. Within each panel, the data points represent the S 1 S_{1} Sobol coefficients representing the importance of a certain input feature in predicting the gas density profile at different radial bins. Each feature is associated with a different colour and marker style, as indicated in the legend. The error bars report the 95% confidence level associated with the S 1 S_{1} coefficients at each radial bin. In every panel, the solid lines represent the S T S_{T} Sobol coefficients, and the shaded areas the corresponding 95% confidence level. The colour coding for the S T S_{T} coefficients is the same as for the S 1 S_{1} coefficients. The grey shaded area in every panels represents the region within which the variance on the predicted density profile introduced by any input feature would be smaller than the intrinsic accuracy of the gas density profile predicted through our RF algorithm. Thus, input features with Sobol indexes falling below the threshold between the grey and white regions do not have a physically meaningful effect on the gas density profile at the radial bin considered. In all simulations and at all redshifts, the total gas mass of the central galaxy is the most impactful feature on the prediction of the as density profile. The SFR and the accretion rate of the BH in the central galaxy are the least consequential properties.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：应用于我们RF算法的Sobol敏感性分析结果。每行面板对应不同的旗舰模拟，如图左侧所示。每列对应不同的红移，如图顶部所示。在每个面板内，数据点表示S_1 Sobol系数，代表某个输入特征在预测不同径向区间气体密度剖面时的重要性。每个特征关联不同的颜色和标记样式，如图例所示。误差棒报告每个径向区间S_1系数的95%置信水平。在每个面板中，实线表示S_T Sobol系数，阴影区域表示相应的95%置信水平。S_T系数的颜色编码与S_1系数相同。每个面板中的灰色阴影区域表示任何输入特征引入的预测密度剖面方差小于通过RF算法预测的气体密度剖面固有精度的区域。因此，Sobol指数低于灰色和白色区域之间阈值的输入特征在考虑的径向区间内对气体密度剖面没有物理上有意义的影响。在所有模拟和所有红移下，中心星系的总气体质量是对气体密度剖面预测影响最大的特征。中心星系的恒星形成率和黑洞吸积率是最不重要的属性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: AC114是一个具有历史意义的星系团，是20世纪90年代初哈勃太空望远镜发射前，最早从地面探测到的强引力透镜星系团之一。尽管早期备受关注，但十五年来未进行过详细的透镜分析。我们利用SLICE项目获得的JWST成像数据，辅以HST和X射线档案数据，对该星系团进行了研究。JWST数据揭示了十个新的多重成像系统，并使得在十六个系统中的几个系统中识别出共轭子结构成为可能，显著增加了强引力透镜约束的数量。利用这些数据，我们使用Lenstool构建了一个参数化质量模型，并通过明确纳入钱德拉数据，将其扩展为强透镜+X射线联合拟合。我们的最佳拟合模型以0.4角秒的均方根再现了多重图像，同时匹配了X射线数据。暗物质分布呈单峰状，中心位于最亮的星系团星系，具有83±5千秒差距的大核心半径，与其他强透镜星系团报告的值一致。强透镜约束要求包含一个外部剪切分量，其位置角明确指向西北方向约1兆秒差距处、同一红移的一个明确质量集中区，我们提议将其命名为AC114b。XMM-牛顿数据的空间覆盖范围涵盖了整个结构，使我们能够探测伴星系团的X射线性质以及AC114的热力学状态，为一次主要并合提供了证据，这与之前在钱德拉、射电和光学光谱数据中看到的迹象一致。我们的结果为并合情景提供了新见解，揭示了一次处于晚期碰撞后阶段的主要并合，其中AC114是主导系统，而AC114b可能已被剥离了其热气体。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要翻译：AC114星系团正处于晚期碰撞后阶段，是一个主要合并系统。研究揭示了其详细的暗物质分布和动力学状态，并识别出伴星系团AC114b。这些发现为理解星系团合并过程提供了新见解，展示了多波长观测在星系团研究中的重要性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Color image of the core of AC 114 produced with SAOImage ds9, using JWST/NIRCam F322W, F150W, and HST/ACS F814W in the red, green, and blue channels, respectively. Contours of the X-ray count maps from Chandra and XMM-Newton are shown in cyan and magenta, respectively, while radio contours from MeerKAT are shown in green. It lies at a projected distance of 210 ″ \arcsec (972 kpc) from the BCG. 100 ″ \arcsec corresponds to 463 kpc.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: csmooth Chandra X-ray contours are shown in cyan. The position of the BCG is marked by a yellow circle. Left: Mass contours derived from fitting the X-ray data only are shown in red. The gas distribution is modeled as a superposition of three dPIE profiles, whose positions are indicated by red circles. Right: Mass contours, shown in white, correspond to different models of the gas distribution used in the combined SL+X-ray fits. The positions of the dPIE components for each realisation are indicated by white circles.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：青色显示csmooth处理后的钱德拉X射线等值线。BCG的位置用黄色圆圈标记。左图：红色显示仅拟合X射线数据得出的质量等值线。气体分布被建模为三个dPIE轮廓的叠加，其位置由红色圆圈指示。右图：白色显示的质量等值线对应于联合SL+X射线拟合中使用的不同气体分布模型。每次实现中dPIE组件的位置由白色圆圈指示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Corner plots showing the posterior distributions of the main cluster parameters for the SL+X-ray fit (black) and for the SL only fit (violet): ellipticity e e , position angle θ \theta , core radius r core r_{core} and velocity dispersion σ \sigma of the DM mass distribution; velocity dispersion of the BCG σ bcg \sigma_{bcg} and strength of the external shear γ ext \gamma_{ext} . We also show in green the results obtained by fitting the SL constraints while including the description of the X-ray component derived in Section 4.2.1 from the X-ray only fit. The RMS is equal to 0.43 ″ \arcsec in all cases.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：角点图显示SL+X射线拟合（黑色）和仅SL拟合（紫色）中主要星团参数的后验分布：暗物质质量分布的椭圆率e、位置角θ、核心半径r_core和速度弥散σ；BCG的速度弥散σ_bcg和外部剪切强度γ_ext。绿色显示在纳入第4.2.1节中仅X射线拟合得出的X射线组件描述后，拟合SL约束的结果。所有情况下的RMS均为0.43角秒。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: dPIE parameters inferred for the mass model of AC 114, constrained using both SL and X-ray constraints, with an RMS equal to 0.43 ″ \arcsec . Error bars on all parameters quoted in this paper correspond to ± \pm 1σ \sigma confidence levels inferred from the MCMC optimisation. Coordinates are given in arcseconds relative to α \alpha = 344.701518, δ \delta = -34.802364; e e and θ \theta are the ellipticity and position angle of the mass distribution. Each parameter is given as the median with the best fit value in parenthesis except the ones fixed a priori that are shown in brackets. For an L* galaxy, we have σ \sigma = 187 ± \pm 5 km s -1 and r s r_{s} = 11 ± \pm 1.2 ″ \arcsec . The external shear component is equal to 0.11 ± \pm 0.01, with an angle of 138.1 ± \pm 0.8.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：使用SL和X射线约束推断的AC 114质量模型的dPIE参数，RMS为0.43角秒。本文引用的所有参数误差条对应于从MCMC优化推断的±1σ置信水平。坐标以角秒给出，相对于α=344.701518，δ=-34.802364；e和θ是质量分布的椭圆率和位置角。每个参数以中位数给出，括号内为最佳拟合值，预先固定的参数显示在方括号中。对于L*星系，σ=187±5 km/s，r_s=11±1.2角秒。外部剪切分量为0.11±0.01，角度为138.1±0.8。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 活动星系核（AGN）风在超大质量黑洞与其宿主星系的共同演化中扮演重要角色，但其驱动机制及对恒星形成的影响仍是活跃的研究课题。关键问题在于，目前缺乏X射线积分场单元，限制了我们在X射线波段获取空间分辨速度信息的能力。然而，詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）可以实现这一目标。作为对邻近明亮AGN NGC 7469核反馈过程持续研究的一部分，我们利用近红外足迹线（如[Mg VIII] 3.03微米）分析了X射线发射外流的运动学。这些高电离发射线与X射线分析中的同一气体相关，因此可用于探测X射线风速度结构和电离状态的足迹。借助JWST的宽波长范围，我们还使用星云线（如[S IV] 10.51微米）和冕线（如[Ne V] 14.32微米）来提供外流的多相视图。我们给出了质量和动能外流率，并发现虽然NGC 7469中的反馈过程在理论基准下效率不高，但质量最大、能量最高的成分是高电离X射线气体。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，JWST能够通过近红外高电离发射线有效追踪X射线外流的运动学特征，为研究活动星系核反馈机制提供了新的观测手段。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Multi-component spectral fit for the [Mg vii ] λ \lambda 5.50 μ \upmu m and adjacent H 2 S(7) emission lines over the full spatial extent of the observed emission. We also include a vertical gray line at systemic velocity.

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparing the morphology of the X-ray emission lines and the corresponding footprint lines. We find general agreement between them, with the caveats outlined in the text. The contour levels from outermost to innermost for N vi (f), O vii (f), and C vi Ly α \alpha are as follows: [0.15, 0.3, 0.6, 3], [0.35, 0.6, 1.2, 3, 5] and [0.22, 0.35, 0.6, 1.2] respectively and correspond to regions of equal count numbers. The Chandra images were PSF subtracted before creating the contours, as explained in Section 2.3 , and the PSF of the IR lines are shown as a circle in the lower right of each map 5 5 5 The MIRI PSF is calculated from the equation in Law_2023 . The NIRSpec PSF is approximated as 0 ​ . ′ ′ ​ 2 0\farcs 2 based on the models in Bentz_2025_NIRSpec_PSF and the reported size of the nuclear region in bianchin_goals-jwst_2024 . .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：比较X射线发射线和相应足迹线的形态。我们发现两者总体一致，但存在正文中概述的注意事项。N vi (f)、O vii (f) 和 C vi Ly α 的等高线从外到内分别为：[0.15, 0.3, 0.6, 3]、[0.35, 0.6, 1.2, 3, 5] 和 [0.22, 0.35, 0.6, 1.2]，对应等计数区域。Chandra图像在创建等高线前已减去PSF（如第2.3节所述），红外线的PSF在每个图右下角以圆圈显示。MIRI PSF根据Law_2023中的公式计算，NIRSpec PSF根据Bentz_2025_NIRSpec_PSF模型和bianchin_goals-jwst_2024中报告的核区域大小近似为0.2角秒。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: We show a continuum-subtracted map of the [Ar ii ] λ \lambda 6.99 μ \upmu m line, a star-formation indicator in MIRI/ch1 to demonstrate the position of our regions with respect to the star-forming ring. The map was created using QFitsView ( Ott2012 ) . The actual spaxels making up each region are shown in the lower left inlay. The white dashed region is the redshifted outflow region detailed in Appendix A .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们展示了MIRI/ch1中恒星形成指示剂[Ar ii] λ 6.99 μm 线的连续谱减除图，以显示我们区域相对于恒星形成环的位置。该图使用QFitsView（Ott2012）创建。我们叠加了每个圆形感兴趣区域距中心的平均距离，以及这些圆进一步分为六个方向（东、东北、西北、西、西南、东南）的方式。构成每个区域的实际空间像素显示在左下角插图中。白色虚线区域是附录A中详述的红移外流区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Spatially resolved calculated outflow parameters. We show the distribution of the various parameters obtained by reporting the values obtained from each region as defined in Figure 5 . The negative distances correspond to the East side regions, while the positive distances correspond to the West. We split each parameter between the North, East-West, and South “cones" once again defined in Figure 5 . Finally, we split our values between the nebular, coronal, and footprint components as described in the text.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：空间分辨的外流参数计算。我们展示了通过报告图5中定义的每个区域获得的值而得到的各种参数分布。负距离对应东侧区域，正距离对应西侧。我们将每个参数分为北、东西和南“锥体”，同样在图5中定义。最后，我们将值分为星云、冕和足迹分量，如正文所述。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 为了评估冷中性介质（CNM）在云尺度重子循环中的作用，我们对极端恒星形成区30 Doradus（30 Dor）及其周围的CNM进行了高分辨率研究。研究中使用了银河系澳大利亚平方公里阵列探路者H I巡天数据，生成了7 pc尺度的H I发射和吸收立方体。为分析30 Dor方向的CNM结构，我们将H I吸收立方体分解为862个高斯分量，发现这些分量分布在四个速度区间（B1、B2、B3和B4）：200–230 km s⁻¹、230–260 km s⁻¹、260–277 km s⁻¹和277–300 km s⁻¹。我们推导了视线平均自旋温度和经过不透明度校正的总H I柱密度，并表明B1–B4结构具有系统性差异，表明它们在物理上是不同的。关于观测到的CNM结构的性质，我们发现B2与主致密结构相关，其中电离气体、原子气体和分子气体集中。B3和B4示踪了内流，其总质量通量率为0.14 M☉ yr⁻¹，与当前恒星形成率相当，而B1探测了外流，其质量通量率低得多，为0.007 M☉ yr⁻¹。有趣的是，B1–B4中的H I柱密度几乎均匀，空间变化仅有两倍，这表明存在用于H₂形成的H I屏蔽层。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：30 Doradus中的CNM结构具有系统性差异，分别对应不同的物理过程；内流质量通量与恒星形成率相当，表明CNM在维持恒星形成中起重要作用；均匀的HI柱密度分布暗示HI屏蔽层对分子云形成的重要性。

(Right) Median of the spectra at the off-source points is shown in black, while the 1σ \sigma error computed from the distribution of the brightness temperatures in each velocity channel is indicated as the gray envelope. This error dominates the precision of our absorption and emission-only spectra.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：泄漏谱的推导。（左）用于推导高分辨率立方体中泄漏谱的184个离源点以白点显示。彩色连续谱图像与图2相同，但覆盖范围稍大。（右）离源点光谱的中位数以黑色显示，根据每个速度通道的亮度温度分布计算的1σ误差以灰色包络表示。该误差主导了我们吸收和纯发射光谱的精度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: (Left) 1/ σ emt 2 \sigma_{\textrm{emt}}^{2} -weighted mean 1 − e − τ ​ ( \varv ) 1-e^{-\tau(\varv)} spectrum. (Right) 1/ σ em-only 2 \sigma_{\textrm{em-only}}^{2} -weighted mean emission-only spectrum. To produce these two spectra, the same unmasked 225 pixels in the absorption and emission-only cubes were used.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：（左）1/σ_emt²加权平均的1−e^{−τ(v)}谱。（右）1/σ_em-only²加权平均的纯发射谱。为生成这两个谱，使用了吸收和纯发射立方体中相同的225个未掩蔽像素。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Spatial distributions of the integrated 1 − e − τ ​ ( \varv ) 1-e^{-\tau(\varv)} (left) and T em − only T_{{em-only}} (right). The entire velocity range of 200–300 km s -1 over which H i absorption and emission are clearly detected was used to produce the maps.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：积分1−e^{−τ(v)}（左）和T_em-only（右）的空间分布。使用了H I吸收和发射清晰检测到的整个速度范围200–300 km s⁻¹来生成这些图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Derivation of the emission-only spectrum for the pixel at ( α , δ ) J2000 (\alpha,\delta)_{\textrm{J2000}} = (05 h {}^{\textrm{h}} 38 m {}^{\textrm{m}} 45.7 s {}^{\textrm{s}} , − - 69 ° \degree 05 ′ 20 ′′ ). The blue curve shows the spectrum from the high-resolution cube along with the 1σ \sigma envelope that arises from both the radiometer noises and the uncertainties in the leakage spectrum. Dividing the blue curve by the continuum ( ∼ \sim 310 K) results in the absorption spectrum e − τ ​ ( \varv ) e^{-\tau(\varv)} . The green curve is the corresponding spectrum measured in the low-resolution cube. As described in Section 2.1.7 , the tan curve is obtained by multiplying the absorption spectrum by the continuum of the green curve ( ∼ \sim 340 K), and subtracting the tan curve from the green curve leads to the black curve, which contains emission only. The error envelopes of the blue and black curves originate mostly from the uncertainties in the leakage spectrum.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：像素(α, δ)J2000 = (05h 38m 45.7s, −69°05′20″)的纯发射谱推导。蓝色曲线显示来自高分辨率立方体的谱，以及由辐射计噪声和泄漏谱不确定性引起的1σ包络。将蓝色曲线除以连续谱（约310 K）得到吸收谱e^{−τ(v)}。绿色曲线是低分辨率立方体中测量的相应谱。如第2.1.7节所述，将吸收谱乘以绿色曲线的连续谱（约340 K）得到棕褐色曲线，从绿色曲线中减去棕褐色曲线得到黑色曲线，其中仅包含发射。蓝色和黑色曲线的误差包络主要源于泄漏谱的不确定性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙微波背景（CMB）中的次级各向异性包含可用于检验宇宙学模型和星系形成模型的信息。基于光锥HEALPix图和星表，我们提出了一套新的自洽模拟CMB图，这些图来自FLAMINGO宇宙学流体动力学模拟套件，包括CMB透镜效应、热学和运动学Sunyaev-Zeldovich效应、宇宙红外背景、射电点源以及各向异性屏蔽图。我们表明，这些模拟再现了广泛的观测约束。我们还将我们的模拟与先前基于暗物质-only模拟的预测进行了比较，这些模拟通常独立地模拟次级各向异性，结论是我们的流体动力学模拟模拟在匹配观测方面至少与先前的模拟一样好，同时保持了不同成分预测的自洽性。利用FLAMINGO中的模型变化，我们进一步探讨了信号如何依赖于宇宙学和反馈建模，并预测了某些信号之间的互相关，这些互相关与先前模拟中的显著不同。这些模拟CMB图应为探索不同次级各向异性之间以及它们与其他大尺度结构示踪物之间的相关性提供宝贵资源，并可应用于未来巡天观测的预测研究。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该套自洽的CMB模拟地图为探索不同次级各向异性之间以及它们与其他大尺度结构示踪物之间的相关性提供了宝贵资源，可应用于未来巡天观测的预测研究。

figures.caption_zh: 表1：不同FLAMINGO模拟中采用的宇宙学参数。此处仅列出本工作中使用的模型（完整表格请参见Schaye等人，2023年）。这些参数包括：无量纲哈勃常数h；总物质密度参数Ω_m；暗能量密度参数Ω_Λ；重子物质密度参数Ω_b；中微子粒子质量之和Σ m_ν c^2；原初物质功率谱振幅A_s；原初物质功率谱的幂律指数n_s；初始功率谱振幅，参数化为半径为8 h^{-1} Mpc的球体内均方根质量密度涨落，并使用线性理论外推到z=0，即σ_8；初始功率谱振幅，参数化为S_8 ≡ σ_8 √(Ω_m/0.3)；中微子物质密度参数Ω_ν ≅ Σ m_ν c^2 / (93.14 h^2 eV)。注意，哈勃参数和密度参数的值在z=0处给出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Constraints on the β d \beta_{d} , T 0 T_{0} , and α \alpha parameters of the SED of the CIB model, obtained by fitting to the 353/545/857 GHz auto-power spectrum measurements from Lenz et al. ( 2019 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：通过拟合Lenz等人（2019年）的353/545/857 GHz自功率谱测量，得到的CIB模型SED的β_d、T_0和α参数约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The 150 MHz radio luminosity function (RLF) reconstructed from the black hole particle lightcone in the fiducial ( 1 ​ Gpc ) 3 (1~{Gpc})^{3} run. This is an example showing the case for a black hole selection of λ Edd < 10 − 2 \lambda_{Edd}<10^{-2} over the redshift range 0.5 < z < 1.0 0.5<z<1.0 . The observed RLF from the LOFAR survey within the same redshift interval (black points), as well as its best-fitting parametric model (red thick dashed line), are overplotted for comparison (see Kondapally et al. , 2022 ) . Abundance matching is used to map from the bolometric luminosity function of black holes in the simulation to the observed RLF (see text).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：从基准(1 Gpc)^3运行的黑洞粒子光锥重建的150 MHz射电光度函数（RLF）。此示例展示了在红移范围0.5 < z < 1.0内，对黑洞选择λ_Edd < 10^{-2}的情况。为进行比较，叠加了同一红移区间内LOFAR巡天观测到的RLF（黑色点）及其最佳拟合参数模型（红色粗虚线）（参见Kondapally等人，2022年）。使用丰度匹配将模拟中黑洞的辐射光度函数映射到观测到的RLF（见正文）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison of the differential source number counts between observations and simulations. The blue, orange, and green solid curves are the best-fitting source count models for the three black hole selections considered in this study (corresponding to different Eddington rate cuts), with the best-fitting α radio \alpha_{radio} values obtained by fitting to the measured SPT data at three frequencies (Everett et al. , 2020 ) (black diamonds) in the flux range S ν = 10 − 2 S_{\nu}=10^{-2} – 10 − 1 10^{-1} Jy. Other observations from the ACT (Vargas et al. , 2023 ) and Planck (Planck Collaboration et al. , 2018 ) are shown as violet triangles and light green crosses respectively. Results from the AGORA simulation are shown as a red thick dashed line for comparison. Overall, the simulations reproduce the number counts well.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：观测与模拟之间微分源数计数的比较。蓝色、橙色和绿色实线是本研究考虑的三种黑洞选择（对应不同的爱丁顿比率截断）的最佳拟合源计数模型，其最佳拟合α_radio值通过拟合三个频率的SPT测量数据（Everett等人，2020年）（黑色菱形）在通量范围S_ν = 10^{-2} – 10^{-1} Jy内获得。ACT（Vargas等人，2023年）和Planck（Planck Collaboration等人，2018年）的其他观测结果分别显示为紫色三角形和浅绿色十字。AGORA模拟的结果以红色粗虚线显示以进行比较。总体而言，模拟很好地再现了数计数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of the lensed and unlensed auto-power spectra of different LSS tracers from the fiducial ( 2.8 ​ Gpc ) 3 (2.8~Gpc)^{3} run. All curves are obtained by averaging over 8 independent lightcones. A 1- 2 % 2\% suppression of power at small scales is expected from foreground lensing effects.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自基准(2.8 Gpc)^3运行的不同大尺度结构示踪物的透镜和未透镜自功率谱比较。所有曲线通过对8个独立光锥取平均获得。在小尺度上，预期来自前景透镜效应的功率抑制为1-2%。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Full-sky mock intensity maps of the lensed thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich (tSZ) effect and its relativistic correction. These maps are generated from the lightcone outputs of the fiducial ( 2.8 ​ Gpc ) 3 (2.8~Gpc)^{3} run integrated up to z = 4.5 z=4.5 . Left : tSZ intensity map at 857 GHz, computed using Equation 3 (i.e., non-relativistic tSZ). Middle : Difference map between the relativistically corrected and non-relativistic tSZ intensity maps at the same frequency, with the relativistic corrections applied using SZpack . Right : the corresponding y y -weighted temperature map. Note the large differences in the color bar ranges across the three maps.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：透镜热Sunyaev–Zel'dovich（tSZ）效应及其相对论修正的全天模拟强度图。这些图由基准(2.8 Gpc)^3运行的光锥输出生成，积分至z=4.5。左图：857 GHz处的tSZ强度图，使用方程3计算（即非相对论tSZ）。中图：相同频率下相对论修正与非相对论tSZ强度图的差异图，相对论修正使用SZpack应用。右图：相应的y加权温度图。注意三张图中颜色条范围存在较大差异。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison of the tSZ angular power spectrum from different simulations. Thick dash-dot lines in different colors show results from the FLAMINGO ( 2.8 ​ Gpc ) 3 (2.8~Gpc)^{3} fiducial run and a subset of its ( 1 ​ Gpc ) 3 (1~Gpc)^{3} model variants, integrated up to z = 3.0 z=3.0 . The shaded region shows the spread obtained by averaging over 8 independent lightcones. The orange line shows the spectrum from the WebSky simulation. Solid lines are the spectra computed from the AGORA tSZ mock maps, calibrated against two BAHAMAS AGN models with heating temperatures of 10 7.8 10^{7.8} and 10 8.0 ​ K 10^{8.0}~K (the latter is the default AGORA gas model) using the HMx code of Mead et al. ( 2020 ) . Note that AGORA does not model the full gas distribution outside of haloes. For comparison, dashed lines show the corresponding results from the BAHAMAS simulations using the same AGN models, where the BAHAMAS maps are constructed in a lightcone with a field of view of 5 square degrees.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：不同模拟的tSZ角功率谱比较。不同颜色的粗点划线显示了FLAMINGO (2.8 Gpc)^3基准运行及其部分(1 Gpc)^3模型变体的结果，积分至z=3.0。阴影区域显示了通过对8个独立光锥取平均得到的弥散。橙色线显示了WebSky模拟的谱。实线是AGORA tSZ模拟图计算的谱，使用Mead等人（2020年）的HMx代码，针对两个BAHAMAS AGN模型进行校准，加热温度分别为10^{7.8}和10^{8.0} K（后者是默认的AGORA气体模型）。注意，AGORA不模拟晕外部的完整气体分布。为进行比较，虚线显示了使用相同AGN模型的BAHAMAS模拟的相应结果，其中BAHAMAS图在视场为5平方度的光锥中构建。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: tSZ monopole measured from observations and from different FLAMINGO model variations. For each model, the predicted monopole is estimated by averaging the mock full-sky Compton y y map integrated up to z = 3.0 z=3.0 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：从观测和不同FLAMINGO模型变体测量的tSZ单极子。对于每个模型，预测的单极子通过对模拟的全天Compton y图取平均来估计，积分至z=3.0。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 径向迁移和动力学加热会重新分布星系盘内的恒星，从而改变其宿主星系的化学-运动学结构。通常，这些长期演化过程是在以恒星主导的盘为特征的银河系类似体的N体和流体动力学模拟中研究的。相比之下，高红移的盘富含气体，这可能会从根本上改变长期演化的进行方式。我们使用Nexus框架构建并演化了一组孤立星系，这些星系具有固定的暗物质晕和盘质量，但初始盘气体分数从0%到100%不等。我们表明，在富气体模型中，恒星角动量的均方根变化比贫气体类似体大两倍，并伴随着更强的径向和垂向加热，导致增强的径向混合。我们进一步剖析了气体在特定迁移通道中的作用。对于棒驱动的迁移，共转共振拖曳在贫气体盘中占主导地位，而在富气体盘中，恒星更容易到达并积聚在外林德布拉德共振处，后者充当了屏障。富气体阶段的高径向混合效率可以在仅几个轨道时间尺度内使恒星金属丰度梯度相对于初始气体盘变平。这些结果共同表明，早期富气体盘中的径向混合比晚期贫气体盘中的更为剧烈，自然地为化学双峰盘（如银河系）产生了不同的演化轨迹。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：早期富气体盘中的径向混合比晚期贫气体盘显著更剧烈，这自然产生了化学双峰盘（如银河系）的独特演化轨迹，解释了星系盘化学-运动学结构的形成机制。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top sets: the surface density maps of the gaseous component in the snapshots of galaxies at 1.2 Gyr and 2.0 Gyr (final snapshot) with turbulent gas in Set 1 of f gas = 20 % , 40 % , 60 % , 80 % f_{gas}=20\%,40\%,60\%,80\% from left to right. Middle sets: same as the top, but they show the surface density maps of the pre-assembled disc stars in the snapshots. Bottom sets: same as the top, but they show the surface density maps of the newborn disc stars in the snapshots. All the panels are 24 kpc across.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部组：在1.2 Gyr和2.0 Gyr（最终快照）时，具有湍流气体的星系快照中气体成分的面密度图，从左到右分别为Set 1中f_gas = 20%、40%、60%、80%。中间组：与顶部相同，但显示快照中预组装盘恒星的面密度图。底部组：与顶部相同，但显示快照中新生成盘恒星的面密度图。所有面板的宽度均为24 kpc。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The root-mean-square variation of stellar orbital angular momentum normalised by the circular velocity of the galaxies. Top: the mean RMS variation of angular momentum as a function of the guiding radii of the stars in the final snapshot of the galaxies after Δ ​ T ≈ 1.5 \Delta T\approx 1.5 Gyr since the initial ( t = 500 ​ Myr t=500~Myr ) snapshot. Each solid line is coloured according to the gas fraction of the galaxy, and the yellow dashed line is for the analogue galaxies with isothermal gas of f gas = 20 % f_{gas}=20\% . The vertical dash-dotted line labels the current corotation radius of the galaxy with f gas = 20 % f_{gas}=20\% . Bottom: the time evolution of the angular momentum variation traced in different snapshots since time Δ ​ T \Delta T after the 500 ​ Myr 500~Myr snapshot, averaging among stars with guiding radius between 4 − 13 4-13 kpc. The zoomed-in panel shows the region in the log–log scale, and the blue dotted line is the ⟨ δ ​ L z ⟩ ∝ Δ ​ T 1 / 2 \langle\delta L_{z}\rangle\propto\Delta T^{1/2} line to indicate the power-law nature of the angular momentum variation in these galaxy models. A different choice of the guiding radius range does not qualitatively affect the trends.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：恒星轨道角动量的均方根变化，按星系圆周速度归一化。顶部：在初始快照（t = 500 Myr）之后ΔT ≈ 1.5 Gyr的最终快照中，恒星角动量均方根变化作为引导半径的函数。每条实线根据星系的气体分数着色，黄色虚线表示具有等温气体且f_gas = 20%的类似星系。垂直点划线标记f_gas = 20%星系当前的共转半径。底部：从500 Myr快照后时间ΔT开始，在不同快照中追踪的角动量变化的时间演化，平均了引导半径在4-13 kpc之间的恒星。放大面板显示对数-对数尺度下的区域，蓝色虚线表示⟨δL_z⟩ ∝ ΔT^{1/2}线，以指示这些星系模型中角动量变化的幂律性质。引导半径范围的不同选择不会定性影响趋势。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The mean relative density perturbation experienced by the stars over the ∼ 1.5 \sim 1.5 Gyr orbital times in the galaxies with different gas fractions, f g ​ a ​ s f_{gas} . Top: the mean total density perturbations averaged along the stellar orbits for stars in different guiding radii in the final snapshot. Each line is coloured according to the gas fraction of the galaxy. Bottom: the ratio of the relative density perturbation contributed by the gas and stars. The grey dashed line is the ratio = 1 ratio=1 line, for which regions above the line means that the gas component dominates the density perturbations, and regions below the line means that stars dominate the perturbations.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在不同气体分数f_gas的星系中，恒星在约1.5 Gyr轨道时间内经历的平均相对密度扰动。顶部：最终快照中不同引导半径恒星沿其轨道平均的总密度扰动。每条线根据星系的气体分数着色。底部：气体和恒星贡献的相对密度扰动之比。灰色虚线表示比值=1的线，线上方区域表示气体成分主导密度扰动，线下方区域表示恒星主导扰动。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Similar to Fig. 2 but shows the radial and time dependence of the averaged radial and vertical heating-to-migration ratio of galaxies with different gas fractions. The heating-to-migration ratios, ℋ \mathcal{H} , are quantified as the ratio of the RMS variation of radial and vertical actions to the RMS variation of the azimuthal actions, ℋ R , z = δ ​ J R , z / δ ​ L z \mathcal{H}_{R,z}=\delta J_{R,z}/\delta L_{z} , which the radial heating-to-migration ratio is shown on the left, and the vertical one is on the right. Top: the mean heating-to-migration ratios of stars as a function of the guiding radii in the final snapshot after ∼ 1.5 \sim 1.5 Gyr since the beginning. The vertical dashed lines and the bands are the current OLR radius of the galaxy with f gas = 20 % , 40 % f_{gas}=20\%,40\% and its 1 ​ σ 1\sigma region, which roughly corresponds to the radius for which the radial trends of δ ​ J R , z / δ ​ L z \delta J_{R,z}/\delta L_{z} change. Bottom: the time dependence of the mean heating-to-migration ratios, which we averaged over the stars between 4 < R g / kpc < 13 4<R_{g}/kpc<13 in each snapshot. The grey shaded regions on the left denote the time that Δ ​ T \Delta T is less than an orbital period. The horizontal blue shaded regions denote the measured heating-to-migration ratio of the Milky Way ( Frankel et al. 2020 ; Zhang et al. in prep.)
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图2类似，但显示了不同气体分数星系的平均径向和垂向加热与迁移之比的径向和时间依赖性。加热与迁移之比ℋ量化为径向和垂向作用量的均方根变化与方位角作用量的均方根变化之比，ℋ_{R,z} = δJ_{R,z}/δL_z，左侧显示径向加热与迁移之比，右侧显示垂向之比。顶部：在开始后约1.5 Gyr的最终快照中，恒星的平均加热与迁移之比作为引导半径的函数。垂直虚线和带状区域表示f_gas = 20%、40%星系当前的OLR半径及其1σ区域，大致对应于δJ_{R,z}/δL_z径向趋势变化的半径。底部：平均加热与迁移之比的时间依赖性，我们在每个快照中对引导半径在4 < R_g/kpc < 13之间的恒星进行了平均。左侧灰色阴影区域表示ΔT小于一个轨道周期的时间。水平蓝色阴影区域表示银河系的测量加热与迁移之比（Frankel et al. 2020；Zhang et al. 准备中）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Top: the time evolution of pattern speed, Ω p \Omega_{p} , corotation and OLR radius of the two galaxies in Set 2. The pattern speed evolution is shown in blue. The corotation and OLR radius evolution are shown in red with solid and dashed lines, respectively. Middle & Bottom: The stellar surface density maps of simulation snapshots of the two galaxies in Set 2 at the bar formation moment and 2.4 Gyr after that. The galaxy without gas is shown on the left and the galaxy with f gas = 10 % f_{gas}=10\% is shown on the right. The red solid and dot-dashed circle denote the CR and OLR radius of the corresponding snapshots. The expansion of the CR and OLR radius from the bar formation to the final snapshot is due to the bar deceleration.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：顶部：Set 2中两个星系的模式速度Ω_p、共转半径和OLR半径的时间演化。模式速度演化以蓝色显示。共转半径和OLR半径演化分别以红色实线和虚线显示。中部和底部：Set 2中两个星系在棒形成时刻及其后2.4 Gyr的模拟快照的恒星面密度图。左侧显示无气体星系，右侧显示f_gas = 10%的星系。红色实线和点划线圆表示相应快照的CR和OLR半径。从棒形成到最终快照，CR和OLR半径的膨胀是由于棒的减速。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The unsharp initial angular momentum ( L z , ini L_{z,\,ini} ) v.s. the changes in angular momentum ( Δ ​ L z \Delta L_{z} ) plane of the two galaxies in Set 2 that have f gas = 0 % , 10 % f_{gas}=0\%,\,10\% after ∼ 2.4 \sim 2.4 Gyr since the bar formation. The un-sharp masking is done by subtracting the Gaussian convolved L z , ini − Δ ​ L z L_{z,\,ini}-\Delta L_{z} plane with σ \sigma of 5. Left shows this plane for the galaxy without gas. The grey shaded region in the lower left corner labels the stars that are currently in the bar region, for which L z / V c , 0 < R bar L_{z}/V_{c,0}<R_{bar} . The red dashed, solid, and dash-dotted lines correspond to the initial bar corotation angular momentum, final bar corotation angular momentum, and the final bar OLR angular momentum, respectively. The black-dashed lines show the − 1 : 1 -1:1 lines which join the grey Δ ​ L z = 0 \Delta L_{z}=0 line at the corotation and OLR line. Stars along these black dashed lines reside on the current corotation and OLR zone in the final snapshots. Middle: the same as the left panel but for the galaxy with gas. All the lines represent the same but in blue. Right: the contrast map that shows the difference between the left and middle panel. The red regions mean that the radial migration in the gas-free galaxy is more prominent in these regions, whereas the blue regions means that they are dominated by the galaxy with gas. The galaxies are scaled so that the present corotation angular momentum (solid lines) is the same.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：Set 2中两个星系（f_gas = 0%、10%）在棒形成后约2.4 Gyr时的非锐化初始角动量（L_z,ini）与角动量变化（ΔL_z）平面。非锐化掩膜通过从高斯卷积的L_z,ini - ΔL_z平面（σ = 5）中减去得到。左侧显示无气体星系的该平面。左下角灰色阴影区域标记当前位于棒区域的恒星，满足L_z/V_{c,0} < R_bar。红色虚线、实线和点划线分别对应初始棒共转角动量、最终棒共转角动量和最终棒OLR角动量。黑色虚线显示-1:1线，在共转和OLR线处与灰色ΔL_z = 0线相交。沿这些黑色虚线的恒星位于最终快照的当前共转和OLR区域。中间：与左侧面板相同，但针对有气体星系。所有线条以蓝色表示相同内容。右侧：对比图，显示左侧和中间面板之间的差异。红色区域表示无气体星系中径向迁移更显著，蓝色区域表示有气体星系中径向迁移更显著。星系已缩放，使得当前共转角动量（实线）相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The mean “radial migration efficiency” ℰ {\cal E} in terms of the rate of guiding radius variation in the four galaxies as a function of the gas fraction. The results in this paper of the four galaxies with turbulent gas in Set 1 are shown in the black dots, for which the gas-rich galaxies has stronger radial migration strength. The blue-shaded and the red-shaded regions are the measured time-averaged radial migration efficiency in the Milky Way’s young, low- α \alpha and old, high- α \alpha discs with 1 ​ σ 1\sigma uncertainties. The two values of ℰ {\cal E} of the Milky Way are computed by averaging δ ​ R g / δ ​ t \delta R_{g}/\delta t over 2 − 8 2-8 Gyr and 10 − 13 10-13 Gyr, respectively. Note that this figure is to illustrate the correlation between the transition of radial migration efficiency in the Milky Way compared to the variation of gas fractions, but it should not be interpreted numerically as shown.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：四个星系中平均“径向迁移效率”ℰ（以引导半径变化率表示）作为气体分数的函数。本文中Set 1四个具有湍流气体的星系的结果以黑点显示，其中富气体星系具有更强的径向迁移强度。蓝色阴影和红色阴影区域是银河系年轻低α盘和年老高α盘的测量时间平均径向迁移效率，带有1σ不确定性。银河系的两个ℰ值分别通过将δR_g/δt在2-8 Gyr和10-13 Gyr上平均计算得到。请注意，此图旨在说明银河系径向迁移效率转变与气体分数变化之间的相关性，但不应从数值上解释为所示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: The expected flattening in radial metallicity gradient at a given radial mixing strength and initial disc scalelength, in terms of the ratio between the final and initial metallicity gradient. The lighter colour means a more significant flattening. The white lines are the contours when ratio is 0.2 0.2 , 0.5 0.5 , and 0.8 0.8 .
figures.caption_zh: 图8：在给定的径向混合强度和初始盘标长下，预期的径向金属丰度梯度变平程度，以最终与初始金属丰度梯度之比表示。颜色越浅表示变平越显著。白线是比值为0.2、0.5和0.8时的等高线。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了一个由6个矮星系组成的孤立致密群在145 Mpc距离上的HI含量。HI的分布和运动学，包括多个气体桥，表明该群是一个引力束缚系统。HI图谱进一步揭示了两个新发现的矮卫星，它们通过气体很容易被识别，但在光学图像中几乎不可见。先前在SDSS中识别的四个矮群成员具有9.06 < log(Mstar/Msun) < 9.43和9.42 < log(MHI/Msun) < 9.73。两个新发现的矮卫星具有log(Mstar/Msun) = 6.10和log(MHI/Msun) = 8.71，以及log(Mstar/Msun) = 7.07和log(MHI/Msun) = 9.18。新的Gemini光学光谱将HI探测与其光学对应体联系起来。该群的三维速度弥散（188 km/s）、质光比（M_L/B ~44）、动力学与重子质量比（Mdyn/Mbary ~ 21）、大小（69 kpc）和气体分数（0.56）均与TNG50模拟中的致密矮群一致。该群具有顶部重的卫星质量函数，与LMC大小宿主星的预测不一致，可能由两个或多个群合并而成。Voronoi镶嵌显示该群位于两条纤维交叉点外的卷须中。大尺度结构中的这些中等密度环境为恒星形成、富含气体的矮星系群形成并最终合并提供了条件。我们的结果进一步表明，通过HI图谱可以发现矮星系宿主周围更暗弱的矮卫星。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：大尺度结构中的中间密度环境为富含气体的矮星系群形成和最终合并提供了条件，HI观测是发现矮星系宿主周围暗弱卫星的有效方法。

The HI contours are at the levels of 7.8, 10.4, 13.0, 18.2, 23.4, 28.7, 33.9, 39.1 × \times 10 20 atoms cm -2 , and the size of the restoring beam is indicated with the filled ellipse in the lower right hand corner. The contour levels are at 0.36 (2σ \sigma ), 0.6, 0.8, 1.0, and 1.2 mJy beam -1 . The synthesized beam of ∼ \sim 7.5 ′′ × \times 6.5 ′′ is shown in the bottom-left corner. Each dwarf group member is labeled in the channel map closest to its peak velocity (v 50 ).

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Rotation curve fitting results for dm1623a. Top (input): 2D velocity map derived from the HI data cube for dm1623a. The color scale indicates how far the gas deviates from the central velocity of 10,285 km/s. The beam size is shown in the lower left corner. Bottom (output): Rotational velocity of the gas as a function of radius (blue curve). The fitting aims to minimize the fitted radial (line-of-sight) velocity (red curve) and the deviation from the systemic velocity (green curve). The rotation curve is still rising and thus the dynamical mass derived from it should be considered a lower limit.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：dm1623a的旋转曲线拟合结果。上（输入）：来自dm1623a HI数据立方体的二维速度图。颜色标度表示气体偏离中心速度10,285 km/s的程度。左下角显示了束大小。下（输出）：气体旋转速度随半径的变化（蓝色曲线）。拟合旨在最小化拟合的径向（视线）速度（红色曲线）和与系统速度的偏差（绿色曲线）。旋转曲线仍在上升，因此由此导出的动力学质量应视为下限。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 为了达到第三和第四阶段弱引力透镜巡天所需的性能，宇宙剪切测量必须依赖外部模拟来校准残余偏差。多年来，已经开发了几种技术来在校准前减轻残余偏差的影响，包括在图像上推断剪切响应以校正乘法偏差，以及经验性地校正加法偏差。我们引入了一种新颖的方法，该方法在现有最先进方法的基础上进行了推广，通过从参数化的测量椭圆率分布中联合推断乘法偏差和加法偏差，关键是不依赖外部模拟且独立于宇宙学。剪切偏差通过对建模中未知的超参数进行边缘化，从而减轻了简并性的影响。我们将该技术应用于一个代表性问题，并展示了即使在存在噪声的情况下估计的性能。该方法在当前和未来的透镜巡天中校准弱引力透镜宇宙剪切具有很高的应用潜力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该方法在当前和未来的透镜巡天中校准弱引力透镜宇宙剪切具有很高的应用潜力，提供了一种更独立、更稳健的校准方法。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of true ellipticity and observed ellipticity after the effect of shear biases m = 0.05 m=0.05 and c = − 0.01 c=-0.01 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在剪切偏差 m = 0.05 和 c = -0.01 影响下，真实椭圆率与观测椭圆率的分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Joint MCMC samples of the inferred bias parameters ( m m and c c ) and distribution hyper-parameters ( σ \sigma , β \beta , and κ \kappa ). The red lines/crosses represent the true values and the blue ones represent the recovered mean values marginalised over nuisance parameters. Despite the degeneracies, the marginalised m m and c c are constrained within one standard deviation (see the two distributions at the top left).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：推断的偏差参数（m 和 c）与分布超参数（σ、β 和 κ）的联合 MCMC 样本。红线/叉号表示真实值，蓝线表示对干扰参数边缘化后的恢复均值。尽管存在简并性，边缘化的 m 和 c 仍被约束在一个标准差内（见左上角的两个分布）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 双度规MOND（BIMOND）被用作可变引力常数G理论的一个平台，这些理论具有MOND特有的特质。例如，MOND的前提要求在高加速度极限下回归标准动力学，从而预测高加速度系统中G的标准值。这自动确保了此类理论符合从高加速度系统（如地球物理学、太阳系、脉冲星、超新星、恒星演化、引力波发射等）研究中得出的所有关于G不变性的约束。在MOND中，从这些现象推导出的约束与宇宙学中可能的G变化无关。我的主要动机是探究此类理论是否可能解释宇宙学中暗物质的某些作用；例如，通过让G_e≈2πG主导物质主导时期后期的膨胀，而不是引入约2π倍重子密度的物质密度，来解释宇宙在物质主导时期的膨胀历史。在不增加自由度或新的有量纲常数的情况下，BIMOND可以扩展为一类理论，这些理论涉及牛顿常数G的现象依赖性。我目前还无法提出一个与所有宇宙学观测（包括膨胀历史及其所有细节）完全一致的模型。相反，我描述了该类理论中的一些例子，它们在不同情况下预测不同的G_e值，其中包括一个G对所有亚宇宙学系统（即使它们处于MOND深度区域）都取标准值的例子。我还讨论了早期宇宙中G_e≈G（符合大爆炸核合成约束）但后期G_e>G出现并影响物质主导时期膨胀历史的场景。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：双度规MOND理论为研究可变引力常数G提供了有前景的平台，能够满足高加速度系统的约束，同时探索G在宇宙学中的可变性来解释暗物质作用。虽然尚未建立完全一致的宇宙学模型，但展示了理论可能性，特别是现象依赖的G值变化如何影响宇宙膨胀历史。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 背景：星系团内介质（ICM）的内部结构与星系群和星系团的聚集历史及物理过程密切相关，但近期吸积在塑造这些轮廓中的作用尚未得到充分探索。目的：我们研究质量吸积在多大程度上解释了ICM密度和热力学轮廓的变异性，以及当前结构能揭示其形成历史的哪些信息。方法：我们分析了一个包含气体冷却但无反馈的流体动力学宇宙学模拟，以隔离结构形成加热的影响。引入ICM量的中位轮廓作为对整体ICM的稳健描述。然后，我们检查质量吸积率或聚集指标与温度、熵、压力、气体和暗物质密度轮廓及其离散度之间的相关性。结果：最近一个动力学时间内的吸积强烈降低了中心气体密度，而对暗物质影响不大，在重子消耗函数中产生了明显特征。压力和熵对吸积的依赖性最明显，而温度则不太敏感。在高吸积和低吸积子样本之间，熵、温度和压力的最陡梯度半径向内移动了约(10-20)%。聚集状态指标也与这些特征的位置相关，并且吸积与密度、压力和熵的常见拟合函数参数相关。结论：近期吸积在ICM结构上留下了可测量的印记，突显了热力学轮廓作为星系团增长历史诊断工具的潜力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 近期吸积在ICM结构上留下了可测量的印记，突显了热力学轮廓作为星系团增长历史诊断工具的潜力。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary statistics accounting for the mass distribution of our group and cluster sample. 3 3 3 Each row in the first block corresponds to a different quantity, namely the DM, gas and total masses within R 200 ​ m R_{200m} (in logarithmic scale), and the baryon fraction within the same aperture. The second block contains the information relative to the hot gas (which we define with a temperature threshold of T thr = 10 6 ​ K T_{{thr}}=10^{6}\,{K} , similar to, e.g., Rasia_2025 ). Columns present the arithmetic mean ⟨ X ⟩ \langle X\rangle , minimum X min X_{{min}} , several percentiles X p % X_{p\%} , and maximum X max X_{{max}} of each quantity X X .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：总结了我们星系群和星系团样本质量分布的统计量。第一个块中的每一行对应一个不同的量，即R_{200m}内的暗物质、气体和总质量（对数尺度），以及同一孔径内的重子分数。第二个块包含与热气体相关的信息（我们定义温度阈值为T_{thr}=10^6 K，类似于Rasia_2025等）。列展示了每个量X的算术平均值⟨X⟩、最小值X_{min}、若干百分位数X_{p%}和最大值X_{max}。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Comparison between mean (red solid line), median (cyan solid line) and mode (orange dashed line) gas density profiles in two galaxy clusters (corresponding to the two panels). In addition to the standard mean profiles, also profiles with substructures having been masked are shown as the dashed, red lines. Light gray lines indicate the individual directional profiles, while cyan dotted lines are the ( 16 − 84 ) % (16-84)\% percentiles at each r r to give a better idea of the width of the density distribution. Dark blue dotted lines indicate the thresholds for the substructure cleaning algorithm from which the red dashed line has been obtained. The insets provide a zoomed-in view of two regions to highlight the differences among the profiles. The blue filled line at the right of the right-hand panel inset depicts the distribution of values of density at r ∼ 3 ​ R vir r\sim 3R_{{vir}} , to highlight its bimodality.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：两个星系团（对应两个面板）中平均（红色实线）、中位（青色实线）和众数（橙色虚线）气体密度轮廓的比较。除了标准平均轮廓外，还显示了子结构被屏蔽后的轮廓（红色虚线）。浅灰色线表示各个方向轮廓，而青色点线表示每个r处的(16-84)%百分位数，以更好地展示密度分布的宽度。深蓝色点线表示子结构清除算法的阈值，由此得到红色虚线。插图提供了两个区域的放大视图，以突出轮廓之间的差异。右面板插图右侧的蓝色填充线显示了r∼3R_{vir}处密度值的分布，以突出其双峰性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Mass distribution for the highest accreting third (green) and lowest accreting third (red) of the sample. Left-hand side panel: gas density. Central panel: DM density. Right-hand side panel: baryon depletion. Within each column, the top panel presents the profiles stacked over each subsample, together with the whole population (gray lines). The second panel shows each class normalised by the ensemble average. The third panel contains the logarithmic slopes of the profiles, together with an indication of the radius of minimum slope. Last, the bottom panels show the correlation between the profiles and accretion rate Γ 200 ​ m \Gamma_{200m} controlling for M 200 ​ m M_{200m} .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：样本中吸积率最高三分之一（绿色）和最低三分之一（红色）的质量分布。左侧面板：气体密度。中间面板：暗物质密度。右侧面板：重子消耗。每列中，顶部面板显示每个子样本的叠加轮廓，以及整个群体（灰色线）。第二个面板显示每个类别相对于整体平均值的归一化值。第三个面板包含轮廓的对数斜率，以及最小斜率半径的指示。最后，底部面板显示轮廓与吸积率Γ_{200m}之间的相关性，同时控制M_{200m}。

Left-hand side panel: temperature. Central panel: entropy. Right-hand side panel: thermal pressure. Vertical panels within each column contain the same information as in Fig. 2 .

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Effect of individual indicators of assembly state on the entropy profiles. Top panel: Spearman (partial) correlation coefficients of each indicator and the value of the profiles at each r / R 200 ​ m r/R_{200m} . Higher magnitudes (either positive or negative) indicate larger influence of the value of the indicator on the profile at this particular radius. Middle panel: effect of selecting clusters based on each parameter on the location and the depth of the steepest logarithmic slope of the entropy profile. Crosses correspond to the profile stacked over the one-third most relaxed subsample (according to the given indicator), while filled dots correspond to the most disturbed third. Bottom panel: Similar to the middle panel, but with the location and height of the entropy peak. The blue regions in the middle and bottom panel indicate the 68 % 68\% confidence region for the determination of the corresponding locations over each of the Δ r \Delta_{r} -based subsamples (as an example), obtained by bootstrap resampling.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：单个聚集状态指标对熵轮廓的影响。顶部面板：每个指标与每个r/R_{200m}处轮廓值的斯皮尔曼（偏）相关系数。较高的幅度（正或负）表示该指标值在此特定半径上对轮廓的影响较大。中间面板：基于每个参数选择星系团对熵轮廓最陡对数斜率位置和深度的影响。十字对应基于给定指标的最松弛三分之一子样本的叠加轮廓，而实心点对应最扰动三分之一。底部面板：与中间面板类似，但针对熵峰的位置和高度。中间和底部面板中的蓝色区域表示基于Δ_r子样本（作为示例）通过自助重采样确定的相应位置的68%置信区间。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 最近研究表明，脉冲星电磁波偏振的时间变化可与脉冲星计时互相关，用于探测各向同性引力波背景的手性。本文利用总角动量形式体系高效推导了互相关表达式，并将该框架扩展至与天体测量学的互相关。我们针对自旋为1的引力波（可能出现在替代引力理论中）以及广义相对论中的自旋为2引力波进行了分析。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，总角动量形式体系为分析脉冲星偏振变化与脉冲星计时及天体测量学的互相关提供了高效框架，适用于不同自旋的引力波探测，扩展了引力波背景手性探测的理论基础。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: The factors F ℓ 𝒪 , X \displaystyle F^{{\cal O},X}_{\ell} for spin-1 and spin-2 TAM waves in the distant-source limit ( k ​ r s → ∞ \displaystyle kr_{s}\to\infty ).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：在远源极限（k r_s → ∞）下，自旋为1和自旋为2 TAM波的因子F^{𝒪,X}_ℓ。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 目的：我们研究纤维结构在高质量恒星形成中的作用，探讨气体是否沿这些结构从大尺度流向小尺度，以及它们的性质可能揭示所在区域的哪些信息。方法：马克斯·普朗克IRAM天文台计划（MIOP）中的天鹅座全尺度化学与动力学环境巡天（CASCADE）包含了天鹅座X复合体中恒星形成区DR20的高空间分辨率（约3角秒）HCO+(1-0)和H13CO+(1-0)发射数据。我们利用结构识别算法DisPerSE在这些数据中识别纤维结构，并通过高斯拟合谱线确定沿纤维的线峰值速度和半高全宽，使用Python包FilChaP测定纤维宽度。结果：在多个纤维中，我们发现了朝向恒星形成核心的投影速度梯度，范围在0.4至2.4 km/s，投影长度尺度为0.1 pc。这可以解释为气体沿纤维流向核心的迹象。纤维宽度分布的中值在0.06至0.14 pc之间，具体取决于核心、示踪物和方法，标准差约为0.02至0.06 pc。这些值与邻近低质量恒星形成区域中通常发现的0.1 pc纤维宽度大致一致。结论：对天鹅座X CASCADE项目中纤维特性的首次分析揭示了气体沿纤维流向恒星形成核心的潜在迹象。此外，这一高质量恒星形成区域中的纤维特性可与先前通常研究的低质量恒星形成区域中的纤维进行比较。将此类研究扩展到整个CASCADE巡天将增强我们在可靠统计基础上对高质量纤维特性的认识。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 这是CASCADE项目中首次分析丝状结构特性，揭示了气体沿丝状结构流向恒星形成核心的潜在证据。高质量恒星形成区域的丝状结构特性与低质量区域相似，扩展此类研究将增强对高质量丝状结构特性的统计理解。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用来自NEP、JADES和PRIMER巡天的深度JWST/NIRCam测光成像，对5.6<z<6.5范围内的1721个星系进行了电离性质的全面研究，覆盖未掩蔽面积约550平方角分，紫外星等范围为-22≲M_UV≲-17.5。我们的90%恒星质量完备样本表明，紫外斜率与星等的关系很小，β_UV=(-0.040±0.022)M_UV-2.88^{+0.43}_{-0.44}，基于低红移莱曼连续谱巡天（LzLCS）的校准，这意味着f_esc^{LyC}≈5%。我们测量了恒定的电离光子产生效率与紫外星等的关系，log_{10}(ξ_{ion,0}/Hz erg^{-1}) = -0.006^{+0.019}_{-0.017} M_UV + 25.05^{+0.39}_{-0.34}，与HST的典型值一致。根据我们的恒星形成和闷燃紫外光度函数（UVLFs），对于M_UV<-17的星系，逃逸到IGM的光子总产生率计算为log_{10}(ṅ_{ion}/s^{-1}Mpc^{-3})=50.31^{+0.07}_{-0.06}，这两个光度函数在暗端斜率上有所不同（α_{SFG}=-2.2±0.2；α_{sm}=-1.7±0.2）。外推到来自大质量透镜星系团Abell S1063的最新UVLF转折极限（M_UV,lim=-13.5）表明，需要复合加权的HII团块因子C_{HII,rec}=6.2^{+4.1}_{-2.1}才能在z≈6时产生完全稳定的再电离。如此大小的团块因子解决了电离光子预算危机。我们的方法为从星系进行间接团块测量铺平了道路，这将为再电离早期阶段提供洞察，此时Lyα森林变得饱和，更直接的类星体测量变得不可能。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：高红移星系的电离性质表明，需要较大的团块因子才能解决电离光子预算危机。该方法为间接测量星系团块因子提供了途径，有助于研究再电离早期阶段，当莱曼α森林饱和且类星体直接测量不可行时。

The dark shaded regions show the 16 th − 84 th 16^{th}-84^{th} percentile of the power law fit to each subsample, with the light shaded regions showing the asymmetric scatter fitted as a function of both N ˙ ion \dot{N}_{ion} and M UV M_{{UV}} . Upper panel) Data is coloured by EPOCHS-v2 origin survey. Spectroscopic sources from the DJA are shown as white stars and wild bootstrap-binned data points are shown as beige squares. Lower panel) Results for our star forming (blue) and smouldering (red) subsamples. Contours are shown for { 1 , 2 , 3 } ​ σ \{1,2,3\}\sigma significance levels. Wild-bootstrap-binned data is shown as light blue/light red circles.

Schechter ( 1976 ) model posterior solutions are plotted for each subsample, with the shaded region highlighting the 1 ​ σ 1\sigma errors. Results are compared to measurements of the bright end (R.
