figures.caption_zh: 表2：赛弗特1星系落入BPT图中各区域的比例（%）

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: BPT Diagrams with log([NII]/H α \alpha ) on the x-axis. In all the line ratio classification diagrams, the light Grey dots show the full MPA-JHU SDSS DR7 data. (a) Shaded blue data points are from the Hao AGN sample. We separate the Star-Forming region into three sections: SF-Lower bottom region–light gray, SF-Middle medium–gray, and the Black dots we call SF-Upper . These groups correspond to high, medium and low-metallicity galaxies, respectively. (b) R ​ e ​ d Red and O ​ r ​ a ​ n ​ g ​ e Orange points are Sy 1.0 and Sy 1.2 galaxies. More than 85% of the Sy 1.0 and 77% of the Sy 1.2 are above the Ke01 line, which we consider to be dominated by the AGN NLR. (c) P ​ u ​ r ​ p ​ l ​ e Purple and P ​ i ​ n ​ k Pink points are Sy 1.5 and Sy 1.6 galaxies. 65% are found in the “Seyfert” region above the Ke01 boundary line (d) L ​ i ​ g ​ h ​ t ​ G ​ r ​ e ​ e ​ n Light\;Green points are the Sy 1.8 NLR, which have similar distribution as in plot (b) but the majority of the Sy 1.9 NLR ( D ​ a ​ r ​ k ​ G ​ r ​ e ​ e ​ n Dark\;Green points) lie in the composite region and down towards SF Lower. Only 50% of the Sy 1.8 and 30% of the Sy 1.9 are in the Seyfert-dominated region.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：BPT图，x轴为log([NII]/Hα)。在所有线比分类图中，浅灰点显示完整的MPA-JHU SDSS DR7数据。(a) 蓝色阴影数据点来自Hao活动星系核样本。我们将恒星形成区分为三部分：SF-下底部区域（浅灰）、SF-中（中灰），以及称为SF-上的黑点。这些组分别对应高、中、低金属丰度星系。(b) 红色和橙色点分别为赛弗特1.0和1.2星系。超过85%的赛弗特1.0和77%的赛弗特1.2位于Ke01线上方，我们认为这些由活动星系核窄线区主导。(c) 紫色和粉色点分别为赛弗特1.5和1.6星系。65%位于Ke01边界线上方的“赛弗特”区域。(d) 浅绿点为赛弗特1.8窄线区，其分布与(b)相似，但大多数赛弗特1.9窄线区（深绿点）位于复合区并向下朝向SF-下。仅50%的赛弗特1.8和30%的赛弗特1.9位于赛弗特主导区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: BPT Diagrams with log([SII]/H α \alpha on the x-axis. The color scheme for data points is the same as in Figure 2 . Galaxies below the short-dash line and to the right of the Ke01 line are LINER-dominated. (a) As before, the Star-Forming galaxy spectra are separated into three sections based on their metallicity. (b) More than 85% of the Sy 1.0 and 77% of the Sy 1.2 are in the Sy 2 “pure AGN” region. We call these the “strong Seyfert 1’s”. (c) The Sy 1.5 and Sy 1.6 galaxies. 30% are in the SF region. (d) “Weak Seyfert 1’s”: 40% of the Sy 1.8 and 60% of the Sy 1.9 are in the SF region.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：BPT图，x轴为log([SII]/Hα)。数据点颜色方案与图2相同。短虚线下方且Ke01线右侧的星系为LINER主导。(a) 如前，恒星形成星系光谱根据金属丰度分为三部分。(b) 超过85%的赛弗特1.0和77%的赛弗特1.2位于赛弗特2“纯活动星系核”区域。我们称这些为“强赛弗特1”。(c) 赛弗特1.5和1.6星系。30%位于恒星形成区域。(d) “弱赛弗特1”：40%的赛弗特1.8和60%的赛弗特1.9位于恒星形成区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: BPT Diagram with log([OI]/H α \alpha on the x-axis. The color scheme as in Figure 2 . (a) As before, the Star-Forming galaxy spectra are separated into three (somewhat overlapping) sections. (b) 95% of Sy 1.0 and 88% of Sy 1.2 are in the AGN region. (c) 77% of the Sy 1.5 and Sy 1.6 are in the AGN region. (d) 65% of the Sy 1.8 NLR, and 45% of the Sy 1.9 are in the AGN region.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：BPT图，x轴为log([OI]/Hα)。颜色方案与图2相同。(a) 如前，恒星形成星系光谱分为三部分（略有重叠）。(b) 95%的赛弗特1.0和88%的赛弗特1.2位于活动星系核区域。(c) 77%的赛弗特1.5和1.6位于活动星系核区域。(d) 65%的赛弗特1.8窄线区和45%的赛弗特1.9位于活动星系核区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The Ke06 diagram, of log([OIII] λ \lambda 5007/[OII] λ ​ λ \lambda\lambda 3726+3729) v ​ e ​ r ​ s ​ u ​ s versus log([OI]/H α \alpha ), adopted from Kewley et al. (2006) to separate AGN, Liners and Star-forming galaxies. The solid black line (AGN/SF) separates Star-forming galaxies and AGNs. The dashed line (Sy/LINER) indicates the demarcation between Sy 2 Galaxies and LINERs. The color scheme is as in Figure 2 . (a) LINERs, Sy 2-Upper and Lower, and star-forming galaxies are plotted with different colors. ∼ 7 \sim 7 % of the Sy 2-Lower are found in the LINER region, while ∼ 21 \sim 21 % of the LINERs are above the Sy/LINER boundary. (b) Sy 1.0 and Sy 1.2 NLR. We see the same trend as in the traditional BPT diagrams, that they occupy the same region as the Sy 2 NLR galaxies. (c) Sy 1.5 and Sy 1.6 NLR. There is a small downward and rightward shift as in the other BPT diagrams. There is also a significant rightward shift into the LINER-dominated region. (d) Sy 1.8 and Sy 1.9 NLR. As with the BPT diagrams having log([OIII]/H β \beta ) on the y-axis, the Sy 1.9 are shifted substantially down towards the star-forming region.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：Ke06图，log([OIII]λ5007/[OII]λλ3726+3729)对log([OI]/Hα)，采用Kewley等人（2006）的方法区分活动星系核、LINER和恒星形成星系。实黑线（活动星系核/恒星形成）分隔恒星形成星系和活动星系核。虚线（赛弗特/LINER）指示赛弗特2星系与LINER之间的分界。颜色方案与图2相同。(a) LINER、赛弗特2-上和下、以及恒星形成星系用不同颜色绘制。约7%的赛弗特2-下位于LINER区域，而约21%的LINER位于赛弗特/LINER边界上方。(b) 赛弗特1.0和1.2窄线区。我们看到与传统BPT图相同的趋势，即它们占据与赛弗特2窄线区星系相同的区域。(c) 赛弗特1.5和1.6窄线区。与其他BPT图一样，有轻微向下和向右的偏移。也有显著向右偏移进入LINER主导区域。(d) 赛弗特1.8和1.9窄线区。与y轴为log([OIII]/Hβ)的BPT图一样，赛弗特1.9显著向下朝向恒星形成区域偏移。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Diagrams comparing AGN and HII region line emission with our Toy Model predictions (solid line with tic marks, see section III.2.1 ). The panel follows the same color scheme as in Figures 2 - 5 . The tics on the solid line in each graph indicate 10% increases in H α \alpha contribution, from 0% AGN activity at the bottom to 100% at the top. The colored symbols show the medians of each Sy category. The strongest result is that the Sy 1.9 medians are all below the AGN/SF demarcation in each graph, including in (d) where the [OII] doublet has replaced the H β \beta NLR line.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：比较活动星系核和HII区线发射与我们的玩具模型预测（实线带刻度标记，见第三节II.1）的图。面板颜色方案与图2-5相同。每张图中实线上的刻度表示Hα贡献的10%增加，从底部0%活动星系核活动到顶部100%。彩色符号显示每个赛弗特类别的中位数。最强结果是赛弗特1.9中位数在每张图中均低于活动星系核/恒星形成分界，包括(d)中[OII]双线替代Hβ窄线的情况。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 来自阿塔卡马宇宙学望远镜（ACT）和南极望远镜（SPT）的最新测量结果对原初标量扰动谱施加了最严格的约束，报告在95%置信水平下谱指数为$n_s\sim0.967-0.98$。这一结果表明标量扰动的尺度不变性比早期估计更强，对众多暴胀模型提出了挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个来自Weyl尺度不变引力理论中由高阶曲率主导的吸引人的暴胀场景。具体而言，引入指数曲率扩展以抑制暴胀子的质量发散。我们发现，对于不同模型，该场景自然产生$n_s\simeq1-3/(2N)\sim0.97-0.975$或$n_s\simeq1-5/(3N)\sim0.967-0.972$的领先阶预测，与ACT/SPT约束高度一致。这一结果在理论与观测尺度不变性之间建立了具体桥梁，暗示着原始对称性在宇宙中留下了持久的回响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该工作建立了理论与观测尺度不变性之间的具体桥梁，表明原始对称性在宇宙中留下了持久的回响。Weyl尺度不变引力理论为解释最新观测数据提供了有吸引力的暴胀场景。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Effective potentials of Weyl exponential-extended models with α = 10 11 \alpha=10^{11} , ζ = 10 8 \zeta=10^{8} as an example.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：以α=10^11、ζ=10^8为例的Weyl指数扩展模型的有效势。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Predictions of spectral index n s n_{s} combined with tensor-to-scalar ratio r r in the Weyl exponential-extended models with various ζ \zeta . The blue, green, red, and yellow dotted lines are respectively for models ( 16 ), ( 17 ), ( 18 ), and ( 19 ). The violet area is the latest observational constraints given by the ACT collaboration [ 2 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：不同ζ下Weyl指数扩展模型中谱指数n_s与张标比r的预测。蓝色、绿色、红色和黄色虚线分别对应模型(16)、(17)、(18)和(19)。紫色区域是ACT合作组[2]给出的最新观测约束。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用COLIBRE最先进的宇宙学流体动力学模拟，研究了宇宙时间（$0\le z \le 8$）内千秒差距（kpc）尺度上恒星形成率（SFR）面密度与气体面密度之间的相关性（即Kennicutt-Schmidt，KS关系）。这些模拟采用了结合尘埃颗粒演化和详细辐射冷却（冷却至约$\approx 10$~K）的实时非平衡化学过程，从而能够直接预测原子（HI）和分子（H$_2$）的KS关系。在$z\approx 0$时，COLIBRE重现了观测到的（空间分辨的）HI和H$_2$的KS关系，包括相关的弥散，我们预测该弥散与恒星面密度、局部比恒星形成率（sSFR）和气体金属丰度显著相关。我们表明，对于质量较低的星系，HI KS关系变得更陡，而H$_2$ KS关系在具有较高sSFR的星系中向更高的归一化值偏移。从$z = 0$到$z = 8$，H$_2$耗尽时间减少了约$\approx 20$倍，这主要是由于气相金属丰度的降低。这导致在高红移下，与给定SFR相关的H$_2$更少，而HI更多。我们还发现，具有较高sSFR的星系在kpc尺度上具有更大的分子气体含量和更高的单位气体质量恒星形成效率。预测的H$_2$耗尽时间演化及其与星系sSFR的相关性，在宽红移范围$0\le z\le 5$内与观测结果吻合得非常好。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：分子气体耗尽时间的演化及其与星系sSFR的相关性与红移0到5范围内的观测结果高度一致，表明金属丰度是驱动KS关系演化的关键因素。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: COLIBRE simulations used in this paper. The columns list: (1) the name of the simulation, (2) comoving box size ( \(L\) ), (3) number of initial baryon ( \(N_{b}\) ) and (4) DM particles ( \(N_{DM}\) ), (5) initial mean particle masses of gas and (6) dark matter, (7) comoving gravitational softening length ( \(\epsilon_{com}\) ) and (8) the maximum proper gravitational softening length ( \(\epsilon_{prop}\) ). Here, “Thermal” refers to runs using the thermal AGN feedback model, while “Hybrid” refers to runs using the AGN feedback model of Huško et al. ( 2026 ) . Our fiducial resolution is m6, and unless otherwise stated, L200m6 is the default simulation used for the analysis in this paper. To make this decision visually clear, we highlight the name of that simulation in bold.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本文使用的COLIBRE模拟。各列列出：(1) 模拟名称，(2) 共动盒尺寸 ( \(L\) )，(3) 初始重子粒子数 ( \(N_{b}\) ) 和 (4) 暗物质粒子数 ( \(N_{DM}\) )，(5) 气体和 (6) 暗物质的初始平均粒子质量，(7) 共动引力软化长度 ( \(\epsilon_{com}\) ) 和 (8) 最大本征引力软化长度 ( \(\epsilon_{prop}\) )。此处，“Thermal”指使用热AGN反馈模型的运行，而“Hybrid”指使用Huško等人 ( 2026 ) 的AGN反馈模型的运行。我们的基准分辨率是m6，除非另有说明，L200m6是本文分析中使用的默认模拟。为使此决定在视觉上清晰，我们以粗体突出显示该模拟的名称。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Three example galaxies at \(z=0\) in the L025m6 COLIBRE simulation used in this work. The top and middle panels show face-on and edge-on views of the gas and stellar disk, which were produced using R-package swift . The gas is coloured by the ionisation fraction, with blue indicating neutral gas ( H i + H 2 ), and red ionised gas (primarily HII regions when the red compact regions are in the disk). The stellar component is shown with a gold colour, with the intensity of the colour scaling on the stellar mass density. Each figure shows at the top the stellar mass and SFR of the subhalo and the subhalo index within the SOAP catalogue. We also indicate with a white bar a physical scale for reference. The bottom panels show the individual H i (blue squares) and H 2 (green circles) KS tracks of the galaxies at the top. The tracks are computed using our fiducial annuli-face method. In the bottom panels, \(\Sigma_{SFR}\) and \(\Sigma_{gas}\) are in units of \(M_{\odot}\,yr^{-1}\,kpc^{-2}\) and \(M_{\odot}\,pc^{-2}\) , respectively. The dotted lines indicate fixed depletion times of \(0.1\) , \(1\) and \(10\) Gyr as labelled. The left and middle galaxies are examples of normal star-forming galaxies, while the one on the right is an example of a strong bar galaxy that has emptied most of its inner region.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本工作中使用的L025m6 COLIBRE模拟中 \(z=0\) 的三个示例星系。上部和中部面板显示了气体和恒星盘的正面和侧面视图，这些视图是使用R-package swift生成的。气体根据电离分数着色，蓝色表示中性气体 ( H i + H 2 )，红色表示电离气体（当红色致密区域在盘中时，主要是HII区域）。恒星成分以金色显示，颜色强度随恒星质量密度缩放。每张图顶部显示了子暗晕的恒星质量、SFR以及SOAP目录中的子暗晕索引。我们还用白色条指示了用于参考的物理尺度。底部面板显示了顶部星系各自的H i（蓝色方块）和H 2（绿色圆圈）KS轨迹。这些轨迹是使用我们的基准环面方法计算的。在底部面板中，\(\Sigma_{SFR}\) 和 \(\Sigma_{gas}\) 的单位分别为 \(M_{\odot}\,yr^{-1}\,kpc^{-2}\) 和 \(M_{\odot}\,pc^{-2}\) 。虚线表示如标注所示的固定耗尽时间 \(0.1\) 、 \(1\) 和 \(10\) Gyr。左侧和中间的星系是正常恒星形成星系的例子，而右侧的星系是一个强棒状星系的例子，该星系已清空其大部分内部区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: KS relation for H i (left panels), H 2 (middle panels) and total neutral hydrogen ( H i \(+H_{2}\) ) (right panels) for galaxies at \(z=0\) with \(M_{\star}\geq 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) in the COLIBRE simulation L200m6 (see Table 1 ). The KS relations are calculated as azimuthal averages in rings with a width of 1 kpc. Black lines and shaded regions show the median and \(16^{th}-84^{th}\) percentile ranges, respectively, for COLIBRE. The bins are chosen to have a similar number of rings per bin, and always \(\geq 10\) . For reference we show in each panel dotted lines of constant gas depletion time ( \(0.1\) , \(1\) and \(10\) Gyr), as labelled. We show observations from Walter et al. ( 2008 ); Wang et al. ( 2024 ) for HI, Leroy et al. ( 2013 ); Ellison et al. ( 2020 ); Sun et al. ( 2022 ); Wong et al. ( 2024 ) for H 2 and Bigiel et al. ( 2008 , 2010 ) for total neutral gas, as labelled in each panel. For Leroy et al. ( 2013 ) we show two sets of values, using a constant and a variable CO-to-H 2 conversion factor ( \(\alpha_{CO}\) ) to demonstrate the typical level of systematic uncertainty introduced by this conversion. Note that the \(x\) - and \(y\) -axes ranges are different in each panel and chosen to span the range over which observations are reported.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：COLIBRE模拟L200m6（见表1）中 \(z=0\) 且 \(M_{\star}\geq 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) 的星系的H i（左面板）、H 2（中间面板）和总中性氢（ H i \(+H_{2}\) ）（右面板）的KS关系。KS关系计算为宽度为1 kpc的环内的方位角平均值。黑线和阴影区域分别表示COLIBRE的中位数和 \(16^{th}-84^{th}\) 百分位范围。箱体的选择使得每个箱体中的环数相似，并且始终 \(\geq 10\) 。作为参考，我们在每个面板中显示了如标注所示的恒定气体耗尽时间（ \(0.1\) 、 \(1\) 和 \(10\) Gyr）的虚线。我们展示了来自Walter等人 ( 2008 ); Wang等人 ( 2024 ) 的HI观测数据，Leroy等人 ( 2013 ); Ellison等人 ( 2020 ); Sun等人 ( 2022 ); Wong等人 ( 2024 ) 的H 2观测数据，以及Bigiel等人 ( 2008 , 2010 ) 的总中性气体观测数据，如每个面板中所标注。对于Leroy等人 ( 2013 )，我们展示了两组值，分别使用恒定和可变的CO-to-H 2转换因子 ( \(\alpha_{CO}\) )，以说明此转换引入的典型系统不确定性水平。请注意，每个面板中的 \(x\) 轴和 \(y\) 轴范围不同，并且选择为覆盖观测报告的范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The distribution of all gas particles within \(50\) pkpc of the centre of mass of galaxies at \(z=0\) with \(M_{\star}\geq 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) and \(SFR>0\) in the temperature-density plane. Contours enclose the regions where \(99\) %, \(95\) %, \(68\) % and \(50\) % of the particles are. The coloured hexbins show the H i (top), H 2 (middle) and SFR (bottom) contribution from each bin to the total HI, H 2 and SFR, respectively. The totals are obtained by summing these quantities of all the galaxies. The horizontal dotted lines mark the regions associated with the hot ionised (HIM), warm neutral (WNM) and cold neutral (CNM) media, as labelled, and as defined in Eq. 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在温度-密度平面中， \(z=0\) 时 \(M_{\star}\geq 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) 且 \(SFR>0\) 的星系质心 \(50\) pkpc 内所有气体粒子的分布。等高线包围了 \(99\) %、 \(95\) %、 \(68\) % 和 \(50\) % 粒子所在的区域。彩色六边形箱体显示了每个箱体对总HI、H 2和SFR的H i（顶部）、H 2（中部）和SFR（底部）贡献。总量是通过对所有星系的这些量求和得到的。水平虚线标记了与热电离介质（HIM）、暖中性介质（WNM）和冷中性介质（CNM）相关的区域，如标注所示，并如公式2中所定义。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Probability density function of the gas density of gas particles in the CNM (as defined in Eq. 2 ), weighted by the H 2 , H i mass or the SFR, as labelled. This is shown for \(z=0\) for gas particles in the L200 m6 (thick lines) and L025m5 (thin lines) simulations, that are in the CNM of galaxies at \(z=0\) with \(M_{\star}\geq 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) and SFR \(>0\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：CNM（如公式2所定义）中气体粒子的气体密度概率密度函数，按H 2、H i质量或SFR加权，如标注所示。此图针对 \(z=0\) 时，位于L200 m6（粗线）和L025m5（细线）模拟中 \(M_{\star}\geq 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) 且SFR \(>0\) 的星系的CNM内的气体粒子。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: As Fig. 2 but with the coloured bins showing the median stellar surface density ( \(\Sigma_{\star}\) ; top panels), gas metallicity ( \(log_{10}(O/H)\) ; middle panels) and surface density of dust ( \(\Sigma_{dust}\) , lower panels). Black lines with error bars in each panel show the median and \(16^{th}-84^{th}\) percentile ranges, respectively. Only hexbins with \(\geq 5\) objects are included.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：同图2，但彩色箱体显示中值恒星面密度 ( \(\Sigma_{\star}\)；顶部面板)、气体金属丰度 ( \(log_{10}(O/H)\)；中间面板) 和尘埃面密度 ( \(\Sigma_{dust}\)，底部面板)。每个面板中的带误差棒的黑线分别显示中位数和 \(16^{th}-84^{th}\) 百分位范围。仅包含 \(\geq 5\) 个对象的六边形箱体。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The fraction of the CNM in the form of H i (orange solid line) and H 2 (orange dotted line), and the SFR-weighted gas density (blue line with shaded region), as a function of gas metallicity. This is constructed with all the gas particles that are within \(50\) pkpc from the centres of galaxies with \(M_{\star}\geq 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) and \(SFR>0\) at \(z=0\) in the L200m6 (thick lines) and L025m5 (thin lines) simulations. The H i fraction saturates at a CNM fraction of \(\approx 0.75\) , as the rest of the gas is in the form of helium and metals. For the gas density, we show the median and the \(16^{th}-84^{th}\) percentile ranges.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：CNM中H i（橙色实线）和H 2（橙色虚线）形式的气体分数，以及SFR加权气体密度（带阴影区域的蓝线），作为气体金属丰度的函数。这是由L200m6（粗线）和L025m5（细线）模拟中 \(z=0\) 时，位于 \(M_{\star}\geq 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) 且 \(SFR>0\) 的星系中心 \(50\) pkpc 内的所有气体粒子构建的。H i分数在CNM分数约为 \(\approx 0.75\) 时饱和，因为其余气体以氦和金属的形式存在。对于气体密度，我们显示中位数和 \(16^{th}-84^{th}\) 百分位范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The correlation between the H 2 (top) and H i (bottom) depletion times, defined as \(\Sigma_{gas}/\Sigma_{SFR}\) , with gas being either H 2 or HI, and the stellar surface density, cold gas metallicity, surface density of dust, local sSFR and cool gas velocity dispersion (as defined in Eq. 3 ), as labelled. Lines and shaded regions show medians and \(16^{th}-84^{th}\) percentile ranges, respectively, for galaxies at \(z=0\) with \(M_{\star}\geq 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) . To plot all the properties on the same x-axis scale, we subtract from every property its median. We also show the Spearman correlation coefficient, \(R\) , of each correlation, as labelled.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：H 2（顶部）和H i（底部）耗尽时间（定义为 \(\Sigma_{gas}/\Sigma_{SFR}\) ，其中气体为H 2或HI）与恒星面密度、冷气体金属丰度、尘埃面密度、局部sSFR和冷气体速度弥散（如公式3所定义）之间的相关性，如标注所示。线条和阴影区域分别表示 \(z=0\) 时 \(M_{\star}\geq 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) 的星系的中位数和 \(16^{th}-84^{th}\) 百分位范围。为了将所有属性绘制在相同的x轴尺度上，我们从每个属性中减去其中位数。我们还显示了每个相关性的斯皮尔曼相关系数 \(R\) ，如标注所示。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用COLIBRE宇宙学流体动力学模拟，量化了低质量（$10^{10.75}<M_\mathrm{200c}/\mathrm{M}_\odot<10^{11}$）星系气体盘偏离流体静力学和离心平衡的程度。我们在中平面评估了完整的欧拉加速度平衡，并表明非平衡是普遍存在的：基于平衡的圆周速度估计通常有$\geq 10$%的误差（按质量计，约占中平面气体的75%）。非平衡最强且相关误差最大的区域出现在对约束暗物质密度分布至关重要的内部几kpc范围内。在时间相关力主导剩余加速度预算的强扰动系统中，通过修正圆周速度以考虑压力和对流项并不能可靠地改善其恢复。恒星反馈、自引力气体团块和活动星系核能量注入是大多数强局部扰动的原因，而大尺度引力不对称性则为非平衡提供了框架。我们将气体盘分类为相干旋转体、扰动旋转体和慢速/不规则旋转体，并表明这种分类与星系质量、形态和近期反馈示踪物等性质相关。我们样本中的大多数星系不适合标准的旋转曲线分析。观测到的矮星系旋转曲线形状的多样性可能源于非平衡气体运动而非质量分布的多样性——解决这一差异首先是气体动力学问题。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：多数低质量星系不适合标准旋转曲线分析，观测到的矮星系旋转曲线多样性可能源于气体非平衡运动而非质量分布多样性，解决这一差异首先是气体动力学问题。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Comparison of different fluid dynamical models in recovering the true circular velocity profile for a representative dwarf galaxy. Each panel shows radial profiles of reconstructed circular velocity along a fixed azimuthal direction ( \(\phi^{\prime}={0,90,180,270}^{\circ}\) ). The black solid line shows the true \(v_{c}\) from the gravitational potential; lines that are coloured and non solid show reconstructions from different models (legend). More physically complete models do not always outperform the naïve \(v_{\phi}=v_{c}\) assumption.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：不同流体动力学模型在恢复代表性矮星系真实圆周速度分布时的比较。每个面板显示了沿固定方位角方向（ \(\phi^{\prime}={0,90,180,270}^{\circ}\) ）重建的圆周速度的径向分布。黑色实线表示来自引力势的真实 \(v_{c}\) ；彩色非实线表示来自不同模型的重建结果（图例）。物理上更完整的模型并不总是优于朴素的 \(v_{\phi}=v_{c}\) 假设。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Radial distributions of the \(\varepsilon(r,\phi)\) and \(\delta(r,\phi)\) parameters (Equation ( 4 )) weighted by gas mass across the full galaxy sample, respectively \({W}(\varepsilon(r,\phi),r)\) and \({W}(\delta(r,\phi),r)\) . Each panel displays both the joint and marginal distributions of the respective parameter. Left panel : Stacked 2D histogram of \(\varepsilon\) vs. galactocentric radius, \(r\) , where the colour scale indicates the joint weighted density, \({W}(\varepsilon,r)/\Sigma{W}\) , summed across all galaxies. The vertical subpanel to the right shows the normalised marginal (1D) distribution, \({W}(\varepsilon)/\Sigma{W}\) . Right panel : Same as left panel, but for the \(\delta\) parameter. Cyan dash-dotted lines in the main panel and black dash-dotted lines in the side panel denote the parameter range associated with \(\leq 10\) per cent error in circular velocity inference based on the corresponding dynamical model. In the main subpanel, white solid and white dashed lines show the median and central \(50\) per cent envelopes of the respective conditional distributions, \({W}(\varepsilon|r)\) and \({W}(\delta|r)\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：整个星系样本中按气体质量加权的 \(\varepsilon(r,\phi)\) 和 \(\delta(r,\phi)\) 参数（方程(4)）的径向分布，分别为 \({W}(\varepsilon(r,\phi),r)\) 和 \({W}(\delta(r,\phi),r)\) 。每个面板都显示了相应参数的联合分布和边缘分布。左面板： \(\varepsilon\) 相对于星系中心距离 \(r\) 的堆叠二维直方图，其中颜色标度表示所有星系中联合加权密度 \({W}(\varepsilon,r)/\Sigma{W}\) 。右侧的垂直子面板显示了归一化的边缘（一维）分布 \({W}(\varepsilon)/\Sigma{W}\) 。右面板：与左面板相同，但针对 \(\delta\) 参数。主面板中的青色点划线以及侧面板中的黑色点划线表示基于相应动力学模型的圆周速度推断误差 \(\leq 10\) % 所对应的参数范围。在主面板中，白色实线和白色虚线分别显示了相应条件分布 \({W}(\varepsilon|r)\) 和 \({W}(\delta|r)\) 的中位数和中心 \(50\) % 包络线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: A visual summary of three different mechanisms inducing local disequilibrium in the interstellar medium considered in this study, along with their associated tracers. The figure is organized in rows, each corresponding to one disequilibrium-driving mechanism: stellar feedback (top), self-gravitating gas clumps (middle), and AGN activity (bottom). For the first two rows (stellar feedback and clumps), the panels in the left and middle columns show the same representative galaxy, as indicated by the annotated track IDs, whereas the bottom row illustrates a different system; the right column in each row always shows the corresponding sample-wide \(\varepsilon\) distribution. Left column : 2D Cartesian maps of a representative deprojected warped disc midplane \((X^{\prime},Y^{\prime})\) , colour-coded by the associated tracer field – effective pressure for both stellar and AGN feedback, and the free-fall to orbital time ratio for self-gravitating clumps. Blue and cyan dots in the upper-left panel indicate the positions of young stars (ages \(\tau_{\star}\leq 100~{Myr}\) ) and gas particles recently affected by CCSNe ( \(t_{lb}\leq 50~{Myr}\) ), respectively. Solid white contours enclose regions exceeding tracer thresholds, or satisfying proximity criteria. Middle column : The same maps, colour-coded by the disequilibrium parameter \(\varepsilon\) , with the same contours as in the left panels (now in lime) overlaid to highlight the spatial correlation between tracers and disequilibrium. Right column : Normalised 1D distributions of \(\varepsilon\) , weighted by gas mass, computed across the full dwarf galaxy sample for each process (coloured), compared to the global distribution (grey). The vertical dashed lines indicate the quasi-equilibrium range defined by \(|\varepsilon|\lesssim 0.20\) . The spatial alignment of tracer-selected regions with extreme \(\varepsilon\) values, together with their skewed and/or broadened \(\varepsilon\) distributions relative to
figures.caption_zh: 图3：本研究中考虑的星际介质中引起局部非平衡的三种不同机制及其相关示踪物的视觉总结。该图按行组织，每行对应一种非平衡驱动机制：恒星反馈（顶部）、自引力气体团块（中部）和活动星系核活动（底部）。对于前两行（恒星反馈和团块），左列和中列的面板显示相同的代表性星系，如注释的轨道ID所示，而底行则说明了一个不同的系统；每行的右列始终显示相应的全样本 \(\varepsilon\) 分布。左列：代表性去投影翘曲盘的中平面 \((X^{\prime},Y^{\prime})\) 的二维笛卡尔图，颜色编码为相关的示踪场——恒星和活动星系核反馈的有效压力，以及自引力团块的自由落体与轨道时间比。左上角面板中的蓝色和青色点分别表示年轻恒星（年龄 \(\tau_{\star}\leq 100~{Myr}\) ）和近期受CCSNe影响的气体粒子（ \(t_{lb}\leq 50~{Myr}\) ）的位置。白色实线等高线包围了超过示踪物阈值或满足接近度标准的区域。中列：相同的图，颜色编码为非平衡参数 \(\varepsilon\) ，并叠加了与左列相同的等高线（现在为青柠色），以突出示踪物与非平衡之间的空间相关性。右列：按气体质量加权的 \(\varepsilon\) 的归一化一维分布，针对每个过程（彩色）在整个矮星系样本上计算，并与全局分布（灰色）进行比较。垂直虚线表示由 \(|\varepsilon|\lesssim 0.20\) 定义的准平衡范围。示踪物选择区域与极端 \(\varepsilon\) 值的空间对齐，以及它们相对于全局分布的偏斜和/或展宽的 \(\varepsilon\) 分布，共同表明这些机制是局部非平衡的主要驱动因素。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of the gaseous disequilibrium structure for galaxies binned by their \(10~{Myr}\) –averaged AGN accretion rate. The three curves show the self-normalised, mass-weighted distribution of the disequilibrium parameter, \(\varepsilon\) , i.e. \({W}_{{I}}(\varepsilon)/\Sigma{W}_{{I}}\) , for systems in the bottom (light grey), middle (grey), and top (dark grey) terciles of the accretion-rate distribution. The vertical dashed lines mark \(|\varepsilon|=0.2\) , as in Fig. 3 . The systematic shift of the distributions – with higher-accretion systems favouring slightly larger \(\varepsilon\) magnitudes – under identical geometric selection (a \(r=2~{kpc}\) mask in the deprojected midplane), supports that AGN activity is an independent, direct driver of part of the observed non-equilibrium behaviour.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：按星系 \(10~{Myr}\) 平均活动星系核吸积率分箱的气体非平衡结构的比较。三条曲线显示了吸积率分布底部（浅灰色）、中部（灰色）和顶部（深灰色）三分位系统的自归一化、质量加权的非平衡参数 \(\varepsilon\) 分布，即 \({W}_{{I}}(\varepsilon)/\Sigma{W}_{{I}}\) 。垂直虚线标记了 \(|\varepsilon|=0.2\) ，与图3相同。在相同的几何选择下（去投影中平面内的 \(r=2~{kpc}\) 掩模），分布的系统性偏移——吸积率更高的系统倾向于稍大的 \(\varepsilon\) 幅度——支持了活动星系核活动是观测到的部分非平衡行为的独立、直接驱动因素。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Correlation between gravitational asymmetries and departures from hydrodynamical equilibrium. The horizontal axis shows the non-axisymmetric component of the local circular velocity, \(v_{c,\,{asymm}}\) , defined as the local deviation from the azimuthally averaged circular speed (Equation ( 5 )). The vertical axis shows the ‘dimensional equilibrium deviation’ parameter, \(\tilde{\varepsilon}\) , which measures the offset (in km s -1 ) between the actual orbital speed and that predicted from the steady-state Euler balance (Equation ( 6 )). Colours give the mass fraction in each \(\tilde{\varepsilon}\) bin, normalised within each column (i.e. at fixed \(v_{c,\,{asymm}}\) ), so each vertical slice represents a probability distribution. A solid and coloured (light-red) line indicates the mass-weighted median within each slice, with the shaded region showing the \(50^{{th}}\) percentile range, highlighting the trend and scatter. A clear pattern emerges: stronger gravitational asymmetries are associated with systematically larger equilibrium deviations, with increased scatter at high \(|v_{c,\,{asymm}}|\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：引力不对称性与偏离流体动力学平衡之间的相关性。横轴表示局部圆周速度的非轴对称分量 \(v_{c,\,{asymm}}\) ，定义为局部速度与方位角平均圆周速度的偏差（方程(5)）。纵轴表示“维度平衡偏差”参数 \(\tilde{\varepsilon}\) ，它测量实际轨道速度与稳态欧拉平衡预测速度之间的偏移（以km s -1 为单位，方程(6)）。颜色给出了每个 \(\tilde{\varepsilon}\) 箱内的质量分数，并在每列内归一化（即在固定的 \(v_{c,\,{asymm}}\) 下），因此每个垂直切片代表一个概率分布。一条实心的彩色（浅红色）线表示每个切片内质量加权的中位数，阴影区域显示 \(50^{{th}}\) 百分位范围，突出了趋势和离散度。一个清晰的模式出现了：更强的引力不对称性与系统性更大的平衡偏差相关，并且在高的 \(|v_{c,\,{asymm}}|\) 处离散度增加。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Cumulative accounting of the disequilibrium budget in simulated dwarf galaxy discs. Top panel : Gas-mass-weighted distributions of \(\varepsilon\) for the three physical drivers considered — AGN energy injection (yellow), stellar feedback (magenta), and self-gravitating clumps (purple) — plotted cumulatively on top of one another. The grey solid line shows the global distribution for the full sample. Overlaps between drivers are explicitly visualised: regions where AGN and stellar feedback coincide are hatched with ‘\\’ lines; overlaps between stellar feedback and self-gravitating clumps are hatched with ‘//’ lines. Colours in these overlaps follow a blending of the corresponding driver colours. For clarity, we omit the two remaining possible overlaps (AGN + clumps, and all three drivers simultaneously) as they contribute \(\ll 1\) per cent of the total mass-weight. Bottom panel : Fractional contribution of each process to the global mass-weight in each \(\varepsilon\) bin (same colour and hatch coding as above). This panel quantifies how each mechanism dominates, shares with, or yields to others across the disequilibrium spectrum. Vertical dashed lines in both panels mark the quasi-equilibrium range, \(|\varepsilon|\leq 0.20\) . Inset : The Venn diagram provides a schematic representation of how gas parcels tagged by the different physical drivers are subsets of the global gas population, illustrating their partial overlap rather than implying distinct or self-normalised distributions. To recover the distribution associated with a given driver, one should consider only the coloured regions uniquely associated with that driver and its direct combinations, rather than the cumulative stacked profile.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：模拟矮星系盘中非平衡预算的累积核算。顶部面板：所考虑的三种物理驱动因素——活动星系核能量注入（黄色）、恒星反馈（品红色）和自引力团块（紫色）——的 \(\varepsilon\) 的气体质量加权分布，彼此累积绘制。灰色实线显示了整个样本的全局分布。驱动因素之间的重叠被明确可视化：活动星系核和恒星反馈重合的区域用‘\\’线影线标记；恒星反馈和自引力团块之间的重叠用‘//’线影线标记。这些重叠中的颜色遵循相应驱动因素颜色的混合。为清晰起见，我们省略了其余两个可能的重叠（活动星系核+团块，以及所有三个驱动因素同时出现），因为它们贡献了总质量权重的 \(\ll 1\) %。底部面板：每个过程在每个 \(\varepsilon\) 箱内对全局质量权重的贡献比例（颜色和影线编码与上述相同）。该面板量化了每种机制如何在非平衡谱上主导、共享或让位于其他机制。两个面板中的垂直虚线标记了准平衡范围 \(|\varepsilon|\leq 0.20\) 。插图：维恩图提供了由不同物理驱动因素标记的气体包如何成为全局气体群体子集的示意图，说明了它们的部分重叠，而不是暗示不同的或自归一化的分布。要恢复与给定驱动因素相关的分布，应仅考虑与该驱动因素及其直接组合唯一相关的彩色区域，而不是累积的堆叠轮廓。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Visual summary of dynamical state classification of simulated gaseous discs. Each column corresponds to one of the three \(k\) -means classes (Appendix C ), colour-coded consistently across rows: Class 1 (green), Class 2 (blue), and Class 3 (red). Top row : Azimuthally averaged rotational velocity profiles, \(\langle v_{\phi}\rangle_{\phi}(r)\) , for all galaxies in each class. Middle row : Corresponding azimuthally averaged circular velocity profiles, \(\langle v_{c}\rangle_{\phi}(r)\) . Bottom row : Fractional error between the model-dependent reconstructed circular velocity, \(v_{c,model}(r,\phi)\) , and the true circular velocity from the potential \(v_{c}(r,\phi)\) , shown as class-stacked medians with \(50^{{th}}\) -percentile envelopes (both weighted) as a function of radius. Lines correspond to the centrifugal model (dark orange/dashed), the pressure-supported model (dark red/dash dotted), and the equilibrium model (dark green/dotted) – i.e., the same colour and line-style schemes as in Fig. 1 . Despite similar \(\langle v_{c}\rangle_{\phi}\) shapes across classes, the residuals with respect to \(\langle v_{\phi}\rangle_{\phi}\) reveal distinct dynamical states, which are then reflected in the structure of the fractional error distributions across different models, including the hydrodynamical equilibrium-based, reinforcing the link between centrifugal balance and hydrodynamical equilibrium.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：模拟气体盘动力学状态分类的视觉总结。每列对应三个 \(k\) -均值类别之一（附录C），在各行中颜色编码一致：类别1（绿色）、类别2（蓝色）和类别3（红色）。顶行：每个类别中所有星系的方位角平均旋转速度分布 \(\langle v_{\phi}\rangle_{\phi}(r)\) 。中间行：相应的方位角平均圆周速度分布 \(\langle v_{c}\rangle_{\phi}(r)\) 。底行：依赖于模型的重建圆周速度 \(v_{c,model}(r,\phi)\) 与来自势能的真实圆周速度 \(v_{c}(r,\phi)\) 之间的分数误差，显示为按类别堆叠的中位数以及 \(50^{{th}}\) 百分位包络线（均加权）随半径的变化。线条对应于离心模型（深橙色/虚线）、压力支持模型（深红色/点划线）和平衡模型（深绿色/点线）——即与图1相同的颜色和线型方案。尽管不同类别的 \(\langle v_{c}\rangle_{\phi}\) 形状相似，但相对于 \(\langle v_{\phi}\rangle_{\phi}\) 的残差揭示了不同的动力学状态，这随后反映在不同模型（包括基于流体动力学平衡的模型）的分数误差分布结构中，加强了离心平衡与流体动力学平衡之间的联系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Distributions of global galaxy and disc properties across the three classes: coherent rotators, perturbed rotators, and slow rotators. Each panel shows a violin plot with class on the y-axis and a given physical property on the x-axis. Yellow squares indicate the class median; black horizontal lines span the 68th percentile range. Top row, left to right: Total neutral hydrogen mass ( \(M_{H\textsc{i}}\) ), DM halo intermediate-to-major axis ratio ( \(b/a\) ), stellar distribution intermediate-to-major axis ratio ( \(b/a\) ) and gas distribution minor-to-major axis ratio ( \(c/a\) ). Bottom row, left to right: Relative strength of kinetic feedback from CCSNe, AGN feedback, and generic stellar feedback from young stars (YS), as quantified in Sec. 2.5 and discussed in the text. The rightmost panel instead shows a proxy for recent star formation: the fraction of stellar mass formed within the last gigayear relative to the total stellar mass at \(z=0\) . Systematic trends across classes offer insight into how global physical conditions and feedback processes relate to gas disc perturbation states.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：三个类别（相干旋转体、扰动旋转体和慢速旋转体）的全局星系和盘性质的分布。每个面板显示一个小提琴图，y轴为类别，x轴为给定的物理性质。黄色方块表示类别中位数；黑色水平线跨越68%百分位范围。顶行，从左到右：总中性氢质量（ \(M_{H\textsc{i}}\) ）、暗物质晕中轴与长轴比（ \(b/a\) ）、恒星分布中轴与长轴比（ \(b/a\) ）和气体分布短轴与长轴比（ \(c/a\) ）。底行，从左到右：来自CCSNe的动力学反馈、活动星系核反馈和来自年轻恒星（YS）的通用恒星反馈的相对强度，如第2.5节所述并在文中讨论。最右边的面板显示了近期恒星形成的代理：最近十亿年内形成的恒星质量相对于 \(z=0\) 时总恒星质量的分数。跨类别的系统性趋势提供了关于全局物理条件和反馈过程如何与气体盘扰动状态相关的见解。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了GLIMPSE-16043的深度JWST/NIRSpec G395M光谱，这是一个有希望的$z\sim6$星族III候选体，最初通过NIRCam测光被识别为具有微弱的[OIII]$\lambda\lambda4959,5007$发射。我们的后续观测揭示了清晰的[OIII]发射，排除了其真正的零金属丰度性质。然而，测得的谱线通量和测光数据的组合表明，其光谱能量分布需要一个异常强的巴尔末跳跃（$-1.66 \pm 0.47$ mag）和H$\alpha$等值宽度（$3750\pm1800$ Å），这些特征无法被当前的恒星+星云或纯星云光电离模型重现。唯一能在几乎$1\sigma$内接近观测结果的模型涉及一个嵌入低$T_{\rm e}$星云环境中的热（$T_{\rm eff}\!\simeq\!10^{4.7}$ K）单黑体，暗示了诸如潮汐瓦解事件或具有强盘风的微类星体等情景。这警示我们，当静止光学连续谱未被探测到时，测光选择的星族III候选体容易受到污染。受此启发，我们改进了测光星族III选择标准，以排除极端巴尔末跳跃天体的位置。修订后的标准也恢复了最近报道的光谱候选体AMORE6，表明更新后的选择在保持对真正星族III类源敏感性的同时，移除了关键污染物。将改进后的标准应用于传统巡天场和五个新发布的CANUCS透镜星团场，我们重新审视了星族III紫外光度函数，并估计星族III宇宙恒星形成率密度在$z\simeq6$--7时约为$\approx[10^{-6}$--$10^{-4}]$~$M_{\odot}$~yr$^{-1}$~cMpc$^{-3}$，落在当前理论预测的范围内。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，光度法选择的星族III候选体容易受到极端巴尔末跳跃天体的污染。改进的选择标准能有效排除这类污染源，同时保持对真正星族III源的敏感性。星族III的宇宙恒星形成率密度与当前理论预测范围一致，表明早期宇宙中可能存在少量但可探测的星族III恒星形成活动。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: NIRSpec/G395M observations of GLIMPSE-16043. The top panel shows the reduced 2D spectra from the three MSA configurations, overlaid on the NIRCam/F444W cutout, with the slit positions indicated. The bottom panel presents the co-added 1D spectrum. Key optical emission lines of H \(\alpha\) , [O iii ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 4960,5008, and H \(\beta\) are all clearly detected. Insets show the best-fit Gaussian profiles to each line with constant continuum terms The measured line fluxes, S/N values, and flux ratios are summarized in Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：GLIMPSE-16043的NIRSpec/G395M观测。上图显示了来自三个MSA配置的已处理二维光谱，叠加在NIRCam/F444W截图上，并标出了狭缝位置。下图展示了合并后的一维光谱。关键光学发射线H \(\alpha\) 、[O iii ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 4960,5008和H \(\beta\) 均被清晰探测到。插图中显示了每条谱线的最佳拟合高斯轮廓，并带有常数连续谱项。测得的谱线通量、信噪比值和通量比总结于表1。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Emission Line Measurements for GLIMPSE-16043
figures.caption_zh: 表1：GLIMPSE-16043的发射线测量结果

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison of the original Pop III model fit from fujimoto2025 and our new best-fit model incorporating the G395M spectroscopic line constraints. Left: The red line shows the best-fit model consisting of a flat continuum plus emission lines ([O iii ] + H \(\beta\) and H \(\alpha\) ), with the shaded region indicating the 1 \(\sigma\) continuum uncertainty. Open red squares denote the model-derived synthetic photometry, while black circles with error bars show the observed NIRCam photometry. The original Pop III best-fit model is shown in blue. The Pop III-like photometric feature of the faint F356W excess is no longer prominent once the extremely weak continuum is unveiled, highlighting a cautionary note for photometric Pop III searches in the absence of a direct continuum detection. At the same time, however, the revealed weak continuum results in an extraordinarily strong Balmer jump ( \(-1.66\pm 0.47\) mag) and H \(\alpha\) equivalent width ( \(3750\pm 1800\) Å) at \(z=6.20\) , features that cannot be reproduced by current photoionization models nor by pure nebular emission scenarios (Section 4.3 ), and this is exactly why the Pop III solution is favored in fujimoto2025 . Right: Illustration summarizing how the unknown underlying continuum leads to the differing interpretations of GLIMPSE-16043.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自fujimoto2025的原始星族III模型拟合与结合G395M光谱线约束的新最佳拟合模型的比较。左图：红线显示了由平坦连续谱加发射线（[O iii ] + H \(\beta\) 和H \(\alpha\) ）组成的最佳拟合模型，阴影区域表示1 \(\sigma\) 连续谱不确定性。空心红色方块表示模型导出的合成测光，而带误差棒的黑圈表示观测到的NIRCam测光。原始星族III最佳拟合模型以蓝色显示。一旦揭示了极弱的连续谱，微弱的F356W过剩这一星族III类测光特征就不再显著，这为在没有直接连续谱探测的情况下进行测光星族III搜索提供了警示。然而，同时揭示的弱连续谱导致了在\(z=6.20\)处异常强的巴尔末跳跃（\(-1.66\pm 0.47\) mag）和H \(\alpha\) 等值宽度（\(3750\pm 1800\) Å），这些特征无法被当前的光电离模型或纯星云发射情景重现（第4.3节），这正是fujimoto2025中倾向于星族III解的原因。右图：示意图总结了未知的底层连续谱如何导致对GLIMPSE-16043的不同解释。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Relation between the [O iii ]/H \(\beta\) ratio and permitted continuum level from the NIRCam photometry for GLIMPSE-16043. The solid curve and shaded area represent the best fit and 1 \(\sigma\) range at a given [O iii ]/H \(\beta\) , color-coded by the \(\chi^{2}\) value from comparing the model synthetic photometry with the observed F356W, F410M, F444W, and F480M fluxes. The vertical solid and dashed red lines denote the observed [O iii ]/H \(\beta\) ratio with NIRSpec/G395M (Section 3.2 ). The curve shape indicates that the inferred very weak continuum and the subsequent extraordinaly strong Balmer jump does not much change from the possible uncertainty of the [O iii ]/H \(\beta\) ratio.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：GLIMPSE-16043的[O iii ]/H \(\beta\) 比值与来自NIRCam测光的允许连续谱水平之间的关系。实线和阴影区域表示在给定[O iii ]/H \(\beta\) 下的最佳拟合和1 \(\sigma\) 范围，颜色编码表示将模型合成测光与观测到的F356W、F410M、F444W和F480M通量进行比较的\(\chi^{2}\) 值。垂直实线和虚线红线表示用NIRSpec/G395M观测到的[O iii ]/H \(\beta\) 比值（第3.2节）。曲线形状表明，推断出的非常弱的连续谱以及随后的异常强巴尔末跳跃，不会因[O iii ]/H \(\beta\) 比值的可能不确定性而发生太大变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of the observed properties of GLIMPSE-16043 with predictions from different photoionization models. The left panels show the parameter space of rest-frame EW(H \(\alpha\) ) versus Balmer-jump amplitude ( \(m_{200}-m_{opt,c}\) ) for each model setup: (A,B) BPASS/Pop III \(+\) Cloudy , (C) pure nebular continua, (D) blackbody \(+\) Cloudy , and (E) Cloudy with fixed \(T_{e}\) . The observed values for GLIMPSE-16043 are indicated with red symbols and uncertainties. The right panels present representative SED fits for each case, with the observed NIRCam photometry (black points) and the best-fit continuum level based on the G395M observations (red square), compared to the model spectra (blue curves). As summarized in Table 2 , none of the models simultaneously reproduce the extraordinarily strong Balmer jump and large EW(H \(\alpha\) ) observed in GLIMPSE-16043, reestabishing the persistent tension between current photoionization frameworks and the data.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：GLIMPSE-16043的观测性质与不同光电离模型预测的比较。左图显示了每种模型设置下静止系EW(H \(\alpha\) )与巴尔末跳跃幅度（\(m_{200}-m_{opt,c}\) ）的参数空间：（A,B）BPASS/星族III \(+\) Cloudy，（C）纯星云连续谱，（D）黑体 \(+\) Cloudy，以及（E）固定\(T_{e}\) 的Cloudy。GLIMPSE-16043的观测值用红色符号和不确定性表示。右图展示了每种情况下的代表性SED拟合，观测到的NIRCam测光（黑点）和基于G395M观测的最佳拟合连续谱水平（红色方块），与模型光谱（蓝色曲线）进行比较。如表2所总结，没有一个模型能同时重现GLIMPSE-16043中观测到的异常强巴尔末跳跃和大EW(H \(\alpha\) )，这再次确认了当前光电离框架与数据之间的持续张力。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Comparison of the observed properties of GLIMPSE-16043 with the different models explored in this work. Symbols indicate whether each model can reproduce the observations: \(\circ\) = consistent; \(\triangle\) = marginal or partial agreement (i.e., within \(\sim 1\sigma\) uncertainty and/or physically explainable); \(\times\) = inconsistent.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：GLIMPSE-16043的观测性质与本工作中探索的不同模型的比较。符号表示每个模型是否能重现观测结果：\(\circ\) = 一致；\(\triangle\) = 边缘或部分一致（即在\(\sim 1\sigma\) 不确定性内和/或物理上可解释）；\(\times\) = 不一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: NIRCam color–color diagrams for the Pop III candidate selection at \(z=5.6\) –6.6, presented in fujimoto2025 . The black dashed lines indicate the fiducial selection windows, designed to isolate promising Pop III candidates exhibiting the key signatures of strong H \(\alpha\) , a prominent Balmer jump, and no obvious [O iii ] emission. The cyan symbols show Pop III SED model tracks at \(z=5.6\) –6.6 ( zackrisson2011 ; nakajima2022 ) , assuming the gas covering fraction of 1.0, while the colored circles indicate metal-enriched galaxy templates at \(z=5\) –7.5 generated with Bagpipes ( carnall2018 ) . For both Pop III and metal-enriched galaxies, the symbol size decreases with increasing redshift, from \(z=5.6\) to \(z=6.6\) in steps of 0.1. The open black pentagon marks GLIMPSE-16043. The red pentagon marks the recently identified spectroscopic Pop III candidate AMORE6 ( morishita2025 ) , which is not included in the UNCOVER+Mega DR3 catalog due to blending with a nearby bright galaxy and was therefore missed in fujimoto2025 . The solid black curve traces the locus of exotic Balmer-jump objects (see Sec. 5.1 ), which overlaps with the original Pop III selection window and explains the contamination that occurred in the case of GLIMPSE-16043.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：fujimoto2025中提出的\(z=5.6\) –6.6星族III候选体选择的NIRCam颜色-颜色图。黑色虚线表示基准选择窗口，旨在隔离有希望的星族III候选体，这些候选体表现出强H \(\alpha\) 、显著巴尔末跳跃和无明显[O iii ]发射的关键特征。青色符号显示了\(z=5.6\) –6.6的星族III SED模型轨迹（zackrisson2011；nakajima2022），假设气体覆盖因子为1.0，而彩色圆圈表示用Bagpipes（carnall2018）生成的\(z=5\) –7.5的富金属星系模板。对于星族III和富金属星系，符号大小随红移增加而减小，从\(z=5.6\) 到\(z=6.6\) ，步长为0.1。空心黑色五边形标记GLIMPSE-16043。红色五边形标记最近识别的光谱星族III候选体AMORE6（morishita2025），由于与附近亮星系混合，它未被包含在UNCOVER+Mega DR3星表中，因此在fujimoto2025中被遗漏。黑色实线追踪了极端巴尔末跳跃天体的位置（见第5.1节），该位置与原始星族III选择窗口重叠，解释了GLIMPSE-16043案例中发生的污染。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Updated NIRCam color-color selection for Pop III candidates at \(z=5.6\) –6.6. The symbols are the same as Figure 5 . The red dashed lines indicate the revised color cuts, which cleanly separate the Pop III model tracks (cyan symbols) from the color spaces of metal-enriched galaxies. The revised selection avoids the locus of exotic Balmer-jump objects (black curve in Fig. 5 ), while still recovering both simulated Pop III tracks and the spectroscopic candidate AMORE6 (red filled pentagon). The open red symbols represent tentative candidates found in strongly lensed LAEs: A370-z6LAE-1c at \(z=5.94\) (square) and A370-z6LAE-2 at \(z=6.17\) (triangle) both identified in the Abell 370 field (see Appendix C ).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：\(z=5.6\) –6.6星族III候选体的更新NIRCam颜色-颜色选择。符号与图5相同。红色虚线表示修订后的颜色切割，将星族III模型轨迹（青色符号）与富金属星系的颜色空间清晰分开。修订后的选择避免了极端巴尔末跳跃天体的位置（图5中的黑色曲线），同时仍然恢复了模拟的星族III轨迹和光谱候选体AMORE6（红色实心五边形）。空心红色符号表示在强透镜LAE中发现的暂定候选体：Abell 370场中识别的\(z=5.94\) 的A370-z6LAE-1c（正方形）和\(z=6.17\) 的A370-z6LAE-2（三角形）（见附录C）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团XLSSC 122是一个罕见的系统，红移z=1.98，在宇宙年龄仅为当前三分之一时，其成员星系已惊人地演化。利用深度的JWST/NIRCam成像，我们进行了弱引力透镜分析并重建了星系团的质量分布，发现质量峰值与X射线峰值及最亮星系团星系的位置重合。我们得到的质量和浓度估计值分别为M_{200c}=1.6±0.3×10^{14} M⊙和c_{200c}=6.3±0.3，与最近的强引力透镜估计一致。特别是高浓度值促使我们根据经验和模拟推导的质量-浓度关系进行检验。将我们的弱引力透镜质量图与钱德拉X射线数据、MeerKAT射电成像、ALMA+ACA/ACT苏尼亚耶夫-泽尔多维奇（SZ）映射以及新的JWST星系团内光测量相结合，我们识别出各数据集间一致的东北-西南方向延展，以及SZ峰值与质量/X射线峰值沿同一轴的显著偏移，表明存在显著的并合活动。因此，XLSSC 122作为JWST高红移透镜研究的试点，展示了该望远镜在z~2处测绘星系团质量分布的独特能力，并激励利用联合透镜、X射线、SZ和射电数据对类似系统进行均匀采样，以探测宇宙正午时期的星系团组装。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，XLSSC 122作为JWST高红移透镜研究的试点，证明了JWST在z~2处测绘星系团质量分布的独特能力，为研究宇宙正午时期的星系团组装提供了重要案例。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Color composite image of JWST/NIRCam module A for the XLSSC 122 field. Spectroscopically selected cluster members (green) and photometrically selected members (magenta) are indicated, and the BCG is marked with a yellow square.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：XLSSC 122天区JWST/NIRCam模块A的彩色合成图像。光谱选出的星系团成员（绿色）和测光选出的成员（品红色）已标出，BCG用黄色方块标记。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Top: pectroscopically confirmed cluster members are indicated in orange, uiescent members highlighted with red squares. The BCG and all quiescent members are spectroscopically confirmed members of the cluster. Galaxies selected as background sources for the lensing analysis are marked in blue, and the BCG is ith a red star. Bottom: Comparison of number density distributions binned by \(m_{{F200W,\,AUTO}}\) . The JADES-GS control field is consistent with both modules in the XLSSC 122 field, with the significant deviation in the final magnitude bin attributed to significantly deeper limiting magnitudes ( \(m_{{F200W,\,AUTO}}\gtrsim 30\) ) in portions of the control field.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：上：光谱确认的星系团成员以橙色表示，宁静成员以红色方块突出显示。BCG和所有宁静成员均为光谱确认的星系团成员。被选为透镜分析背景源的天体以蓝色标记，BCG以红色星号表示。下：按\(m_{{F200W,\,AUTO}}\)分箱的数密度分布比较。JADES-GS控制场与XLSSC 122天区的两个模块一致，最终星等箱中的显著偏差归因于控制场部分区域显著更深的极限星等（\(m_{{F200W,\,AUTO}}\gtrsim 30\)）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: XLSSC 122 WL results. Left: Mass contours produced with MARS . The contours start at the \(1\sigma\) level and increase in steps of \(1\sigma\) . The peak convergence is \(\sim\!7.8\sigma\) , and the peak convergence contour after smoothing with a Gaussian kernel ( \(\sigma\approx 3^{\prime\prime}\) ) is at \(5\sigma\) . The BCG is marked with a yellow cross, while the WL, Radio, SZ, and X-ray peak positions are denoted with a red square, green triangle, magenta diamond, and blue circle, respectively. The dotted box marks the region shown in Figure LABEL:fig:matrixplot . Right: Binned tangential shear (blue dots) and cross shear (black crosses) are shown for visualization purposes. The curves and corresponding labels correspond to profiles fit to the unbinned data ive different elations, with our best-fit model using the Prada et al. ( 2012 ) prescriptionfig:wl
figures.caption_zh: 图3：XLSSC 122的弱引力透镜结果。左：使用MARS生成的质量轮廓。轮廓从\(1\sigma\)水平开始，以\(1\sigma\)步长递增。峰值收敛度为\(\sim\!7.8\sigma\)，经高斯核（\(\sigma\approx 3^{\prime\prime}\)）平滑后的峰值收敛轮廓位于\(5\sigma\)。BCG以黄色十字标记，而弱引力透镜、射电、SZ和X射线峰值位置分别以红色方块、绿色三角形、品红色菱形和蓝色圆圈表示。虚线框标记了图LABEL:fig:matrixplot中显示的区域。右：为可视化目的显示的分箱切向剪切（蓝点）和交叉剪切（黑叉）。曲线及对应标签表示对未分箱数据拟合的轮廓，采用五种不同关系，我们的最佳拟合模型使用Prada等人（2012）的公式。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Multiwavelength view of XLSSC 122 within the region marked by the dotted box in Figure LABEL:fig:wl . Each column displays the following datasets from left to right: WL mass map, Chandra X-ray, MeerKAT radio, ACA+ALMA SZ, BCG+ICL, cluster member number density. Each row shows the corresponding contours for these datasets in the same order from top to bottomfig:matrixplot
figures.caption_zh: 图4：XLSSC 122在由图LABEL:fig:wl中虚线框标记区域内的多波段视图。每列从左到右显示以下数据集：弱引力透镜质量图、钱德拉X射线、MeerKAT射电、ACA+ALMA SZ、BCG+ICL、星系团成员数密度。每行从上到下以相同顺序显示这些数据集的对应轮廓。

figures.caption_en: Figure A.1: Residual ellipticity and size measurements for the PCA and STPSF models. Top: Complex ellipticity components of stars measured in the XLSSC 122 field (black circles), and residual STPSF model (red triangles) and PCA model (blue squares) ellipticities computed as the difference between observed and predicted values. The outer circle represents an ellipticity of \(|e|=0.02\) , while the inner dotted circle corresponds to \(|e|=0.01\) . Bottom: STPSF (red) and PCA (blue) model residual sizes computed as the difference between observed star sizes and model sizes.
figures.caption_zh: 图A.1：PCA和STPSF模型的残余椭圆率和大小测量。上：在XLSSC 122天区测量的恒星复椭圆率分量（黑色圆圈），以及残余STPSF模型（红色三角形）和PCA模型（蓝色方块）椭圆率，计算为观测值与预测值之差。外圆代表椭圆率\(|e|=0.02\)，内虚线圆对应\(|e|=0.01\)。下：STPSF（红色）和PCA（蓝色）模型残余大小，计算为观测恒星大小与模型大小之差。

figures.caption_zh: 图B.1：fig:tng

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过结合三维辐射磁流体动力学（R-MHD）模拟与合成偏振观测，研究了HII区边界柱状结构中的磁场形态和强度。我们的分析聚焦于模拟中自洽形成的第一个柱状结构，并将其作为概念验证，用于测试Davis-Chandrasekhar-Fermi（DCF）方法在外部因素主导条件下的适用性。该柱状结构由电离前沿压缩致密团块产生，形成磁对齐的细长结构，其形态和场构型与M16柱状结构等真实系统观测到的结果高度相似。850 $μ$m的合成尘埃偏振图再现了模拟柱状结构的大尺度磁场形态，证实了偏振测量是磁场几何结构的可靠示踪剂。然而，使用DCF类方法推断的磁场强度系统性地高估了模拟中的内在值，因子$\gtrsim 2$。我们将这一差异归因于场对齐和放大主要由膨胀HII区的外部气体压力驱动，而非内部湍流，从而违反了DCF方法的关键假设。我们的结果强调，在将经典DCF分析应用于柱状结构或其他由外部压缩塑造的结构时需要谨慎。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，DCF方法的关键假设在外部压缩主导的结构中不成立，应用于柱状结构或其他由外部压缩塑造的结构时需要谨慎。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Evolution of the ratio between the major and minor axes of the dense gas structure, computed from the inertia matrix. Representative slices in the \(z\) – \(y\) plane are shown to visually illustrate the evolutionary stages at the corresponding times. The phase corresponding to the pillar’s lifetime is labeled “Pillar” and highlighted in purple.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：由惯性矩阵计算的致密气体结构长轴与短轴之比的演化。展示了\(z\) – \(y\)平面中的代表性切片，以直观说明相应时间点的演化阶段。柱状结构存在期对应的阶段标记为“Pillar”并以紫色高亮。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Slices in the \(z\) - \(y\) plane illustrating the formation process of the first pillar in the simulation. The upper and lower panels show the number density and the magnetic field strength at three different times. The corresponding evolutionary stages (TC, AC, and Pillar) are indicated by labels in the upper left corner of the panels. Black contours indicate number density levels of \(3\times 10^{2},\,1\times 10^{3}\,{and}\,1\times 10^{4}\,{cm}^{-3}\) . Black arrows depict the velocity field, while red line segments indicate the magnetic field orientation and relative strength. The blue star marks the position of one of the sources embedded within the pillar tip (symbol size not to scale).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：\(z\) - \(y\)平面中的切片，展示了模拟中第一个柱状结构的形成过程。上、下两行分别显示三个不同时间点的数密度和磁场强度。相应的演化阶段（TC、AC和Pillar）由面板左上角的标签指示。黑色等高线表示数密度水平\(3\times 10^{2},\,1\times 10^{3}\,{and}\,1\times 10^{4}\,{cm}^{-3}\)。黑色箭头描绘速度场，红色线段表示磁场方向和相对强度。蓝色星号标记嵌入柱状结构尖端的一个源的位置（符号大小未按比例）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Evolution of the mean (black line, the gray shaded region indicates its standard deviation) and rms (orange line) magnetic field strengths in the dense gas \(n\geq 300\,{cm^{-3}}\) over time. The rms magnetic field strengths in the pillar stage ( \(t\sim 0.6-0.9\) Myr) range from 38 to 27 \(\mu\) G.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：致密气体（\(n\geq 300\,{cm^{-3}}\)）中平均（黑线，灰色阴影区域表示其标准差）和均方根（橙色线）磁场强度随时间的演化。柱状结构阶段（\(t\sim 0.6-0.9\) Myr）的均方根磁场强度范围为38至27 \(\mu\) G。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Left panel: Column density map of the simulation at \(0.7\) Myr (right colour bar). The pseudo-vectors show the magnetic-field orientation projected onto the \(z\) – \(y\) plane, with colours indicating the line-of-sight, density-weighted magnetic-field strength (left colour bar). Right panel: the corresponding \(p/\delta p\) map from synthetic polarisation observations. All pixels and polarisation vectors associated with the pillar have a signal-to-noise ratio of \(I/\delta I>10\) . Black, cyan, and magenta segments indicate \(p/\delta p 3\) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图：模拟在\(0.7\) Myr时的柱密度图（右侧色标）。伪矢量显示投影到\(z\) – \(y\)平面上的磁场方向，颜色表示视线方向密度加权的磁场强度（左侧色标）。右图：来自合成偏振观测的相应\(p/\delta p\)图。所有与柱状结构相关的像素和偏振矢量均满足信噪比\(I/\delta I>10\)。黑色、青色和品红色线段分别表示\(p/\delta p 3\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Top panel: Evolution of the dispersion in polarization angles, \(\delta\psi\) , at different times measured in the self-consistent model. The magenta dashed line represents \(\delta\psi=25^{\circ}\) , while the brown dashed line represents \(\delta\psi=14^{\circ}\) .4, as reported by P18 in their analysis of B POS . The solid black line corresponds to \(\delta\psi\) measured in the pillar using only the criteria described in Section 2.2 . The solid red, green, and blue lines represent \(\delta\psi\) in the pillar using masks with signal-to-noise ratios of \(I/\delta I>10\) and \(p/\delta p>1\) , 2, and 3, respectively. Bottom panel: Magnetic field strength as a function of time in the self-consistent model. The orange solid line represents B rms , the black solid line represents B mean , and the gray shaded region indicates its standard deviation. The dashed and solid blue lines correspond to B POS derived from synthetic observations using \(\Delta v=1.2\) and \(2.2\) km s -1 , respectively. Similarly, the dashed and solid red lines represent B POS,S21 measured using the method of Skalidis et al. ( 2021 ) . The green shaded region (B POS,P18 ) indicates the range of values reported by P18 , from 170 \(\mu\) G to 320 \(\mu\) G in Pillar II. Line segments for B POS and B POS,S21 are highlighted where \(\delta\psi 3\) and \(I/\delta I>10\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：上图：自洽模型中不同时间点测量的偏振角色散\(\delta\psi\)的演化。品红色虚线表示\(\delta\psi=25^{\circ}\)，棕色虚线表示\(\delta\psi=14^{\circ}\)。4，如P18在其B POS分析中所报告。黑色实线对应仅使用第2.2节所述标准在柱状结构中测量的\(\delta\psi\)。红色、绿色和蓝色实线分别表示使用信噪比掩膜\(I/\delta I>10\)且\(p/\delta p>1\)、2和3时柱状结构中的\(\delta\psi\)。下图：自洽模型中磁场强度随时间的变化。橙色实线表示B rms，黑色实线表示B mean，灰色阴影区域表示其标准差。蓝色虚线和实线分别对应使用\(\Delta v=1.2\)和\(2.2\) km s -1 从合成观测导出的B POS。类似地，红色虚线和实线表示使用Skalidis等人（2021）方法测量的B POS,S21。绿色阴影区域（B POS,P18）表示P18在Pillar II中报告的范围，从170 \(\mu\) G到320 \(\mu\) G。B POS和B POS,S21的线段在\(\delta\psi 3\)且\(I/\delta I>10\)处高亮。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Comparison between the physical parameters of the simulated pillar (at \(t=0.7\) Myr) and representative observational values for Pillar II in M16.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：模拟柱状结构（在\(t=0.7\) Myr时）的物理参数与M16中Pillar II的代表性观测值之间的比较。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用MaNGA巡天数据，对1813个活动星系核（AGN）进行了空间分辨的恒星形成、气体电离和外流特性研究。根据中红外颜色、光学光谱和/或射电测光，将这些AGN分为红外（IR）、宽线（BL）、窄线（NL）和射电（RD）AGN。我们还提供了不同波段AGN功率的估计。发现AGN发生率随恒星质量呈幂律增长，高质量端以RDAGN为主，低质量端以NLAGN为主。与质量匹配的非AGN对应体相比，IRAGN、BLAGN和NLAGN在中心区域平均表现出更高的比恒星形成率、更年轻的星族和更强的电离。相比之下，RDAGN的径向轮廓与宁静星系相似。[OIII]外流在BL/IRAGN中更常见且更强，而RDAGN平均没有外流特征。外流发生率随[OIII]光度增加，BL/IRAGN中的外流特征平均从核区延伸至约2 kpc。我们进一步讨论了AGN及其宿主星系可能的演化序列：具有强发射线或尘埃环的AGN存在于恒星形成星系中；随后出现年轻致密射电喷流，宿主星系逐渐熄灭；最终演化为具有较大射电喷流的全局宁静系统，阻止进一步的气体冷却。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，提出AGN演化序列：强发射线或尘埃环存在于恒星形成星系中，随后出现年轻致密射电喷流，宿主星系逐渐熄灭，最终演化为具有较大射电喷流的全局静止系统，阻止进一步气体冷却。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : The galaxy stellar mass function of our parent sample (blue), recovered using volume weights. The red line shows the mass function of the full MaNGA Primary+ and Secondary sample. Our sample follows a mass function similar to that derived from the low-redshift SDSS sample (Baldry et al. , 2008 ) , and is thus mass-complete at \(M_{\star}>\sim 10^{9.1}M_{\odot}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：母样本（蓝色）的星系恒星质量函数，使用体积权重恢复。红线显示完整MaNGA Primary+和Secondary样本的质量函数。我们的样本遵循与低红移SDSS样本（Baldry et al., 2008）相似的质量函数，因此在\(M_{\star}>\sim 10^{9.1}M_{\odot}\)处质量完备。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : AGN classification diagnostics. The criteria are shown as black dashed lines in each panel. BLAGNs, NLAGNs, IRAGNs, RDAGNs, and non-AGNs are shown in blue squares, green triangles, orange circles, red stars, and grey dots, respectively. The RDAGNs are selected by at least 0.7 dex stronger radio emission than that predicated by their SFR (e.g. Best et al. , 2023 ; Jin et al. , 2025 ) . NLAGNs are required to have \(H\alpha\) equivalent width larger than 6 (Cid Fernandes et al. , 2010 ) , and \(P1>-0.5\) . P1 is defined as \(0.63\,log([NII]/H\alpha)+0.51\,log([SII]/H\alpha)+0.59\,log([OIII]/H\beta)\) , which is proposed in Ji and Yan ( 2020 ) for MaNGA NLAGN classification. IRAGNs are selected based on their W1-W2 colour, and the BLAGNs are defined by the existence of broad Balmer lines. The \(\sigma_{H\alpha}\) in the lower right panel represents the velocity dispersion of the broad-line component for BLAGNs and of the narrow-line component for other galaxies; consequently, BLAGNs occupy a distinct region. If an AGN is classified into multiple types, it will be plotted at the same location using the corresponding symbols.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：AGN分类诊断图。每个面板中，判据以黑色虚线显示。BLAGN、NLAGN、IRAGN、RDAGN和非AGN分别以蓝色方块、绿色三角形、橙色圆圈、红色星号和灰色点表示。RDAGN通过射电辐射比其SFR预测值至少强0.7 dex来选取（例如Best et al., 2023；Jin et al., 2025）。NLAGN要求\(H\alpha\)等值宽度大于6（Cid Fernandes et al., 2010），且\(P1>-0.5\)。P1定义为\(0.63\,log([NII]/H\alpha)+0.51\,log([SII]/H\alpha)+0.59\,log([OIII]/H\beta)\)，由Ji and Yan (2020)提出用于MaNGA NLAGN分类。IRAGN基于W1-W2颜色选取，BLAGN由宽巴尔默线的存在定义。右下角面板中的\(\sigma_{H\alpha}\)表示BLAGN的宽线分量和其他星系窄线分量的速度弥散；因此，BLAGN占据一个独特区域。如果一个AGN被分为多种类型，将使用相应符号在同一位置绘制。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : The Venn diagram showing the overlap between different AGN populations. IRAGNs, BLAGNs, NLAGNs, and RDAGNs are shown in orange, blue, green, and red, respectively. The fraction listed in each section is the percentage of the AGNs in that section relative to the total AGN sample, and is corrected by the volume weights. RDAGNs are the most populous AGN population, and most of them are not classified as other AGN types, while BLAGNs are relatively rare and most of them are also classified as other AGN types. Four regions show zero occupancy, as NLAGNs and BLAGNs are mutually exclusive.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：维恩图显示不同AGN群体之间的重叠。IRAGN、BLAGN、NLAGN和RDAGN分别以橙色、蓝色、绿色和红色显示。每个部分列出的比例是该部分AGN相对于总AGN样本的百分比，并经过体积权重校正。RDAGN是数量最多的AGN群体，且大多数未被分类为其他AGN类型，而BLAGN相对稀少，且大多数也被分类为其他AGN类型。四个区域显示为零占用，因为NLAGN和BLAGN互斥。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : The luminosity of different AGN tracers across the MaNGA redshift range. Corresponding AGNs are shown as stars and colour-coded by their AGN fraction in each tracer. Non-AGNs are shown as grey dots. We also plot the typical luminosity of the local luminosity functions in red dashed lines, which are derived from Comparat et al. ( 2016 ) ([ O iii ]), Huang et al. ( 2007 ) (8 \(\mu\) m, converted to 6 \(\mu\) m), and Cochrane et al. ( 2023 ) (150 MHz, converted to 144 MHz), respectively. The AGN sample includes emission line AGNs with \(L_{[OIII]}\) larger than \(10^{39}\,erg\,s^{-1}\) , IRAGNs with \(L_{6\mu m}\) larger than \(10^{42}\,erg\,s^{-1}\) , and RDAGNs with \(L_{RDAGN}\) larger than \(10^{21}\,W\,Hz^{-1}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：不同AGN示踪剂在MaNGA红移范围内的光度。相应的AGN以星号显示，并根据每个示踪剂中的AGN比例进行颜色编码。非AGN以灰色点显示。我们还以红色虚线绘制了局部光度函数的典型光度，分别来自Comparat et al. (2016)（[O iii]）、Huang et al. (2007)（8 \(\mu\)m，转换为6 \(\mu\)m）和Cochrane et al. (2023)（150 MHz，转换为144 MHz）。AGN样本包括\(L_{[OIII]}\)大于\(10^{39}\,erg\,s^{-1}\)的发射线AGN、\(L_{6\mu m}\)大于\(10^{42}\,erg\,s^{-1}\)的IRAGN，以及\(L_{RDAGN}\)大于\(10^{21}\,W\,Hz^{-1}\)的RDAGN。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Fraction of galaxies hosting different AGN populations as a function of stellar mass, specific star formation rate (sSFR), and black hole mass. The fraction is already corrected by the volume weights. IRAGNs, BLAGNs, NLAGNs, and RDAGNs are shown in orange, blue, green, and red, respectively, and the total AGN fraction is shown in black. The AGN fraction increases with \(M_{\star}\) and \(M_{BH}\) , and is contributed by different AGN populations at different mass ranges. Along the sSFR axis, the AGN fraction shows a peak at the ‘green valley’ region (the grey shaded area), and becomes dominant in the most strongly starbursting galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：不同AGN群体宿主星系的比例作为恒星质量、比恒星形成率（sSFR）和黑洞质量的函数。该比例已通过体积权重校正。IRAGN、BLAGN、NLAGN和RDAGN分别以橙色、蓝色、绿色和红色显示，总AGN比例以黑色显示。AGN比例随\(M_{\star}\)和\(M_{BH}\)增加，并由不同质量范围内的不同AGN群体贡献。沿sSFR轴，AGN比例在“绿谷”区域（灰色阴影区域）出现峰值，并在最强星暴星系中占主导地位。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Cumulative distribution functions of the nuclear \(A_{V}\) from stellar population synthesis and Balmer decrement ( \(H\alpha/H\beta\) ) for different AGN populations. Volume weights are applied. The distributions are shown for IRAGNs (orange), BLAGNs (blue), NLAGNs (green), and RDAGNs (red). The non-AGN population is shown in grey dashed lines. The \(A_{V}\) from stellar population synthesis shows that IRAGNs and NLAGNs have higher \(A_{V}\) values than normal galaxies, while BLAGNs and RDAGNs have slightly lower \(A_{V}\) values (K-S test, \(p
figures.caption_zh: 图6：不同AGN群体的核区\(A_{V}\)（来自星族合成和巴尔默减缩\(H\alpha/H\beta\)）的累积分布函数。应用了体积权重。分布显示为IRAGN（橙色）、BLAGN（蓝色）、NLAGN（绿色）和RDAGN（红色）。非AGN群体以灰色虚线显示。来自星族合成的\(A_{V}\)显示，IRAGN和NLAGN的\(A_{V}\)值高于正常星系，而BLAGN和RDAGN的\(A_{V}\)值略低（K-S检验，\(p

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : The distance to the star formation main sequence ( \(\Delta{SFMS}\) ) versus stellar mass ( \(M_{\star}\) ) for different AGN populations as well as normal galaxies in our parent sample. The grey contours in each panel show the distribution of normal galaxies. AGN hosts are shown in coloured stars. The panels, from left to right, show AGN hosts coloured by their AGN types, nuclear \(L_{[OIII]}\) , and \(L_{144MHz}\) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：不同AGN群体以及母样本中正常星系的距恒星形成主序距离（\(\Delta{SFMS}\)）与恒星质量（\(M_{\star}\)）的关系。每个面板中的灰色等高线显示正常星系的分布。AGN宿主以彩色星号显示。从左到右的面板分别显示按AGN类型、核区\(L_{[OIII]}\)和\(L_{144MHz}\)着色的AGN宿主。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8 : Radial profiles of sSFR, Dn4000, and the ionisation parameter for different AGN populations, compared to their mass-matched control samples. The control samples are divided into star-forming (light grey dashed lines), green valley (grey dash–dotted lines), and quiescent (black dotted lines) galaxies. The panels, from left to right, show IRAGNs, BLAGNs, NLAGNs, and RDAGNs, respectively, shown in orange, blue, green, and red lines. sSFR (in units of \(yr^{-1}\) ), Dn4000, and the ionisation parameter are shown from top to bottom panels and indicate the current star formation, average age of the stellar population (long-term star formation), and gas ionisation state, respectively. Shaded regions indicate the 95% confidence intervals estimated through bootstrapping.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：不同AGN群体的sSFR、Dn4000和电离参数的径向轮廓，与其质量匹配的控制样本进行比较。控制样本分为恒星形成（浅灰色虚线）、绿谷（灰色点划线）和宁静（黑色点线）星系。从左到右的面板分别显示IRAGN、BLAGN、NLAGN和RDAGN，以橙色、蓝色、绿色和红色线条表示。从上到下面板分别显示sSFR（单位为\(yr^{-1}\)）、Dn4000和电离参数，分别指示当前恒星形成、星族平均年龄（长期恒星形成）和气体电离状态。阴影区域表示通过自助法估计的95%置信区间。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）是最近由JWST发现的一类活动星系核（AGNs），它们显示出独特的巴尔末跃迁特征，包括显著的巴尔末吸收、明显的巴尔末断裂以及宽Hα发射的大等值宽度，所有这些都表明其中心黑洞周围存在稠密气体。LRDs的另一个关键特性是其大的巴尔末减缩，宽Hα/Hβ线通量比远超Case B复合值。这些Hα/Hβ>3的比值常被解释为严重尘埃消光（A_V≳3 mag）的证据，然而这种尘埃不可避免地会产生强烈的近到中红外再辐射，这在JWST/MIRI观测中几乎看不到。为了探究这些观测到的巴尔末特征的物理起源，我们通过无尘、稠密气体进行了辐射传输计算。我们表明，观测到的大巴尔末减缩（Hα/Hβ和Hα/Hγ）自然源于巴尔末共振散射，无需引入尘埃。在足够高的密度（n_H ≳ 10^{8-10} cm^{-3}）下，升高的多重巴尔末线比值收敛到与尘埃红化非常相似的值，这解释了为什么LRD光谱类似于被遮蔽的AGNs。此外，当巴尔末断裂和宽巴尔末线起源于同一稠密气体时，它们的强度在物理上是关联的，这使我们能够约束密度结构并推断出低宽线区气体质量约为O(10 M_⊙)。这样小的气体储层即使单个超新星也能使其富集，这意味着具有观测到的低金属丰度特征的LRDs在其核区可能经历了极少的恒星形成。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：小红点AGN的大巴尔末减缩比可由无尘高密度气体中的巴尔末共振散射解释，无需引入尘埃消光。这种小气体储层意味着即使单个超新星也能显著富集金属，解释了观测到的低金属丰度特征，表明这些AGN核区经历了极少的恒星形成。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Left: Transmitted AGN SEDs attenuated by a dust-free gas slab with a gas metallicity \(0.1~Z_{\odot}\) . Nebular emission from the cloud is not included. All spectra correspond to a fixed column density of \(N_{{H}}=10^{24}\,{cm}^{-2}\) and hydrogen volume densities ranging from \(n_{{H}}=10^{7}\) to \(10^{12}\,{cm}^{-3}\) . Two vertical lines mark the wavelengths \(\lambda_{{B,blue}}=3600\,\) Å and \(\lambda_{{B,red}}=4000\,\) Å used to measure the Balmer break strength. The incident AGN continuum is shown with the dashed-dotted curve for comparison. Right: Balmer break strength defined by \(f_{\lambda_{B,red}}/f_{\lambda_{B,blue}}\) as a function of hydrogen volume density for column densities \(N_{{H}}=10^{22}-10^{24}\,{cm}^{-2}\) . The Balmer break strength rapidly increases within \(n_{H}\simeq 10^{8-9}~{cm}^{-3}\) , reflecting the enhanced population of atomic hydrogen in the \(n=2\) level.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：经无尘气体板衰减的透射AGN SED，气体金属丰度为\(0.1~Z_{\odot}\)。未包含来自云的星云发射。所有光谱对应固定柱密度\(N_{{H}}=10^{24}\,{cm}^{-2}\)和氢体积密度范围\(n_{{H}}=10^{7}\)至\(10^{12}\,{cm}^{-3}\)。两条竖线标记用于测量巴尔末断裂强度的波长\(\lambda_{{B,blue}}=3600\,\) Å和\(\lambda_{{B,red}}=4000\,\) Å。入射AGN连续谱以点划线曲线显示以供比较。右图：巴尔末断裂强度定义为\(f_{\lambda_{B,red}}/f_{\lambda_{B,blue}}\)，作为柱密度\(N_{{H}}=10^{22}-10^{24}\,{cm}^{-2}\)下氢体积密度的函数。巴尔末断裂强度在\(n_{H}\simeq 10^{8-9}~{cm}^{-3}\)内迅速增加，反映了原子氢在\(n=2\)能级的布居增强。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Left: Emitted continuum and line spectra for a hydrogen column density of \(N_{{H}}=10^{24}\,{cm}^{-2}\) . From the bottom to the top, each curve represents the case with hydrogen volume density of \(n_{H}=10^{2}\) , \(10^{3}\) , \(10^{5}\) , \(10^{7}\) , \(10^{9}\) , and \(10^{11}~{cm}^{-3}\) . Vertical dashed lines mark the wavelengths of the Balmer lines ( \(\lambda_{{H}\alpha}=6563\,\) Å, \(\lambda_{{H}\beta}=4861\,\) Å and \(\lambda_{{H}\gamma}=4341\,\) Å) and the [O III] \(\lambda\lambda 4959,5007\) emission lines. The numbers adjacent to curves of the same color indicate the Balmer decrement, \(F({H}\alpha)/F({H}\beta)\) , measured directly from the corresponding SEDs. Right: Balmer decrement as a function of hydrogen volume density \(n_{{H}}\) for different hydrogen column densities \(N_{{H}}=10^{22}-10^{24}\,{cm}^{-2}\) . The horizontal dashed line marks the Case B recombination value of 2.86. Square and star symbols denote the characteristic densities at which H \(\beta\) and Pa \(\alpha\) become optically thick, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：氢柱密度为\(N_{{H}}=10^{24}\,{cm}^{-2}\)时的发射连续谱和线光谱。从下到上，每条曲线代表氢体积密度为\(n_{H}=10^{2}\)、\(10^{3}\)、\(10^{5}\)、\(10^{7}\)、\(10^{9}\)和\(10^{11}~{cm}^{-3}\)的情况。垂直虚线标记巴尔末线（\(\lambda_{{H}\alpha}=6563\,\) Å、\(\lambda_{{H}\beta}=4861\,\) Å和\(\lambda_{{H}\gamma}=4341\,\) Å）以及[O III] \(\lambda\lambda 4959,5007\)发射线的波长。相同颜色曲线旁边的数字表示直接从相应SED测量的巴尔末减缩\(F({H}\alpha)/F({H}\beta)\)。右图：巴尔末减缩作为不同氢柱密度\(N_{{H}}=10^{22}-10^{24}\,{cm}^{-2}\)下氢体积密度\(n_{{H}}\)的函数。水平虚线标记Case B复合值2.86。方形和星形符号分别表示Hβ和Paα变得光学厚的特征密度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Optical depths of the hydrogen recombination lines (H \(\alpha\) , H \(\beta\) , and Pa \(\alpha\) ) as a function of hydrogen volume density \(n_{{H}}\) for a fixed hydrogen column density \(N_{{H}}=10^{23}\,{cm^{-2}}\) . With a fixed \(N_{{H}}\) , the optical depths of Balmer lines ( \(\tau_{{H}\alpha}\) and \(\tau_{{H}\beta}\) ) increase with \(\propto n_{{H}}\) due to collisional excitation to the \(n=2\) level. While \(\tau_{{Pa}\alpha}\) follows a similar trend in the low density regime, the value rapidly increases as \(\propto n_{H}^{2}\) when the gas slab becomes opaque to \({H}\beta\) line and its resonance scattering operates (see text). At high densities above \(n_{H}\simeq 10^{9}~{cm}^{-3}\) , all the optical depths approach their LTE values. Square and star symbols denote the densities at which \(\tau_{{H}\beta}=1\) and \(\tau_{{Pa}\alpha}=1\) , respectively, with the corresponding \(n_{{H}}\) values. The relative ordering of the line optical depths explains the Balmer decrement trends presented in the right panel of Figure 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：固定氢柱密度\(N_{{H}}=10^{23}\,{cm^{-2}}\)下，氢复合线（Hα、Hβ和Paα）的光学深度作为氢体积密度\(n_{{H}}\)的函数。在固定\(N_{{H}}\)下，由于碰撞激发到\(n=2\)能级，巴尔末线（\(\tau_{{H}\alpha}\)和\(\tau_{{H}\beta}\)）的光学深度随\(\propto n_{{H}}\)增加。而\(\tau_{{Pa}\alpha}\)在低密度区域遵循类似趋势，但当气体板对Hβ线变得不透明且其共振散射起作用时，该值迅速增加为\(\propto n_{H}^{2}\)（见正文）。在高于\(n_{H}\simeq 10^{9}~{cm}^{-3}\)的高密度下，所有光学深度接近其LTE值。方形和星形符号分别表示\(\tau_{{H}\beta}=1\)和\(\tau_{{Pa}\alpha}=1\)时的密度，并附有相应的\(n_{{H}}\)值。线光学深度的相对顺序解释了图2右图中呈现的巴尔末减缩趋势。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Correlations between the Balmer break strength and the Balmer decrement for different hydrogen column densities of \(N_{{H}}=10^{22}-10^{24}~{cm}^{-2}\) . Each curve traces increasing hydrogen volume density \(n_{{H}}\) along the sequence. The vertical line marks the canonical Case B recombination value for reference. LRDs with measured Balmer break and Balmer decrement are overlaid to demonstrate the diagnostic capability of this diagram for constraining both the volume density and column density of high density clouds. Orange star symbols represent LRDs for which the broad and narrow components have been spectroscopically decomposed, including objects discussed in Nikopoulos2025 and several well-known LRDs (see Table 1 ). For these sources, the Balmer decrements of the broad-line component are shown. Gray cross symbols denote an LRD sample with Balmer decrements measured from the total emission line fluxes ( deGraaff25b ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：不同氢柱密度\(N_{{H}}=10^{22}-10^{24}~{cm}^{-2}\)下巴尔末断裂强度与巴尔末减缩之间的相关性。每条曲线沿序列追踪递增的氢体积密度\(n_{{H}}\)。竖线标记用于参考的典型Case B复合值。叠加了具有测量到的巴尔末断裂和巴尔末减缩的LRDs，以展示该图对约束高密度云的体积密度和柱密度的诊断能力。橙色星形符号代表已通过光谱分解出宽窄成分的LRDs，包括Nikopoulos2025中讨论的天体和几个著名的LRDs（见表1）。对于这些源，显示了宽线成分的巴尔末减缩。灰色十字符号代表从总发射线通量测量巴尔末减缩的LRD样本（deGraaff25b）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Balmer line ratio diagram showing \({H}\alpha/{H}\beta\) versus \({H}\gamma/{H}\alpha\) for three different hydrogen column densities ( \(N_{{H}}=10^{22}\) , \(10^{23}\) , and \(10^{24}~{cm}^{-2}\) ). Each curve traces increasing hydrogen volume density from \(n_{{H}}=10^{2}\) to \(10^{12}\,{cm}^{-3}\) along a counterclockwise sequence, beginning at the Case B locus indicated by the intersection of the two dashed gray lines. Larger markers highlight densities of \(n_{{H}}=10^{7}\) , \(10^{8}\) , and \(10^{9}~{cm}^{-3}\) . Star symbols represent the observed broad line ratios compiled by Nikopoulos2025 . Two representative dust extinction curves are plotted for comparison. The ratios observed in these LRDs are naturally reproduced by models with \(n_{{H}}=10^{9}-10^{12}~{cm}^{-3}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：巴尔末线比值图，显示三种不同氢柱密度（\(N_{{H}}=10^{22}\)、\(10^{23}\)和\(10^{24}~{cm}^{-2}\)）下的\({H}\alpha/{H}\beta\)与\({H}\gamma/{H}\alpha\)关系。每条曲线沿逆时针序列追踪从\(n_{{H}}=10^{2}\)到\(10^{12}\,{cm}^{-3}\)的递增氢体积密度，起始于两条灰色虚线交点指示的Case B位置。较大的标记突出显示密度\(n_{{H}}=10^{7}\)、\(10^{8}\)和\(10^{9}~{cm}^{-3}\)。星形符号代表Nikopoulos2025汇编的观测宽线比值。绘制了两条代表性的尘埃消光曲线以供比较。在这些LRDs中观测到的比值自然地被\(n_{{H}}=10^{9}-10^{12}~{cm}^{-3}\)的模型所再现。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Rest-frame EW of \({H}\alpha\) emission as a function of hydrogen volume density for three column densities \(N_{{H}}=10^{22}-10^{24}\,{cm}^{-2}\) . Solid and dashed curves correspond to covering factions \(C=1.0\) and \(C=0.4\) , respectively. Red dotted line and shaded region show the observed median and distribution of broad \({H}\alpha\) EW for high-redshift AGNs from JWST ( Maiolino2025 ) . The extremely high EW of broad \({H}\alpha\) emission can only be produced by covering faction \(C\sim 1\) and high density gas environment.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：三种柱密度\(N_{{H}}=10^{22}-10^{24}\,{cm}^{-2}\)下，静止系Hα发射等值宽度作为氢体积密度的函数。实线和虚线曲线分别对应覆盖因子\(C=1.0\)和\(C=0.4\)。红色虚线和阴影区域显示来自JWST的高红移AGNs宽Hα等值宽度的观测中位数和分布（Maiolino2025）。极高的宽Hα发射等值宽度只能由覆盖因子\(C\sim 1\)和高密度气体环境产生。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Source list of the LRDs used for the orange star symbols in Figure 4 . For each object, we list the survey field, object ID, sky coordinates, redshift, Balmer-break strength (BB), and broad-line Balmer decrement \({H}\alpha/{H}\beta\) (BD). For LRDs without published BB measurements, we computed the values directly from spectra reduced using the Dawn JWST Archive ( Heintz24_DJA ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：图4中用于橙色星形符号的LRDs源列表。对于每个天体，我们列出了巡天场、天体ID、天空坐标、红移、巴尔末断裂强度（BB）和宽线巴尔末减缩\({H}\alpha/{H}\beta\)（BD）。对于没有已发表BB测量的LRDs，我们直接从使用Dawn JWST档案（Heintz24_DJA）缩减的光谱计算了这些值。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Balmer decrement \(F({H}\alpha)/F({H}\beta)\) predicted by our CLOUDY simulations for a grid of hydrogen column densities \(N_{H}\) and hydrogen volume densities \(n_{H}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：我们的CLOUDY模拟预测的氢柱密度\(N_{H}\)和氢体积密度\(n_{H}\)网格上的巴尔末减缩\(F({H}\alpha)/F({H}\beta)\)。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的自洽理论框架，用于描述动态形成的黑洞双星的形成、演化及并合位置，特别关注解释LIGO-Virgo-KAGRA合作组观测到的最重大质量事件。我们的方法将星系形成模型GAMESH与星团种群合成代码相结合，以同时追踪球状星团的宇宙演化与大质量黑洞的并合。我们的参考模型包含了依赖于特定星系属性的星团形成与瓦解的预设，精确再现了银河系球状星团观测到的年龄-质量分布。我们发现，银河系晕中观测到的球状星团中约有30%可能起源于银河系的卫星星系。我们确认层级并合的黑洞对形成位于并超过对不稳定质量间隙的黑洞有显著贡献。然而，量化其贡献具有挑战性，因为不同的星团种群合成代码在黑洞质量函数和并合率方面给出了不同的结果。此外，我们根据暗物质、恒星质量及金属丰度描述了形成大质量黑洞的宿主星系特征。最终，我们证明双黑洞的并合率和诞生率密度随红移增加而上升，直至z=5。这一宇宙演化特征对未来能够探测高红移宇宙的探测器（如LISA、爱因斯坦望远镜和宇宙探索者）具有重要意义。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该框架成功模拟了动态形成黑洞双星的宇宙演化，层级并合是形成大质量黑洞的关键机制。黑洞并合率随红移增加的演化特征对未来LISA、爱因斯坦望远镜和宇宙探索者等探测器探测高红移宇宙具有重要意义。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Primary (M 1 ) and secondary (M 2 ) BH mass distribution of observable dynamically formed BBHs within our LG-like volume. Red dots show the estimated median values of the most massive GW events (M \({}_{1}>50\) M ⊙ ) detected by the LVK collaboration up to O4a, with error bars representing the 90% credible intervals. Dashed lines in histograms display the mass distributions of all BBH mergers that occur in our simulation.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在我们类似LG的体积内可观测的动态形成BBH的主星(M 1 )和伴星(M 2 )黑洞质量分布。红点表示LVK合作组截至O4a探测到的最重大质量引力波事件(M \({}_{1}>50\) M ⊙ )的估计中值，误差棒代表90%置信区间。直方图中的虚线显示了模拟中所有BBH并合的质量分布。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Statistics of merging BBHs and IMBHs from the GAMESH simulation. 3 3 3 Columns indicate the total number of merging BBHs ( \(M_{1}\leq 100\,M_{\odot}\) ), the number of systems observable by terrestrial interferometers, the number of events formed within the MW, and the number of IMBHs ( \(M_{1}>1000\,M_{\odot}\) ) in the MW disk. The number of MBBHs ( \(100\) M \({}_{\odot} ⊙ ) is shown in square brackets, while values for IMBHs that migrated into the MW’s halo are in round parentheses.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：来自GAMESH模拟的并合BBH和IMBH的统计数据。3 3 3 列表示并合BBH的总数( \(M_{1}\leq 100\,M_{\odot}\) )、地面干涉仪可观测的系统数量、银河系内形成的事件数量以及银河系盘中的IMBH数量( \(M_{1}>1000\,M_{\odot}\) )。方括号内显示了MBBH的数量( \(100\) M \({}_{\odot} ⊙ )，圆括号内显示了迁移到银河系晕中的IMBH数值。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 暗时代21厘米信号是一个有前景的探针，用于研究宇宙微波背景在红移z≈1100形成之后、首批星系在z≈30形成之前尚未观测到的婴儿宇宙。探测到该信号将有助于研究人员理解暗物质和暗能量的本质、宇宙膨胀以及任何对标准ΛCDM模型的扩展，这些扩展可能解释EDGES报告的宇宙黎明21厘米信号和哈勃常数张力。在本信中，我们利用两个早期宇宙探针（Planck和WMAP）和两个晚期宇宙探针（DES星系透镜和成团以及重子声学振荡）对ΛCDM宇宙学模型的现有约束，将这些约束传播到对暗时代21厘米信号幅度的约束。我们在系统考虑宇宙学参数不确定性的情况下，约束了信号的幅度和中心频率。我们发现，在我们的建模假设和ΛCDM范式内，暗时代21厘米信号的深度已知精度优于1 mK，中心频率已知精度优于0.05 MHz。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，通过结合早期和晚期宇宙观测数据，可以在ΛCDM框架下对暗时代21厘米信号进行精确约束，这为理解早期宇宙物理和验证宇宙学模型提供了重要基础。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: A representative prior on the cosmological parameters. This is used to derive a representative functional prior on the dark ages 21-cm signal. We note that this is not the prior used in the MCMC analysis of Planck, WMAP, DES Y1 or the BAO data.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：宇宙学参数的代表性先验。这用于推导暗时代21厘米信号的代表性函数先验。我们注意到，这不是Planck、WMAP、DES Y1或BAO数据的MCMC分析中使用的先验。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The functional posteriors (red) on the dark ages 21-cm signal from constraints on the parameters of \(\Lambda\) CDM cosmology from four existing probes using the HYREC-2 recombination code; Planck and WMAP observations of the CMB, BAO observations and lensing and galaxy clustering from DES. A representative prior is shown in blue. The darker shaded regions correspond to 1 sigma contours, with the lighter shaded regions being 2 and 3 sigma. The figure is made with fgivenx (Handley, 2018 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用HYREC-2重组代码，从四个现有探针（Planck和WMAP对CMB的观测、BAO观测以及DES的透镜和星系成团）对\(\Lambda\) CDM宇宙学参数约束得到的暗时代21厘米信号的函数后验（红色）。代表性先验以蓝色显示。较暗阴影区域对应1 sigma等高线，较亮阴影区域为2和3 sigma。该图使用fgivenx制作（Handley, 2018）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The posterior on the central frequency and depth of the dark ages 21-cm signal from the four cosmological probes explored in this work using HYREC-2 . The figure was produced with anesthetic (Handley, 2019 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：使用HYREC-2，从本文探索的四个宇宙学探针得到的暗时代21厘米信号中心频率和深度的后验。该图使用anesthetic制作（Handley, 2019）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: The mean and standard deviations of the 1D posteriors on the central frequency and corresponding value of the 21-cm temperature from the four probes of \(\Lambda\) CDM cosmology explored in this paper using both recfast++ and HYREC-2 . The corresponding values for the representative prior are also shown.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：使用recfast++和HYREC-2，从本文探索的四个\(\Lambda\) CDM宇宙学探针得到的中心频率和相应21厘米温度的一维后验均值和标准差。还显示了代表性先验的对应值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The posterior constraints on the present day expansion rate of the universe \(H_{0}\) , the total baryon density \(\Omega_{b}\) and the total matter density \(\Omega_{m}\) from the four data sets explored in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：从本文探索的四个数据集得到的宇宙当前膨胀率\(H_{0}\)、总重子密度\(\Omega_{b}\)和总物质密度\(\Omega_{m}\)的后验约束。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 相互作用暗能量（IDE）模型为探索暗物质与暗能量之间可能的能量和动量交换提供了一条有前景的途径，从而为标准ΛCDM范式提供了动力学扩展。这种相互作用会改变宇宙结构的增长，在物质功率谱上留下独特的印记，可通过大尺度结构（LSS）观测进行检验。在这项工作中，我们计算了IDE模型中物质功率谱的单圈修正。然后，我们在有效场论大尺度结构（EFTofLSS）的标准框架内重新解释这些结果，该框架为轻度非线性尺度提供了一致的描述，并允许与观测数据进行可靠比较。我们研究了两种常见的耦合函数形式Q，即Q = ξℋρ_m 和 Q = ξℋρ_DE，并引入了一个新的相互作用项 Q = Γ ρ_m ρ_DE θ_m，其特征是非线性耦合常数Γ，该常数将相互作用强度与暗物质的速度散度联系起来。提出这种耦合函数是为了仅分离IDE模型在轻度非线性尺度上的效应。利用BOSS DR12的星系功率谱全形状（FS）测量，我们约束了相互作用率Γ、宇宙学参数和偏差参数。我们发现Γ = 0.0039 ± 0.0082，这与ΛCDM模型高度一致。这项工作为在轻度非线性尺度上测试IDE模型开辟了可能性，可能为这类超越标准ΛCDM框架的模型提供新的见解。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这项工作为在轻度非线性尺度上测试IDE模型开辟了可能性，为超越标准ΛCDM框架的这类模型提供了新的见解途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: Total matter power spectrum in real space within the IDE framework for different values of \(\Gamma\) , with the \(\Lambda\) CDM result shown as a black dashed curve. Right: total one-loop contributions for various \(\Gamma\) values in the IDE model, with the \(\Lambda\) CDM prediction again indicated by the black dashed curve. In both panels we show the relative difference, where in the limit \(\Gamma=0\) the IDE model reduces to \(\Lambda\) CDM.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：IDE框架内不同\(\Gamma\)值下实空间中的总物质功率谱，\(\Lambda\)CDM结果以黑色虚线曲线显示。右图：IDE模型中不同\(\Gamma\)值下的总单圈贡献，\(\Lambda\)CDM预测同样以黑色虚线曲线表示。在两个面板中，我们展示了相对差异，其中在\(\Gamma=0\)的极限下，IDE模型简化为\(\Lambda\)CDM。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the cosmological constraints for the IDE model. The quoted values correspond to the mean and 68% CL, with the marginalized limits in parentheses.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：IDE模型的宇宙学约束总结。引用的值对应均值及68%置信水平，括号内为边缘化后的极限。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Posterior distributions and 68% and 95% credible contours for the parameters \(\Gamma\) , \(S_{8}\) , and \(\Omega_{m}\) . Blue corresponds to \(\Lambda\) CDM and red to IDE, both analyses using BOSS-DR12 data.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：参数\(\Gamma\)、\(S_{8}\)和\(\Omega_{m}\)的后验分布及68%和95%置信轮廓。蓝色对应\(\Lambda\)CDM，红色对应IDE，两者均使用BOSS-DR12数据进行分析。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 已有研究提出M83的大质量、富金属的扩展HI盘和核星暴可能源于并合事件。为验证这一观点，我们观测了M83的恒星晕。利用斯巴鲁望远镜的广域成像数据，结合哈勃空间望远镜数据，通过最近邻星-星系分类方法，我们绘制了M83晕中已分辨恒星的分布图。我们发现M83存在一个延伸、密度极低的平滑恒星晕，由年老、贫金属（[M/H]$\sim -1.15$）的红巨星分支（RGB）恒星组成，在15至40 kpc范围内的质量为$\log_{10}M_{*,15-40,maj}/M_{\odot}=8.02\pm0.10$。除了M83著名的北向流外，我们的地面斯巴鲁成像还揭示了一条向南的新流，模型表明这可能是其尾臂。两条流的总质量为$\log_{10}M_{stream}/M_{\odot}=7.93\pm0.10$，金属丰度为[M/H]$= -1.0\pm0.2$。流的前身星最近才被吸积，因为其恒星种群表明它直到$2.1\pm1.3$ Gyr前仍在形成恒星。M83位于其他银河系质量星系所遵循的恒星晕质量-金属丰度相关关系上，但其恒星晕质量较低。我们推断总吸积质量为$\log_{10}M_{*,accreted}/M_{\odot}=8.78^{+0.22}_{-0.28}$，其中过去最大并合事件的质量为$\log_{10}M_{*,dom}/M_{\odot}=8.5\pm0.3$。我们在TNG-50中识别出与M83恒星晕相似的潜在类比体，发现虽然近期吸积可以形成显著的恒星流，但这种吸积既不会触发星暴活动，也不会提供足够的气体形成M83的扩展HI盘。我们得出结论，其他非并合机制，如长期演化或从星系际介质中吸积气体，可能是M83这些显著特性的成因。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，M83的并合历史无法解释其扩展HI盘和核星暴特征，这些特性更可能源于非并合机制，如长期演化或从星系际介质中吸积气体。

figures.caption_zh: 表1：M83恒星晕的斯巴鲁观测

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Hubble Space Telescope Observations
