figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Left panel . Masks (cyan curves) used for extraction of molecular emission in the sources VLA 1A and VLA 1B. The background image is the 15 GHz continuum from the work [ Bayandina2023 ] . Right panel . Spectral profiles of SiO (5-4) emission in the VLA 1A (red) and VLA 1B regions (blue).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：左图：用于提取源VLA 1A和VLA 1B中分子发射的掩模（青色曲线）。背景图像是文献[Bayandina2023]中的15 GHz连续谱。右图：VLA 1A（红色）和VLA 1B区域（蓝色）中SiO (5-4)发射的谱线轮廓。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Molecular emission in the VLA 1A source associated with H 2 O maser super flares in the region G25.65+1.05 in all observed spectral windows.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：与G25.65+1.05区域H 2 O脉泽超级耀斑相关的VLA 1A源在所有观测光谱窗口中的分子发射。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了2024年中旬对恒星1SWASP J140747.93-394542.6进行的ALMA Band 7连续谱观测。这些观测是对2017年在J1407视场中意外位置检测到的发射源的后续研究。自行运动分析表明，如果该源是导致2007年J1407掩星事件的天体，则它将在2024年移动到新位置，但仍位于ALMA视场内。在此，我们报告在ALMA视场内（1σ上限为17.5 μJy）未检测到发射，无论是在2017年的位置，还是在根据自行运动预期的新位置。我们对2024年数据中经自行运动校正的预期位置处的源设定了上限，并排除了尘埃天体导致2007年掩星事件的可能性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：观测结果不支持2017年检测到的发射源是导致2007年J1407掩星事件的尘埃天体，掩星事件的成因仍需进一步研究。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Multi-epoch ALMA observations of the J1407 area. There was a \(\sim 4\sigma\) 345 GHz continuum detection in the 2017 epoch observations that does not seem to persist to the 2024 observations, despite the two observations having similar beams and noise levels.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：J1407区域的多历元ALMA观测。在2017历元观测中存在一个 \(\sim 4\sigma\) 的345 GHz连续谱探测，但该信号在2024年观测中似乎未持续存在，尽管两次观测具有相似的光束和噪声水平。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了四个UV明亮、受引力透镜效应（放大倍数μ=1.4-3.8）、由JWST选出的红移z=8.5-10.3星系的深度ALMA Band 7观测结果，涉及[OIII] 88μm谱线及其下方的尘埃连续谱发射，观测星等范围为-22.5 ≲ M_UV ≲ -20.5。在红移z=8.5080 ± 0.0011的UNCOVER-10646（15σ）和红移z=9.3113 ± 0.0005的DHZ1（6σ）中，[OIII] 88μm被可靠探测到，两者均为内在明亮的系统[L_[OIII] = (1.1 - 1.6) × 10^9 L_⊙]，遵循局域[OIII]-恒星形成率关系。在两个z>10的目标中，包括红移z=10.07的X射线活动星系核UHZ1，[OIII] 88μm未被探测到，我们获得了L_[OIII] < 6 × 10^7 L_⊙的深度上限。在任何单个源或叠加图像中均未探测到尘埃发射（<3σ）。UNCOVER-10646中高信噪比的[OIII] 88μm探测独特地揭示了一个额外的宽成分（FWHM = 1366_{-329}^{+473} km/s；ΔBIC≈20），表明存在电离外流。我们推断出高速外流率Ṁ_out = 128_{-46}^{+80} M_⊙ yr^{-1}，对应的质量负载因子η= Ṁ_out/SFR = 2.9_{-1.0}^{+1.8}，与理论预测及基于JWST的高红移电离外流研究大致一致。虽然需要高分辨率ALMA后续观测来确认该外流，但这项z>8的首次系统性研究突显了[OIII] 88μm在表征早期宇宙星系方面的独特诊断能力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这是首次在z>8的系统性研究，展示了[OIII] 88μm线在表征早期宇宙星系中的独特诊断能力，为理解高红移星系的外流和反馈机制提供了重要线索。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Absolute UV magnitude versus redshift (bottom \(x\) -axis) and Cosmic time (top axis) for our targets (large, colored markers) and other \(z>8\) galaxies targeted in [O iii ] 88 in the literature (white squares; hashimoto2018 ; tamura2019 ; fujimoto2024_s4590 ; zavala2024_alma ; carniani2024_oiii ; schouws2024 ; witstok2025 ) . The larger, opaque markers show the apparent brightness, including the effects of gravitational lensing, while the smaller symbols – connected via the dashed lines – correspond to de-lensed values. We moreover show the compilation of \(z>6.5\) galaxies spectroscopically confirmed with the JWST from tang2024 ; tang2025 as well as the \(z>8\) photometric candidates from hainline2024 . Our targets are particularly UV-luminous galaxies at \(z>8\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们目标源（大彩色标记）及其他文献中在[O iii] 88处观测的z>8星系（白色方块；hashimoto2018 ; tamura2019 ; fujimoto2024_s4590 ; zavala2024_alma ; carniani2024_oiii ; schouws2024 ; witstok2025）的绝对UV星等与红移（底部x轴）和宇宙时间（顶部轴）的关系。较大的不透明标记显示表观亮度（包括引力透镜效应），而较小的符号（通过虚线连接）对应去透镜后的值。此外，我们展示了来自tang2024 ; tang2025的JWST光谱证认的z>6.5星系汇编，以及来自hainline2024的z>8测光候选体。我们的目标源是z>8处特别UV明亮的星系。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Physical properties of our four targets
figures.caption_zh: 表1：我们四个目标源的物理性质

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Properties of the naturally-weighted ALMA Band 7 data presented in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：本文呈现的自然权重ALMA Band 7数据的性质

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Naturally-weighted ALMA Band 7 dust continuum cutouts ( \(3^{\prime\prime}\times 3^{\prime\prime}\) ) of our four targets, overplotted on JWST /NIRCam F150W imaging. Contours are drawn at \(\pm 2,3,4,\ldots\times\sigma\) intervals, where \(\sigma\) is the continuum RMS. Negative contours are dashed. None of the sources are convincingly dust-detected, although UNCOVER-10646 shows a \(\sim 2\sigma\) continuum signal in tapered imaging (Figure 9 in Appendix B ), tentatively suggesting the presence of an extended dust reservoir.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们四个目标源的自然权重ALMA Band 7尘埃连续谱剪裁图（3″×3″），叠加在JWST/NIRCam F150W成像上。等高线以±2,3,4,…×σ间隔绘制，其中σ为连续谱均方根。负等高线用虚线表示。没有源被令人信服地探测到尘埃，尽管UNCOVER-10646在锥形成像中显示出约2σ的连续谱信号（附录B中的图9），初步表明存在一个延展的尘埃储库。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: ALMA [O iii ] 88 cutouts ( \(4^{\prime\prime}\times 4^{\prime\prime}\) ) of our four targets, overplotted on JWST /NIRCam F444W imaging. For UNCOVER-10646 and DHZ1, where [O iii ] 88 emission is robustly detected, the moment-0 map spans all channels within \(1.2\times\) the line FWHM. No line emission is detected in UHZ1 and UNCOVER-37126, and the moment-0 map is collapsed across \(200\,{km/s}\) centered on the fiducial redshifts of \(z=10.073\) and \(z=10.255\) , respectively. Contours are drawn at \(\pm 2,3,4,\ldots,10\sigma\) intervals, with negative contours being dashed and \(\sigma\) being the RMS in the moment-0 map.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：我们四个目标源的ALMA [O iii] 88剪裁图（4″×4″），叠加在JWST/NIRCam F444W成像上。对于UNCOVER-10646和DHZ1，其中[O iii] 88发射被可靠探测，零阶矩图覆盖了线FWHM的1.2倍内的所有通道。在UHZ1和UNCOVER-37126中未探测到线发射，零阶矩图分别以z=10.073和z=10.255的基准红移为中心，在200 km/s范围内坍缩。等高线以±2,3,4,…,10σ间隔绘制，负等高线用虚线表示，σ为零阶矩图中的均方根。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Extracted 1D spectra showing the [O iii ] 88 detections for UNCOVER-10646 at \(z=8.51\) ( left ) and DHZ1 at \(z=9.31\) ( right ). A Gaussian fit to the spectra is shown through the red lines. The vertical shading shows the channels across which the moment-0 maps in Figure 3 are collapsed, while the gray shading represents the noise per channel. The best-fit parameters are presented in Table 3 . Note that the spectrum of UNCOVER-10646 is better fit by a double-Gaussian, as detailed in Section 4.3 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：提取的一维光谱，显示UNCOVER-10646在z=8.51（左）和DHZ1在z=9.31（右）处的[O iii] 88探测。红色线条显示对光谱的高斯拟合。垂直阴影显示图3中零阶矩图坍缩所跨越的通道，灰色阴影表示每通道的噪声。最佳拟合参数见表3。注意，UNCOVER-10646的光谱更适合用双高斯拟合，详见第4.3节。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Dust continuum, [O iii ] 88 \(\mu{m}\) , and related properties of our targets
figures.caption_zh: 表3：我们目标源的尘埃连续谱、[O iii] 88 μm及相关性质

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Left: The [O iii ] 88 -SFR relation of \(z>6\) galaxies. Our four \(z>8.5\) targets are overplotted as the colored symbols, while \(z>8\) ( \(6\lesssim z algera2025_oiii are shown as white (grey) squares. We show UNCOVER-37126 as a semi-transparent symbol, given that its [O iii ] 88 line is possibly missed by our ALMA observations as a result of its uncertain, Lyman-break-based redshift. The local relations for starbursts ( green ), dwarf galaxies ( blue ) and AGN ( purple ) from delooze2014 are indicated through the shaded bands. All values are corrected for lensing, where necessary. Our sample shows [O iii ] 88 luminosities consistent with the local dwarf galaxy relation, in agreement with previous studies of \(z\gtrsim 6\) galaxies with \({SFR}\lesssim 100\,M_{\odot}\,{yr}^{-1}\) . Right: the [O iii ] 88 luminosity of \(z>6\) galaxies plotted against redshift. We highlight the individually [O iii ] 88 -detected galaxies at \(z>8\) (c.f., hashimoto2018 ; tamura2019 ; fujimoto2024_s4590 ; zavala2024_alma ; carniani2024_oiii ; schouws2024 ; witstok2025 ) . Our line-detected galaxies, UNCOVER-10646 and DHZ1, are the two most [O iii ] 88 -luminous sources known at \(z>8\) and \(z>9\) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左图：z>6星系的[O iii] 88 -恒星形成率关系。我们四个z>8.5的目标源用彩色符号叠加，而z>8（6≲z<8）的文献源（白色方块）和z>8的文献源（灰色方块）来自algera2025_oiii。我们将UNCOVER-37126显示为半透明符号，因为其[O iii] 88线可能因不确定的莱曼断裂基准红移而被我们的ALMA观测遗漏。来自delooze2014的星暴星系（绿色）、矮星系（蓝色）和活动星系核（紫色）的局域关系通过阴影带表示。所有值均已根据需要进行透镜校正。我们的样本显示出与局域矮星系关系一致的[O iii] 88光度，与先前对SFR≲100 M_⊙ yr^{-1}的z≳6星系的研究一致。右图：z>6星系的[O iii] 88光度与红移的关系。我们突出显示了在z>8处单独探测到[O iii] 88的星系（参见hashimoto2018 ; tamura2019 ; fujimoto2024_s4590 ; zavala2024_alma ; carniani2024_oiii ; schouws2024 ; witstok2025）。我们的线探测星系UNCOVER-10646和DHZ1分别是已知在z>8和z>9处[O iii] 88最明亮的源。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜是宇宙学、暗物质（DM）和高红移星系演化的有力探针，但目前已知的强透镜星系（SLG）样本仍然太小，无法充分发挥其全部潜力。赫歇尔（$\textit{Herschel}$）的亚毫米（submm）巡天表明，亚毫米选择是识别高红移SLG最有效且偏差最小的途径，但仅在有限的、不均匀的场中产生了数百个系统。要实现精密宇宙学以及对遥远尘埃恒星形成星系进行详细研究所需的数千个SLG，需要一项新的、大面积的、均匀的亚毫米巡天。像AtLAST这样的设施，能够将类似赫歇尔的方法扩展到更大的区域，具有独特的优势，可以提供SLG数量数量级的增长，从而实现变革性的进展。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，AtLAST天文台通过实施大面积均匀亚毫米波巡天，能够实现强引力透镜星系样本的数量级增长，为宇宙学、暗物质和高红移星系演化研究带来变革性进展。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Three views of the strongly lensed galaxy SDP.81: foreground lens and faint Einstein ring (left), sharp ALMA image of the ring (centre), and lens‑model reconstruction (right) revealing multiple cold dust clouds where stars and planets are forming. Credit: ALMA (NRAO/ESO/NAOJ)/Y. Tamura (The University of Tokyo)/Mark Swinbank (Durham University)
figures.caption_zh: 图1：强透镜星系SDP.81的三个视图：前景透镜和微弱的爱因斯坦环（左），清晰的ALMA环图像（中），以及揭示多个冷尘埃云（恒星和行星正在其中形成）的透镜模型重建（右）。图片来源：ALMA (NRAO/ESO/NAOJ)/Y. Tamura (东京大学)/Mark Swinbank (杜伦大学)

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用BRAHMA宇宙学流体动力学模拟套件中一个实现里存在的超大质量黑洞（$\rm M_{BH}/M_{\ast} \approx0.1$），来研究它们在詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）所识别的独特“小红点”（LRD）天体辐射中所起的作用。我们发现，当这些黑洞的辐射被建模为被稠密气体云包裹的活动星系核（AGN）时，它们可以产生类似LRD的可观测信号。在红移5到8之间，我们发现该模拟中LRD的数密度为$\rm 2.04 \pm 0.32 \times 10^{-4} \space Mpc^{-3}$，这与当前JWST对总LRD星族的估计大致一致。它们在静止系可见光谱中的辐射由其AGN主导，这通过一个非常强的巴尔末跳变诱导出指示LRD的红色。此外，黑洞质量的升高降低了其吸积盘的温度。这将AGN辐射的峰值移向更长的波长，并相对于以相同速率吸积的较低质量黑洞，增加了它们在静止系可见光谱中的亮度。这些模拟的LRD具有极小的尘埃消光（$\rm A_V = 0.21 \pm 0.12$），限制了红外波段可能发生的尘埃再辐射，使它们很可能低于阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）等天文台的观测探测极限。与BRAHMA盒子相比，ASTRID模拟系统地产生了更小的黑洞，并预测LRD数密度比当前测量值低两个多数量级。因此，我们得出结论：存在相对于其宿主星系质量过大且被稠密气体包裹的黑洞，是AGN主导的LRD模型重现JWST LRD星族的观测性质和丰度的必要条件。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：相对于宿主星系质量过大的黑洞，加上被稠密气体云遮蔽，是AGN主导的LRD模型能够重现JWST观测到的LRD天体性质和丰度的必要条件。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Example of the AGN Spectra used as input for, and output by, CLOUDY . We are placing this example object at \(z=6\) to provide relevant comparisons with observational bands. The top panel shows a broad view of the spectrum, spanning the infrared and X-ray regions. The lower panel zooms in on the JWST NIRCam wavelength range. The black line is the incident AGN spectrum in CLOUDY , which is processed through the surrounding gas cloud. We have chosen a temperature of \(T=10^{5.0}K\) for the example AGN. The green, and purple lines show different transmitted spectra based on the properties of the gas cloud. The green line is the cloud properties used in LaChance_2025 , and the purple spectrum is produced by the “gas-enshrouded” model we use in this work. The dashed and dotted grey lines are the incident AGN spectra produced by AGN with temperatures \(T=10^{4.5}K\) , and \(T=10^{5.5}K\) respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：用作CLOUDY输入和输出的AGN光谱示例。我们将此示例天体置于\(z=6\)，以便与观测波段进行相关比较。上图显示了光谱的宽视图，涵盖红外和X射线区域。下图放大了JWST NIRCam波长范围。黑线是CLOUDY中的入射AGN光谱，该光谱经过周围气体云的处理。我们为示例AGN选择了温度\(T=10^{5.0}K\)。绿线和紫线显示了基于气体云性质的不同透射光谱。绿线是LaChance_2025中使用的云性质，紫线是由我们在本工作中使用的“气体包裹”模型产生的光谱。虚线和点状灰线分别是温度为\(T=10^{4.5}K\)和\(T=10^{5.5}K\)的AGN产生的入射AGN光谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Color-Color and Color-Magnitude plots for the colors and magnitudes used in the “little red dot” criteria. The top panel shows sources F200W-F356W color vs. F444W magnitude, and F115W-F150W color. These are the primary factors in determining if a source meets the Red1 LRD criterion. The bottom panel shows sources F277W-F444W color vs. F444W magnitude, and F150W-F200W color. These are used in the Red2 LRD criterion. In order for a source to be considered a Red1 LRD it must be above the horizontal dashed line, and to the left of the vertical dashed line (falling within the highlighted regions) in both plots in the upper panel. The same is true for the Red2 criterion, and the plots in the bottom panel. The green 2D histogram shows the population of sources in BRAHMA . The magenta contours contain \(1\sigma\) and \(3\sigma\) of sources in the ASTRID simulation. The LRDs identified in BRAHMA are marked with red circles, and the LRDs found in ASTRID are shown with open magenta circles. Both panels include all of the sources in the snapshots we analyzed ( \(z=5-8\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：“小红点”判据中使用的颜色-颜色和颜色-星等图。上图显示了F200W-F356W颜色与F444W星等，以及F115W-F150W颜色。这些是判断源是否满足Red1 LRD判据的主要因素。下图显示了F277W-F444W颜色与F444W星等，以及F150W-F200W颜色。这些用于Red2 LRD判据。一个源要被视为Red1 LRD，它必须在上方面板的两个图中都位于水平虚线上方且垂直虚线左侧（落在高亮区域内）。Red2判据以及下方面板中的图也是如此。绿色二维直方图显示了BRAHMA中的源星族。品红色等高线包含ASTRID模拟中源的\(1\sigma\)和\(3\sigma\)。在BRAHMA中识别的LRD用红色圆圈标记，在ASTRID中发现的LRD用空心品红色圆圈显示。两个面板都包含我们分析的所有快照中的源（\(z=5-8\)）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: The number density of “little red dots” in the BRAHMA and ASTRID simulations when applying the more AGN model of LaChance_2025 (“standard” AGN) and the “gas-enshrouded” AGN model described in section 2.3.1 . The models differ in their volume and surface density of Hydrogen, and gas turbulence. The “standard” model has a less dense, and less deep gas cloud surrounding the AGN than the “gas-enshrouded” model, and also lacks the turbulent motion present in the “gas-enshrouded” model.All values in the table have units of \([Mpc^{-3}]\) , with Poisson uncertainties.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：应用LaChance_2025的更多AGN模型（“标准”AGN）和2.3.1节描述的“气体包裹”AGN模型时，BRAHMA和ASTRID模拟中“小红点”的数密度。这些模型在氢的体积密度和面密度以及气体湍流方面有所不同。“标准”模型周围的气体云比“气体包裹”模型密度更低、深度更浅，并且也缺乏“气体包裹”模型中存在的湍流运动。表中的所有值单位均为\([Mpc^{-3}]\)，并带有泊松不确定度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Mock JWST observations of three of the “Little Red Dots” found in the BRAHMA simulation. The images on the left are produced with the F444W, F277W, and F150W filters as the red, green, and blue channels, respectively. The spectra on the right show the total source spectrum in grey, the stellar component in green, and the AGN component in blue. The dashed lines indicate the spectra before dust attenuation is applied.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在BRAHMA模拟中发现的三个“小红点”的模拟JWST观测。左侧图像分别使用F444W、F277W和F150W滤光片作为红、绿、蓝通道生成。右侧光谱以灰色显示总源光谱，绿色显示恒星成分，蓝色显示AGN成分。虚线表示应用尘埃消光前的光谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The \(M_{BH}-M_{\ast}\) for the black holes and their host galaxies in the BRAHMA and ASTRID simulations. The 2D histogram shows the overall BRAHMA population. It is colored by the mean “Rest-visible Color” in each cell, where “Rest-visible Color” is F200W-F356W for z=5,6 sources, and F277W-F444W for z=7,8 sources. The magenta contours contain \(1\sigma\) and \(3\sigma\) of sources in the ASTRID simulation. The LRDs identified in BRAHMA are marked with red circles, and the LRDs found in ASTRID are shown with open magenta circles. The purple square dataset is comprised of AGN fits from Maiolino_2024_JADES ; Harikane_2023 ; Ubler_2023 ; Stone_2024 ; Furtak_2024 ; Yue_2024_eiger compiled in Pacucci_Loeb_2024 . The green star dataset was produced in Ananna_2024 from the X-ray observations of some LRDs. We also include the local relation per Reines_2015 and an inferred \(z\sim 4-7\) relation from Pacucci_2023
figures.caption_zh: 图4：BRAHMA和ASTRID模拟中黑洞及其宿主星系的\(M_{BH}-M_{\ast}\)关系。二维直方图显示了BRAHMA的整体星族。其颜色由每个单元格中的平均“静止系可见颜色”表示，其中对于z=5,6源，“静止系可见颜色”为F200W-F356W，对于z=7,8源为F277W-F444W。品红色等高线包含ASTRID模拟中源的\(1\sigma\)和\(3\sigma\)。在BRAHMA中识别的LRD用红色圆圈标记，在ASTRID中发现的LRD用空心品红色圆圈显示。紫色方形数据集由来自Maiolino_2024_JADES；Harikane_2023；Ubler_2023；Stone_2024；Furtak_2024；Yue_2024_eiger的AGN拟合数据组成，这些数据由Pacucci_Loeb_2024汇编。绿色星形数据集由Ananna_2024根据一些LRD的X射线观测产生。我们还包含了来自Reines_2015的局域关系和来自Pacucci_2023推断的\(z\sim 4-7\)关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: \(L_{bol}-M_{BH}\) and \(L_{bol}-M_{\ast}\) for the black holes and their host galaxies in the BRAHMA and ASTRID simulations. The 2D histogram shows the overall BRAHMA population. It is colored by the mean “Rest-visible Color” in each cell, where “Rest-visible Color” is F200W-F356W for z=5,6 sources, and F277W-F444W for z=7,8 sources. The magenta contours contain \(1\sigma\) and \(3\sigma\) of sources in the ASTRID simulation. The dashed grey line in the left panel indicates the Eddington luminosity as a function of black hole mass.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：BRAHMA和ASTRID模拟中黑洞及其宿主星系的\(L_{bol}-M_{BH}\)和\(L_{bol}-M_{\ast}\)关系。二维直方图显示了BRAHMA的整体星族。其颜色由每个单元格中的平均“静止系可见颜色”表示，其中对于z=5,6源，“静止系可见颜色”为F200W-F356W，对于z=7,8源为F277W-F444W。品红色等高线包含ASTRID模拟中源的\(1\sigma\)和\(3\sigma\)。左图中的灰色虚线表示作为黑洞质量函数的爱丁顿光度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The bolometric luminosity function of the AGN for datasets around \(5\leq z\leq 6\) (top panel), and \(7\leq z\leq 8\) (bottom panel). The AGN found in LRDs in BRAHMA are shown with red circles, and the ASTRID LRDs are shown with magenta circles (Not seen on the bottom panel due to falling below the x-axis). We compare with the luminosity functions of multiple observations ( Kokorev_2024 ; Akins_2025 ) including both pre and post correction sets from Greene_2025 . We also include the overall AGN luminosity function of BRAHMA , ASTRID , and Shen_2020 as dashed lines.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：\(5\leq z\leq 6\)（上图）和\(7\leq z\leq 8\)（下图）数据集周围AGN的辐射光度函数。BRAHMA中LRD内发现的AGN用红色圆圈显示，ASTRID LRD用品红色圆圈显示（由于低于x轴，在下图中未显示）。我们与多个观测的光度函数（Kokorev_2024；Akins_2025）进行比较，包括来自Greene_2025的校正前和校正后数据集。我们还以虚线形式包含了BRAHMA、ASTRID和Shen_2020的整体AGN光度函数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The top row shows the relative contribution of the AGN to the overall emission in both the F444W and F150W bands. The bottom row shows the amount of dust attenuation experienced by each source in the F444W and F150W bands. The x-axis of each plot is the source magnitude in the relevant filter (F444W for the left column, F150W for the right column). The 2D histogram shows the overall BRAHMA population. It is colored by the mean “Rest-visible Color” in each cell, where “Rest-visible Color” is F200W-F356W for z=5,6 sources, and F277W-F444W for z=7,8 sources. The magenta contours contain \(1\sigma\) and \(3\sigma\) of sources in the ASTRID simulation.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：第一行显示了AGN对F444W和F150W波段总辐射的相对贡献。第二行显示了每个源在F444W和F150W波段经历的尘埃消光量。每个图的x轴是源在相应滤光片中的星等（左列为F444W，右列为F150W）。二维直方图显示了BRAHMA的整体星族。其颜色由每个单元格中的平均“静止系可见颜色”表示，其中对于z=5,6源，“静止系可见颜色”为F200W-F356W，对于z=7,8源为F277W-F444W。品红色等高线包含ASTRID模拟中源的\(1\sigma\)和\(3\sigma\)。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 尘埃和冷气体在邻近的早期型星系中并不罕见，并且是其演化的重要方面。然而，它们的起源几十年来一直存在争议。可能的来源包括内部过程（例如，演化恒星的物质损失）、外部机制（例如，小质量并合或冷却流），或两者的结合。富含气体的小质量并合长期以来在观测和模拟中都被认为是冷气体燃料的重要渠道，但通过富含气体的小质量并合直接输送冷气体的直接证据仍然难以捉摸，特别是在环境效应显著的星系群和星系团中。在这封信中，我们首次呈现了一个明确的案例，即通过一个正在进行中的、质量比约为$\sim1:56$的近距离富含气体小质量并合，将冷气体直接输送到一个最亮群星系（红移$z=0.25$）。高分辨率JWST成像揭示了一个严重遮蔽的低质量卫星，它在静止系光学波段几乎不可见。来自该卫星的潮汐剥离将气体和尘埃沉积到BGG上，原位形成了显著的$\sim$10千秒差距尘埃带。宇宙学模拟表明，这种相互作用优先发生在首次沿高偏心轨道内落的富含气体卫星中。我们的结果强调了富含气体的小质量并合在补充冷气体储库和塑造星系群中中心早期型星系演化方面的关键作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：富含气体的小质量并合在补充星系群中心早期型星系的冷气体储库和塑造其演化过程中起着关键作用。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Single-band images (left) and pseudo-color image (right) of the CW-BGG-1 system. Label in each panel indicates the name of the band: HST ACS F606W and F814W in the top row; JWST NIRCam F115W, F150W, F277W, and F444W in the middle and bottom rows. The pseudo-color image is generated using F814W (blue), F115W (green), and F444W (red). The white arrow in each panel indicates the location of the satellite CW-BGG-1-C. The bottom-left scale bar indicates 10 kpc. North is up and east is left.
figures.caption_zh: 图1: CW-BGG-1系统的单波段图像（左）和伪彩色图像（右）。每个面板中的标签指示波段的名称：顶行是HST ACS F606W和F814W；中间和底行是JWST NIRCam F115W、F150W、F277W和F444W。伪彩色图像使用F814W（蓝色）、F115W（绿色）和F444W（红色）生成。每个面板中的白色箭头指示卫星CW-BGG-1-C的位置。左下角的比例尺表示10千秒差距。北向上，东向左。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Two-dimensional modeling of CW-BGG-1 and CW-BGG-1-C. Columns from left to right show the data, best-fit BGG model, data \(-\) BGG model, bulge model of the CW-BGG-1-C, and data \(-\) BGG model \(-\) CW-BGG-1-C bulge model in six HST/ACS and JWST/NIRCam bands. BGG model is constructed by fitting four Sérsiccomponents to CW-BGG-1 after masking dust lanes, CW-BGG-1-C and its tidal tails, and neighboring sources using GALFITM . CW-BGG-1-C is modeled using three Sérsic components (one for the bulge, one for the disk, and one for the extended envelope) in data \(-\) BGG model image after masking tidal tails. Red ellipses denote the aperture used to measure the flux of CW-BGG-1-C.
figures.caption_zh: 图2: CW-BGG-1和CW-BGG-1-C的二维建模。从左到右的列显示了在六个HST/ACS和JWST/NIRCam波段中的数据、最佳拟合BGG模型、数据 \(-\) BGG模型、CW-BGG-1-C的核球模型以及数据 \(-\) BGG模型 \(-\) CW-BGG-1-C核球模型。BGG模型是通过使用GALFITM对CW-BGG-1拟合四个Sérsic分量（在遮蔽尘埃带、CW-BGG-1-C及其潮汐尾以及邻近源之后）构建的。CW-BGG-1-C在数据 \(-\) BGG模型图像（遮蔽潮汐尾后）中使用三个Sérsic分量（一个用于核球，一个用于盘，一个用于扩展包层）进行建模。红色椭圆表示用于测量CW-BGG-1-C通量的孔径。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Model parameters of FSPS and the derived physical parameters
figures.caption_zh: 表1: FSPS的模型参数和导出的物理参数

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Joint spectral energy distribution modeling of the CW-BGG-1 system (left) and posterior distributions of the derived physical parameters (right). The black dots represent the total SED of the CW-BGG-1 system while the red dots represent SED of CW-BGG-1-C after decomposing emission from CW-BGG-1. The empty gray and red squares are the model photometric fluxes at the corresponding observed bands of the data for CW-BGG-1 and CW-BGG-1-C, respectively. The gray, blue, and red curves are the median total, median CW-BGG-1, and median CW-BGG-1-C model SEDs from our Bayesian nested sampling posteriors, respectively. The shaded regions indicate the 16th-to-84th percentile confidence ranges. The lower panel displays the residual data with respect to the median models in the unit of observed uncertainties. Most of the data points are within 1 \(\sigma\) deviations. The right panel displays the posterior distribution of the physical parameters derived from the joint SED fitting. The first four parameters are the stellar mass and \(V\) -band extinction ( \(A_{V}\) ) of the two galaxies, respectively. The last two parameters are the total star formation rate (SFR) based on the total infrared (integrated over 8-1000 \(\mu\) m) luminosity and total dust mass of the CW-BGG-1 system.
figures.caption_zh: 图3: CW-BGG-1系统的联合光谱能量分布建模（左）和导出物理参数的后验分布（右）。黑点代表CW-BGG-1系统的总SED，而红点代表从CW-BGG-1分解发射后的CW-BGG-1-C的SED。空的灰色和红色方块分别是CW-BGG-1和CW-BGG-1-C数据在相应观测波段处的模型测光通量。灰色、蓝色和红色曲线分别是我们贝叶斯嵌套采样后验中的中位数总模型、中位数CW-BGG-1模型和中位数CW-BGG-1-C模型SED。阴影区域表示第16至第84百分位的置信区间。下面板显示了数据相对于中位数模型在观测不确定度单位下的残差。大多数数据点在1 \(\sigma\) 偏差内。右面板显示了从联合SED拟合导出的物理参数的后验分布。前四个参数分别是两个星系的恒星质量和 \(V\) 波段消光（ \(A_{V}\) ）。最后两个参数是基于CW-BGG-1系统的总红外（积分在8-1000 \(\mu\) m）光度的总恒星形成率（SFR）和总尘埃质量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: SED data (top) and posterior distributions of model fitting parameters (bottom) to the bulge of CW-BGG-1-C. The upper panel displays the SED data (black points) and the model median (gray curve) and 16-to-84 confidence interval (gray shaded region) of the fitting to CW-BGG-1-C bulge SED, with fitting residual showing underneath. The bottom panel displays the posterior distributions of model fitting parameters and the derived physical parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 图4: CW-BGG-1-C核球的SED数据（上）和模型拟合参数的后验分布（下）。上面板显示了CW-BGG-1-C核球SED拟合的SED数据（黑点）、模型中位数（灰色曲线）和16至84置信区间（灰色阴影区域），拟合残差显示在下方。下面板显示了模型拟合参数和导出物理参数的后验分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Dust mass ( \(M_{dust}\) ) and star formation rate (SFR) versus stellar mass ( \(M_{*}\) ). The red star denotes the CW-BGG-1 system while the blue dots represent dust-detected early-type galaxies at \(0.2 ( 2023ApJ...953...27L ) . Error bars indicate 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainties. The black dashed curve and gray shaded stripe denotes the galaxy star-forming main sequence at \(z=0.25\) taken from equation 14 in ( SFMS ) and its \(\pm 0.5\) dex dispersion, respectively. CW-BGG-1 is located on the galaxy star-forming main sequence and is among the dustiest ETGs at \(0.2 10^{10.5}\,M_{\odot}\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图5: 尘埃质量（ \(M_{dust}\) ）和恒星形成率（SFR）与恒星质量（ \(M_{*}\) ）的关系。红星表示CW-BGG-1系统，而蓝点表示在 \(0.2<z<0.5\) 范围内探测到尘埃的早期型星系（2023ApJ...953...27L）。误差棒表示1 \(\sigma\) 不确定度。黑色虚线曲线和灰色阴影带分别表示取自方程14（SFMS）的 \(z=0.25\) 处星系恒星形成主序及其 \(\pm 0.5\) dex弥散。CW-BGG-1位于星系恒星形成主序上，并且是 \(0.2<z<0.5\) 范围内尘埃最多的早期型星系之一（在 \(M_{*}>10^{10.5}\,M_{\odot}\) 处）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Full spectral modeling to CW-BGG-1. Gray curve and shaded region represent the restframe spectrum of CW-BGG-1 and its uncertainty. Orange curve represents combined model from stellar continuum (red curve) and emission lines (black curve) using pPXF ( pPXF ) . Blue curve represents emission line-only spectrum after subtracting the continuum (data \(-\) stellar continuum). Top panel shows the full spectrum fitting result, while middle panels show zoom-in views around H \(\beta\) and H \(\alpha\) , respectively. Prominent emission lines are labeled and indicated with vertical dashed lines. Bottom panel shows the stellar population distribution in metallicity ([M/H]) and stellar age plane color-coded by light-weighted fraction.
figures.caption_zh: 图6: CW-BGG-1的全光谱建模。灰色曲线和阴影区域表示CW-BGG-1的静止系光谱及其不确定度。橙色曲线表示使用pPXF（pPXF）从恒星连续谱（红色曲线）和发射线（黑色曲线）组合的模型。蓝色曲线表示减去连续谱（数据 \(-\) 恒星连续谱）后的纯发射线光谱。上面板显示了全光谱拟合结果，而中间面板分别显示了H \(\beta\) 和H \(\alpha\) 周围的放大视图。显著的发射线已标记并用垂直虚线指示。下面板显示了按光加权分数着色的金属丰度（[M/H]）和恒星年龄平面中的恒星种群分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Orbital properties of satellites in galaxy groups from the TNG50 simulation ( Nelson2018 ; Pillepich2018a ) . Top: Orbital ellipticity versus pericenter distance ( \(r_{peri}\) ) normalized by the virial radius of the group ( \(r_{vir}\) ). Satellites undergoing their first close-separation pericentric passage at \(0.2\leq z\leq 0.5\) are marked with red circles, where close-separation is defined as \(r_{peri}/r_{vir}\leq 0.1\) (red vertical dashed line). The left panel is color-coded by satellites’ velocity at pericenter, while the right panel is color-coded by their total cold gas fraction ( \(M_{gas}/M_{*}\) ) measured at the first preceding apocenter. Bottom: Orbital histories showing satellites’ distance to BGG ( \(r\) , normalized by \(r_{vir}\) ) as a function of redshift for satellites undergoing the first close-separation pericentric passage at \(0.2\leq z\leq 0.5\) (objects with red circles in the top panel). The left panel displays gas-rich ( \(M_{gas}/M_{*}\geq 0.3\) ) satellites (CW-BGG-1-C analogs), while the right panel shows gas-poor satellites.
figures.caption_zh: 图7: 来自TNG50模拟（Nelson2018；Pillepich2018a）的星系群中卫星的轨道性质。上：轨道椭圆率与由群维里半径（ \(r_{vir}\) ）归一化的近心点距离（ \(r_{peri}\) ）的关系。在 \(0.2\leq z\leq 0.5\) 处经历首次近距离近心点通过的卫星用红色圆圈标记，其中近距离定义为 \(r_{peri}/r_{vir}\leq 0.1\) （红色垂直虚线）。左面板按卫星在近心点的速度着色，而右面板按在首次前一个远心点测量的卫星总冷气体分数（ \(M_{gas}/M_{*}\) ）着色。下：轨道历史，显示卫星到BGG的距离（ \(r\) ，由 \(r_{vir}\) 归一化）作为红移的函数，针对在 \(0.2\leq z\leq 0.5\) 处经历首次近距离近心点通过的卫星（上面板中带有红色圆圈的物体）。左面板显示富含气体（ \(M_{gas}/M_{*}\geq 0.3\) ）的卫星（CW-BGG-1-C类似物），而右面板显示贫气体卫星。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 再电离纪元（EoR）标志着宇宙从中性态向电离态的转变，是理解首批恒星和星系形成的关键阶段。对原子和分子谱线（如$[\mathrm{CII}]$和CO J-阶梯跃迁）在宽红移范围内的强度测绘，是研究恒星形成历史、金属丰度、气体和尘埃分布以及星系内物理条件的强大工具。此外，21\,cm谱线强度测绘直接探测了星系际介质中的中性氢含量，为了解再电离的时机和形态提供了独特窗口。在本研究中，我们探索了21\,cm信号与多谱线强度测绘（LIM）之间的互相关，以预测其在下一代实验中的可探测性。我们的分析强调了这些技术在约束电离源最小质量和电离分数$x_e$等参数方面的互补潜力。与LIM的互相关还能约束金属富集等物理性质以及恒星形成率与多谱线光度之间的关系。利用来自平方千米阵（SKA）-low 21\,cm和弗雷德·杨亚毫米望远镜（FYST）类LIM实验的模拟观测，我们发现$[\mathrm{CII}]$--21\,cm互相关可以通过在多个红移区间以9到40$σ$的显著性水平测量$x_e$来约束再电离历史。我们将分析扩展到CO跃迁，表明CO(1-0)--21\,cm互相关对再电离参数提供了有竞争力的约束。本文探索的协同效应将能够对再电离和LIM参数进行稳健约束，从而最大化当前和下一代强度测绘实验的科学回报。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，多谱线强度测绘与21厘米信号的交叉关联技术具有互补潜力，能同时约束再电离化历史和星系物理参数，最大化当前和下一代强度测绘实验的科学产出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Schematic workflow for [CII]-21 cm and COs-21 cm cross-correlations analysis. We model [CII]/CO emissions using halo mass-to-SFR and SFR-to-luminosity scaling relations, and 21cm signals via excursion set formalism applied to ionizing photon production. Cross-correlation of the resulting intensity maps enables power spectrum forecasts. Finally, we incorporate instrumental noise, interlopers, foregrounds, and other effects to forecast the detectability of these cross-correlations and determine the constraints on the parameters of interest.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：[CII]-21 cm和COs-21 cm互相关分析的工作流程示意图。我们使用暗晕质量-恒星形成率（SFR）和SFR-光度标度关系对[CII]/CO发射进行建模，并通过基于电离光子产生的游走集合形式对21cm信号进行建模。所得强度图的互相关可实现功率谱预测。最后，我们加入仪器噪声、干扰源、前景等效应，以预测这些互相关的可探测性，并确定对感兴趣参数的约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Evolution of the free-electron fraction for a tanh reionization history. We illustrate the change in the ionization fraction resulting from variations in the central redshift of reionization and the width of reionization using two adjacent colorbars. The reionization history derived from the radiative transfer simulations by kulkarni2019l-reio is overplotted for comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：双曲正切再电离历史中自由电子分数的演化。我们通过两个相邻色条展示了再电离中心红移和再电离宽度变化引起的电离分数变化。来自kulkarni2019l-reio的辐射传输模拟得出的再电离历史也叠加在图中以作比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: A snapshot of the 21 cm brightness temperature fluctuations and [CII] intensity emission at \(z\sim 7.3\) . The black dots on the 21 cm panel represent the distribution of dark matter halos. For visibility purposes, we apply a beam convolution with \(\theta=1\,{arcmin}\) to the [CII] intensity map.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在\(z\sim 7.3\)处21 cm亮温度涨落和[CII]强度发射的快照。21 cm面板上的黑点代表暗物质晕的分布。为便于观察，我们对[CII]强度图应用了\(\theta=1\,{arcmin}\)的波束卷积。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: the auto power spectrum of the 21 cm signal at redshifts 7.6, 7.3, 6.6, and 5.8 for ionization fractions of 0.35, 0.42, 0.63, and 0.91, respectively. The 21 cm power spectrum decreases with decreasing redshift as the Universe becomes more ionized, reducing the abundance of neutral hydrogen. Right: the power spectrum of [CII] line emissions at the same redshifts as the 21 cm signal. The power spectrum increases with redshift as more sources produce high-energy photons that ionize the IGM. As we integrate over all sources, the amplitude increases. For the LIM calculation, we use the Schareer20 models to generate the LIM maps.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图：红移7.6、7.3、6.6和5.8处21 cm信号的自功率谱，对应的电离分数分别为0.35、0.42、0.63和0.91。随着宇宙进一步电离，中性氢丰度减少，21 cm功率谱随红移降低而减小。右图：与21 cm信号相同红移处[CII]谱线发射的功率谱。随着更多源产生电离IGM的高能光子，功率谱随红移增加而增大。由于我们对所有源进行积分，振幅增大。对于LIM计算，我们使用Schareer20模型生成LIM图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: We show the cross-correlated signal between the 21 cm and [CII] line emissions at four different redshifts. The anti-correlation between these two signals reaches its maximum value when the Universe is half ionized and half neutral.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：我们展示了四个不同红移处21 cm与[CII]谱线发射之间的互相关信号。当宇宙处于半电离半中性状态时，这两个信号之间的反相关达到最大值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The foreground contamination of the 21 cm signal coming from the EoR. The solid lines represent the optimistic foreground model, where the dashed lines are the moderate foreground models implemented in 21cmSense package. These models consist of both extragalactic foreground, thermal noise and sample variance. We show the five frequency bands which are necessary for measuring the 21 cm signal for estimating the LIM-21 cm cross-correlations.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：来自EoR的21 cm信号的前景污染。实线代表乐观前景模型，虚线是21cmSense包中实现的中等前景模型。这些模型包括河外前景、热噪声和样本方差。我们展示了测量21 cm信号以估计LIM-21 cm互相关所需的五个频带。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Parameter constraints and their redshift dependencies as inferred from the [CII]-21 cm cross-correlations. We use SKA-low and FYST-like instruments to forecast the parameters at four redshifts. As the ionization fraction \(x_{e}\) increases at lower redshifts, the contours shift to higher values of \(x_{e}\) . This indicates that we can measure the ionization fraction precisely at these redshifts to better understand the morphology of reionization.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：从[CII]-21 cm互相关推断出的参数约束及其红移依赖性。我们使用SKA-low和FYST类仪器在四个红移处预测参数。随着电离分数\(x_{e}\)在较低红移处增加，等高线向更高的\(x_{e}\)值移动。这表明我们可以在这些红移处精确测量电离分数，以更好地理解再电离的形态。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: The parameter constraints are determined from LIM–21 cm cross-correlations, assuming CO(1-0) to CO(4-3) line emissions. We consider the “optimistic” ground-based scenario while using SKA-Low as our experiment, and a COMAP-like experiment for measuring different CO transitions. Our forecasts show that CO(1-0) provides the tightest constraints on the parameters; however, a joint analysis would be useful for breaking degeneracies among the parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：假设CO(1-0)到CO(4-3)谱线发射，从LIM–21 cm互相关确定的参数约束。我们考虑“乐观”的地面场景，使用SKA-Low作为我们的实验，并使用COMAP类实验来测量不同的CO跃迁。我们的预测表明，CO(1-0)对参数提供了最严格的约束；然而，联合分析将有助于打破参数之间的简并。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 越来越多的证据表明，具有射电探测的活跃星系核（AGN）表现出更受扰动的电离气体运动学和更高的外流探测率，暗示射电辐射与这些过程之间存在联系。在具有微弱或模糊AGN特征的星系中，一些研究将射电辐射归因于恒星形成，而另一些研究则提出AGN驱动的风或微弱的、未分辨的喷流是主导机制。为了探究这种联系，我们退一步分析了一个样本，该样本由没有明确当前AGN特征的恒星形成（SF）星系组成。利用低频（LOFAR，144MHz）和高频（FIRST，1.4GHz）巡天，结合来自MaNGA巡天的空间分辨光谱，我们比较了具有144 MHz探测的SF星系，这些星系要么有GHz探测，要么没有。尽管在恒星质量、红移和射电（MHz）光度上进行了匹配，但具有GHz探测的SF星系与其无GHz探测的对应星系存在系统性差异。前者表现出增强的电离气体发射线宽度、更高的中心外流比例、更红的颜色、增加的中心遮蔽，以及向AGN区域（在[NII] BPT图中）偏移（或更接近）的发射线比。此外，无GHz探测的星系很可能因其延展的射电形态而未被探测到，而具有GHz探测的星系则明显更紧凑。与无探测的星系相比，具有GHz探测的星系的大多数性质与许多射电探测AGN研究中的行为惊人地相似。这表明塑造具有GHz探测的SF星系性质的潜在物理机制在根本上是相似的。这引发了一些有趣的问题：一些紧凑的SF星系是否代表了AGN演化的前身阶段，或者是一种低功率AGN的形式。具有GHz探测的SF星系的射电紧凑特征尺寸也暗示了AGN与年老星暴星系之间的联系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：GHz探测的SF星系与射电探测的AGN具有相似的物理机制，暗示这些紧凑的SF星系可能是AGN演化的前身阶段或低功率AGN的一种形式，其射电紧凑特性也提示AGN与年老星暴星系之间的联系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Comparison of the radio continuum luminosities between megahertz and gigahertz frequencies. Blue circles represent SF galaxies and red X-symbols represent AGN candidates chosen from multi-wavelength selection techniques (all the ones mentioned in Section 2.3 ). The black solid line is a 1D-polynomial fitted to SF galaxies, and it is followed by a dashed-dotted line that extrapolates it to \(L_{1.4GHz}>23\) [W Hz -1 ]. The dotted line is the same fit for AGN candidates.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：兆赫兹和千兆赫兹频率之间射电连续谱光度的比较。蓝色圆圈代表SF星系，红色X符号代表从多波段选择技术（第2.3节中提到的所有方法）中选出的AGN候选体。黑色实线是对SF星系拟合的一维多项式，其后是点划线，将其外推至\(L_{1.4GHz}>23\) [W Hz -1 ]。虚线是对AGN候选体的相同拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Parameter space used to match pairs of SF galaxies with and without gigahertz detections. We compared the properties of each pair, with GHz-SF on the x-axis and nGHz-SF on the y-axis, where both axes represent the same parameter. The dashed line in each plot represents the 1-to-1 correspondence where the parameter pairs are equal.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：用于匹配有和没有千兆赫兹探测的SF星系对的参数空间。我们比较了每对的性质，x轴为GHz-SF，y轴为nGHz-SF，两个轴代表相同的参数。每个图中的虚线表示参数对相等的一一对应关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Uncontrolled global or integrated properties of SF galaxies with and without gigahertz detections.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：有和没有千兆赫兹探测的SF星系的未受控全局或整体性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of modeled and empirically resolved properties between GHz-SFs and nGHz-SFs. The solid lines represent the median value at each annulus and the shaded region represents the 25th and 75th percentiles. The empirical properties are located in the top row, and the modeled, in the bottom row.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：GHz-SF和nGHz-SF之间建模和经验分辨性质的比较。实线代表每个环带的中值，阴影区域代表第25和第75百分位数。经验性质位于顶行，建模性质位于底行。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Resolved emission line ratios binned by their \(W_{80}\) . The first column of plots shows the positions of the spaxels (from the DAP, see Section 2.1.1 ) binned by \(W_{80}\) for GHz-SFs. The second column shows the same for nGHz-SFs. The distribution of the emission-line ratio spaxels of either GHz-SF or nGHz-SFs is shown in the opposite columns using black contours (see 4.4 ). For example, in the left column, \(W_{80}\) is binned for GHz-SF, but the contours show the spaxel distribution of nGHz-SF. In all plots, the Kewley_2001 and Kauffmann2003a lines for transition objects and extreme starbursts are shown in the red solid and black dashed lines, respectively. Bins where fewer than three scatter points were present have been excluded. On the bottom left of each plot, we display representative error bars (in black) for the individual scatter points that compose the shown binning.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：按\(W_{80}\)分箱的分辨发射线比。第一列图显示了GHz-SF中按\(W_{80}\)分箱的spaxel位置（来自DAP，见第2.1.1节）。第二列显示了nGHz-SF的相同情况。在相对的列中，使用黑色等高线显示了GHz-SF或nGHz-SF的发射线比spaxel的分布（见4.4）。例如，在左列中，\(W_{80}\)按GHz-SF分箱，但等高线显示了nGHz-SF的spaxel分布。在所有图中，过渡天体和极端星暴的Kewley_2001和Kauffmann2003a线分别以红色实线和黑色虚线显示。少于三个散点的分箱已被排除。在每个图的左下角，我们显示了构成所示分箱的单个散点的代表性误差棒（黑色）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Continuum and spatially resolved properties from a pair of galaxies of the main sample. We show four columns of plots, where the two left columns correspond to GHz-SF and the right ones to nGHz-SF. The GHz-SF and nGHz-SF shown here are twins (control sample pairs) in the parameter space defined in Section 3 . The left column in each shows the SDSS optical image at the top, the LOFAR sky cut in the same region as shown in SDSS is seen in the middle, and the FIRST counterpart at the bottom. The right columns show MaNGA’s spatially resolved properties. At the top, the W \(80\) , at the middle, the age-weighted luminosity, and at the bottom, the Visual extinction. The red regions in the radio continuum images display the region of MaNGA’s coverage.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：来自主样本的一对星系的连续谱和空间分辨性质。我们展示了四列图，其中左两列对应GHz-SF，右两列对应nGHz-SF。此处显示的GHz-SF和nGHz-SF在第3节定义的参数空间中是孪生对（对照样本对）。每组的左列顶部显示SDSS光学图像，中间显示与SDSS相同区域的LOFAR天空切片，底部显示FIRST对应体。右列显示MaNGA的空间分辨性质。顶部为W \(80\)，中间为年龄加权光度，底部为视觉消光。射电连续谱图像中的红色区域显示了MaNGA覆盖的区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Radial outflow fraction. The plot shows the median fraction of pixels that, at each annulus, were fitted with more than 2 Gaussian components, suggesting an outflow.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：径向外流比例。该图显示了在每个环带中，被拟合为多于两个高斯分量（暗示外流）的像素的中值比例。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the global or resolved properties of GHz-SFs when compared to nGHz-SFs.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：与nGHz-SF相比，GHz-SF的全局或分辨性质总结。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 现今的星系团是宇宙中最大的维里化结构，然而其早期形成过程仍知之甚少。在红移z>2时，正在形成的星系团跨度达数十兆秒差距，并包含富含气体、被尘埃遮蔽的星系，这些星系嵌入在延展的低表面亮度气体环境中。当前的（亚）毫米波设施缺乏所需的巡天速度、灵敏度和连续视场，无法追踪驱动星系快速增长的冷气体和尘埃在如此尺度上的分布。未来具有度级覆盖、宽光谱接入和高多路复用能力的大型单口径天文台，将能够对整个原星系团进行全面且均匀的测绘，揭示恒星形成被触发或淬灭的位置，并量化冷气体预算，从而提供原星系团环境中气体冷却的信息。与欧几里得、LSST和罗曼等广天区光学/近红外巡天协同，该设施将提供缺失的多尺度和多相亚毫米波视角，以揭示恒星、气体和暗物质成分在原星系团中如何组装，从而完善我们对早期结构形成的认识。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：未来大型单口径望远镜与光学/NIR巡天的协同观测将完整揭示早期结构形成中恒星、气体和暗物质组装的完整图景。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 放大偏置效应，即透镜引起的背景源数量计数的修正，为探测星系和星系团在千秒差距尺度上的质量密度分布提供了独特而强大的探针。与基于剪切的弱透镜不同，放大偏置不依赖于星系的形状，从而避免了主导性的小尺度系统误差。然而，现有研究受到天区覆盖范围、位置不确定性以及深度不足、受混淆限制的亚毫米波巡天的限制。需要像拟议中的50米望远镜AtLAST这样的下一代宽视场、高通量亚毫米波设施，才能释放该技术的全部诊断潜力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：放大偏置效应是探测星系和星系团质量分布的有力工具，但需要下一代亚毫米波望远镜设备来克服当前限制，实现该技术的全部潜力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Simulated stacking map showing the strong lensing effect and, in particular, the gap inside the Einstein ring.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：模拟叠加图，展示了强透镜效应，特别是爱因斯坦环内部的间隙。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Cross-correlation functions measured using the magnification bias of SMGs (red dots) showing the lensing gap around \(10^{\prime\prime}\) and the oscillatory signal at larger angular scales. The blue dots are the renormalized mass density profile measured from the galaxy satellites distribution. The best NFW fit to the outer region is represented by a dashed black line. See Crespo et al. (2025) for more details.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：利用SMG的放大偏置效应测量的互相关函数（红点），显示了在\(10^{\prime\prime}\)周围的透镜间隙以及更大角尺度上的振荡信号。蓝点是从星系卫星分布中测量的重归一化质量密度分布。外部区域的最佳NFW拟合由黑色虚线表示。更多细节见Crespo等人（2025）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们研究了星系团的动力学状态如何影响其星系种群和质量分布。利用DESI Legacy成像巡天与UNIONS星系剪切目录交叉匹配得到的光度选星系团样本，我们根据最亮星系团星系（BCGs）与明亮卫星星系之间的静止帧r波段星等差以及恒星质量比，将星系团分类为演化完全（evolved）或演化中（evolving）。我们测量了这两个子样本中叠加星系团的恒星质量函数、弱引力透镜轮廓、径向数密度和红星系比例轮廓。演化完全的星系团表现出更集中的透镜轮廓、由大质量BCGs主导的双峰恒星质量函数以及中等质量卫星星系的缺失，而演化中的星系团则显示出更平坦的中心透镜信号和过量的大质量卫星星系。将相同的选择标准应用于IllustrisTNG模拟的星系团，重现了这些趋势，并将观测到的差异与不同的质量吸积历史联系起来。这些结果证明了星系团星系种群与其底层暗物质晕的整体动力学状态之间存在密切联系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：星系团的星系种群与其底层暗物质晕的整体动力学状态之间存在密切联系，星系团的演化程度显著影响其内部结构和星系分布特征。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Selection of the evolved and evolving subsamples. The \(x\) -axis shows the absolute \(r-\) band magnitude gap between the BCG and the brightest satellite galaxy and the \(y\) -axis shows the log of the stellar mass ratio of the BCG to the 3rd most massive satellite of each galaxy cluster. The dashed lines and shaded regions indicate our selection regions for the evolved and evolving samples.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：演化完全和演化中子样本的选择。\(x\)轴显示BCG与最亮卫星星系之间的绝对\(r-\)波段星等差，\(y\)轴显示每个星系团中BCG与第三大质量卫星星系的恒星质量比的对数。虚线和阴影区域表示我们为演化完全和演化中样本选择的范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Flowchart showing our sample selection process combining multiple catalogues.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：展示我们结合多个星表进行样本选择过程的流程图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Distribution of cluster properties in the evolved and evolving samples. From left to right: Halo mass (average value 13.95 and 13.99 for evolved and evolving samples), redshift (average value 0.34 and 0.33 for evolved and evolving samples), and number of member galaxies within R 500c (average value 16.7 and 20.1 for evolved and evolving samples), respectively. The average values of each sample are shown by vertical lines of the corresponding colours in each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：演化完全和演化中样本的星系团属性分布。从左到右依次为：晕质量（演化完全和演化中样本的平均值分别为13.95和13.99）、红移（演化完全和演化中样本的平均值分别为0.34和0.33）以及R 500c内的成员星系数量（演化完全和演化中样本的平均值分别为16.7和20.1）。每个面板中对应颜色的垂直线显示了每个样本的平均值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Stellar mass functions (SMFs) of cluster galaxies in two redshift bins ( \(0.0\leq z<0.25\) , blue; \(0.25\leq z<0.5\) , orange) for all (evolved+evolving) clusters (left), evolved clusters (middle), and evolving clusters (right). Solid lines include all members within \(R_{500c}\) , while dashed lines show SMFs of satellites only, excluding the BCG. Evolved systems display a bimodal SMF, with the high-mass peak corresponding to the BCGs reaching \(\log_{10}(M_{\star}/{M}_{\odot})\approx 12.5\) , whereas BCGs in the evolving sample extend only to \(\log_{10}(M_{\star}/{M}_{\odot})\approx 12.0\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：在两个红移区间（\(0.0\leq z<0.25\)，蓝色；\(0.25\leq z<0.5\)，橙色）内，所有（演化完全+演化中）星系团（左）、演化完全星系团（中）和演化中星系团（右）的恒星质量函数（SMFs）。实线包括\(R_{500c}\)内的所有成员，而虚线仅显示卫星星系的SMFs，排除了BCG。演化完全系统显示出双峰SMF，其高质量峰对应BCGs，达到\(\log_{10}(M_{\star}/{M}_{\odot})\approx 12.5\)，而演化中样本中的BCGs仅延伸至\(\log_{10}(M_{\star}/{M}_{\odot})\approx 12.0\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Stellar mass functions (SMFs) of the evolved (magenta) and evolving (teal) clusters across all redshifts. The left panel shows SMF with all cluster members, and the right panel shows satellites only. The SMF with all cluster members extend to larger stellar mass for the evolved sample, whereas the trend is opposite for the satellites. Either way, the SMFs are different for the evolved and evolving subsamples.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：所有红移范围内演化完全（品红色）和演化中（青色）星系团的恒星质量函数（SMFs）。左图显示包含所有星系团成员的SMF，右图仅显示卫星星系。包含所有成员的SMF在演化完全样本中延伸至更大的恒星质量，而对于卫星星系则趋势相反。无论哪种情况，演化完全和演化中子样本的SMFs都是不同的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The 1- and 2- \(\sigma\) distribution of the stellar mass of different ranked galaxies vs. the total mass \(M_{500}\) of the evolved and evolving clusters. From left to right, the y-axes show the stellar mass of the BCG, the second brightest cluster galaxy, and the fourth massive cluster galaxy within \(R_{500}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：演化完全和演化中星系团中不同排名星系的恒星质量与总质量\(M_{500}\)的1-和2-\(\sigma\)分布。从左到右，y轴分别显示\(R_{500}\)内BCG、第二亮星系团星系和第四大质量星系团星系的恒星质量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The 1- and 2- \(\sigma\) distribution of the BCG stellar mass vs. the \(M_{500}\) of the different cluster sub-samples defined in the text.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：文中定义的不同星系团子样本的BCG恒星质量与\(M_{500}\)的1-和2-\(\sigma\)分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Weak lensing \(\Delta\Sigma\) profiles of the evolved and evolving subsamples, all redshifts combined. Beyond 1 Mpc, their profiles are similar in amplitude, though with slightly different shapes. Within 1 Mpc, however, the evolved systems show a significantly stronger lensing signal. These profiles are calculated using the full evolved and evolving cluster samples over all redshifts.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：演化完全和演化中子样本的弱引力透镜\(\Delta\Sigma\)轮廓，所有红移合并。在1 Mpc以外，它们的轮廓幅度相似，但形状略有不同。然而，在1 Mpc以内，演化完全系统显示出显著更强的透镜信号。这些轮廓是使用所有红移范围内的完整演化完全和演化中星系团样本计算得出的。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系演化由跨越广泛尺度的过程驱动，从巨分子云内的恒星形成（秒差距尺度）到整个星系中的外流和长期演化（千秒差距尺度），以及星系、其暗物质晕和大尺度结构（兆秒差距尺度）之间的相互作用。连接这些尺度上重子物质和能量的分布，在未来十年仍将是理论和观测天体物理学面临的关键挑战之一。应对这一挑战的一个重大进展是，获取高空间分辨率（秒差距尺度）积分场光谱观测（例如使用VLT/MUSE）的能力不断增强，以及探测星系在较大半径和高垂直标高处的极低表面亮度外围区域的能力。为了结合这两个领域，我们需要在星系光谱学方法上实现范式转变，特别是考虑到正在进行的和未来的测光巡天。未来十年还将带来大面积天空的广泛测光巡天革命，揭示邻近星系周围的低表面亮度特征。然而，要完全理解将星系与其晕连接起来、塑造低表面亮度特征并驱动长期演化的过程，空间分辨光谱学将至关重要。在此，我们概述了对邻近星系进行具有统计显著样本的宽视场光谱观测的需求，并强调了只有通过此类数据才能解决的关键问题。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要：要全面详细地理解塑造星系并将其与暗物质晕连接起来的物理过程，需要一个宽视场光谱设施来补充未来几十年的丰富成像巡天。通过实现从星系中心到其最微弱外围和晕的深度、空间分辨光谱学，它将为理解重子循环、层级并合和环境影响开辟新的参数空间。这样的设施将使欧洲南方天文台在未来几十年内处于星系演化研究的前沿。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 对高红移类星体的吸收光谱学为物理学基本常数在宇宙时间尺度上的可能变化提供了强有力的约束。亚毫米波段的甲基炔（CH）和水（H2O）基态跃迁，这两种分子在星际介质中广泛存在且同时期形成，利用射电技术无与伦比的光谱分辨率和频率可靠性，为精细结构常数α和质子电子质量比μ的变化提供了灵敏的检验。我们利用ALMA对这两种物种的同时观测，限制了它们朝向射电明亮透镜类星体PKS1830-211（z_abs=0.88582）和B0218+357（z_abs=0.68466）的吸收轮廓之间的任何速度偏移。我们的观测设置最小化了仪器误差和已知的系统误差来源，例如吸收轮廓的时间变化和背景类星体的频率相关形态。CH和H2O不透明度之间的极好相关性、大量独立的窄速度分量以及由于吸收轮廓固有的时间变化性而获得的独立光谱数量，确保了即使是化学分离偏差也被最小化。我们获得了在PKS1830-211(NE)和B0218+357(SW)方向上CH和H2O之间的整体速度偏移δ_v = -0.048 ± 0.028 km/s 和 -0.13 ± 0.14 km/s（1σ置信水平）。考虑到先前对这些系统获得的|Δμ/μ|的独立上限，这些值分别转换为3σ上限|Δα/α| < 0.55 ppm 和 1.5 ppm。这些对|Δα/α|的约束，在回溯时间约为当前宇宙年龄一半时，比之前对任何其他单个高红移系统的约束深两到四倍。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该研究通过对CH和H2O吸收谱的高精度测量，在宇宙年龄约一半的回望时间尺度上，对精细结构常数α的稳定性设定了迄今最严格的约束，支持α在宇宙演化过程中保持恒定。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Diagram of the lowest rotational energy levels of CH. The \(\Lambda\) -doublet and hyperfine levels are not to scale. The rest-frame frequencies of CH transitions observed by ALMA are indicated in red, in GHz, and their relative line strengths are given in parenthesis.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：CH最低转动能级示意图。\(\Lambda\) 双重态和超精细结构未按比例绘制。ALMA观测到的CH跃迁的静止系频率以GHz为单位用红色标出，其相对线强度在括号中给出。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Spectroscopic parameters of the CH and H 2 O transitions considered here and their sensitivity coefficients to variations of \(\mu\) and \(\alpha\) . 5 5 5 (a) For CH, frequencies are taken from Truppe et al. ( 2014 ) . For H 2 O, the frequency is taken from Cazzoli et al. ( 2009 ) . The hyperfine structure of the ortho-H 2 O 1 10 –1 01 line spreads over less than a few tens of m s -1 and is thus negligible in our work. For H \({}_{2}^{18}\) O, the frequency is taken from Golubiatnikov et al. ( 2006 ) . (b) Sky frequencies are calculated for \(z\) =0.88582. (c) Line strength. (d) Energy of the lower level. (e) The sensitivity coefficients \(K_{\mu}\) and \(K_{\alpha}\) for CH are taken from de Nijs et al. ( 2012 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：此处考虑的CH和H 2 O跃迁的光谱参数及其对\(\mu\) 和\(\alpha\) 变化的灵敏度系数。5 5 5 (a) 对于CH，频率取自Truppe等人(2014)。对于H 2 O，频率取自Cazzoli等人(2009)。邻位-H 2 O 1 10 –1 01线的超精细结构分布在小于几十m s -1的范围内，因此在我们的工作中可以忽略。对于H \({}_{2}^{18}\) O，频率取自Golubiatnikov等人(2006)。(b) 天空频率针对\(z\) =0.88582计算。(c) 线强度。(d) 下能级能量。(e) CH的灵敏度系数\(K_{\mu}\) 和\(K_{\alpha}\) 取自de Nijs等人(2012)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Spectra of CH and H 2 O lines toward PKS 1830 \(-\) 211 NE and SW images (left, middle, respectively), and toward B 0218 \(+\) 357(SW) (right) observed by ALMA at different epochs. The spectra are colored by dates, as indicated in the top-left and top-right boxes. The hyperfine structure of each CH \(\Lambda\) -doublet is indicated at the bottom of spectra. The spectrum of the H \({}_{2}^{18}\) O isotopologue, taken on 2014/05/05, is also shown for PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(SW) (top-middle box, in light blue). A zoom on the weak \(v\sim+170\) km s -1 velocity component is shown for PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(SW), with the 2016 averaged spectra (in purple) instead of that taken on 2016/03/05.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：ALMA在不同历元观测到的朝向PKS 1830 \(-\) 211 NE和SW像（左、中）以及朝向B 0218 \(+\) 357(SW)（右）的CH和H 2 O线光谱。光谱按日期着色，如左上和右上框所示。每个CH \(\Lambda\) 双重态的超精细结构在光谱底部标出。H \({}_{2}^{18}\) O同位素体的光谱（拍摄于2014/05/05）也显示在PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(SW)中（中上框，浅蓝色）。对于PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(SW)，显示了弱\(v\sim+170\) km s -1速度分量的放大图，其中使用了2016年平均光谱（紫色）代替2016/03/05拍摄的光谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Overlay of the opacity profiles of CH (average of the two \(\Lambda\) -doublets, deconvolved from their respective hyperfine structure) and H 2 O (scaled by the opacity ratio \(\gamma_{\tau}\) ), on top of their common fit profile (see Sec. 4.2 ) for PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(NE) (top, 2012 data), the isolated velocity component near \(v\sim+170\) km s -1 toward PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(SW) (middle, average of the 2016 data), and B 0218 \(+\) 357(SW) (bottom). Note the span of two orders of magnitude between the optical depths of these features.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：CH（两个\(\Lambda\) 双重态的平均值，已从其各自的超精细结构中解卷积）和H 2 O（按不透明度比\(\gamma_{\tau}\) 缩放）的不透明度轮廓叠加图，以及它们的共同拟合轮廓（见第4.2节），分别对应PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(NE)（顶部，2012年数据）、朝向PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(SW)的孤立速度分量（中部，2016年数据平均值）和B 0218 \(+\) 357(SW)（底部）。注意这些特征的光学深度跨越了两个数量级。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Bulk velocity offsets ( \(\delta v\) ) and opacity scaling ratios ( \(\gamma_{\tau}\) ) between CH and H 2 O spectra toward PKS 1830 \(-\) 211 and B 0218 \(+\) 357 from fitting a common opacity profile to both species (including H \({}_{2}^{18}\) O when specified).
figures.caption_zh: 表2：通过将共同不透明度轮廓拟合到两种物种（包括H \({}_{2}^{18}\) O，当指定时），得到朝向PKS 1830 \(-\) 211和B 0218 \(+\) 357的CH和H 2 O光谱之间的整体速度偏移（\(\delta v\) ）和不透明度缩放比（\(\gamma_{\tau}\) ）。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Fit results of Monte Carlo simulations of CH and H 2 O synthetic spectra with random amplitude variations governed by the dispersion \(\lambda\) . We set a fixed bulk velocity offset \(\delta v=1.0\) km s -1 and the scaling ratios \(\gamma_{\tau}=4.0\) , for PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(NE) and \(\gamma_{\tau}=8.0\) , for PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(SW). 7 7 7 \(\lambda\) represents the dispersion of amplitude variation introduced on each velocity component of the H 2 O spectra, see § 4.6 .
figures.caption_zh: 表3：对具有由色散\(\lambda\) 控制的随机振幅变化的CH和H 2 O合成光谱进行蒙特卡洛模拟的拟合结果。我们设定固定的整体速度偏移\(\delta v=1.0\) km s -1，以及对于PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(NE)的缩放比\(\gamma_{\tau}=4.0\) 和对于PKS 1830 \(-\) 211(SW)的\(\gamma_{\tau}=8.0\) 。7 7 7 \(\lambda\) 表示引入到H 2 O光谱每个速度分量上的振幅变化的色散，见第4.6节。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 重子在吸积到星系、星系群、星系团和纤维状结构等大质量高密度区域时，会被加热到温度超过 $>\!\!10^5\,\mathrm{K}$，在此过程中它们电离并变得光学透明。诸如ALMA等深亚毫米波观测已开始探测到少数（约4个）红移 $z\!\sim\!2-4$ 的大质量系统，而低分辨率亚毫米波巡天已在角分分辨率下探测到数千个红移达 $z\!\approx\!2$ 的天体。为了真正推动大尺度结构演化领域的发展，并绘制电离气体在温暖/炽热状态下直至其形成红移的分布，欧洲南方天文台（ESO）界需要一台大口径单碟（亚）毫米波望远镜。该望远镜需提供比现有设备高出数个量级的巡天速度，同时保持几角秒的分辨率，以便对气体成像，并在整个（亚）毫米波段消除射电和尘埃热信号的污染。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，ESO天文界需要建造大口径单碟（亚）毫米波望远镜，以高分辨率、高效率地绘制大尺度结构中电离气体的分布，从而推进对宇宙结构形成和演化的理解。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Spectral distortion from to the relativistically corrected thermal SZ effect (coloured solid lines), relativistic SZ correction for \(25~{keV}\) gas (black dashed line), and kinetic SZ effect (black dot-dashed line). In the background is a comparison of the atmospheric transmission conditions at the Chajnantor Plateau and the proposed spectral bands.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：来自相对论修正的热SZ效应的谱畸变（彩色实线），\(25~{keV}\) 气体的相对论SZ修正（黑色虚线），以及运动SZ效应（黑色点划线）。背景中对比了查南托高原的大气传输条件和拟议的谱段。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Mass-redshift detection limit for different AtLAST survey strategies [ undefg ] for a fixed survey time of 5 years in comparison with cluster wide-field millimeter (SZ) surveys [ undefh , undefi , undefj , undefk ] and the eROSITA all-sky (X-ray) survey [ undefl ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：不同AtLAST巡天策略 [ undefg ] 在固定5年巡天时间下的质量-红移探测极限，与星系团宽场毫米波（SZ）巡天 [ undefh , undefi , undefj , undefk ] 及eROSITA全天（X射线）巡天 [ undefl ] 的比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Simulated nearby galaxy cluster ( \(M_{500}\!\!=\!\!1.28\times 10^{15}\,{M_{\odot}}\) , \(z\!\!=\!\!0.07\) ; left) as observed by ALMA+ACA in Band 3 (top centre), MUSTANG-2 (bottom centre), and AtLAST at \(90~{GHz}\) (right). Adapted from Di Mascolo et al. [ undefg ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：模拟的近邻星系团（ \(M_{500}\!\!=\!\!1.28\times 10^{15}\,{M_{\odot}}\) ， \(z\!\!=\!\!0.07\) ；左图）分别由ALMA+ACA在Band 3（中上）、MUSTANG-2（中下）和AtLAST在 \(90~{GHz}\) （右图）观测的结果。改编自Di Mascolo等人 [ undefg ] 。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们从Hyper Suprime-Cam Subaru战略计划最终年数据中构建了光学选择的星系团和测光亮红星系（LRGs）样本，覆盖约1200平方度。星系团星表延伸至红移1.38，包含超过10000个富度大于15的星系团，其中富度定义为恒星质量约10^{10.2}M_⊙以上的星系成员概率加权数量。这些星系团中可能的红色成员星系总数超过6×10^5。星系团的测光红移精度较高，在广泛红移范围内弥散优于约0.01。我们探测到红移1以内星系团的堆叠弱引力透镜信号，并利用这些信号更新了质量-富度关系的约束。我们的测光LRG星表包含约600万个星系，延伸至红移1.25，在红移0.4至1.0范围内测光红移弥散优于约0.02。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，成功构建了大规模、高精度的星系团和红星系样本，为宇宙学研究和星系形成演化提供了重要数据基础，并更新了星系团质量-富度关系约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of CAMIRA clusters on the sky. Filled red circles show positions of clusters in the Wide layer, while filled blue squares show positions of clusters in the Deep+UD layer. The bright star mask is applied. Alt text: The plot shows how CAMIRA clusters are distributed on the sky.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：CAMIRA星系团在天球上的分布。红色实心圆表示Wide层中的星系团位置，蓝色实心方块表示Deep+UD层中的星系团位置。已应用亮星掩模。替代文本：该图显示了CAMIRA星系团在天球上的分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Distribution of CAMIRA clusters in the redshift-richness plane. Contours indicates the density of clusters. Top and right panels show the histograms of the cluster redshift \(z_{{cl}}\) and the richness \(\hat{N}_{{mem}}\) , respectively. Alt text: In the main plot, the x axis shows the redshift from 0.1 to 1.38, and the y axis shows the richness from 15 to 200. Points show how CAMIRA clusters are distributed in this plane.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：CAMIRA星系团在红移-富度平面上的分布。等高线表示星系团的密度。顶部和右侧面板分别显示了星系团红移\(z_{{cl}}\)和富度\(\hat{N}_{{mem}}\)的直方图。替代文本：在主图中，x轴显示红移从0.1到1.38，y轴显示富度从15到200。点表示CAMIRA星系团在此平面上的分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Upper: The comparison between cluster photometric redshifts \(z_{{cl}}\) and spectroscopic redshifts of BCGs \(z_{{BCG,spec}}\) . Values of the bias \(\delta_{z}\) , the scatter \(\sigma_{z}\) , and the outlier fraction of the redshift residual \((z_{{cl}}-z_{{BCG,spec}})/(1+z_{{BCG,spec}})\) that are derived with \(4\sigma\) clipping are also shown. Lower: The bias \(\delta_{z}\) , the scatter \(\sigma_{z}\) of the redshift residual as a function of redshift. Alt text: the x and y axes show the redshift from 0.1 to 1.38.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：上：星系团测光红移\(z_{{cl}}\)与BCG光谱红移\(z_{{BCG,spec}}\)的比较。还显示了使用\(4\sigma\)裁剪得到的红移残差\((z_{{cl}}-z_{{BCG,spec}})/(1+z_{{BCG,spec}})\)的偏差\(\delta_{z}\)、弥散\(\sigma_{z}\)和异常值比例。下：红移残差的偏差\(\delta_{z}\)和弥散\(\sigma_{z}\)随红移的变化。替代文本：x轴和y轴显示红移从0.1到1.38。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Examples of \(gri\) -composite color images of low- ( left ), mid- ( middle ), and high-redshift ( right ) CAMIRA clusters. The size of each image is \(\sim 5\farcm 5\) . Alt text: concentrations of red galaxies are shown.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：低红移（左）、中红移（中）和高红移（右）CAMIRA星系团的\(gri\)合成彩色图像示例。每幅图像的大小约为\(\sim 5\farcm 5\)。替代文本：显示了红色星系的聚集。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison between richness \(\hat{N}_{{mem}}\) and eRASS1 X-ray luminosity \(L_{X}\) with the correction of \([E(z)]^{-2}\) , where \(E(z)\) the Hubble parameter normalized by the Hubble constant. Here the X-ray luminosity refers to the bolometric luminosity within \(r_{500}\) (see bulbul24 ) . Clusters at \(z<0.2\) , \(0.2\leq z<0.5\) , and \(0.5\leq z\) are shown by blue circles, magenta stars, and red crosses, respectively. Alt text: the x axis shows the richness from 15 to 200, and the y axis shows the X-ray luminosity from three times 10 to 42 to 10 to 46 erg per second.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：富度\(\hat{N}_{{mem}}\)与经\([E(z)]^{-2}\)校正的eRASS1 X射线光度\(L_{X}\)的比较，其中\(E(z)\)是哈勃常数归一化的哈勃参数。此处X射线光度指\(r_{500}\)内的热光度（参见bulbul24）。\(z<0.2\)、\(0.2\leq z<0.5\)和\(0.5\leq z\)的星系团分别用蓝色圆圈、品红星号和红色叉号表示。替代文本：x轴显示富度从15到200，y轴显示X射线光度从3×10^{42}到10^{46} erg/s。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Histogram of positional offsets \(R_{{off}}\) , which are defined by physical transverse distances, between CAMIRA cluster centers and eRASS1 X-ray cluster centers. The solid line shows the best-fitting model assuming a two-component model. Alt text: The x axis shows the positional offset from 0 to 1 megaparsec.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：CAMIRA星系团中心与eRASS1 X射线星系团中心之间的位置偏移\(R_{{off}}\)（定义为物理横向距离）的直方图。实线显示假设双分量模型的最佳拟合模型。替代文本：x轴显示位置偏移从0到1兆秒差距。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Lensing profiles measured from the three-year HSC-SSP shear catalog. Different panels show results for different redshift bins. In each panel, we plot profiles for different richness bins with different symbols. Shaded regions indicate ranges of the radii that are excluded from the analysis (see text for more details). Solid lines indicate model predictions with the best-fit parameters listed in Table 3.3 . In sub-panels, we also show residuals (i.e., observed minus model predicted values) normalized by errors. Alt text: In each panel, the x axis shows the distance from the cluster center from 0.1 to 10 megaparsec. The y axis shows the differential surface mass distribution.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：使用三年HSC-SSP剪切目录测量的透镜轮廓。不同面板显示不同红移区间的结果。在每个面板中，我们用不同符号绘制不同富度区间的轮廓。阴影区域表示分析中排除的半径范围（详见正文）。实线表示使用表3.3中最佳拟合参数的模型预测。子面板中还显示了残差（即观测值减去模型预测值）经误差归一化的结果。替代文本：在每个面板中，x轴显示距星系团中心的距离从0.1到10兆秒差距，y轴显示微分表面质量分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: The mass-richness relations, obtained from equation ( 8 ), at \(z=0.3\) , \(0.6\) , and \(0.9\) for our best-fit model parameters listed in Table 3.3 . Solid lines and shaded regions show medians and the 16th and 84th percentiles of the PDF of the halo mass for a fixed richness. Alt text: The x axis shows the richness from 15 to 100, and the y axis shows from 3 times 10 to 13 to 2 times 10 to 15 solar masses.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：在\(z=0.3\)、\(0.6\)和\(0.9\)处，由方程（8）得到的质量-富度关系，使用表3.3中列出的最佳拟合模型参数。实线和阴影区域分别表示对于固定富度，晕质量概率密度函数的中位数以及第16和第84百分位数。替代文本：x轴显示富度从15到100，y轴显示从3×10^{13}到2×10^{15}太阳质量。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 外流在恒星和行星形成过程中起着关键作用。一些外流显示出以极高速度（EHV，约100 km/s）运动的冷分子气体离散团块，被称为“分子子弹”，它们很可能与其主要驱动机制密切相关。本文展示了ALMA对CO(J=3-2)谱线的一个明亮EHV分子子弹的观测，揭示了其在30 au尺度上的详细形态以及在整个中等速度范围（约30-100 km/s）内的运动学结构。这些观测为外流如何将质量和动量传递给周围介质提供了重要的新见解。观测到的通道图显示了多个环状特征序列，其速度随投影距离增加而增加，尺寸减小，每个序列描绘出一个薄的弓形壳层，并在轴上终止于一个明亮的EHV头部。每个壳层的形状、运动学和质量都与最简单的教科书模型——由时变EHV喷流产生的动量守恒弓形激波——惊人地吻合。连续壳层之间的动力学时标为几十年，最近的一次喷射事件与约1990年观测到的原恒星光学/红外爆发相吻合。这项工作揭示的由喷流变异性驱动的弓形激波夹带的强有力证据表明，吸积爆发（以及盘雪线变化）发生在数十年时间尺度上，这可能显著影响颗粒生长和行星形成过程。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：观测为射流变异性驱动的弓形激波夹带提供了强有力证据，表明吸积爆发（以及盘雪线变化）发生在数十年时间尺度上，这可能显著影响颗粒生长和行星形成过程。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: ALMA images and position-velocity diagrams of the blueshifted Bullet 1. Primary beam corrected ALMA images of the velocity-integrated intensity, peak intensity of the spectral cube, mean velocity, and position-velocity diagrams of the observed CO( \(J\) =3-2) emission. The higher (lower) angular resolution results are shown in the top (bottom) panels. Synthesized beams are shown at the bottom left corners of the images. Plus signs indicate the positions of the protostars, VLA 4A (west) and VLA 4B (east), of the SVS 13 binary [ 56 , 57 , 58 ] . The H 2 arcuate features [ 60 ] are plotted as black and white arcs, taking into account their observed proper motion and the \(\sim 0.07^{\prime\prime}\) offset between the radio and optical/infrared positions of the star [ 58 , 55 ] . All velocities are relative to VLA 4B, ranging from \(-\) 9.3 to \(-\) 102.7 (top panels) and \(-\) 126.4 km s -1 (bottom panels). These ranges exclude the CO disk emission but not contamination (stronger toward VLA 4A) from disk emission of other molecular transitions, with higher rest frequencies, falling within the frequency range of the blueshifted CO emission of the bullet. Note also that the low-resolution images include emission from the CO clumps 1 and 2 (see Extended Data Fig. 1 and Supplementary Table 1), near the southeast corner. The position-velocity diagrams have been obtained along the longitudinal axis of the bullet (PA = 160 ∘ , indicated by the black line in the panels of the third column), with origin in VLA 4B. Dashed lines in these diagrams indicate the emission of the families of rings II, III, and VI (defined in Fig. 3 ). Contours are: 3, 6, 10, 16, and 25 times \(0.05\) (top) and \(0.61\) (bottom) Jy beam -1 km s -1 (first and third columns); 3, 6, 10, and 16 times \(0.011\) (top) and \(0.066\) (bottom) Jy beam -1 (second column); 5, 10, 20, 35, 60 and 90 times 0.0025 (top) and 0.008 (bottom) Jy beam -1 (fourth column). See Methods for further details.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：蓝移子弹1的ALMA图像和位置-速度图。主波束校正的ALMA图像显示速度积分强度、谱立方体的峰值强度、平均速度，以及观测到的CO(\(J\)=3-2)发射的位置-速度图。较高（较低）角分辨率的结果显示在顶部（底部）面板中。合成波束显示在图像左下角。加号表示SVS 13双星[56, 57, 58]的原恒星VLA 4A（西）和VLA 4B（东）的位置。H\(_2\)弧形特征[60]被绘制为黑色和白色弧线，考虑了它们观测到的自行以及恒星射电与光学/红外位置之间约\(0.07^{\prime\prime}\)的偏移[58, 55]。所有速度均相对于VLA 4B，范围从\(-\)9.3到\(-\)102.7（顶部面板）和\(-\)126.4 km s\(^{-1}\)（底部面板）。这些范围排除了CO盘发射，但未排除来自其他分子跃迁（具有更高静止频率）的盘发射的污染（在VLA 4A方向更强），这些发射落在子弹蓝移CO发射的频率范围内。另请注意，低分辨率图像包括来自东南角附近的CO团块1和2的发射（参见扩展数据图1和补充表1）。位置-速度图是沿子弹纵轴（PA = 160°，由第三列面板中的黑线指示）获得的，原点在VLA 4B。这些图中的虚线表示环族II、III和VI（定义见图3）的发射。等高线为：3、6、10、16和25倍\(0.05\)（顶部）和\(0.61\)（底部）Jy beam\(^{-1}\) km s\(^{-1}\)（第一和第三列）；3、6、10和16倍\(0.011\)（顶部）和\(0.066\)（底部）Jy beam\(^{-1}\)（第二列）；5、10、20、35、60和90倍0.0025（顶部）和0.008（底部）Jy beam\(^{-1}\)（第四列）。详见方法部分。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Observed CO( \(J\) =3-2) spectral channel images at high angular resolution. A sample of high angular resolution channel maps of the CO( \(J\) =3-2) emission observed by ALMA, which illustrate the ringed kinematic structure in Bullet 1. The synthesized beam is \(0.173^{\prime\prime}\times 0.091^{\prime\prime}\) (PA = \(-2.2^{\circ}\) ), and is plotted as an ellipse in the bottom left corner of the first image. The full set of observed channel maps is shown in Supplementary Fig. 1 and Supplementary Video 1. The positions of the two protostars of the SVS 13 binary are indicated by plus signs. Note that several velocity channels are contaminated by emission from different molecular transitions, with higher rest frequency than CO, coming from the disks associated with VLA 4A and VLA 4B [ 58 ] . This disk emission is stronger toward VLA 4A. The LOS velocity relative to VLA 4B is shown in the top left corner of each image. The velocity width of each of the channels shown in the figure is 0.53 km s -1 , which corresponds to five native channels. The r.m.s noise of the images is 2.6 mJy beam -1 . The images have not been corrected by the primary beam response. The H 2 arcuate features [ 60 ] are plotted in the first column as white arcs. Lower angular resolution channel maps, covering a wider range of velocities, are shown in Extended Data Fig. 3, Supplementary Fig. 2 and Supplementary Video 2.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：高角分辨率下观测到的CO(\(J\)=3-2)谱通道图像。ALMA观测到的CO(\(J\)=3-2)发射的高角分辨率通道图样本，展示了子弹1中的环状运动学结构。合成波束为\(0.173^{\prime\prime}\times 0.091^{\prime\prime}\)（PA = \(-2.2^{\circ}\)），并在第一张图像左下角绘制为椭圆。观测到的完整通道图集见补充图1和补充视频1。SVS 13双星的两颗原恒星位置由加号表示。请注意，几个速度通道受到来自不同分子跃迁（静止频率高于CO）发射的污染，这些发射来自与VLA 4A和VLA 4B相关的盘[58]。这种盘发射在VLA 4A方向更强。相对于VLA 4B的视向速度显示在每张图像的左上角。图中显示的每个通道的速度宽度为0.53 km s\(^{-1}\)，对应于五个原生通道。图像的均方根噪声为2.6 mJy beam\(^{-1}\)。图像未经主波束响应校正。H\(_2\)弧形特征[60]在第一列中绘制为白色弧线。覆盖更宽速度范围的较低角分辨率通道图见扩展数据图3、补充图2和补充视频2。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Elliptical fits to the ringed emission of the CO( \(J\) =3-2) channel maps. Top: Color-coded plots of elliptical fits (see Methods) to the observed CO emission. Rings are represented by the ellipses that best-fit their emission, and filled emission regions by shaded areas, with colors indicating the LOS velocity relative to VLA 4B of the channel map. Their centers are indicated by color dots (rings) and triangles (filled emission). The rings tend to group in sequences that we call “families”, with their centers well aligned, their velocity increasing (in absolute value) and their size decreasing with distance from the stars (indicated with black plus signs), and ending in a region of filled emission (the “head”). Separate plots for each family are shown in the right panels. Linear regression fits (plotted as black lines for families I to III) have been performed (for families IV to VI their origin is set at the position of VLA 4B). The [FeII] microjet [ 60 ] from VLA 4B is represented by a green segment. Black and white arcs represent the H 2 arc-like features [ 60 ] . Offsets are relative to the position of VLA 4B. Bottom: Plots of the mean radius and the LOS velocity of the rings, as a function of the projected distance of their centers to VLA 4B. Error bars represent the estimated uncertainties, adopted as the deviations with respect to the fitted value that cause the intensity of the fitted ring to decrease by 1 \(\times\) r.m.s of the channel map (see Methods). The plots illustrate the trends (except for the heads) for the radius to decrease and the velocity to increase with distance, with the different families clearly differentiated in the plots. The gray line in the left panel traces the suggested outer edge of the families, forming an angle of \(\sim\) \(44^{\circ}\) from the axis ( \(\sim\) \(22^{\circ}\) after deprojection by an inclination angle of \(25^{\circ}\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：CO(\(J\)=3-2)通道图环状发射的椭圆拟合。顶部：对观测到的CO发射的椭圆拟合（见方法）的彩色编码图。环由其发射的最佳拟合椭圆表示，填充的发射区域由阴影区域表示，颜色表示通道图相对于VLA 4B的视向速度。它们的中心由彩色点（环）和三角形（填充发射）表示。环倾向于分组为称为“族”的序列，其中心良好对齐，速度（绝对值）随距恒星的距离增加而增加，尺寸减小，并终止于填充发射区域（“头部”）。每个族的单独图显示在右侧面板中。已对族I至III进行了线性回归拟合（绘制为黑线）（对于族IV至VI，其原点设置在VLA 4B位置）。来自VLA 4B的[FeII]微喷流[60]由绿色线段表示。黑色和白色弧线代表H\(_2\)弧形特征[60]。偏移量相对于VLA 4B的位置。底部：环的平均半径和视向速度作为其中心到VLA 4B投影距离的函数图。误差棒表示估计的不确定性，采用相对于拟合值的偏差，该偏差导致拟合环的强度降低1\(\times\)通道图的均方根（见方法）。这些图说明了半径随距离减小和速度随距离增加的趋势（头部除外），不同族在图中清晰区分。左图中的灰色线描绘了族的外边缘，与轴形成约\(44^{\circ}\)的角度（去投影后，倾角为\(25^{\circ}\)，约为\(22^{\circ}\)）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Decomposition of an approaching bowshock into velocity channel images. The \(x^{\prime}y^{\prime}\) plane is the plane of the sky, the \(z^{\prime}\) axis is the LOS, and the \(z\) axis is the symmetry axis of the bowshock, oriented at an inclination angle \(i\) with respect to the LOS. Left: Side view illustrating the velocity gradient of the blueshifted bowshock, where the magnitude of the velocities increases as we approach the bowshock head. Black arrows represent the velocity field of the bowshock shell, while colored arrows represent their projection onto the LOS. The points in the bowshock with LOS velocities \(v_{ch1}\) , \(v_{ch2}\) , and \(v_{ch3}\) are also shown in colors. Right: Projection onto the plane of the sky of the points in the bowshock with LOS velocities \(v_{ch1}\) , \(v_{ch2}\) , and \(v_{ch3}\) . Each colored curve corresponds to the emission observed in a channel map. Note that the LOS velocities ( \(v_{ch}\) ) are defined as positive when the motion is away from the observer (redshifted), but in the coordinate system used, positive \(v_{z^{\prime}}\) velocities are directed toward the observer (blueshifted); therefore, \(v_{ch}=-v_{z^{\prime}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：一个接近的弓形激波分解为速度通道图像。\(x^{\prime}y^{\prime}\)平面是天球平面，\(z^{\prime}\)轴是视向，\(z\)轴是弓形激波的对称轴，相对于视向以倾角\(i\)定向。左图：侧视图说明了蓝移弓形激波的速度梯度，其中速度大小随着接近弓形激波头部而增加。黑色箭头表示弓形激波壳层的速度场，而彩色箭头表示它们在视向上的投影。具有视向速度\(v_{ch1}\)、\(v_{ch2}\)和\(v_{ch3}\)的弓形激波上的点也以彩色显示。右图：具有视向速度\(v_{ch1}\)、\(v_{ch2}\)和\(v_{ch3}\)的弓形激波上的点在天球平面上的投影。每条彩色曲线对应于在通道图中观测到的发射。请注意，视向速度（\(v_{ch}\)）定义为当运动远离观测者时为正（红移），但在所使用的坐标系中，正的\(v_{z^{\prime}}\)速度指向观测者（蓝移）；因此，\(v_{ch}=-v_{z^{\prime}}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Bowshock model fitting to the elliptical fits of the rings. Panels correspond to families II, III and VI, respectively, from top to bottom. The bowshock model fitting was performed through a least-square minimization to the data (see Methods). The best-fit model parameters are presented in Extended Data Table 1. First column: Shape and velocity field (black arrows) of the bowshock model, where \(z\) is the symmetry axis (whose origin is VLA 4B) and \(r\) is the cylindrical radius. The main parameters of the model, the characteristic scale ( \(L_{0}\) ), the velocity at which the jet material is initially ejected sideways by the working surface ( \(v_{0}\) ), and the velocity of the internal working surface along the \(z\) -axis ( \(v_{jet}\) ), are listed in the top right corner of the panels. The fitted inclination angles are \(i=20\) - \(25^{\circ}\) , and the fitted velocity of the medium into which the jet is traveling is \(v_{amb}\simeq 0\) km s -1 (see Methods and Extended Data Table 1). Second column: Observed (dots indicate rings and triangles indicate filled emission of the head) and bowshock model (continuum line) mean radius of the elliptical rings in channel maps as a function of the projected distance to VLA 4B. Velocities are indicated in a color scale. The reduced chi-square of the fitting is shown on the right top corner. Third column: Observed (red dots) and model (blue line) position-velocity diagram for the rings (excluding the heads). Fourth column: Observed (red dots) and model (blue line) elongation factor of the rings ( \(f\) ), taken as the ratio of the ring axes along the longitudinal and transverse directions. Error bars indicate the estimated uncertainties of the data points as defined in Fig. 3 , empty dots indicate that the axial ratio uncertainty could not be obtained (see “Ellipse fitting” in Methods). All velocities are LOS velocities relative to the velocity of VLA 4B.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：弓形激波模型对环的椭圆拟合。面板分别对应族II、III和VI，从上到下。弓形激波模型拟合通过数据的最小二乘最小化进行（见方法）。最佳拟合模型参数见扩展数据表1。第一列：弓形激波模型的形状和速度场（黑色箭头），其中\(z\)是对称轴（原点为VLA 4B），\(r\)是柱坐标半径。模型的主要参数，特征尺度（\(L_{0}\)）、喷流物质最初被工作面侧向抛出的速度（\(v_{0}\)）以及内部工作面沿\(z\)轴的速度（\(v_{jet}\)），列在面板右上角。拟合的倾角为\(i=20\)-\(25^{\circ}\)，拟合的喷流行进介质速度为\(v_{amb}\simeq 0\) km s\(^{-1}\)（见方法和扩展数据表1）。第二列：观测到的（点表示环，三角形表示头部的填充发射）和弓形激波模型（连续线）在通道图中椭圆环的平均半径作为到VLA 4B投影距离的函数。速度以颜色标尺指示。拟合的约化卡方值显示在右上角。第三列：环（不包括头部）的观测（红点）和模型（蓝线）位置-速度图。第四列：环的观测（红点）和模型（蓝线）伸长因子（\(f\)），取环沿纵向和横向的轴比。误差棒表示数据点的估计不确定性，定义见图3，空点表示无法获得轴比不确定性（见方法中的“椭圆拟合”）。所有速度均为相对于VLA 4B速度的视向速度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison of the bowshock model with the observations. Comparison of observational and model results for ring families II and III. The model parameters are given in Fig. 5 and Extended Data Table 1. An intrinsic velocity dispersion \(v_{T}\) =2 km s -1 has been assumed in the modeling (see Methods). The channel width is \(\Delta v_{ch}\) =0.53 km s -1 in both model and observations. Offsets are relative to VLA 4B. Top rows: Comparison of a set of observed and bowshock model spectral channel images (first and second rows, respectively). The LOS velocity relative to VLA 4B is indicated in the images. Bottom rows: Comparison of observational and model results (third and fourth rows, respectively) for the integrated intensity and mean velocity images, and position-velocity diagrams. The LOS velocity range in model calculations is \(-\) 41.6 to \(-\) 112.0 km s -1 , corresponding approximately to the range used to construct the observed images ( \(-\) 41.6 to \(-\) 100.8 km s -1 , where the emission of families II and III is dominant, although there is still some contamination from Family I within \(\sim\) \(0.5^{\prime\prime}\) southeast from VLA 4B). The disk emission has been masked in the observed images; yet, the observed emission is stronger than that of the model, since the observations likely include some emission from other features that is difficult to avoid. Contours of the integrated intensity are 4, 6, 8, 10, and 12 times 0.12 Jy beam -1 km s -1 for the observations, and 2, 4, 6, 8, and 10 times 0.08 Jy beam -1 km s -1 for the model images. Contours of the position-velocity diagrams (PA = 160 ∘ , width = \(0.1^{\prime\prime}\) ) are 5, 10, 20, and 35 times 2.5 mJy beam -1 for the observations, and 2, 5, 10, and 20 times 2.5 mJy beam -1 for the model. Dashed lines in the observed position-velocity diagram indicate the emission from families II and III.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：弓形激波模型与观测的比较。环族II和III的观测与模型结果比较。模型参数见图5和扩展数据表1。在建模中假设了固有速度弥散\(v_{T}\)=2 km s\(^{-1}\)（见方法）。模型和观测中的通道宽度均为\(\Delta v_{ch}\)=0.53 km s\(^{-1}\)。偏移量相对于VLA 4B。顶部行：一组观测到的和弓形激波模型谱通道图像（分别为第一行和第二行）的比较。相对于VLA 4B的视向速度在图像中指示。底部行：积分强度和平均速度图像以及位置-速度图的观测与模型结果（分别为第三行和第四行）的比较。模型计算中的视向速度范围为\(-\)41.6到\(-\)112.0 km s\(^{-1}\)，大致对应于用于构建观测图像的范围（\(-\)41.6到\(-\)100.8 km s\(^{-1}\)，其中族II和III的发射占主导，尽管在VLA 4B东南约\(0.5^{\prime\prime}\)范围内仍有一些来自族I的污染）。观测图像中的盘发射已被掩蔽；然而，观测发射比模型更强，因为观测可能包含一些难以避免的其他特征的发射。积分强度的等高线为：观测为4、6、8、10和12倍0.12 Jy beam\(^{-1}\) km s\(^{-1}\)，模型图像为2、4、6、8和10倍0.08 Jy beam\(^{-1}\) km s\(^{-1}\)。位置-速度图（PA = 160°，宽度=\(0.1^{\prime\prime}\)）的等高线为：观测为5、10、20和35倍2.5 mJy beam\(^{-1}\)，模型为2、5、10和20倍2.5 mJy beam\(^{-1}\)。观测位置-速度图中的虚线表示来自族II和III的发射。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Fig. 1: Overview of the outflows in the vicinity of SVS 13. Observed outflow features surrounding SVS 13 at different scales (see their observational properties in Supplementary Table 1). Large boxes indicate zoomed-in regions. The synthesized beams are shown in the bottom right corner of the panels. Velocities are relative to VLA 4B ( \(v_{{LSR}}=+9.3\) km s -1 ) [ 58 ] . Top left: CARMA CO(J=1-0) map of the large-scale SHV molecular outflow [ 63 , 106 ] . The emission has been integrated from -11.6 to -3.1 km s -1 (blue lobe) and from 0.7 to 8 km s -1 (red lobe). The location of the EHV molecular bullets [ 51 , 52 ] (triangles), Herbig-Haro objects (squares), and radio sources proposed as YSOs [ 107 , 58 ] (plus signs, where SVS 13 is the largest) is indicated. Top right: HST optical image (F606W filter) of the region, showing the outflow cavity, with the SMA map of the CO(2-1) emission of the EHV bullets [ 52 ] (with velocities from -161 to +129 km/s) overlapped in blue contours. Bottom left: Our ALMA CO(3-2) map (not corrected for the primary beam response) of the central region of the molecular outflow (beam= \(0.527^{\prime\prime}\times 0.333^{\prime\prime}\) , PA=2.7 deg) is shown in contours. The emission has been integrated from -126.4 to -6.5 km s -1 (blue lobe) and from 6.5 to 60.8 km s -1 (red lobe). Contours are 3, 6, 10, 15, 21, 28, and 37 times 0.41 Jy beam -1 km s -1 (blue lobe) and 0.32 Jy beam -1 km s -1 (red lobe).The H 2 arcuate features60 are plotted as arcs. Bottom right: Close-up toward Bullet 1. Our ALMA CO(3-2) map of the blueshifted emission (beam= \(0.537^{\prime\prime}\times 0.333^{\prime\prime}\) , PA=2.7 deg), integrated from -9.3 to -126.4 km s -1 (thus including the SHV, IHV, and EHV components), is shown in contours. Contours are 3, 6, 10, 16, and 25 times 0.61 Jy beam -1 km s -1 . The colored filled areas represent the heads of the detected families of rings (see Fig. 3). The green squares represent the location of two

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们考虑了轻质量（但大质量）遗迹粒子（LiMRs）对早期宇宙物质成团性的影响。我们注意到，质量足够大的LiMRs可能在早期宇宙的大尺度上成团，从而甚至在小角尺度上影响宇宙微波背景（CMB）的弱透镜效应。特别地，我们发现质量范围在$\gtrsim$ eV（甚至$> 10$ eV）的LiMRs可以构成暗物质中不可忽略的组成部分。这开启了一类新场景：能量以暗辐射形式注入，但在重组之前开始像物质一样红移，从而避免了对$ΔN_{eff}$的约束，同时提供了eV量级的暗物质组分。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，轻质量遗迹粒子（≥eV）可以作为暗物质的重要候选者，为暗物质研究提供了新的可能性，同时避免了传统暗辐射约束的限制。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Plot of \(\Delta C_{\ell}^{\kappa\kappa}/C_{\ell}^{\kappa\kappa}\) as a function of \(\ell\) , setting \(r=(4/11)^{1/3}\) and \(\sum_{\nu}m_{\nu}=0.3~\,{eV}\) ( \(g=3/2,n_{s}=1\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：\(\Delta C_{\ell}^{\kappa\kappa}/C_{\ell}^{\kappa\kappa}\) 作为 \(\ell\) 的函数图，设定 \(r=(4/11)^{1/3}\) 和 \(\sum_{\nu}m_{\nu}=0.3~\,{eV}\) ( \(g=3/2,n_{s}=1\) )。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Regions of the \((m_{X},f_{X})\) parameter space in which \(|\Delta C_{\ell}^{\kappa\kappa}/C_{\ell}^{\kappa\kappa}|<0.025~(0.017)\) for \(\ell\leq 2000\) are plotted in blue (yellow). Also plotted are contours of constant \(r\equiv T_{X}/T_{\gamma}\) , as labelled.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：\((m_{X},f_{X})\) 参数空间中满足 \(|\Delta C_{\ell}^{\kappa\kappa}/C_{\ell}^{\kappa\kappa}|<0.025~(0.017)\) 对于 \(\ell\leq 2000\) 的区域以蓝色（黄色）绘制。同时绘制了恒定 \(r\equiv T_{X}/T_{\gamma}\) 的等高线，如标注所示。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星暴星系中的尘埃含量通常与其恒星质量呈正相关。然而，近期一些JWST研究显示存在一类尘埃消光异常大的矮星系。利用宇宙演化早期释放科学巡天（CEERS）数据，我们识别出1361个高消光低质量（HELM）星系样本，定义为矮星系（$M_*<10^{8.5}$）且$A_V>1$ mag，或更大质量星系中相对于其恒星质量具有异常高尘埃消光的星系（即$A_V>1.6\log_{10}(M_*/M_\odot)-12.6$）。该选择基于通过综合光谱能量分布拟合分析（基于光学至近红外数据）获得的多参数分布。在排除可能的污染源（如褐矮星、小红点、高红移（$z>8.5$）和超高红移（$z>15$）星系）后，样本主要包含$z<1$的源，尾部延伸至$z=7.2$。样本的中值恒星质量为$10^7 M_\odot$，中值尘埃消光为$A_V=2$ mag。我们分析了这些源的形态、环境和恒星形成率，以探究其大尘埃消光的原因。特别是，HELM源的大小（有效半径$R_e$）与非尘埃矮星系相似，且轴比（$b/a$）与尘埃消光之间无相关性。这一发现表明，大尘埃消光不太可能是投影效应所致，但扁长或盘状扁球几何结构仍有可能（至少对部分源而言）。我们发现HELM源的分布略微偏向于比非尘埃矮星系更聚集的环境，且其恒星形成率略低。若经光谱后续观测证实，这一发现表明HELM源可能正在经历某些环境过程，如星系相互作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，HELM星系异常高的尘埃消光不太可能是投影效应所致，而可能与星系相互作用等环境过程有关，这需要光谱后续观测来证实。

Contour lines show the 20 (yellow) to 90% (dark blue) of the distribution, in steps of 10%. Coloured symbols show other samples of dusty objects from the literature ( AlcaldePampliega2019 ; PerezGonzalez2023 ; Gentile2024 ; Rodighiero2023 ; Bisigello2023b ; Gandolfi2025 ; Castellano2025 ; ArrabalHaro2023b ) and the one analysed in this paper (see Sec. 2.3 ). Bisigello2025a is an HELM galaxy confirmed spectroscopically and is also part of the HELM- \(2\sigma\) sample, while the source by Castellano2025 has been confirmed spectroscopically, but it is on another field. The green dashed line shows the known relation between dust attenuation and stellar mass ( McLure2018 ) derived at \(2<z<3\) , while the red solid line shows the selection criterion of HELM sources.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在恒星质量与尘埃消光平面上可见的意外HELM星系群。黑点为整个CEERS样本（任何选择之前），源自第2.2节描述的首次SED拟合运行，并考虑$A_V$和恒星质量的中值。等高线以10%步长显示分布的20%（黄色）至90%（深蓝色）。彩色符号显示文献中其他尘埃天体样本（AlcaldePampliega2019；PerezGonzalez2023；Gentile2024；Rodighiero2023；Bisigello2023b；Gandolfi2025；Castellano2025；ArrabalHaro2023b）以及本文分析的样本（见第2.3节）。Bisigello2025a是经光谱证认的HELM星系，也是HELM-$2\sigma$样本的一部分，而Castellano2025的源已通过光谱证认，但位于另一天区。绿色虚线显示在$2<z<3$处推导的已知尘埃消光与恒星质量关系（McLure2018），红色实线显示HELM源的选择判据。

For the stellar mass and dust attenuation we show the median value of the median outputs of each SED setup. We remind that the HELM selection is performed on the multiparameter probability distribution and not on the point estimates of the physical properties, so the median value shown here can be slightly out of the selection if one of the SED runs has a median output distant from the HELM selection. The two side panels show the number density of the HELM samples before and after the selections of Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：恒星质量与尘埃消光平面，显示HELM源和HELM选择判据（红色实线）。对于恒星质量和尘埃消光，我们显示每个SED设置中值输出的中值。我们提醒，HELM选择基于多参数概率分布而非物理属性的点估计，因此若某个SED运行的中值输出远离HELM选择，此处显示的中值可能略微超出选择范围。两侧面板显示表1选择前后HELM样本的数密度。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 到2040年代，若干全天巡天将彻底改变我们对大尺度结构的认识。然而，天体物理学中一个主要的未解问题依然存在：理解星系如何获得并演化其角动量，以及这与宇宙网的联系。测量星系自旋与宇宙纤维在宇宙时间尺度上的对齐，并理解这揭示了星系演化的哪些信息，需要同时表征本征对齐（即由宇宙网本身而非引力透镜产生的星系形状相关性）的巡天。本征对齐是弱引力透镜测量宇宙基本参数的主要系统误差来源。同时解决这两个问题将需要新型多目标光谱巡天，这些巡天需结合运动学信息与高完整性红移（至少达到24-25星等）。为实现我们的科学目标，我们需要新一代宽视场光谱设施，能够对数百万个星系进行自旋-纤维对齐测量，同时提供亚兆秒差距分辨率的宇宙网以及空间分辨的运动学，以在单个星系及其局部宇宙环境层面绘制自旋-纤维联系。这样的项目将提供一个从千秒差距到兆秒差距尺度的独特星系和宇宙结构遗产巡天，确立欧洲南方天文台在连接星系演化物理学与第四阶段宇宙学巡天系统误差控制需求方面的领导地位。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：需要结合运动学信息与高完整性红移（至少24-25星等）的新型多目标光谱巡天，以同时解决星系演化问题和弱引力透镜系统误差控制，这需要新一代宽视场光谱设施来实现。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们对棒旋星系不同区域中的HII区域性质进行了比较分析，旨在探究棒结构对电离气体物理性质的影响。基于17个棒旋星系的积分场光谱数据（覆盖约中心6×6千秒差距），我们共探测到2200个HII区域，其中331个位于核盘（也称为环核区域），661个位于棒区域，1208个位于盘区域。在HII区域的物理性质中，我们研究了O/H和N/O丰度、Hα光度、尘埃消光、电子密度以及Hα等效宽度。我们发现核盘、棒和盘区域的HII区域性质存在明显差异，这可以通过棒驱动的气体流导致中心区域分子气体浓度增强来解释。随着气体向星系中心输送，环核HII区域在分析的性质中表现出最极端的值。与棒强度不同，星系质量似乎确实影响HII区域的性质，大质量星系在大多数性质上呈现更高的值，这可能是由于这些系统中气体含量增加所致。本研究提供了证据表明，棒驱动的星系内部物质再分布导致HII区域性质随其在星系中的位置不同而产生显著差异。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，棒驱动的星系内部物质再分布导致HII区域性质随其在星系中的位置不同而产生显著差异，棒诱导的气体流动是造成这些差异的主要机制。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Main properties of the galaxy sample. These include: galaxy designation (column 1), morphological classification (column 2), galaxy distance (column 3), stellar mass (column 4), position angle and ellipticity of the disc (columns 5 and 6), position angle, ellipticity and semi-major axis of the bar (columns 7-9), bar strength (column 10), and kinematic radius for the nuclear disc (column 11).
