figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Modelling of the H ii regions by PYHIIEXTRACTOR for the galaxy NGC 4981. We show the observed H \(\alpha\) map (top panel), the derived model of the candidate H ii regions and the DIG together (middle-top panel) and separately (H ii regions, middle-bottom panel; DIG, bottom panel). Orange circle and red ellipse in top panel delimit the nuclear disc and bar regions, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：PYHIIEXTRACTOR对星系NGC 4981的H ii区域的建模。我们展示了观测到的H \(\alpha\) 图（上方面板），候选H ii区域和DIG的联合模型（中上方面板）以及分别展示的模型（H ii区域，中下方面板；DIG，下方面板）。上方面板中的橙色圆圈和红色椭圆分别标定了核盘和棒区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Sketch of a barred galaxy where the different populations of H ii regions are identified (circumnuclear, pink; bar, orange; inner disc, purple; outer disc, grey). The three contours correspond to the limits of the nuclear disc (dashed pink circle), bar region (dotted orange ellipse), and inner disc (dashed-dotted green ellipse), respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：一个棒旋星系的示意图，其中标明了不同群体的H ii区域（环核区域，粉色；棒区域，橙色；内盘，紫色；外盘，灰色）。三个等高线分别对应核盘（粉色虚线圆圈）、棒区域（橙色虚线椭圆）和内盘（绿色点划线椭圆）的边界。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison of the distributions of oxygen abundances ( top ), N/O abundances ( middle ), and L(H \(\alpha\) ) ( bottom ) for different populations of H ii regions: disc (green) versus bar (orange) regions ( left ), disc (green) versus circumnuclear (pink) regions ( middle ), and regions in the disc inside (purple) versus outside (grey) the bar radius ( right ). The distribution for the bar regions is also represented in right panels with unfilled black histograms. In the top left corner of first panels we include the typical (median) errorbar of each parameter, derived by propagating the errors in the involved emission line intensities (the intrinsic error in the used calibrations is not included for O/H and N/O abundances). In the bottom right corner of the panels the Mann-Whitney U test p-value for each pair of compared distributions is shown, and for those which have values below 5% (i.e. presenting statistically significant differences), the Cliff’s \(\delta\) is also provided as a measure of the magnitude of the differences. These are categorised as negligible (N), small (S), medium (M) and large (L) differences (see Sec. 4 for details on these statistics).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：不同H ii区域群体的氧丰度（上方面板）、N/O丰度（中间面板）和L(H \(\alpha\) )（下方面板）分布的比较：盘（绿色）与棒（橙色）区域（左方面板），盘（绿色）与环核（粉色）区域（中间面板），以及棒半径内（紫色）与外（灰色）的盘区域（右方面板）。右方面板中也用未填充的黑色直方图表示棒区域的分布。在第一个面板的左上角，我们包含了每个参数的典型（中位数）误差棒，该误差棒通过传播所涉及发射线强度的误差得出（O/H和N/O丰度未包含所用校准的内在误差）。在面板的右下角，显示了每对比较分布的Mann-Whitney U检验p值，对于p值低于5%（即存在统计显著差异）的情况，还提供了Cliff’s \(\delta\) 作为差异大小的度量。这些差异被分类为可忽略（N）、小（S）、中（M）和大（L）（详见第4节关于这些统计量的说明）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Same as Fig. 3 but for the dust extinction ( top ), the \([\text{S\,{ii}}]\lambda 6717/[\text{S\,{ii}}]\lambda 6731\) line ratio as a proxy for the electron density ( middle ), and the H \(\alpha\) equivalent width ( bottom ). See caption above for more details.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3相同，但针对尘埃消光（上方面板）、作为电子密度代理的\([\text{S\,{ii}}]\lambda 6717/[\text{S\,{ii}}]\lambda 6731\) 线比（中间面板）和H \(\alpha\) 等效宽度（下方面板）。更多细节请参见上图说明。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Resolved \(\Sigma_{\star}-{O/H}\) ( top ) and \(\Sigma_{\star}-{N/O}\) ( bottom ) relations. H ii regions have been segregated as in Fig. 3 , following Sec. 3.3 . Solid and dashed lines mark the median trend and the median absolute deviation, respectively, in bins of 0.4 log \(\Sigma_{\star}\) . The average absolute difference of the median trend between the two represented distributions (| \(\Delta\) |) is given in the bottom right corner of the panels.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：分辨的\(\Sigma_{\star}-{O/H}\) （上方面板）和\(\Sigma_{\star}-{N/O}\) （下方面板）关系。H ii区域已按图3所示方式分组，遵循第3.3节。实线和虚线分别表示在0.4 log \(\Sigma_{\star}\) 的区间内的中位数趋势和中位数绝对偏差。两个表示分布的中位数趋势之间的平均绝对差（| \(\Delta\) |）在面板的右下角给出。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Mann-Whitney U test p-values and Cliff’s \(\delta\) values for the analysed properties of the compared subpopulations of H ii regions (circumnuclear, bar, and disc) when segregating the sample according to the galaxy mass and the bar strength.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：根据星系质量和棒强度对样本进行分组时，比较的H ii区域子群体（环核、棒和盘）的分析性质的Mann-Whitney U检验p值和Cliff’s \(\delta\) 值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Cliff’s \(\delta\) values for the analysed properties of the compared subpopulations of H ii regions with no decontamination from DIG emission (golden down triangles). The values for the analysis with DIG correction (described in Sec. 4 ) are shown for reference (brown up triangles). Only the cases where Mann-Whitney U p-values \(<5\%\) are considered.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：未进行DIG发射去污染的比较H ii区域子群体的分析性质的Cliff’s \(\delta\) 值（金色向下三角形）。带有DIG校正的分析值（如第4节所述）作为参考显示（棕色向上三角形）。仅考虑Mann-Whitney U p值\(<5\%\) 的情况。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST在早期宇宙（$z \gtrsim 2$）中发现了一大批大质量（$M_{\star} \gtrsim 10^{10 }\mathrm{M_{\odot}}$）静止星系（MQGs），其性质对当前的星系形成模型提出了挑战。本文在最新的COLIBRE宇宙学流体动力学模拟中研究了这群MQGs。我们报告了与最新观测大致一致的数密度和恒星质量函数。预测的静止和形成时标在定性上与观测推断一致。利用COLIBRE中最先进的物理过程，模型预测MQGs的尘埃和$\rm H_{2}$丰度比其大质量恒星形成对应体低1个dex以上；而它们的大小和运动学则大致相似。我们进一步探索了COLIBRE中驱动星系变得大质量并静止的过程，确定活动星系核反馈是主要的静止机制。与相似质量的恒星形成星系相比，MQGs拥有更大质量的黑洞，并表现出更高的恒星形成效率。这些差异源于它们的环境，特别是在静止前的局域（$\rm 0.3\,cMpc$）到中等尺度（$\rm 1.0\,cMpc$）上，过密区域与增强的气体流入、更高的黑洞吸积率以及由此产生的更强反馈功率相关。我们发现，当在$z=3$处选择时，约55%的MQGs作为$z=0$星系的主要前身存活下来，尽管高达55%的MQGs经历了再活跃期。我们的结果为MQGs提供了可靠的预测，表明当正向模拟有效的观测不确定性时，与观测的紧张关系得到缓解，并阐明了其起源背后的机制。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，COLIBRE模拟为大质量静止星系提供了可靠的预测，显示当考虑观测不确定性时与观测的紧张关系得到缓解，并阐明了这些星系起源背后的机制，特别是AGN反馈在静止化过程中的关键作用。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : COLIBRE hydrodynamical simulations used in this work. \(L\) : the periodic box size in comoving Mpc (cMpc); \(N_{b}\) : the initial number of baryonic particles in the volume; \(N_{DM}\) : the number of DM particles in the volume; \(m_{g}\) : the mean initial gas particle mass in M ⊙ ; \(m_{DM}\) : the mean DM particle mass in M ⊙ ; \(\epsilon_{com}\) : the gravitational softening length in ckpc; \(\epsilon_{prop}\) : the maximum gravitational softening length in proper kpc (pkpc); and the type of AGN feedback implemented (thermal or hybrid including thermal+jet); \({N_{MQ}}(z=3)\) : the number of MQGs selected at \(z=3\) using the criteria defined in § 3.1 . We highlight in bold the simulation adopted as fiducial in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中使用的COLIBRE流体动力学模拟。\(L\)：共动Mpc（cMpc）中的周期盒尺寸；\(N_{b}\)：体积中重子粒子的初始数量；\(N_{DM}\)：体积中暗物质粒子的数量；\(m_{g}\)：以M ⊙ 为单位的平均初始气体粒子质量；\(m_{DM}\)：以M ⊙ 为单位的平均暗物质粒子质量；\(\epsilon_{com}\)：以ckpc为单位的引力软化长度；\(\epsilon_{prop}\)：以固有kpc（pkpc）为单位的最大引力软化长度；以及所实现的AGN反馈类型（热反馈或包括热+喷流的混合反馈）；\({N_{MQ}}(z=3)\)：使用§ 3.1中定义的标准在\(z=3\)处选择的MQG数量。我们以粗体突出显示在本工作中作为基准的模拟。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Top panel : normalised SFHs ( \(SFR/SFR_{max}\) versus lookback time, with redshift indicated by the top \(x\) -axis) of two example galaxies identified to be massive and quenched at \(z=3\) in L200m6. The horizontal solid line corresponds to the peak SFR value, \(SFR_{max}\) , while the dotted line shows the \(0.1\times SFR_{max}\) threshold used to define the quenching timescale, \(t_{q}\) . Arrows indicate \(t_{q}\) for each galaxy, defined as the latest time the galaxy’s SFR drops below this threshold; as well as the SFR peak time, \(t_{SFR_{max}}\) . The green curve represents a galaxy that, once it has crossed the threshold indicated by the dotted line, never rises above it again. The orange curve represents a galaxy that experiences several star formation episodes above the threshold after its SFR peak. Bottom panel : normalised stellar mass assembly histories, \textcolor black \(M_{\star}^{{f}}/M_{\star,t=0}^{{f}}\) , versus lookback time, with redshift indicated by the top \(x\) -axis) for the same galaxies. The horizontal solid line shows the maximum \textcolor black“formed” stellar mass value, \textcolor black \(M_{\star,t=0}^{{f}}\) ; while the dotted line shows the \textcolor black \(0.5\times M_{\star,t=0}^{{f}}\) threshold used to define the formation timescale, \(t_{50}\) . Arrows indicate \(t_{50}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上图：在L200m6中识别为在\(z=3\)处大质量且静止的两个示例星系的归一化恒星形成历史（\(SFR/SFR_{max}\)与回溯时间的关系，顶部\(x\)轴指示红移）。水平实线对应峰值SFR值\(SFR_{max}\)，而虚线显示用于定义静止时标\(t_{q}\)的\(0.1\times SFR_{max}\)阈值。箭头指示每个星系的\(t_{q}\)，定义为星系SFR最近一次降至该阈值以下的时间；以及SFR峰值时间\(t_{SFR_{max}}\)。绿色曲线代表一个星系，一旦其越过虚线指示的阈值，就再也不会上升到该阈值以上。橙色曲线代表一个星系，在其SFR峰值之后经历了多次高于阈值的恒星形成事件。下图：相同星系的归一化恒星质量累积历史，\textcolor black \(M_{\star}^{{f}}/M_{\star,t=0}^{{f}}\)，与回溯时间的关系（顶部\(x\)轴指示红移）。水平实线显示最大\textcolor black“形成”恒星质量值\textcolor black \(M_{\star,t=0}^{{f}}\)；而虚线显示用于定义形成时标\(t_{50}\)的\textcolor black \(0.5\times M_{\star,t=0}^{{f}}\)阈值。箭头指示\(t_{50}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Comoving number density of MQGs, defined by \(M_{\star}>10^{10}\,\textcolor{black}{M_{\odot}}\) and \({sSFR} COLIBRE boxes (spanning different volumes, resolutions, and AGN feedback models) in Table 1 , with the selection at \(2\leq z\leq 8\) . \textcolor blackLines that terminate at \(z JWST observational estimates: black (smaller area) and dark red (larger area) points show spectroscopic measurements, while grey (smaller area) and red (larger area) points correspond to photometric measurements. Observational data are taken from Carnall et al. ( 2023 ); Valentino et al. ( 2023 ); Alberts et al. ( 2024 ); Baker et al. ( 2025c ); Weibel et al. ( 2025 ); Nanayakkara et al. ( 2025 ); Stevenson et al. ( 2026 ); Zhang et al. ( 2026 ) . Top panel : predicted simulation values. Bottom panel : \(M_{\star}\) and SFR values in the simulations are convolved independently with a Gaussian distribution (mean 0, standard deviation \(0.3\) dex) representing a reasonable error budget for these quantities.

Observational data are taken from Carnall et al. ( 2023 ); Valentino et al. ( 2023 ); Alberts et al. ( 2024 ); Baker et al. ( 2025c ); Weibel et al. ( 2025 ); Nanayakkara et al. figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : SMF of MQGs, defined by \(M_{\star}>10^{10}\,\textcolor{black}{M_{\odot}}\) and \({sSFR} Left panel : predicted simulation values at different redshifts \(2\leq z\leq 7\) (colour-coded as labelled in the left panel), compared with observational estimates from Baker et al. ( 2025c ) and Stevenson et al. ( 2026 ) within the same redshift range, as labelled. Right panel : the SMF at \(z=3\) from COLIBRE in light blue (fiducial L200m6) compared with results from other galaxy formation and evolution models, where \(M_{\star}\) and SFR values in the simulations are convolved independently with a Gaussian distribution (mean 0, standard deviation \(0.3\) dex) representing a reasonable error budget for these quantities ( GAEA defines quenching using a fixed cut of \(sSFR=10^{-10}\,yr^{-1}\) and its results are convolved \textcolor blackonly in \(M_{\star}\) with potential observational errors). figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : SFH properties of MQGs as a function of \(M_{\star}\) . Thick solid lines show the median predictions from L200m6 at different redshifts \(2\leq z\leq 5\) (as labelled in the bottom panel), with shaded regions indicating the 16th and 84th percentile range. At \(z=5\) , MQGs are too few to split in stellar mass bins (9 galaxies). Thin solid lines show the corresponding medians from L400m7. These are compared to recent JWST spectroscopic measurements (Carnall et al. , 2024 ; Nanayakkara et al. , 2025 ; Baker et al. , 2025b ) , shown as symbols colour-coded by observed galaxy redshift, with the corresponding colorbar at the top. Top panel : formation times ( \(t_{50}\) ), defined in § 3.2 . Middle panel : quenching times ( \(t_{q}\) ), defined in § 3.2 \textcolor black (for Carnall et al. , 2024 , defined as the earliest lookback time at which the galaxy first crosses \({sSFR} . Bottom panel : SFR peak ( \({SFR}_{max}\) ) (no data from Carnall et al. , 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：MQG的SFH性质随\(M_{\star}\)的变化。粗实线显示L200m6在不同红移\(2\leq z\leq 5\)下的中值预测（如底部面板标签所示），阴影区域表示第16和第84百分位范围。在\(z=5\)处，MQG数量太少无法按恒星质量箱划分（9个星系）。细实线显示L400m7的相应中值。这些与最近的JWST光谱测量（Carnall等人，2024；Nanayakkara等人，2025；Baker等人，2025b）进行比较，显示为按观测星系红移颜色编码的符号，顶部有相应的颜色条。上图：形成时间（\(t_{50}\)），定义见§ 3.2。中图：静止时间（\(t_{q}\)），定义见§ 3.2 \textcolor black（对于Carnall等人，2024，定义为星系首次越过\({sSFR} 的最早回溯时间）。下图：SFR峰值（\({SFR}_{max}\)）（无Carnall等人，2024的数据）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Dust fraction, \(f_{dust}=M_{dust}/M_{\star}\) , ( top panel ) and molecular hydrogen fraction, \(f_{H_{2}}=M_{H_{2}}/M_{\star}\) , ( bottom panel ) as a function of redshift at \(2\leq z\leq 5\) for L200m6. Median values for the MQGs (thick solid blue) and MSFGs (thick dashed grey) with the corresponding 16th and 84th percentile range at each selection redshift. At \(z=6\) , MQGs are too few to define a median (1 galaxy), since we consider here all galaxies together rather than splitting by stellar mass bins. Thin lines show the corresponding median from L400m7. Observational data of MQGs are taken from the literature: for dust fractions from Whitaker et al. ( 2021b ); Kalita et al. ( 2021 ); Suzuki et al. ( 2022 ); Setton et al. ( 2024 ); Lee et al. ( 2024 ) , and for molecular hydrogen fractions from Suzuki et al. ( 2022 ); Umehata et al. ( 2025 ); Scholtz et al. ( 2026 ) . Arrows indicate upper limits from non-detections (also shown with a more faded colour).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：L200m6在红移\(2\leq z\leq 5\)处的尘埃分数\(f_{dust}=M_{dust}/M_{\star}\)（上图）和分子氢分数\(f_{H_{2}}=M_{H_{2}}/M_{\star}\)（下图）。MQG（粗实蓝线）和MSFG（粗虚灰线）的中值，以及每个选择红移处的相应第16和第84百分位范围。在\(z=6\)处，MQG数量太少无法定义中值（1个星系），因为我们在此将所有星系一起考虑，而不是按恒星质量箱划分。细线显示L400m7的相应中值。MQG的观测数据取自文献：尘埃分数来自Whitaker等人（2021b）；Kalita等人（2021）；Suzuki等人（2022）；Setton等人（2024）；Lee等人（2024），分子氢分数来自Suzuki等人（2022）；Umehata等人（2025）；Scholtz等人（2026）。箭头表示非探测的上限（也以较淡的颜色显示）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Distribution functions of dust fraction, \(f_{dust}=M_{dust}/M_{\star}\) (left panel), molecular gas fraction, \(f_{H_{2}}=M_{H_{2}}/M_{\star}\) (middle panel), and dust-to-gas ratio, \(\delta_{DGR}=M_{dust}/M_{H_{2}}\) (right panel) for L200m6. Solid lines show the distributions for MQGs, colour-coded by selection redshift ( \(2\leq z\leq 6\) ). Vertical dashed lines indicate the median values for MSFGs at \(z=2\) , with shaded regions marking the corresponding 16th and 84th percentile range. Thin lines show the corresponding medians from L400m7. In the right panel, the red vertical dashed line marks the canonical value \(\delta_{DGR}=0.01\) . The horizontal dotted line denotes the threshold of 10 galaxies for L200m6, below which the statistics become unreliable.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：L200m6的尘埃分数\(f_{dust}=M_{dust}/M_{\star}\)（左图）、分子气体分数\(f_{H_{2}}=M_{H_{2}}/M_{\star}\)（中图）和尘埃气体比\(\delta_{DGR}=M_{dust}/M_{H_{2}}\)（右图）的分布函数。实线显示MQG的分布，按选择红移（\(2\leq z\leq 6\)）颜色编码。垂直虚线显示MSFG在\(z=2\)处的中值，阴影区域标记相应的第16和第84百分位范围。细线显示L400m7的相应中值。在右图中，红色垂直虚线标记典型值\(\delta_{DGR}=0.01\)。水平虚线表示L200m6的10个星系阈值，低于该阈值统计结果不可靠。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了AMORE6前所未有的Lyα特性，这是一个极端贫金属（12+log(O/H) < 6）、低质量（M_⋆ = 4.4×10^5 M_⊙）且超致密（有效半径 ≲30 pc）的矮星系，红移z=5.7253，受到星系团A2744的引力透镜效应。在系统红移处（后者由Hβ示踪，来自JWST/NIRCam无缝光谱）探测到一条显著、窄且近乎对称的Lyα发射线，其静止系等效宽度EW=150±10 Å，半高全宽FWHM=58±1 km s⁻¹，并具有轻微的不对称性，导致谱线红翼存在约10%的流量过剩。相对于系统红移的速度偏移可忽略不计（dv = 4±67 km s⁻¹，3σ不确定度），加上谱线的尖锐和对称性，表明辐射转移效应极小，意味着中性氢柱密度与光学薄介质一致，且与非零的电离光子逃逸分数相容。如果仅在z<4.5校准的间接光谱诊断仍是再电离时期识别LyC泄漏者的唯一可行工具，那么基于其最强指标（Lyα），AMORE6是再电离时代迄今发现的最令人信服的LyC泄漏候选体之一。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，AMORE6是再电离时期最引人注目的LyC逃逸候选天体之一，其Lyα特征表明可能存在非零的电离光子逃逸分数，为研究早期宇宙电离光子逃逸机制提供了重要线索。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: NIRCam stacking of the SW bands. The red contours highlight the extent of the Ly \(\alpha\) emission, and the blue contour encloses the rest-UV emission of AMORE6-B. Middle: Ly \(\alpha\) flux from VLT/MUSE; a faint emission from a low-magnification third counter-image (AMORE6-C) is also visible. Right: Zoomed two-dimensional X-shooter spectrum centered on the Ly \(\alpha\) wavelength from 8163 Å to 8184 Å. The dotted lines show the region we used to extract spectra.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左：SW波段的NIRCam叠加。红色等高线突出Ly \(\alpha\) 发射的范围，蓝色等高线包围AMORE6-B的静止UV发射。中：来自VLT/MUSE的Ly \(\alpha\) 流量；一个来自低放大率第三对应像（AMORE6-C）的微弱发射也可见。右：以Ly \(\alpha\) 波长为中心的放大二维X-shooter光谱，波长范围从8163 Å到8184 Å。虚线显示我们用于提取光谱的区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Observed profile of the Ly \(\alpha\) emission for AMORE6-B (black line), best-fit profile (solid red), best-fit central wavelength (dashed red), systemic redshift (and relative uncertainty) from Morishita et al. ( 2025 , solid blue lines and shaded region) . The (lower-resolution) MUSE spectrum is shown as the dashed black line.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：AMORE6-B的Ly \(\alpha\) 发射观测轮廓（黑线），最佳拟合轮廓（实红线），最佳拟合中心波长（红虚线），系统红移（及相对不确定度）来自Morishita等人（2025，蓝实线和阴影区域）。（较低分辨率）MUSE光谱显示为黑虚线。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Ly \(\alpha\) -related properties of AMORE6. 3 3 3 The properties in Cols. 1 and 2 are taken from X-shooter data for images B and A, respectively; MUSE measurements for image B are also reported in Col. 3. (a) From M25 ; the uncertainty here is \(3\sigma\) . NIRCam-WFSS at observed H \(\beta\) has \(R\sim 1500\) , implying \(\sigma_{z}\sim 0.004\) , or \(\sigma_{v}\sim 200\penalty 10000\ kms^{-1}\) . (b) \(5\sigma\) uncertainty (see text). (c) Observed FWHM. (d) Instrument- corrected FWHM. (e) RB and PERC asymmetry as defined in the text. (f) \(M_{UV}\) from M25 extrapolated to the observed Ly \(\alpha\) continuum using \(\beta=-2.77\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：AMORE6的Ly \(\alpha\) 相关性质。3 3 3 第1列和第2列的性质分别取自图像B和A的X-shooter数据；第3列也报告了图像B的MUSE测量值。(a) 来自M25；此处不确定度为 \(3\sigma\) 。观测到的H \(\beta\) 的NIRCam-WFSS具有 \(R\sim 1500\) ，意味着 \(\sigma_{z}\sim 0.004\) ，或 \(\sigma_{v}\sim 200\penalty 10000\ kms^{-1}\) 。(b) \(5\sigma\) 不确定度（见正文）。(c) 观测到的FWHM。(d) 仪器校正后的FWHM。(e) 正文中定义的RB和PERC不对称性。(f) 使用 \(\beta=-2.77\) 从M25外推到观测到的Ly \(\alpha\) 连续谱的 \(M_{UV}\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison of the Ly \(\alpha\) properties of AMORE6 with literature samples of galaxies at \(z>4\) . Left: shift of the Ly \(\alpha\) peak relative to systemic ( \(dv\) ) versus rest-frame Ly \(\alpha\) EW; literature samples from Tang et al. ( 2024 ); Saxena et al. ( 2024 ); Prieto-Lyon et al. ( 2025 ) ; references for the lensed-galaxies sample in Table 2 . Center: EW(Ly \(\alpha\) ) versus \(M_{UV}\) ; AMORE6 is \(4-5\) mag fainter than the comparison average. Right: \(dv\) versus \(FWHM_{Ly\alpha}\) for cases with both measurements.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：AMORE6的Ly \(\alpha\) 性质与红移 \(z>4\) 星系文献样本的比较。左：Ly \(\alpha\) 峰值相对于系统红移的偏移（ \(dv\) ）相对于静止系Ly \(\alpha\) 等效宽度；文献样本来自Tang等人（2024）；Saxena等人（2024）；Prieto-Lyon等人（2025）；透镜星系样本的参考文献见表2。中：等效宽度EW(Ly \(\alpha\) )相对于 \(M_{UV}\) ；AMORE6比比较样本的平均值暗 \(4-5\) 星等。右：同时具有两个测量值的案例中， \(dv\) 相对于 \(FWHM_{Ly\alpha}\) 。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Ly \(\alpha\) properties of lensed LAEs at \(z>4\) from the literature. 4 4 4 Uncertainties are not reported when they are not available in the original publication. † not corrected for instrumental broadening.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：文献中红移 \(z>4\) 的透镜LAE的Ly \(\alpha\) 性质。4 4 4 当原始出版物中未提供不确定度时，不予报告。† 未进行仪器展宽校正。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Emergent Ly \(\alpha\) line profiles from a grid of idealized radiative-transfer models (see text). Left: high-velocity shell (V \({}_{max}=750\) km s -1 ); varying \(N_{HI}\) shows that \(log(N_{HI})\lesssim 20\) reproduces the observed profile but requires an extreme outflow. Right: low-velocity case (V \({}_{max}=100\) km s -1 ); matching the data demands very low columns, \(log(N_{HI})\lesssim 14\) . Both panels assume the systemic redshift \(z=5.7253\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自理想化辐射转移模型网格的涌现Ly \(\alpha\) 谱线轮廓（见正文）。左：高速壳层（V \({}_{max}=750\) km s -1 ）；改变 \(N_{HI}\) 表明 \(log(N_{HI})\lesssim 20\) 可再现观测轮廓，但需要极端外流。右：低速情况（V \({}_{max}=100\) km s -1 ）；匹配数据需要非常低的柱密度， \(log(N_{HI})\lesssim 14\) 。两个面板均假设系统红移 \(z=5.7253\) 。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 理解中心星系恒星形成的淬灭仍是星系演化中的核心挑战。二十年前，晕淬灭的概念被引入作为一种主导机制，认为大质量中心星系的淬灭由主要受暗物质晕影响的气体热力学支配。然而，大量不断增加的观测证据一致表明，淬灭主要与中心属性（如速度弥散、核球质量和黑洞质量）相关。当控制这些属性时，晕质量似乎影响微弱，支持AGN反馈作为主要机制。然而，一个反复出现的关键问题是，这些研究依赖于通过丰度匹配（AM）导出的晕质量。来自弱引力透镜、卫星运动学和星系动力学的直接观测测量表明，AM系统性地高估了恒星形成中心星系的晕质量，同时低估了被动中心星系的晕质量。为了准确评估晕质量的真实作用，我们重新估计了SDSS星系的晕质量；由此得到的两个星系的晕质量函数和恒星-晕质量关系（SHMRs）与理论预测和弱引力透镜测量一致。利用这些改进的质量，我们发现了直接观测证据，表明晕质量是淬灭中心星系的主导因素，在$M_{h}\sim 10^{12.1}M_\odot$处存在一个清晰的阈值。通过使用弱引力透镜导出的SHMRs对AM数据进行简单校正，我们证明先前关于中心属性主导性的主张主要源于AM晕质量的系统性偏差。我们的结果表明，AGN反馈的重要性主要体现于该质量阈值以上的晕中，即那些已准备好淬灭的星系中。换句话说，AGN反馈似乎在该质量阈值以上的晕中变得有效。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，晕质量是中心星系恒星形成淬灭的主要驱动因素，存在约10^12.1太阳质量的阈值。AGN反馈在该阈值以上的晕中变得有效，但星系已准备好淬灭。先前研究低估晕质量作用的原因是丰度匹配方法的系统偏差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The important role of halo mass in central galaxy quenching. The median sSFR (left) and \(\Delta\) MS (right) of central galaxies are shown as a function of halo mass and central velocity dispersion. Halo masses are estimated using the machine learning (ML) method described in Zhao et al. 2025ApJ...979...42Z . Colors indicate the median value shown in each panel, and the black contours trace iso-levels of the same quantity. The vertical and horizontal green lines ( \(M_{{h}}\sim 10^{12.1}M_{\odot}\) and \(V_{disp}\sim 85\,km\,s^{-1}\) ) define a characteristic L-shaped threshold. Crucially, galaxies with halo masses below this threshold remain star-forming regardless of their central velocity dispersion, whereas quenching dominates only in massive halos coupled with high central velocity dispersion.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：晕质量在中心星系淬灭中的重要作用。中心星系的中值sSFR（左）和\(\Delta\) MS（右）作为晕质量和中心速度弥散的函数显示。晕质量使用Zhao等人2025ApJ...979...42Z中描述的机器学习（ML）方法估计。颜色表示每个面板中显示的中值，黑色等高线追踪相同量的等值线。垂直和水平绿线（\(M_{{h}}\sim 10^{12.1}M_{\odot}\)和\(V_{disp}\sim 85\,km\,s^{-1}\)）定义了一个特征性的L形阈值。关键的是，晕质量低于该阈值的星系无论其中心速度弥散如何都保持恒星形成，而淬灭仅在与高中心速度弥散耦合的大质量晕中占主导。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison of sSFR variations using AM-derived halo masses. Analogous to the left panel of Fig. 1 , but using halo masses derived via the AM method based on total stellar mass ranking (left) and total \(r\) -band luminosity ranking (right) 2007ApJ...671..153Y . The magenta line at \(V_{disp}\sim 125~km\,s^{-1}\) marks the apparent quenching threshold reported in previous studies. The green lines correspond to the L-shaped threshold identified in Fig. 1 . Data are restricted to galaxies with \(M_{{h}}>10^{11.8}M_{\odot}\) , corresponding to the low-mass cutoff of the AM halo-mass estimates in the group catalogue.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：使用AM导出晕质量的sSFR变化比较。类似于图1的左面板，但使用基于总恒星质量排序（左）和总\(r\)波段光度排序（右）的AM方法导出的晕质量2007ApJ...671..153Y。\(V_{disp}\sim 125~km\,s^{-1}\)处的品红色线标记了先前研究中报告的明显淬灭阈值。绿线对应于图1中识别的L形阈值。数据限制在\(M_{{h}}>10^{11.8}M_{\odot}\)的星系，对应于星表目录中AM晕质量估计的低质量截止。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Origin of the discrepancy: systematic bias in abundance matching. Left: SHMRs for star-forming (blue) and passive (red) galaxies. Solid and dashed lines represent results from our ML method 2025ApJ...979...42Z and the AM method with total stellar mass ranking 2007ApJ...671..153Y , respectively. The upturn of the AM results (dashed lines) at the low-mass end is an artifact caused by the halo mass cutoff at \(M_{{h}}\sim 10^{11.8}M_{\odot}\) . Data points with error bars represent independent weak lensing measurements from Mandelbaum et al. 2016MNRAS.457.3200M and Bilicki et al. 2021A&A...653A..82B . Shaded regions and error bars indicate the 16–84th percentile ranges. Right: The median sSFR distribution re-calculated using AM halo masses after applying a systematic correction ( \(\pm 0.15\) dex) derived from the weak lensing results. This simple correction largely recovers the L-shaped threshold (green lines) observed in Fig. 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：差异的起源：丰度匹配中的系统性偏差。左：恒星形成（蓝色）和被动（红色）星系的SHMRs。实线和虚线分别代表我们的ML方法2025ApJ...979...42Z和具有总恒星质量排序的AM方法2007ApJ...671..153Y的结果。AM结果（虚线）在低质量端的上升是由\(M_{{h}}\sim 10^{11.8}M_{\odot}\)处的晕质量截止引起的伪影。带有误差棒的数据点代表来自Mandelbaum等人2016MNRAS.457.3200M和Bilicki等人2021A&A...653A..82B的独立弱引力透镜测量。阴影区域和误差棒表示16-84百分位范围。右：在应用从弱引力透镜结果导出的系统性校正（\(\pm 0.15\) dex）后，使用AM晕质量重新计算的中值sSFR分布。这一简单校正很大程度上恢复了图1中观察到的L形阈值（绿线）。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Fig. 1 : Robustness of the halo mass threshold. The median sSFR is plotted as a function of halo mass and gravitational potential (left) or bulge mass (right), analogous to the primary analysis in Fig. 1 . The vertical green line indicates the same halo mass threshold ( \(M_{{h}}\sim 10^{12.1}M_{\odot}\) ) identified in the main text.
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据图1：晕质量阈值的稳健性。中值sSFR作为晕质量和引力势（左）或核球质量（右）的函数绘制，类似于图1中的主要分析。垂直绿线表示与正文中识别的相同晕质量阈值（\(M_{{h}}\sim 10^{12.1}M_{\odot}\)）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 引力波（GW）是独特的信使，因为它们除了引力透镜效应外，在穿越宇宙时不会发生改变。其长波长使其易受宇宙结构的衍射影响，为绘制暗物质子结构提供了前所未有的机会。识别透镜事件需要分析数千到数百万个模拟事件，以达到高统计显著性。使用标准的引力波参数估计方法，这在计算上是不可行的。我们基于最先进的神经后验算法，通过DINGO-lensing将透镜推断从CPU天数加速到分钟级别。我们通过重新分析迄今为止最有希望的透镜候选事件GW231123来展示其能力，并发现其统计显著性无法超过4σ。我们观察到，8%的类似GW231123的非透镜模拟支持透镜效应，这可以通过短持续时间信号的自相似性来解释。尽管如此，58%的类似GW231123的透镜模拟对透镜效应有更大的支持，表明更高的探测统计量是可能的。尽管GW231123暴露了声称首个引力波透镜探测的挑战，但我们的深度学习方法已被证明足够强大，能够实现即将到来的透镜引力波发现。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：尽管GW231123暴露了声称首个引力波透镜探测的挑战，但深度学习方法已被证明足够强大，能够实现即将到来的透镜引力波发现。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Source characterization of GW231123 assuming it is lensed (with DINGO-lensing , in blue) and not lensed (with DINGO , in green), respectively. From the 17 parameters in the inference, we present the chirp mass \(\mathcal{M}_{c}\) , spin magnitudes \(a_{1,2}\) , lensing relative magnification \(\mu_{\text{rel}}\) and time delay \(\Delta t\) . The posterior distributions using DINGO-lensing and DINGO are compatible with those obtained using bilby . The credible levels quoted here are from the DINGO-lensing analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：分别假设GW231123被透镜化（使用DINGO-lensing，蓝色）和未被透镜化（使用DINGO，绿色）时的源表征。从推断的17个参数中，我们展示了啁啾质量\(\mathcal{M}_{c}\)、自旋幅度\(a_{1,2}\)、透镜相对放大率\(\mu_{\text{rel}}\)和时间延迟\(\Delta t\)。使用DINGO-lensing和DINGO得到的后验分布与使用bilby得到的结果一致。此处引用的置信水平来自DINGO-lensing分析。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Inference for the lensing relative magnification \(\mu_{\text{rel}}\) and time delay \(\Delta t\) . We compare GW231123 results (filled contours) with nonlensed simulations for similarly heavy binaries (unfilled contours).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：透镜相对放大率\(\mu_{\text{rel}}\)和时间延迟\(\Delta t\)的推断。我们将GW231123的结果（填充等高线）与类似重双星的非透镜模拟结果（未填充等高线）进行比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Whitened best-fit lensed ( \(h_{L}\) , solid), unlensed ( \(h_{U}\) , dash), and nonlensed ( \(h\) , dotted) time-domain waveforms ( \(\sigma\) ) for GW231123. The inferred time delay between the two chirps \(\Delta t\) matches with their instantaneous period near the reference time \(t_{ref}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：GW231123的白化最佳拟合透镜化（\(h_{L}\)，实线）、未透镜化（\(h_{U}\)，虚线）和非透镜化（\(h\)，点线）时域波形（\(\sigma\)）。两个啁啾之间的推断时间延迟\(\Delta t\)与它们在参考时间\(t_{ref}\)附近的瞬时周期相匹配。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Complementary cumulative distribution function \(P(x>X)\) of the logarithmic lensing Bayes factors ( \(x=\log_{10}\mathcal{B}_{{lens}}\) ) for GW231123-like simulations. The \(\log_{10}\mathcal{B}_{{lens}}\) of GW231123, 4.0, is indicated by the vertical dashed line. The shaded region corresponds to the Poisson error of \(N\) simulations, \(1/\sqrt{N}\) . Small vertical lines indicate the Bayes factors of the examples displayed in Fig. 2 and the bars on top highlight the false alarm probability levels of the nonlensed simulations in units of standard deviation ( \(\sigma\) ). With our neural networks trained on NRSur7dq4 , we analyze nonlensed simulations generated with NRSur7dq4 (NRSur), SEOBNRv5PHM (SEOB), and IMRPhenomXPHM (XPHM) waveform approximants..
figures.caption_zh: 图4：类似GW231123模拟的对数透镜贝叶斯因子（\(x=\log_{10}\mathcal{B}_{{lens}}\)）的互补累积分布函数\(P(x>X)\)。GW231123的\(\log_{10}\mathcal{B}_{{lens}}\)值为4.0，由垂直虚线表示。阴影区域对应于\(N\)次模拟的泊松误差\(1/\sqrt{N}\)。小垂直线表示图2中示例的贝叶斯因子，顶部的条形图以标准差（\(\sigma\)）为单位突出显示了非透镜模拟的误报概率水平。使用在NRSur7dq4上训练的神经网络，我们分析了使用NRSur7dq4（NRSur）、SEOBNRv5PHM（SEOB）和IMRPhenomXPHM（XPHM）波形近似生成的非透镜模拟。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 半禁戒CIII] $λλ$1907,1909双线是早期宇宙中高电离发射的关键示踪物。我们利用来自CEERS、JADES、RUBIES和CAPERS等项目的公开JWST/NIRSpec棱镜数据，研究了红移z=5-7星系中的CIII]发射。我们构建了一个包含61个CIII]发射星系的样本，并使用(1)静止系紫外和光学发射线诊断图，以及(2)宽巴尔默发射线的存在/缺失，将它们分类为恒星形成星系或活动星系核(AGN)宿主星系。紫外诊断基于CIII]的静止系等值宽度(EW)与CIII]/HeII $λ$1640的组合，以及CIV的EW与CIV/HeII $λ$1640的组合。对于光学诊断，我们采用了OHNO图，该图结合了[OIII] $λ$5007、H$β$、[NeIII] $λ$3869和[OII] $λλ$3727,3729，并发现其在区分AGN和SFG方面效率较低。我们发现样本中一半的源（61个星系中的29个）至少表现出一个可靠的AGN活动迹象，而基于CIII]诊断，有13个是潜在的AGN。物理性质，包括恒星质量和恒星形成率，是通过使用Bagpipes进行光谱能量分布建模得出的。我们的分析揭示，JWST正在发现一个高红移（5<z<7）的强CIII]发射星系群体，其中位EW为22.8 Å。该EW高于红移3<z<4的对照CIII]发射星系样本（中位EW为4.7 Å）。我们发现，在相同的Muv范围内，CIII] EW从3<z<4到5<z<7增加了约0.67 dex，表明该谱线强度存在强烈的红移演化。最后，我们在样本中识别出五个源为小红点(LRDs)；其中四个已在文献中被识别为LRD，而一个在此首次提出。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，JWST揭示了高红移(5<z<7)存在强CIII]发射星系群体，CIII]发射强度随红移显著增强，表明早期宇宙中电离辐射场或星系物理条件发生演化，AGN在高红移CIII]发射星系中普遍存在。

figures.caption_en: (a) COSMOS-67506 (z = 5.8666) from the COSMOS field with an EW(C III ]) = 21.85 \(\pm\) 8.25 Å.
figures.caption_zh: (a) 来自COSMOS天区的COSMOS-67506 (z = 5.8666)，其EW(C III ]) = 21.85 \(\pm\) 8.25 Å。

figures.caption_en: (b) CAPERS-9244 (z = 5.203) from the EGS field with an EW(C III ]) = 24.24 \(\pm\) 9.28 Å.
figures.caption_zh: (b) 来自EGS天区的CAPERS-9244 (z = 5.203)，其EW(C III ]) = 24.24 \(\pm\) 9.28 Å。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Redshift distribution of our galaxy sample. The histogram shows the number of galaxies as a function of redshift between 5 and 7, with a pronounced peak at 5.25.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们星系样本的红移分布。直方图显示了红移在5到7之间作为红移函数的星系数量，在5.25处有一个显著峰值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Rest-frame C III ] equivalent width (EW; in Å) versus absolute UV magnitude ( \(M_{\text{UV}}\) ; AB mag). The blue points correspond to our sample of C III ] emitters with redshifts between 5 and 7. The red points correspond to a VANDELS sample compiled by Cunningham et al. ( 2024 ) with redshifts between 3 and 4. Contour plots and linear regression fits are also shown.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：静止系C III ]等值宽度(EW；单位Å)与绝对紫外星等( \(M_{\text{UV}}\) ；AB星等)的关系。蓝点对应红移在5到7之间的C III ]发射星系样本。红点对应Cunningham等人(2024)编制的红移在3到4之间的VANDELS样本。还显示了等高线图和线性回归拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Plot of the SFR vs stellar mass of our sample compared to the star formation of field galaxies at z=5-7. Our sample is color coded by the rest frame C III ] EW value. The general parent population in the same redshift range is plotted as grey circles. The blue line represents the relationship found by Calabrò et al. ( 2024 ) and derived with SFR based on \({H}\alpha\) for a similar spectroscopic sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：我们样本的恒星形成率(SFR)与恒星质量的关系，与z=5-7场星系的恒星形成率比较。我们的样本根据静止系C III ] EW值进行颜色编码。相同红移范围内的一般母体星系以灰色圆圈表示。蓝线代表Calabrò等人(2024)发现的关系，该关系基于类似光谱样本的\({H}\alpha\)推导出的SFR。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Stacked spectra for the sample of non-C III ] emitters (top panel), weak (middle panel), and strong (bottom panel) C III ] emitters. In all panels, the shaded regions represent the 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainty of the stacking. The dashed black vertical line indicates the position of rest-frame UV emission lines.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：非C III ]发射星系（上图）、弱C III ]发射星系（中图）和强C III ]发射星系（下图）样本的叠加光谱。在所有面板中，阴影区域代表叠加的1 \(\sigma\)不确定性。黑色虚线垂直线表示静止系紫外发射线的位置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Example of a galaxy with a significant broad H \(\alpha\) component: GDS-13704 at \(z=5.93\) . The black line shows the observed spectrum. The blue line represents the best-fit model using a double Gaussian profile. The red line shows the narrow component, while the green line corresponds to the broad component. The x-axis shows the rest-frame wavelength in Angstroms, and the y-axis shows the flux density in units of \(10^{-21}\) erg s -1 cm -2 Å -1 . This source has a \(\Delta{BIC}=34.5\) , providing strong evidence for the presence of broad-line emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：具有显著宽H \(\alpha\)成分的星系示例：位于\(z=5.93\)的GDS-13704。黑线显示观测光谱。蓝线表示使用双高斯轮廓的最佳拟合模型。红线显示窄成分，而绿线对应宽成分。x轴表示以埃为单位的静止系波长，y轴表示以\(10^{-21}\) erg s -1 cm -2 Å -1 为单位的流量密度。该源的\(\Delta{BIC}=34.5\)，为宽发射线的存在提供了有力证据。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Black hole mass versus stellar mass. The results for our 9 C III ] emitters with broad \({H}\alpha\) emission are compared with \(4 (gray squares, Harikane et al., 2023 ; Kocevski et al., 2023 ; Juodžbalis et al., 2025 ; Wang et al., 2024 ; Übler et al., 2024 ; Akins et al., 2025 ; Kokorev et al., 2023 ; Larson et al., 2023 ; Bogdán et al., 2024 ; Maiolino et al., 2024 , full references in the text) , with a compilation of \(2 (Tripodi et al., 2024 , and references therein) , and with local scaling relations (dashed grey, solid red and dotted yellow lines, respectively from refs. Kormendy & Ho, 2013 ; Reines & Volonteri, 2015 ; Greene et al., 2020 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：黑洞质量与恒星质量的关系。我们9个具有宽\({H}\alpha\)发射的C III ]发射星系的结果与\(4\)（灰色方块，Harikane等人，2023；Kocevski等人，2023；Juodžbalis等人，2025；Wang等人，2024；Übler等人，2024；Akins等人，2025；Kokorev等人，2023；Larson等人，2023；Bogdán等人，2024；Maiolino等人，2024，完整参考文献见正文）、\(2\)的汇编（Tripodi等人，2024及其参考文献）以及局域标度关系（虚线灰色、实线红色和点状黄色线，分别来自参考文献Kormendy & Ho, 2013；Reines & Volonteri, 2015；Greene等人，2020）进行了比较。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告发现了一个大规模、边缘增亮的外流，从侧向星系ESO 130-G012（距离D = 16.9 Mpc）的恒星形成盘上下延伸至少30 kpc。这个光学上不起眼的低质量星系，部分被银河系前景恒星和尘埃遮挡，却展现出从其明亮恒星盘全范围延伸出的已知最大沙漏形外流之一。该外流是在澳大利亚平方公里阵列探路者（ASKAP）的944 MHz射电连续谱图像中发现的，这些图像来自“宇宙演化地图”（EMU）项目。其高度至少是恒星盘直径（约10 kpc）的3倍，而其形状和大小最类似于附近星暴星系NGC 3079中的大型双锥形、边缘增亮的远紫外和X射线外流。ESO 130-G012的大规模沙漏形外流似乎是中空的，起源于恒星形成盘，以接近逃逸速度的速度膨胀进入晕，之后可能返回盘。考虑到ESO 130-G012适中的恒星形成率，外流的高度令人惊讶且不寻常，很可能得益于该星系相对较低的引力势。后续观测有望探测到双极外流锥内的热气体以及沿X形外流翼的磁场。中性气体也可能被外流提升到内盘之上。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：尽管ESO 130-G012的恒星形成率不高，但其相对较低的引力势能使得大规模外流成为可能，这种外流可能将中性气体提升到内盘之上，后续观测有望探测到双极锥内的热气体和X形外流翼中的磁场。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Optical DECaPS colour-composite image of ESO 130-G012. The stellar disk clearly stands out despite the high density of foreground stars from the Milky Way Galactic Plane, and a curved dust lane is just visible against the bright galaxy bulge, suggesting a disk inclination of \(\sim\) 80 ∘ . The ESO \(B_{25.5mag}\) -band diameter of the stellar disk is \(\sim\) 1.8 arcmin corresponding to 8.8 kpc for a distance of \(D\) = 16.9 Mpc. — North is up and East to the left.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：ESO 130-G012的光学DECaPS彩色合成图像。尽管银河系银道面前景恒星密度很高，恒星盘仍清晰可见，一条弯曲的尘埃带在明亮的星系核球上隐约可见，表明盘倾角约为\(\sim\) 80 ∘ 。ESO \(B_{25.5mag}\) 波段恒星盘直径约为\(\sim\) 1.8角分，对应距离\(D\) = 16.9 Mpc时的8.8 kpc。— 北向上，东向左。

At the galaxy distance of 16.9 Mpc, the detected outflow height of at least 6 ′ corresponds to \(\sim\) 30 kpc (see also Figure 3 ). The ASKAP resolution of 15 ′′ is indicated in the bottom left corner.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：ASKAP EMU 944 MHz射电连续谱图像，显示侧向星系ESO 130-G012壮观的外流。在星系距离16.9 Mpc处，探测到的外流高度至少为6 ′ ，对应\(\sim\) 30 kpc（另见图3）。左下角标明了ASKAP的15 ′′ 分辨率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : ASKAP EMU 944 MHz radio continuum images of the bipolar outflow from the galaxy ESO 130-G012, rotated such that the flow is approximately along the y-axis. – Left pair: Total intensity images at 15 ′′ resolution. – Right pair: Clean residual images smoothed to 20 ′′ resolution. The contour levels are 30, 60, 150 and 300 \(\mu\) Jy beam -1 . The yellow ellipse indicates the approximate size of the stellar disk. Orange circles are drawn at radii of 60 ′′ , 150 ′′ , 300 ′′ and 600 ′′ . At the galaxy distance of 16.9 Mpc, 60 ′′ corresponds to \(\sim\) 5 kpc. The blue ellipses have sizes of 560 ′′ \(\times\) 340 ′′ (46 kpc \(\times\) 28 kpc).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：ASKAP EMU 944 MHz射电连续谱图像，显示星系ESO 130-G012的双极外流，图像已旋转使外流大致沿y轴方向。– 左对：15 ′′ 分辨率的总强度图像。– 右对：平滑至20 ′′ 分辨率的清洁残差图像。等高线水平为30、60、150和300 \(\mu\) Jy beam -1 。黄色椭圆表示恒星盘的近似大小。橙色圆圈以60 ′′ 、150 ′′ 、300 ′′ 和600 ′′ 的半径绘制。在星系距离16.9 Mpc处，60 ′′ 对应\(\sim\) 5 kpc。蓝色椭圆大小为560 ′′ \(\times\) 340 ′′ （46 kpc \(\times\) 28 kpc）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Zoom-in of the ESO 130-G012 outflow, here shown to a height of \(\sim\) 160 ′′ ( \(\sim\) 13 kpc). — DECaPS \(zrg\) -band optical image overlaid with ASKAP EMU 944 MHz radio continuum contours. – Left: Total intensity contours (yellow, 15 ′′ resolution). – Right: Clean residual contours (orange, 20 ′′ resolution). The levels are 0.06, 0.09, 0.12, 0.15, 0.20, 0.25, 0.3, 0.4, 0.5, 0.6, 0.8 and 1.2 mJy beam -1 (yellow / orange) plus 0.5, 1, 1.4, and 1.8 mJy beam -1 (black, 8 ′′ resolution).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：ESO 130-G012外流的放大图，此处显示至高度约\(\sim\) 160 ′′ （\(\sim\) 13 kpc）。— DECaPS \(zrg\) 波段光学图像叠加ASKAP EMU 944 MHz射电连续谱等高线。– 左：总强度等高线（黄色，15 ′′ 分辨率）。– 右：清洁残差等高线（橙色，20 ′′ 分辨率）。水平为0.06、0.09、0.12、0.15、0.20、0.25、0.3、0.4、0.5、0.6、0.8和1.2 mJy beam -1 （黄色/橙色），加上0.5、1、1.4和1.8 mJy beam -1 （黑色，8 ′′ 分辨率）。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Radio continuum flux estimates for different regions in the galaxy ESO 130-G012 from the ASKAP 944 MHz images.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：来自ASKAP 944 MHz图像的星系ESO 130-G012不同区域的射电连续谱流量估计

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : The inner ring and disk of ESO 130-G012. VPHAS+ H \(\alpha\) image (left), overlaid with ASKAP EMU 944 MHz radio continuum contours at \(\sim\) 8 ′′ resolution (middle), and a zoom-in VPHAS+ continuum subtracted (H \(\alpha\) - \(r\) ) image (right). Contours in the middle image are at 0.3, 0.4, 0.6 (red), 1.0, 1.2, 1.4, 1.6 and 2.1 mJy beam -1 (yellow).
figures.caption_zh: 图5：ESO 130-G012的内环和盘。VPHAS+ H \(\alpha\) 图像（左），叠加ASKAP EMU 944 MHz射电连续谱等高线，分辨率约\(\sim\) 8 ′′ （中），以及放大的VPHAS+连续谱减除（H \(\alpha\) - \(r\) ）图像（右）。中间图像中的等高线为0.3、0.4、0.6（红色）、1.0、1.2、1.4、1.6和2.1 mJy beam -1 （黄色）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了西蒙斯天文台（SO）计划进行的度尺度（93 GHz下半高全宽为0.5度）深场巡天的科学性能最新预测。到2027年，SO的小孔径望远镜（SAT）组将从三台增加到六台，其中包括93 GHz和145 GHz通道的探测器数量翻倍至48,160个。结合计划将巡天持续时间延长至2035年，这一扩展将显著增强SO对宇宙微波背景极化中B模式信号的搜索能力，该信号是早期宇宙产生的引力波的潜在特征。假设1/f噪声模型（膝点多极ℓ_knee = 50）和中等复杂程度的银河系前景模型，我们预测在不存在原初B模式的情况下，张标比r的1σ（或68%置信水平）约束为σ_r = 1.2×10^{-3}。该预测假设通过SO大孔径望远镜（LAT）的高分辨率观测和重叠的大尺度结构巡天，最终可以去除70%的B模式透镜信号。对于更乐观的前景和噪声假设，并假设相同的去透镜水平，该预测约束改善至σ_r = 7×10^{-4}。这些预测代表了SO约束能力的重大提升，比原计划方案（假设现有三台SAT进行五年巡天）所能达到的结果大约好2.5倍。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，西蒙斯天文台的升级计划将显著增强其探测早期宇宙引力波信号的能力，为宇宙学参数测量提供更精确的约束，特别是对张标比r的测量精度将有重大提升。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : SO Small Aperture Telescopes Survey Specifications
figures.caption_zh: 表1：SO小孔径望远镜巡天规格

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Timeline of the Simons Observatory expanded SATs programme. Two additional “mid-frequency” SATs, operating at 93/145 GHz, are due to begin operations in 2027. A sixth “low-frequency” SAT, operating at 27/39 GHz is due to commence operations on a similar timescale. The additional telescopes, combined with an extension of the SO SAT survey to the mid-2030s, will significantly enhance the scientific reach of the observatory. This is demonstrated here by quoting forecasts for the errors achieved on the tensor-to-scalar ratio, \(\sigma_{r}\) , by 2028 and by 2035. For clarity, forecasted errors are quoted only for the “pessimistic” \(1/f\) noise model, assuming a moderately complex model for astrophysical foregrounds (i.e. allowing for foreground frequency decorrelation – see text in Section 3 for details). See Figure 3 and Table 2 for the detailed forecasting results, covering a wider range of assumptions for the levels of noise, foreground complexity and delensing achieved.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：西蒙斯天文台扩展SAT计划的时间线。两个额外的“中频”SAT（工作于93/145 GHz）计划于2027年开始运行。第六个“低频”SAT（工作于27/39 GHz）计划在类似时间尺度上开始运行。额外的望远镜，加上SO SAT巡天延长至2030年代中期，将显著增强天文台的科学覆盖范围。此处通过引用到2028年和2035年张标比\(\sigma_{r}\)的预测误差来展示这一点。为清晰起见，仅针对“悲观”\(1/f\)噪声模型引用预测误差，并假设中等复杂程度的天体物理前景模型（即允许前景频率去相关——详见第3节正文）。详细的预测结果（涵盖更广泛的噪声水平、前景复杂性和去透镜程度假设）见图3和表2。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : The \(B\) -mode power spectrum and uncertainties achievable by SO, accounting for the expansions described in Section 2 . Bandpowers of width \(\Delta\ell=10\) are shown after 10 years of observations assuming no delensing (orange bands) and 70% delensing (blue bands), and assuming the “pessimistic” \(1/f\) noise model (see Section 3.1 for details). The solid line shows the lensing \(B\) -mode power spectrum in the absence of tensor modes ( \(r=0\) ). The signal for \(r=0.01\) is shown in dashed black. Current measurements from BICEP/ Keck (red, showing CMB bandpowers, 2021PhRvL.127o1301A ) , SPT-3G (black, showing bandpowers at 90 GHz, 2025arXiv250502827Z ) , and Polarbear (green, showing bandpowers at 150 GHz, 2022ApJ...931..101A ) are also shown for reference.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：SO可实现的\(B\)模式功率谱及其不确定性，考虑了第2节所述的扩展。在10年观测后，假设无去透镜（橙色带）和70%去透镜（蓝色带），并假设“悲观”\(1/f\)噪声模型（详见第3.1节），展示了宽度\(\Delta\ell=10\)的带功率。实线显示在无张量模式（\(r=0\)）情况下的透镜\(B\)模式功率谱。\(r=0.01\)的信号以黑色虚线显示。同时显示了来自BICEP/Keck（红色，显示CMB带功率，2021PhRvL.127o1301A）、SPT-3G（黑色，显示90 GHz带功率，2025arXiv250502827Z）和Polarbear（绿色，显示150 GHz带功率，2022ApJ...931..101A）的当前测量结果以供参考。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : The forecasted 68% constraints on the tensor-to-scalar ratio \(r\) , achievable by SO, as a function of time, accounting for the expansions described in Section 2 . “Y \(N\) ” denotes the \(N\) -th year after the start of observations. Results are shown assuming 50% and 70% delensing (blue and red, respectively), for different assumptions regarding \(1/f\) noise and foreground decorrelation. Each band covers the range of \(\sigma_{r}\) between the worst- and best-case scenarios (the “pessimistic” \(1/f\) noise model with foreground frequency decorrelation as described by the moment expansions vs. the “optimistic” \(1/f\) noise model and no decorrelation). The constraints that the nominal SO configuration would have been able to attain, with the same foreground and noise assumptions, and \(A_{lens}=0.5\) , are shown as the gray hashed band.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：SO可实现的张标比\(r\)的预测68%约束随时间的变化，考虑了第2节所述的扩展。“Y \(N\)”表示观测开始后的第\(N\)年。结果显示了在50%和70%去透镜（分别为蓝色和红色）下，针对\(1/f\)噪声和前景去相关的不同假设。每个带覆盖了最差和最佳情况之间的\(\sigma_{r}\)范围（“悲观”\(1/f\)噪声模型与矩展开描述的前景频率去相关 vs. “乐观”\(1/f\)噪声模型且无去相关）。名义SO配置在相同前景和噪声假设下且\(A_{lens}=0.5\)所能达到的约束以灰色阴影带显示。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Forecasted 68% constraints on the tensor-to-scalar ratio \(r\) achievable by SO, accounting for the expansions described in Section 2 , after 5 and 10 years of observations. Results are shown for different assumptions regarding \(1/f\) noise and the impact of foreground frequency decorrelation (as characterised by a moments expansion). For comparison, also presented are the constraints forecasted for the nominal SO configuration, without the new SATs studied here, after 5 years of observations, and assuming 50% delensing.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：SO可实现的张标比\(r\)的预测68%约束，考虑了第2节所述的扩展，在5年和10年观测后。结果显示了针对\(1/f\)噪声和前景频率去相关影响（由矩展开表征）的不同假设。作为比较，还给出了名义SO配置（无此处研究的新SAT）在5年观测后且假设50%去透镜下的预测约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : The forecasted 95% constraints on the tensor-to-scalar ratio \(r\) and the scalar spectral index \(n_{s}\) that could be achieved by SO. Results are shown for the full SO SAT configuration, including the enhancements detailed in Section 2 , assuming 10 years of observation and 70% delensing. These forecasts are presented for two cases: (i) assuming the “pessimistic” \(1/f\) noise model and allowing for foreground frequency decorrelation (yellow), and (ii) assuming the “optimistic” \(1/f\) noise model and no frequency decorrelation (purple). The black line shows the prediction from \(R^{2}\) inflation (Starobinsky model) for a total number of \(e\) -folds in the range \(45 Planck ( planck_cosmo:2018 ) . For comparison, the red contours show the 95% constraints achievable by the nominal SO SAT configuration (assuming a 5-year survey and 50% delensing, as well as optimistic \(1/f\) noise and no frequency decorrelation), while the green contours show the current 68% and 95% constraints from BICEP/ Keck , Planck , and WMAP data ( 2021PhRvL.127o1301A ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：SO可实现的张标比\(r\)和标量谱指数\(n_{s}\)的预测95%约束。结果显示了完整的SO SAT配置，包括第2节详述的增强，假设10年观测和70%去透镜。这些预测针对两种情况呈现：(i) 假设“悲观”\(1/f\)噪声模型并允许前景频率去相关（黄色），以及(ii) 假设“乐观”\(1/f\)噪声模型且无频率去相关（紫色）。黑线显示了\(R^{2}\)暴胀（Starobinsky模型）在总\(e\)折叠数范围为\(45 < N < 60\)时的预测，并假设普朗克（planck_cosmo:2018）的最佳拟合宇宙学参数。作为比较，红色轮廓显示了名义SO SAT配置（假设5年巡天和50%去透镜，以及乐观\(1/f\)噪声且无频率去相关）可达到的95%约束，而绿色轮廓显示了来自BICEP/Keck、Planck和WMAP数据的当前68%和95%约束（2021PhRvL.127o1301A）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: GW231123 是 LIGO 干涉仪观测到的质量最大的双黑洞 (BBH)，总质量为 $190-265 M_\odot$。如此高的观测质量可以通过宇宙学红移和引力放大（如果源与引力透镜（如星系）对齐）的组合来解释。恒星和遗迹等小尺度物体会衍射信号，扭曲波前并提供额外的透镜特征。在此，我们首次结合了小尺度透镜的衍射效应和外部势的引力放大效应（建模为嵌入式点质量透镜 (PL)）对 GW231123 进行了分析，发现了一个有趣的透镜假说案例。数据支持透镜假说，观测到的贝叶斯因子的误报概率下限低于 $<1\%$，即置信水平约为 $2.6 σ$。考虑透镜效应后，GW231123 的源总质量降低至 $100-180 M_\odot$，更接近迄今报道的 BBH，同时也消除了不同波形近似器之间的差异以及对高分量自旋的需求。我们重建了所有源和透镜属性，包括微透镜质量 $190-850 M_\odot$、其偏移量、外部引力势的大小及其方向。与孤立 PL 相比，嵌入式 PL 分析得到的微透镜质量更轻。在我们的假设下，重建是完整的，但存在距离与投影密度之间的模糊性（质量片简并）。假设单个星系作为宏观透镜，我们可以推断信号的总放大倍数，将事件置于红移 $0.7-2$ 处，并预测由于宏观透镜的强透镜效应而形成额外可探测图像的概率约为 $~55\%$。我们讨论了我们的发现对微透镜的源和性质（包括可能的暗物质起源）的影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，GW231123很可能是一个被引力透镜放大的双黑洞系统。嵌入式点质量透镜分析比孤立点质量透镜得到更轻的微透镜质量。该发现对理解源特性和微透镜性质（包括可能的暗物质起源）具有重要意义，并预测有约55%概率形成额外可探测的强透镜图像。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Diffracted and magnified GWs. Top left: A small-scale point-lens in an external potential diffracts the signal. The external potential produces additional images and extends the Einstein ring (color shows the micro-magnification). This represents the local region near a macroimage produced by a galaxy, shown in the right panel. The offset between the lens and source ( \(y_{macro}\) ) determines whether additional images (dashed line) form. In contrast, the isolated point lens (bottom left panel) only produces two images and does not capture effects from the macroscopic potential.
figures.caption_zh: 图 1: 衍射和放大的引力波。左上：外部势中的小尺度点透镜衍射信号。外部势产生额外的图像并扩展爱因斯坦环（颜色显示微放大率）。这表示由星系产生的宏图像附近的局部区域，如右图所示。透镜和源之间的偏移量 ( \(y_{macro}\) ) 决定了是否形成额外的图像（虚线）。相比之下，孤立点透镜（左下）只产生两个图像，并且不捕获来自宏观势的效应。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of results under lensing by an embedded (isolated) point mass hypothesis. Maximum likelihood is relative to unlensed NRSur. See Table S1 for the recovered source parameters and Fig. S1 for some 2D posteriors of the lens parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 表 1: 在嵌入式（孤立）点质量透镜假说下的结果总结。最大似然值是相对于未透镜化的 NRSur。恢复的源参数见表 S1，透镜参数的某些二维后验分布见图 S1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: False alarm probability of observing Bayes Factors from GW231123-like unlensed signals. The curves are generated by analysing a hundred unlensed NRsur signals injected into Gaussian noise with lensed and unlensed hypotheses. The shaded region shows the Poisson error. Horizontal lines show the corresponding confidence levels. The GW231123 Bayes factor lies outside the distribution, with FAP \(<1\%\) and significance \(\gtrsim 2.6\sigma\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图 2: 从类似 GW231123 的未透镜化信号中观测到贝叶斯因子的误报概率。这些曲线是通过分析一百个注入高斯噪声中的未透镜化 NRSur 信号（使用透镜化和未透镜化假说）生成的。阴影区域显示泊松误差。水平线显示相应的置信水平。GW231123 的贝叶斯因子位于分布之外，FAP \(<1\%\) 且显著性 \(\gtrsim 2.6\sigma\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: 1D marginalised posterior distributions of \((i)\) detector frame chirp mass \(\mathcal{M}_{c}^{det}\) , mass ratio \(q\) and projected spin components \(\chi_{1}\) and \(\chi_{2}\) (perpendicular to the binary orbital plane) under unlensed and lensed hypotheses with different waveforms. The posteriors are in agreement for all the waveform models after incorporating lensing by an isolated or embedded point mass. \((ii)\) luminosity distance of the source \(d_{L}\) , and parameters of the point mass lens (redshifted lens mass \(M_{L}(1+z_{L})\) , impact parameter \(y\) ) without and with external potential (assuming \(\kappa=\gamma\) ). The posteriors under both lensing hypotheses are consistent among the three waveforms.
figures.caption_zh: 图 3: 在未透镜化和透镜化假说下，使用不同波形的 \((i)\) 探测器帧啁啾质量 \(\mathcal{M}_{c}^{det}\) 、质量比 \(q\) 和投影自旋分量 \(\chi_{1}\) 和 \(\chi_{2}\) （垂直于双星轨道平面）的一维边缘化后验分布。在通过孤立或嵌入式点质量透镜纳入透镜效应后，所有波形模型的后验分布一致。 \((ii)\) 源的光度距离 \(d_{L}\) ，以及点质量透镜的参数（红移透镜质量 \(M_{L}(1+z_{L})\) 、碰撞参数 \(y\) ），分别在不考虑和考虑外部势（假设 \(\kappa=\gamma\) ）的情况下。两种透镜假说下的后验分布在三种波形之间是一致的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: GW231123 total source-frame mass \(M^{src}_{tot}\) versus redshift \(z\) , as a lensed black hole merger. Contours indicate 68, 95, and 99% credible regions for different waveform and lensing models: unlensed (gray filled; Phenom and NRSur), diffracted (blue unfilled; NRSur), and magnified+diffracted by a singular isothermal macrolens (red filled; NRSur). Circles indicate median values of GWTC-4 events [ 4 ] . The black curve marks the approximate detector horizon for O4. Unlike the unlensed interpretation, which requires unusually high masses relative to the GWTC-4 population [ 104 ] , lensing analyses harmonize the event with the broader distribution of binary black holes.
figures.caption_zh: 图 4: GW231123 的源帧总质量 \(M^{src}_{tot}\) 与红移 \(z\) 的关系，作为一个被透镜化的黑洞并合。等高线表示不同波形和透镜模型在 68%、95% 和 99% 置信区域：未透镜化（灰色填充；Phenom 和 NRSur）、衍射（蓝色未填充；NRSur）以及由奇异等温宏观透镜放大并衍射（红色填充；NRSur）。圆圈表示 GWTC-4 事件的中值 [ 4 ] 。黑色曲线标记了 O4 的近似探测器视界。与需要相对于 GWTC-4 群体 [ 104 ] 异常高质量的未透镜化解译不同，透镜化分析使该事件与更广泛的双黑洞分布相协调。

figures.caption_en: Figure S1: Different microlensing regions inferred from the Embedded PL (NRSur) analysis, showing the multi-modality in the posteriors, related to the properties of the microimages. We identified a very subdominant mode with 4 images (black, \(4\%\) of samples) and three main modes with 2 images, which can be classified in terms of the time delay between them \(\Delta t_{01}\) : \(\sim 22\) ms (red, \(43\%\) ), \(\sim 44\) ms (blue, \(38\%\) ) and \(\sim 66\) ms (green, \(15\%\) ). The best fit is provided by the mode at \(\sim 44\) ms (blue), see Fig. S2 for the best fitting results for each of the modes.
figures.caption_zh: 图 S1: 从嵌入式 PL (NRSur) 分析推断出的不同微透镜区域，显示了后验分布的多模态性，与微图像的性质相关。我们识别出一个非常次要的具有 4 个图像的模式（黑色，\(4\%\) 的样本）和三个主要的具有 2 个图像的模式，可以根据它们之间的时间延迟 \(\Delta t_{01}\) 进行分类：\(\sim 22\) ms（红色，\(43\%\) ）、\(\sim 44\) ms（蓝色，\(38\%\) ）和 \(\sim 66\) ms（绿色，\(15\%\) ）。最佳拟合由 \(\sim 44\) ms（蓝色）的模式提供，每个模式的最佳拟合结果见图 S2。

figures.caption_en: Figure S2: Amplification factor with the best-fit lensing parameters for the three modes with two images shown in Fig. S1 . The reference likelihood value is the unlensed case. The wave-optics contribution (i.e. full result minus the geometric optics contribution) is represented with a lighter shade. In all three cases, the diffractive feature at \(t\sim 20\) ms is very important. The interference between the diffractive feature and the main image produces the main oscillatory pattern observed in \(F(f)\) , while the secondary image introduces additional wiggles.
figures.caption_zh: 图 S2: 图 S1 中所示三个具有两个图像的模式的最佳拟合透镜参数的放大因子。参考似然值是未透镜化的情况。波动光学贡献（即完整结果减去几何光学贡献）以较浅的色调表示。在所有三种情况下，\(t\sim 20\) ms 处的衍射特征非常重要。衍射特征与主图像之间的干涉产生了在 \(F(f)\) 中观察到的主要振荡模式，而次级图像引入了额外的波动。

figures.caption_en: Figure S3: Time domain waveform for GW231123 (top) and decomposition of the best fit model into a main image, secondary image and diffraction feature (bottom). Lensed models refer to the best-fit source parameters and posterior mode where the time delay \(\Delta t\sim 44\) ms between the main and secondary microimages.
figures.caption_zh: 图 S3: GW231123 的时域波形（顶部）以及最佳拟合模型分解为主图像、次级图像和衍射特征（底部）。透镜化模型指的是最佳拟合源参数和后验模式，其中主微图像和次级微图像之间的时间延迟 \(\Delta t\sim 44\) ms。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用MEGARA（GTC）和SITELLE（CFHT）的新积分场光谱数据，对室女座星系团中心星系M87中的暖电离丝状结构（10^4 K）进行了全面的运动学和电离分析。MEGARA观测了东南（SE）丝状结构（距星系核3 kpc，与已知的唯一分子气体团块重合）和远东（FE）丝状结构（距星系核15 kpc，空间上孤立于一个古老射电瓣内）。SITELLE则完整绘制了丝状结构图，首次提供了其运动学和激发的完整视图。结合存档的ALMA、MUSE和Chandra数据，这些观测提供了气体动力学的多相视角。丝状结构表现出复杂运动，不符合简单旋转。中心及东南丝状结构中暖气体和冷气体的速度结构函数（VSF）显示出一致的陡峭斜率（2/3）和在几百秒差距小尺度上的平坦化，可能暗示Ia型超新星的能量注入，但解释受方法限制。远东丝状结构的VSF振幅较低，表明驱动较弱。ALMA的CO发射与电离气体在空间上共位且运动学上对齐，但后者速度弥散更宽。电离诊断表明AGN相关过程（如激波）占主导，在射电瓣附近激发能量更高，而在远东丝状结构中则表现为低能化石反馈特征。最后，丝状结构遵循在其他星系团中观测到的强Hα-X射线表面亮度相关性，支持各相之间的局部热耦合。然而，远东丝状结构偏离了这一趋势，可能是由于过去AGN爆发引起的抬升或分析方法的局限性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，M87丝状结构受AGN反馈和局部能量注入共同影响，多相气体存在热耦合，但不同区域受不同物理过程主导，远东丝状结构可能受过去AGN爆发抬升影响。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Composite image of M87 combining SDSS optical data ( SDSS2022 ) with VESTIGE H \(\alpha\) + [ N ii ] emission (in red), obtained with MegaCam/CFHT ( Boselli2018 ; Boselli2019 ) . The image reveals the central filamentary network and two isolated plumes extending northeastward at projected distances of \(\sim\) 15 kpc and \(\sim\) 18 kpc from the galaxy center. Previous MUSE WFM observations is outline in pink, the MEGARA pointings toward the SE and FE filaments are shown in cyan. The blue contour highlights the only known CO(2-1) molecular gas, detected in the SE filaments. Dotted grey contours indicate the 90 cm VLA radio continuum ( Owen2000 ) . The field correspond to the full width and 60% of the height of the SITELLE FOV, centered on the galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：结合SDSS光学数据（SDSS2022）与VESTIGE H \(\alpha\) + [ N ii ] 发射（红色，由MegaCam/CFHT获得，Boselli2018；Boselli2019）的M87合成图像。图像显示了中心丝状网络以及两个向东北方向延伸的孤立羽流，其投影距离分别约为\(\sim\) 15 kpc和\(\sim\) 18 kpc。粉色轮廓标出了先前的MUSE WFM观测区域，青色轮廓标出了指向SE和FE丝状结构的MEGARA视场。蓝色等高线标出了在SE丝状结构中探测到的唯一已知CO(2-1)分子气体。灰色虚线等高线表示90 cm VLA射电连续谱（Owen2000）。该视场对应于SITELLE全视场的宽度和60%的高度，中心位于星系。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of M87 observations used in our analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：我们分析中使用的M87观测总结。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: (A) MEGARA emission maps of [ N ii ] \(\lambda\) 6583 + H \(\alpha\) for the first and second kinematic components of the SE filaments (continuum-subtracted), with North at the top and East to the left, as well as for the FE filament. The blue-shaded region outlines the area where the presence of two components if confirmed. Only spaxels with SNR \({}_{\text{H}\alpha}>3\) are shown. CO(2-1) flux contours from ALMA (above the 3 \(\sigma\) level) are overlaid on the SE filament maps, ranging from \(\sim\) 1 to \(\sim\) 6 mJy beam -1 . All scale bars correspond to 5 \(\arcsec\) . (B) Representative MEGARA spectra from selected spaxels: from left to right, one from the SE filament with a single component, one with two components, and one from the FE filament. A broken axis has been applied to better visualize the main spectral lines, which are marked by red dotted lines. For each spectrum, the fitted line profile (in red) is shown, along with individual components where applicable (blue dashed curves). The bottom panel displays the residuals of the fits, with the shaded region indicating the \(\pm\epsilon_{c}\) interval.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：(A) SE丝状结构第一和第二运动学分量以及FE丝状结构的[ N ii ] \(\lambda\) 6583 + H \(\alpha\) 的MEGARA发射图（连续谱扣除），北在上，东在左。蓝色阴影区域标出了确认存在两个分量的区域。仅显示信噪比\({}_{\text{H}\alpha}>3\)的像素。来自ALMA的CO(2-1)流量等高线（高于3 \(\sigma\) 水平）叠加在SE丝状结构图上，范围从\(\sim\) 1到\(\sim\) 6 mJy beam -1 。所有比例尺对应5 \(\arcsec\) 。(B) 选定像素的代表性MEGARA光谱：从左到右，一个来自单分量SE丝状结构，一个来自双分量区域，一个来自FE丝状结构。为更好地显示主要谱线（用红色虚线标出），坐标轴已断开。每个光谱均显示拟合的谱线轮廓（红色），以及适用的单个分量（蓝色虚线曲线）。底部面板显示拟合残差，阴影区域表示\(\pm\epsilon_{c}\)区间。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: (A) SITELLE continuum-subtracted [ N ii ] + H \(\alpha\) emission map showing only spaxels with SNR \({}_{\text{H}\alpha}>3\) and velocity error \(\leq\) 30 km s -1 . (B) Corresponding [ O ii ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 3727-3729 emission map. The main panel displays all spaxels, while the inset shows a zoomed-in view of the central region with only spaxels satisfying SNR \({}_{\text{[OII]}}>3\) . In both panels, the MEGARA FOVs targeting the SE and FE filaments are outlined in blue. The displayed maps represent approximately 10% of SITELLE’s full FOV. All scale bars correspond to 1 \(\arcmin\) . Maps are shown with 2 \(\times\) 2 binning and a logarithmic color scale to enhance contrast between bright and faint emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：(A) SITELLE连续谱扣除的[ N ii ] + H \(\alpha\) 发射图，仅显示信噪比\({}_{\text{H}\alpha}>3\)且速度误差\(\leq\) 30 km s -1 的像素。(B) 对应的[ O ii ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 3727-3729发射图。主面板显示所有像素，而插图显示中心区域的放大视图，仅包含信噪比\({}_{\text{[OII]}}>3\)的像素。在两幅图中，指向SE和FE丝状结构的MEGARA视场用蓝色轮廓标出。显示的图大约占SITELLE全视场的10%。所有比例尺对应1 \(\arcmin\) 。图采用2 \(\times\) 2合并和反对数颜色标度以增强亮发射与暗发射之间的对比。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: (A) SITELLE velocity map showing spaxels with SNR \({}_{\text{H}\alpha}>3\) and velocity uncertainties \(\leq\) 30 km s -1 (2 \(\times\) 2 binning). (B) Rotating thin-disk model computed for the combined gravitational potential of the central SMBH and the stellar bulge, based on the best-fit model from Osorno2023 . (C) Residual map showing the difference between the observed velocities and the rotation model. For each panel, faint solid white/black lines centered on the nucleus mark the disk’s kinematic P.A. (45°) and its perpendicular axis. MEGARA FOVs targeting the SE and FE filaments are outlined in blue, and the existing MUSE WFM observations is outlined with a white/black dashed box. The color scale is consistent across all panels and each scale bar corresponds to 1 \(\arcmin\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：(A) SITELLE速度图，显示信噪比\({}_{\text{H}\alpha}>3\)且速度不确定度\(\leq\) 30 km s -1 的像素（2 \(\times\) 2合并）。(B) 基于Osorno2023最佳拟合模型，针对中心超大质量黑洞和恒星核球联合引力势计算的旋转薄盘模型。(C) 残差图，显示观测速度与旋转模型之间的差异。在每个面板中，以星系核为中心的淡实线白/黑线标出了盘的动力学位置角（45°）及其垂直轴。指向SE和FE丝状结构的MEGARA视场用蓝色轮廓标出，现有的MUSE WFM观测用白/黑色虚线框标出。所有面板的颜色标度一致，每个比例尺对应1 \(\arcmin\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: (A) Velocity dispersion maps and (B) velocity maps of the SE (top) and FE (bottom) filaments, obtained with MEGARA (left) and SITELLE (right), showing only spaxels with SNR \({}_{\text{H}\alpha}>3\) . North is up and East is to the left. For the SE filaments in MEGARA, the main maps display the first component, while separate maps display the second component and, for the velocity map, the single-component fit within the two-component region (outlined). SITELLE maps include only a single velocity component. Color scales are consistent across maps of the same type. All scale bars correspond to 5 \(\arcsec\) . (C) VSFs for both pointings, derived from SITELLE and MEGARA data. Shaded areas indicates bins with an insufficient number of pairs ( \(
figures.caption_zh: 图5：(A) 速度弥散图和(B) SE（上）和FE（下）丝状结构的速度图，由MEGARA（左）和SITELLE（右）获得，仅显示信噪比\({}_{\text{H}\alpha}>3\)的像素。北在上，东在左。对于MEGARA中的SE丝状结构，主图显示第一分量，而单独的分图显示第二分量，对于速度图，还显示了双分量区域（已标出）内的单分量拟合。SITELLE图仅包含一个速度分量。相同类型图之间的颜色标度一致。所有比例尺对应5 \(\arcsec\) 。(C) 两个指向的VSF，源自SITELLE和MEGARA数据。阴影区域表示对数不足的区间（ \(

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: (A) Spaxel-by-spaxel comparison of ALMA CO(2-1) and MEGARA H \(\alpha\) (1st comp.) LOS velocities (blue) and velocity dispersion (pink), smoothed using a Gaussian kernel. For the velocity comparison, the dotted contours represent the distribution of spaxels using the 1 comp. fit, illustrating how the use of a two-component decomposition in the appropriate region tightens the overall distribution. Shaded bands indicate regions where the H \(\alpha\) values are 1 to 2 times (light grey) and 1 to 4 times (dark grey) the CO values. The 1:1 relation is highlighted by the solid grey line. (B) VSFs for the full SE filament using MEGARA (dark blue), the MEGARA spaxels within the CO(2-1) detection region (black) and the CO(2-1) detection itself (magenta). Two reference slopes are shown: 1/3 (Kolmogorov turbulence) and 2/3 (steeper slope). The vertical dotted, dashed and solid lines indicate the ALMA beam size (1.4 \(\arcsec\) , lager beam axis), the MEGARA seeing limit ( \(\sim\) 1 \(\arcsec\) ) and the half-width of the CO-detected region (extent from east to west), respectively. (C) Velocity difference map (H \(\alpha\) - CO), with the area right of the white line corresponding to the two-component region. (D) Velocity dispersion ratio map (H \(\alpha\) / CO); edges should be disregarded. (E) Normalized ([ N ii ] + H \(\alpha\) )/CO flux ratio map. All scale bars correspond to 5 \(\arcsec\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：(A) ALMA CO(2-1)与MEGARA H \(\alpha\) （第一分量）视线速度（蓝色）和速度弥散（粉色）的逐像素比较，使用高斯核平滑。对于速度比较，虚线等高线表示使用单分量拟合的像素分布，说明在适当区域使用双分量分解如何收紧整体分布。阴影带表示H \(\alpha\) 值为CO值的1到2倍（浅灰色）和1到4倍（深灰色）的区域。1:1关系由实灰线标出。(B) 使用MEGARA（深蓝色）、CO(2-1)探测区域内的MEGARA像素（黑色）以及CO(2-1)探测本身（品红色）的整个SE丝状结构的VSF。显示了两个参考斜率：1/3（Kolmogorov湍流）和2/3（更陡斜率）。垂直虚线、点划线和实线分别表示ALMA波束尺寸（1.4 \(\arcsec\) ，较长波束轴）、MEGARA视宁度极限（\(\sim\) 1 \(\arcsec\) ）和CO探测区域的半宽（东西方向延伸）。(C) 速度差图（H \(\alpha\) - CO），白线右侧区域对应双分量区域。(D) 速度弥散比图（H \(\alpha\) / CO）；边缘应忽略。(E) 归一化（[ N ii ] + H \(\alpha\) ）/CO流量比图。所有比例尺对应5 \(\arcsec\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: (A) MUSE velocity map of the central filaments. Each marker corresponds to the center of a VSF computed within a circular aperture ( \(R=\) 0.39 kpc), shown as the white aperture, and distributed across subregions F1 to F5 and I1 to I5 (as defined in the reference map, lower right). Crosses indicate locations where no VSF flattening is observed. (B) VLA 6 cm radio emission with MUSE filaments contours overlaid in white. The schematic at bottom right shows the definition of the angle relative to the radio jet axis. Panels (C) and (D) present the VSF parameters – slope (black), amplitude (red), flattening scale (blue) – as functions of projected radial distance from the nucleus and projected angle with respect to the jet axis, respectively. Semi-transparent horizontal lines show the median values of each parameter: slope \(\sim\) 0.92 dex, amplitude \(\sim\) 32 km s -1 , and flattening scale \(\sim\) 0.18 kpc (excluding data points points within grey shaded and magenta-highlighted regions). In panel (C), a break in the horizontal axis separates measurements for the SE and FE filaments (star markers). The vertical dashed green line marks the projected length of the optical jet ( \(\sim\) 1.5 kpc), while the grey shaded region represents the 0.78 kpc diameter of the VSF aperture. In panel (D), vertical dashed and dotted lines correspond to angles of \(90\degr\) and \(180\degr\) , respectively. Highlighted points in panels (A) through (D) are shown in magenta. Filled symbols indicate regions projected near the jet axis, while hollow symbols identify filament segments with velocities significantly offset from their local environments.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：(A) 中心丝状结构的MUSE速度图。每个标记对应在圆形孔径（\(R=\) 0.39 kpc，如白色孔径所示）内计算的VSF中心，并分布在子区域F1至F5和I1至I5（如参考图（右下）所定义）中。叉号表示未观察到VSF平坦化的位置。(B) VLA 6 cm射电发射，白色叠加MUSE丝状结构等高线。右下角的示意图显示了相对于射电喷流轴的角度定义。面板(C)和(D)分别展示了VSF参数——斜率（黑色）、振幅（红色）、平坦化尺度（蓝色）——作为投影径向距离（距星系核）和投影角度（相对于喷流轴）的函数。半透明水平线显示每个参数的中值：斜率\(\sim\) 0.92 dex，振幅\(\sim\) 32 km s -1 ，平坦化尺度\(\sim\) 0.18 kpc（排除灰色阴影和品红色高亮区域内的数据点）。在面板(C)中，水平轴上的断点分隔了SE和FE丝状结构（星形标记）的测量值。垂直虚线绿色线标出了光学喷流的投影长度（\(\sim\) 1.5 kpc），而灰色阴影区域代表VSF孔径的0.78 kpc直径。在面板(D)中，垂直虚线和点线分别对应\(90\degr\) 和\(180\degr\) 的角度。面板(A)至(D)中高亮的点以品红色显示。实心符号表示投影在喷流轴附近的区域，而空心符号标识速度与其局部环境显著偏离的丝状结构片段。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们基于AURORA巡天中34个星系（红移范围1.38≤z≤3.5，中值z=2.28）的样本，对质量-金属丰度关系（MZR）和基本金属丰度关系（FMR）提出了新的约束。这些星系通过JWST/NIRSpec探测到了[O III]λ4363和/或[O II]λλ7320,7331极光发射线，从而获得了直接的Te测量。两种氧极光线的探测使得可以进行双区域直接Te测量，并扩展了12+log(O/H)（7.68至8.65 dex）、恒星质量（10^8至10^10.4 M⊙）和恒星形成率（1至100 M⊙ yr⁻¹）的动态范围，相较于此前高红移MZR和FMR的直接Te研究。我们刻画了z∼2的MZR特征，发现其斜率为0.27±0.04，在10^10 M⊙处的归一化值为12+log(O/H) = 8.44±0.04，内禀弥散为0.10 dex，与过去的强线MZR测量结果一致。与六个模拟的z∼2预测比较显示，没有一个能重现我们观测到的从z∼0到z∼2的MZR归一化演化。这一差异表明，当前模型未能完全捕捉宇宙正午时期发生的化学增丰和反馈过程。然而，所有34个星系都位于或高于恒星形成主序，因此如果FMR在z∼2仍然存在，我们的样本可能偏向于较低的12+log(O/H)。校正这一选择效应将使O/H在10^9.3 M⊙（我们样本的中值质量）处增加约0.1 dex，从而使我们的MZR与TNG的结果更加一致。最后，我们发现z∼2.3的样本与z∼0的FMR在O/H上0.1 dex范围内一致，表明调节化学增丰、恒星形成、恒星质量和外流的平滑世俗机制在宇宙正午时期已经存在。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：当前星系形成模型未能完全捕捉宇宙正午时期的化学增丰和反馈过程，但基本金属丰度关系在z∼2.3时已与z∼0一致，表明调节化学增丰、恒星形成、恒星质量和外流的平滑机制在宇宙正午时期已经存在。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: SFR vs. stellar mass for AURORA sources, shown in squares color-coded by redshift. Overlaid are the Clarke2024 star-forming main sequence relations based on SFR(H \(\alpha\) ). Offsets from the Clarke2024 relations are shown in the bottom panel. AURORA sources lie on and above the main sequence, reaching as high as \(31\) times the typical SFR at fixed mass.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：AURORA源的红移编码色标方块显示的SFR与恒星质量关系。叠加的是基于SFR(H α)的Clarke2024恒星形成主序关系。底部面板显示了与Clarke2024关系的偏移。AURORA源位于主序之上，最高可达典型SFR的31倍（在固定质量下）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Mass metallicity relation for AURORA galaxies at \(z\sim 2.3\) using only direct \(T_{e}\) metallicities. Open circles show individual galaxies color-coded based on whether [O iii ]4363Å-only, [O ii ]7320,7331Å-only, or both oxygen auroral lines were detected. Our best-fit model ( blue solid line) is shown along with the best-fit parameters and the darker ( lighter ) shading corresponds to the \(1\sigma\) ( \(2\sigma\) ) confidence regions. Weighted mean values for equally populated stellar mass bins are shown for visualization purposes, but not used in fitting.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：仅使用直接T_e金属丰度的z∼2.3 AURORA星系的质-金属丰度关系。空心圆显示单个星系，颜色编码基于是否仅探测到[O III]λ4363、仅探测到[O II]λλ7320,7331，或两种氧极光线均被探测到。我们的最佳拟合模型（蓝色实线）连同最佳拟合参数一起显示，较深（较浅）的阴影对应1σ（2σ）置信区域。为可视化目的显示了等恒星质量分箱的加权平均值，但未用于拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Fundamental Metallicity Relation with two different \(\alpha\) that minimizes the scatter in \(12+\log({O/H})\) at \(z\sim 0\) . Our measurements show how combining both [O iii ] and [O ii ] auroral lines results in a \(\sim 1.5\) dex coverage in \(\mu\) from direct \(T_{e}\) measurements. We find our measurements are in strong agreement with the Sanders2021 FMR ( right ) with only a deviation at \(\mu>8.7\) although still within \(1\sigma\) errors. The left panel shows the comparison with the Curti2020 FMR where we find agreement within \(1\sigma\) but \(\sim 0.07\) dex systematically lower \(12+\log({O/H})\) at fixed \(\mu\) which is within the typical uncertainties of strong-line calibrations. Overall, this suggests that the same physical processes regulating star formation, stellar mass build-up, and chemical enrichment at \(z\sim 0\) is in place at cosmic noon.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：使用两种不同α（在z∼0时最小化12+log(O/H)弥散）的基本金属丰度关系。我们的测量显示，结合[O III]和[O II]极光线可从直接T_e测量中获得约1.5 dex的μ覆盖范围。我们发现测量结果与Sanders2021 FMR（右图）高度一致，仅在μ>8.7处有偏差，但仍处于1σ误差内。左图显示了与Curti2020 FMR的比较，我们发现两者在1σ内一致，但在固定μ下12+log(O/H)系统性地低约0.07 dex，这处于强线校准的典型不确定度范围内。总体而言，这表明在z∼0调节恒星形成、恒星质量积累和化学增丰的相同物理过程在宇宙正午时期已经存在。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: Our best-fit Mass – Metallicity Relationship compared to past direct \(T_{e}\) ( Curti2020 ; Ly2016 ; Sanders2020 ) and strong-line calibration ( Henry2021 ; Sanders2021 ; Revalski2024 ; Jain2025 ; Stanton2025 ) MZR measurements. We find our MZR is in strong agreement with past MZR studies. We also include our \(0.19\times\Delta\log_{10}{SFR}\) corrected MZR that takes into account the bias towards high SFR, low mass systems. This MZR is found to result in increased \(12+\log({O/H})\) towards low-mass relative to past MZR studies. However, the level of correction needed is uncertain. Right: Comparison of our MZR to different simulation predictions compiled by Garcia2025 including FIRE ( Ma2016 ) and NewHorizon ( Dubois2021 ) . Only Illustris and NewHorizon match in terms of normalization but have a steeper slope. All other simulations are found to have widely different normalizations but slopes consistent with our MZR measurement.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图：我们的最佳拟合质-金属丰度关系与过去的直接T_e（Curti2020；Ly2016；Sanders2020）和强线校准（Henry2021；Sanders2021；Revalski2024；Jain2025；Stanton2025）MZR测量结果的比较。我们发现我们的MZR与过去的MZR研究高度一致。我们还展示了考虑了高SFR、低质量系统偏差的0.19×Δlog₁₀SFR校正后的MZR。发现该MZR相对于过去的MZR研究，在低质量端导致12+log(O/H)增加。然而，所需校正的水平尚不确定。右图：我们的MZR与Garcia2025汇编的不同模拟预测的比较，包括FIRE（Ma2016）和NewHorizon（Dubois2021）。只有Illustris和NewHorizon在归一化上匹配，但斜率更陡。所有其他模拟的归一化差异很大，但斜率与我们的MZR测量一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 磁场在多个尺度上对星系动力学和结构至关重要，包括多相压力平衡、尘埃处理和恒星形成。发电机作用决定了它们的动力学结构和强度。结合大尺度和小尺度发电机的模拟已成功发展出与观测一致的均场强度和拓扑结构，但湍流场远弱于观测值；而使用与星际介质相关参数的小尺度发电机模拟产生的湍流场比观测值或理论预期值低一个数量级。我们使用在GPU上通过Astaroth加速的Pencil Code，在周期性区域中进行超新星驱动的星系发电机高分辨率模拟，包括加热和冷却。我们的模型表明，小尺度发电机产生的湍流场强度在仅适中的磁普朗特数下就趋近于渐近线。这使我们能够利用这些模型提出该磁场成分的基本特征，以便纳入全球星系模型。渐近极限已在仅几百的磁普朗特数下出现，比星际介质中的物理值低许多数量级，这与先前对可压缩等熵流的研究结果一致。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：小尺度发电机在相对较低的磁普朗特数下就能达到渐近行为，这为全球星系模型中湍流磁场成分的建模提供了关键特征参数，有助于更准确地模拟星系磁场。

Insets zoom in near the start of the inertial range to highlight deviations from the curve for \(\eta=0\) .

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Magnetic energy spectra \(e_{B}(k)\) normalized by \(e_{B}(k_{f})\) at a typical SN forcing wavenumber \(k_{f}=125\mbox{ kpc}^{-1}\) at a given Pm for models listed in the legends. The \(k^{3/2}\) Kazantsev scaling is indicated upper left (dotted dark blue).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：磁能谱 \(e_{B}(k)\) 以典型SN强迫波数 \(k_{f}=125\mbox{ kpc}^{-1}\) 处的 \(e_{B}(k_{f})\) 归一化，针对给定Pm的模型，如图例所示。左上角（虚线深蓝色）标出 \(k^{3/2}\) Kazantsev标度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Magnetic energy \(e_{B}\) normalised by time-averaged turbulent kinetic energy \({\overline{e_{K}}}\) for grid (a) \(512^{3}\) (b) , \(1024^{3}\) (c) , \(2048^{3}\) and (d) \(4096^{3}\) . See the legends for Pm and \(e_{s}\) from an average over the latest 2.5% of simulation time. Markers are shown at the time of SN explosions. Note that the time scales are dramatically smaller at higher resolution.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：磁能 \(e_{B}\) 以时间平均湍流动能 \({\overline{e_{K}}}\) 归一化，针对网格 (a) \(512^{3}\)、(b) \(1024^{3}\)、(c) \(2048^{3}\) 和 (d) \(4096^{3}\)。图例中显示Pm和 \(e_{s}\)，取自模拟时间最后2.5%的平均值。标记表示SN爆炸时刻。注意，更高分辨率下时间尺度显著减小。
