artifacts.abstract_zh: 在其大部分历史中，宇宙学是一种关于宇宙的定性约束性论述，受到有限的观测途径和缺乏全局动力学定律的影响。近几十年来，这种情况已发生决定性改变。现代宇宙学如今由来自广泛独立探测手段的前所未有的高精度数据流所驱动，包括宇宙微波背景、大尺度结构、超新星、重子声学振荡、引力透镜、宇宙计时器、红移空间畸变、引力波标准汽笛以及新兴的21厘米观测等。这种观测上的丰富性与基于广义相对论的具体理论和数学框架相匹配，该框架提供了支配宇宙尺度上时空和物质演化的动力学方程。结合明确的背景和微扰方程，该框架能够对宇宙演化进行定量、可预测且可证伪的描述。因此，宇宙学如今作为一门关于可观测宇宙的法则性自然科学运作，具有普遍定律、预测能力和系统的经验检验特征。我们认为，这种认识论转变引发了一个相应的概念转变，直接类似于从占星术到天文学的历史过渡。从这个意义上说，从“宇宙学”到“宇宙法则学”的转变应该开始在宇宙学家中，或者更准确地说，在宇宙法则学家中展开讨论。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论是宇宙学的这种认识论转变应该引发相应的概念转变，即从"宇宙学"（cosmology）转向"宇宙法则学"（cosmonomy），并建议宇宙学家（或更准确地说，宇宙法则学家）开始讨论这一转变。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们分析了来自BAT AGN光谱巡天（BASS）近红外数据发布3（DR3；⟨z⟩=0.036，z<1.0）的453个硬X射线选择（14–195 keV）AGN的近红外（NIR）发射线特性、AGN诊断以及核周气体动力学。该数据集是硬X射线选择AGN的静止框架近红外光谱观测的最大汇编，并包含完整的DR2样本。观测使用VLT X-shooter多波长（0.3–2.5μm）光谱仪（R = 4,000–18,000）进行，采用≥2σ探测阈值，从而能够对发射特征进行广泛分析。我们发现，近红外日冕线，特别是SiVI λ1.964，比光学[OIII]更可靠地示踪AGN光度，与硬X射线光度的相关性更紧密（σ=0.25 dex），而[OIII] λ5007的相关性为σ=0.55 dex。宽帕邢线（Paα和Paβ）在12%的塞弗特2型和57%的塞弗特1.9型中被探测到，这与先前隐藏宽线区的研究一致。我们引入了一个改进的近红外诊断图（FeII λ1.257μm/Paβ和H₂ λ2.122μm/Brγ），即使当污染限制单个诊断或仅能获得上限时，也能有效区分AGN、恒星形成和复合源。此外，我们发现热分子气体质量（由H₂ 2.121μm示踪）与X射线光度之间存在中等相关性（p ≈ 7.4 × 10⁻³），而其与爱丁顿比率的关系较弱。热气体与冷气体的质量比跨越四个数量级，平均约为3 × 10⁻⁷，表明分子气体激发过程多样化，可能由恒星形成和AGN反馈驱动。我们的结果强调了近红外光谱在探测AGN活动、被遮蔽的宽线区以及AGN与其核周环境复杂相互作用方面的价值。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，近红外光谱在探测AGN活动、被遮蔽的宽线区以及AGN与核周环境的复杂相互作用方面具有重要价值，为理解AGN反馈和分子气体激发过程提供了新见解。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top : Redshift histogram (binned for uniform width) for the full sample of 453 AGN, with median redshift \(z\approx 0.036\) , and a vertical dash-dotted line indicating maximum redshift for emission line coverage. Bottom : Distribution of intrinsic \(L_{\text{X}}\) (14 \(-\) 150 keV) vs redshift. Blue dots indicate AGN with Seyfert 1 optical classification, orange squares for Seyfert 1.9, and red triangles for Seyfert 2.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部：全部453个AGN样本的红移直方图（均匀宽度分箱），中值红移\(z\approx 0.036\)，垂直点划线表示发射线覆盖的最大红移。底部：内禀\(L_{\text{X}}\)（14 \(-\) 150 keV）随红移的分布。蓝点表示光学分类为塞弗特1型的AGN，橙色方块表示塞弗特1.9型，红色三角形表示塞弗特2型。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Instruments composing our full sample, their wavelength coverage, and total contribution.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：构成我们完整样本的仪器、其波长覆盖范围及总贡献。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Example of simultaneous emission-line fits for galaxy LEDA 2793282 (BAT ID 795), observed with VLT/X-shooter. The eight panels show the fitting for each region, labeled in the lower left of each panel (from the upper left to the bottom right: Pa \(\epsilon\) , [S viii ] , Pa \(\gamma\) , Pa \(\beta\) , Br10, [Fe ii ] , Pa \(\alpha\) , and Br \(\gamma\) ). In each panel, spectral data are plotted in black, and the best fit is in red. Regions of intense telluric absorption are in orange. Below the spectrum is the emission-line model fit in blue, below the model is the spectrum residual in grey, and a 2 \(\sigma\) threshold in dashed magenta. Cyan indicates CO absorption regions, which may complicate fitting. In this example spectrum, Br10 is absent. (The complete figure set will be available.)
figures.caption_zh: 图2：星系LEDA 2793282（BAT ID 795）的同步发射线拟合示例，使用VLT/X-shooter观测。八个面板显示每个区域的拟合，在每个面板的左下角标记（从左上到右下：Pa \(\epsilon\)、[S viii ]、Pa \(\gamma\)、Pa \(\beta\)、Br10、[Fe ii ]、Pa \(\alpha\)和Br \(\gamma\)）。在每个面板中，光谱数据以黑色绘制，最佳拟合以红色绘制。强烈的大气吸收区域以橙色表示。光谱下方是蓝色的发射线模型拟合，模型下方是灰色的光谱残差，以及品红色的2 \(\sigma\)阈值。青色表示CO吸收区域，可能使拟合复杂化。在此示例光谱中，Br10缺失。（完整图集将提供。）

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Detection totals for the Pa \(\beta\) , Pa \(\alpha\) , and Br \(\gamma\) emission lines.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：Pa \(\beta\)、Pa \(\alpha\)和Br \(\gamma\)发射线的探测总数。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Primary NIR Telluric Regions.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：主要近红外大气吸收区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Top : FWHM Pa \(\alpha\) vs. Pa \(\beta\) , separated by optical Seyfert type, and with a diagonal dashed black line indicating a one-to-one ratio of widths, and dashed lines indicating the division between narrow and broad Paschen lines vertically and horizontally. Bottom : FWHM Pa \(\alpha\) vs \(N_{H}\) , the vertical dashed line indicates the boundary for broad/narrow Pa \(\alpha\) . The horizontal dashed line to indicates the threshold \(N_{H}\) value that separates optical Seyfert 1 or Seyfert 2 using H \(\beta\) (21.9, Koss:2017:74 ) . A similar lack of sources in the FWHM 800 \(-\) 1400 km s -1 range is also seen in Brok:2022:7 , likely reflecting standard fitting constraints rather than a physical gap.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：顶部：Pa \(\alpha\)的半高全宽（FWHM）与Pa \(\beta\)的FWHM，按光学塞弗特类型区分，黑色虚线对角线表示宽度的一对一比率，垂直和水平虚线表示窄帕邢线和宽帕邢线的分界。底部：Pa \(\alpha\)的FWHM与\(N_{H}\)，垂直虚线表示宽/窄Pa \(\alpha\)的边界。水平虚线表示使用H \(\beta\)（21.9, Koss:2017:74）区分光学塞弗特1型或塞弗特2型的\(N_{H}\)阈值。在FWHM 800 \(-\) 1400 km s -1范围内也观察到类似的光源缺失，这在Brok:2022:7中也有发现，可能反映了标准拟合约束而非物理间隙。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Histogram across narrow Br \(\gamma\) luminosity, categorized by Seyfert 1 or 2, and blue or red lines indicate kernel density estimation of the two distributions. Statistical analysis suggests these detections are from different distributions (p-value \(\approx 2\times 10^{-3}\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：窄Br \(\gamma\)光度的直方图，按塞弗特1型或2型分类，蓝色或红色线表示两个分布的核密度估计。统计分析表明这些探测来自不同的分布（p值 \(\approx 2\times 10^{-3}\)）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: \(M_{BH}\) derived from FWHM Pa \(\alpha\) vs. Pa \(\beta\) , using identical markers as Fig. 1 , and with a dashed black line indicating a one-to-one ratio of widths.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：从Pa \(\alpha\)的FWHM推导的\(M_{BH}\)与Pa \(\beta\)的FWHM推导的\(M_{BH}\)，使用与图1相同的标记，黑色虚线表示宽度的一对一比率。

artifacts.abstract_zh: MAMMOTH-LyC巡天是哈勃太空望远镜（HST）第30周期的一项中型项目，利用18轨道深度的WFC3/UVIS F225W成像观测了两个位于$z\sim2.2$的大质量星系原星团场。我们通过报告发现J1244-LyC1来介绍这一巡天，这是一个在$z = 2.39$处表现出明显并合特征的强莱曼连续谱（LyC）泄漏源。J1244-LyC1具有高度显著（$10σ$）的LyC探测，对应的绝对逃逸分数为$f_{\mathrm{esc}} \! =\!36\%\pm4\%$（$1σ$）。LyC发射在空间上分解为多个峰值，与系统的扰动形态重合，证实了真正的多站点LyC泄漏。其恒星质量为$10^{10.2}{M_\odot}$，J1244-LyC1既是首个被确认的高红移LyC泄漏并合体，也是迄今已知质量最大的LyC发射体。我们将J1244-LyC1解释为一个并合驱动的星暴系统，其中潮汐相互作用破坏了星际介质，创造了多个低柱密度通道，从而促进了LyC逃逸。这一发现首次提供了并合系统中空间分辨LyC逃逸的直接证据，为理解大质量并合在驱动宇宙再电离中的潜在作用提供了新见解。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，J1244-LyC1是一个并合驱动的星暴系统，潮汐相互作用破坏了星际介质，创造了多个低柱密度通道，促进了莱曼连续谱逃逸。这一发现首次提供了并合系统中空间分辨莱曼连续谱逃逸的直接证据，为理解大质量并合可能在驱动宇宙再电离中发挥的作用提供了新见解。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: HST WFC3 coverage of the BOSS1244 protocluster field and high-resolution multi-band imaging of J1244-LyC1. Left: The MAMMOTH-Grism and MAMMOTH-LyC programs target overdense fields of extreme emission-line galaxies (EELGs) at \(z\approx 2.2\) , corresponding to the BOSS1244 protocluster. Black circles mark spectroscopically confirmed H \(\alpha\) emitters (HAEs; Shi et al. 2021 ), while the magenta diamonds indicate EELGs with \({EW}\) ([O iii ]) \(>225\,\text{\AA }\) following Tang et al. ( 2019 ) , identified using the MAMMOTH-Grism deep HST grism spectroscopy. The red star denotes the location of J1244-LyC1. Right: HST imaging of J1244-LyC1 in WFC3/UVIS F225W (rest-frame LyC; PSF-smoothed), F475W (rest-frame UV), and WFC3/IR F125W and F160W (rest-frame optical). The FWHM of the PSF is shown by the black circle. The 0.6″aperture is indicated by the black dashed circle. Each cutout is 1.8″ \(\times\) 1.8″in size.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：BOSS1244原星团场的HST WFC3覆盖范围及J1244-LyC1的高分辨率多波段成像。左图：MAMMOTH-Grism和MAMMOTH-LyC项目针对$z\approx 2.2$处极端发射线星系（EELGs）的过密场，对应于BOSS1244原星团。黑色圆圈标记光谱证认的H $\alpha$发射体（HAEs；Shi et al. 2021），品红色菱形表示根据Tang et al.（2019）标准、${EW}$（[O iii]）$>225\,\text{\AA }$的EELGs，通过MAMMOTH-Grism深场HST棱栅光谱识别。红色星号标记J1244-LyC1的位置。右图：J1244-LyC1在WFC3/UVIS F225W（静止系LyC；PSF平滑）、F475W（静止系紫外）以及WFC3/IR F125W和F160W（静止系光学）的HST成像。PSF的半高全宽由黑色圆圈表示。0.6″孔径由黑色虚线圆圈标出。每个切片大小为1.8″$\times$ 1.8″。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Emission line and photometry of J1244-LyC1
figures.caption_zh: 表1：J1244-LyC1的发射线和测光数据

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Keck/MOSFIRE \(K\) band spectroscopy (R \(\sim 3600\) ) confirming the double-velocity components of J1244-LyC1 through the H \(\alpha\) emission line. Left: Slit positions from two MOSFIRE observations overlaid on the pseudo-color image of J1244-LyC1. The yellow and green rectangles correspond to the slit orientations for the first and second observations, respectively, and match the colors used for the spectra on the right. Right: H \(\alpha\) emission-line profiles and Gaussian fitting results. For the first observation, a single-Gaussian model is adopted, and the derived line centroid is used to constrain the double-Gaussian fit in the second observation. Because the blue component is closer to the systemic redshift of J1244-LyC1 ( \(z=2.387\) ), we adopt its centroid as the velocity zero-point to illustrate the relative velocity offset between the two components. The expected locations of the [N ii ] \(\lambda\lambda 6548,6583\) lines are marked; no significant [N ii ] emission is detected in either observation.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：Keck/MOSFIRE $K$波段光谱（R $\sim 3600$）通过H $\alpha$发射线确认J1244-LyC1的双速度分量。左图：两次MOSFIRE观测的狭缝位置叠加在J1244-LyC1的伪彩色图像上。黄色和绿色矩形分别对应第一次和第二次观测的狭缝方向，与右侧光谱使用的颜色匹配。右图：H $\alpha$发射线轮廓及高斯拟合结果。第一次观测采用单高斯模型，其线心用于约束第二次观测的双高斯拟合。由于蓝色分量更接近J1244-LyC1的系统红移（$z=2.387$），我们以其线心作为速度零点，以展示两个分量之间的相对速度偏移。标记了[N ii] $\lambda\lambda 6548,6583$线的预期位置；两次观测均未探测到显著的[N ii]发射。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The best-fit SED model (blue) of J1244-LyC1 at \(z=2.39\) using CIGALE , fit to the existing broad-band photometry covering a wide wavelength range of \(600\) – \(7000\,\AA \) in the rest-frame. The SED fitting results are shown in Table 2 , and the multi-band photometry is shown in Table 1 . The SED of J1244-LyC1 is dominated by a young stellar population with an age \(330\pm 120\) Myr and a recent SFR of \(65\pm 33\,M_{\odot}\,{yr^{-1}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：使用CIGALE对J1244-LyC1在$z=2.39$处的最佳拟合SED模型（蓝色），拟合覆盖静止系$600$–$7000\,\AA $宽波长范围的现有宽带测光数据。SED拟合结果见表2，多波段测光数据见表1。J1244-LyC1的SED由年龄$330\pm 120$ Myr的年轻星族和近期恒星形成率$65\pm 33\,M_{\odot}\,{yr^{-1}}$主导。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Physical properties of J1244-LyC1 derived from SED fitting
figures.caption_zh: 表2：由SED拟合得出的J1244-LyC1物理性质

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: GALFIT decomposition of J1244-LyC1 in HST F160W imaging. All images are normalized to the peak value of the observed image. Single-component ( top ) and Double-component ( bottom ) GALFIT models for the F160W image. The Double-component fit provides a significantly better description of the main body of J1244-LyC1, whereas the single-component model leaves behind prominent structural residuals. The red arrows in the residual map highlight the tidal-tail structure, a clear signature of galaxy mergers.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：HST F160W成像中J1244-LyC1的GALFIT分解。所有图像均归一化至观测图像的峰值。F160W图像的单分量（上）和双分量（下）GALFIT模型。双分量拟合显著更好地描述了J1244-LyC1的主体，而单分量模型留下了明显的结构残差。残差图中的红色箭头突出显示了潮汐尾结构，这是星系并合的清晰标志。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Spatially Resolved \(f_{{esc}}\) Calculation of J1244-LyC1
figures.caption_zh: 表3：J1244-LyC1的空间分辨$f_{{esc}}$计算

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: UV morphology and [O ii ] emission distribution of J1244-LyC1. We present the HST/WFC3 F475W image (rest-frame UV continuum) together with the [O ii ] emission map extracted from the HST WFC3/G141 slitless spectroscopic data. The blue dashed contours trace the spatial distribution of the LyC emission. The green crosses mark the two luminosity centers identified in the F475W image. Three black circles (diameter 0.15″) indicate the locations of the three LyC-emitting clumps defined in our analysis. At all three clump positions, the flux distribution in F475W differs significantly from that in the [O ii ] map, highlighting spatial variations in recent ( \(\sim\) 3–10 Myr) versus longer-timescale ( \(\sim\) 10–100 Myr) star-formation activity.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：J1244-LyC1的紫外形态和[O ii]发射分布。我们展示了HST/WFC3 F475W图像（静止系紫外连续谱）以及从HST WFC3/G141无缝光谱数据提取的[O ii]发射图。蓝色虚线等高线描绘了LyC发射的空间分布。绿色十字标记F475W图像中识别的两个光度中心。三个黑色圆圈（直径0.15″）指示了我们分析中定义的三个LyC发射团块的位置。在所有三个团块位置，F475W中的流量分布与[O ii]图中的分布显著不同，突出了近期（$\sim$ 3–10 Myr）与较长时标（$\sim$ 10–100 Myr）恒星形成活动的空间变化。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 探测宇宙微波背景（CMB）的原初B模偏振为暴胀引力波提供了直接探针。然而，该信号极其微弱，并受到引力透镜、仪器噪声和天体物理前景的污染。本文提出了一种基于得分的扩散方法，利用方差爆炸随机微分方程（VE-SDEs），从受污染的观测中重建原初B模角功率谱。该方法采用由得分模型引导的逆向SDE，该得分模型仅针对固定张标比r=0.001对应的原初低ℓ B模角功率谱的随机实现进行训练。在推理过程中，逆向SDE迭代地将观测到的角功率谱驱动至学习到的原初流形，从而有效去噪和去透镜化输入。模型在包含引力透镜、复杂偏振前景组合以及拟议的ECHO任务代表性仪器噪声特征的模拟观测谱上进行了测试。训练后的得分模型学习了给定r值下原初B模场的底层统计分布，作为物理引导的先验，能够生成新的、一致的信号实现。该方法为未来CMB偏振任务中的原初信号恢复提供了稳健框架。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，得分模型学习了给定r值下原初B模场的底层统计分布，作为物理引导的先验，可以生成新的、一致的信号实现，为未来CMB偏振任务的原始信号恢复提供了稳健框架。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Top panel shows transformation of the data to a noise dominated distribution by slowly adding noise to it using a forward SDE. The bottom panel shows that samples of noise minimized data can be generated by using the reverse SDE method. In both cases the differential equations used are mentioned. The reverse SDE computation requires knowledge of score function.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上方面板展示了通过使用正向SDE缓慢添加噪声将数据转换为噪声主导分布的过程。下方面板展示了可以使用逆向SDE方法生成噪声最小化数据的样本。两种情况下均提及所使用的微分方程。逆向SDE计算需要知道得分函数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Training loss evolution for ScoreNet1D under the weighted denoising score-matching objective (Eq. ( 11 )) over 150 epochs. The loss decreases rapidly during the initial phase and saturates after \(\sim\) 100 epochs, indicating stable convergence of the learned score estimator. Small fluctuations around the plateau arise from stochastic mini-batch sampling of diffusion times and noise realizations.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在加权去噪得分匹配目标（式(11)）下，ScoreNet1D在150个epoch内的训练损失演变。损失在初始阶段迅速下降，并在约100个epoch后趋于饱和，表明学习到的得分估计器稳定收敛。平台期附近的小波动源于扩散时间和噪声实现的随机小批量采样。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Reconstruction of a single low- \(\ell\) CMB \(B\) -mode realization for four distinct foreground configurations (F1–F4; Section 3.2 ). In each panel, the contaminated observed spectrum (green) is dominated by polarized foregrounds and lensing across all multipoles, while the reverse VE–SDE reconstruction (orange) successfully recovers the primordial \(B\) -mode spectrum (blue) without explicit foreground modeling.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：针对四种不同前景配置（F1–F4；第3.2节）的单个低ℓ CMB B模实现的恢复。在每个面板中，受污染的观测谱（绿色）在所有多极矩上均被偏振前景和透镜主导，而逆向VE–SDE重建（橙色）成功恢复了原初B模谱（蓝色），无需显式前景建模。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Direct comparison of the reconstructed (orange) and ground-truth (blue) primordial \(B\) -mode spectra for the same test realization shown in Fig. 3 . The close agreement across all multipoles demonstrates that the reverse VE-SDE reconstruction accurately recovers both the amplitude and shape of the primordial signal.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：针对图3所示相同测试实现，重建（橙色）与真实（蓝色）原初B模谱的直接比较。所有多极矩上的紧密吻合表明逆向VE-SDE重建准确恢复了原初信号的幅度和形状。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Evolution of the reconstructed \(D_{\ell}\) spectrum for a single noisy observation during reverse VE–SDE sampling. Top panel: Initial state at \(t=1\) , where the spectrum is dominated by noise and carries no primordial structure. Middle panel: Intermediate diffusion stage ( \(t=0.8\) ), showing a gradual reduction in amplitude and variance as stochastic noise is suppressed and the spectrum begins to move toward the learned primordial distribution. Bottom panel: Late-stage reconstruction at decreasing diffusion times ( \(t=0.4,\,0.2,\,0.0\) ), demonstrating convergence toward the primordial \(B\) -mode spectrum (black dashed line).
figures.caption_zh: 图5：在逆向VE–SDE采样过程中，单个含噪观测的D_ℓ谱演变。上方面板：t=1时的初始状态，谱被噪声主导且无原初结构。中间面板：中间扩散阶段（t=0.8），显示幅度和方差逐渐减小，随机噪声被抑制，谱开始向学习到的原初分布移动。下方面板：在递减扩散时间（t=0.4, 0.2, 0.0）下的后期重建，展示出向原初B模谱（黑色虚线）的收敛。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6 : Ensemble-averaged reconstruction of the primordial \(B\) -mode \(D_{\ell}\) spectrum from \(10{,}000\) independent reverse VE–SDE samples starting from the same observed realization. The reconstructed mean (blue) closely follows both the ground-truth spectrum (black) and the theoretical prediction (red dashed). The shaded blue region denotes the \(\pm 1\sigma\) reconstruction uncertainty, while the gray band indicates the expected cosmic-variance envelope. The reconstruction uncertainty remains fully consistent with cosmic variance across all multipoles, indicating unbiased and well-calibrated inference.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：从同一观测实现出发，基于10,000个独立逆向VE–SDE样本的原初B模D_ℓ谱的系综平均重建。重建均值（蓝色）紧密跟随真实谱（黑色）和理论预测（红色虚线）。蓝色阴影区域表示±1σ重建不确定性，灰色带表示预期的宇宙方差包络。重建不确定性在所有多极矩上完全与宇宙方差一致，表明推断无偏且校准良好。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7 : Ensemble-averaged primordial \(B\) -mode power spectrum obtained from \(5{,}000\) independent realizations for each foreground configuration. The reconstructed mean (orange) closely matches the true primordial mean (blue) across all multipoles, demonstrating unbiased recovery in expectation and robustness of the reverse VE-SDE reconstruction to foreground complexity.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：针对每种前景配置，基于5,000个独立实现的原初B模功率谱的系综平均。重建均值（橙色）在所有多极矩上与真实原初均值（蓝色）紧密匹配，表明在期望意义上无偏恢复，且逆向VE-SDE重建对前景复杂性具有鲁棒性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8 : Visualization of the learned score field in \(D_{\ell}\) space at multiple diffusion times for selected multipole pairs. Left to right: Decreasing diffusion time \(t=\{0.9,\,0.6,\,0.3,\,0.1\}\) . At large \(t\) , the score vectors exhibit an approximately isotropic pattern, reflecting the near-Gaussian, noise-dominated distribution induced by the forward diffusion process. As \(t\) decreases, the vectors become increasingly structured and aligned, indicating that the learned score consistently points toward regions of higher data density. This evolution confirms that the network has learned a stable and well-behaved approximation to the gradient of the log-density required for accurate reverse VE–SDE sampling.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：在D_ℓ空间中，针对选定多极矩对，多个扩散时间下学习到的得分场的可视化。从左到右：递减扩散时间t={0.9, 0.6, 0.3, 0.1}。在大的t下，得分向量呈现近似各向同性模式，反映了正向扩散过程导致的近高斯、噪声主导分布。随着t减小，向量变得日益结构化且对齐，表明学习到的得分一致指向数据密度更高的区域。这一演变证实网络已学习到准确逆向VE–SDE采样所需的log密度梯度的稳定且表现良好的近似。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的星系旋转曲线经验模型，该模型引入了一个速度修正项ω，该修正项源自观测到的恒星运动，并锚定于开普勒基线。与参数化晕模型或修正引力理论不同，本方法不改变牛顿动力学，也不涉及暗物质分布。相反，它识别出一个可重复的运动学偏移，该偏移与广泛星系中观测到的旋转轮廓一致。利用SPARC数据[1]，我们证明了该模型能够持续实现高保真拟合，在无需参数调整的情况下，通常在均方根误差（RMSE）和R平方指标上优于MOND和CDM晕模型。该方法可重复，对质量建模的依赖性极小，并为表征星系动力学提供了一种简化的替代方案。虽然速度修正项ω缺乏明确的物理解释，但其经验上的成功值得进一步探索。我们将此模型定位为一种局部运动学工具，而非宇宙学框架，并欢迎就其对于星系结构和引力理论的启示进行讨论。附录B展示了RMSE和R²比较，表明该方法在代表性星系样本中始终优于MOND和CDM晕模型。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该模型提供了一个简化的局部运动学工具而非宇宙学框架，虽然速度修正项ω缺乏明确的物理解释，但其经验成功值得进一步探索，对星系结构和引力理论有潜在启示。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST巡天发现了一类在$z \ge 5$处紧凑、红色的源（“小红点”，LRDs），它们表现出宽巴尔默发射，但X射线微弱，意味着重遮蔽，$N_H \ge 10^{24}$ cm$^{-2}$。我们提出，LRDs可能追踪一个短暂的、被遮蔽的阶段，该阶段与模糊暗物质（FDM）晕的深孤子核内快速重子流入有关。结合孤子尺寸标度与(i)观测到的紧凑半径（$r_e \sim 30-100$ pc）以及(ii)在核心半径量级区域内可实现康普顿厚柱密度的要求，我们发现，对于孤子质量$M_s \sim 10^8 - 10^9 M_\odot$，粒子质量$m$为数$\times 10^{-22}$ eV是合理的；我们采用$m_{22}=2$作为基准选择。对遮蔽柱密度的保守质量预算估计，结合等温静水压分层，表明达到$N_H \ge 10^{24} - 10^{25}$ cm$^{-2}$的构型所需的密度下，辐射损失（冷却和/或扩散）发生得比动力学时间更快，这表明长期存在的静态热大气不太可能（“不透明度危机”），而快速流入或辐射压驱动的演化更受青睐。利用$512^3$伪谱薛定谔-泊松模拟理想化孤子合并，我们展示了在代表性标度下，通过剧烈弛豫可以形成紧凑、高密度的孤子核。我们讨论了观测意义和检验，并概述了未来辐射流体动力学建模以预测统计特性和详细光谱的必要性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：“小红点”可能是模糊暗物质晕中快速重子流入的短暂遮蔽相，需要未来辐射流体动力学模拟来预测其统计特性和详细光谱特征。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Constraints on boson mass ( \(m_{22}\) ) from combining the soliton size scaling (Eq. 1 ) with an opacity (column) requirement. The vertical axis shows a characteristic physical scale; we compare the observed effective radius range of LRDs (green band, \(r_{e}\sim 30\) – \(100\) pc) with the soliton core radius predicted for \(M_{s}=10^{8}\) – \(10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) (blue band; dashed boundaries follow \(r_{c}\propto m_{22}^{-2}\) ). The red hatched region (“Too transparent”/“Generic transparency”) marks parameters for which even a maximally loaded core ( \(f_{g}=1\) ) confined within \(r_{e}=\xi r_{c}\) with \(\xi=1\) cannot reach \(N_{H}=10^{24}\,{cm^{-2}}\) . The opacity boundary is evaluated for a representative \(M_{s}\sim 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\) (typical of LRD hosts). The orange shaded area illustrates sensitivity to baryon-loading uncertainties by adopting conservative values ( \(f_{g}=0.1\) , \(\xi=3\) ). The viable region is the overlap between the observed size band and the non-transparent (Compton-thick-capable) region; The region outside the red-shaded area corresponds entirely to the non-transparent (Compton-thick capable) regime. The “Viable Region” is specifically the parallelogram defined by the overlap between the observed size band and this non-transparent regime. under the direct-mapping assumption ( \(r_{e}\sim r_{c}\) ) this favors \(m_{22}\sim{few}\) , and we adopt \(m_{22}=2\) as a fiducial baseline for subsequent figures.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：结合孤子尺寸标度（公式1）与不透明度（柱密度）要求对玻色子质量（\(m_{22}\)）的约束。纵轴显示特征物理尺度；我们将LRDs的观测有效半径范围（绿色带，\(r_{e}\sim 30\) – \(100\) pc）与预测的\(M_{s}=10^{8}\) – \(10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\)孤子核心半径（蓝色带；虚线边界遵循\(r_{c}\propto m_{22}^{-2}\)）进行比较。红色阴影区域（“过于透明”/“一般透明”）标记了即使在\(r_{e}=\xi r_{c}\)且\(\xi=1\)内限制最大负载核心（\(f_{g}=1\)）也无法达到\(N_{H}=10^{24}\,{cm^{-2}}\)的参数。不透明度边界是针对代表性\(M_{s}\sim 10^{9}\,M_{\odot}\)（LRD宿主典型值）评估的。橙色阴影区域通过采用保守值（\(f_{g}=0.1\)，\(\xi=3\)）说明重子负载不确定性的敏感性。可行区域是观测尺寸带与非透明（可达到康普顿厚）区域的重叠；红色阴影区域外的区域完全对应非透明（可达到康普顿厚）区域。“可行区域”特指由观测尺寸带与该非透明区域重叠定义的平行四边形。在直接映射假设（\(r_{e}\sim r_{c}\)）下，这有利于\(m_{22}\sim{few}\)，我们采用\(m_{22}=2\)作为后续图形的基准基线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Timescale hierarchy in soliton cores. Comparison between the dynamical time \(t_{dyn}\) (blue solid line, \(t_{dyn}\propto M_{s}^{-2}\) ) and the optically thin cooling time \(t_{cool}\) (red dashed line; this corresponds strictly to the optically thin cooling time defined in Equation (5), not the effective diffusion-limited time \(t_{rad}\) ) as a function of soliton mass \(M_{s}\) . The top axis explicitly provides the corresponding virial temperature \(T_{vir}\) to guide physical intuition. At low masses ( \(T_{vir} t_{dyn}\) . As the soliton mass increases, the gas is heated above the atomic cooling threshold, causing a sharp drop in \(t_{cool}\) . A critical mass emerges at \(M_{crit}\approx 2.8\times 10^{7}M_{\odot}\) , identified exactly at the intersection where the condition \(t_{cool}=t_{dyn}\) is satisfied; this threshold is obtained analytically by solving \(t_{cool}=t_{dyn}\) using the cooling function adopted in our model (see Appendix B). Above this mass threshold, the system enters the cooling-dominated regime ( \(t_{cool}<t_{dyn}\) ). For the massive regime relevant to Little Red Dots ( \(M_{s}\gtrsim 10^{8}M_{\odot}\) ), the cooling time is orders of magnitude shorter than the dynamical time, inevitably triggering a catastrophic collapse.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：孤子核中的时标层次。动力学时间\(t_{dyn}\)（蓝色实线，\(t_{dyn}\propto M_{s}^{-2}\)）与光学薄冷却时间\(t_{cool}\)（红色虚线；这严格对应于公式(5)中定义的光学薄冷却时间，而非有效扩散限制时间\(t_{rad}\)）作为孤子质量\(M_{s}\)函数的比较。顶部坐标轴明确提供了相应的维里温度\(T_{vir}\)以指导物理直觉。在低质量（\(T_{vir} t_{dyn}\)。随着孤子质量增加，气体被加热到原子冷却阈值以上，导致\(t_{cool}\)急剧下降。在\(M_{crit}\approx 2.8\times 10^{7}M_{\odot}\)处出现临界质量，精确识别在满足条件\(t_{cool}=t_{dyn}\)的交点处；该阈值通过使用我们模型中采用的冷却函数（见附录B）求解\(t_{cool}=t_{dyn}\)解析获得。在此质量阈值以上，系统进入冷却主导区域（\(t_{cool}<t_{dyn}\)）。对于与小红点相关的质量范围（\(M_{s}\gtrsim 10^{8}M_{\odot}\)），冷却时间比动力学时间短几个数量级，不可避免地触发灾难性坍缩。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Validation of a compact soliton core in an idealized merger. Radial density profile of the simulated core (red points) compared to the analytic soliton solution (black line; fitted \(r_{c}=2.32\) in code units). Both axes are shown in code units; the corresponding physical scaling for \(m_{22}=2\) is given in Section IV (yielding \(r_{c}\simeq 51\) pc and \(M_{c}\simeq 7.8\times 10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\) ). The deviation at large radii reflects unrelaxed merger debris and finite-box/periodic-boundary effects, and does not affect the inner soliton core relevant for our analytic estimates.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：理想化合并中紧凑孤子核的验证。模拟核心的径向密度分布（红点）与解析孤子解（黑线；拟合\(r_{c}=2.32\)，以代码单位表示）的比较。两个坐标轴均以代码单位显示；\(m_{22}=2\)对应的物理标度在第四节给出（得到\(r_{c}\simeq 51\) pc和\(M_{c}\simeq 7.8\times 10^{8}\,M_{\odot}\)）。大半径处的偏差反映了未弛豫的合并碎片和有限盒子/周期边界效应，不影响与我们解析估计相关的内部孤子核。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The size–mass plane of Little Red Dots (LRDs), comparing observed effective radii \(r_{e}\) with illustrative FDM soliton compactness limits. The red shaded region indicates a “Soliton Formation Zone,” defined by the minimum radii implied by the soliton scaling for different boson masses. The horizontal axis represents the observed black hole mass ( \(M_{BH}\) ) , which does not necessarily equal the underlying soliton mass ( \(M_{c}\) ) during the early progenitor phase. The dashed red line shows our fiducial baseline ( \(m_{22}=2\) ) under the direct-mapping assumption ( \(M_{BH}\approx M_{c}\) ). LRD measurements from Greene et al. ( 2024 ) and Kokorev et al. ( 2024 ) are overplotted. In the progenitor phase interpretation ( \(M_{BH} II .1, which strictly assumes a mature, direct-mapping ( \(M_{BH}\approx M_{c}\) ) scenario. This interpretation allows the observed LRDs to be consistent with heavier boson masses ( \(m_{22}\gtrsim 20\) , consistent with Lyman- \(\alpha\) constraints) while still utilizing the deep soliton potential to trigger the initial collapse.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：小红点（LRDs）的尺寸-质量平面，比较观测有效半径\(r_{e}\)与说明性FDM孤子致密性极限。红色阴影区域表示“孤子形成区”，由不同玻色子质量下孤子标度隐含的最小半径定义。横轴表示观测到的黑洞质量（\(M_{BH}\)），在早期前身阶段不一定等于底层孤子质量（\(M_{c}\)）。红色虚线显示在直接映射假设（\(M_{BH}\approx M_{c}\)）下我们的基准基线（\(m_{22}=2\)）。叠加了Greene等人（2024）和Kokorev等人（2024）的LRD测量值。在前身阶段解释（\(M_{BH} II .1，该假设严格假设一个成熟的、直接映射（\(M_{BH}\approx M_{c}\)）情景。这种解释允许观测到的LRDs与更重的玻色子质量（\(m_{22}\gtrsim 20\)，与莱曼-\(\alpha\)约束一致）一致，同时仍利用深孤子势触发初始坍缩。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 假设暗物质是一个超轻标量场，通过规范-动能函数与电磁学耦合，并且在复合时期在一个哈勃斑块上相干振荡，我们证明规范场模式存在快子不稳定性，这导致在宇宙学尺度上产生足够幅度的磁场，以解释观测结果。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：暗物质作为与电磁场耦合的超轻标量场，通过快子不稳定性机制，能够有效解释宇宙尺度磁场的起源问题。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用JWST/MIRI对GATOS巡天中八个邻近活动星系核（AGN）的成像，研究其窄线区（NLR）中延伸尘埃的物理条件。在四个星系（ESO 428-G14、NGC 4388、NGC 3081和NGC 5728）中，我们探测到沿NLR延伸约100-200 pc的空间分辨尘埃结构。在这些系统中，我们发现尘埃形态、射电喷流和冕[Si VI]发射之间存在强关联，表明尘埃携带着塑造NLR过程的印记。利用空间分辨的能谱分布，我们显示NLR中的尘埃斜率系统性地陡于恒星形成团块。这些尘埃在距核心约150 pc处，以150-220 K的温度范围发射。使用简单模型，我们表明即使在尘埃尺寸和AGN光度的乐观假设下，过剩的中红外发射也无法仅由AGN辐照解释。我们将这种过剩加热解释为原位加热。我们显示，在稠密气体中速度约为$v_{\rm shock} \sim 200-400 \, \rm km/s$的激波可以弥合这一差距，在某些情况下甚至能解释总观测发射。这结合这些区域中激波的多重证据，支持了一个场景：激波不仅与尘埃共存，而且可能在加热尘埃中起关键作用。我们的发现揭示，激波可能是AGN中心数百秒差距范围内延伸尘埃发射的一个重要且此前被忽视的驱动因素。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：AGN窄线区延伸尘埃的加热机制不能仅用AGN辐射解释，激波在其中起关键作用。激波可能是AGN中心数百秒差距范围内延伸尘埃发射的重要驱动因素。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Sample Properties.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：样本性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: JWST/MIRI F1000W images of the central regions of four galaxies (ESO 428 \(-\) G14, NGC 4388, NGC 3081, and NGC 5728). North is up and East is to the left. The images have been PSF subtracted and decontaminated from emission lines. Each main panel shows the pure dust continuum emission in logarithmic scale, highlighting extended structures. The zoom-ins display the flux maps of [ Si vi ] emission observed with SINFONI, matched to a \(\sim 4^{\prime\prime}\times 4^{\prime\prime}\) field of view. Overlaid contours show the extended dust emission as the main panels. Where relevant, arrows mark regions where shocks are prevalent, based on [ Fe ii ] enhancement.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：四个星系（ESO 428 \(-\) G14、NGC 4388、NGC 3081和NGC 5728）中心区域的JWST/MIRI F1000W图像。北向上，东向左。图像已扣除PSF并去除发射线污染。每个主面板以对数尺度显示纯尘埃连续谱发射，突出延伸结构。放大图显示用SINFONI观测到的[ Si vi ]发射的通量图，匹配到\(\sim 4^{\prime\prime}\times 4^{\prime\prime}\)视场。叠加的等高线显示主面板中的延伸尘埃发射。在相关位置，箭头标记基于[ Fe ii ]增强而激波普遍存在的区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Similar to Fig. 1 but for NGC 7172, NGC 2992, NGC 3227, and NGC 5135.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：与图1类似，但针对NGC 7172、NGC 2992、NGC 3227和NGC 5135。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Left: Spectral energy distributions taken over five filters (F560W, F1000W, F1500W, F1800W, F2100W) normalised by the F1500W filter. Different colours represent different galaxies. Each curve shows the median SED of all ROIs for that galaxy. For each galaxy, the dashed lines represent the median SED of star forming regions. Where relevant, we plot the median for regions covering dust in the NLR, represented as solid lines. The latter have been shifted up in the Y-axis for clarity. The shaded area represents the 16-84 percentile. Right: Galaxy median SEDs for dust in the NLR (solid) and for star-forming clumps (dashed).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左：在五个滤光片（F560W、F1000W、F1500W、F1800W、F2100W）上获取的能谱分布，按F1500W滤光片归一化。不同颜色代表不同星系。每条曲线显示该星系所有ROI的中位SED。对于每个星系，虚线代表恒星形成区域的中位SED。在相关位置，我们绘制覆盖NLR中尘埃的区域的中位值，以实线表示。后者已在Y轴上向上移动以便清晰显示。阴影区域代表16-84百分位。右：星系NLR中尘埃（实线）和恒星形成团块（虚线）的中位SED。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Monte Carlo blackbody fits for the dusty NLRs of ESO 428-G14, NGC 4388 (top row), NGC 3081, and NGC 5728 (bottom row). Each panel shows an SED extracted with an aperture diameter of \(0\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}7\) at \(\sim\) 150 pc from the nucleus, where shocks dominate (see Fig. 1 ). Apertures are marked as orange circles in the upper left of each panel. Red stars are the photometric points. The solid lines represent the median of the fits and the shaded bands show the 16–84th percentiles. For each galaxy, we show the median temperature \(T_{med}\) , and the 16–84th values ( \(T_{low}\) , \(T_{high}\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：ESO 428-G14、NGC 4388（上行）、NGC 3081和NGC 5728（下行）的尘埃NLR的蒙特卡罗黑体拟合。每个面板显示在距核心\(\sim\) 150 pc处、激波主导的区域（见图1），以孔径直径\(0\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}7\)提取的SED。孔径在每个面板左上角以橙色圆圈标记。红色星号为测光点。实线代表拟合的中位值，阴影带显示16-84百分位。对于每个星系，我们显示中位温度\(T_{med}\)，以及16-84百分位值（\(T_{low}\)，\(T_{high}\)）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: JWST/MIRI ”Dust in the Wind” sample. ( Left: ) Extended dust emission revealed by the JWST/MIRI F1000W image, shown after PSF subtraction and decontamination. ( Middle: ) Radio continuum emission from VLA observations. ( Right: ) Comparison between the dust morphology (image) and the radio emission (shown as white contours). The zoomed-in \(4^{\prime\prime}\times 4^{\prime\prime}\) region displays the [ Si vi ] coronal line emission from SINFONI.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：JWST/MIRI“风中尘埃”样本。（左：）JWST/MIRI F1000W图像揭示的延伸尘埃发射，显示在PSF扣除和去污染之后。（中：）VLA观测的射电连续谱发射。（右：）尘埃形态（图像）与射电发射（以白色等高线显示）的比较。放大的\(4^{\prime\prime}\times 4^{\prime\prime}\)区域显示来自SINFONI的[ Si vi ]冕线发射。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Expected AGN radiation field \(U_{AGN}\) and dust temperatures (assuming classical ISM grain sizes) derived at a distance \(d_{AGN}=150\,{pc}\) from the nucleus.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：在距核心\(d_{AGN}=150\,{pc}\)处推导的预期AGN辐射场\(U_{AGN}\)和尘埃温度（假设经典ISM尘埃尺寸）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Comparison between the median dust temperatures from MC BB fits (orange stars) and predicted temperatures from AGN illumination (blue bars). The shaded orange area represents the minimum and maximum possible dust temperatures across the four galaxies. The colour gradient within each blue bar represents the range of predicted temperatures resulting from variations in the assumed grain size \(a=[0.005,0.25]\,\micron\) . For all four galaxies, additional heating mechanisms must be present, as AGN illumination alone cannot account for the observed dust temperatures.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：来自MC BB拟合的中位尘埃温度（橙色星）与AGN辐照预测温度（蓝色条）的比较。橙色阴影区域代表四个星系中可能的最小和最大尘埃温度。每个蓝色条内的颜色梯度代表由于假设尘埃尺寸\(a=[0.005,0.25]\,\micron\)变化导致的预测温度范围。对于所有四个星系，必须存在额外的加热机制，因为仅AGN辐照无法解释观测到的尘埃温度。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了从BEACON（JWST第2周期纯平行NIRCam成像项目）第二次数据发布（DR2）中选出的161个红移z=7-14星系候选体的测光性质。这些候选体经过精心挑选，来自36个独立指向（对应约350平方角分的天区覆盖），因此宇宙方差较小，为研究广泛环境下的星系性质提供了无偏样本。我们测量了物理性质，包括紫外连续谱斜率（β_UV）、恒星质量（M_*）、恒星形成率（SFR）和尺度。我们最高红移的星系候选体位于z=13.71±0.15，其紫外光度异常明亮，M_UV=-21.19±0.08，若经光谱确认，将成为z>12处最明亮的星系。该候选体具有极蓝的紫外斜率、致密的形态和高恒星形成率面密度（Σ_SFR），可能具有极低的金属丰度、高电离光子逃逸分数，或存在活动星系核（AGN）的贡献。在我们的多个独立视线方向中，我们识别出三个星系数量超密度区域，显著性超过3σ。不同环境中星系的性质未表现出显著差异，这意味着要么在z>7时过密区域中加速的星系演化尚未普遍发生，要么当前的约束受限于样本量。我们的模拟表明，将样本扩大一个数量级将能够可靠地确认或排除这类环境趋势，这凸显了未来纯平行观测的重要性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：在z>7时期，过密区域中加速的星系演化可能尚未普遍发生，或者当前样本量限制了环境趋势的检测；未来需要将样本扩大一个数量级才能可靠确认或排除环境效应。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top: Comparison between EAZY photometric redshift and spectroscopic redshift in our sample. The black solid line indicates one-to-one relation, while the grey shaded region shows the \(|z_{phot}-z_{spec}|/(1+z_{spec}) Prospector photometric redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上：样本中EAZY测光红移与光谱红移的比较。黑色实线表示一对一关系，灰色阴影区域表示\(|z_{phot}-z_{spec}|/(1+z_{spec}) Prospector\)测光红移。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the 10 free parameters used for the SED fitting with Prospector
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于Prospector SED拟合的10个自由参数总结

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Examples of our SED fitting results. In the top of each panel, we show the best-fit SEDs from EAZY and Prospector with grey and red curves, respectively. The red solid circles and black open squares indicate the photometry predicted from the best-fit SEDs and the observed photometry, respectively. The normalized residuals are presented in bottom of each panel, with the horizontal shaded region showing the \(\pm 2\sigma\) interval.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们的SED拟合结果示例。在每个面板的顶部，我们分别用灰色和红色曲线展示了EAZY和Prospector的最佳拟合SED。红色实心圆和黑色空心方块分别表示最佳拟合SED预测的光度测量和观测光度测量。归一化残差显示在每个面板的底部，水平阴影区域表示\(\pm 2\sigma\)区间。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Rest-frame UV and optical colors of our galaxy candidates at \(z>7\) selected in Section III . Red data points denote the five objects that are excluded due to their red optical color. The black dashed lines indicates the “little red dot” (LRD) selection criteria from greene24lrd and hainline25lrd .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在第三节中选出的\(z>7\)星系候选体的静止系紫外和光学颜色。红色数据点表示因光学颜色过红而被排除的五个天体。黑色虚线表示来自greene24lrd和hainline25lrd的“小红点”（LRD）选择标准。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: histogram of \(z_{phot}\) distribution (top) and \(M_{UV}\) versus \(z_{phot}\) (bottom) for our sample. Objects with spectroscopic confirmation are marked with open red symbols and the red histogram. We also plot other spectroscopically confirmed galaxies at \(z>10\) in the literature with green data points. Right: histograms of \(M_{UV}\) distributions for the F090 (top), F115 (middle), and F150W (bottom) -dropout galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左：样本的\(z_{phot}\)分布直方图（上）和\(M_{UV}\)与\(z_{phot}\)的关系（下）。具有光谱确认的天体用红色空心符号和红色直方图标记。我们还绘制了文献中其他经光谱确认的\(z>10\)星系，用绿色数据点表示。右：F090（上）、F115（中）和F150W（下）dropout星系的\(M_{UV}\)分布直方图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Left: \(\beta_{UV}\) versus \(M_{UV}\) for our sample of 161 \(z\geq 7\) galaxies, where the data points are color-coded by redshift. The median \(\beta_{UV}\) and its inner 68 percentile distribution in different \(M_{*}\) bins are denoted with green open squares and error bars. The green solid line indicates our best-fit \(M_{UV}-\beta_{UV}\) linear relation. The black dashed line shows the \(M_{UV}-\beta_{UV}\) relation from topping24 . Right: same as the left panel, but for \(\beta_{UV}\) versus \(M_{*}\) . The black dotted line shows the \(M_{*}-\beta_{UV}\) relation from finkelstein12 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左：161个\(z\geq 7\)星系样本的\(\beta_{UV}\)与\(M_{UV}\)关系，数据点按红移着色。不同\(M_{*}\)区间内的中位\(\beta_{UV}\)及其内部68百分位分布用绿色空心方块和误差棒表示。绿色实线表示我们最佳拟合的\(M_{UV}-\beta_{UV}\)线性关系。黑色虚线表示来自topping24的\(M_{UV}-\beta_{UV}\)关系。右：与左图相同，但为\(\beta_{UV}\)与\(M_{*}\)的关系。黑色点线表示来自finkelstein12的\(M_{*}-\beta_{UV}\)关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The \(M_{*}-\) SFR relation of our galaxy sample. Data points are color-coded in the same manner as Figure 5 . The green line and shaded regions indicate the best-fit SFR \(=\alpha\log(M_{*}/M_{0})+\beta\) relation and the intrinsic scatter, respectively. The black, blue, and magenta dashed lines denote previous results from morishita24 , clarke25 , and rb24 , respectively, at the similar redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：星系样本的\(M_{*}-\)SFR关系。数据点着色方式与图5相同。绿色线和阴影区域分别表示最佳拟合的SFR \(=\alpha\log(M_{*}/M_{0})+\beta\)关系和固有弥散。黑色、蓝色和品红色虚线分别表示来自morishita24、clarke25和rb24在相似红移下的先前结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Examples of galfit fitting results. The left, middle, and right columns show the cutout images of galaxies, best-fit Sérsic profiles, and normalized residuals, respectively. Other sources are masked out in the last column.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：galfit拟合结果示例。左、中、右列分别显示星系的截取图像、最佳拟合Sérsic轮廓和归一化残差。最后一列中其他源已被掩蔽。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 测量暗物质晕的密度分布和质量浓度是检验标准冷暗物质模型的关键。这类天体是暗的，因此难以表征，但可以通过引力透镜进行研究。最近，在一个延伸且极薄的引力弧上发现了一个百万太阳质量的天体。在此，我们报告了对该天体的质量密度分布和红移的各种假设的广泛测试。我们发现，最能描述数据的模型包含两个成分：一个半径≤10 pc的未分辨点质量，位于一个延伸的质量分布中心，该分布在一个139 pc的截断半径内具有几乎恒定的表面密度。这些性质与任何已知的天文天体都不相似。然而，如果该天体是暗物质主导的，其结构与冷暗物质模型不相容，但可能与自相互作用暗物质晕相容，其中央区域已坍缩形成一个黑洞。这一发现可能对我们目前对暗物质的理解产生重大影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这一发现可能对当前暗物质理解具有重要影响，如果该天体是暗物质主导的，其结构支持自相互作用暗物质模型而非标准冷暗物质模型。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary statistics for models of detection \(\cal{V}\) that are the same redshift of the main lens. Inferred parameters of the mass profile models tested for detection \({\cal V}\) that are at the same redshift of the main lens, \(z=0.881\) . \(\Delta\ln{{\cal E}}\) is the Bayes factor relative to the model that fits the best over all those considered. This model is preferred over a model with no perturber by \(\Delta\ln{{\cal E}_{s}}=388\) . Models are listed in order of decreasing \(\Delta\ln{{\cal E}}\) . Here \(M\) is the mass of the extended component within \(r_{max}\) for all NFW models and for the KG ∞ model, and the total mass \(M_{t}\) for all other models. The characteristic radius \(R_{ch}\) is the effective radius of the extended component for all Sérsic models and for the uniform disk with a point-mass (UD+PM) and the Plummer with a point-mass (PLU+PM) models, the truncation radius for all the pseudo-Jaffe (PJ) models, the core radius for all the King models, \(r_{max}\) for all NFW models, and the break radius for the broken power-law (bPL) models. M cyl,90 is the cylindrical mass within a radius of 90 pc. M PM is the total mass of the point-mass component in composite models.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：与主透镜红移相同的探测 \(\cal{V}\) 模型的汇总统计。对于与主透镜相同红移 \(z=0.881\) 的探测 \({\cal V}\) 所测试的质量分布模型的推断参数。\(\Delta\ln{{\cal E}}\) 是相对于所有考虑模型中拟合最佳模型的贝叶斯因子。该模型优于无扰动体模型，其 \(\Delta\ln{{\cal E}_{s}}=388\) 。模型按 \(\Delta\ln{{\cal E}}\) 递减顺序列出。此处，\(M\) 是所有NFW模型和KG ∞模型在 \(r_{max}\) 内的延伸成分质量，以及所有其他模型的总质量 \(M_{t}\) 。特征半径 \(R_{ch}\) 是所有Sérsic模型、均匀盘加点质量（UD+PM）模型和Plummer加点质量（PLU+PM）模型中延伸成分的有效半径，所有伪Jaffe（PJ）模型的截断半径，所有King模型的核半径，所有NFW模型的 \(r_{max}\) ，以及断裂幂律（bPL）模型的断裂半径。M cyl,90 是半径90 pc内的柱质量。M PM 是复合模型中点质量成分的总质量。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Summary statistics for models of detection \(\cal{V}\) where the redshift is a free parameter. \(\Delta\ln{{\cal E}}\) is the Bayes factor relative to the model that fits best over all those considered, that is, the UD+PM in Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：红移为自由参数的探测 \(\cal{V}\) 模型的汇总统计。\(\Delta\ln{{\cal E}}\) 是相对于所有考虑模型中拟合最佳模型（即表1中的UD+PM）的贝叶斯因子。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The cylindrical mass profile ( \(M_{cyl}\) ) for the six best-fitting models at \(z=z_{lens}\) . The vertical lines represent the 20 and 90 pc radii, which is also where the different models most closely agree with each other. The horizontal lines are the corresponding values of \(M_{cyl}\) for the uniform disk and point mass (UD+PM) model. In the legend, models appear in order of decreasing Bayes factor. Note that the top two models, a uniform disk with a point mass and a Sérsic profile with a point mass (denoted UD+PM and SER+PM, respectively), are plotted as a single curve and uncertainty band since the differences between them are too small to be easily distinguished at this plotting scale. Also shown are the cylindrical mass profiles for a broken power-law with a point mass (bPL+PM), a Plummer sphere with a point mass (PLU+PM), a broken power-law (bPL) and a pseudo-Jaffe with a point mass (PJ+PM). The uncertainty bands represent the 1- \(\sigma\) confidence interval around the mean.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在 \(z=z_{lens}\) 处六个最佳拟合模型的柱质量分布（ \(M_{cyl}\) ）。垂直线表示20和90 pc半径，这也是不同模型之间最接近一致的位置。水平线是均匀盘和点质量（UD+PM）模型的相应 \(M_{cyl}\) 值。图例中，模型按贝叶斯因子递减顺序出现。注意，前两个模型（均匀盘加点质量和Sérsic分布加点质量，分别记为UD+PM和SER+PM）被绘制为单条曲线和不确定带，因为在此绘图尺度下它们之间的差异太小而难以区分。还显示了断裂幂律加点质量（bPL+PM）、Plummer球加点质量（PLU+PM）、断裂幂律（bPL）和伪Jaffe加点质量（PJ+PM）的柱质量分布。不确定带表示均值周围的1- \(\sigma\) 置信区间。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Figure 1: Comparison with known stellar systems. Panel (a): Mass and concentration for the GCs in the Milky Way [black circles, 47 ] and for the KG td and KG models of detection \({\cal V}\) (coloured points, mean value and 1- \(\sigma\) uncertainty). Panel (b): relation between stellar mass and effective radius from observations of different types of objects: dSph galaxies at \(z=0\) [green diamonds, 48 ] , strongly lensed star-forming clumps at \(z=2\) to 6 [gray stars, 49 ] , eUCDs in the Virgo cluster [pink squares, 44 ] , dEs, dS0s, nuclear star clusters, GCs, UCDs, cEs and YMCs at \(z=0\) [coral crosses, 48 ] . The yellow diamonds represent simulated star-forming stellar clusters at \(z\sim 6\) . The green, red and black dots are detection \({\cal V}\) when modelled with a Sérsic profile of index \(n\sim 7\) , a King profile and a Sérsic profile of index \(n\rightarrow 0\) with a point-mass, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据图1：与已知恒星系统的比较。面板(a)：银河系中球状星团的质量和浓度[黑色圆圈，47]以及探测 \({\cal V}\) 的KG td和KG模型（彩色点，平均值和1- \(\sigma\) 不确定度）。面板(b)：不同类型天体的恒星质量与有效半径之间的关系：\(z=0\) 的矮椭球星系[绿色菱形，48]，\(z=2\) 至6的强透镜星暴团[灰色星形，49]，室女星系团的超致密矮星系[粉色方块，44]，\(z=0\) 的矮椭圆星系、矮S0星系、核星团、球状星团、超致密矮星系、致密椭圆星系和年轻星团[珊瑚色十字，48]。黄色菱形表示 \(z\sim 6\) 的模拟恒星形成星团。绿色、红色和黑色点分别是探测 \({\cal V}\) 在建模为指数 \(n\sim 7\) 的Sérsic分布、King分布和指数 \(n\rightarrow 0\) 的Sérsic分布加点质量时的结果。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Figure 2: Comparison with CDM predictions. The contours represent the number density of CDM subhaloes with \(M_{{sub}}>10^{5}h^{-1}M_{\odot}\) . These were obtained using the SASHIMI-C semi-analytical subhalo model [ 50 , 51 ] assuming a host redshift and mass of \(z_{h}=0.881\) and \(M_{h}=10^{12}M_{\odot}\) . The coloured crosses show the \(V_{max}\) and \(r_{max}\) mean values and 1- \(\sigma\) uncertainties inferred for different models of the detected object: an NFW profile with free concentration (NFW, \(\Delta\ln{\cal E}=-44\) ), an NFW halo with concentration drawn from the mass-concentration relation in [ 28 ] (NFW CDM,field , \(\Delta\ln{\cal E}=-75\) ) and an NFW subhalo with concentration drawn from [ 29 ] (NFW CDM , \(\Delta\ln{\cal E}=-147\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据图2：与冷暗物质预测的比较。等高线表示 \(M_{{sub}}>10^{5}h^{-1}M_{\odot}\) 的冷暗物质子晕的数密度。这些是使用SASHIMI-C半解析子晕模型[50, 51]获得的，假设宿主红移和质量为 \(z_{h}=0.881\) 和 \(M_{h}=10^{12}M_{\odot}\) 。彩色叉号表示对探测天体不同模型推断的 \(V_{max}\) 和 \(r_{max}\) 平均值及1- \(\sigma\) 不确定度：自由浓度的NFW分布（NFW，\(\Delta\ln{\cal E}=-44\) ），浓度取自[28]中质量-浓度关系的NFW晕（NFW CDM,field，\(\Delta\ln{\cal E}=-75\) ），以及浓度取自[29]的NFW子晕（NFW CDM，\(\Delta\ln{\cal E}=-147\) ）。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Figure 3: Comparison with SIDM predictions. Projected “circular velocity” versus projected radius for different SIDM haloes (solid lines), for their CDM NFW analogues (dashed-dotted lines) and for our best-fit model, a uniform disk with a point mass (UD+PM). The vertical and horizontal lines represent the 90 pc radius at which all models for the detected object agree most closely, and the corresponding circular velocity. The NFW profiles are labelled according to their log values of \(V_{max}\) and \(r_{max}\) . The uncertainty band in the UD+PM curve represent the 1- \(\sigma\) error around the mean value.
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据图3：与自相互作用暗物质预测的比较。不同自相互作用暗物质晕（实线）、其冷暗物质NFW类似物（点划线）以及我们最佳拟合模型（均匀盘加点质量，UD+PM）的投影“环速度”与投影半径的关系。垂直线和水平线表示探测天体所有模型最接近一致的90 pc半径，以及相应的环速度。NFW分布根据其 \(V_{max}\) 和 \(r_{max}\) 的对数值进行标注。UD+PM曲线中的不确定带表示均值周围的1- \(\sigma\) 误差。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Macro-model parameters Inferred macro-model parameters, including the mass and position of detection \({\cal A}\) , for the best-fit case where detection \(\cal{V}\) is modelled as a uniform disk with a point-mass (UD+PM).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：宏模型参数。推断的宏模型参数，包括探测 \({\cal A}\) 的质量和位置，针对探测 \(\cal{V}\) 建模为均匀盘加点质量（UD+PM）的最佳拟合情况。

figures.caption_en: Supplementary Figure 1: Cylindrical mass profiles. Panel (a): cylindrical mass profiles for the uniform disk plus point mass and Sérsic models. Panel (b): cylindrical mass profiles for the Pseudo-Jaffe models. Panel (c): cylindrical mass profiles for the NFW models with a redshift consistent with that of the main lens. Panel (d): cylindrical mass profiles for the power-law models. Panel (e): cylindrical mass profiles for the King models. We do not plot the KG model because it is indistinguishable from the KG ∞ one at this plotting scale. Panel (f): cylindrical mass profiles for the profiles with the redshift as a free parameter. In all panels, the vertical lines represent the 20 and 90 pc radii, which are also where the different models agree most closely. The horizontal lines are the corresponding values of \(M_{cyl}\) for the UD+PM model. In the legends, models appear in order of decreasing Bayes factor. The uncertainty bands represent the 1- \(\sigma\) confidence interval around the mean.
figures.caption_zh: 补充图1：柱质量分布。面板(a)：均匀盘加点质量和Sérsic模型的柱质量分布。面板(b)：伪Jaffe模型的柱质量分布。面板(c)：红移与主透镜一致的NFW模型的柱质量分布。面板(d)：幂律模型的柱质量分布。面板(e)：King模型的柱质量分布。我们不绘制KG模型，因为在此绘图尺度下它与KG ∞模型无法区分。面板(f)：红移为自由参数的分布的柱质量分布。在所有面板中，垂直线表示20和90 pc半径，这也是不同模型最接近一致的位置。水平线是UD+PM模型的相应 \(M_{cyl}\) 值。图例中，模型按贝叶斯因子递减顺序出现。不确定带表示均值周围的1- \(\sigma\) 置信区间。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们呈现了迄今为止最大的类星体上方星系（GOTOQs）星表，这些系统中背景类星体的视线直接穿过或非常接近前景星系。利用来自SDSS DR16和DESI早期数据发布的约110万个类星体光谱，我们在红移范围0.0045 ≤ z ≤ 1.09内识别出1345个独特的GOTOQs，数量是先前已知的四倍以上。该星表结合了吸收无关和吸收选择两种搜索方法，从而能够在投影间距D ≲ 20 kpc处对星系中的气体进行统计稳健的表征。GOTOQ的发射线比表明其宿主星系主要是具有典型尘埃消光A_V ≈ 0.5星等的正常恒星形成盘。我们在D ≲ 20 kpc处测量了MgII覆盖分数，发现其非常高，f_c = 98.2^{+1.3}_{-4.5}%，表明这些系统追踪了盘-晕界面处富含气体、富含金属的区域。朝向类星体视线的中值色余E(B-V) = 0.087，显著高于典型MgII吸收体，凸显了GOTOQ视线富含尘埃的特性。通过高信噪比复合光谱，我们首次统计探测到λ4428处的弥散星际带（W_r = 0.055 ± 0.011埃），揭示了盘-晕界面处复杂有机分子的存在。该星表为未来对内环星系介质中气体流动、冷气体和尘埃演化的多波段研究提供了强大的参考样本。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，GOTOQ目录为研究星系内环星系介质中的气体流动、冷气体和尘埃演化提供了强大的参考样本。这些系统揭示了盘-晕界面区域富含气体、金属和尘埃的特性，并首次统计证实了复杂有机分子的存在，对理解星系化学演化具有重要意义。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Examples of absorption-agnostic GOTOQs. Each row represents a different quasar observed with SDSS, BOSS, and DESI spectrographs, respectively, from top to bottom. In each horizontal panel: the left plot displays the nebular emission lines detected in the continuum-subtracted quasar spectra with the solid blue line representing the Gaussian fits to the nebular emission lines and the right plot shows a composite \(griz\) band DESI-LIS image of the quasar field, with the quasar marked by a red star and the observing fiber outlined by a blue circle. Flux scales in the left panels are in the units of \({10^{-17}\,ergs\,s^{-1}\,cm^{-2}\,\text{\AA }^{-1}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：吸收无关GOTOQ示例。每一行从上到下分别代表使用SDSS、BOSS和DESI光谱仪观测的不同类星体。在每个水平面板中：左侧图显示在连续谱扣除后的类星体光谱中探测到的星云发射线，蓝色实线代表对星云发射线的高斯拟合；右侧图显示类星体场的复合\(griz\)波段DESI-LIS图像，红色星号标记类星体，蓝色圆圈勾勒出观测光纤。左侧面板中的流量标度单位为\({10^{-17}\,ergs\,s^{-1}\,cm^{-2}\,\text{\AA }^{-1}}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Examples of absorption-selected GOTOQs. Each row represents a different quasar observed with SDSS, BOSS, and DESI spectrographs, respectively, from top to bottom. In each horizontal panel: the left plot displays the intervening Mg ii absorption in a continuum-normalized spectrum; the middle plot highlights the nebular emission lines detected in the continuum-subtracted quasar spectra, corresponding to the Mg ii absorption with the solid blue line representing the Gaussian fits to the nebular emission lines; the right plot shows a composite \(griz\) band DESI-LIS image of the quasar field, with the quasar marked by a red star and the observing fiber outlined by a blue circle. Flux scales in the middle panels are in the units of \({10^{-17}\,ergs\,s^{-1}\,cm^{-2}\,\text{\AA }^{-1}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：吸收选择GOTOQ示例。每一行从上到下分别代表使用SDSS、BOSS和DESI光谱仪观测的不同类星体。在每个水平面板中：左侧图显示连续谱归一化光谱中的中间Mg ii吸收；中间图突出显示在连续谱扣除后的类星体光谱中探测到的星云发射线，对应于Mg ii吸收，蓝色实线代表对星云发射线的高斯拟合；右侧图显示类星体场的复合\(griz\)波段DESI-LIS图像，红色星号标记类星体，蓝色圆圈勾勒出观测光纤。中间面板中的流量标度单位为\({10^{-17}\,ergs\,s^{-1}\,cm^{-2}\,\text{\AA }^{-1}}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The redshift distribution of the absorption-agnostic (blue histogram) and absorption-selected (green histogram) GOTOQs. The distribution for the combined sample is depicted in gray.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：吸收无关（蓝色直方图）和吸收选择（绿色直方图）GOTOQ的红移分布。组合样本的分布以灰色显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The kernel density estimations of [O ii ] line luminosities (considering only detections and excluding upper limits) for the GOTOQs in our sample is shown from DESI (blue), BOSS (orange), and SDSS (green). For comparison, the [O ii ] luminosity function of field galaxies at the median redshift of our GOTOQ sample, \(z=0.54\) , is shown as a dashed purple curve. The brown vertical dot-dashed line marks the characteristic [O ii ] luminosity ( \(L^{\star}_{[O\,II]}\) ) at \(z=0.54\) ( Comparat2016 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自DESI（蓝色）、BOSS（橙色）和SDSS（绿色）的样本中GOTOQ的[O ii]线光度（仅考虑探测结果，排除上限）的核密度估计。作为比较，在GOTOQ样本中值红移\(z=0.54\)处场星系的[O ii]光度函数以紫色虚线曲线显示。棕色垂直点划线标记了\(z=0.54\)处的特征[O ii]光度（\(L^{\star}_{[O\,II]}\)）（Comparat2016）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The [O ii ] line luminosities of the GOTOQs captured within the fibers of DESI (blue) SDSS (green) and BOSS (orange) spectrographs are plotted against their redshift. The solid gray line corresponds to the physical area a BOSS fiber covers as a function of redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：DESI（蓝色）、SDSS（绿色）和BOSS（橙色）光谱仪光纤内捕获的GOTOQ的[O ii]线光度随其红移的变化。灰色实线对应BOSS光纤作为红移函数所覆盖的物理面积。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The redshift evolution of the \(H\alpha/H\beta\) line ratios for the GOTOQs in our sample, where \(H\alpha\) line is covered.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：样本中GOTOQ的\(H\alpha/H\beta\)线比的红移演化，其中\(H\alpha\)线被覆盖。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The [O iii ] / [O ii ] line ratios for the GOTOQs in our sample. The green, orange, and blue points correspond to the GOTOQs detected with SDSS, BOSS, and DESI spectrographs respectively. The redshift evolution of the [O iii ] / [O ii ] ratio for the field galaxies, as modeled by a power-law fit from Khostovan2016 , is represented by the solid magenta line, with the shaded region indicating the 1 \(\sigma\) uncertainty.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：样本中GOTOQ的[O iii] / [O ii]线比。绿色、橙色和蓝色点分别对应使用SDSS、BOSS和DESI光谱仪探测到的GOTOQ。来自Khostovan2016的幂律拟合模型所表示的场星系[O iii] / [O ii]比的红移演化以实洋红色线表示，阴影区域表示1 \(\sigma\)不确定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Normalized rest-frame equivalent width distributions of Mg ii absorption systems from the SDSS and DESI-EDR catalogs (blue), compared with those for the GOTOQs (orange). The absorption-selected GOTOQs were specifically searched for corresponding systems in these catalogs and the gray circles correspond to the fraction of GOTOQs in each rest equivalent width bin. The error bars on the detection rates corresponds to the 95% Wilson confidence intervals.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：来自SDSS和DESI-EDR星表的Mg ii吸收系统的归一化静止系等值宽度分布（蓝色），与GOTOQ的分布（橙色）进行比较。吸收选择GOTOQ专门在这些星表中搜索了对应系统，灰色圆圈对应每个静止等值宽度区间内GOTOQ的比例。探测率上的误差棒对应95% Wilson置信区间。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了利用弱透镜质量映射对星系团进行非线性透镜重建的数值研究。最近在成像和剪切估计方面的进展已将可靠的约化剪切测量推向更靠近星系团核心的区域，使得在非线性区域进行质量重建成为可能。然而，基于Kaiser-Squires的算法在星系团核心区域变得不稳定，因为那里的收敛度 $κ$ 显著偏离零，线性近似失效。为了解决这一局限性，我们开发了一个重建框架，包含两个关键修改：对这些区域应用平滑掩模，并使用模型推导的解析解作为初始猜测，而不是假设 $κ= 0$。我们使用已知质量分布的模拟星系团透镜数据验证了我们的框架，其中包含了因约化剪切测量局限性而产生的真实掩模。我们表明，在没有形状噪声的情况下，我们的框架在约化剪切较大的区域实现了高质量的重建，其中表现最佳的方法在未掩模区域的残差低于 $0.02 σ$。这推动了质量重建在非线性区域达到更高精度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：该框架成功地将质量重建扩展到非线性区域，通过处理星系团核心区域的不稳定性问题，实现了更高精度的质量重建，为弱透镜质量映射在非线性区域的应用提供了有效解决方案。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Comparison of standard and modified methods.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：标准方法与修改方法的比较。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Comparison of reconstructed convergence maps for the toy model. Top panels : True convergence \(\kappa_{true}\) , the binary mask with \(g_{th}=0.4\) and masked reduced shear \(g^{m}\) . Middle panels : Normalized residual \(\sigma\) (Eq. 16 ) for KS-based methods K1 and K2 at first and fifth iterations. Lower panels : Same as middle panels but for AKRA-based methods A1 and A2. The blue dashed box indicates the region where the mean \(\sigma\) is computed. The mean \(\sigma\) values are shown in each panel. The inner blue dashed contour outlines the masked region.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：玩具模型的重建收敛度图比较。顶部面板：真实收敛度 \(\kappa_{true}\) ，阈值为 \(g_{th}=0.4\) 的二元掩模，以及掩模后的约化剪切 \(g^{m}\) 。中间面板：基于KS的方法K1和K2在第一次和第五次迭代时的归一化残差 \(\sigma\) （公式16）。底部面板：与中间面板相同，但针对基于AKRA的方法A1和A2。蓝色虚线框表示计算平均 \(\sigma\) 的区域。每个面板中显示了平均 \(\sigma\) 值。内部蓝色虚线轮廓标出了掩模区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Reconstructed convergence maps for the B23 model. Top panels : True convergence map, binary mask with \(g_{th}=0.5\) , and the masked reduced shear \(g^{m}\) . Middle and lower panels : Normalized residuals for KS-based and AKRA-based methods, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：B23模型的重建收敛度图。顶部面板：真实收敛度图，阈值为 \(g_{th}=0.5\) 的二元掩模，以及掩模后的约化剪切 \(g^{m}\) 。中间和底部面板：分别对应基于KS和基于AKRA方法的归一化残差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Iterative reconstruction results under different masking schemes. Top panels: A3 with smooth mask ( \(g_{th}=0.5\) , \(g_{*}=0.3\) ) and normalized residuals. Middle panels: A2 with binary mask ( \(g_{th}=0.8\) ) and normalized residuals. Bottom panels: A3 with smooth mask ( \(g_{th}=0.8\) , \(g_{*}=0.6\) ) and normalized residuals.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：不同掩模方案下的迭代重建结果。顶部面板：使用平滑掩模（ \(g_{th}=0.5\) ， \(g_{*}=0.3\) ）的A3方法及归一化残差。中间面板：使用二元掩模（ \(g_{th}=0.8\) ）的A2方法及归一化残差。底部面板：使用平滑掩模（ \(g_{th}=0.8\) ， \(g_{*}=0.6\) ）的A3方法及归一化残差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Normalized residual maps at iterations 1–5 and 10 for the toy model. Rows from top to bottom correspond to methods K1, K2, A1, and A2. Mean \(\sigma\) values within the evaluation region are indicated in each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：玩具模型在迭代1–5和10时的归一化残差图。从上到下的行分别对应方法K1、K2、A1和A2。每个面板中标出了评估区域内的平均 \(\sigma\) 值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Normalized residual maps at iterations 1–5 and 10 for the B23 model. The panel layout and labeling follow the same convention as in Fig. 4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：B23模型在迭代1–5和10时的归一化残差图。面板布局和标注遵循与图4相同的惯例。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 利用中性氢（HI）的谱线强度映射，若能将信号从极其明亮的射电前景辐射中成功分离，则有望高效绘制宇宙的大尺度结构。这促使人们进行交叉相关分析，以确认所测HI涨落的宇宙学性质，并研究其与星系及底层物质密度场的联系。然而，这些前景辐射使得与投影场（如宇宙微波背景（CMB）的透镜化）的交叉相关变得困难。事实上，相关傅里叶模式沿视线方向变化缓慢，因此最易受到平滑谱射电连续谱前景的污染。本文实现了一种方法，通过尝试测量来自加拿大氢强度映射实验（CHIME）的小尺度21厘米功率与来自普朗克卫星的大尺度CMB透镜化之间的非线性引力耦合，从而避免这一问题。该测量是一种位置依赖的功率谱，即压缩积分双谱。利用94晚CHIME数据（红移范围$1.0 < z < 1.3$）并采用激进的前景滤波，我们发现预期信号比当前噪声小五倍。我们预测，纳入已收集的额外CHIME观测夜数据，无需进一步改进前景清洁滤波，即可实现信噪比为3的探测。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该方法展示了通过非线性引力耦合测量来避免前景污染的可行性。虽然当前数据不足以检测信号，但未来数据积累有望实现显著探测，为HI强度映射与CMB透镜化的交叉相关提供了新途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: We estimate the cross-correlation of the lensing convergence and the variance of the line-of-sight neutral hydrogen fluctuations \(\langle{HI}^{2}\rangle\) fields using a tiled flat-sky approach. Noise-free non-Gaussian simulations of the expected signal from SkyLine (G. Sato-Polito et al., 2023 ) were used to produce the maps shown here.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们使用平铺平面天球方法估计透镜化会聚场与视线方向中性氢涨落方差场\(\langle{HI}^{2}\rangle\)的交叉相关。利用来自SkyLine（G. Sato-Polito等人，2023）的无噪声非高斯模拟生成预期信号，并绘制了此处所示的地图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Gaussian simulations of the 21 cm signal (blue dots) do not capture the three-point correlation function, and thus predict a null cross-power spectrum of CMB lensing and 21 cm variance along the line of sight (Eq ( 8 )). Nonlinear simulations such as SkyLine , based on N-body simulations, are thus needed to predict our signal (orange dots).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：21厘米信号的高斯模拟（蓝点）未能捕捉三点相关函数，因此预测CMB透镜化与视线方向21厘米方差之间的交叉功率谱为零（式(8)）。因此，需要基于N体模拟的非线性模拟（如SkyLine）来预测我们的信号（橙点）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Map of line of sight variance estimated from the filtered CHIME data. The vertical axis is \(\sin\) of the angle from zenith, a coordinate that corresponds to the Fourier conjugate of the telescope’s North-South baseline grid. The locations of bright points sources are masked in a region around their meridian crossing, when they are directly overhead CHIME (small ellipses). For the brightest sources, we additionally mask the tracks they follow as they transit through the far side-lobes of the telescope beam (curved tracks), and all declinations at their transit time (vertical bars). The top and bottom of the map have been smoothly tapered. Residual contamination can be seen near the plane of the Galaxy and along tracks from sources outside the field that are not masked.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：从滤波后的CHIME数据估计的视线方差地图。纵轴是天顶角的正弦\(\sin\)，该坐标对应于望远镜南北基线网格的傅里叶共轭。亮源位置在其过中天区域（即当它们位于CHIME正上方时）被掩蔽（小椭圆）。对于最亮的源，我们额外掩蔽它们穿过望远镜波束远旁瓣时留下的轨迹（弯曲轨迹），以及它们过中天时刻的所有赤纬（竖条）。地图顶部和底部已进行平滑锥化。在银道面附近以及来自未掩蔽场外源的轨迹上，仍可见残余污染。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The measured correlation function for Planck lensing and CHIME variance maps (blue points with error bars) is consistent with noise. Indeed, the chi-squared with respect to the null hypothesis (i.e. no signal model) is \(\chi_{\nu}^{2}=0.90\) , with a PTE of \(0.51\) . This includes the non-zero correlation between data points.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：普朗克透镜化与CHIME方差地图的测量相关函数（带误差棒的蓝点）与噪声一致。实际上，相对于零假设（即无信号模型）的卡方值为\(\chi_{\nu}^{2}=0.90\)，PTE为\(0.51\)。这包含了数据点之间的非零相关性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The correlation matrix between the samples in Figure 4 shows that they are not independent.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：图4中各样本之间的相关矩阵显示它们并非独立。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: We estimate the measurement noise in multiple ways, finding good consistency. From the data alone, we correlate 21 cm tiles with mismatched CMB lensing tiles, obtaining the standard deviation of permutations (purple). We also replace CHIME data with the difference between odd and even nights (red) or with a CHIME noise realization (solid green). Finally, we replace the CHIME data by a noise realization plus the negligible signal from SkyLine and the Planck data by a simulated noise and signal from Agora (dashed green). Given this consistency, we can confidently scale the thermal noise floor with an increased number of CHIME observations (dashed orange), and compare to the expected signal amplitude (dashed black). The result is a factor of about two larger than the sample variance limit (noiseless, dashed blue) due to the finite number of modes measured after all of the required data cuts. Note that in all cases, the restricted frequency band and strict delay filter used in this analysis are maintained.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：我们通过多种方式估计测量噪声，发现一致性良好。仅从数据出发，我们将21厘米平铺块与不匹配的CMB透镜化平铺块进行相关，得到排列的标准差（紫色）。我们还用奇偶夜之差（红色）或CHIME噪声实现（实线绿色）替换CHIME数据。最后，我们用噪声实现加上来自SkyLine的可忽略信号替换CHIME数据，并用模拟噪声和来自Agora的信号替换普朗克数据（虚线绿色）。鉴于这种一致性，我们可以自信地将热噪声基底随CHIME观测次数增加而缩放（虚线橙色），并与预期信号幅度（虚线黑色）比较。结果是，由于所有必要数据切割后测量的模式数有限，该值约为样本方差极限（无噪声，虚线蓝色）的两倍。注意，在所有情况下，本分析中使用的受限频带和严格延迟滤波器均保持不变。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: To assess the impact of the lensing noise on the measurement, we also substitute the noise power spectra forecasted for the SO LAT in P. Ade et al. ( 2019 ) (green) in place of the Planck noise (orange). The fiducial lensing power spectrum is also shown for comparison (blue). Note that SO will not provide the same sky overlap with CHIME as Planck does.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：为评估透镜化噪声对测量的影响，我们还用P. Ade等人（2019）预测的SO LAT噪声功率谱（绿色）替代普朗克噪声（橙色）。同时展示了基准透镜化功率谱以作比较（蓝色）。注意，SO将不会提供与CHIME相同的天区重叠，而普朗克则提供。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: S/N for cross-correlation measurement and simulations that vary the noise properties of the CHIME and lensing maps (see Equation 17 for definition of S/N).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：交叉相关测量及改变CHIME和透镜化地图噪声特性的模拟的信噪比（S/N定义见式(17)）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 规则旋转盘星系的旋转曲线是研究引力势和暗物质分布的独特探针。直到最近，对红移$z>0.5$的星系进行物质分解仍然具有挑战性，这不仅是因为缺乏高分辨率的运动学数据，还因为缺乏能够精确追踪恒星面密度的合适测光数据以及能够追踪冷气体分布的空间分辨亚毫米观测数据。本文分析了来自档案大型运动学分析计划（ALPAKA）样本的三个星系，结合ALMA的高分辨率冷气体观测数据和JWST的静止系近红外成像数据，研究它们的动力学性质并约束其暗物质晕。这些星系最初仅基于ALMA观测被分类为规则旋转盘，在JWST图像中表现为具有旋臂的延展且对称的恒星盘。我们的动力学模型很好地再现了星系外部的旋转，但系统性地低估了内部旋转速度，揭示了相对于数据而言中心质量的不足。这种差异表明，要么是由于恒星质量-光比变化或尘埃消光导致核球质量被低估，要么是存在超大质量黑洞。或者，它可能暗示偏离了标准暗物质晕轮廓，包括增强的中心浓度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，观测与模型之间的差异表明：1）由于恒星质量-光比变化或尘埃消光导致核球质量被低估；2）存在超大质量黑洞；3）偏离标准暗物质晕分布，包括增强的中心浓度。这些发现对高红移星系的暗物质分布和中心质量构成提出了重要问题。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Main properties and data of the three ALPAKA discs studied in this paper. The galaxies were selected based on their kinematic properties, spatial resolution and availability of ancillary JWST data, as explained in the main text. Columns: (i) ALPAKA ID number. (ii) Redshift of the galaxy. (iii) Emission line used for the kinematics. (iv) Corresponding emission-line luminosity. (v) Number of independent resolution elements over the major axis of the ALMA data, defined as the diameter of the gas disc divided by the circularised ALMA beam. (vi) and (vii) JWST imaging filter used for tracing the distribution of the stellar continuum and the corresponding rest-frame pivot wavelength. (viii) and (ix) Stellar mass and star formation rate, respectively (see Rizzo et al. , 2023 , for details) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本文研究的三个ALPAKA盘的主要性质和数据。这些星系是根据其运动学性质、空间分辨率以及辅助JWST数据的可用性选择的，详见正文。列：(i) ALPAKA编号。(ii) 星系红移。(iii) 用于运动学的发射线。(iv) 相应的发射线光度。(v) ALMA数据长轴上的独立分辨率元数量，定义为气体盘直径除以圆化后的ALMA波束。(vi) 和 (vii) 用于追踪恒星连续谱分布的JWST成像滤光片及其相应的静止系中心波长。(viii) 和 (ix) 恒星质量和恒星形成率（详见Rizzo等人，2023）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Top row: ALPAKA subsample of galaxies analysed in this work. The galaxies are organised in ascending order of redshift, from left to right. The gas data (see Table 1 ) are shown as blue contours with levels following \(3\sigma\) , \(6\sigma\) and \(12\sigma\) , where \(\sigma\) is the root-mean-square (RMS) noise of the ALMA moment 0th map of the gas emission. We also show negative emission with dashed contours at the \(-3\sigma\) level and the corresponding ALMA beam on the bottom left of each panel. In the background, we display the JWST filter used for deriving the stellar surface brightness, same as the one reported in Table 1 . The ALMA contours shown here are simply the emission levels on the unmasked 0th-moment maps, therefore they differ from the pseudo-X \(\sigma\) contours shown in Rizzo et al. ( 2023 ) . Bottom row: RGB composite JWST images. We note that the scales in the top and bottom rows are different with a larger FOV on the bottom panels that allow us to see the foreground and background galaxies surrounding ID3 and ID13.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上行：本文分析的ALPAKA子样本星系。星系按红移升序从左到右排列。气体数据（见表1）以蓝色等高线显示，水平为\(3\sigma\)、\(6\sigma\)和\(12\sigma\)，其中\(\sigma\)是ALMA气体发射0阶矩图的均方根（RMS）噪声。我们还用虚线等高线显示负发射，水平为\(-3\sigma\)，并在每个面板的左下方显示相应的ALMA波束。背景中显示用于导出恒星面亮度的JWST滤光片，与表1中报告的相同。此处显示的ALMA等高线仅是未掩膜0阶矩图上的发射水平，因此它们不同于Rizzo等人（2023）中显示的伪X \(\sigma\)等高线。下行：RGB合成JWST图像。我们注意到上行和下行的尺度不同，下面板具有更大的视场，使我们能够看到ID3和ID13周围的前景和背景星系。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Priors for the parameters defining the 2D gas surface brightness models: intensity at the effective radius ( \(I_{{eff}}\) ), effective radius ( \(R_{{eff}}\) ), geometric centre ( \(x_{0}\) , \(y_{0}\) ), ellipticity ( \(\epsilon\) ) and position angle ( \(PA\) ). For the intensity, we arbitrarily chose 1.2 \(\sigma_{{RMS}}\) as the lower bound of the prior. \(\sigma_{{RMS}}\) is the RMS noise in the map.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：定义二维气体面亮度模型参数的先验：有效半径处的强度（\(I_{{eff}}\)）、有效半径（\(R_{{eff}}\)）、几何中心（\(x_{0}\)、\(y_{0}\)）、椭圆率（\(\epsilon\)）和位置角（\(PA\)）。对于强度，我们任意选择1.2 \(\sigma_{{RMS}}\)作为先验的下界。\(\sigma_{{RMS}}\)是图中的RMS噪声。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Rotation curve decomposition priors: fiducial model. The main three parameters we fit are the total gas mass, the total stellar mass and the dark matter mass. The total gas mass is computed by the product of the CO/[CI] luminosity (see Table 1 ) and the gas normalisation, i.e. the CO/[CI] line ratio ( \(r_{l}\) ) times the \(\alpha_{{CO}/{[CI]}}\) conversion. The truncation radius is assumed to be the extent of the gas data, that is the last radius in the CO/[CI] rotation curve. The total stellar mass is let free to vary and it is computed by the sum of the contribution of the disc and bulge masses assuming that the mass-to-light ratio of the bulge is 1.4 times that of the disc. The dark matter mass is computed from the baryonic fraction parameter that is let free to vary uniformly in log space.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：旋转曲线分解先验：基准模型。我们拟合的三个主要参数是总气体质量、总恒星质量和暗物质质量。总气体质量由CO/[CI]光度（见表1）与气体归一化因子（即CO/[CI]线比率\(r_{l}\)乘以\(\alpha_{{CO}/{[CI]}}\)转换因子）的乘积计算得出。截断半径假定为气体数据的范围，即CO/[CI]旋转曲线中的最后一个半径。总恒星质量自由变化，由盘和核球质量的贡献之和计算得出，假设核球的质量-光比是盘的1.4倍。暗物质质量由重子分数参数计算得出，该参数在对数空间中均匀自由变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Surface brightness models of the gas (top panels) and stellar distribution (bottom panels) of ID1. Top left panel: the ALMA moment 0 map is overlayed with yellow contours for the data and orange for the best-fit model, following levels of 3 \(\sigma\) , 6 \(\sigma\) , 9 \(\sigma\) , etc., where \(\sigma\) is the RMS noise in the data. We also show negative contours with dashed gray lines at levels \(-3\sigma\) and \(-6\sigma\) . Top middle panel: noise-normalised residual map defined by (Data \(-\) Model) / RMS. Top right panel: 1D representation of the projected average surface brightness over inclined rings along the major axis of the galaxy. The yellow band represents the data and its uncertainties while the orange solid line represents the best-fit model. Bottom left panel: JWST image in grayscale is overlayed with teal contours for the data and blue for the best-fit model, following levels of 3 \(\sigma\) , 9 \(\sigma\) , 27 \(\sigma\) , etc. above the background, where \(\sigma\) is the RMS noise in the data. Bottom middle panel: noise-normalised residual map defined by (Data \(-\) Model) / RMS. Bottom left panel: 1D representation of the projected average surface brightness over inclined rings along the major axis of the galaxy. The teal band represents the data and the blue solid line represents the total best-fit model which is composed by a stellar disc (dotted dark blue line) and stellar bulge (dashed red line). In both top and bottom right panels we show the circularised ALMA beam/ JWST PSF and the data RMS as vertical dotted and horizontal dashed lines, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：ID1的气体（上面板）和恒星分布（下面板）的面亮度模型。左上方面板：ALMA 0阶矩图叠加了数据的黄色等高线和最佳拟合模型的橙色等高线，水平为3 \(\sigma\)、6 \(\sigma\)、9 \(\sigma\)等，其中\(\sigma\)是数据中的RMS噪声。我们还用灰色虚线显示负等高线，水平为\(-3\sigma\)和\(-6\sigma\)。上中方面板：噪声归一化残差图，定义为（数据\(-\)模型）/ RMS。右上方面板：沿星系长轴倾斜环上投影平均面亮度的一维表示。黄色带表示数据及其不确定性，橙色实线表示最佳拟合模型。左下方面板：灰度JWST图像叠加了数据的青色等高线和最佳拟合模型的蓝色等高线，水平为背景以上3 \(\sigma\)、9 \(\sigma\)、27 \(\sigma\)等，其中\(\sigma\)是数据中的RMS噪声。下中方面板：噪声归一化残差图，定义为（数据\(-\)模型）/ RMS。左下方面板：沿星系长轴倾斜环上投影平均面亮度的一维表示。青色带表示数据，蓝色实线表示总最佳拟合模型，该模型由恒星盘（深蓝色虚线）和恒星核球（红色虚线）组成。在右上和右下方面板中，我们分别用垂直虚线和水平虚线显示圆化后的ALMA波束/JWST PSF和数据RMS。

figures.caption_en: Table 4 : Best-fit parameters of the 2D surface brightness fits to the gas and stars. The gas discs were modelled using our DYNESTY based script and the stellar discs and bulges were modelled using GALFIT . For the latter, we employed a two-iteration fitting process in which the geometric parameters (indicated with an asterisk) were fixed in the second iteration to reduce the number of free parameters. Both the gas and stellar disc are exponential discs and the bulge is a de Vaucouleurs profile. \(R_{eff}\) for the exponential disc is calculated as \(1.678\times R_{d}\)
figures.caption_zh: 表4：气体和恒星二维面亮度拟合的最佳拟合参数。气体盘使用我们基于DYNESTY的脚本建模，恒星盘和核球使用GALFIT建模。对于后者，我们采用了两轮迭代拟合过程，其中几何参数（用星号表示）在第二轮迭代中被固定以减少自由参数的数量。气体盘和恒星盘都是指数盘，核球是德沃库勒轮廓。指数盘的\(R_{eff}\)计算为\(1.678\times R_{d}\)

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Surface brightness models of the gas (top panels) and stellar distribution (bottom panels) of ID3. The panel description is the same as Figure 2 . We note that there are foreground/background galaxies seen visible in the near-infrared (bottom left panel) that are fitted simultaneously to the target galaxy.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：ID3的气体（上面板）和恒星分布（下面板）的面亮度模型。面板描述与图2相同。我们注意到，在近红外（左下方面板）中可见的前景/背景星系与目标星系同时被拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Surface brightness models of the gas (top panels) and stellar distribution (bottom panels) of ID13. The panel description is the same as Figure 2 and, similar to ID3, this galaxy is also surrounded by foreground/background galaxies that are fitted simultaneously.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：ID13的气体（上面板）和恒星分布（下面板）的面亮度模型。面板描述与图2相同，与ID3类似，该星系也被同时拟合的前景/背景星系所包围。

artifacts.abstract_zh:
背景。在星际介质的气相中，仅检测到六种含有N-O键的分子。其中一种是氧化亚氮（N2O），自红外空间天文台（ISO）任务发射以来，人们就一直在寻找其固态形式，但未能发现。詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）的观测能力为识别固态星际N2O提供了可能性。
目的。我们旨在利用相关的N2O星际冰模拟物实验室混合物，在公开的JWST星际冰光谱中，针对一组0类、0/I类和平坦型原恒星样本，识别氧化亚氮。
方法。在10-23 K温度下，获得了以下混合物的实验室红外透射光谱：N2O:CO2=1:20、N2O:CO=1:20、N2O:N2=1:20、N2O:CO2:CO=1:15:5、N2O:CO2:N2=1:15:13。通过将4.44-4.47微米（2250-2235 cm⁻¹）的N-N伸缩吸收带与新的N2O冰模拟物实验室混合物进行拟合，在50颗原恒星的JWST NIRSpec光谱中搜索N2O。
结果。我们首次确认在16颗原恒星中识别出N2O。拟合结果表明，N2O主要形成于富含CO、CO2和N2的冰幔非极性层内。固态N2O的丰度估计为固态CO的0.2-2.1%。我们给出了对应于非极性层的混合物中N2O的谱带强度。此外，还报告了在4.42微米（2260 cm⁻¹）处识别出的C-N伸缩带，我们初步将其归属为HNCO，即最简单的C-N键载体。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，成功利用JWST观测数据首次确认了星际固态N2O的存在，揭示了其在星际冰层非极性层中的形成机制，并报告了可能属于HNCO的C-N伸缩带识别。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : The \(\nu_{3}\) mode of N 2 O in pure N 2 O, N 2 O:H 2 O=1:20 and nitrous oxide in astrochemically relevant matrices corresponding to the apolar layer of ice mantles N 2 O:CO=1:20, N 2 O:N 2 =1:20, N 2 O:CO 2 :N 2 =1:15:13, N 2 O:CO 2 :CO=1:15:5, N 2 O:CO 2 =1:20. Spectra are displayed only for the lowest and the highest temperatures considered in this study.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：纯N2O、N2O:H2O=1:20以及氧化亚氮在对应于冰幔非极性层的天体化学相关基质中的\(\nu_{3}\)模式：N2O:CO=1:20、N2O:N2=1:20、N2O:CO2:N2=1:15:13、N2O:CO2:CO=1:15:5、N2O:CO2=1:20。仅显示本研究考虑的最低和最高温度下的光谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Intensity maps at 4.4 \(\mu\) m with the apertures chosen for the fit. Aperture centers and diameters are listed in Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：4.4 \(\mu\) m处的强度图，显示了为拟合选择的光圈。光圈中心和直径列于表1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Raw and processed observational spectra with fitted polynomial continuum. Anchor points are represented with red dots, fitted continuum with red line. Original and processed observational spectra are shown with orange and black lines, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：原始和处理后的观测光谱，以及拟合的多项式连续谱。锚点用红点表示，拟合的连续谱用红线表示。原始和处理后的观测光谱分别用橙色线和黑色线表示。

Protostar classes are taken from: $a$ $a$ footnotetext: Tobin et al. ( 2016 ) $b$ $b$ footnotetext: Furlan et al. ( 2016 ); Tobin et al. ( 2022 ) $c$ $c$ footnotetext: Launhardt, R. et al.
