( 2018 ) $g$ $g$ footnotetext: For B1-c the ring aperture is used, inner and outer diameters are listed. $h$ $h$ footnotetext: W (white) and g (green) indicate the color of the aperture in Fig. 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：研究对象的参数及拟合导出的量。2 2 2 对于每个源，列出了类别、坐标、光圈直径（D）、N2O温度、N2O、HNCO、13CO2、OCN⁻、CO的柱密度以及N2O相对于CO的丰度（R）。原恒星类别取自：$a$ $a$ 脚注：Tobin等人（2016）$b$ $b$ 脚注：Furlan等人（2016）；Tobin等人（2022）$c$ $c$ 脚注：Launhardt, R.等人（2013）$d$ $d$ 脚注：Chen等人（2016）$e$ $e$ 脚注：Riaz等人（2009）$f$ $f$ 脚注：Ortiz-León等人（2018）$g$ $g$ 脚注：对于B1-c，使用环形光圈，列出了内径和外径。$h$ $h$ 脚注：W（白色）和g（绿色）表示图2中光圈的颜色。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : The list of used absorption band strength values for fit.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：用于拟合的吸收谱带强度值列表。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Observational data at 4.45 \(\mu\) m, fitted curves and Gaussian function for HNCO. Black line represents the observational spectra, dashed — laboratory spectra of N 2 O in apolar environment, short dashed — HNCO Gaussian, green — combined N 2 O feature, and red — full fitted curve.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：4.45 \(\mu\) m处的观测数据、拟合曲线以及HNCO的高斯函数。黑线表示观测光谱，虚线表示非极性环境中N2O的实验室光谱，短虚线表示HNCO的高斯函数，绿色表示组合的N2O特征，红色表示完整的拟合曲线。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 线偏振发射是原恒星喷流中磁场几何结构和粒子加速的有力示踪物。我们对HH 80和HH 81这两个HH天体进行了偏振研究，通过低频段的谱指数测量已确认它们存在非热辐射。我们利用卡尔·G·詹斯基甚大阵列在4-6 GHz频段对HH 80和HH 81进行了观测。与内部喷流结不同，在HH 80和HH 81结处未探测到线偏振。我们将偏振强度的$3σ$上限设为$30~μ$Jy，对应的分数偏振上限分别为HH 80的$Π_{\max}\approx0.02$和HH 81的$Π_{\max}\approx0.01$。为解释这一未探测结果，我们评估了同步辐射偏振的条件以及退偏振机制的影响。这些最外侧HH天体的激波冷却参数$χ_\mathrm{s}$低于内部结，表明HH 80-81中的反向激波在加速相对论电子方面效率低于内部结。此外，法拉第退偏振似乎很严重：估计的旋转测量色散$σ_{\rm RM}\sim400~\mathrm{rad~m^{-2}}$与观测到的RM值相当或更大。这与强涨落和湍流一致。结合波束退偏振，这些效应可将可观测的分数偏振通量密度抑制到可探测阈值以下。我们得出结论：与内部结相比，加速效率降低以及强退偏振效应共同导致了HH 80和HH 81处偏振发射的缺失。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，HH 80和HH 81缺乏偏振发射是由于与内部结相比电子加速效率降低，以及强退偏振效应（包括法拉第退偏振和波束退偏振）共同作用的结果，这些效应将可观测的分数偏振通量密度抑制到检测阈值以下。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: (a) Linearly polarized emission observed toward the inner jet lobes of I18162. The white contours overlaid on the image are the Stokes I contours ( \((6,9,12,15,30,120),\sigma\) , where \(\sigma=10~\mu{Jy/beam}\) .), which are identical to the black contours in panel (b). (b) Total intensity radio map of the HH 80-81 region at the VLA C band, where the beam size is \(9^{\prime\prime}.5\times 6^{\prime\prime}.0\) . (c) Linearly polarized map towards HH 80 and HH 81, with Stokes I contours. The cyan ellipse at the bottom-left corner of the middle panel shows the beam size. The colour bar is shown on the top of the image.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：(a) 朝向I18162内部喷流叶观测到的线偏振发射。图像上叠加的白色等高线是Stokes I等高线 ( \((6,9,12,15,30,120),\sigma\) ，其中 \(\sigma=10~\mu{Jy/beam}\) )，与面板(b)中的黑色等高线相同。(b) VLA C波段HH 80-81区域的总强度射电图，波束大小为 \(9^{\prime\prime}.5\times 6^{\prime\prime}.0\) 。(c) 朝向HH 80和HH 81的线偏振图，叠加有Stokes I等高线。中间面板左下角的青色椭圆表示波束大小。色标显示在图像顶部。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: A plot of the shock velocity ( \(v_{s}\) ) as a function of the jet radius ( \(r_{jet}\) ), with \(\chi_{{s}}\) values shown using a colour scale for comparison between the inner knots and HH 80-81. The \(\chi_{{s}}\) values derived for each knot are indicated by grey points, and the corresponding colour bar is displayed on the right-hand side of the plot.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：激波速度 ( \(v_{s}\) ) 作为喷流半径 ( \(r_{jet}\) ) 的函数图，其中 \(\chi_{{s}}\) 值用色标表示，用于比较内部结与HH 80-81。每个结推导出的 \(\chi_{{s}}\) 值用灰色点表示，相应的色标显示在图的右侧。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Details of the shock types, physical parameters and estimated properties for the jet knots HH 80 and HH 81. a a footnotetext: Cooling length \(\left({d_{{cool}}}/{{cm}}\right)\;\approx\;1.8\times 10^{14}\;\left({v_{s}}/{100\ {km\ s^{-1}}}\right)^{4.67}\left({100\ {cm^{-3}}}/{n}\right)\) for \(v_{s}>60\) km s -1 b b footnotetext: Cooling length \(\left({d_{{cool}}}/{{cm}}\right)\;\approx\;2.24\times 10^{14}\;\left({v_{s}}/{100\ {km\ s^{-1}}}\right)^{4.5}\left({100\ {cm^{-3}}}/{n}\right)\) for \(v_{s}>400\) km s -1
figures.caption_zh: 表1：喷流结HH 80和HH 81的激波类型、物理参数和估计性质的详细信息。a a 脚注文本：冷却长度 \(\left({d_{{cool}}}/{{cm}}\right)\;\approx\;1.8\times 10^{14}\;\left({v_{s}}/{100\ {km\ s^{-1}}}\right)^{4.67}\left({100\ {cm^{-3}}}/{n}}\right)\) 对于 \(v_{s}>60\) km s -1 b b 脚注文本：冷却长度 \(\left({d_{{cool}}}/{{cm}}\right)\;\approx\;2.24\times 10^{14}\;\left({v_{s}}/{100\ {km\ s^{-1}}}\right)^{4.5}\left({100\ {cm^{-3}}}/{n}}\right)\) 对于 \(v_{s}>400\) km s -1

artifacts.abstract_zh: 阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列和詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜正在改变我们对早期宇宙中星系形成和演化的理解。通过结合它们的能力，这些天文台在空间分辨尺度上提供了对高红移星系中气体、尘埃和恒星的前所未有的洞察，揭示了它们星际介质、运动学、形态、活动星系核和恒星形成活动的复杂性。本综述总结了宇宙历史最初十亿年星系研究的最新突破，突出了关键发现、未解问题和当前局限性。我们讨论了观测、理论模型和模拟如何塑造我们对早期星系演化的理解，并指出了未来研究的有前景方向。虽然通过优化利用现有设施和合作努力可以取得显著进展，但进一步的进展需要更高的角分辨率和灵敏度，这要求升级现有仪器并开发下一代天文台。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要：虽然现有设施和合作努力可以取得显著进展，但未来需要更高的角分辨率和灵敏度，这要求升级现有仪器并开发下一代天文台，以推动早期星系演化研究的进一步发展。

artifacts.abstract_zh: We study the flow of gas in a barred-galaxy model, in which a considerable part of the underlying stable periodic orbits have loops where, close to the ends of the bar, several orbital families coexist and chaos dominates. Such conditions are typically encountered in a zone between the 4:1 resonance and corotation. The purpose of our study is to understand the gaseous flow in the aforementioned environment and trace the morphology of the shocks that form. We use two conceptually different hydrodynamic schemes for our calculations, namely, the mesh-free Lagrangian SPH method and the adaptive mesh refinement code RAMSES. This allows us to compare responses by means of the two algorithms. We find that the big loops of the orbits, mainly belonging to the x1 stable periodic orbits, do not help the shock loci to approach corotation. They deviate away from the regions occupied by the loops, bypass them and form extensions at an angle with the straight-line shocks. Roughly at the distance from the center at which we start to observe the big loops, we find characteristic "tails" of dense gas streaming towards the straight-line shocks. The two codes give complementary information for understanding the hydrodynamics of the models.
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 在棒旋星系模型的轨道环区域，气体流动表现出复杂的激波形态，轨道环结构对激波位置有显著影响，两种流体力学方法的结合使用能更全面地理解该环境下的气体动力学行为。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The circular speed \(v_{c}=\sqrt{r\frac{d\Phi_{0}}{dr}}\) ( a ) and the k = 2 ( b ), k = 4 ( c ) and k = 6 ( d ) components of the potential, normalized by \(\Phi_{0}\) , as a function of the radius \(r\) . From ( b – d ), magenta curves refer to the cosine and green to the sine terms.

Figure 2: ( a – h ): Successive snapshots of the stellar response model. Lighter regions correspond to denser regions, according to the logarithmic color bar at the bottom of the panels. The number of pattern rotations is given at the upper-left corner of the frames. The red dots indicate the location of L 1 ( top ), L 2 ( bottom ), L 4 ( right ) and L 5 ( left ) of the bar. The bar rotates counterclockwise.

Figure 3: Characteristics of the main families of POs, x1 and f, projected in the ( \(E_{J}\) , \(x_{0}\) ) plane. Stable parts of these curves are plotted with black, while unstable with red, color. The zero-velocity curve is the thick green curve, having at its local maximum the L 4 point. The area between the \(E_{J}\) ’s of L 1 and L 4 is shaded with cyan color. In the embedded frame, we give an enlargement of the characteristics of all main families close to the center of the system (see text). The x2-x3 loop is plotted with magenta, the x1 characteristic with balck and that of x4 with blue color.

Figure 4: Periodic orbits with loops. ( a ) Stable orbits of x1 are plotted with black and an unstable f with pairs of loops at its apocenters is plotted with grey. ( b ) Two stable f orbits (black and cyan) and an unstable in grey. ( c ) POs with loops beyond the 4:1 resonance. The grey belongs to f, while the two others (black and cyan) to x1.

Figure 5: ( a ) Three orbits with loops, plotted with black, green and red color) that follow different paths and eventually cross the corotation region \(((x_{L_{1,2}},y_{L_{1,2}})=(\pm 1.21,\pm 9.65))\) . ( b ) The central part of the \((x,\dot{x})\) surface of section at \(E_{J}=-\) 111,723. The location of x1 and f are indicated with a green and magenta dot, respectively. The left empty part (roughly for \(x -0.5\) is due to the fact that orbits with initial conditions in this region are practically escape orbits (they intersect the surface of section at large distances, outside the frame of panel).

Figure 6: The f PO for \(E_{J}=-\) 118,092 (in black) together with two sticky periodic orbits (red and green) at the same energy, integrated for about three periods of f. The orbits do not reach the unstable Lagrangian points, located at \((x_{L_{1,2}},y_{L_{1,2}})=(\pm 1.21,\pm 9.65)\) .

Figure 7: The SPH response without redistribution of the particles, during the growing phase of the bar, for \(t=0.52\) ( a ) and for \(t=0.65\) ( b ). The artificial viscosity parameters we used are \((\alpha,\beta)=(0.5,1)\) . In this, and in all relevant subsequent figures, the bar rotates counterclockwise. Red dots indicate the Lagrangian points of the model.

Figure 8: Characteristic snapshots of a typical model with redistribution of particles in action, at \(t=0.53\) ( a ) and \(t=9.83\) ( b ). In ( c ) we give a sketch that outlines the dense parts of the model. In the text, the green features, indicated with arrows, are described as “ \(\Gamma\) / L tails”. We draw the straight-line dust lane shocks and its continuations with cyan and yellow color respectively.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 暗物质晕的结构通常由宇宙学模拟启发的径向密度轮廓描述。这些轮廓通常假定具有固定的函数形式（例如NFW），并带有一些可通过观测约束的自由参数。然而，依赖模拟的缺点是，所得轮廓取决于暗物质模型和重子物理实现，而这些都具有高度不确定性。相反，我们提出了一种直接从观测约束晕密度轮廓的方法。这是通过一种称为穷举符号回归（ESR）的符号回归算法实现的。ESR搜索拟合数据的最优解析表达式，兼顾准确性和简洁性。我们将ESR应用于HSC-XXL巡天中的149个星系团样本，以确定在整个样本中表现最佳的函数形式。我们识别出在最小描述长度准则下统计上优于NFW的密度轮廓。在弱引力透镜数据探测的径向范围（$R \sim 0.3 - 3$ h$^{-1}$ Mpc）内，排名最高的ESR轮廓表现出浅的内部行为和密度轮廓中的最大值。作为实际应用，我们展示了如何使用最佳拟合的ESR模型来获得包围质量估计。我们发现，平均而言，这些质量高于使用NFW推导的质量，这突显了假设错误密度轮廓时潜在偏差的来源。这些结果对利用星系团的分析（例如，根据星系团丰度和成团性对$σ_8$和$Ω_m$的宇宙学约束）具有重要的连锁效应。除了HSC数据集外，该方法可随时应用于任何约束星系和星系团中暗物质分布的数据，例如其他弱引力透镜巡天、星系旋转曲线或互补探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：该方法可直接从观测约束暗物质分布，避免模拟依赖性。错误密度分布假设可能导致质量估计偏差，进而影响基于星系团的宇宙学约束（如σ₈和Ωₘ）。该方法可广泛应用于其他弱透镜巡天、星系旋转曲线等暗物质分布探测数据。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Example weak-lensing ESD measurements for three clusters spanning the range of SNRs in the XXL–HSC sample. The first three panels show clusters with low (Cluster XLSSC \(77\) , SNR \(=-0.1\) ), medium (Cluster XLSSC \(101\) , SNR \(=3.4\) ), and high (Cluster XLSSC \(91\) , SNR \(=7.4\) ) weak-lensing SNRs. Points denote the measured ESD ( \(\Delta\Sigma\) ) with associated shape-noise uncertainties and the blue dashed marks \(\Delta\Sigma=0\) . The fourth panel shows the distribution of weak-lensing SNR for all clusters in the sample. The median SNR is \(1.25\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：XXL–HSC样本中跨越信噪比范围的三个星系团的示例弱引力透镜ESD测量值。前三个面板显示低（星系团XLSSC \(77\) ，信噪比 \(=-0.1\) ）、中（星系团XLSSC \(101\) ，信噪比 \(=3.4\) ）和高（星系团XLSSC \(91\) ，信噪比 \(=7.4\) ）弱引力透镜信噪比的星系团。点表示测量的ESD（ \(\Delta\Sigma\) ）及相关的形状噪声不确定性，蓝色虚线标记 \(\Delta\Sigma=0\) 。第四个面板显示样本中所有星系团的弱引力透镜信噪比分布。中位信噪比为 \(1.25\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Illustration of parameter uncertainty estimation from the conditional likelihood \(\mathcal{L}(\theta_{i})\) . The red dashed line marks the maximum-likelihood (ML) estimate, and the shaded region corresponds to the 68% confidence interval. For our analysis, we define a symmetric uncertainty \(\pm\hat{\sigma}\) (blue dashed lines), where \(\hat{\sigma}\) is set to the larger of the two distances from the ML value to the boundaries of the 68% confidence interval.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：基于条件似然 \(\mathcal{L}(\theta_{i})\) 的参数不确定性估计示意图。红色虚线标记最大似然（ML）估计，阴影区域对应68%置信区间。在我们的分析中，我们定义对称不确定性 \(\pm\hat{\sigma}\) （蓝色虚线），其中 \(\hat{\sigma}\) 设置为从ML值到68%置信区间边界的两个距离中较大的一个。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Top functions found by ESR applied to the sample of \(149\) HSC galaxy clusters, ranked by total description length. The total description length is decomposed in three terms: the accuracy term (“Residuals”), the parameters complexity term (“Parameter”) and the structural complexity term (“Function”). To calculate the total description length using the Katz prior (“Total Katz”), we replace the “Function” column with the “Katz” column. All functions presented here use exclusively local (i.e. separate per-cluster) parameters. For each model we also report the relative probability \(P(f_{i}|D)\) , obtained by normalising \(\exp(-L(D)_{i})\) over all functions. We additionally include several commonly used literature profiles: NFW (Navarro et al. , 1997 ) , generalised NFW (gNFW; Evans and An 2006 ), Einasto (Einasto, 1965 ) , Burkert (Burkert, 1995 ) , and Dekel–Zhao (Freundlich et al. , 2020 ) ), written in the ESR functional language and evaluated using the same description-length formalism. .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：ESR应用于 \(149\) 个HSC星系团样本找到的顶级函数，按总描述长度排序。总描述长度分解为三项：精度项（“残差”）、参数复杂度项（“参数”）和结构复杂度项（“函数”）。要使用Katz先验（“总Katz”）计算总描述长度，我们将“函数”列替换为“Katz”列。此处呈现的所有函数都仅使用局部（即每个星系团单独）参数。对于每个模型，我们还报告相对概率 \(P(f_{i}|D)\) ，通过对所有函数归一化 \(\exp(-L(D)_{i})\) 获得。我们还额外包含几个常用的文献轮廓：NFW（Navarro et al. , 1997 ）、广义NFW（gNFW; Evans and An 2006）、Einasto（Einasto, 1965）、Burkert（Burkert, 1995）和Dekel–Zhao（Freundlich et al. , 2020），它们用ESR函数语言编写并使用相同的描述长度形式进行评估。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Best-fitting functions at ecah complexity according to the change in description length, \(\Delta L(D)\) , and the likelihood, \(\mathcal{L}\) , relative to the corresponding minima. The markers show the position in the \(L(D)\) plane (red) and likelihood plane (blue) of some common dark matter halo profiles. The Burkert and Dekel-Zhao profiles are not included here for clarity, since they have very poor \(L(D)\) . Only the \(L(D)\) values without the Katz prior are shown, since including the Katz prior produces very similar results. The two NFW points correspond to two parametrisations used in the analysis. NFW \(1\) is the standard form, \(\rho(r)=\theta_{0}/(r(|\theta_{1}|+r)^{2})\) and NFW \(2\) is \(\rho(r)=\theta_{0}/(r(1/|\theta_{1}|+r)^{2})\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：根据相对于相应最小值的描述长度变化 \(\Delta L(D)\) 和似然 \(\mathcal{L}\) 的最佳拟合函数。标记显示了某些常见暗物质晕轮廓在 \(L(D)\) 平面（红色）和似然平面（蓝色）中的位置。为清晰起见，此处未包含Burkert和Dekel-Zhao轮廓，因为它们的 \(L(D)\) 非常差。仅显示没有Katz先验的 \(L(D)\) 值，因为包含Katz先验会产生非常相似的结果。两个NFW点对应于分析中使用的两种参数化。NFW \(1\) 是标准形式， \(\rho(r)=\theta_{0}/(r(|\theta_{1}|+r)^{2})\) ，NFW \(2\) 是 \(\rho(r)=\theta_{0}/(r(1/|\theta_{1}|+r)^{2})\) 。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Top-ranked functions with some global parameters. The information displayed is the same as in Table ˜ 1 . Parameters set to global are highlighted in bold red. For comparison, the gNFW with \(\theta_{2}\) as a global parameter is also included. The “Rank” column shows each function’s position relative to the complete list of all models analysed in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：具有某些全局参数的顶级排名函数。显示的信息与表˜ 1相同。设置为全局的参数以粗体红色突出显示。为了比较，还包含了 \(\theta_{2}\) 作为全局参数的gNFW。“排名”列显示每个函数相对于本工作中分析的所有模型完整列表的位置。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: This table presents a subset of functions that are analytically integrable and thus have analytical mass profiles. As in Table ˜ 2 , the “Rank” column shows each function’s position relative to the complete list of all models analysed in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：本表呈现了可解析积分从而具有解析质量轮廓的函数子集。与表˜ 2一样，“排名”列显示每个函数相对于本工作中分析的所有模型完整列表的位置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Plots of the top \(2\) best-fitting functions, together with the top analytically integrable functions discussed in the text. The NFW profile is also shown for comparison. The top panels correspond to cluster XLSSC \(91\) , which has the highest SNR in the sample, while the bottom panels show cluster XLSSC \(101\) , which is a medium SNR cluster. These two clusters are also shown in Fig. ˜ 1 . Left panels: ESD fits to the data. The horizontal dashed line marks zero. Right panels: Corresponding density profiles plotted over a wide radial range. The vertical dashed lines indicate the radial range covered by the data. Shaded regions represent the \(68\%\) credible intervals derived from the posterior parameter distributions.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：前 \(2\) 个最佳拟合函数以及文中讨论的顶级可解析积分函数的图。同时显示NFW轮廓以作比较。上面板对应星系团XLSSC \(91\) ，它是样本中信噪比最高的星系团，而下面板显示星系团XLSSC \(101\) ，它是一个中信噪比星系团。这两个星系团也在图˜ 1中显示。左面板：数据的ESD拟合。水平虚线标记零。右面板：在宽径向范围内绘制的相应密度轮廓。垂直虚线表示数据覆盖的径向范围。阴影区域表示从后验参数分布推导出的 \(68\%\) 可信区间。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison of enclosed mass estimates, \(M_{{mESR}}\) , obtained from the weighted combination of our best-fitting functions against those derived from the standard NFW profile, \(M_{{NFW}}\) for XXL clusters with a signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) higher than \(2.5\) . The top panel shows the results in log–log space. The dashed black line indicates the 1:1 relation, while the solid red line shows the best-fit linear relation obtained using the roxy package, with the shaded region representing the \(1\sigma\) confidence interval. The bottom panel shows the stacked posterior distribution of the logarithmic mass ration \(\delta_{i}=\log_{10}(M_{{mESR}}/M_{{NFW}})\) . Each cluster contributes its individual posterior, built by propagating the uncorrelated uncertainties on both mass estimates under a Gaussian approximation. The black dashed line shows the \(1:1\) relation and the solid red line marks median of the stacked distribution, \(\langle\delta\rangle=0.17\) dex.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：对于信噪比（SNR）高于 \(2.5\) 的XXL星系团，从最佳拟合函数的加权组合获得的包围质量估计 \(M_{{mESR}}\) 与标准NFW轮廓推导的 \(M_{{NFW}}\) 的比较。上面板显示对数-对数空间的结果。黑色虚线表示1:1关系，红色实线表示使用roxy包获得的最佳拟合线性关系，阴影区域表示 \(1\sigma\) 置信区间。下面板显示对数质量比 \(\delta_{i}=\log_{10}(M_{{mESR}}/M_{{NFW}})\) 的堆叠后验分布。每个星系团贡献其个体后验，通过在高斯近似下传播两个质量估计的不相关不确定性构建。黑色虚线表示 \(1:1\) 关系，红色实线标记堆叠分布的中位数， \(\langle\delta\rangle=0.17\) dex。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告在一颗强引力透镜化的星系中（红移$z\sim7$，位于PLCKG004.5-10.5星系团后方）发现了一对微弱的“小红点”（LRDs），命名为“红眼”，该发现源自JWST遗产项目VENUS。“红眼”在像平面上空间可分辨且颜色不同，而临界曲线位于“红眼”以北很远，明确要求存在两个不同的LRD而非单个LRD。“红眼”是一对极近的LRD，在源平面上的间距为$\sim70\,\mathrm{pc}$，放大率为$μ\sim20$，这一致地解释了西北方向探测到的另一个对应像。“红眼”位于一个典型的恒星形成星系中，其内禀紫外星等$M_{\mathrm{UV,int}}\sim -19$，但LRD自身的紫外辐射非常微弱（$M_{\mathrm{UV,int}} \gtrsim -16$）。此外，“红眼”并不位于星系中心，而是偏离中心约一个有效半径$R_{\mathrm{e}}$的位置。若无引力透镜效应，“红眼”将表现为一个典型的$z\sim 7$恒星形成星系（$M_{\mathrm{UV}}\sim -19$），在形态或能谱分布上均无明显的LRD特征。这些结果表明，类似于“红眼”的多个偏离中心的LRD可能普遍隐藏在高红移典型恒星形成星系中。在这种情况下，可能出现多种合理的解释场景，其中之一是：恒星盘上的星团中可能形成中等质量黑洞（IMBHs），其质量$M_\mathrm{BH}\sim10^{4\text{--}6}\,M_\odot$，并通过并合促进中心超大质量黑洞的生长，其中一些IMBHs在足够活跃且质量足够大的阶段可作为明亮的LRD被探测到。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：典型高红移恒星形成星系中可能隐藏着多个离中心的LRDs，这些可能是恒星盘中星团形成的中等质量黑洞，通过并合促进中心超大质量黑洞的生长，在活跃期可作为明亮的LRDs被探测到。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: RGB composite image (R: F356W+F444W, G: F200W+F277W, B: F115W+F150W) of the PLCK G004-10.5 cluster. The red contours indicate the critical curves at \(z=7.4\) . LRD and SFG images are highlighted by annotated inset figures.
figures.caption_zh: 图1: PLCK G004-10.5星系团的RGB合成图像（R: F356W+F444W, G: F200W+F277W, B: F115W+F150W）。红色等高线表示红移\(z=7.4\)处的临界曲线。LRD和SFG图像由带注释的插图突出显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: LRD selection using colors (the top panels) and slope fitting (the bottom panels). The black lines show the LRD selection threshold. The red and blue symbols indicate the LRD and SFG images, respectively. The circles, diamonds, and squares represent the SW, NW, and NE images, respectively. The LRD-SW1, SW2, and NW satisfy all of the LRD selection criteria, while the SFG components do not. The cyan stars denote the intrinsic colors and slopes of the whole system (i.e., corrected for the gravitational lensing; Section IV.2 ). Without gravitational lensing, Red Eyes would not be identified as an LRD.
figures.caption_zh: 图2: 利用颜色（上方面板）和斜率拟合（下方面板）进行LRD选择。黑色线条表示LRD选择阈值。红色和蓝色符号分别表示LRD和SFG图像。圆形、菱形和正方形分别代表SW、NW和NE图像。LRD-SW1、SW2和NW满足所有LRD选择标准，而SFG成分则不满足。青色星号表示整个系统的内禀颜色和斜率（即经引力透镜校正后；第四节IV.2）。若无引力透镜效应，“红眼”将不会被识别为LRD。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: (Top) HST and NIRCam cutouts of the SW image. The rightmost panel represents the segmentation image. (Bottom) Photometry and best-fit SEDs for the SW images. The blue points indicate the observed photometry, with upper limits shown at the \(3\sigma\) level. The photometry and upper limit values are not corrected for the magnification. The red curves show the best-fit SEDs consisting of galaxy and blackbody components, while the red circles indicate the best-fit photometry. The gray curves in the bottom two panels represent the best-fit SEDs without the blackbody component. The models without the blackbody component favor the solutions invoking dusty SFGs, which significantly underestimate the UV continuum due to the strong dust attenuation. The posterior redshift distribution is shown in the top-left corner of each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图3: （上）SW图像的HST和NIRCam局部放大图。最右侧面板为分割图像。（下）SW图像的光度测量和最佳拟合能谱分布。蓝色点表示观测光度，上限以\(3\sigma\)水平显示。光度测量和上限值未经过放大率校正。红色曲线显示由星系和黑体成分组成的最佳拟合能谱分布，红色圆圈表示最佳拟合光度。下方两个面板中的灰色曲线表示不含黑体成分的最佳拟合能谱分布。不含黑体成分的模型倾向于支持涉及尘埃SFG的解决方案，由于强烈的尘埃消光，这些方案显著低估了紫外连续谱。每个面板左上角显示了后验红移分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Same as Figure 3 , but for the NW image.
figures.caption_zh: 图4: 与图3相同，但针对NW图像。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Same as Figure 3 , but for the NE image.
figures.caption_zh: 图5: 与图3相同，但针对NE图像。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Source plane reconstruction. From left to right, each column represents the observed, modeled, residual of the F444W image.
figures.caption_zh: 图6: 源平面重建。从左到右，每列分别表示F444W图像的观测、模型和残差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Source plane image. The scale bar indicates 500 physical pc at \(z=7.4\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图7: 源平面图像。比例尺表示红移\(z=7.4\)处500物理秒差距。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Intrinsic SEDs obtained by multi-band source plane reconstruction (Section IV.2 ). The blue points indicate the SED for the SFG (sum of all of the star-forming clumps and diffuse component), while the red and pink points represent that for each of the LRD pair.
figures.caption_zh: 图8: 通过多波段源平面重建获得的内禀能谱分布（第四节IV.2）。蓝色点表示SFG（所有恒星形成团块和弥散成分的总和）的能谱分布，红色和粉色点分别表示LRD对中每个LRD的能谱分布。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 推断高红移星系的恒星形成率（SFR）仍具挑战性，这源于观测限制或连接光度与SFR的校准方法中的不确定性。我们利用两个最先进的流体动力学模拟NewHorizon和NewCluster，并通过辐射传输代码Skirt进行后处理，以研究z=5星系（一个星系积累其恒星质量的时期）中推断SFR的系统性不确定性和偏差。我们为广泛使用的示踪剂创建了合成可观测数据：Hα星云线、[CII] 158微米精细结构线、总红外（IR）连续谱光度以及混合（IR + UV）示踪剂。我们发现，Hα推断的SFR（在10 Myr时间尺度上平均）对校准的选择敏感，并表现出由尘埃消光、视角和尘埃-金属比驱动的显著弥散。采用更陡的消光曲线可显著减少这种弥散，但无法完全消除系统性不确定性。当可获得静止框架8至1000微米之间良好采样的连续谱发射时，基于IR连续谱的SFR可追踪在100 Myr时间尺度上平均的固有SFR，而当IR数据有限时，典型方法会低估它们。尽管如此，IR SFR仍显示出相当大的弥散，这主要源于UV光子泄漏和恒星形成历史的强烈变化。当UV数据可用时，混合（IR + UV）SFR提供了更稳健的估计，与基于IR的SFR相比减少了弥散，同时避免了明确的消光校正。最后，我们推导出一个[CII]-SFR关系，发现其比先前研究更陡，但存在与气体密度和金属丰度相关的显著弥散。总体而言，IR、混合和[CII]基示踪剂在光学深度变化下比Hα更稳健。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，IR、混合和[CII]基示踪剂在光学深度变化下比Hα更稳健，混合(IR+UV)方法提供最可靠的SFR估计，而[CII]方法需要进一步考虑气体密度和金属丰度的影响。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Physical properties of the NewHorizon and NewCluster selected galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：NewHorizon和NewCluster选定星系的物理性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Projection of the gas mass (left) and post-processed Skirt output of the H \(\alpha\) (middle) and [ Cii ] (right) emission of the most and least massive NewCluster (top two rows) and NewHorizon (bottom two rows) galaxies in a face-on configuration. The bar shows the physical scale of each source in kpc.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：正面朝向配置下，质量最大和质量最小的NewCluster（上两行）及NewHorizon（下两行）星系的气体质量投影（左）以及后处理Skirt输出的H \(\alpha\)（中）和[ Cii ]（右）发射。条形图显示每个源在kpc中的物理尺度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Integrated spectral energy distribution of one representative NewCluster galaxy as produced by the Skirt radiative transfer simulations assuming a dust-to-metal ratio of 16%. Left: Full SED in the observed frame, shown for both the face-on (black) and edge-on (teal) configurations, spanning wavelengths from the ultra-violet to the millimeter. Shaded vertical regions show the coverage of ALMA bands 3, 7, and 9, and the dashed line demonstrates the JWST IFU range. Right: Examples of continuum-subtracted emission lines extracted from the same SED.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：一个代表性NewCluster星系的积分光谱能量分布，由Skirt辐射传输模拟生成，假设尘埃-金属比为16%。左：观测坐标系中的完整SED，显示正面朝向（黑色）和边缘朝向（青色）两种配置，波长范围从紫外到毫米。阴影垂直区域显示ALMA波段3、7和9的覆盖范围，虚线表示JWST IFU范围。右：从同一SED中提取的连续谱减除发射线示例。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: H \(\alpha\) -derived SFRs using Eq. 3 versus SFR \({}_{10\,Myr}\) for NewCluster (black squares) and NewHorizon (red circles) simulated galaxies in a face-on configuration. The identity line is shown in black, the purple and orange dotted lines show the best-fit of the H \(\alpha\) -derived SFRs using the conversion of Reddy et al. ( 2022 ) and Murphy et al. ( 2011 ) , respectively (see Sect. 4.1 for details). In the top left corner, the slopes and offsets are shown with the same color code as the lines, and the scatter \(\sigma\) of the inferred SFRs.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：使用公式3推导的H \(\alpha\) SFR与正面朝向配置下NewCluster（黑色方块）和NewHorizon（红色圆圈）模拟星系的SFR \({}_{10\,Myr}\)对比。黑色实线为恒等线，紫色和橙色虚线分别显示使用Reddy等人（2022）和Murphy等人（2011）转换的H \(\alpha\) 推导SFR的最佳拟合（详见第4.1节）。左上角显示与线条相同颜色编码的斜率和偏移，以及推断SFR的弥散 \(\sigma\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Same as Fig. 3 for an edge-on viewing angle.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3相同，但针对边缘朝向视角。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Same as Fig. 3 , for the IR-inferred SFRs versus time-averaged SFR over 100 Myr. The SFRs are derived using Kennicutt ( 1998 ) conversion (Eq. 6 ) and the best fit is the purple dashed line.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：与图3相同，但针对IR推断SFR与100 Myr时间平均SFR的对比。SFR使用Kennicutt（1998）转换（公式6）推导，最佳拟合为紫色虚线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Same as Fig. 3 , for the Hybrid-inferred SFRs (IR + UV) versus time-averaged SFR over 100 Myr. The SFRs are derived using the conversion in Eq. 7 and the best fit is the purple dashed line.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：与图3相同，但针对混合推断SFR（IR + UV）与100 Myr时间平均SFR的对比。SFR使用公式7中的转换推导，最佳拟合为紫色虚线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: [ Cii ] luminosity as a function of SFR \({}_{100\,Myr}\) of NewHorizon and NewCluster simulated sources shown in circles and squares, respectively. The data points are color-coded based on the median of gas metallicities ( left ), the median of gas densities ( middle ), and the peak temperature ( right ) in a given source (see Sect. 4.4 for details). The black dashed-dotted line shows the \(L_{[\textsc{Cii}]}-SFR\) relation we obtain in this study. The purple dashed-dotted, blue dotted, red, green dashed, and magenta dashed lines represent \(L_{[\textsc{Cii}]}-SFR\) relations by Olsen et al. ( 2017 , \(z=6\) ) , Lagache et al. ( 2018 , \(z=5\) ) , Schaerer et al. ( 2020 , \(4 , Harikane et al. ( 2020 , \(6 , and Accard et al. ( 2025 , \(4 , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：NewHorizon和NewCluster模拟源的[ Cii ]光度作为SFR \({}_{100\,Myr}\)的函数，分别以圆圈和方块显示。数据点根据给定源中气体金属丰度的中位数（左）、气体密度的中位数（中）和峰值温度（右）进行颜色编码（详见第4.4节）。黑色点划线显示本研究获得的\(L_{[\textsc{Cii}]}-SFR\)关系。紫色点划线、蓝色点线、红色、绿色虚线和品红色虚线分别代表Olsen等人（2017，\(z=6\)）、Lagache等人（2018，\(z=5\)）、Schaerer等人（2020，\(4<z<6\)）、Harikane等人（2020，\(5<z<6\)）和Accard等人（2025，\(4<z<6\)）的\(L_{[\textsc{Cii}]}-SFR\)关系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 具有电磁对应体的引力波事件提供了哈勃图的直接测量。我们证明，将弱引力透镜效应纳入亮标准汽笛分析，可以测量那些不影响平均光度距离-红移关系但确实影响宇宙结构的宇宙学参数。特别是，我们研究了除了哈勃常数和物质丰度之外，测量物质扰动标准差σ₈的前景。我们发现，如果观测到300个具有电磁对应体的中子星双星系统，使用ET可以实现对σ₈的10%测量。使用LISA，假设观测到12个具有电磁对应体的大质量黑洞双星系统，对σ₈的测量精度将达到30%。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：将弱引力透镜效应纳入亮标准汽笛分析，能够有效测量影响宇宙结构形成的参数如σ₈，为引力波宇宙学开辟了新的参数约束途径，未来引力波观测将提供重要的宇宙学信息。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The PDF of lenses for sources at \(z_{s}=5\) , integrated over the transverse distance \(r\) . In the purple region \(r_{max}=0\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：源在\(z_{s}=5\)处的透镜概率密度函数，对横向距离\(r\)进行积分。在紫色区域中\(r_{max}=0\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The PDF of lensing magnifications for different source redshifts for the Planck 2018 values of the cosmological parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：对于Planck 2018宇宙学参数值，不同源红移处的透镜放大率概率密度函数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The variance of luminosity distances induced by weak lensing in various approximations of the lens population. For comparison, the dashed curve shows the result of Takahashi et al. ( 2011 ) . The open symbols depict the numerical results, while the curves illustrate the fit using the ansatz ( 8 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在透镜群体的各种近似下，由弱引力透镜引起的光度距离方差。作为比较，虚线显示了Takahashi等人（2011）的结果。空心符号表示数值结果，而曲线展示了使用ansatz（8）的拟合。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The solid curve shows the true luminosity distance-redshift relation \(\tilde{D}_{L}(z)\) , while the surrounding gray band indicates 99% range of the apparent luminosity distances. The points represent a benchmark catalogue of 500 NS binaries and 10 MBH binaries.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：实线显示了真实的光度距离-红移关系\(\tilde{D}_{L}(z)\)，而周围的灰色带表示表观光度距离的99%范围。这些点代表了一个包含500个中子星双星和10个大质量黑洞双星的基准目录。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Posteriors of the Hubble diagram reconstruction from the catalogues shown in Fig. 4 . The contours indicate the 68% and 95% credible regions. The dashed lines indicate the benchmark parameter values used to generate the catalogues.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：从图4所示目录重建哈勃图的后验分布。轮廓表示68%和95%的置信区域。虚线表示用于生成目录的基准参数值。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在接下来的二十年里，引力波观测预计将从以发现为导向的事业发展为天体物理学、宇宙学和基础物理学的精密工具。当前第二代地面探测器已确认致密双星合并的存在，并实现了引力波多信使天文学，但其灵敏度、红移覆盖范围、频率覆盖范围和占空比仍然有限。这些限制使其无法解决宇宙学中的许多基本开放问题。到2040年代，宽视场电磁巡天将以前所未有的深度和精度绘制发光宇宙的图谱。然而，仅凭电磁观测，暗物质本质、宇宙加速膨胀的物理起源、宇宙尺度上的引力性质以及大爆炸后最早时刻的物理条件等关键问题仍将只能得到部分约束。在这些方面的进展需要借助不发射光的物理过程和时期。引力波提供了一种独特且互补的观测渠道：它们几乎不受中间物质影响地在宇宙距离上传播，探测极端天体物理环境，并直接响应时空几何。在此背景下，下一代引力波观测站，如爱因斯坦望远镜，将对欧洲天文学产生变革性影响。ET将以超越现有探测器的灵敏度和频率运行，观测此前无法触及红移处的双黑洞和中子星，实现对致密源的高信噪比连续监测，并探测天体物理和宇宙学起源的引力波背景。与空间探测器一起，ET将在推进我们对宇宙演化和基础物理学的理解方面发挥核心作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，下一代引力波观测站（特别是爱因斯坦望远镜ET）将在未来20年内将引力波观测从发现驱动的事业转变为天体物理学、宇宙学和基础物理学的精密工具。通过与电磁波观测的互补，ET将在理解宇宙演化和基础物理学方面发挥核心作用，为解决暗物质本质、宇宙加速膨胀、引力性质等基本问题提供独特而关键的观测手段。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了MUSE-ALMA Haloes巡天的新结果，涵盖了79个与红移约0.5处强HI吸收相关的星系。我们的ALMA第10周期观测在最初的21个系统基础上新增了39个，使总数达到60个星系。在9个新星系中探测到CO发射，总计60个星系中有12个探测到CO，使CO发射的HI选择星系数量翻倍，并且分子气体质量的探测深度比以往研究深1.2 dex。这些星系跨越了广泛的恒星质量和金属丰度范围。通过将CO(2-1)和CO(3-2)性质与来自VLT/MUSE和HST的恒星形成速率及气相金属丰度进行比较，我们发现恒星形成效率存在双重行为：低质量系统遵循主序标度关系，而高质量系统则表现出恒星形成受抑制。这种多样性表明HI吸收体同时追踪演化成熟和年轻星系，为完成红移约0.5处的重子物质普查迈出了关键一步。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：HI吸收体同时追踪演化成熟和年轻星系，为完成红移约0.5处的重子物质普查迈出关键一步。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of CO-detections (blue) and non-CO-detections (light blue) on galaxies as a function of redshift (left) and stellar mass (middle). The right panel is plotted as a function of metallicity corresponding to multiple galaxies associated with the absorbers (Halley et al., in prep). This figure represents the MUSE-ALMA Haloes survey, including all the sources from the new ALMA Large Program and previous ALMA data (see Section 2.2 ). The middle and right panels have fewer numbers because only those with reliable \(M_{\star}\) and [M/H] determinations are included. The median values for the detections are 0.6, 9.66 and \(-1.23\) for the redshift, stellar mass and absorption metallicity, while the non-detections have median values of 0.5, 9.16, and \(-1.84\) . Overall, we report no clear correlation between the detection rate and any of these properties, suggesting that the detection of CO emission may be governed by a combination of global galaxy properties, rather than just one property alone.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：CO探测（蓝色）和非CO探测（浅蓝色）星系作为红移（左）和恒星质量（中）函数的分布。右图绘制了与吸收体相关的多个星系的金属丰度函数（Halley et al., in prep）。此图展示了MUSE-ALMA Haloes巡天，包括来自新ALMA大型计划及先前ALMA数据的所有源（见第2.2节）。中图和右图数量较少，因为仅包含具有可靠\(M_{\star}\)和[M/H]测定的星系。探测的中位值分别为红移0.6、恒星质量9.66和吸收金属丰度\(-1.23\)，而非探测的中位值为0.5、9.16和\(-1.84\)。总体而言，我们未发现探测率与这些性质中的任何一个存在明确相关性，这表明CO发射的探测可能由星系整体性质的组合决定，而非单一性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: CO detections and spectral profiles of the new nine detected sources. Left panels show the moment zero maps with the \(\pm\) 3, \(\pm\) 4, and \(\pm\) 5 \(\sigma\) level contours, while the right panels display the extracted CO spectra. The grey shaded regions around each spectrum represent the \(\pm 1\sigma\) RMS noise level estimate from the individual data cubes, and the blue shaded region indicates the velocity range used to create the moment maps. The final row, right figure, presents the rest-frame stacked spectrum of non-detections with \(\pm 1\sigma\) and \(\pm 2\sigma\) levels. A summary of the integrated CO fluxes and associated uncertainties for all detected sources is provided in Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：新探测到的九个源的CO探测和光谱轮廓。左图显示零阶矩图，带有\(\pm\) 3、\(\pm\) 4和\(\pm\) 5 \(\sigma\)等值线，右图显示提取的CO光谱。每个光谱周围的灰色阴影区域表示来自单个数据立方体的\(\pm 1\sigma\) RMS噪声水平估计，蓝色阴影区域表示用于创建矩图的速度范围。最后一行右图显示了非探测的静止帧叠加光谱，带有\(\pm 1\sigma\)和\(\pm 2\sigma\)水平。所有探测源的积分CO通量及相关不确定性的总结见表1。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Different \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\) models across varying metallicites. In this work, we adopt the model proposed by Genzel et al. ( 2015 ) , shown in the blue points, which corresponds to the geometric mean of the prescriptions of Bolatto et al. ( 2013 ) and Genzel et al. ( 2012 ) , as indicated in Eq. 3 . As a reference, we also include the model proposed by Accurso et al. ( 2017 ) , which would lead to higher values for \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\) for the galaxies in our sample. To prevent extrapolation into poorly constrained regions of parameter space, we impose an upper limit on \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\) , set to the lowest emission metallicity measured in our sample, which leads to an \(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\sim 15\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：不同金属丰度下的\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\)模型。在本工作中，我们采用Genzel等人（2015）提出的模型，以蓝点表示，该模型对应于Bolatto等人（2013）和Genzel等人（2012）方案的几何平均值，如公式3所示。作为参考，我们还包含了Accurso等人（2017）提出的模型，该模型会导致我们样本中星系的\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\)值更高。为避免外推到参数空间约束较差的区域，我们对\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\)设置了一个上限，设定为我们样本中测得的最低发射金属丰度，这导致\(\alpha_{\text{CO}}\sim 15\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left: Molecular gas mass ( \(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) ) as a function of H i column density ( \(N_{\text{HI}}\) ). Blue circles represent our sample in comparison with previous studies on H i -absorption selected systems from kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018 and klitschH2MolecularGas2021 , shown in grey. Right: \(N_{\text{HI}}\) and impact parameter, colour coded by the molecular gas masses. In this plot, we include all impact parameters for the sources in our sample, rather than limiting to the smallest \(b\) as done in previous studies (e.g. perouxSINFONIIntegralField2016 ; Hamanowicz et al. 2020 ; wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2022 ) . The circles represent CO detections, and the triangle represents non-CO detections. We also include the median radial profiles for the neutral hydrogen column density from the simulations by voortCosmologicalSimulationsCircumgalactic2019 and nelsonResolvingSmallscaleCold2020 in the dashed and dotted lines, respectively. We report no clear correlation between the column density and impact parameter for different molecular gas masses.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左：分子气体质量（\(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)）作为HI柱密度（\(N_{\text{HI}}\)）的函数。蓝色圆圈代表我们的样本，与来自kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018和klitschH2MolecularGas2021的先前HI吸收选择系统研究（灰色）进行比较。右：\(N_{\text{HI}}\)和碰撞参数，按分子气体质量着色。在此图中，我们包含了样本中所有源的碰撞参数，而非像先前研究（例如perouxSINFONIIntegralField2016；Hamanowicz et al. 2020；wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2022）那样仅限于最小的\(b\)。圆圈代表CO探测，三角形代表非CO探测。我们还分别以虚线和点线形式包含了来自voortCosmologicalSimulationsCircumgalactic2019和nelsonResolvingSmallscaleCold2020模拟的中性氢柱密度中值径向轮廓。我们未报告不同分子气体质量的柱密度与碰撞参数之间存在明确相关性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Left: Star formation rate (SFR) as a function of molecular gas mass ( \(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) ). Right: Stellar mass ( \(M_{\star}\) ) as a function of molecular gas mass ( \(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) ). Our sample is shown in blue circles, and the blue arrows represent a \(3\sigma\) upper limit. The result from the stacked spectrum described in Sect. 3.2 is shown by the blue star. We also include the mean dust correction for SFR depicted by a large blue arrow on the corner of the left panel. For comparison, we include data from the xCOLD GASS survey ( saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017 ) , which represents low-redshift galaxies, and the PHIBSS survey ( tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 ) , in the redshift range \(z\sim 0.3-1.2\) . The solid line represents the molecular gas main sequence scaling relation from tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 . We also included estimates from kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018 and klitschH2MolecularGas2021 in both panels, labelled as other H i –selected systems. Our sources with \(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}\lesssim 10^{9.8}\) lie \(\sim 0.3\) dex above the expected SFR \(-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) relations for ‘normal star-forming galaxies’ at the same redshift range, while the systems with with \(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}>10^{9.8}\) lie \(\sim 1.5\) dex below the relation. This trend suggests that H i –selected systems have a dual behaviour. Galaxies with low molecular gas masses form stars efficiently, following both the depletion timescales and the \(M_{\star}-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\) scaling relations of main-sequence galaxies. In contrast, galaxies with high molecular gas masses show inefficient star formation and fall below the expected stellar mass growth, likely because they are still actively accreting gas from the intergalactic medium or interacting within group environments. These systems appear not yet to have reached the equilibrium conditions characteristic of main-sequence galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左：恒星形成速率（SFR）作为分子气体质量（\(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)）的函数。右：恒星质量（\(M_{\star}\)）作为分子气体质量（\(M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)）的函数。我们的样本以蓝色圆圈显示，蓝色箭头表示\(3\sigma\)上限。第3.2节描述的叠加光谱结果以蓝色星形显示。我们还包含了左图角落处一个大蓝色箭头所示的SFR平均尘埃校正。作为比较，我们包含了代表低红移星系的xCOLD GASS巡天（saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017）和红移范围\(z\sim 0.3-1.2\)的PHIBSS巡天（tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018）的数据。实线代表来自tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018的分子气体主序标度关系。我们还在两个面板中包含了来自kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018和klitschH2MolecularGas2021的估计，标记为其他HI选择系统。我们的\(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}\lesssim 10^{9.8}\)的源位于相同红移范围内“正常恒星形成星系”的预期SFR \(-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)关系之上约\(\sim 0.3\) dex，而\(M_{H_{2}}/M_{\odot}>10^{9.8}\)的系统位于该关系之下约\(\sim 1.5\) dex。这一趋势表明HI选择系统具有双重行为。分子气体质量低的星系高效形成恒星，遵循主序星系的耗尽时标和\(M_{\star}-M_{\text{H}_{2}}\)标度关系。相比之下，分子气体质量高的星系表现出低效的恒星形成，并低于预期的恒星质量增长，这可能是因为它们仍在从星系际介质活跃吸积气体或在群环境中相互作用。这些系统似乎尚未达到主序星系特征的平衡条件。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Left: Nebular emission metallicity, \(12+\log\) (O/H) ( wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2023 ) , as a function of molecular gas mass ( \(M_{{H}_{2}}\) ) for our H i –selected galaxies. Blue circles indicate CO detections, and blue leftward arrows show \(3\sigma\) upper limits for CO non-detections. The result from the stacked spectrum described in Sect. 3.2 is shown by the blue star. The solid line indicates the mass-metallicity relation from Genzel et al. ( 2015 ) for the PHIBSS sample ( tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 ) . A positive correlation emerges between metallicity and CO detectability, with CO-detected galaxies tending to occupy the higher-metallicity regime ( \(\log Z\gtrsim 8.5\) ), as found previously in many studies (e.g., Bolatto et al. 2013 ) . Right: Histogram of emission metallicities for all galaxies, with CO detections in blue and non-detections in light blue filled histogram. The dashed orange line indicates a metallicity \(\log Z\sim 8.5\) , which sets the higher and lower metallicity regimes discussed in Sect. 5 . Although the distributions overlap significantly, a two-sample Kolmogorov-Smirnov test yields a p-value of 0.004, indicating a statistically significant difference in the underlying metallicity distributions. This reinforces the interpretation that metallicity plays a key role in governing the observability of molecular gas in H i –selected systems.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：左：我们HI选择星系的星云发射金属丰度\(12+\log\) (O/H)（wengMUSEALMAHaloesVIII2023）作为分子气体质量（\(M_{{H}_{2}}\)）的函数。蓝色圆圈表示CO探测，蓝色左向箭头表示CO非探测的\(3\sigma\)上限。第3.2节描述的叠加光谱结果以蓝色星形显示。实线表示来自Genzel等人（2015）的PHIBSS样本（tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018）的质量-金属丰度关系。金属丰度与CO可探测性之间呈现正相关，CO探测星系倾向于占据较高金属丰度区域（\(\log Z\gtrsim 8.5\)），这与先前许多研究（例如Bolatto et al. 2013）的发现一致。右：所有星系的发射金属丰度直方图，CO探测以蓝色填充，非探测以浅蓝色填充。橙色虚线表示金属丰度\(\log Z\sim 8.5\)，这设定了第5节讨论的高和低金属丰度区域。尽管分布显著重叠，双样本Kolmogorov-Smirnov检验得出p值为0.004，表明底层金属丰度分布存在统计显著差异。这强化了金属丰度在控制HI选择系统中分子气体可观测性方面起关键作用的解释。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Molecular gas depletion time ( \(t_{\text{dep}}=M_{\text{H}_{2}}/\text{SFR}\) ) as a function of redshift for our H i –selected sample (blue/light-blue circles for high/low molecular gas mass systems), compares with literature scaling relations and emission-selected samples ( saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017 ; tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 ) . The result from the stacked spectrum described in Sect. 3.2 is shown by the blue star. The solid red curve shows the empirically derived \(t_{\text{dep}}\) evolution for main-sequence galaxies from tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018 , the dotted line marks the Hubble time at each redshift, the thin solid line represents the stellar mass doubling time ( \(t_{*}=M_{\star}/\text{SFR}\) ) from tacconiEvolutionStarFormingInterstellar2020 , and the purple dashed line is from the cosmic depletion timescales derived from the ALMACAL survey (Bollo et al. 2025 ) . H i –selected galaxies, both from our sample and from high-redshift literature sources (gray dots; klitschH2MolecularGas2021 ; neelemanMolecularEmissionGalaxy2018 ; neelemanColdMassiveRotating2020 ; neelemanII158Mm2025 ; Fynbo et al. 2018 ; kanekarHighMolecularGas2020 ; kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018 ; kaurMassiveDustyHi2022 ; kaurMassiveIabsorptionselectedGalaxy2025 ), consistently lie above the main-sequence relation, indicating lower star formation efficiencies. Several galaxies exhibit \(t_{\text{dep}}\) approaching or exceeding the Hubble time, suggesting inefficient molecular gas consumption or suppressed star formation.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：我们HI选择样本（高/低分子气体质量系统分别用蓝色/浅蓝色圆圈表示）的分子气体耗尽时标（\(t_{\text{dep}}=M_{\text{H}_{2}}/\text{SFR}\)）作为红移的函数，与文献标度关系和发射选择样本（saintongeXCOLDGASSComplete2017；tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018）进行比较。第3.2节描述的叠加光谱结果以蓝色星形显示。红色实线曲线显示了来自tacconiPHIBSSUnifiedScaling2018的主序星系经验推导的\(t_{\text{dep}}\)演化，点线标记每个红移处的哈勃时间，细实线代表来自tacconiEvolutionStarFormingInterstellar2020的恒星质量倍增时间（\(t_{*}=M_{\star}/\text{SFR}\)），紫色虚线来自ALMACAL巡天（Bollo et al. 2025）推导的宇宙耗尽时标。HI选择星系，无论是来自我们的样本还是高红移文献源（灰点；klitschH2MolecularGas2021；neelemanMolecularEmissionGalaxy2018；neelemanColdMassiveRotating2020；neelemanII158Mm2025；Fynbo et al. 2018；kanekarHighMolecularGas2020；kanekarMassiveAbsorptionselectedGalaxies2018；kaurMassiveDustyHi2022；kaurMassiveIabsorptionselectedGalaxy2025），始终位于主序关系之上，表明恒星形成效率较低。几个星系的\(t_{\text{dep}}\)接近或超过哈勃时间，表明分子气体消耗低效或恒星形成受抑制。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Detections. Measured properties of the new nine detected sources from the MUSE-ALMA Haloes ALMA Large Program. 1 1 1 \(b\) is the impact parameter, and \(F_{{peak}}\) is the measured peak flux
figures.caption_zh: 表1：探测。来自MUSE-ALMA Haloes ALMA大型计划的新探测到的九个源的测量性质。\(b\)是碰撞参数，\(F_{{peak}}\)是测得的峰值通量。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系团中次结构性质通过引力透镜效应得到精细探测，为暗物质模型提供了严格检验。结合强透镜和弱透镜数据，我们对大质量星系团的总质量（主要由暗物质主导）进行了成像，覆盖了与无碰撞冷暗物质（CDM）小尺度预言进行对比所需的动态范围。利用最先进的透镜模型，我们提取了四个关键次晕性质：质量函数、投影径向分布、内部密度轮廓和潮汐截断半径。我们发现次晕质量函数和截断半径与CDM预期一致。相反，次晕的内部密度轮廓和径向分布与CDM存在强烈差异。来自次晕核心的星系-星系强透镜（GGSL）发生率超出CDM预言近一个数量级，要求内部密度斜率在$r \lesssim 0.01\,R_{200}$内陡峭至$\gamma\gtrsim 2.5$，这与核心坍缩的自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）一致，而相同的次晕在其外围表现为无碰撞。此外，在透镜重建中明确建模的、承载明亮星系团成员星系的次晕的观测径向分布仍与CDM不相容。总之，这些小尺度压力测试揭示了一个有趣的悖论，挑战了纯无碰撞CDM的暗物质微观物理，并激发了混合场景，例如包含CDM和SIDM的双组分模型，或全新类别的暗物质理论。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这些小尺度压力测试揭示了有趣的悖论，挑战了纯无碰撞冷暗物质的微观物理，并支持混合模型（如CDM+SIDM双组分模型）或全新类别的暗物质理论。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Galaxy Cluster Sample
figures.caption_zh: 表1：星系团样本

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The mass function of subhalos associated with spectroscopically confirmed bright cluster member galaxies in observed lensing clusters ( Lenstool , color-shaded) compared with CDM predictions from simulated analogs (TNG-C, solid lines) under the same selection criteria; see Section IV for details.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在观测透镜星系团中（Lenstool，彩色阴影），与光谱确认的明亮星系团成员星系相关的次晕质量函数，与模拟类似物（TNG-C，实线）在相同选择标准下的CDM预言比较；详见第四节。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Top: the projected radial distribution of subhalos associated with spectroscopically confirmed member galaxies in observed clusters (color-shaded) and in simulated analogs (solid lines; averaged over the five best-matched analogs and over three random projections). Bottom: the projected spatial distribution of subhalos around cluster centers in observations (left) and simulated analogs (right; from the best-mass-matched analog along a random projection), annotated by the respective absolute magnitude of associated galaxies. As compared to the observations, the simulated analogs clearly show a dearth of and fail to reproduce the spatial clustering of inner substructures within \(R/R_{200}\lesssim 0.2\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：上：观测星系团中（彩色阴影）与光谱确认的成员星系相关的次晕投影径向分布，以及模拟类似物中的分布（实线；取五个最佳匹配类似物和三个随机投影的平均值）。下：观测（左）和模拟类似物（右；来自最佳质量匹配类似物的随机投影）中星系团中心周围次晕的投影空间分布，并标注了相关星系的绝对星等。与观测相比，模拟类似物明显缺乏且未能再现\(R/R_{200}\lesssim 0.2\)内内部次结构的空间聚集。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Tidal radii from lensing-based observational inferences (gray line; the shading indicates conservative \(5\sigma\) uncertainties), overlaid with individual CDM (blue horizontal dashes) and strongly collisional SIDM (red horizontal dashes; conservative upper bounds) predictions for all spectroscopically confirmed member galaxies in our sample. We also plot the respective medians (circles), central 68% ranges (triangles), and central 95% ranges (horizontal bars). Lensing inferences are fully statistically consistent with CDM and discrepant with SIDM.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：基于透镜的观测推断的潮汐半径（灰线；阴影表示保守的\(5\sigma\)不确定性），叠加了样本中所有光谱确认成员星系的单个CDM（蓝色水平虚线）和强碰撞SIDM（红色水平虚线；保守上限）预言。我们还绘制了各自的中位数（圆圈）、中心68%范围（三角形）和中心95%范围（水平条）。透镜推断在统计上与CDM完全一致，而与SIDM不一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Schematic illustrating the implications for CDM and SIDM models. Left: collisionless CDM matches subhalo tidal extents but severely underpredicts GGSL. Right: core-collapsed SIDM yields steep inner profiles that match GGSL, but this strongly collisional regime also results in more pronounced mass stripping that significantly reduces tidal extents, even after accounting for the slight expansion of the outskirts due to outward energy transfer during the core collapsing. The inset axes show the run of \(\log\rho\) versus \(\log r\) (not to scale).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：说明对CDM和SIDM模型影响的示意图。左：无碰撞CDM匹配次晕潮汐范围，但严重低估了GGSL。右：核心坍缩SIDM产生匹配GGSL的陡峭内部轮廓，但这种强碰撞状态也导致更显著的质量剥离，显著减小了潮汐范围，即使在考虑了核心坍缩过程中由于向外能量转移导致的外围轻微膨胀之后。插图坐标轴显示了\(\log\rho\)与\(\log r\)的关系（未按比例）。

figures.caption_en: Figure A1: Left: 3D radial distribution of the subhalos in our TNG-C cluster analogs (dashed, color-coded as indicated) compared to the force-disruption-free benchmark taken from Hopkins et al. 2023 (black solid). We show the cumulative number of all subhalos with more than 20 DM particles, normalized to the total number within the respective \(2R_{200}\) . To explicitly account for the artificial disruption of the inner subhalos, we artificially “inject” subhalos within \(0.5R_{200}\) by sampling weighted by the deficit within \(0.5R_{200}\) between the TNG-C and benchmark cumulative distributions (see the text for details). Three random examples of such modified subhalo radial distributions (dotted) are plotted that well match the benchmark distribution. Right: projected radial distribution of the subhalos hosting member galaxies in observed clusters (color-shaded, as in the top panel of Figure 2 ) and in simulated analogs with injected inner subhalos. The solid (dotted) lines show the mean ( \(1\sigma\) confidence interval) inferred from 1 million bootstrapping iterations. Within the projected radius of \(\lesssim 0.2R_{200}\) , individual radial bins remain \(5\sigma\) – \(40\sigma\) discrepant with the observed abundance, even after explicitly accounting for numerical uncertainties due to artificial disruption.
figures.caption_zh: 图A1：左：TNG-C星系团类似物中次晕的3D径向分布（虚线，按指示颜色编码），与取自Hopkins等人2023年的无力瓦解基准（黑色实线）比较。我们展示了所有包含超过20个暗物质粒子的次晕的累积数量，归一化到各自\(2R_{200}\)内的总数。为了明确考虑内部次晕的人为瓦解，我们通过在\(0.5R_{200}\)内按TNG-C与基准累积分布之间的差值（详见正文）加权采样，人为“注入”\(0.5R_{200}\)内的次晕。绘制了三个这样的修正次晕径向分布（虚线）的随机示例，它们与基准分布匹配良好。右：观测星系团中（彩色阴影，如图2上图）和具有注入内部次晕的模拟类似物中承载成员星系的次晕的投影径向分布。实线（虚线）显示了从100万次自助抽样迭代推断的平均值（\(1\sigma\)置信区间）。在投影半径\(\lesssim 0.2R_{200}\)内，即使在明确考虑了由于人为瓦解导致的数值不确定性之后，单个径向区间仍与观测丰度存在\(5\sigma\) – \(40\sigma\)的差异。

figures.caption_en: Figure A2: Ratios of subhalo tidal radii computed from CDM–SIDM-matched pairs of the L-Cluster run of the SIDM Concerto suite (Nadler et al. , 2025 ) that assumes a Rutherford-like velocity-dependent cross-section model (see the text for details). We show the mean (diamonds), central 68% (triangles), and central 95% (horizontal bars) ranges of each distribution under no subhalo selection (gray) and as selected by instantaneous halocentric radius (purple) or bound mass fraction (red). This comparison is done for the entire CDM–SIDM-matched subhalo sample (left) and for the subsample filtered by requiring the mass-resolution-limited numerical scatter in the bound mass fraction to be less than 0.3 dex (right; Equation ( C1 )). Even in the mildly collisional regime or with velocity-dependent SIDM models, self-interaction-driven core formation leads to substantially higher tidal mass loss and tidal truncation radii statistically discrepant from CDM predictions, by up to an order of magnitude for inner and/or heavily stripped subhalos.
figures.caption_zh: 图A2：从SIDM Concerto套件（Nadler等人，2025）的L-Cluster运行中，假设类卢瑟福速度依赖截面模型（详见正文）的CDM–SIDM匹配对计算的次晕潮汐半径比率。我们展示了在无次晕选择（灰色）以及按瞬时晕心半径（紫色）或束缚质量分数（红色）选择下，每个分布的平均值（菱形）、中心68%（三角形）和中心95%（水平条）范围。此比较针对整个CDM–SIDM匹配次晕样本（左）和通过要求束缚质量分数的质量分辨率限制数值散射小于0.3 dex（右；方程(C1)）过滤的子样本进行。即使在弱碰撞状态或使用速度依赖SIDM模型时，自相互作用驱动的核心形成也会导致显著更高的潮汐质量损失和潮汐截断半径，在统计上与CDM预言不一致，对于内部和/或严重剥离的次晕，差异可达一个数量级。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST观测表明，一些高红移星系可能质量极大，从而挑战了标准早期星系形成和宇宙学模型。我们利用不同建模假设和新数据分析了三个星系（S1、S2和S3）的恒星质量，这些星系的NIRCam/光栅红移与$z>5$一致。这三个光学暗星系此前被报道拥有异常高的恒星质量和恒星形成率，暗示了极高的恒星形成效率。最近对S1的NIRSpec/IFU观测显示其光谱红移为$z_{\rm spec}=3.2461^{+0.0001}_{-0.0002}$，低于此前报道的值。利用贝叶斯光谱能量分布（SED）建模工具\texttt{Prospector}，我们研究了关键模型假设对恒星质量估计的影响，例如恒星形成历史（SFH）先验的选择（非参数先验的恒定与上升SFH基底）、尘埃消光定律以及发射线通量的处理。我们的分析得出S1、S2和S3的修正恒星质量分别为$\log(M_{\star}/M_{\odot}) \approx 10.36^{+0.47}_{-0.32}, 10.95^{+0.11}_{-0.10}$和$10.31^{+0.24}_{-0.19}$。我们发现，采用上升SFH基底先验相比恒定SFH基底先验会得到更低的推断恒星质量。我们识别出尘埃消光曲线斜率、尘埃消光量和恒星质量之间存在显著的简并性。我们的结果突显了SED建模中由于SFH先验和尘埃消光引起的各种系统误差，这些误差会影响严重尘埃遮蔽源的恒星质量估计。尽管如此，即使采用这些修正后的恒星质量估计，这三个星系中的两个在其各自红移处仍属于质量最大、恒星形成最活跃的系统，暗示了高恒星形成效率。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，SED建模中恒星形成历史先验和尘埃衰减的系统误差会显著影响尘埃遮蔽源的恒星质量估计。尽管修正后的质量低于先前报告，但其中两个星系在其红移处仍属于最质量最大、恒星形成最活跃的系统，暗示高恒星形成效率。这些结果强调了在解释高红移星系观测时考虑建模系统误差的重要性。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Galaxy properties of the three galaxies. (1) Right ascension (J2000); (2) Declination (J2000); (3) NIRCam/grism redshifts presented in Xiao et al. ( 2024 ) ; (4) Redshifts adopted in this work. For S2 and S3, we adopt the same spectroscopic redshifts as in Xiao et al. ( 2024 , see also ) , while for S1 we use the updated spectroscopic redshift obtained from NIRSpec/IFU observations of \(z_{spec}=3.2439\pm 0.0002\) (Xiao et al., 2026 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：三个星系的星系属性。(1) 赤经 (J2000); (2) 赤纬 (J2000); (3) Xiao等人 (2024) 给出的NIRCam/光栅红移; (4) 本工作采用的红移。对于S2和S3，我们采用与Xiao等人 (2024, 亦见) 相同的光谱红移，而对于S1，我们使用从NIRSpec/IFU观测获得的更新光谱红移 \(z_{spec}=3.2439\pm 0.0002\) (Xiao等人, 2026)。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Observed photometry for S1, S2, and S3, expressed in nJy. We use the Kron-convolved photometry. The measurements include NIRCam imaging from FRESCO (F182M, F210M, F444W) and JADES (F090W to F444W) surveys, with long-wavelength channel filters separated into modules A and B due to differing response curves. H \(\alpha\) line fluxes (in nJy) are included for S2 and S3 from FRESCO grism spectroscopy, along with far-infrared fluxes from ALMA (S1) and NOEMA (S2) at \(1-3\) mm. Filters and observations not available are marked as NA (Not Available).
figures.caption_zh: 表2：S1、S2和S3的观测测光数据，以nJy表示。我们使用Kron卷积测光。测量包括来自FRESCO (F182M, F210M, F444W) 和JADES (F090W至F444W) 巡天的NIRCam成像，由于响应曲线不同，长波通道滤光片分为模块A和B。来自FRESCO光栅光谱学的H \(\alpha\) 线通量（以nJy为单位）包含在S2和S3中，以及来自ALMA (S1) 和NOEMA (S2) 在 \(1-3\) mm的远红外通量。不可用的滤光片和观测标记为NA（不可用）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Top: Best-fitting SED for S1 with the redshift fixed to the spectroscopic value \(z_{spec}=3.244\) (blue solid line for RSFH prior and dashed orange line for CSFH prior) and, for comparison, to the redshift adopted by Xiao et al. ( 2024 ) , \(z_{\text{Xiao}}=5.579\) (grey dashed line). Black points show the observed photometric data, including the ALMA 1.1 mm measurement (see Table 2 ). Bottom: The normalized residuals ( \(\chi\) ), e.g., photometric residuals between the observed and model-predicted fluxes, normalised by the observational uncertainties. Blue and orange circles correspond to the fit using the new spectroscopic redshift \(z_{spec}=3.244\) for the RSFH and CSFH prior, respectively, while grey crosses show the residuals obtained when fixing the redshift to \(z_{\text{Xiao}}=5.579\) . The photometry favours the new spectroscopic redshift, yielding a total \(\chi^{2}=42.5\) and 37.7 for the RSFH and CSFH prior, respectively, compared to \(\chi^{2}=53.7\) for the fit adopting the redshift from Xiao et al. ( 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：顶部：S1的最佳拟合SED，红移固定为光谱值 \(z_{spec}=3.244\)（蓝色实线为RSFH先验，橙色虚线为CSFH先验），并与Xiao等人 (2024) 采用的红移 \(z_{\text{Xiao}}=5.579\)（灰色虚线）进行比较。黑点显示观测测光数据，包括ALMA 1.1 mm测量（见表2）。底部：归一化残差 ( \(\chi\) )，即观测通量与模型预测通量之间的测光残差，除以观测不确定度。蓝色和橙色圆圈分别对应使用新光谱红移 \(z_{spec}=3.244\) 的RSFH和CSFH先验拟合，灰色叉号显示红移固定为 \(z_{\text{Xiao}}=5.579\) 时的残差。测光数据支持新的光谱红移，RSFH和CSFH先验的总 \(\chi^{2}=42.5\) 和37.7，而采用Xiao等人 (2024) 红移的拟合总 \(\chi^{2}=53.7\)。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Parameters and their priors used in our fiducial Model. (1) Name of the Parameter (2) Description of the parameter (3) Parameter prior probability distribution; \(\mathcal{U}(a,b)\) is a uniform distribution between \(a\) and \(b\) ; \(\mathcal{G}(\mu,\sigma,a,b)\) is a clipped Gaussian distribution with mean \(\mu\) and dispersion \(\sigma\) between \(a\) and \(b\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表3：我们基准模型中使用的参数及其先验。(1) 参数名称 (2) 参数描述 (3) 参数先验概率分布；\(\mathcal{U}(a,b)\) 是 \(a\) 和 \(b\) 之间的均匀分布；\(\mathcal{G}(\mu,\sigma,a,b)\) 是均值 \(\mu\)、弥散 \(\sigma\) 在 \(a\) 和 \(b\) 之间的截断高斯分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Top: SED fits for galaxies S2 (left panel) and S3 (right panel). Black points show photometric measurements for several filters shown in Table 2 , with black error bars indicating observational uncertainties. NOEMA data for S2 is also included in the fit. The blue solid and orange dashed lines show the best-fit spectra from Prospector using rising and constant SFH priors, respectively. Blue and orange squares mark the corresponding model-predicted photometry. Bottom: The normalized residuals ( \(\chi\) ), normalized by the observational uncertainties, are generally distributed around zero for both galaxies, indicating a good overall fit for both the rising and constant SFH models. However, for both S2 and S3, the residuals from the rising SFH fits (blue circles) appear slightly more tightly clustered and symmetric around \(\chi\approx 0\) compared to those from the constant SFH fits (orange circles), suggesting that the rising SFH prior provides a marginally better fit to the observed photometry. This is supported by the total \(\chi^{2}\) values: for S2, \(\chi^{2}_{\text{rising}}=64.7\) and \(\chi^{2}_{\text{constant}}=64.8\) ; and for S3, \(\chi^{2}_{\text{rising}}=23.5\) and \(\chi^{2}_{\text{constant}}=24.2\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：顶部：星系S2（左图）和S3（右图）的SED拟合。黑点显示表2中几个滤光片的测光测量值，黑色误差棒表示观测不确定度。S2的NOEMA数据也包含在拟合中。蓝色实线和橙色虚线分别显示使用上升和恒定SFH先验的Prospector最佳拟合光谱。蓝色和橙色方块表示相应的模型预测测光。底部：归一化残差 ( \(\chi\) )，除以观测不确定度，对于两个星系通常分布在零附近，表明上升和恒定SFH模型整体拟合良好。然而，对于S2和S3，上升SFH拟合的残差（蓝色圆圈）似乎比恒定SFH拟合的残差（橙色圆圈）更紧密地聚集并围绕 \(\chi\approx 0\) 对称，表明上升SFH先验对观测测光提供了略好的拟合。这由总 \(\chi^{2}\) 值支持：对于S2，\(\chi^{2}_{\text{rising}}=64.7\) 和 \(\chi^{2}_{\text{constant}}=64.8\)；对于S3，\(\chi^{2}_{\text{rising}}=23.5\) 和 \(\chi^{2}_{\text{constant}}=24.2\)。

figures.caption_en: Table 4 : Summary of fiducial runs for all three galaxies, presenting key parameters: stellar mass ( \(M_{\star}\) ), SFR averaged over the past 50 Myr (SFR 50 ), mass-weighted stellar age ( \(t_{50}\) ), optical depth of diffuse dust attenuation ( \(\tau_{2}\) ), and dust attenuation curve index ( \(n_{\text{dust}}\) ). Results are shown for both the constant SFH base prior (CSFH) and the rising SFH base prior (RSFH).
figures.caption_zh: 表4：所有三个星系的基准运行总结，呈现关键参数：恒星质量 ( \(M_{\star}\) )、过去50 Myr平均SFR (SFR 50 )、质量加权恒星年龄 ( \(t_{50}\) )、弥散尘埃消光的光学深度 ( \(\tau_{2}\) ) 和尘埃消光曲线指数 ( \(n_{\text{dust}}\) )。结果分别显示恒定SFH基底先验 (CSFH) 和上升SFH基底先验 (RSFH)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Posterior distribution of key stellar population parameters: total stellar mass formed ( \(M_{\star}\) ), specific star formation rate averaged over 50 Myr (sSFR 50 ), mass-weighted stellar age ( \(t_{50}\) ), optical depth of the diffuse dust attenuation ( \(\tau_{2}\) ), dust attenuation curve index ( \(n_{dust}\) ), and stellar metallicity ( \(Z_{\star}\) ). Results are shown for two SFH base priors: rising SFH (RSFH; blue) and constant SFH (CSFH; orange). Median values for each parameter under both priors are indicated. The top-right panel shows the resulting SFH, illustrating that the CSFH prior prefers a higher SFR at earlier times than the RSFH prior, which gives rise to a higher stellar mass and a lower sSFR.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：关键恒星种群参数的后验分布：形成的总恒星质量 ( \(M_{\star}\) )、50 Myr平均比恒星形成率 (sSFR 50 )、质量加权恒星年龄 ( \(t_{50}\) )、弥散尘埃消光的光学深度 ( \(\tau_{2}\) )、尘埃消光曲线指数 ( \(n_{dust}\) ) 和恒星金属丰度 ( \(Z_{\star}\) )。结果显示两种SFH基底先验：上升SFH (RSFH；蓝色) 和恒定SFH (CSFH；橙色)。两种先验下每个参数的中值均已标出。右上图显示得到的SFH，说明CSFH先验比RSFH先验更倾向于早期更高的SFR，从而导致更高的恒星质量和更低的sSFR。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Same as Fig. 4 , but for S2. The CSFH prior converges on a slightly higher stellar mass solutions, with a lower sSFR and older stellar age than the RSFH prior.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：与图4相同，但针对S2。CSFH先验收敛于略高的恒星质量解，具有比RSFH先验更低的sSFR和更老的恒星年龄。

artifacts.abstract_zh: Ia型超新星、II型超新星和渐近巨星分支（AGB）星是恒星核合成的重要场所，但它们在爆发率、在星系内的位置以及抛射物的平均热能和丰度分布方面存在巨大差异。在本系列的前期论文中，我们已经表明，由II型超新星新合成的金属中有相当一部分会迅速通过星系风流失——即星系风是富含金属的。本文研究由Ia型超新星和AGB星返回的元素是否同样富含金属，或者金属加载是否随核合成场所的不同而显著变化。我们使用一系列高分辨率“高箱”模拟，采用\quokka~GPU加速代码对星际介质进行模拟，在其中系统地改变星系气体面密度、金属丰度以及不同核合成源的标高和相对速率。我们表明，不同来源产生的金属在星系风中的金属加载存在显著差异，典型变化幅度约为$\approx 0.3$ dex，我们将这一现象称为差异金属加载。哪些金属集合会因这一现象而优先损失，取决于星系环境，并且无法先验地轻易预测。我们的发现对基于丰度诊断的星系形成诊断（例如恒星形成时标和初始质量函数）的解释提出了质疑，因为这些技术所依赖的丰度变化水平往往与我们展示的由差异金属加载引起的水平相当。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，差异金属加载现象对基于元素丰度诊断的星系形成研究（如恒星形成时标和初始质量函数）提出了质疑，因为观测到的丰度变化水平与差异金属加载引起的水平相当。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of parameters for all runs. Column (2) gives the initial gas surface density and (3) is the rate of SN events derived from the Kennicutt-Schmidt relation. Columns (4), (5), (6) tabulate the scale heights of type II supernovae, type Ia superovae, and AGB stars, respectively. Column (7) is the fraction of SNe that are type II SN; the fraction of type Ia is \(1-\Gamma_{II}/\Gamma_{SN}\) and the rate of AGBs is fixed at \(16\Gamma_{SN}\) for all runs. Columns (8-11) list the other parameters: metallicity ( \(Z\) ) which sets the cooling rate of gas, the resolution ( \(\Delta x\) ) which is uniform throughout the box, the box half-height ( \(L_{z}\) ), and the total duration for which the simulations have been evolved.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：所有运行的参数汇总。第(2)列给出初始气体面密度，第(3)列是根据Kennicutt-Schmidt关系得出的超新星事件率。第(4)、(5)、(6)列分别列出了II型超新星、Ia型超新星和AGB星的标高。第(7)列是II型超新星所占比例；Ia型超新星的比例为\(1-\Gamma_{II}/\Gamma_{SN}\)，所有运行中AGB星率固定为\(16\Gamma_{SN}\)。第(8-11)列列出了其他参数：金属丰度（\(Z\)），它决定了气体的冷却率；分辨率（\(\Delta x\)），在整个盒子中均匀一致；盒子半高（\(L_{z}\)）；以及模拟已演化的总时长。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: A slice through the plane \(y=0\) for run \(\Sigma\) 6.6 at \(t=60\) Myr. From (a) to (f), the quantities shown are gas density, temperature, SN type II metal abundance normalised to Solar, the metal mixing ratios ( Equation 7 ) for type II, type Ia, and the AGB. Column (g) shows the colour with the red green, and blue channels mapped to the mixing ratios of type II, type Ia, and AGB ejecta, respectively – see Section 3.1.2 for details. Note that, for clarity, we show only the upper half of the domain; the full simulation domain extends to \(z=-4\) kpc.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：运行\(\Sigma\) 6.6在\(t=60\) Myr时通过平面\(y=0\)的切片。从(a)到(f)，显示的物理量分别是气体密度、温度、归一化到太阳丰度的II型超新星金属丰度、以及II型、Ia型和AGB星的金属混合比（方程7）。第(g)列显示颜色，其中红色、绿色和蓝色通道分别映射到II型、Ia型和AGB抛射物的混合比——详见第3.1.2节。注意，为清晰起见，我们仅显示区域的上半部分；完整模拟区域延伸至\(z=-4\) kpc。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Metal loading factors \(\eta_{Z,k}\) ( Equation 3 ) and \(\phi_{k}\) ( Equation 4 ) for the \(\Sigma\) 6.6 run. In both panels solid lines and points show time averages, and shaded bands show the \(16\) th to \(84\) th percentile variation in time over the full run. Red, green, and blue colours correspond to the metal fields tracing type II ejecta, type Ia ejecta, and AGB ejecta, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：运行\(\Sigma\) 6.6的金属加载因子\(\eta_{Z,k}\)（方程3）和\(\phi_{k}\)（方程4）。在两个面板中，实线和点表示时间平均值，阴影带表示整个运行期间时间上的第16到第84百分位变化。红色、绿色和蓝色分别对应追踪II型抛射物、Ia型抛射物和AGB抛射物的金属场。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Slices through run \(\Sigma\) 6.6 at the same time as shown in Figure 1 . Each row shows a slice in the \(xy\) plane at a height \(z\) indicated in the legend. The left column shows colour (as in the right panel of Figure 1 – see Section 3.1.2 ), while the middle column shows vertical velocity \(v_{z}\) . The right column shows the distribution of metal mass with respect to velocity for each of the three metals – \(Z_{{II}}\) (red dot-dotted), \(Z_{Ia}\) (green dashed), and \(Z_{{AGB}}\) (blue solid) – in the slice.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：与图1所示相同时间下运行\(\Sigma\) 6.6的切片。每一行显示在高度\(z\)（图例中指示）处的\(xy\)平面切片。左列显示颜色（如图1右面板——见第3.1.2节），中列显示垂直速度\(v_{z}\)。右列显示切片中三种金属——\(Z_{{II}}\)（红色点划线）、\(Z_{Ia}\)（绿色虚线）和\(Z_{{AGB}}\)（蓝色实线）——的金属质量随速度的分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Time-averaged mixing ratio ( Equation 7 ) as a function of height for gas that is hot ( \(T>5\times 10^{5}\) K; left) and warm ( \(T 50\) Myr, the approximate time at which the outflow reaches steady-state. Black dashed horizontal lines indicate \(1/3\) , the value corresponding to material that is fully mixed.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：时间平均的混合比（方程7）作为高度的函数，针对热气体（\(T>5\times 10^{5}\) K；左）和暖气体（\(T 50\) Myr，即流出达到稳态的大致时间。黑色虚线水平线表示\(1/3\)，对应完全混合的物质的值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The coloured panels around the edge show the volume filling factor \(f_{V}\) ( Equation 12 ), for type II (blue solid) and type Ia (orange dashed) SNe as a function of height, time-averaged over all simulation times after initial breakout of the SNe from the disk (see main text). The horizontal dashed lines indicate the averages over the respective scale heights of the two SN types. In the black panel (top centre), we re-plot \(\epsilon_{{II/Ia}}\) from Figure 5 , with the colour of the star matching the colour of the corresponding panel showing \(f_{V}(z)\) for that simulation. These panels are ordered from largest to smallest \(\epsilon_{{II/Ia}}\) starting from the top left and proceeding first across the top row, then across the bottom row.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：边缘的彩色面板显示II型（蓝色实线）和Ia型（橙色虚线）超新星的体积填充因子\(f_{V}\)（方程12）作为高度的函数，时间平均取自超新星从盘面初始爆发后的所有模拟时间（见正文）。水平虚线表示两种超新星类型各自标高的平均值。在黑色面板（顶部中央），我们重新绘制了图5中的\(\epsilon_{{II/Ia}}\)，星形颜色与该模拟对应的\(f_{V}(z)\)面板颜色相匹配。这些面板按\(\epsilon_{{II/Ia}}\)从大到小排列，从左上角开始，先沿顶行，再沿底行。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 根据经典活动星系核（AGN）模型，宽发射线起源于宽线区（BLR），且仅当尘埃环的消光较小时才可观测到。然而，我们近期发现了几例具有宽Hα探测的严重遮蔽（A_V > 50 mag）AGN：MCG -3-34-64、UGC 5101 和 Mrk 268。为探究这些AGN中观测到的宽线的起源，我们进行了多历元光学光谱观测，以搜寻宽Hα线的流量变化。对于MCG -3-34-64和UGC 5101，未探测到显著变化，表明这些AGN的宽线可能源自BLR以外的其他来源。光谱拟合分析表明，电离外流可能对MCG -3-34-64的观测宽成分有较大贡献，而外流和极向物质散射均可解释UGC 5101的宽成分。对于Mrk 268，我们利用Hα复合体与[SII]λλ6716, 6731双线的流量比，探测到宽Hα线显著的（4.3σ）流量变化，表明该宽线直接起源于BLR。光学连续谱缺乏显著流量变化，暗示Mrk 268核区的视线方向受到轻度遮蔽。我们的结果表明，遮蔽AGN中观测到的宽Hα线可能具有多种起源。这种复杂性可能给JWST等揭示的遥远AGN的黑洞质量测量带来额外不确定性。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：遮蔽AGN中观测到的宽Hα线具有多种起源，这种复杂性可能给JWST等揭示的遥远AGN黑洞质量测量带来额外不确定性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 射电迷你晕是令人困惑的特征，通常出现在X射线冷核星系团中。理解热X射线与非热射电辐射之间的联系是揭示其起源的关键。本文利用钱德拉X射线和宽频带uGMRT射电数据（波段3、4和5），对冷核星系团RXCJ1558.3-1410进行了多波段研究。我们的改进分析确认了先前已知的位于星系团中心东南约36 kpc处的X射线空腔，并报告了一个位于西北约42 kpc处的新空腔。这些空腔表明，活动星系核提供了约6.0 × 10^{44} erg s^{-1}的机械功率，足以抵消ICM中的辐射冷却。我们还探测到中心东南约72 kpc处存在一个尖锐的表面亮度边缘，其特征是温度跳跃和压力连续性，与冷锋一致，可能由小并合引起的气体晃动所致。我们的uGMRT图像揭示了围绕最亮星系团星系（BCG）的有趣弥漫辐射，其边缘在空间上与晃动的冷锋以及大致与冷却半径重合。此外，低的恒星形成率和直至晃动边缘的均匀金属丰度，与先前发现的通过晃动混合核心气体抑制恒星形成和均质化金属丰度的结果一致。最后，迷你晕与观测到的X射线特征之间的空间相关性表明，ICM晃动（而非AGN反馈）在驱动所提出的射电迷你晕辐射中起主导作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，ICM晃动（而非AGN反馈）在驱动射电迷你晕发射中起主导作用，这通过射电迷你晕与X射线特征（特别是冷锋）的空间相关性得到证实。

A cold front is apparent across Sector-I, marked by a cyan arc along with NW and SE cavities.
