artifacts.abstract_zh: 高红移剧烈星暴星系的形成机制仍然未知。触发这些星暴的一种可能机制是合并与相互作用，但在高红移处探测这些过程仍具挑战。对高红移引力透镜星系的观测能够详细研究这些极端星暴的星际介质和环境。我们利用尘埃连续谱、CO(6-5)、H2O(211-202)和H2O+(202-111)发射的高角分辨率观测，来约束红移z = 3.63的引力透镜亚毫米星系H-ATLAS J083051.0+013224 (G09v1.97)中的持续过程。我们使用PyAutoLens创建了去放大源平面的CO(6-5)发射线数据立方体，并利用3DBarolo进行了运动学建模。此外，我们研究了源平面中连续谱和分子线发射的性质。我们发现CO(6-5)和H2O(211-202)发射区域在源平面中紧密匹配，但尘埃连续谱发射更为致密。我们发现透镜建模结果不需要多于一个源，这与先前研究的结果相反。相反，我们发现G09v1.97类似于一个旋转盘，其Vmax/sigma = 2.8 +/- 0.4，并存在指示非圆周运动（如外流、潮汐尾或额外背景星系）的残余发射证据。我们认为非圆周运动的起源可能与双锥外流、相互作用产生的潮汐尾有关，或表明可能存在另一个星系。我们计算了G09v1.97的动力学质量、气体质量、恒星形成率和耗尽时间，发现其恒星形成率高而气体耗尽时间短。综合来看，这表明G09v1.97近期经历了一次相互作用，触发了强烈的恒星形成，并正在向盘状结构演化。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：G09v1.97近期经历了相互作用触发了强烈恒星形成，目前正在向盘状结构演化，其高恒星形成率和短气体耗尽时间支持这一演化阶段。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜星团最近在星系团场中被詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜（JWST）探测到，红移高达$z\approx 10$。当此类星团的镜像图像对出现在透镜临界曲线两侧时，通常假设两个图像将显示相同的光谱能量分布（SED）。然而，如果透镜中存在来自恒星或其他致密天体的引力微透镜效应，这一假设可能失效，因为微透镜会独立影响两个镜像图像中星团内明亮恒星的SED贡献。本文探讨了在何种情况下镜像图像SED不匹配可能被观测到，并论证在JWST对透镜星系团场的观测中，可探测的SED差异仅限于质量$< 10^5\ M_\odot$且年龄$\lesssim 5$ Myr的星团。如果恒星初始质量函数非常顶部沉重且延伸至恒星质量$\gg 100\ M_\odot$（如对第三族恒星所提出的情况），则严重不匹配的镜像图像SED的概率会增加。因此，具有高度不一致镜像图像SED的透镜星团的普遍性可作为早期宇宙中极大质量恒星和极端恒星群体的探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：强引力透镜星团镜像图像的光谱能量分布差异可作为探测早期宇宙中超大质量恒星和极端恒星群体的有效工具，为理解早期宇宙恒星形成提供新途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Schematic illustration of the mechanism by which mirror images of star cluster may develop mismatched SEDs. Left: A star cluster featuring a small number of red, evolved stars (here just one; red circle) and a larger number of blue stars (for illustrative purposes just three; blue circles) is located close to the macrolensing caustic in the source plane. Right: In the image plane, the light from the blue and red stars blends into two unresolved star cluster macroimages (green circles) located symmetrically on either side of the critical curve (a third image is also formed directly on the critical curve, but is highly demagnified and not shown). In the case of macrolensing only, the two star cluster images contain the highly stretched images of each star, appearing as mirror-flipped versions of each other. Microlensing by stars or other compact objects (black circles) located in the galaxy cluster that acts as the macrolens distort the magnification of individual stars within the two star cluster images. Due to the separation of the star cluster macroimages in the image plane (typically \(\approx 0.1\) –1 arcsec), different compact objects microlens the two sets of stellar images independently, which can alter the balance of red to blue light between the two unresolved star cluster images.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：星团镜像图像可能产生不匹配SED的机制示意图。左图：一个包含少量红色演化恒星（此处仅一颗；红色圆圈）和大量蓝色恒星（为示意仅三颗；蓝色圆圈）的星团位于源平面中的宏透镜焦散线附近。右图：在像平面中，来自蓝色和红色恒星的光混合成两个未分辨的星团宏像（绿色圆圈），对称地位于临界曲线两侧（第三个像也直接形成于临界曲线上，但高度缩小，未显示）。在仅考虑宏透镜的情况下，两个星团像包含每颗恒星高度拉伸的像，呈现为镜像翻转版本。位于作为宏透镜的星系团中的恒星或其他致密天体（黑色圆圈）引起的微透镜会扭曲两个星团像内单个恒星的放大率。由于星团宏像在像平面中的分离（通常\(\approx 0.1\) –1角秒），不同的致密天体独立地对两组恒星像进行微透镜，从而可能改变两个未分辨星团像之间红蓝光的平衡。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Macro- and microlensing of stars within a \(10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\) star cluster at a distance of 10 pc from the macrolensing caustic. a) Projected spatial distribution of the \(\geq 10\ M_{\odot}\) stars (blue dots) with respect to the caustic (dashed black line). b) Magnification distribution for stars within a single macroimage of the star cluster, when placed at \(z=6\) , under the assumption of \(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2 in microlenses in the \(z_{{l}}=0.5\) lens plane: positive-parity image (blue line), negative-parity image (red line), macrolensing only (black line, same for positive/negative parity). Stars to the left of the caustic in panel do not produce counterimages and are not included here. Due to gravitational microlensing, both the positive- and negative parity distributions are wider than the distribution due to macrolensing only. Compared to the positive-parity distribution, the negative-parity probabiliity distribution exhibits a prominent tail to very low magnifications, but also a subtle boost of the probabilities for very high magnifications.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：距离宏透镜焦散线10 pc的\(10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\)星团内恒星的宏透镜和微透镜。a) \(\geq 10\ M_{\odot}\)恒星（蓝点）相对于焦散线（黑色虚线）的投影空间分布。b) 假设在\(z_{{l}}=0.5\)透镜平面中微透镜的\(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2时，位于\(z=6\)的星团单个宏像内恒星的放大率分布：正宇称像（蓝线），负宇称像（红线），仅宏透镜（黑线，正/负宇称相同）。面板中焦散线左侧的恒星不产生对应像，此处未包含。由于引力微透镜，正宇称和负宇称分布均比仅宏透镜的分布更宽。与正宇称分布相比，负宇称概率分布表现出向极低放大率的显著尾部，但也存在极高放大率概率的微妙提升。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The photometric evolution in JWST/NIRCam bands of the star light from a young, unlensed \(10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\) , \(Z=0.002\) single-age star cluster at \(z=6\) , under the assumption of a fully-sampled Kroupa ( 2001 ) IMF from 0.1–120 \(M_{\odot}\) : a) Brightness evolution in filters F115W, F200W and F444W as a function of age; b) JWST/NIRcam SEDs at ages 1, 3, 10 and 20 Myr. The contribution from evolved, red stars is seen as an upturn in the SEDs for wavelengths above 2 \(\mu\) m at ages 3 Myr and above.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：假设完全采样的Kroupa (2001) IMF（0.1–120 \(M_{\odot}\)），在\(z=6\)处年轻、未透镜的\(10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\)、\(Z=0.002\)单一年龄星团星光在JWST/NIRCam波段的光度演化：a) 滤光片F115W、F200W和F444W的亮度随年龄的变化；b) 年龄为1、3、10和20 Myr时的JWST/NIRcam SED。演化恒星（红色）的贡献表现为年龄3 Myr及以上时波长超过2 \(\mu\) m的SED上升。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Discrepant SEDs of star cluster mirror images at \(z=6\) , formed by \(Z=0.002\) star clusters at 10 pc from the macrocaustic and affected by \(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2 microlensing. a) Examples of JWST/NIRCam SEDs of positive (blue line) and negative-parity (red line) mirror images of a \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) star cluster at ages 3 and 20 Myr. The black line shows the corresponding SEDs predicted by macrolensing alone (the same for both mirror images). b) Variation in \(m_{115}-m_{444}\) colour between positive- and negative-parity images ( \(\Delta(m_{115}-m_{444})=(m_{115}-m_{444})^{+}-(m_{115}-m_{444})^{-}\) ), as a function of the F200W apparent magnitude of the positive-parity image ( \(m_{200}^{+}\) ), for star clusters with total masses \(1\times 10^{4}\) (red circles), \(3\times 10^{4}\) (orange circles), \(1\times 10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\) (green circles) at ages 3 and 20 Myr. Every differently cloud of points correspond to 100 Monte Carlo realizations. The colour differences between the mirror images are seen to be larger at 3 Myr than at 20 Myr (please note the different y-axis limits in panel b). At fixed age, the colour differences between the mirror images is also seen to become larger for lower-mass star clusters, while at the same time occurring at fainter overall SED magnitudes (F200W + ).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：\(z=6\)处星团镜像图像的不一致SED，由距离宏焦散线10 pc的\(Z=0.002\)星团形成，并受\(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2微透镜影响。a) 年龄为3和20 Myr时，\(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)星团正宇称（蓝线）和负宇称（红线）镜像图像的JWST/NIRCam SED示例。黑线显示仅宏透镜预测的相应SED（两个镜像图像相同）。b) 正宇称和负宇称图像之间\(m_{115}-m_{444}\)颜色的变化（\(\Delta(m_{115}-m_{444})=(m_{115}-m_{444})^{+}-(m_{115}-m_{444})^{-}\)），作为正宇称图像F200W视星等（\(m_{200}^{+}\)）的函数，针对总质量为\(1\times 10^{4}\)（红圈）、\(3\times 10^{4}\)（橙圈）、\(1\times 10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\)（绿圈）的星团，年龄为3和20 Myr。每个不同的点云对应100次蒙特卡洛实现。镜像图像之间的颜色差异在3 Myr时比20 Myr时更大（请注意面板b中y轴范围不同）。在固定年龄下，镜像图像之间的颜色差异也随星团质量降低而增大，同时整体SED星等（F200W + ）更暗。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Median absolute colour difference between the F115W and F444W filters for mirror images of young \(Z=0.002\) , \(z=6\) star clusters affected by microlensing with \(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2 , as a function of the median apparent F200W flux of the positive-parity star cluster image. Models for star clusters of mass \(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) (red circles), \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) (orange squares) and \(1\times 10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\) (green triangles) are shown at ages 3, 5, 10 and 20 Myr (from right to left). The dashed line indicates the part of the diagram where we consider that colour differences may be detectable in JWST observations of cluster-lens fields (see main text for details). For star clusters in the mass range \(1\times 10^{4}\) – \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) , the median colour difference is in the observable range for ages \(\approx 3\) –5 Myr.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：受微透镜影响的年轻\(Z=0.002\)、\(z=6\)星团镜像图像在F115W和F444W滤光片之间的中位绝对颜色差异，作为正宇称星团像中位视F200W通量的函数，微透镜参数\(\Sigma_{\star}=10\ M_{\odot}\) pc -2。显示了质量\(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)（红圈）、\(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)（橙方块）和\(1\times 10^{5}\ M_{\odot}\)（绿三角）的星团模型，年龄为3、5、10和20 Myr（从右到左）。虚线表示我们认为颜色差异在JWST对星团透镜场观测中可能可探测的区域（详见正文）。对于质量范围\(1\times 10^{4}\) – \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)的星团，中位颜色差异在年龄\(\approx 3\) –5 Myr时处于可观测范围。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Photometric evolution in JWST/NIRCam filters F115W, F200W and F444W of the star light from a young, unlensed \(10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) , Pop III single-age star cluster at \(z=6\) , under the assumption of a fully-sampled log-flat IMF from 2–2000 \(M_{\odot}\) . At ages \(\approx 1\) –2 Myr, the star cluster becomes very bright in the F444W band as stars in the 300–2000 \(M_{\odot}\) mass range reach \(T_{{eff}}<2\times 10^{4}\) K states at the end of their lives.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：假设完全采样的对数平坦IMF（2–2000 \(M_{\odot}\)），在\(z=6\)处年轻、未透镜的\(10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)、第三族单一年龄星团星光在JWST/NIRCam滤光片F115W、F200W和F444W中的光度演化。在年龄\(\approx 1\) –2 Myr时，星团在F444W波段变得非常明亮，因为质量范围300–2000 \(M_{\odot}\)的恒星在其生命末期达到\(T_{{eff}}<2\times 10^{4}\) K状态。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Discrepant mirror image SEDs for \(z=6\) Pop III star clusters with a log-flat IMF throughout the 2–2000 \(M_{\odot}\) mass range. Left: Examples of JWST/NIRCam SEDs of positive (blue line) and negative-parity (red line) mirror images of a \(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) star cluster at ages 1.5 and 2.0 Myr. The black line shows the corresponding SEDs predicted by macrolensing alone (the same for both mirror images). Right: Median absolute colour difference between the F115W and F444W filters for mirror images as a function of the median apparent F200W flux of the positive-parity star cluster image. Models for star clusters of mass \(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\) (red circles), \(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) (orange squares) and \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) (green triangles) are shown at ages 1.5, 2.0 and 3.0 Myr (from right to left), in relation to the part of the diagram (dashed line) where we consider colour differences to be detectable. For \(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) star clusters, discrepant SEDs in the detectable regime are produced at 1.5–3.0 Myr, whereas lower-mass star clusters ( \(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\) and \(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\) ) only produce discrepant SEDs during a fraction of this age span. At median \(m_{200}^{+} 5 ). The behaviour of the \(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\) models at 2–3 Myr (very faint, with small SED difference between mirror images) is caused by IMF sampling effects due to the small number of stars present within such star clusters.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：\(z=6\)第三族星团（对数平坦IMF，质量范围2–2000 \(M_{\odot}\)）的不一致镜像图像SED。左图：年龄为1.5和2.0 Myr时，\(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)星团正宇称（蓝线）和负宇称（红线）镜像图像的JWST/NIRCam SED示例。黑线显示仅宏透镜预测的相应SED（两个镜像图像相同）。右图：镜像图像在F115W和F444W滤光片之间的中位绝对颜色差异，作为正宇称星团像中位视F200W通量的函数。显示了质量\(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\)（红圈）、\(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)（橙方块）和\(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)（绿三角）的星团模型，年龄为1.5、2.0和3.0 Myr（从右到左），相对于我们认为颜色差异可探测的区域（虚线）。对于\(3\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)星团，在1.5–3.0 Myr时产生可探测范围内的一致SED，而较低质量星团（\(1\times 10^{4}\ M_{\odot}\)和\(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\)）仅在此年龄跨度的一部分时间内产生不一致SED。在中位\(m_{200}^{+} 5 )时，\(3\times 10^{3}\ M_{\odot}\)模型在2–3 Myr时的行为（非常暗，镜像图像间SED差异小）是由IMF采样效应引起的，因为此类星团中恒星数量较少。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Relative contributions from stars of different masses to the integrated light in the JWST/NIRCam F115W (blue), F200W (green) and F444W (red) filters, in the case of a \(z=6\) star cluster with a standard, fully-sampled IMF, at ages 1 Myr (left) and 3 Myr (right)
figures.caption_zh: 图8：在\(z=6\)星团（标准、完全采样IMF）情况下，不同质量恒星对JWST/NIRCam滤光片F115W（蓝）、F200W（绿）和F444W（红）积分光的相对贡献，年龄为1 Myr（左）和3 Myr（右）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 最近，Goldman (2024) 在一个引力透镜化的、存在外流风的恒星形成星系（红移 $z = 1.87$）的星际介质中，获得了大尺度可压缩 Burgers 湍流的证据。最大空间尺度上的湍流时间尺度约为 500 Myr。这与约 6.4 kpc 的大空间尺度一起，暗示了一个持续约 500 Myr 的大尺度产生机制（如潮汐相互作用或并合）。另一方面，外流风要年轻得多，很可能是强烈恒星形成的结果。因此，恒星形成是否也可能驱动小尺度湍流？在本工作中，我们利用多点二阶结构函数来探究该星系中是否也存在小尺度湍流，如果存在，则尝试识别其驱动因素。我们获得了小尺度湍流的证据：对于星云气体速度场，其最大空间尺度约为 240 pc；对于外流风速度场，其最大空间尺度约为 290 pc。这些数值表明，含有高浓度年轻大质量恒星的恒星亚团或巨型星团可能是外流风和小尺度湍流的共同驱动源。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，小尺度湍流的存在表明，恒星亚团或巨型星团（含有高浓度年轻大质量恒星）可能是驱动小尺度湍流和星风的共同机制。这与大尺度湍流（由潮汐相互作用或星系合并驱动）形成了对比，揭示了星系中不同尺度湍流的不同驱动源。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The residual nebular velocity field, and a continuous fit in units of \(km/s\) as function of position along the major axis, in units of \(207.5\) pc.
figures.caption_zh: 图 1：残余星云速度场及其连续拟合，单位为 \(km/s\)，作为沿主轴的以 \(207.5\) pc 为单位的位置的函数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Multi-point structure functions of the nebular gas velocity field, in units of \((km/s)^{2}\) as function of spatial lags along the major axis, in units of \(207.5\) pc. Blue curve: 3 point structure function. Orange curve: 4 point structure function. Green curve: 5 point structure. Red curve: 6 point structure function.
figures.caption_zh: 图 2：星云气体速度场的多点结构函数，单位为 \((km/s)^{2}\)，作为沿主轴的以 \(207.5\) pc 为单位的空间延迟的函数。蓝色曲线：3 点结构函数。橙色曲线：4 点结构函数。绿色曲线：5 点结构函数。红色曲线：6 点结构函数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The residual outflowing wind velocity field, and a continuous fit in units of \(km/s\) as function of position along the major axis, in units of \(207.5\) pc.
figures.caption_zh: 图 3：残余外流风速度场及其连续拟合，单位为 \(km/s\)，作为沿主轴的以 \(207.5\) pc 为单位的位置的函数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Multi-point structure functions of the outflowing wind velocity field, in units of \((km/s)^{2}\) as function of spatial lags along the major axis, in units of \(207.5pc\) . Blue curve: 3 point structure function. Orange curve: 4 point structure function. Green curve: 5 point structure. Red curve: 6 point structure function.
figures.caption_zh: 图 4：外流风速度场的多点结构函数，单位为 \((km/s)^{2}\)，作为沿主轴的以 \(207.5pc\) 为单位的空间延迟的函数。蓝色曲线：3 点结构函数。橙色曲线：4 点结构函数。绿色曲线：5 点结构函数。红色曲线：6 点结构函数。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了在强透镜星系团Carousel（z=0.49）附近场星系和透镜源的光谱巡天结果。利用Gemini/GMOS狭缝掩模光谱和深VLT/MUSE观测，我们将透镜源总数增加到13个，其中包括三个先前在成像观测中未知但在MUSE数据中作为发射线源出现的源。在这些源中，10个具有可靠的 redshifts，另外2个具有来自可能的Lyα发射的 tentative redshifts（包括在此确定的七个新 redshifts，补充了Sheu等人（2024）先前呈现的结果）。透镜源的红移范围从z=0.96到4.09，其中大多数显示3-5个像，包括四个显示中心或径向像的源。总共，我们识别了这13个源的43个像。该透镜系统高度对称，并且可以用比典型星系团透镜更简单的透镜模型很好地建模，大量的源及其大范围的红移使该星系团成为约束宇宙学参数（如w和Ω_m）以及星系团密度分布的理想系统。此外，我们呈现了一个包含57个具有可靠 redshifts的非透镜场星系的星表，其中49个与星系团相关。我们测量了约1100 km s⁻¹的星系团速度弥散，由此估计出晕质量M_{200c} ≈ 1.2 × 10^{15} M_⊙。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：Carousel透镜系统对称性高，透镜模型简单，多源大红移范围使其成为约束宇宙学参数（如w和Ω_m）和星系团密度分布的理想系统。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Spectral FOV Comparison: A comparison of the fields-of-view of GMOS slitmasks and MUSE observations used in this work. The slits of all four GMOS slitmasks are shown in cyan. The broader cyan region shows the size of the GMOS slitmask for scale, not the actual orientation used in our four masks. The compass arrows in the bottom-right are each 1.5’ long.

Magenta: Known sources with redshifts presented in Paper 0 (Sheu et al. , 2024 ) ; White: Previously known sources with redshifts presented in this work; Cyan: Newly discovered sources, with extended emission observed in MUSE data; Yellow: Sources which do not yet have confident redshifts. Sources 8, 11, 12, and 13 display contours of Ly \(\alpha\) emission.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：所有源：Carousel系统中所有已知的透镜源，叠加在HST成像上，颜色编码如下。品红色：在论文0（Sheu等人，2024）中呈现了红移的已知源；白色：在本工作中呈现了红移的先前已知源；青色：新发现的源，在MUSE数据中观测到延展发射；黄色：尚未有可靠红移的源。源8、11、12和13显示了Ly α发射的等值线。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Full Source List: Full list of strongly-lensed sources. Source positions and redshifts previously reported in Paper 0 (Sheu et al. , 2024 ) are shown in italics, and those newly reported in this work are shown in bold. A dash (—) indicates the same value as the previous row. Sources or images without confirmed redshifts are listed as “n.a.”. *Sources 6d and 6c were reported in Paper 0 with different labels. We have renamed them for consistency with source group 4. \(\dagger\) Redshifts of sources 11 and 13 are considered tentative.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Known sources: Spectra of sources previously identified in imaging data. Left: MUSE data, with regions of extracted spectra overlaid. Right: Extracted spectra of each lensed source, identifying spectral features and redshift. For clarity, the spectrum of each lensed image is offset vertically. For Source 7, we include the Early Type Galaxy MARZ template match in red. For source 9, we additionally show a GMOS spectrum of image 9a exhibiting a clear [O II] doublet. Wavelengths contaminated by poor sky subtraction are indicated in vertical gray bands.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：已知源：先前在成像数据中识别的源的光谱。左：MUSE数据，叠加了提取光谱的区域。右：每个透镜源的提取光谱，标识了光谱特征和红移。为清晰起见，每个透镜像的光谱垂直偏移。对于源7，我们以红色显示了早型星系MARZ模板匹配。对于源9，我们额外显示了像9a的GMOS光谱，展示了清晰的[O II]双线。受较差天光扣除影响的波长以垂直灰色带指示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Lyman \(\alpha\) Emitters: Spectra and newly reported redshifts of strongly-lensed LAEs discovered in MUSE data. Left Column: RGB image of the MUSE data, with regions used for each object overlaid. Right Column: Extracted spectra of each object. In each plot, the left panel shows Ly \(\alpha\) emission visible in each image, offset and scaled for clarity. The right panels show the stacked spectrum of all images, demonstrating faint features. Grey shaded regions at the bottom show the uncertainty. Features labeled in green (purple) are expected in absorption (emission).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：Ly α发射体：在MUSE数据中发现的强透镜LAE的光谱和新报告的红移。左列：MUSE数据的RGB图像，叠加了每个天体使用的区域。右列：每个天体的提取光谱。在每个图中，左面板显示了每个像中可见的Ly α发射，为清晰起见进行了偏移和缩放。右面板显示了所有像的叠加光谱，展示了微弱特征。底部的灰色阴影区域显示了不确定性。以绿色（紫色）标记的特征预期在吸收（发射）中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Sources 12 and 13: The spatial distribution of Ly \(\alpha\) emission from sources 12 and 13, with each image labeled.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：源12和13：来自源12和13的Ly α发射的空间分布，每个像已标注。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: LAE Kinematics: Kinematics offsets of the red- and blue-shifted Ly \(\alpha\) emission of all four Lyman \(\alpha\) emitters, for each observed image. Kinematic offsets and uncertainties were computed with ppxf as described in Section 3.1.2 , using the same spatial regions of MUSE data as in Figure 4 .
