artifacts.abstract_zh: 詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）发现的大量致密“小红点”（LRDs）种群提出了一个重大难题：它们观测到的光谱无法用标准的天体物理学解释。在此，我们表明LRD光谱可以自然地由吸积的直接坍缩黑洞（DCBH）的辐射重现。通过辐射流体动力学模拟，我们追踪了DCBH种子通过致密、压缩加热、碰撞电离的吸积流生长的过程。该模型自洽地重现了导致观测到的巴尔默吸收的屏蔽层，同时允许紫外/光学辐射部分逃逸，以及再处理的红外辐射。关键的是，这种结构不是黑体，也不需要恒星贡献：紫外连续谱完全源自再处理的DCBH辐射，仅被少量尘埃衰减，其消光曲线与高红移星系一致。这一单一框架同时解释了LRD的关键观测谜题：(a) 微弱的X射线发射，(b) 金属和高电离谱线伴随缺失的恒星形成特征，(c) 超大质量黑洞，(d) 致密形态，(e) 丰度和红移演化——将它们直接与原始原子冷却晕联系起来，(f) 由辐射压驱动的长寿命（>100 Myr）、缓慢变化的阶段。我们的发现表明，JWST正在见证早期宇宙中重黑洞种子的广泛形成。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：JWST正在观测早期宇宙中大质量黑洞种子的广泛形成过程，这些"小红点"代表了原始原子冷却晕中直接坍缩黑洞的吸积活动。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Radial profiles of gas density, cumulative hydrogen column density, velocity, and optical depth at \(75\) Myr after DCBH seeding, corresponding to a representative, intermediate evolutionary stage of the RHD simulation [ 25 ] . These profiles are used to generate the DCBH spectrum in Fig. 3 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：DCBH播种后75 Myr时气体密度、累积氢柱密度、速度和光学深度的径向轮廓，对应于RHD模拟[25]的一个代表性中间演化阶段。这些轮廓用于生成图3中的DCBH光谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Artist’s illustration of our DCBH model for Little Red Dots.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们针对小红点的DCBH模型的艺术家示意图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison between the attenuated DCBH spectrum (red) and the spectrum of a prototypical LRD at \(z=5.28\) (blue), RUBIES-EGS-42046 [ 38 ] . The unattenuated DCBH spectrum is also shown (orange), together with the dust attenuation law \(\tau_{d}(\lambda)\) . The bottom panel displays the residuals between the attenuated DCBH spectrum and the LRD spectrum. The DCBH spectrum is shown at the intermediate accretion stage of \(\sim 75\) Myr, when it reached a mass of \(\sim 10^{6}\,{M_{\odot}}\) [ 25 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：衰减后的DCBH光谱（红色）与红移\(z=5.28\)的原型LRD（蓝色）RUBIES-EGS-42046 [38]光谱的比较。同时显示了未衰减的DCBH光谱（橙色）以及尘埃消光律\(\tau_{d}(\lambda)\)。底部面板显示了衰减后的DCBH光谱与LRD光谱之间的残差。DCBH光谱显示在约75 Myr的中间吸积阶段，此时其质量达到约\(10^{6}\,{M_{\odot}}\) [25]。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Reference DCBH synthetic spectrum, from the far-infrared ( \(120\,\mu m\) ) to the hard X-rays ( \(100\) keV). Line smoothing was applied to improve the clarity of the continuum visualization. The inset shows a zoom-in of the wavelength range highlighted in Fig. 3 . In this particular run, as the column density is \(>10^{25}\,cm^{-2}\) , the X-ray emission is faint. This fact does not imply that all DCBH accretion phases are X-ray weak to this extent; on the contrary, in the final phases, when most of the gas is depleted, DCBH accretion is X-ray bright [ 26 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：参考DCBH合成光谱，从远红外（\(120\,\mu m\)）到硬X射线（\(100\) keV）。应用了谱线平滑以提高连续谱可视化的清晰度。插图显示了图3中突出显示波长范围的放大图。在此特定运行中，由于柱密度\(>10^{25}\,cm^{-2}\)，X射线发射微弱。这一事实并不意味着所有DCBH吸积阶段都如此微弱；相反，在最终阶段，当大部分气体耗尽时，DCBH吸积在X射线波段是明亮的[26]。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Dust attenuation parameters; MCMC modeling
figures.caption_zh: 表1：尘埃消光参数；MCMC建模

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的多谱线分析框架，该框架结合了核主成分分析（Kernel PCA，一种无监督机器学习方法）和核SHAP（Kernel SHAP，一种可解释人工智能技术）。为了与基于PCA的研究（已广泛用于多谱线分析）进行比较，我们将该框架应用于来自阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列（ALMA）波段3档案数据的邻近星系NGC 1068的13条分子谱线的积分强度图。先前基于PCA的NGC 1068研究报告称，物理上有意义的结构主要被捕获到第二主成分。相比之下，我们的框架可以解释到第四主成分的物理上有意义的特征。此外，通过将我们的框架获得的结果与基于局部热动平衡（LTE）分析得出的分子柱密度进行比较，我们提出HCO+的丰度在分子外流区域（从星系中心延伸至约400 pc半径）相对增强，这可能是由于紫外辐射和高密度气体的影响。这些结果表明，我们的框架能够提供数据驱动的物理和化学特征洞察，而这些特征在先前研究中尚未被清晰识别。它也为解释快速增长的多谱线观测数据提供了一种高效工具。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该框架为多谱线观测数据分析提供了数据驱动的物理化学特征洞察工具，能识别传统研究中未清晰发现的物理特征，对处理快速增长的多谱线观测数据具有重要应用价值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The integrated intensity maps of NGC 1068. The left panel presents the 13 CO( \(J\) =1–0) integrated intensity map. The crosses indicate the positions of the SSC, SHC, and Pa \(\alpha\) regions defined in Rico-Villas et al. ( 2021 ) . Note that the circle marking the starburst ring is not a strict definition, but only shows its approximate location. The middle and right panels show the CS( \(J\) =2–1) and HNC( \(J\) =1–0) integrated intensity maps, respectively. The central circle indicates the field of view (FoV) of the [CI] data. The region outlined with dotted arrows marks the direction of the molecular outflow (Saito et al. , 2022a , b ) . The diameter of the circle is 1 kpc.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：NGC 1068的积分强度图。左图展示了13 CO( \(J\) =1–0)积分强度图。十字标记表示Rico-Villas等人（2021）定义的SSC、SHC和Pa \(\alpha\) 区域的位置。请注意，标记星暴环的圆圈并非严格定义，仅显示其大致位置。中图和右图分别展示了CS( \(J\) =2–1)和HNC( \(J\) =1–0)积分强度图。中心圆圈表示[CI]数据的视场（FoV）。虚线箭头勾勒出的区域标记了分子外流的方向（Saito等人，2022a，b）。圆圈的直径为1 kpc。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Correlation plot between two standardized molecular lines. The color indicates the Mahalanobis distance, which accounts for the correlation between the two variables. The red ellipse represents a Mahalanobis distance of 1. These plots correspond to the maps shown in Figure 1 (left), Figure 2, and Figure 3 of Okubo et al. ( 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：两条标准化分子谱线之间的相关图。颜色表示马氏距离，该距离考虑了两个变量之间的相关性。红色椭圆代表马氏距离为1。这些图对应于Okubo等人（2025）的图1（左）、图2和图3中所示的图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Kernel PCA resutls. The first row shows the contribution ratio (CR) and cumulative contribution ratio (CCR). The second row displays the KPC1 map on the left and the KPC2 map on the right, while the third row shows the KPC3 map on the left and the KPC4 map on the right. The color represents the KPC \(i\) scores. The black circle marks the field of view (FoV) of the [CI] data (Saito et al. , 2022a ) . The crossed dashed lines denote the direction of the outflow (Saito et al. , 2022b ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：核PCA结果。第一行显示了贡献率（CR）和累积贡献率（CCR）。第二行左侧显示KPC1图，右侧显示KPC2图，而第三行左侧显示KPC3图，右侧显示KPC4图。颜色代表KPC \(i\) 得分。黑色圆圈标记了[CI]数据的视场（FoV）（Saito等人，2022a）。交叉虚线表示外流的方向（Saito等人，2022b）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Kernel SHAP resutls. The top row shows the SHAP values for the KPC1 scores on the left and for the KPC2 scores on the right, while the second row shows those for the KPC3 scores on the left and for the KPC4 scores on the right. The color represents the standardized integrated intensity of each molecular line used in the analysis. In each figure, the x-axis corresponds to the SHAP value and the y-axis corresponds to the molecular lines. The black-outlined points indicate the grid at the AGN position.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：核SHAP结果。第一行左侧显示KPC1得分的SHAP值，右侧显示KPC2得分的SHAP值；第二行左侧显示KPC3得分的SHAP值，右侧显示KPC4得分的SHAP值。颜色代表分析中使用的每条分子谱线的标准化积分强度。在每个图中，x轴对应SHAP值，y轴对应分子谱线。黑色轮廓的点表示AGN位置处的网格。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The left panel in the first row shows the cluster map, while the right panel presents the clustering result. The second row illustrates the relationship between the SHAP values and the scores in Cluster 2, and the third row shows the corresponding relationship for Cluster 4. The numbers in the plot represent the correlation coefficients.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：第一行左侧面板显示聚类图，右侧面板显示聚类结果。第二行展示了聚类2中SHAP值与得分之间的关系，第三行展示了聚类4中相应的关系。图中的数字代表相关系数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The left panel in the first row shows the cluster map, while the right panel presents the clustering result. The second row illustrates the relationship between the SHAP values and the scores in Cluster 1, and the third row shows the corresponding relationship for Cluster 3. The numbers in the plot represent the correlation coefficients. The fourth row shows the relationship between the SHAP values and the scores in Cluster 4. In each plot, the red line indicates the mean SHAP value, and the light red region represents the 1 \(\sigma\) range.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：第一行左侧面板显示聚类图，右侧面板显示聚类结果。第二行展示了聚类1中SHAP值与得分之间的关系，第三行展示了聚类3中相应的关系。图中的数字代表相关系数。第四行展示了聚类4中SHAP值与得分之间的关系。在每个图中，红线表示平均SHAP值，浅红色区域表示1 \(\sigma\) 范围。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: KPC3 scores and column densities for each grid
figures.caption_zh: 表1：每个网格的KPC3得分和柱密度

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Correlation resutls. The orange squares represent the correlation obtained using the original column densities. The blue circles represent the mean correlation derived from Monte Carlo simulations, and the error bars indicate the \(\pm 1\sigma\) uncertainty estimated from the Monte Carlo results.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：相关性结果。橙色方块表示使用原始柱密度获得的相关性。蓝色圆圈表示从蒙特卡洛模拟得出的平均相关性，误差棒表示从蒙特卡洛结果估计的 \(\pm 1\sigma\) 不确定性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在冷核星系团中心，已观测到具有复杂形态和运动学的扩展暖气体和冷气体星云。它们在热星系团内介质（ICM）中的起源仍令人困惑，在众多机制中，中心活动星系核（AGN）的正反馈已被提出。在本工作中，我们进行了一系列极高分辨率流体动力学模拟，模拟了一个类似英仙座的冷核星系团，该星系团受到自调节的AGN喷流反馈，从而产生了真实的ICM性质。通过显式追踪暖电离气体、中性气体和分子气体相，我们研究了AGN活动与多相ICM之间的复杂相互作用。虽然AGN反馈整体上加热了ICM，但我们发现，在单个AGN喷流爆发期间，热物质也会横向注入到喷流轴方向，进入湍流混合层。这些物质在膨胀时压缩周围的热ICM，缩短了局部冷却时间，并在约30 Myr的特征时间尺度上导致冷团块的形成。通过使用示踪粒子，我们明确追踪了受影响区域内的冷却过程，发现在高压缩、低涡度区域中识别出的极热气体原位凝结形成冷团块。统计分析表明，一旦热气体成分（T ≥ 10^7 K）中的局部湍流马赫数σ_hot/c_s,hot达到约0.3，冷气体的凝结就会得到极大促进。所呈现的过程是理解星系团核心中冷气体形成物理机制的又一重要步骤。我们测得的特征湍流马赫数值，连同详细的多相气体运动学预测，为解释未来的X射线光谱和深射电数据提供了重要的理论工具，最终将有助于约束冷核星系团星云的起源。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，AGN反馈不仅加热ICM，还能通过压缩和湍流混合促进冷气体形成。湍流马赫数约0.3是冷气体凝结的关键阈值，这为理解星系团核心多相气体形成提供了重要机制，并为未来X射线光谱和射电观测提供了理论工具。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top panels: overview of the gas phases of interest during three particular moments of the simulation (columns from left to right). First row: X-ray emission shown with black-red colour tones (see the main text for the emission calculations) and jet tracer projections contours (black colour). X-ray cavities coincide with the locations where jet tracer material is prevalent; second row: Warm ionized gas ( \(3\times 10^{3}\ {K}<T<5\times 10^{4}\ {K}\) ) column density superimposed on the X-ray image, shown with blue-green colour tones; third row: molecular gas column density, superimposed on the previous two images, shown with yellow-orange colour tones. Fourth row: projected velocity along a line-of-sight of the warm ionized gas phase, which is in good agreement with observations. Bottom plot: Total mass of gas with temperature below \(5\times 10^{4}\ {K}\) (blue curve) and AGN power (grey curve), plotted as a function of time. Purple bands indicate corresponding time instances of the maps shown. The amount of warm and cold gas correlates with the AGN power because the cold gas, accreting onto the central SMBH, ignites the AGN feedback. The AGN-driven jets propagating through the multi-phase ICM create further perturbations, leading to the renewed formation of cold clumps and filaments.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部面板：模拟中三个特定时刻（从左到右各列）相关气体相的概览。第一行：X射线发射以黑红色调显示（发射计算见正文），以及喷流示踪投影等高线（黑色）。X射线空洞与喷流示踪物质占主导的位置重合；第二行：暖电离气体（\(3\times 10^{3}\ {K}<T<5\times 10^{4}\ {K}\)）柱密度叠加在X射线图像上，以蓝绿色调显示；第三行：分子气体柱密度，叠加在前两幅图像上，以黄橙色色调显示。第四行：暖电离气体相沿视线的投影速度，与观测结果吻合良好。底部图：温度低于\(5\times 10^{4}\ {K}\)的气体总质量（蓝色曲线）和AGN功率（灰色曲线）随时间的变化。紫色带表示所示图像对应的时刻。暖气体和冷气体的量与AGN功率相关，因为冷气体吸积到中心超大质量黑洞上会点燃AGN反馈。AGN驱动的喷流在穿过多相ICM时会产生进一步的扰动，导致冷团块和纤维状结构重新形成。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: From left to the right, X-ray emission-weighted profiles of electron number density, temperature and entropy of our simulations, colour coded with respect to time (purple-yellow colour bar), and compare with: the Perseus cluster derived by Churazov et al. ( 2004 ) (green diamonds); cool-core clusters from the ACCEPT sample by Cavagnolo et al. ( 2008 ) (grey lines), with a central temperature in a range of \(1.5\times 10^{7}\ {K}\leq T\leq 5\times 10^{7}\ {K}\) and a central entropy less than \(50\ {keVcm^{-2}}\) , i.e. having similar properties to the Perseus cluster. We find that our simulated galaxy cluster profiles are in good agreement with the observed Perseus-like cool-core clusters.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：从左到右，我们模拟的X射线发射加权电子数密度、温度和熵的轮廓，按时间着色（紫-黄色条），并与以下结果比较：Churazov等人（2004）得出的英仙座星系团（绿色菱形）；Cavagnolo等人（2008）ACCEPT样本中的冷核星系团（灰色线），其中心温度范围为\(1.5\times 10^{7}\ {K}\leq T\leq 5\times 10^{7}\ {K}\)，中心熵小于\(50\ {keVcm^{-2}}\)，即具有与英仙座星系团相似的性质。我们发现，我们模拟的星系团轮廓与观测到的类似英仙座的冷核星系团吻合良好。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: From left to right: maps of the average gas number density, average vertical component of gas velocity, and average total gas pressure (i.e., ram plus thermal) of a \(1\ {kpc}\) thick projection centred at \(y=0\) during the two AGN jet outbursts, at \(t=1.22\ {Gyr}\) (top) and \(t=1.50\ {Gyr}\) (bottom). With non-relativistic velocities ( \(v_{{jet}}\lesssim 0.1c\) ), the jets are able to compress the ICM, heating the cluster core and leading to the formation of localized overdensities (see Section 4.2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：从左到右：在两次AGN喷流爆发期间，\(t=1.22\ {Gyr}\)（顶部）和\(t=1.50\ {Gyr}\)（底部），以\(y=0\)为中心、厚度为\(1\ {kpc}\)的投影切片上的平均气体数密度、平均气体速度垂直分量和平均总气体压力（即冲压压力加热压力）的图。以非相对论速度（\(v_{{jet}}\lesssim 0.1c\)），喷流能够压缩ICM，加热星系团核心，并导致局部过密度的形成（见第4.2节）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Total mass of gas with temperature below \(5\times 10^{4}\ {K}\) (solid blue line), as well as mass of neutral hydrogen \({HI}\) (dashed blue line), molecular hydrogen \({H2}\) (dotted blue line) and warm-ionized phase (dot-dashed blue line). Note that the total amount refers to both hydrogen and helium, while the different phases refer only to hydrogen. For completeness, the total stellar mass (orange dashed line) is also shown. All the quantities are largely consistent with the values observed in real systems.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：温度低于\(5\times 10^{4}\ {K}\)的气体总质量（实蓝线），以及中性氢\({HI}\)质量（虚蓝线）、分子氢\({H2}\)质量（点蓝线）和暖电离相质量（点划蓝线）。注意，总量指的是氢和氦的总和，而不同相仅指氢。为完整起见，还显示了总恒星质量（橙色虚线）。所有数量都与实际系统中观测到的值基本一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: A series of time instances showing the spatial distribution of the jet fraction in the meridional plane (red-yellow colour-coding). The column density of the gas with temperatures below \(5\times 10^{4}\ {K}\) is overplotted as well (blue-green colour-coding). The black circle indicates a \(6\ {kpc}\) radius region, centred at \((x,y,z)=(-3,-12,-5)\ {kpc}\) , in which the properties of Fig. 7 are computed. As the jet material propagates laterally towards the indicated region it initially drags some of the cold gas with it ( \(t\sim 1.34-1.38\) Gyr); meanwhile, by injecting turbulence, creates the perturbations (Fig. 7 ) that, in the next \(30\ {Myr}\) , form fresh cold gas in situ (Fig. 9 ).A video of this figure is available in the online journal.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：一系列时间实例，显示子午面中喷流比例的空间分布（红-黄色编码）。温度低于\(5\times 10^{4}\ {K}\)的气体柱密度也叠加显示（蓝-绿色编码）。黑色圆圈表示一个半径为\(6\ {kpc}\)的区域，中心位于\((x,y,z)=(-3,-12,-5)\ {kpc}\)，图7的性质在该区域内计算。当喷流物质横向传播到所示区域时，它最初会拖曳一些冷气体（\(t\sim 1.34-1.38\) Gyr）；同时，通过注入湍流，产生扰动（图7），这些扰动在接下来的\(30\ {Myr}\)内原位形成新的冷气体（图9）。该图的视频可在在线期刊中获得。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Simplified sketch of the cold clumps formation model at the “edges” of the main jet. Only a small vertical section of one jet is shown for simplicity. The red arrow indicates the main velocity of the jet ( \(\sim 1000\ {km/s}\) ), while the edges are expanding in a perpendicular direction at a lower speed ( \(\sim 300\ {km/s}\) ). The thin black line demarks the separation of the jet material from the ICM. The green curly regions indicate the presence of turbulence, and the bold black arrows indicate the pressure gradient direction. Turbulent vortices and black arrows marking pressure gradients are shown only in some parts of the sketch for clarity. The blue clouds indicate the new cold clumps that are forming.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：主喷流“边缘”冷团块形成模型的简化示意图。为简单起见，仅显示一个喷流的一小段垂直截面。红色箭头表示喷流的主速度（\(\sim 1000\ {km/s}\)），而边缘以较低速度（\(\sim 300\ {km/s}\)）沿垂直方向膨胀。细黑线标示喷流物质与ICM的分界线。绿色卷曲区域表示湍流的存在，粗黑箭头表示压力梯度方向。为清晰起见，湍流涡旋和标示压力梯度的黑色箭头仅显示在示意图的某些部分。蓝色云团表示正在形成的新冷团块。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Left: Distribution of the hot gas mass, i.e., with \(T>10^{7}\ {K}\) , binned as a function of overdensity, \(\delta\rho/\bar{\rho}=(\rho_{i}-\bar{\rho})/\bar{\rho}\) , where \(\rho_{i}\) and \(\bar{\rho}\) are the density of the \(i\) -th cell and the average density, respectively. Right: corresponding mass-weighted cooling time in each bin of overdensity. The distributions are computed in a spherical region having a radius of \(6\ {kpc}\) and centred at \((x,y,z)=(-3,-12,5)\ {kpc}\) (highlighted by the black circle in Figs. 5 and 9 ) at \(t_{1}=1.29\ {Gyr}\) before the jet passage (red line), \(t_{2}=1.35\ {Gyr}\) and \(t_{3}=1.38\ {Gyr}\) during the jet passage (green and blue lines). While the distribution of overdensities is very narrow at \(t_{1}\) , at \(t_{2}\) and \(t_{3}\) there is a broad tail of much larger overdensities. The orange dashed line in the right panel separates bins that have average cooling times below \(30\ {Myr}\) . After the passage of the AGN jet, a significant fraction of the hot ICM mass exhibits low cooling times.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：左图：热气体（即\(T>10^{7}\ {K}\)）质量按过密度\(\delta\rho/\bar{\rho}=(\rho_{i}-\bar{\rho})/\bar{\rho}\)（其中\(\rho_{i}\)和\(\bar{\rho}\)分别是第\(i\)个网格的密度和平均密度）分箱的分布。右图：每个过密度箱中对应的质量加权冷却时间。这些分布是在半径为\(6\ {kpc}\)、中心位于\((x,y,z)=(-3,-12,5)\ {kpc}\)的球形区域内计算的（在图5和图9中用黑色圆圈标出），时间分别为喷流经过前的\(t_{1}=1.29\ {Gyr}\)（红线），以及喷流经过期间的\(t_{2}=1.35\ {Gyr}\)和\(t_{3}=1.38\ {Gyr}\)（绿线和蓝线）。在\(t_{1}\)时，过密度分布非常窄，而在\(t_{2}\)和\(t_{3}\)时，存在一个包含更大过密度的宽尾。右图中的橙色虚线分隔了平均冷却时间低于\(30\ {Myr}\)的箱。在AGN喷流经过后，相当一部分热ICM质量表现出较短的冷却时间。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Mass fraction of tracers that goes in the cold phase for every tracer re-run (dot symbols) performed with different divergence cuts from \(-10\ {km/s}/{kpc}\) to \(-500\ {km/s}/{kpc}\) ( \(x\) -axis) and with different compressive ratio cuts, \(r_{{cs}}>0.8\) (blue line) and \(r_{{cs}}>0\) (red line). The mass of tracers that condense in the cold gas increases when the divergence and compressive ratio cuts are higher, reaching up to \(\sim 60\%\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图8：对于每次示踪粒子重运行（点符号），进入冷相的示踪粒子质量分数，这些重运行采用不同的散度截断值，从\(-10\ {km/s}/{kpc}\)到\(-500\ {km/s}/{kpc}\)（\(x\)轴），以及不同的压缩比截断值，\(r_{{cs}}>0.8\)（蓝线）和\(r_{{cs}}>0\)（红线）。当散度和压缩比截断值更高时，凝结成冷气体的示踪粒子质量增加，最高可达\(\sim 60\%\)。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 由于正常星系的射电辐射是无尘埃的恒星形成示踪剂，追踪宇宙的恒星形成历史是SKA和ngVLA的一个关键目标。为了研究早期宇宙中射电光度示踪恒星形成率（SFR）的准确性，我们研究了1.0≤z≤1.8范围内一个JWST帕邢α星系样本的射电性质。在GOODS-S天区，我们将506个FRESCO帕邢α发射源样本与MeerKAT MIGHTEY巡天的1.23 GHz射电连续谱数据进行了交叉匹配，发现了47个探测源。在通过X射线探测、热中红外尘埃和延展射电发射过滤掉活动星系核（AGN）以及混合源后，我们得到了一个恒星形成星系样本，包括：11个编录射电探测源、18个非编录探测源（约3-5σ）和298个未探测源。对298个未探测源进行叠加，我们在射电波段获得了3.3σ的探测。该样本以及一个本地帕邢α发射源样本，与从本地（z<0.2）到高红移（z~1）的先前射电光度/SFR关系一致。对1.0≤z≤1.8的FRESCO数据进行拟合，我们得到log(L_1.4GHz) = (1.31±0.17) × log(SFR_Pa-alpha) + (21.36±0.17)，这与文献中的其他关系一致。我们可以通过一个玩具模型解释观测到的L_1.4GHz/SFR_Pa-alpha相关性中的部分弥散，该模型中同步辐射是瞬时帕邢α SFR延迟约10/75 Myr后的平均示踪剂。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：在z=1.0-1.8时，射电光度与帕邢α恒星形成率的关系与本地宇宙一致，支持射电作为宇宙恒星形成历史的可靠示踪剂。观测到的散射可以通过同步辐射相对于瞬时帕邢α SFR存在约10/75 Myr延迟的简单模型解释。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Attenuation corrected line luminosities with uncertainties plotted against redshift. (left) The 506 Paschen- \(\alpha\) sources in the GOODS-South sample with red squares indicating the 47 sources which match the host galaxies of the cataloged radio sources from the E-CDFS MIGHTEE image at \(1.23\,\) GHz. (right) Radio cataloged detections of Paschen- \(\alpha\) sources with AGN identified (as described in § III.2 ). AGN are selected via X-ray detections from a deep Chandra image (Luo et al., 2017 ) , mid-IR warm dust from SED fitting using NIRCam/MIRI data (Lyu et al., 2024 ) or from extended radio emission from MIGHTEE (§ II.2 ). One source is removed due to blended radio emission. Of 47 radio sources only 11 are SFGs free from AGN activity.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：经消光校正后的谱线光度及其不确定性随红移的变化。（左）GOODS-South样本中的506个帕邢- \(\alpha\) 源，红色方块表示与E-CDFS MIGHTEE图像中 \(1.23\,\) GHz编录射电源宿主星系匹配的47个源。（右）帕邢- \(\alpha\) 源的射电编录探测，其中已识别出AGN（如§ III.2所述）。AGN通过深钱德拉X射线图像（Luo et al., 2017）的X射线探测、利用NIRCam/MIRI数据（Lyu et al., 2024）的SED拟合得到的中红外暖尘，或MIGHTEE的延展射电发射（§ II.2）进行选择。由于混合射电发射，移除了一个源。在47个射电源中，只有11个是无AGN活动的SFG。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Breakdown of the 506 Paschen- \(\alpha\) sample following cross-matching with the radio catalog and cuts described in § III.2.1 , § III.3 and § III.4 . Numbers in brackets represent subsamples to be subtracted from the number above. The final breakdown of non-AGN sources (in bold below) is: 11 cataloged radio detections, 18 non-cataloged radio detections and 298 non-detections to be stacked.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：506个帕邢- \(\alpha\) 样本在与射电星表交叉匹配并进行§ III.2.1、§ III.3和§ III.4所述筛选后的细分。括号中的数字表示要从上方数字中减去的子样本。非AGN源（下方加粗）的最终细分为：11个编录射电探测源、18个非编录射电探测源和298个待叠加的非探测源。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Distribution in Paschen- \(\alpha\) luminosity/distance parameter space of the local sample from Tateuchi et al. ( 2015 ) as presented in § II.5 . Sources with Seyfert or LINER indicators in their optical spectrum are marked. These are removed from further analysis to avoid contamination by AGN as discussed in § III.2.2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自Tateuchi等人（2015）的本地样本在帕邢- \(\alpha\) 光度/距离参数空间中的分布，如§ II.5所述。标记了在其光学光谱中具有Seyfert或LINER指示的源。为避免AGN污染，这些源被从进一步分析中移除，如§ III.2.2所述。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Histogram of the SNR of MIGHTEE flux density pixels values at the positions of Paschen- \(\alpha\) sources without counterparts in the radio catalog. The 18 sources with values above \(3\sigma\) (the vertical dashed line) are considered non-cataloged detections.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在射电星表中没有对应体的帕邢- \(\alpha\) 源位置上MIGHTEE流量密度像素值的信噪比直方图。值高于 \(3\sigma\)（垂直虚线）的18个源被视为非编录探测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Radio luminosity plotted as function of Paschen- \(\alpha\) luminosity for our various AGN removed sub-samples: the 11 cataloged radio-detections, the 18 non-cataloged detections and the stack of the 298 remaining non-detections after removing blended sources. The local sample of 14 Paschen- \(\alpha\) emitters from Tateuchi et al. ( 2015 ) , minus AGN, is also plotted. Both axes have error bars plotted which are sometimes smaller than the symbol. Overlaid as lines are the expected 1.4 GHz free-free luminosity from a Paschen- \(\alpha\) source as well as \(\times 10\) and \(\times 100\) this value which corresponds to 10% and 1% 1.4 GHz thermal fractions (TFs), respectively. Nearly all galaxies have TF in the range \(1-10\%\) with the local sample having slightly higher TF.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：对于移除AGN后的各个子样本，射电光度作为帕邢- \(\alpha\) 光度的函数绘制：11个编录射电探测源、18个非编录探测源以及移除混合源后剩余298个非探测源的叠加结果。同时绘制了来自Tateuchi等人（2015）的14个本地帕邢- \(\alpha\) 发射源（减去AGN）样本。两个轴均绘制了误差棒，有时小于符号。叠加的线表示来自帕邢- \(\alpha\) 源的预期1.4 GHz自由-自由光度，以及该值的 \(\times 10\) 和 \(\times 100\)，分别对应10%和1%的1.4 GHz热分量比例（TF）。几乎所有星系的TF都在 \(1-10\%\) 范围内，本地样本的TF略高。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Timescales for the delay (relative to the star formation) and for the average over the prior preriod for the toy starburst model.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：玩具星暴模型中延迟（相对于恒星形成）和先前时期平均的时间尺度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Radio luminosity plotted as function of Paschen- \(\alpha\) SFR for our various sub-samples after the removal of AGN: the 11 cataloged radio detections, the 18 non-cataloged radio detections, the 14 local sources and the 298 remaining Paschen- \(\alpha\) non-detections. We also present the stacked value of these non-detections although it is not used in the fitting. For comparison we present the H \(\alpha\) /radio luminosity results from Duncan et al. ( 2020 ) at \(z\sim 1.65\) . We overlay various conversion factors from the literature including Bell ( 2003 ); Molnár et al. ( 2021 ); Cook et al. ( 2024 ) and Matthews et al. ( 2021 ) as well as indicating the redshift range they were evaluated over (the length of the line indicates the SFR range they were determined over). The best fit radio luminosity/SFR correlation is presented (see § III.5.1 ) with the pink tracks representing solutions within \(1\sigma\) of the median fit of both parameters. We also overlay a starburst evolutionary track as described in § III.5.2 with the arrows indicating the direction of time. The starburst has a Cauchy-Lorentz (pseudo-exponential) rise and fall temporal form with the synchrotron component of the radio luminosity delayed by 20 Myr (compared to 10 Myr for the Paschen- \(\alpha\) and free-fee components). The SFRs are averaged over previous 10 and 75 Myr for the Paschen- \(\alpha\) SFR/free-free luminosity and synchrotron luminosity, respectively. This model can partly explain the scatter around the best fit line in this and other work.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：对于移除AGN后的各个子样本，射电光度作为帕邢- \(\alpha\) SFR的函数绘制：11个编录射电探测源、18个非编录射电探测源、14个本地源以及298个剩余帕邢- \(\alpha\) 非探测源。我们还展示了这些非探测源的叠加值，尽管它未用于拟合。作为比较，我们展示了来自Duncan等人（2020）在 \(z\sim 1.65\) 的H \(\alpha\) /射电光度结果。我们叠加了文献中的各种转换因子，包括Bell（2003）；Molnár等人（2021）；Cook等人（2024）和Matthews等人（2021），并标明了它们评估的红移范围（线的长度表示它们确定的SFR范围）。展示了最佳拟合的射电光度/SFR相关性（见§ III.5.1），粉色轨迹表示两个参数中位数拟合 \(1\sigma\) 内的解。我们还叠加了一条星暴演化轨迹，如§ III.5.2所述，箭头表示时间方向。星暴具有柯西-洛伦兹（伪指数）上升和下降的时间形式，射电光度的同步辐射分量延迟了20 Myr（相比之下，帕邢- \(\alpha\) 和自由-自由分量为10 Myr）。对于帕邢- \(\alpha\) SFR/自由-自由光度和同步辐射光度，SFR分别取前10 Myr和75 Myr的平均值。该模型可以部分解释本工作及其他工作中最佳拟合线周围的弥散。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 下一代巡天项目，如欧几里得巡天、时空遗产巡天（LSST）和中国空间站望远镜（CSST）巡天，预计将发现约10^5个星系-星系尺度强引力透镜。这促使开发可扩展且稳健的透镜建模方法，以便在高分辨率后续观测之前，能够高效可靠地从广域巡天数据集中学习。我们设计了一个可扩展的、基于贝叶斯和Lenstronomy的流水线，并将其应用于一个由16个透镜候选体组成的样本，这些候选体是用麦哲伦望远镜上的南天天体观测并行成像仪（PISCO）观测的。PISCO提供四个波段（z、i、r、g）的成像，其颜色、深度和视宁度条件与LSST相当。为了充分利用该数据集的约束能力，我们的流水线执行同步多波段建模，在所有四个波段中使用共同的质量分布，同时允许每个波段有独立的光分布。这种方法利用颜色信息对透镜质量提供联合约束，与单波段分析相比，减少了不确定性。16个PISCO透镜候选体中有15个成功恢复，并具有可解释的透镜构型，包括DESJ0533-2536，这是首个报道的双曲脐点星系-星系尺度强透镜候选体。我们进一步评估了在PISCO类数据的分辨率和视宁度下，能够可靠约束的模型复杂度。总体而言，我们的结果表明，对地面数据进行可扩展的多波段透镜建模能够提取质量和源形态的有意义约束，为最大化即将到来的巡天中大量样本的科学回报提供了实用途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，可扩展的地面数据多波段透镜建模能够提取质量和源形态的有意义约束，为最大化即将到来的巡天中大量样本的科学回报提供了实用途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Dark Energy Survey (DES) data of the 16 lens candidates identified using a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) (Jacobs et al. , 2019 , 2019 ) . In most cases, the central lens galaxies appear red or orange, consistent with their quenched nature, while the lensed background sources are blue, reflecting ongoing star formation.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用卷积神经网络（CNN）识别的16个透镜候选体的暗能量巡天（DES）数据（Jacobs等人，2019，2019）。在大多数情况下，中心透镜星系呈现红色或橙色，与其淬灭性质一致，而透镜化的背景源呈现蓝色，反映了持续的恒星形成。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Summary of model configurations adopted for each system. The mass profile is consistent across all bands, while the light profiles of the deflector(s) and source(s) may either share the same model across bands or adopt different components, with separate parameters for each band. If present, satellite components are modeled as stated in the table.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：每个系统采用的模型配置总结。质量分布在所有波段中一致，而偏转体和源的光分布可以在各波段共享相同模型，或采用不同组件，每个波段有独立参数。如果存在卫星组件，则按表中所述进行建模。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Three-panel overview of all 16 lens systems. Each panel shows 2×8 images arranged by candidate ID. From top to bottom: (1) observed data, (2) best-fit lens model reconstructions, and (3) source-plane reconstructions. Each image is created by stacking the \(z\) , \(i\) , \(r\) , and \(g\) bands after registering them to the \(r\) -band frame, with a label in the top-left corner. The reconstructions represent the highest likelihood lens configurations in the MCMC chain, under the best-performing lens models (grey-highlighted row in Table 2 ), with red critical curves overlaid in the lens plane and white caustic curves shown in the source plane. The presence (or absence) of an inner critical curve (corresponding to the outer caustic in the source plane) reflects the slope of the mass density profile, appearing only when the logarithmic slope is shallower than isothermal ( \(\gamma
figures.caption_zh: 图2：所有16个透镜系统的三面板概览。每个面板显示按候选体ID排列的2×8张图像。从上到下依次为：（1）观测数据，（2）最佳拟合透镜模型重建，以及（3）源平面重建。每张图像通过将\(z\)、\(i\)、\(r\)和\(g\)波段配准到\(r\)波段帧后叠加而成，左上角有标签。重建结果代表MCMC链中最高似然度的透镜构型，基于表现最佳的透镜模型（表2中灰色高亮行），红色临界曲线叠加在透镜平面，白色焦散曲线显示在源平面。内临界曲线（对应源平面的外焦散）的存在（或缺失）反映了质量密度分布的斜率，仅当对数斜率比等温（\(\gamma\)）更浅时出现。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Example of multi–band gravitational lens reconstruction for the system DESJ2032-5658. Each row corresponds to a different filter— \(z\) , \(i\) , \(r\) , and \(g\) from top to bottom—followed by a composite color image based on band-normalized data in the final row. The columns display: (i) observed data; (ii) reconstructed model image with red critical curves; (iii) normalized residuals, defined as \(({model}-{data})/\sigma\) ; (iv) source-plane reconstruction with white caustics; and (v) lensed source light in the image plane, also with red critical curves. Within each band, a consistent color scale is used for the data, model, and lensed source image, revealing the increasing prominence of the lensed source in bluer bands. Critical curves, computed from a shared mass model, are transformed into each band’s frame using the inferred relative shifts and rotations with respect to the r-band. For the composite row, all images are aligned to the r-band frame, and the residuals are averaged across bands.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：系统DESJ2032-5658的多波段引力透镜重建示例。每一行对应不同的滤光片——从上到下依次为\(z\)、\(i\)、\(r\)和\(g\)——最后一行是基于波段归一化数据的合成彩色图像。各列显示：（i）观测数据；（ii）带有红色临界曲线的重建模型图像；（iii）归一化残差，定义为\(({model}-{data})/\sigma\)；（iv）带有白色焦散曲线的源平面重建；以及（v）图像平面中的透镜化源光，也带有红色临界曲线。在每个波段内，数据、模型和透镜化源图像使用一致的颜色标尺，揭示了透镜化源在更蓝波段中日益突出的现象。临界曲线由共享质量模型计算，并利用相对于\(r\)波段推断的相对偏移和旋转，变换到每个波段的帧中。对于合成行，所有图像都配准到\(r\)波段帧，残差在各波段间取平均。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : The \(1\sigma\) and \(2\sigma\) posterior distributions of Einstein radius, power law slope, ellipticity parameters, external shear parameters, for DESJ0305-1024. Colored contours show single-band reconstructions ( \(z\) , \(i\) , \(r\) , \(g\) ), which exhibit broad and inconsistent posteriors. The black line shows the joint four-band reconstruction, demonstrating tighter and more stable posteriors.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：DESJ0305-1024的爱因斯坦半径、幂律斜率、椭圆率参数、外部剪切参数的\(1\sigma\)和\(2\sigma\)后验分布。彩色轮廓显示单波段重建（\(z\)、\(i\)、\(r\)、\(g\)），表现出宽泛且不一致的后验。黑线显示联合四波段重建，展示了更紧凑且更稳定的后验。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Summary of key physics quantities for the full lens system sample. Listed are the target label, deflector redshift \(z_{{lens}}\) (with † indicating spectroscopic values and unmarked values from photometric estimates), right ascension and declination (in degrees), Einstein radius \(\theta_{E}^{\text{\tiny EPL}}\) , mass profile slope \(\gamma^{\text{\tiny EPL}}\) , total projected mass enclosed within the Einstein radius assuming either a fiducial source redshift of \(z_{s}=2\) or the system’s spectroscopic \(z_{s}^{\dagger}\) when available, external shear strength \(\gamma^{\text{\small ext}}\) , and position angles of the lens and shear components. Values with uncertainties are either directly obtained or derived from the posterior distributions, with 68% credible intervals. Spectroscopic redshifts are drawn from the ASTRO 3D Galaxy Evolution with Lenses (AGEL) survey ( tranAGELSurveyStrong2023 ; baroneAGELSurveyData2025 ) . The row highlighted in grey corresponds to the lens model shown in Figure 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：完整透镜系统样本的关键物理量总结。列出目标标签、偏转体红移\(z_{{lens}}\)（†表示光谱值，未标记值来自光度估计）、赤经和赤纬（度）、爱因斯坦半径\(\theta_{E}^{\text{\tiny EPL}}\)、质量分布斜率\(\gamma^{\text{\tiny EPL}}\)、假设源红移为\(z_{s}=2\)或系统光谱\(z_{s}^{\dagger}\)（若可用）时爱因斯坦半径内的总投影质量、外部剪切强度\(\gamma^{\text{\small ext}}\)，以及透镜和剪切分量的位置角。带不确定性的值直接来自后验分布或由其推导，给出68%置信区间。光谱红移来自ASTRO 3D星系演化与透镜（AGEL）巡天（tranAGELSurveyStrong2023；baroneAGELSurveyData2025）。灰色高亮行对应图2所示的透镜模型。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : The best-fit mass parameters for the DESJ0003 system under three different models, drawn from zeus samples. The number of decimal places for each parameter is chosen to reflect the precision suggested by the 68% credible interval of its posterior distribution. For model with satellite mass (constrianed position), the SIS component’s Einstein radius \(\theta_{E}^{\text{\tiny SIS}}\) has a posterior distribution that peaks near zero, and we report the 84% upper limit, derived from an exponential fit to the posterior.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：DESJ0003系统在三种不同模型下的最佳拟合质量参数，取自zeus样本。每个参数的小数位数根据其后验分布68%置信区间所建议的精度选择。对于带卫星质量（位置受约束）的模型，SIS分量的爱因斯坦半径\(\theta_{E}^{\text{\tiny SIS}}\)的后验分布峰值接近零，我们报告84%上限，该上限由后验的指数拟合推导得出。

figures.caption_en: Table 4 : Same as Table 3 , but for the DESJ2125 system. The inclusion of a SIS component significantly improves the fit, with BIC differences of approximately 52 and 76 for Model 2 and Model 3, respectively, relative to Model 1. The inferred external shear correspondingly decreases when the satellite is included, indicating that part of the perturbation previously absorbed by the shear is now attributed to the satellite mass.
figures.caption_zh: 表4：与表3相同，但针对DESJ2125系统。包含SIS分量显著改善了拟合，模型2和模型3相对于模型1的BIC差异分别约为52和76。当包含卫星时，推断的外部剪切相应减小，表明先前被剪切吸收的部分扰动现在归因于卫星质量。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们基于JWST先进深空巡天（JADES）中588个红移介于1.5<z<7.0的星系，利用低电离[NII]6583发射线测量了氮丰度。我们在样本中的40个星系中探测到了温度敏感的[OIII]4363极光发射线，从而获得了这一子样本的$T_e$基丰度。我们发现，低金属丰度样本的平均N/O丰度比至少比z~0样本高0.1 dex。特别地，我们观察到N/O比值向高值方向显著弥散，其中5个星系在低金属丰度（12+log(O/H)<8.0）下通过$T_e$基测量被识别为具有增强的氮丰度（log(N/O)>-1.1）。同时，对样本其余部分应用强线丰度测量，又发现了14个候选星系满足这些丰度截断，这意味着在这些红移下，约13%的12+log(O/H)<8.0星系在此水平上氮增强。我们发现，在高红移下，低金属丰度系统中的N/O丰度与恒星形成率、恒星形成率面密度和恒星质量面密度相关，而只有在高金属丰度系统中才出现与恒星质量的相关性。尽管这些“中等氮增强”星系（-1.1<log(N/O)<-0.6）有充分代表，但我们的低金属丰度样本中没有星系被识别为具有log(N/O)>-0.6的丰度，而这是高红移NIII]和NIV]发射体的典型丰度。这表明，在一些NIII]和NIV]发射体中看到的极端氮增强仅在最极端的星暴中才能达到。这提示这些升高的丰度是由极端环境下年轻大质量恒星的增丰所致，并且这种增丰路径对主序星系的影响较为温和，但仍然重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论为：极端氮增强仅出现在最剧烈的星暴中，表明这种增丰机制由极端环境下年轻大质量恒星的核合成驱动，对主序星系的影响相对温和但仍重要。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Upper panel: \(m_{F444W}\) vs. redshift for JADES NIRSpec galaxies entering into this sample. Large circles show the galaxies making it into our final sample (see Section 2 ) with colours denoting redshift. Green points show the distribution of all JADES galaxies with robust spectroscopic redshifts, while grey points show the portion of the JADES sample for which no reliable redshift was obtained (with the point location given by the photometric redshift). Lower left: Redshift distribution of final sample (colours) vs. all JADES galaxies with a robust spectroscopic redshift and \(1.5 Lower right: As for lower left, except showing the \(m_{F444W}\) distribution. Black dashed lines at \(m_{F444W}=27.0\) and \(27.5\) show the magnitude cuts for the \(m_{F444W}\) -limited portion of the JADES NIRSpec selection for Medium/JWST and Deep/JWST respectively (see Curtis-Lake et al. 2025 for details).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：上方面板：进入本样本的JADES NIRSpec星系的\(m_{F444W}\) vs. 红移。大圆圈表示进入最终样本的星系（见第2节），颜色表示红移。绿点显示所有具有可靠光谱红移的JADES星系的分布，灰点显示未获得可靠红移的JADES样本部分（点位置由测光红移给出）。左下方：最终样本（彩色）与所有具有可靠光谱红移且\(1.5<z<7.0\)的JADES星系的红移分布。右下方：与左下方类似，但显示\(m_{F444W}\)分布。\(m_{F444W}=27.0\)和\(27.5\)处的黑色虚线分别表示Medium/JWST和Deep/JWST的JADES NIRSpec选择中\(m_{F444W}\)限制部分的星等截断（详见Curtis-Lake et al. 2025）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Example spectra of three galaxies in the \(T_{e}\) -based sample. Left: RGB thumbnail showing the location of the three-shutter slitlet. Middle: Section of the NIRSpec spectrum in which key rest-frame optical emission lines from [O ii ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 3726, 3729 to [O iii ] \(\lambda\) 5007 are observed. Right: Section of the NIRSpec spectrum surrounding H \(\alpha\) , [N ii ] \(\lambda\) 6583, and [S ii ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 6716, 6731. Our best-fit model to this complex is shown in green. There is generally overlapping wavelength coverage between different gratings. Across both plot regions, the top panel shows the 2D spectrum from either G140M/F070LP or G395M/F290LP (see label), while the second panel shows the 2D spectrum from G235M/F170LP. In the 1D spectrum, G235M/F170LP is in black and other gratings are in blue.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：\(T_{e}\)基样本中三个星系的示例光谱。左：RGB缩略图，显示三快门狭缝的位置。中：NIRSpec光谱中观测到从[O ii]\(\lambda\lambda\) 3726, 3729到[O iii]\(\lambda\) 5007的关键静止光学发射线的部分。右：NIRSpec光谱中围绕H\(\alpha\)、[N ii]\(\lambda\) 6583和[S ii]\(\lambda\lambda\) 6716, 6731的部分。绿色显示我们对这一复合体的最佳拟合模型。不同光栅之间通常有重叠的波长覆盖。在两个绘图区域中，顶部面板显示来自G140M/F070LP或G395M/F290LP的二维光谱（见标签），而第二个面板显示来自G235M/F170LP的二维光谱。在一维光谱中，G235M/F170LP为黑色，其他光栅为蓝色。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Diagnostic diagrams showing the location of galaxies in our sample in emission line ratio space compared to \(z\sim 0\) galaxies from SDSS (Aihara et al. , 2011 , grey 2D histogram) . Red points show the galaxies that we discard from our sample due to significant AGN contamination, while the other colours indicate the approximate redshift of each source. The Kewley et al. ( 2001 ) AGN-SF demarcation line is shown in blue.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：诊断图，显示样本星系在发射线比值空间中的位置，与来自SDSS的\(z\sim 0\)星系（Aihara et al., 2011，灰色二维直方图）进行比较。红点显示因显著AGN污染而从样本中剔除的星系，其他颜色表示每个源的大致红移。Kewley et al. (2001)的AGN-SF分界线以蓝色显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Main panel: JADES \(T_{e}\) -based N/O abundance measurements as a function of measured [N ii ] \(\lambda\) 6583/[O ii ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 3726, 3729 ratio under different \(T_{e}\) and \(n_{e}\) assumptions. All points have \(T_{e}\) [O iii ] derived from [O iii ] \(\lambda\) 4363/ \(\lambda\) 5007 measurements, comprising a sample of 22 galaxies. Purple points show abundances derived assuming the \(T_{e}\) [O ii ]– \(T_{e}\) [O iii ] relation of Cataldi et al. ( 2025a ) , while red points show how these change if Pilyugin et al. ( 2009 ) is adopted instead. Circles denote galaxies for which \(n_{e}\) is measured from the [S ii ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 6716,6731 doublet, and the blue circles show how the purple points would shift if the \(+1\sigma\) value was adopted instead of the best-fit \(n_{e}\) value. Diamonds denote galaxies without \(n_{e}\) constraints – purple and blue diamonds assume \(n_{e}=100\) & \(10^{4}\) cm -3 , respectively. Dotted and dashed lines show conversions of [N ii ]/[O ii ]to N/O for different \(T_{e}\) and \(n_{e}\) values (assuming ICF( \({N}^{+}/{O}^{+})=1\) ). Dark blue solid, light blue solid, green dot-dash, and yellow double-dot-dash lines show the Pérez-Montero and Contini ( 2009 ) , Cataldi et al. ( 2025b ) , Hayden-Pawson et al. ( 2022 ) , and Florido et al. ( 2022 ) strong-line calibrations respectively. Top panel: The distribution of [N ii ] \(\lambda\) 6583/[O ii ] \(\lambda\lambda\) 3726, 3729 ratios among galaxies in which both lines are detected with \(S/N>3\) in our JADES strong-line sample.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：主面板：JADES \(T_{e}\)基N/O丰度测量值，作为在不同\(T_{e}\)和\(n_{e}\)假设下测量的[N ii]\(\lambda\) 6583/[O ii]\(\lambda\lambda\) 3726, 3729比值的函数。所有点均具有从[O iii]\(\lambda\) 4363/\(\lambda\) 5007测量推导的\(T_{e}\)[O iii]，包含22个星系的样本。紫点显示采用Cataldi et al. (2025a)的\(T_{e}\)[O ii]–\(T_{e}\)[O iii]关系推导的丰度，而红点显示若改用Pilyugin et al. (2009)关系时这些值的变化。圆圈表示从[S ii]\(\lambda\lambda\) 6716,6731双线测量了\(n_{e}\)的星系，蓝色圆圈显示若采用\(+1\sigma\)值而非最佳拟合\(n_{e}\)值时紫点将如何移动。菱形表示没有\(n_{e}\)约束的星系——紫色和蓝色菱形分别假设\(n_{e}=100\)和\(10^{4}\) cm\(^{-3}\)。虚线和点线显示不同\(T_{e}\)和\(n_{e}\)值下[N ii]/[O ii]到N/O的转换（假设ICF(\({N}^{+}/{O}^{+})=1\)）。深蓝实线、浅蓝实线、绿点划线、黄双点划线分别显示Pérez-Montero and Contini (2009)、Cataldi et al. (2025b)、Hayden-Pawson et al. (2022)和Florido et al. (2022)的强线校准。顶部面板：在我们的JADES强线样本中，两条线均以\(S/N>3\)检测到的星系中[N ii]\(\lambda\) 6583/[O ii]\(\lambda\lambda\) 3726, 3729比值的分布。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Nebular properties and chemical abundances derived for the 40 galaxies in our \(T_{e}\) -based sample. Columns \(1-3\) give unique identifiers and redshift. Columns 4 & 5 give the \(n_{e}\) derived from the [S ii ] \(\lambda\) 6716/ \(\lambda\) 6731 ratio and \(T_{e}\) derived from the [O iii ] \(\lambda\) 4363/ \(\lambda\) 5007 ratio. Column 6 gives the low-ionisation \(T_{e}\) [O ii ] derived adopting the C25 and P09 relations, respectively. Columns 7 & 9 give \(12+\log({O}/{H})\) and \(\log({N}/{O})\) derived using the C25 relation, while Columns 8 & 10 indicate how these values change if the P09 relation is adopted instead.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：为\(T_{e}\)基样本中40个星系推导的星云性质和化学丰度。第1-3列给出唯一标识符和红移。第4和5列给出从[S ii]\(\lambda\) 6716/\(\lambda\) 6731比值推导的\(n_{e}\)和从[O iii]\(\lambda\) 4363/\(\lambda\) 5007比值推导的\(T_{e}\)。第6列给出分别采用C25和P09关系推导的低电离\(T_{e}\)[O ii]。第7和9列给出采用C25关系推导的\(12+\log({O}/{H})\)和\(\log({N}/{O})\)，而第8和10列显示若改用P09关系时这些值的变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Nitrogen-to-oxygen abundance ratio as a function of oxygen abundance for our JADES \(T_{e}\) -based sample (blue diamonds). The blue dashed line shows the weighted average N/O for this \(12+\log({O}/{H})\) \( P09 \(T_{e}\) [O ii ]- \(T_{e}\) [O iii ] calibration was used instead of the C25 adopted for the fiducial values. Purple arrows show the systematic uncertainty arising from a weak or absent \(n_{e}\) constraint (see Section 3.2 for details). Green circles and diamonds show \(z\sim 0\) H ii regions (Pilyugin et al. , 2012 ; Berg et al. , 2020 ) . Green squares show \(z\sim 0\) star-forming galaxies from the CLASSY survey (Arellano-Córdova et al. , 2025b ) . Orange ‘ \(\times\) ’ marks show the high-N/O-selected subsample of DESI galaxies from Bhattacharya and Kobayashi ( 2025 ) . High-redshift N iii ]- and N iv ]-emitters are shown by the brown hexagons, compiled from (Isobe et al. , 2023 ; Marques-Chaves et al. , 2023 ; Castellano et al. , 2024 ; Schaerer et al. , 2024 ; Martinez et al. , 2025 ; Naidu et al. , 2025 ) . The grey solid, beige solid, and brown dotted lines show the \({N}/{O}-{O}/{H}\) scaling from Nicholls et al. ( 2017 ) , Cataldi et al. ( 2025b ) , and Scholte et al. ( 2026 ) respectively, while the purple dashed line shows the average N/O value derived for \(z\sim 0\) metal-poor dwarf galaxies in Berg et al. ( 2019 ) . The faint dotted lines show the solar ratios of each abundance.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：JADES \(T_{e}\)基样本（蓝色菱形）的氮氧丰度比随氧丰度的变化。蓝色虚线显示该\(12+\log({O}/{H})\) < 8.0子样本的加权平均N/O。红色菱形显示若采用P09 \(T_{e}\)[O ii]-\(T_{e}\)[O iii]校准代替基准值采用的C25时，丰度值的变化。紫色箭头显示由弱或缺失\(n_{e}\)约束引起的系统不确定性（详见第3.2节）。绿色圆圈和菱形显示\(z\sim 0\) H ii区（Pilyugin et al., 2012; Berg et al., 2020）。绿色方块显示来自CLASSY巡天的\(z\sim 0\)恒星形成星系（Arellano-Córdova et al., 2025b）。橙色‘\(\times\)’标记显示来自Bhattacharya and Kobayashi (2025)的DESI星系高N/O选择子样本。高红移N iii]和N iv]发射体以棕色六边形显示，汇编自（Isobe et al., 2023; Marques-Chaves et al., 2023; Castellano et al., 2024; Schaerer et al., 2024; Martinez et al., 2025; Naidu et al., 2025）。灰色实线、米色实线和棕色点线分别显示来自Nicholls et al. (2017)、Cataldi et al. (2025b)和Scholte et al. (2026)的\({N}/{O}-{O}/{H}\)标度关系，而紫色虚线显示Berg et al. (2019)为\(z\sim 0\)贫金属矮星系推导的平均N/O值。淡点线显示每种丰度的太阳比值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Nitrogen-to-oxygen abundance ratio as a function of oxygen abundance for our JADES strong-line sample, divided into four redshift bins. Circles show our strong-line abundance measurements, while triangles show galaxies for which we only have an upper limit on \(\log({N}/{O})\) . The black errorbars in the upper right corner show the median measurement uncertainties for the strong-line sample. Diamond markers show \(T_{e}\) -based abundances, carried over from Figure 5 . We include demarcation lines for our ‘moderate’ and ‘extreme’ nitrogen-enhancement selection criteria as a visual aid (see Section 4.2 ). Green squares and brown hexagons are as in Figure 5 , as are the grey, beige, and purple lines. Faint dotted lines show the solar ratios of each abundance.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：JADES强线样本的氮氧丰度比随氧丰度的变化，分为四个红移区间。圆圈显示强线丰度测量值，三角形显示仅有\(\log({N}/{O})\)上限的星系。右上角的黑色误差棒显示强线样本的中位测量不确定性。菱形标记显示来自图5的\(T_{e}\)基丰度。我们加入了“中等”和“极端”氮增强选择标准的界线作为视觉辅助（见第4.2节）。绿色方块和棕色六边形与图5相同，灰色、米色和紫色线亦然。淡点线显示每种丰度的太阳比值。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Nitrogen-enhanced galaxies from the JADES strong-line sample, based on our criteria of \(\log({N}/{O})\) \(>-1.1\) and \(12+\log({O}/{H})\) \(<8.0\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：基于\(\log({N}/{O})\) > -1.1和\(12+\log({O}/{H})\) < 8.0的标准，来自JADES强线样本的氮增强星系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 詹姆斯·韦伯空间望远镜（JWST）中红外仪器（MIRI）的中等至超深中红外成像巡天正在重塑我们对早期宇宙的看法，从超红尘埃星系和静止星系的出现，到再电离时代，再到第一批星系。本文介绍了JADES项目中MIRI协调并行观测部分，该部分在GOODS-S和GOODS-N天区获得了超深（155 ks）的$7.7 μ$m成像，覆盖约$\sim10$平方角分，以及中等深度（约$\sim5-15$ ks）的$7.7, 12.8$和$15 μ$m成像，分别覆盖约$\sim36$、25和22平方角分。本文描述了数据缩减过程，该过程结合了官方JWST校准流水线与自定义步骤，以优化热/亮像素标记和背景扣除。我们进一步引入了一个新步骤来处理由饱和源引起的余辉伪影。最终的、完全缩减的JADES/MIRI拼接图像作为JADES数据发布5的一部分发布，同时发布了基于NIRCam探测图像的先验强制测光数据，为早期星系群提供了关键的静止系近红外和光学约束。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，JADES/MIRI协调并行观测项目提供了高质量的中红外数据产品，这些数据将显著推进对早期宇宙中星系形成和演化的理解，特别是对超红尘埃星系、静止星系和再电离时代的研究。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: RGB image of the JADES/MIRI GOODS-S Deep parallel (R=MIRI F770W, G=NIRCam F444W, B=NIRCam F200W) shown outlined in teal. The GS-Deep mosaic covers \(\sim 10\) arcmin 2 with an average exposure time of 155 ks (43 hr) in the F770W filter (Section II.1 ). Background grayscale image is a stack of the NIRCam F444W and F200W mosaics. Zoom-in regions: (top left) a \(z\sim 14\) galaxy detected at F770W (JADES-GS-z14-0; Helton et al., 2025 , 2025a ) ; (top right) a compact grouping of quenched and star forming galaxies at \(z\sim 3.7\) termed the Cosmic Rose (Alberts et al., 2024a ) ; (bottom left) a region containing a representative cross-section of the galaxies in the GS-Deep parallel. The small purple box highlights JADES-GS-z14-1 (Wu et al., 2025 ) , which is undetected in F770W despite falling in a strip of the parallel with a total exposure time of 253 ks (70.7 hr, see Figure A.1 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：JADES/MIRI GOODS-S深场并行（R=MIRI F770W, G=NIRCam F444W, B=NIRCam F200W）的RGB图像，以青色轮廓显示。GS-Deep拼接覆盖\(\sim 10\)平方角分，在F770W滤光片中的平均曝光时间为155 ks（43小时）（第II.1节）。背景灰度图像是NIRCam F444W和F200W拼接图像的叠加。放大区域：（左上）一个在F770W中探测到的\(z\sim 14\)星系（JADES-GS-z14-0；Helton等人，2025, 2025a）；（右上）一个在\(z\sim 3.7\)处的致密淬灭和恒星形成星系群，称为宇宙玫瑰（Alberts等人，2024a）；（左下）包含GS-Deep并行中星系代表性横截面的区域。紫色小方框突出显示了JADES-GS-z14-1（Wu等人，2025），尽管它位于并行中总曝光时间为253 ks（70.7小时，见图A.1）的条带内，但在F770W中未被探测到。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The JADES/MIRI parallel footprints in the GOODS-S (top) and GOODS-N (bottom) fields for the F770W (orange solid color), F1280W (orange circle hatch), and F1500W (orange line hatch) filters. A small subset of the ancillary data available is shown for reference: Chandra X-ray 7 Ms imaging (gray background region; Luo et al., 2017 ) , NIRCam F356W imaging as in DR 5 from multiple programs Johnson et al. (purple shaded region; submitted , see) ) with the JADES/NIRCam Deep and JADES/NIRCam Medium footprints (PID 1180) highlighted (purple solid line), JOF (PID 3215) (blue violet solid line; Eisenstein et al., 2023b ) , SMILES MIRI 8-band survey (red dashed line; Rieke et al., 2024 ; Alberts et al., 2024b ) , and HST WFC3 F160W footprint (blue dotted line; Grogin et al., 2011 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：GOODS-S（上）和GOODS-N（下）天区中F770W（橙色实心）、F1280W（橙色圆形阴影）和F1500W（橙色线条阴影）滤光片的JADES/MIRI并行覆盖足迹。显示了一小部分可用的辅助数据作为参考：钱德拉X射线7 Ms成像（灰色背景区域；Luo等人，2017），来自多个项目的NIRCam F356W成像，如DR 5中所示（Johnson等人，紫色阴影区域；已提交，见），其中突出显示了JADES/NIRCam深场和JADES/NIRCam中等覆盖足迹（PID 1180）（紫色实线），JOF（PID 3215）（蓝紫色实线；Eisenstein等人，2023b），SMILES MIRI 8波段巡天（红色虚线；Rieke等人，2024；Alberts等人，2024b），以及HST WFC3 F160W覆盖足迹（蓝色点线；Grogin等人，2011）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of JADES/MIRI parallel observations (Section II ). Notes: Column 3: The depth is given as the aperture-corrected, \(5\sigma\) point source sensitivity. Column 4: Predicted \(5\sigma\) point source sensitivities from ETC v4. Column 6-7: Summary of overlap between the MIRI parallels and NIRCam imaging programs. PIDs are listed for overlapping NIRCam programs that obtained \(\geq 6\) filters and have \(>10\%\) overlap with the MIRI mosaic. The percentage covered is determined based on the F356W imaging that is included in JADES DR5. The list of NIRCam programs providing overlap to the MIRI parallels is not exhaustive. NIRCam program references: 1180, 1181, 1210, 1286, 1287 (JADES; Eisenstein et al., 2023a ; Johnson et al., submitted ; Robertson et al., submitted ) ; 3215, 4540 (JOF; Eisenstein et al., 2023b ) ; 2514 (PANORAMIC; Williams et al., 2025 ) ; 3990 (BEACON; Morishita et al., 2025 ) , 5997 (OASIS, PIs T. Looser & F. D’Eugenio)
figures.caption_zh: 表1：JADES/MIRI并行观测总结（第II节）。注：第3列：深度表示为孔径校正后的\(5\sigma\)点源灵敏度。第4列：来自ETC v4的预测\(5\sigma\)点源灵敏度。第6-7列：MIRI并行与NIRCam成像程序之间的重叠总结。列出了与MIRI拼接重叠\(\geq 6\)个滤光片且重叠率\(>10\%\)的NIRCam程序的PID。覆盖百分比基于JADES DR5中包含的F356W成像确定。提供与MIRI并行重叠的NIRCam程序列表并非详尽无遗。NIRCam程序参考文献：1180, 1181, 1210, 1286, 1287 (JADES; Eisenstein等人，2023a；Johnson等人，已提交；Robertson等人，已提交)；3215, 4540 (JOF; Eisenstein等人，2023b)；2514 (PANORAMIC; Williams等人，2025)；3990 (BEACON; Morishita等人，2025)，5997 (OASIS, PI T. Looser & F. D’Eugenio)

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Artifacts created from persistence due to saturated pixels (Section III.1.1 ). (left) A small area of the MIRI imaging detector is shown for six dithers for F770W (top), which was followed by six dithers in F1280W (bottom). An under-exposed artifact appears following the observation where a bright source saturates multiple pixels in at least one group. (Right) Without any correction, the final F1280W mosaic shows these persistence artifacts prominently.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：由饱和像素引起的余辉伪影（第III.1.1节）。（左）显示了F770W（上）的六个抖动和随后F1280W（下）的六个抖动的MIRI成像探测器的一小部分。在观测到亮源在至少一个组中饱和多个像素后，出现了一个曝光不足的伪影。（右）未经任何校正，最终的F1280W拼接图像显著显示了这些余辉伪影。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Greyscale images of GS-Deep F770W (top) and the GN-Medium F770W and F1280W (bottom) mosaics. Due to the significantly different exposure times (155 vs \(6-9\) ks), these are not shown on the same scale. GN-Medium and GS-Medium (Figures 5 and 6 ) are displayed on the same scale and stretch, derived from the GN-Medium F770W.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：GS-Deep F770W（上）和GN-Medium F770W与F1280W（下）拼接图像的灰度图。由于曝光时间差异显著（155 ks对比\(6-9\) ks），这些图像未按相同比例显示。GN-Medium和GS-Medium（图5和6）以相同的比例和拉伸显示，该比例和拉伸源自GN-Medium F770W。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Greyscale images of GS-Medium-1, -2, and -3 in F770W (left), F1280W (middle), and F1500W (right). Scale and strength match GN-Medium F770W (Figure 4 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图5：GS-Medium-1、-2和-3在F770W（左）、F1280W（中）和F1500W（右）中的灰度图像。比例和拉伸与GN-Medium F770W（图4）匹配。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Greyscale images of GS-Medium-4, -5, and -6 in F770W (left), F1280W (middle), and F1500W (right). Scale and strength match GN-Medium F770W (Figure 4 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：GS-Medium-4、-5和-6在F770W（左）、F1280W（中）和F1500W（右）中的灰度图像。比例和拉伸与GN-Medium F770W（图4）匹配。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The F770W \(5\sigma\) point source sensitivities reached as a function of exposure time in ks for various MIRI surveys. GS-Deep is shown as both the final mosaic (red star) and the partial data collected in 2022 (two pointings with 61 ks and two pointings with 94 ks, shown as orange stars). The 2023 data reached the same depths. The JADES GN-Medium, JADES GS-Medium, SMILES (Alberts et al., 2024b ) , MIDIS (Rinaldi et al., 2025 ) , MEGA (Backhaus et al., 2025 ) , and PRIMER (Liu et al., 2026 ) F770W depths are shown as a blue circle, yellow circles, a purple diamond, a green square, pink hexagon, and brown triangle, respectively. The dashed line shows the the expectation that sensitivity scales with the square root of time (normalized to SMILES).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：不同MIRI巡天中F770W \(5\sigma\)点源灵敏度随曝光时间（以ks为单位）的变化关系。GS-Deep显示为最终拼接（红色星形）和2022年收集的部分数据（两个指向分别为61 ks和94 ks，显示为橙色星形）。2023年数据达到了相同深度。JADES GN-Medium、JADES GS-Medium、SMILES（Alberts等人，2024b）、MIDIS（Rinaldi等人，2025）、MEGA（Backhaus等人，2025）和PRIMER（Liu等人，2026）的F770W深度分别显示为蓝色圆圈、黄色圆圈、紫色菱形、绿色正方形、粉色六边形和棕色三角形。虚线显示了灵敏度随时间的平方根变化的预期（归一化到SMILES）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 射电观测通过射电连续谱-恒星形成率（RC-SFR）关系，提供了无尘埃遮挡的星系恒星形成视图。新出现的证据表明，RC-SFR 关系存在恒星质量依赖性，这引发了一个更广泛的问题：其他星系属性如何影响这一关系。在本工作中，我们利用 LOFAR 两米巡天第二次数据发布（LoTSS-DR2），研究了局域（z ≤ 0.3）恒星形成星系（SFGs）中全局 RC-SFR 关系对星系属性的依赖性。采用非参数决策树回归算法，我们基于 SDSS-DR8 的光谱数据，使用 18,828 个发射线分类的 SFGs 样本，识别出估计射电光度最重要的星系属性。除了光谱获得的 SFR 和恒星质量值，我们还使用了来自 GALEX–SDSS–WISE 遗留目录（GSWLC）的光度 SED 拟合导出的 SFR 和恒星质量。我们发现，星系的 SFR 对于预测射电光度最为重要，其次是恒星质量，显著性 >5σ。通过将 LoTSS 目录的 150 MHz 流量密度与其余发射线分类样本（总共 35,099 个星系）的孔径测光相结合，我们获得了 RC-SFR 关系的新校准。无论使用光谱还是光度导出的 SFR 和恒星质量，该校准均无显著变化，尽管这些方法探测的是不同特征时标上的恒星形成。我们的结果突显了决策树算法在处理截断的射电选择星系样本方面的实用性，这对未来射电源的光谱巡天研究将很有价值。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，决策树算法在处理截断的射电选择星系样本方面具有实用性，对未来射电源的光谱巡天研究有重要价值，为射电连续谱-恒星形成率关系提供了新的校准。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Sky coverage of MPA–JHU DR8 and LoTSS-DR2. The light and dark grey regions indicate sources from the MPA–JHU and LoTSS-DR2 catalogues respectively. The black points represent sources that belong to the parent sample as defined in Section 3 , i.e. sources that have optical as well as radio observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图 1：MPA–JHU DR8 和 LoTSS-DR2 的天空覆盖。浅灰色和深灰色区域分别表示来自 MPA–JHU 和 LoTSS-DR2 目录的源。黑点表示属于第 3 节定义的主样本的源，即同时具有光学和射电观测的源。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Distribution of gas phase metallicity, velocity dispersion, radio luminosity and redshift for our samples. The 18,828 galaxies which contain LoTSS flux densities given in the H23 catalogue are shown in dark grey. For the sample of 35,099 galaxies (18,828 sources with catalogued radio flux densities and aperture flux densities measured for remaining 16,271 sources), the distributions are shown in light grey.
figures.caption_zh: 图 2：我们样本的气相金属丰度、速度弥散、射电光度和红移的分布。包含 H23 目录中给出的 LoTSS 流量密度的 18,828 个星系以深灰色显示。对于 35,099 个星系样本（18,828 个具有目录射电流量密度的源和其余 16,271 个源测量的孔径流量密度），分布以浅灰色显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison of SFR and stellar mass values derived using the photometric (GSWLC-X2) and spectroscopic (MPA–JHU) datasets for sources with 150 MHz flux densities in the LoTSS catalogue (in dark grey) and sources with radio luminosities measured with aperture photometry (in light grey). The inset plot shows the difference between SFR and stellar mass, and all values have been converted to our adopted Chabrier IMF (where required).
figures.caption_zh: 图 3：对于 LoTSS 目录中具有 150 MHz 流量密度的源（深灰色）和通过孔径测光测量射电光度的源（浅灰色），使用光度（GSWLC-X2）和光谱（MPA–JHU）数据集导出的 SFR 和恒星质量值的比较。插图显示了 SFR 和恒星质量之间的差异，所有值均已转换为我们采用的 Chabrier IMF（必要时）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The relationship between redshift and 150 MHz luminosity for our samples. All sources in the LoTSS-DR2 catalogue with redshifts \(z\leq 0.3\) are shown in light grey, while the subset of sources with LoTSS-DR2 catalogue matches in our spectroscopic sample are shown in black. These have been complemented by the sources for which we have measured aperture 150 MHz flux densities, which are shown in dark grey (as indicated in the legend).
figures.caption_zh: 图 4：我们样本的红移与 150 MHz 光度之间的关系。LoTSS-DR2 目录中所有红移 \(z\leq 0.3\) 的源以浅灰色显示，而我们的光谱样本中与 LoTSS-DR2 目录匹配的源子集以黑色显示。这些源已通过我们测量了孔径 150 MHz 流量密度的源进行补充，后者以深灰色显示（如图例所示）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Upper panel: relative feature importance of SFR, stellar mass, gas-phase metallicity and velocity dispersion in predicting radio luminosities for our sample of SFGs, when included in the model. The importance values of parameters in each model sum to 1. Lower panel: permuted relative importance for the same features. The numbers below each bar correspond to the legend, and to the enumerated explanations in section 4.1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图 5：上图：在模型中包含 SFR、恒星质量、气相金属丰度和速度弥散时，这些特征在预测我们 SFGs 样本射电光度方面的相对重要性。每个模型中参数的重要性值之和为 1。下图：相同特征的置换相对重要性。每个柱下方的数字对应图例以及第 4.1 节中列举的解释。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Dependence of radio luminosity at 150 MHz on SFR and stellar mass. The top left panel shows the radio luminosity at 150 MHz as a function of photometrically-derived (i.e. GSWLC) star-formation rates. Each coloured line represents the median likelihood value of radio luminosity at a given SFR in stellar mass bins indicated by the colour bar. The mass-independent best-fitting line(s) from G18 (in green), S21 (in red, dashed) and D24 (in blue, dashed-dot) are overplotted. Top right panel: Similar to the top left panel, but the median likelihood radio luminosity as a function of stellar mass are plotted in bins of SFR as indicated by the colour bar. The bottom left panel shows the RC–SFR relationship with the stellar mass dependence taken out using equation 3 and the best-fit parameters obtained in Section 4.2 . The bottom right panel shows the median likelihood radio luminosity as a function of stellar mass with SFR dependence taken out using equation 3 . The radio luminosity values, estimated in bins of star formation rates (SFRs) using the mass-dependent form of the RC–SFR relation (given by equation 6 ), are represented by the diamond-shaped points in the top left panel. These values are calculated based on the median SFR and stellar mass within each SFR bin. The solid line represents the best-fit line through the diamond points. In the bottom left panel, we plot the radio luminosity values, shown as circles, calculated using median SFR values in each bin, without accounting for the stellar mass dependence.The dashed line represents the best-fit line through the circle points.
figures.caption_zh: 图 6：150 MHz 射电光度对 SFR 和恒星质量的依赖性。左上图显示了 150 MHz 射电光度作为光度导出（即 GSWLC）恒星形成率的函数。每条彩色线表示在由色条指示的恒星质量区间内，给定 SFR 下射电光度的中位似然值。来自 G18（绿色）、S21（红色虚线）和 D24（蓝色点划线）的质量无关最佳拟合线被叠加。右上图：与左上图类似，但射电光度的中位似然值作为恒星质量的函数，在由色条指示的 SFR 区间内绘制。左下图显示了使用方程 3 和 4.2 节获得的最佳拟合参数去除恒星质量依赖性后的 RC–SFR 关系。右下图显示了使用方程 3 去除 SFR 依赖性后射电光度的中位似然值作为恒星质量的函数。使用 RC–SFR 关系的质量依赖形式（由方程 6 给出），在恒星形成率（SFR）区间内估计的射电光度值，由左上图中的菱形点表示。这些值基于每个 SFR 区间内的中位 SFR 和恒星质量计算。实线表示通过菱形点的最佳拟合线。在左下图中，我们绘制了使用每个区间内中位 SFR 值计算的射电光度值（显示为圆圈），未考虑恒星质量依赖性。虚线表示通过圆圈点的最佳拟合线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Same as Figure 6 but with stellar mass and SFR values taken from the spectroscopic dataset (i.e. MPA–JHU).
figures.caption_zh: 图 7：与图 6 相同，但恒星质量和 SFR 值取自光谱数据集（即 MPA–JHU）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Best-fit values of \(L_{c}\) , \(\beta\) and \(\gamma\) for the parametric model for both photometric (GSWLC) and spectroscopic (MPA–JHU) datasets, compared with those values from previous works.
figures.caption_zh: 表 1：光度（GSWLC）和光谱（MPA–JHU）数据集的参数模型中 \(L_{c}\) 、 \(\beta\) 和 \(\gamma\) 的最佳拟合值，并与先前工作的值进行比较。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 热Sunyaev-Zel'dovich（tSZ）效应为探测星系团和宇宙网中电离气体的热压力提供了有力工具；约束模拟重建了本地宇宙的质量场和速度场。我们探讨了这两者如何相互提供信息：tSZ信号为评估约束模拟的保真度提供了基准，而约束模拟则为tSZ研究提供了关于宇宙网结构的位置、总质量和密度轮廓的信息。我们专注于贝叶斯起源重建自星系（BORG）范式中的星团预测，引入了CSiBORG-Manticore，这是一个新的最先进的数字孪生套件——数据约束的后验模拟，其初始条件通过贝叶斯正向建模推断。我们开发了一个框架，用于根据约束模拟匹配普朗克卫星对星团切片的Compton-$y$图的能力进行评分，并利用它展示了相较于先前BORG重建的改进。我们进一步通过eROSITA的弱引力透镜校准X射线质量验证了晕质量。我们还展示了高保真数字孪生如何通过质量-可观测关系的新校准，为从tSZ数据中提取额外信息提供实用途径，并为Compton-$y$图的纯统计分析提供了补充框架。这为将约束模拟中固有的大尺度结构信息整合到CMB次级各向异性研究中铺平了道路。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该研究为整合约束模拟中的大尺度结构信息到CMB次级各向异性研究中铺平了道路，提供了与纯统计Compton-y图分析互补的框架，展示了tSZ效应与约束模拟相互增强的潜力。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Selected nearby clusters for detailed analysis, ordered by recession velocity. We report the Galactic longitude \(\ell\) , Galactic latitude \(b\) , cosmic microwave background-frame recession velocity \(cz_{CMB}\) , the Planck thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich mass (Planck Collaboration and others, 2016d ) , and the weak-lensing-calibrated eROSITA mass (Bulbul and others, 2024 ) , where available. Virgo lacks a thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich mass due to its large angular extent relative to the Planck beam; other clusters may be absent due to proximity to the Zone of Avoidance. Some clusters lack eROSITA masses due to the half-sky coverage of the eRASS1 data release.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：按退行速度排序的用于详细分析的选定邻近星团。我们报告了银经\(\ell\)、银纬\(b\)、宇宙微波背景框架退行速度\(cz_{CMB}\)、普朗克热Sunyaev–Zel’dovich质量（Planck Collaboration and others, 2016d）以及弱引力透镜校准的eROSITA质量（Bulbul and others, 2024）（如可用）。室女座因相对于普朗克波束的角尺度较大而缺乏热Sunyaev–Zel’dovich质量；其他星团可能因靠近避让区而缺失。部分星团因eRASS1数据发布的半天空覆盖而缺乏eROSITA质量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Distribution of \(p_{tSZ}\) for selected clusters from Table 1 across realisations in CB2 and CBM . For each cluster, \(p_{tSZ}\) is the fraction of random sky positions that yield an equal or higher thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich signal than the observed cluster position; low values indicate that the simulated halo lies at the observed thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich hotspot, indicative of a well-reconstructed cluster. The horizontal dashed line marks \(p_{tSZ}=0.05\) . We also show \(p_{tSZ}\) values for SLOW clusters (Hernández-Martínez et al. , 2024 ) , computed using the same procedure with their simulated halo positions.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：表1中选定星团的\(p_{tSZ}\)在CB2和CBM各次实现中的分布。对于每个星团，\(p_{tSZ}\)是随机天空位置产生等于或高于观测星团位置的热Sunyaev–Zel’dovich信号的比例；低值表明模拟晕位于观测到的热Sunyaev–Zel’dovich热点，指示星团重建良好。水平虚线标记\(p_{tSZ}=0.05\)。我们还展示了SLOW星团（Hernández-Martínez et al., 2024）的\(p_{tSZ}\)值，使用相同程序以其模拟晕位置计算得出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Compton- \(y\) map cutouts centred on selected clusters. White dots mark the positions of CBM halo realisations, the green dot indicates the reported cluster centre from the optical catalogue, and the red dot marks the local peak of the thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich map. For Shapley (A3558), the cyan dot marks the position of Shapley (A3562), which lies within the field of view.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：以选定星团为中心的Compton-\(y\)图切片。白点标记CBM晕实现的位置，绿点指示光学星表中报告的星团中心，红点标记热Sunyaev–Zel’dovich图的局部峰值。对于Shapley（A3558），青点标记Shapley（A3562）的位置，该星团位于视场内。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Stacked 1D radial thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich profiles for haloes ranked by mass. Profiles are measured at normalised angular separations \(\theta/(2\theta_{500{c}})\) and stacked within cumulative mass bins: top 10, top 50, and top 100 most massive haloes per realisation, then combined across all realisations. Halo masses \(M_{200{c}}\) are in units of \(h^{-1}\,M_{\odot}\) . Solid lines show the mean stacked profile for CB2 and CBM , with shaded bands indicating the \(1\sigma\) uncertainty from bootstrap resampling. The grey band shows the random expectation from stacking at random sky positions. Both simulations show a clear signal above random in the top 10 and top 50 bins, with CBM marginally stronger in the top 10. The signal weakens in the top 100 bin, approaching the random baseline.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：按质量排序的晕的堆叠一维径向热Sunyaev–Zel’dovich轮廓。轮廓在归一化角分离\(\theta/(2\theta_{500{c}})\)处测量，并按累积质量区间堆叠：每次实现中质量最大的前10、前50和前100个晕，然后跨所有实现合并。晕质量\(M_{200{c}}\)的单位为\(h^{-1}\,M_{\odot}\)。实线显示CB2和CBM的平均堆叠轮廓，阴影带表示自举重采样的\(1\sigma\)不确定性。灰色带显示在随机天空位置堆叠的随机期望。两个模拟在前10和前50区间均显示高于随机的清晰信号，其中CBM在前10区间略强。信号在前100区间减弱，接近随机基线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of Planck thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich masses and eROSITA X-ray masses for matched clusters; error bars show \(1\sigma\) uncertainties. The dashed line shows the one-to-one relation. The Planck masses are systematically lower by \({\sim}0.14\penalty 10000\ {dex}\) ( \({\sim}30\%\) ), consistent with the known hydrostatic mass bias (Sereno et al. , 2017 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：匹配星团的普朗克热Sunyaev–Zel’dovich质量与eROSITA X射线质量比较；误差棒显示\(1\sigma\)不确定性。虚线显示一对一关系。普朗克质量系统性地低约\({\sim}0.14\penalty 10000\ {dex}\)（\({\sim}30\%\)），与已知的流体静力学质量偏差一致（Sereno et al., 2017）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Planck cluster scaling relations. Top row : integrated Compton parameter \(Y_{500{c}}^{tSZ}\) versus Bayesian Origin Reconstruction from Galaxies halo mass; the red dashed line shows the expected self-similar slope of \(5/3\) . Bottom row : Planck-calibrated mass \(M_{500{c}}^{tSZ}\) versus Bayesian Origin Reconstruction from Galaxies halo mass; the red dashed line shows the one-to-one relation.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：普朗克星团标度关系。上行：积分Compton参数\(Y_{500{c}}^{tSZ}\)与贝叶斯起源重建自星系晕质量的关系；红色虚线显示预期的自相似斜率\(5/3\)。下行：普朗克校准质量\(M_{500{c}}^{tSZ}\)与贝叶斯起源重建自星系晕质量的关系；红色虚线显示一对一关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: eROSITA mass–mass relations comparing \(M_{500{c}}^{X-ray}\) to the Bayesian Origin Reconstruction from Galaxies halo mass. The one-to-one relation is shown as a red dashed line.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：eROSITA质量-质量关系，比较\(M_{500{c}}^{X-ray}\)与贝叶斯起源重建自星系晕质量。一对一关系以红色虚线显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Comparison of \(p_{LUM}\) -values and \(p_{tSZ}\) -values for selected clusters ( Table 1 ) in CBM . Points show the median \(p\) -value across realisations for each cluster, with error bars indicating the 16th–84th percentile spread. The red dashed line indicates 1:1 correspondence. The two metrics are correlated, though the thermal Sunyaev–Zel’dovich test is generally stricter.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：CBM中选定星团（表1）的\(p_{LUM}\)值与\(p_{tSZ}\)值比较。点显示每个星团跨实现的\(p\)值中位数，误差棒指示第16至第84百分位范围。红色虚线表示1:1对应关系。两个指标相关，但热Sunyaev–Zel’dovich检验通常更严格。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强透镜化的尖点结构类星体为探测小尺度暗物质结构提供了独特的灵敏探针。利用17个四重成像尖点透镜中最大的无微引力透镜效应流量比，我们结合冷暗物质（CDM）、自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）和模糊暗物质（FDM）情景下模拟透镜实现的广泛蒙特卡洛模拟。在此基础上，我们提出了一个区域（短轴和窄长轴尖点透镜），在该区域内，即使采用具有多极自由度（捕获盘状、非对称或并合驱动结构）的全局参数化模型（“宏观模型”），流量比异常仍然存在。在该区域内，J1042+1641与CDM和SIDM均存在$>3σ$的不兼容性。我们的结果得到的贝叶斯因子超过$100$，为FDM相对于甚至最乐观的CDM和SIDM情景提供了非常强的证据。由于只有11个尖点透镜位于该区域内，扩展至更大样本对于评估其统计普遍性以及利用未来的无微引力透镜效应流量比数据最终确认这些发现至关重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用总结，FDM在解释尖点透镜流量比异常方面优于CDM和SIDM，但当前只有11个尖点透镜位于关键区域，需要更大样本进行统计验证和最终确认。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top panels: Effective convergence perturbations ( \(\kappa_{{eff,sub}}\) ; see Eq. ( 14 )) induced by substructure in a representative lens with significant \(m=3/4\) multipoles, characterized by a major-axis angle \(\phi=70.63^{\circ}\) (see Extended Data Table. 3 for macromodel parameters). The black ellipse denotes the critical curve, and the insets show the distinct perturbation patterns associated with different dark matter scenarios at each cusp image position (A, B and C). The colours encode the angular misfit \(\chi^{2}\) (see Eq. ( 15 )), constructed from \(\phi\) and \(\phi_{1}\) . Middle panels: Source-plane caustics, with background colour indicating \(\log|\mu|\) . Insets illustrate the corresponding source positions for the points in the top panels, with colours also encoding \(\chi^{2}\) . They highlight substructure-induced distortions and local variations in the caustic shape across different dark matter scenarios. Bottom panels: Scatter distributions of \(R_{{cusp}}\) obtained while traversing \(\phi\) near the cusp angle. As the source approaches the narrow cusp, the differences among CDM, SIDM, and FDM increase substantially. In particular, interference-driven density fluctuations in FDM produce a larger fraction of high- \(R_{{cusp}}\) points.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部面板：具有显著 \(m=3/4\) 多极的代表性透镜中，由次结构引起的有效会聚扰动（ \(\kappa_{{eff,sub}}\) ；见公式（14）），其特征为主轴角 \(\phi=70.63^{\circ}\) （宏观模型参数见扩展数据表3）。黑色椭圆表示临界曲线，插图显示了每个尖点像位置（A、B和C）处不同暗物质情景相关的不同扰动模式。颜色编码由 \(\phi\) 和 \(\phi_{1}\) 构建的角度失配 \(\chi^{2}\) （见公式（15））。中间面板：源平面焦散线，背景颜色表示 \(\log|\mu|\) 。插图显示了顶部面板中各点对应的源位置，颜色也编码 \(\chi^{2}\) 。它们突出了不同暗物质情景下次结构引起的畸变和焦散线形状的局部变化。底部面板：在尖点角附近遍历 \(\phi\) 时获得的 \(R_{{cusp}}\) 散点分布。当源接近窄尖点时，CDM、SIDM和FDM之间的差异显著增大。特别是，FDM中干涉驱动的密度涨落产生了更大比例的高 \(R_{{cusp}}\) 点。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Normalized \(R_{{cusp}}\) distributions predicted under different dark matter scenarios for cusp-configured mock lens systems generated using a SIE model with external shear (see Extended Data Fig. 4 for smooth-lens predictions). The lens populations are separated into major-axis and minor-axis cusp configurations (see Extended Data Fig. 3 ). The distributions are constructed by samples \(\phi\) from \(30^{\circ}\) to \(150^{\circ}\) and applying a normalized KDE within each \(\phi\) bin. The \(n\sigma\) contours correspond to highest-probability-density regions enclosing 68.3%, 95%, and 99.7% of the total KDE probability mass, respectively. The left, middle, and right columns correspond to mock lenses populated with CDM, SIDM, and FDM substructures, respectively. Each dark matter system contains \(\sim 10^{7}\) data points. The background colour map represents the KDE-normalized density computed from these data points in each \(\phi\) bin. Systems marked with red labels denote \(2\sigma\) outliers (see Extended Data Table. 8 for the per-system density values).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：对于使用带有外部剪切的SIE模型生成的尖点配置模拟透镜系统（平滑透镜预测见扩展数据图4），不同暗物质情景下预测的归一化 \(R_{{cusp}}\) 分布。透镜群体被分为长轴和短轴尖点配置（见扩展数据图3）。这些分布由从 \(30^{\circ}\) 到 \(150^{\circ}\) 的样本 \(\phi\) 构建，并在每个 \(\phi\) 区间内应用归一化KDE。 \(n\sigma\) 等高线分别对应包含总KDE概率质量68.3%、95%和99.7%的最高概率密度区域。左、中、右列分别对应填充了CDM、SIDM和FDM次结构的模拟透镜。每个暗物质系统包含 \(\sim 10^{7}\) 个数据点。背景色图表示根据每个 \(\phi\) 区间内这些数据点计算的KDE归一化密度。标有红色标签的系统表示 \(2\sigma\) 异常值（每个系统的密度值见扩展数据表8）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Same as Fig. 2 , but for mock lens systems generated with the SIE with external and multipole.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：与图2相同，但针对使用带有外部剪切和多极的SIE模型生成的模拟透镜系统。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Bayesian model comparison among dark matter scenarios and lens-structure prescriptions, quantified by the Bayes factor ratio \({BF}{\text{(row)}}/{BF}{\text{(column)}}\) . The scenarios include CDM, SIDM, and FDM, with and without higher-order multipole perturbations (MP). Values larger than unity indicate that the model listed in the row is favored over that in the column. The strength of this preference is interpreted using the Jeffreys scale applied to the Bayes-factor ratio, with values \(\gtrsim 100\) corresponding to decisive evidence, \(\sim 10\) – \(100\) to very strong evidence, and \(\sim 3\) – \(10\) to moderate evidence. We note that smooth lens models without substructure are overwhelmingly disfavored ( \({BF}{(smooth)}/{BF}{(sub)}\lesssim 10^{-35}\) ) (see Extended Data Table. 4 for details), where \({BF}{(sub)}\) denotes models including dark-matter substructure.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：暗物质情景与透镜结构规定之间的贝叶斯模型比较，由贝叶斯因子比 \({BF}{\text{(row)}}/{BF}{\text{(column)}}\) 量化。情景包括CDM、SIDM和FDM，有或没有高阶多极扰动（MP）。大于1的值表示行中列出的模型优于列中的模型。这种偏好的强度使用应用于贝叶斯因子比的杰弗里斯尺度解释，其中值 \(\gtrsim 100\) 对应决定性证据， \(\sim 10\) – \(100\) 对应非常强的证据， \(\sim 3\) – \(10\) 对应中等证据。我们注意到，没有次结构的平滑透镜模型被压倒性地否定（ \({BF}{(smooth)}/{BF}{(sub)}\lesssim 10^{-35}\) ）（详情见扩展数据表4），其中 \({BF}{(sub)}\) 表示包含暗物质次结构的模型。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Fig. 1: Workflow used in this study. (a) Observational data provide the image positions, flux ratios, and the geometric opening angle \(\phi\) . (b) From these quantities, we compute the observed \(R_{cusp}\) , which defines the constraints used to evaluate different dark matter scenarios. (c) We construct mock macrolens models. (d) We then add small-scale structure corresponding to CDM, SIDM, and FDM scenarios onto the smooth lens potentials. (e) Using our JAX -accelerated GPU implementation of the multi-plane lensing framework, we generate the lensing realizations. (f) A two-stage MCMC procedure samples source-plane configurations consistent with the target geometry, yielding weighted realizations of \(R_{cusp}\) . (g) For each dark matter scenario, we accumulate more than \(10^{7}\) realizations to construct statistical predictions in the \((R_{cusp},\phi)\) plane. (h) Comparison with the observational measurements through Bayesian marginalisation then yields the relative support for competing dark matter microphysics.
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据图1：本研究中使用的工作流程。(a) 观测数据提供像位置、流量比和几何张角 \(\phi\) 。(b) 根据这些量，我们计算观测到的 \(R_{cusp}\) ，它定义了用于评估不同暗物质情景的约束条件。(c) 我们构建模拟宏观透镜模型。(d) 然后，我们在平滑透镜势上添加对应于CDM、SIDM和FDM情景的小尺度结构。(e) 使用我们基于JAX加速的GPU实现的多平面透镜框架，我们生成透镜实现。(f) 一个两阶段MCMC过程对与目标几何一致的源平面配置进行采样，产生加权的 \(R_{cusp}\) 实现。(g) 对于每个暗物质情景，我们累积超过 \(10^{7}\) 个实现，以在 \((R_{cusp},\phi)\) 平面中构建统计预测。(h) 通过贝叶斯边缘化与观测测量进行比较，然后得出对竞争暗物质微观物理的相对支持。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Fig. 2: Background-subtracted gravitational lensing images of the selected cusp lenses. The JWST systems are taken from the GO-2046 program [ Nierenberg:2023tvi , Keeley:2024brx , Keeley:2025oig , Gilman:2025fhy ] , while the HST images use archival near-infrared data (see Extended Data Table. 1 for details). In both cases, the wavebands adopted for the photometric measurements probe emission regions that are effectively microlensing-free, although the images shown here are for illustration only. Lenses are grouped into major-axis (upper two rows) and minor-axis (lower two rows) cusps, ordered by increasing opening angle \(\phi\) . Systems such as B2045 and J1042 exhibit pronounced flux-ratio anomalies and are of particular interest in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据图2：所选尖点透镜的背景扣除引力透镜图像。JWST系统取自GO-2046项目[Nierenberg:2023tvi, Keeley:2024brx, Keeley:2025oig, Gilman:2025fhy]，而HST图像使用档案近红外数据（详情见扩展数据表1）。在这两种情况下，用于光度测量的波段探测的是有效无微引力透镜效应的发射区域，尽管此处显示的图像仅供说明。透镜按张角 \(\phi\) 递增顺序分为长轴（上两行）和短轴（下两行）尖点。像B2045和J1042这样的系统表现出明显的流量比异常，是本研究特别关注的。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Table 1: Observed properties of the cusp-configuration quasar lenses used in this study. The table lists the system name, the image opening angle \(\phi\) , \(R_{cusp}\) , the photometric band in which \(R_{cusp}\) is measured, and notes on whether the lens galaxy shows obvious visible structure. A dash (-) indicates that no clear evidence for a merger is reported. For B2045, earlier claims of a merger have been revised [ McKean:2006yt ] , as the object previously identified as a companion galaxy is now shown to be a foreground star [ Hsueh:2019ynk ] .
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据表1：本研究中使用的尖点配置类星体透镜的观测性质。表格列出了系统名称、像张角 \(\phi\) 、 \(R_{cusp}\) 、测量 \(R_{cusp}\) 的光度波段，以及关于透镜星系是否显示明显可见结构的注释。破折号(-)表示未报告并合的明确证据。对于B2045，早期的并合说法已被修订[McKean:2006yt]，因为先前被识别为伴星系的天体现被证明是一颗前景星[Hsueh:2019ynk]。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Table 2: Redshifts and macromodel parameters of the cusp-configuration lens sample. An asterisk (*) indicates systems for which no reliable redshift measurement is currently available. In these cases, a fiducial redshift \(z_{l}=0.5\) is adopted solely for the purpose of estimating the macromodel parameters of the main lens, including the Einstein radius \(\theta_{E}\) , the axis ratio \(q\) , and the external shear \(\gamma\) .
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据表2：尖点配置透镜样本的红移和宏观模型参数。星号(*)表示目前尚无可靠红移测量的系统。在这些情况下，仅出于估计主透镜宏观模型参数（包括爱因斯坦半径 \(\theta_{E}\) 、轴比 \(q\) 和外部剪切 \(\gamma\) ）的目的，采用基准红移 \(z_{l}=0.5\) 。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 获取低质量（≤10^9 M_⊙）暗物质结构的普查可以为暗物质的性质提供强有力的约束，尽管识别此类结构仍然困难。在这项工作中，我们研究了星系团RX J0437.1+0043，利用其强大的“奇异”双曲脐点（HU）透镜构型来搜索子结构候选体。结合高分辨率成像、IFU光谱和引力透镜建模，我们报告在一个最大的HU图像附近，初步探测到一个暗物质子晕（m_halo = 2.25 ± 0.94 × 10^9 M_⊙）。我们强调这一结果仍是初步的，需要更深入的数据和更先进的建模技术来最终确认这一探测。尽管如此，这项工作勾勒出理解致密星系团环境中子晕性质的第一步，将HU星系团透镜发展为研究暗物质的潜在新工具。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这项工作首次展示了利用双曲脐点星系团透镜作为研究暗物质新工具的潜力，为理解致密星系团环境中子晕性质迈出了重要一步。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Examples of rare, “exotic” lens configurations. The left column displays the critical curves in the (observed) image plane, with the characteristic image formations and image parity shown by the multicoloured regions. The right column shows the corresponding caustics in the (demagnified, intrinsic) source plane. [Adapted from Figs. 1-3 in Meena and Bagla ( 2020 ) .] Lenses in exotic configurations are more sensitive to the effects of nearby substructures than more common “stable” lensed images, making them ideal probes to look for low-mass subhalos. The Hyperbolic-Umbilic (HU) lensing configuration seen in the middle panels are the subject of this work.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：罕见的“奇异”透镜构型示例。左列显示（观测）像平面中的临界曲线，多色区域表示特征像形成和像奇偶性。右列显示（消放大、本征）源平面中相应的焦散线。[改编自Meena和Bagla (2020)的图1-3。] 奇异构型中的透镜比更常见的“稳定”透镜像对附近子结构的影响更敏感，使其成为寻找低质量子晕的理想探针。中间面板中显示的双曲脐点（HU）透镜构型是本文的研究对象。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Spectroscopically-confirmed multiply-imaged sources in the RX J0437 field, overlaid on multi-band HST imaging (F140W/F110W/F814W). Sources identified as Hyperbolic-Umbilic (HU) systems appear in cyan, while all other systems are shown in red. Numbering convention of all systems follows that presented in Lagattuta et al. ( 2023 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：RX J0437场中经光谱证认的多重成像源，叠加在多波段HST成像（F140W/F110W/F814W）上。被识别为双曲脐点（HU）系统的源以青色显示，而所有其他系统以红色显示。所有系统的编号约定遵循Lagattuta等人 (2023) 中的介绍。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Multiple images of HU System 1 ( \(z=2.97\) ), seen in several data sets. In the top left panel, we see a greyscale image of the complete system, observed in HST /F814W imaging, the highest resolution image available. A zoom-in of one image (Image 1.2) is seen in the bottom left cutout. From this data we have identified seven distinct morphological features (“clumps”, labelled 1-7), which we identify with coloured apertures. A 3-band colour image of the same system is shown in the bottom middle panel. This adds colour information, but individual clumps appear less distinct, due to the lower resolution of the HST /F110W and F140W imaging. The top right panel shows how the system appears in VLT/MUSE imaging, in this case, a complete ring structure composed of Lyman- \(\alpha\) emission. A zoom in (of the same individual image) is shown in the bottom right panel. Contrasting with the HST imaging, the MUSE view of the system shows a broad, smooth feature, rather than distinct clumps.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：HU系统1（z=2.97）的多重图像，见于多个数据集。在左上角面板中，我们看到完整系统的灰度图像，在HST /F814W成像中观测到，这是可用的最高分辨率图像。左下角插图中看到其中一个图像（图像1.2）的放大图。从这些数据中，我们识别出七个不同的形态特征（“团块”，标记为1-7），并用彩色光圈标出。同一系统的3波段彩色图像显示在底部中间面板中。这增加了颜色信息，但由于HST /F110W和F140W成像分辨率较低，单个团块显得不那么清晰。右上角面板显示了系统在VLT/MUSE成像中的外观，在这种情况下，是一个由Lyman-α发射组成的完整环状结构。右下角面板显示了（同一单个图像的）放大图。与HST成像相比，MUSE视角下的系统显示出一个宽广、平滑的特征，而不是不同的团块。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Multiple images of HU System 2 ( \(z=1.98\) ), seen in several data sets. The layout and composition of these images follows that of Fig. 3 , though the zoomed-in image this time is the combined merging images of Images 2.1 and 2.4. In System 2, we identify three distinct clumps in the high-resolution imaging, which, due to their larger sizes are still distinct in the colour panel. The bright central component is readily identified in MUSE data (here CIII emission), while the two edge components are less bright.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：HU系统2（z=1.98）的多重图像，见于多个数据集。这些图像的布局和组成遵循图3，不过这次放大的图像是图像2.1和2.4的合并图像。在系统2中，我们在高分辨率成像中识别出三个不同的团块，由于其尺寸较大，在彩色面板中仍然清晰。明亮的中心成分在MUSE数据中（此处为CIII发射）很容易识别，而两个边缘成分则不那么明亮。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Multiple images of HU System 10 ( \(z=6.02\) ), seen in several data sets. The layout and composition of these images follows that of Fig. 3 , though the zoomed-in image this time is the combined merging images of Images 10.1 and 10.2. Unlike Systems 1 and 2, System 10 is not seen in any broadband images, having been solely identified in deep MUSE observations as a faint Lyman- \(\alpha\) emitter. Future, deeper imaging may yet reveal continuum emission and more complex morphological features for this system.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：HU系统10（z=6.02）的多重图像，见于多个数据集。这些图像的布局和组成遵循图3，不过这次放大的图像是图像10.1和10.2的合并图像。与系统1和2不同，系统10在任何宽带图像中都不可见，仅通过深度MUSE观测被识别为一个微弱的Lyman-α发射体。未来的更深成像可能会揭示该系统的连续谱发射和更复杂的形态特征。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the HST observations for RX J0437. Column 1 gives the instrument and the band. Columns 2 and 3 list the ID of the proposal and respective PI. Columns 4 and 5 give the total exposure time in seconds and the observation date.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：RX J0437的HST观测总结。第1列给出仪器和波段。第2列和第3列列出提案ID和相应的PI。第4列和第5列给出以秒为单位的总曝光时间和观测日期。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Summary of VLT/MUSE observations for RX J0437. Columns 1 and 2 indicate the ID of the ESO programme and respective PI. For each pointing, we give the observation date in column 3, the istrument setup in Column 4, the total exposure time in column 5, the right ascension (R. A.) and declination (Decl.) of the center of the field of view in columns 6 and 7, and the mean FWHM of the seeing during the observations in column 7.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：RX J0437的VLT/MUSE观测总结。第1列和第2列指示ESO项目ID和相应的PI。对于每个指向，我们在第3列给出观测日期，第4列给出仪器设置，第5列给出总曝光时间，第6列和第7列给出视场中心的赤经（R. A.）和赤纬（Decl.），第7列给出观测期间视宁度的平均FWHM。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: A comparison of the observed stellar clumps in the HU systems (cyan) to the model-predicted positions (orange). The largest discrepancies ( \(\sim\) 0.35″) can be found around Images 1.2, 1.3, and 2.2.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：HU系统中观测到的恒星团块（青色）与模型预测位置（橙色）的比较。最大的差异（∼ 0.35″）出现在图像1.2、1.3和2.2附近。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了通过JWST/NIRSpec和MIRI获得的八个低光度活动星系核（LLAGN）的近红外和中红外光谱，这些光谱是ReveaLLAGN项目的一部分，以及Cen A的相同存档数据，其黑洞质量和爱丁顿比率跨越近四个数量级。JWST的高空间分辨率清晰地将AGN发射与宿主星系污染分开，使得能够探测到比先前测量结果暗一个数量级以上的高电离势线。发射线诊断揭示了在log($L_{bol}/L_{Edd}$) ~ -3.5处的一个转变，在该处光谱能量分布变得日益缺乏紫外光子。我们发现，与更高光度AGN和恒星形成星系相比，旋转H$_2$激发温度升高（约高500 K），而H$_2$(0-0)S(3)/PAH$_{11.3 μm}$比率与在AGN群体中观测到的比率一致。我们讨论了外流、喷流和X射线主导区域在塑造LLAGN周围星际介质中可能扮演的角色。在大多数ReveaLLAGN目标中，探测到了局限于核区的~10 $μ$m硅酸盐发射。该数据集提供了首个基于JWST的LLAGN核区红外发射线的全面表征。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 这是首次基于JWST对LLAGN核区红外发射线的全面表征，揭示了低光度AGN的独特物理特性，为理解外流、喷流和X射线主导区域在塑造LLAGN周围星际介质中的作用提供了新见解。（基于可用摘要）

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top – Nuclear extracted spectra for ReveaLLAGN targets and Cen A. Spectra have been normalized to MIRI/MRS channel 1. Targets are listed in the legend and colored according to Eddington Ratio (see Table 1 ). Bottom – NGC 4395 spectrum is shown. JWST instrument filters are labeled and prominent emission lines that are used in this work are marked.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部 – ReveaLLAGN目标和Cen A的核提取光谱。光谱已归一化到MIRI/MRS通道1。目标在图例中列出，并根据爱丁顿比率着色（见表1）。底部 – 显示NGC 4395的光谱。标记了JWST仪器滤光片，并标出了本工作中使用的显著发射线。

figures.caption_zh: 表1：星系属性 † † footnotetext: 来自LV星系目录与图集的更新值

figures.caption_zh: 表2：ReveaLLAGN目标中的H$_2$激发温度
