figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Galaxy surface density (left column), galaxy density (middle column), and logarithmic derivatives of galaxy density (right column) similar to Figure 2 , but for \(7\leq\) S/N P \( P \(\geq 9\) with larger redshift binning as described in Table 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：星系表面密度（左列）、星系密度（中列）和星系密度对数导数（右列），与图2类似，但针对\(7\leq\) S/N P \( P \(\geq 9\)且红移分箱更大（如表1所述）的子样本。

artifacts.abstract_zh: (节略) 对当前及未来一代宇宙学观测的深入解读，需要跨越多种宇宙学模型和参数，进行前所未有的大尺度、高分辨率模拟。实现这些计算量巨大的模拟是一个关键的技术挑战。我们提出了超越ΛCDM模型的动态变焦模拟（DZS）方法实现，这是一种专为产生类光锥输出的大尺度模拟量身定制的性能增强技术。该方法动态降低与观测者无因果联系区域内的模拟分辨率，从而节省计算资源，且不会直接影响光锥内的物理性质。我们在两个支持非标准宇宙学的先进代码中实现了DZS算法，即Arepo中的修正f(R)引力和Gadget4中的暗区相互作用。我们通过比较使用和不使用DZS算法运行的模拟，分析了结果精度以及在不同分辨率、模拟体积和模型下的性能提升。在大多数情况下，我们的DZS模拟重现了光锥晕质量函数、天球投影质量图以及物质和弱引力透镜会聚功率谱，精度约为0.1%或更高。在性能方面，在我们的测试模拟中，DZS运行相比非DZS运行最多可节省约50%的运行时间。扩展到更大的模拟体积表明，在当前最先进模拟的分辨率水平下，性能提升可能再提高约20%。DZS算法在非标准模型中的验证表明，该技术能够以最先进的分辨率实现成本效益高的大尺度（≥ 1 cGpc/h）模拟，为约束和帮助解读即将到来的数据提供了必要的计算框架。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：DZS算法在非标准模型中的验证表明，该技术能够实现成本效益高的大尺度（≥ 1 cGpc/h）模拟，并保持最先进的分辨率，为约束和解释即将到来的观测数据提供了必要的计算框架。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: 1D+1D space-time diagram illustrating the lightcone-like approach of DZS. An example simulation (a cubic box \(8192\) comoving Mpc/h on a side) is depicted from its initial conditions (top) to redshift, or lookback time, zero (bottom). The depicted density field is only included for displaying purposes, and does not match the size of the volume marked on the \(x\) axis (it is rendered from TNG300-3-Dark simulation data, Nelson et al., 2019 ) . The observer is placed at redshift zero at the location marked with \(O\) . The simulation volume is crossed by the lightcone (blue curve) at a time indicated by the dashed black line. Traditional snapshots, or time slices, are taken at the cosmic times highlighted by horizontal colored lines, leading to fixed-time density maps of real simulation volumes, rendered from the TNG300-3-Dark (left) and the medium DZS on the right (see Table 1 in Section 3 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：说明DZS类光锥方法的1D+1D时空图。一个示例模拟（边长为\(8192\) comoving Mpc/h的立方体）从其初始条件（顶部）描绘到红移或回溯时间零点（底部）。所描绘的密度场仅用于显示目的，与\(x\)轴上标记的体积大小不匹配（它来自TNG300-3-Dark模拟数据，Nelson等人，2019）。观测者位于红移零点，标记为\(O\)的位置。模拟体积被光锥（蓝色曲线）在虚线黑线指示的时间穿过。传统的快照或时间切片，在水平彩色线条突出显示的宇宙时间拍摄，产生真实模拟体积的固定时间密度图，左侧来自TNG300-3-Dark，右侧来自中等DZS（见表1第3节）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Equation of state (EoS) parameter of dark energy \(w_{DE}\) as a function of redshift \(z\) . The blue curve is the best-fit CPL parametrization from Abdul Karim et al. ( 2025 ) , with \(w_{0}=-0.667\) , \(w_{a}=-1.09\) . Its “phantom” behavior ( \(w_{DE} Lodha et al. ( 2025 , their eq. 15) , and reproducing the low- \(z\) trend of the CPL best-fit without the phantom behavior.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：暗能量状态方程（EoS）参数\(w_{DE}\)作为红移\(z\)的函数。蓝色曲线是来自Abdul Karim等人（2025）的最佳拟合CPL参数化，其中\(w_{0}=-0.667\)，\(w_{a}=-1.09\)。其“幻影”行为（\(w_{DE}<-1\)）在低红移时与数据一致，但在高红移时与数据不一致。红色曲线是来自Lodha等人（2025，他们的方程15）的“非幻影”参数化，再现了CPL最佳拟合的低\(z\)趋势，但没有幻影行为。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Simulation parameters used for algorithm validation, including the side length of the simulated volume, the number of simulation particles, the resulting mass resolution, and the redshift range in which lightcone output was produced. The latter is chosen to ensure that \(R_{lc}(z)<L_{box}/2\) always, avoiding any box replications. Note that, at the highest considered redshifts, the DZS algorithm has already significantly modified the simulation volume.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于算法验证的模拟参数，包括模拟体积的边长、模拟粒子数、由此产生的质量分辨率以及产生光锥输出的红移范围。选择后者是为了确保始终满足\(R_{lc}(z)<L_{box}/2\)，避免任何盒子复制。请注意，在考虑的最高红移处，DZS算法已经显著修改了模拟体积。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Models and parameters adopted in the DZS algorithm validation.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：DZS算法验证中采用的模型和参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Lightcone halo mass function of the \(\Lambda\) CDM mediumHR twin simulations (top). The std solid histogram and the dzs dashed histogram are in excellent agreement. This is also shown by the relative difference plot between the two curves (bottom), where we arbitrarily set the \(y\) axis scale.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：\(\Lambda\)CDM mediumHR双胞胎模拟的光锥晕质量函数（顶部）。std实线直方图和dzs虚线直方图非常一致。两条曲线之间的相对差异图（底部）也显示了这一点，其中我们任意设置了\(y\)轴刻度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left column: Lightcone halo mass function of the MG-Arepo mediumHR twin simulations, for the MG-F5 and MG-F6 models (top panel). Solid lines refer to std runs, dashed lines to dzs ones. The \(\Lambda\) CDM std case is overlaid as a dotted line for reference. Relative difference plots are included for both MG models (middle and bottom panels), with a dashed line at \(N_{LC}^{dzs}/N_{LC}^{std}-1=0\) for reference. Right column: the same as in the left column, but for the DS-DESI and DS-THAW mediumHR simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左列：MG-Arepo mediumHR双胞胎模拟的光锥晕质量函数，针对MG-F5和MG-F6模型（顶部面板）。实线指std运行，虚线指dzs运行。\(\Lambda\)CDM std情况作为参考用虚线叠加。两个MG模型都包含了相对差异图（中间和底部面板），其中虚线位于\(N_{LC}^{dzs}/N_{LC}^{std}-1=0\)作为参考。右列：与左列相同，但针对DS-DESI和DS-THAW mediumHR模拟。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Maps showing the angular matter density \(\Sigma\) of the mediumHR twin simulations in the \(\Lambda\) CDM (left column), the MG-F5 (middle column) and the DS-DESI (right column) cases. For each of the three models, maps for the dzs and std simulations are depicted in the top and middle panel, respectively. At the bottom, the relative differences between the dzs and std cases are shown, with the MG-F5 case employing the color green for differences above \(1\%\) in absolute value.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：显示\(\Lambda\)CDM（左列）、MG-F5（中列）和DS-DESI（右列）情况下mediumHR双胞胎模拟的角物质密度\(\Sigma\)的图。对于这三个模型中的每一个，dzs和std模拟的图分别描绘在顶部和中间面板。在底部，显示了dzs和std情况之间的相对差异，其中MG-F5情况对绝对值超过\(1\%\)的差异使用绿色。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Top panel: Angular power spectrum \(\mathcal{C}(l)\) of \(\Lambda\) CDM mediumHR , medium and largeHR runs. The power is lower in the latter pair of simulations due to the larger output redshift range (see Table 1 ). Solid lines refer to std runs, dashed lines to dzs ones. Bottom panels: Relative differences between the dzs and std simulations for the different run types discussed above, as indicated in each panel. The dashed line is located at \(\Delta\mathcal{C}(l)=0\) as a reference.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：顶部面板：\(\Lambda\)CDM mediumHR、medium和largeHR运行的角功率谱\(\mathcal{C}(l)\)。由于输出红移范围更大（见表1），后一对模拟的功率较低。实线指std运行，虚线指dzs运行。底部面板：如上所述，不同运行类型的dzs和std模拟之间的相对差异，如每个面板所示。虚线位于\(\Delta\mathcal{C}(l)=0\)作为参考。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在星际介质中，甲酸（HCOOH）在合成最简单的氨基酸——甘氨酸（NH$_{2}$CH$_{2}$COOH）中起着重要作用。HCOOH的存在表明，含氧分子可能直接参与恒星形成区域的化学和物理演化，特别是在热分子核中。本文首次报道了在位于大质量恒星形成区域G358.93$-$0.03中的热分子核G358.93$-$0.03 MM1中检测到HCOOH的$trans$-构象的转动发射线。本研究使用了阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列（ALMA）在Band 7的高分辨率观测。$t$-HCOOH的柱密度和激发温度分别确定为$(8.13\pm0.72)\times10^{15}$ cm$^{-2}$和$120\pm15$ K。$t$-HCOOH相对于H$_{2}$的丰度比为$(2.62\pm 0.29)\times 10^{-9}$。$t$-HCOOH/CH$_{3}$OH和$t$-HCOOH/H$_{2}$CO的柱密度比分别为$(1.56 \pm 0.12)\times 10^{-2}$和$(1.16 \pm 0.12)$。我们使用气-粒化学代码UCLCHEM计算了HCOOH的三相暖化化学模型。我们发现，观测到的HCOOH丰度与模型预测的丰度几乎一致，相差在0.89倍以内。基于化学模型，我们表明HCOOH可能通过HCO和OH在尘埃表面反应形成，随后释放到气相中。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，甲酸可能通过HCO和OH在尘埃表面反应形成，随后释放到气相中；这一发现支持了含氧分子在热分子核化学演化中的重要作用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 近期，斯巴鲁超超广角相机（HSC）观测发现了12个微引力透镜事件候选体。这些事件可由质量在$10^{-7}$-$10^{-6} M_\odot$范围内、占所有暗物质比例$f_\mathrm{PBH} = \mathcal{O}(10^{-1})$的原初黑洞（PBHs）解释。本文考虑了两类轴子类曲率子模型中的原初黑洞产生，这些模型预测了小尺度上曲率扰动的增强。我们表明，微引力透镜事件可在轴子类曲率子模型中得到解释，并讨论了引力波等宇宙学意义。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：轴子类曲率子模型为解释HSC微引力透镜观测提供了可行的理论框架，这些模型不仅能产生符合观测的原初黑洞，还具有重要的宇宙学意义。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Evolution of \(V_{\Phi}\) and its minimum during inflation. The horizontal axis is the real part of \(\Phi\) . Upper panel: The potential shape depending on \(I\) . \(V_{\Phi}\) evolves in the order of red, green, and blue as \(I\) decreases. The colored dots denote the potential minima of the potential with the corresponding colors. Lower panel: The trajectory of the potential minimum. The colored dots are the same as in the upper panel. The gray dashed lines denote the approximated relations, \(\Phi=\epsilon v^{3}/(gI^{2})\) and \(\Phi=\sqrt{v^{2}/2-2gI^{2}/\lambda}\) , which applies for \(I\gtrsim\sqrt{\lambda}v/(2\sqrt{g})\) and \(I\lesssim\sqrt{\lambda}v/(2\sqrt{g})\) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：暴胀期间\(V_{\Phi}\)及其最小值的演化。横轴为\(\Phi\)的实部。上图为：势能形状随\(I\)的变化。\(V_{\Phi}\)随\(I\)减小按红、绿、蓝顺序演化。彩色圆点表示对应颜色的势能最小值。下图为：势能最小值的轨迹。彩色圆点与上图中相同。灰色虚线表示近似关系\(\Phi=\epsilon v^{3}/(gI^{2})\)和\(\Phi=\sqrt{v^{2}/2-2gI^{2}/\lambda}\)，分别适用于\(I\gtrsim\sqrt{\lambda}v/(2\sqrt{g})\)和\(I\lesssim\sqrt{\lambda}v/(2\sqrt{g})\)的情况。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left: Evolution of the energy densities for \(r_{{dec}}>1\) . The energy density of the inflaton (blue) remains almost constant during inflation, and becomes matter-like after the end of inflation at \(t=t_{{end}}\) . Then, the inflaton decays to radiation (light blue) at \(t_{{R}}\) . The curvaton (red) also remains almost constant in the early stage and starts to oscillate during the MD era dominated by the oscillating inflaton. Then, the oscillating curvaton comes to dominate the universe and decays into radiation (light red) at \(t=t_{{dec}}\) . Finally, non-relativistic matter (green) dominates the universe for \(t>t_{{eq}}\) as in the standard cosmology. Right: The same for \(r_{{dec}}<1\) . In this case, the curvaton never dominates the universe, and there is a single RD era.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：\(r_{{dec}}>1\)时能量密度的演化。暴胀子（蓝色）的能量密度在暴胀期间几乎保持不变，并在暴胀结束后\(t=t_{{end}}\)时变得类似物质。随后，暴胀子在\(t_{{R}}\)时衰变为辐射（浅蓝色）。曲率子（红色）在早期阶段也几乎保持不变，并在由振荡暴胀子主导的MD时期开始振荡。然后，振荡的曲率子开始主导宇宙，并在\(t=t_{{dec}}\)时衰变为辐射（浅红色）。最后，非相对论性物质（绿色）在\(t>t_{{eq}}\)时主导宇宙，与标准宇宙学一致。右图：\(r_{{dec}}<1\)时的相同情况。在这种情况下，曲率子从未主导宇宙，存在单一的RD时期。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Model parameters for the type II axionlike curvaton model. The colors denote the line colors used in Figs. 3 , 4 , and 5 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：第二类轴子类曲率子模型的模型参数。颜色表示图3、图4和图5中使用的线条颜色。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Power spectra of the curvature perturbations, \(\mathcal{P}_{\zeta}\) . The blue, red, and violet lines represent the results for the type II model with the parameter sets in Table 1 . The curvature perturbations have peaks due to the evolution of \(\varphi_{0}\) during inflation. Due to the effective mass of \(\delta\sigma\) in the early stage of inflation, they are suppressed for small \(k\) . We do not show the short modes that reenter the horizon before the curvaton decay. While the red and blue lines lead to the production of PBHs explaining the microlensing events, the violet line corresponds to PBHs with smaller masses. The green line represents the result for the type I model.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：曲率扰动的功率谱\(\mathcal{P}_{\zeta}\)。蓝色、红色和紫色线条分别表示表1中参数组对应的第二类模型结果。由于暴胀期间\(\varphi_{0}\)的演化，曲率扰动出现峰值。由于暴胀早期\(\delta\sigma\)的有效质量，小\(k\)处的扰动被抑制。我们未显示在曲率子衰变前重新进入视界的短模式。红色和蓝色线条导致产生解释微引力透镜事件的原初黑洞，而紫色线条对应质量较小的原初黑洞。绿色线条表示第一类模型的结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: PBH fraction to dark matter, \(f_{{PBH}}\) , for the type II model with the parameter sets in Table 1 (blue, red, and violet) and the type I model with the parameter set in Eq. ( 27 ) (green). The blue- and red-shaded regions represent the PBH interpretation of the 12 candidates and 4 secure candidates for microlensing events observed in Subaru HSC observations [ 1 ] , respectively. The green-shaded region represents the estimate by Ref. [ 78 ] interpreting the ultrashort-timescale microlensing events in the 5-year OGLE data [ 79 ] as originating from PBHs. The gray-shaded regions represent the observational upper bounds on the PBH abundance by EROS [ 72 ] , HSC [ 73 ] , OGLE-III+OGLE-IV [ 74 ] , the high-cadence survey by OGLE-IV [ 75 ] , X-ray background [ 76 ] , and the 21 cm measurement [ 77 ] . The last two limits are due to the evaporation of PBHs and are taken from PBHbounds [ 80 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：原初黑洞占暗物质的比例\(f_{{PBH}}\)，对应表1中参数组的第二类模型（蓝色、红色和紫色）以及式(27)中参数组的第一类模型（绿色）。蓝色和红色阴影区域分别代表斯巴鲁HSC观测[1]中12个候选体和4个可靠候选体微引力透镜事件的原初黑洞解释。绿色阴影区域代表文献[78]将OGLE五年数据[79]中的超短时标微引力透镜事件解释为原初黑洞的估计。灰色阴影区域代表EROS[72]、HSC[73]、OGLE-III+OGLE-IV[74]、OGLE-IV高巡天率观测[75]、X射线背景[76]和21厘米测量[77]对原初黑洞丰度的观测上限。后两个限制源于原初黑洞的蒸发，取自PBHbounds[80]。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Power spectra of the gravitational waves in the type II (blue, red, and violet) and type I (green) axionlike curvaton models. The colors are the same as in Figs. 3 and 4 . The gray lines represent the future sensitivities of the Square Kilometre Array (SKA) [ 88 , 89 ] , THEIA [ 90 ] , \(\mu\) Ares [ 91 ] , Laser Interferometer Space Antenna (LISA) [ 92 ] , and DeciHertz Interferometer Gravitational-Wave Observatory (DECIGO) [ 93 ] . The sensitivities of SKA, LISA, and DECIGO are taken from Ref. [ 94 ] . The gray violins on the nHz scale represent the result of the NANOGrav 15 yr data set [ 95 ] .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：第二类（蓝色、红色和紫色）和第一类（绿色）轴子类曲率子模型中引力波的功率谱。颜色与图3和图4相同。灰色线条代表平方千米阵列（SKA）[88,89]、THEIA[90]、\(\mu\)Ares[91]、激光干涉空间天线（LISA）[92]和十赫兹干涉引力波天文台（DECIGO）[93]的未来灵敏度。SKA、LISA和DECIGO的灵敏度取自文献[94]。nHz尺度上的灰色小提琴图代表NANOGrav 15年数据集[95]的结果。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 一个稳健的恒星初始质量函数（IMF）对于任何与恒星形成相关的研究都至关重要。然而，恒星IMF的直接测量受限于望远镜的分辨能力，仅限于本地宇宙。最近，一种在本地宇宙之外获取恒星IMF的新方法被开发出来。观测到的瞬态透镜星——即强透镜星系中因恒星微透镜效应而暂时可探测到的、大质量且因此明亮的单个恒星——的探测率，可以作为探针，在利用光谱能量分布拟合的研究中打破IMF-恒星形成历史简并，从而为在强透镜星系子样本中审视IMF提供窗口。在本会议论文中，我总结了与本文同名的IAUS402特邀报告，并强调了关键结果，这些结果目前未显示在红移z≈1的星系中存在顶部重的IMF。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：瞬态透镜星探测率为研究遥远星系的恒星初始质量函数提供了新窗口，初步结果表明z≈1星系的IMF与本地宇宙相似，未表现出顶部重特征。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Observed transient detection rate in the Spock arc (gray data points), compared with predicted detection rate when adopting a Salpeter IMF (blue, \(\alpha=2.3\) ), and a top-heavy IMF ( \(\alpha=1\) , red) as predicted by Li_2025_IMF . Filters leftward of the vertical dashed line are HST filters, whereas those on the right are JWST filters.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：Spock弧中观测到的瞬态探测率（灰色数据点），与采用Salpeter IMF（蓝色，\(\alpha=2.3\)）和Li_2025_IMF预测的顶部重IMF（\(\alpha=1\)，红色）时的预测探测率进行比较。垂直虚线左侧的滤光片为HST滤光片，右侧的为JWST滤光片。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Observed transient detection rate (gray) versus transient detection rate predicted with a Salpeter IMF (blue) in the Warhol arc, numbers adopted from Palencia_2025_microlensing .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：Warhol弧中观测到的瞬态探测率（灰色）与采用Salpeter IMF（蓝色）预测的瞬态探测率，数据取自Palencia_2025_microlensing。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系的恒星含量与其宿主暗晕的质量和增长密切相关。对这一关系的观测约束仍然有限，特别是在低质量星系群中，这导致我们对星系如何在暗晕质量尺度上组装其恒星的认识存在不确定性。因此，在广泛的质量范围内精确测量最亮中心星系（BCG）的恒星-暗晕质量关系（SHMR）对于理解星系形成和反馈过程的作用至关重要。在此，我们展示了跨越 $M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{12}$-$10^{15}\,M_\odot$ 的SHMR，其中暗晕质量来源于eROSITA eRASS1 X射线数据，BCG恒星质量基于SDSS测光。通过对光学选择的星系群进行X射线光谱叠加，我们为每个星等箱恢复了稳健的平均暗晕气体温度，然后通过 $M$-$T_X$ 关系将其转换为暗晕质量。我们发现SHMR在 $M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{12}\,M_\odot$ 附近达到峰值，在更高质量处恒星比例下降。这一趋势反映了多种过程的组合，这些过程降低了高质量暗晕中恒星质量增长的效率，例如活动星系核反馈、冷却效率降低以及外部组装主导地位的增强，而暗晕则通过并合和吸积继续增长。我们的测量结果在整个质量范围内与先前的观测研究一致，包括弱引力透镜、单个星团的X射线分析以及运动学和动力学方法。与流体动力学模拟的比较显示，在低质量处吻合良好，但在星团尺度上归一化存在显著差异，这凸显了BCG恒星增长对反馈方案和暗晕组装历史的敏感性。这些结果首次提供了基于X射线的观测性SHMR，覆盖了三个数量级的暗晕质量范围，为测试星系形成模型建立了稳健的基准。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该研究首次提供了基于X射线的观测性SHMR，覆盖三个数量级的暗晕质量范围，为测试星系形成模型建立了稳健的基准。结果表明BCG恒星增长对反馈机制和暗晕组装历史高度敏感，揭示了高质量暗晕中恒星形成效率降低的物理机制。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Stacked X-ray temperatures within \(R_{500}\) as a function of BCG stellar mass. Black points correspond to bins defined by stellar mass, while grey points correspond to bins defined by optically based halo mass (Yang et al. , 2007 ) ; for both binning schemes, the average BCG stellar mass of each sub-bin is plotted on the \(x\) -axis. Error bars on the \(y\) -axis indicate \(1\sigma\) uncertainties derived from bootstrap resampling, while error bars on the \(x\) -axis represent the 1 \(\sigma\) interval around the mean. Best-fit relations for both binning schemes are shown as black solid and grey dashed lines. The shaded area corresponds to the 1 \(\sigma\) and 3 \(\sigma\) uncertainties of the best-fit.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：在 \(R_{500}\) 内的叠加X射线温度作为BCG恒星质量的函数。黑点对应按恒星质量定义的星等箱，而灰点对应按基于光学的暗晕质量定义的星等箱（Yang et al. , 2007）；对于两种分箱方案，每个子箱的平均BCG恒星质量绘制在 \(x\) 轴上。\(y\) 轴上的误差棒表示通过自助重采样得到的 \(1\sigma\) 不确定性，而 \(x\) 轴上的误差棒表示均值周围的1 \(\sigma\) 区间。两种分箱方案的最佳拟合关系分别显示为黑色实线和灰色虚线。阴影区域对应最佳拟合的1 \(\sigma\) 和3 \(\sigma\) 不确定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: BCG stellar-to-halo mass ratio as a function of halo mass. The meaning of the symbols is as in Figure 1 . Best-fit relations are shown as green and red dashed lines; the shaded region indicates the \(1\sigma\) uncertainty of the double power-law best-fit relation. Literature measurements are color-coded by halo mass estimation method as indicated in the legend: violet for weak lensing (WL), red for X-ray, green for kinematical and dynamical studies (K), and light green for scaling relations (SR); for the literature data, filled points indicate stacking results, while empty points show results for individual sources. Orange lines correspond to semi-analytical predictions from abundance matching (AM) and empirical modeling (EM).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：BCG恒星-暗晕质量比作为暗晕质量的函数。符号含义与图1相同。最佳拟合关系显示为绿色和红色虚线；阴影区域表示双幂律最佳拟合关系的 \(1\sigma\) 不确定性。文献测量值按暗晕质量估计方法进行颜色编码，如图例所示：紫色表示弱引力透镜（WL），红色表示X射线，绿色表示运动学和动力学研究（K），浅绿色表示标度关系（SR）；对于文献数据，实心点表示叠加结果，空心点表示单个源的结果。橙色线对应来自丰度匹配（AM）和经验建模（EM）的半解析预测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Upper panel: Stellar-to-halo mass ratio as a function of halo mass for different assumptions on the gas metal abundance. Semi-transparent squares show the results of the main analysis, identical to those presented in Figure 2 . Star symbols correspond to the same stacked spectra modeled using simulated metal abundances from the lower panel. Dashed lines indicate the best-fitting double powerlaw relations for each case, following Eq. 4 . Lower panel: Mean gas metal abundance as a function of halo mass derived from the Magneticum simulation and adopted for the spectral modeling shown in the upper panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：上方面板：不同气体金属丰度假设下的恒星-暗晕质量比作为暗晕质量的函数。半透明方块显示了主要分析的结果，与图2中呈现的结果相同。星形符号对应使用下方面板中模拟金属丰度建模的相同叠加光谱。虚线表示每种情况下遵循公式4的最佳拟合双幂律关系。下方面板：从Magneticum模拟得出的平均气体金属丰度作为暗晕质量的函数，并用于上方面板所示的光谱建模。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: BCG stellar-to-halo mass ratio as a function of halo mass: comparison with simulations. Black points show stacked results in bins of stellar mass, while grey points show stacked results in bins of halo mass. Colored lines and symbols represent predictions from state-of-the-art hydrodynamical simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：BCG恒星-暗晕质量比作为暗晕质量的函数：与模拟的比较。黑点显示按恒星质量分箱的叠加结果，灰点显示按暗晕质量分箱的叠加结果。彩色线条和符号代表最先进的流体动力学模拟的预测。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: X-ray-derived halo mass as a function of the average optically-based halo mass from Yang et al. ( 2007 ) for bins of optical halo mass. The color of the points indicates the average stellar mass of the BCG.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：对于光学暗晕质量分箱，X射线导出的暗晕质量作为来自Yang et al. (2007)的平均基于光学的暗晕质量的函数。点的颜色表示BCG的平均恒星质量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Stellar mass-temperature relation for BCGs. Colored boxes show the measured X-ray temperature \(T_{X}\) in each stellar-mass bin; the box center marks the \(T_{X}\) value, while the box height represents the width of the temperature distribution \(\sigma_{T}\) in the gadem model. Orange boxes indicate predictions for \(\sigma_{T}\) and the corresponding \(T_{X}\) obtained from fits with \(\sigma_{T}\) fixed to these values. Green boxes show results from fits with \(\sigma_{T}\) left free. The solid line and shaded regions correspond to the best-fit relation from Eq. 2 and its \(1\sigma\) and \(3\sigma\) uncertainties. Error bars indicate the uncertainties on \(T_{X}\) for each fitting choice. Vertical lines mark the stellar-mass bin edges; within each bin, all boxes share the same \(M_{\star}\) , placed between the boxes.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：BCG的恒星质量-温度关系。彩色方框显示每个恒星质量箱中测量的X射线温度 \(T_{X}\)；方框中心标记 \(T_{X}\) 值，而方框高度表示gadem模型中温度分布 \(\sigma_{T}\) 的宽度。橙色方框表示 \(\sigma_{T}\) 的预测值以及通过将 \(\sigma_{T}\) 固定为这些值进行拟合得到的相应 \(T_{X}\)。绿色方框显示 \(\sigma_{T}\) 自由拟合的结果。实线和阴影区域对应来自公式2的最佳拟合关系及其 \(1\sigma\) 和 \(3\sigma\) 不确定性。误差棒表示每种拟合选择的 \(T_{X}\) 不确定性。垂直线标记恒星质量箱的边界；在每个箱内，所有方框共享相同的 \(M_{\star}\)，放置在方框之间。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Stacked background-subtracted spectra in the 0.2–3 keV energy range for binning by BCG stellar mass. Black points show the observed stacked data, while lines represent the spectral model components: the green line is the ICM emission modeled with gadem , the yellow line is the power-law component representing unresolved AGN, and the red line is the total model combining all components. The mean temperature of the gadem component is provided in the title of each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：按BCG恒星质量分箱的0.2–3 keV能量范围内的叠加背景减除光谱。黑点显示观测到的叠加数据，线条代表光谱模型成分：绿线是使用gadem建模的ICM发射，黄线是代表未解析活动星系核的幂律成分，红线是结合所有成分的总模型。gadem成分的平均温度在每个面板的标题中给出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Same as 7 but for the sample binned by halo mass based on characteristic luminosity as described in 2.1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图8：与图7相同，但针对基于2.1节所述特征光度按暗晕质量分箱的样本。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 当代河外天体物理学中的一个主要难题是在红移 \(z\gtrsim 9\) 处存在一个显著且数量过多的紫外明亮星系群。我们分析了由 JWST/NIRSpec Prism 光谱观测并确认位于 \(z>9\) 的星系，这些星系具有足够的信噪比，可以仔细建模其静止框架紫外到光学连续谱和发射线。特别是，我们对每个星系的阻尼莱曼-α (Lyα) 吸收 (DLA) 特征进行建模，以对宇宙再电离开始时期中性原子氢 (HI) 在星系晕上的气体聚集施加观测约束。基于推导出的 HI 柱密度和恒星形成率 (SFR) 面密度，我们表明所有星系在快速的 \(\sim 10-100\,\)Myr 消耗时标上都极其高效地形成恒星，其效率远超典型的本地宇宙 Kennicutt-Schmidt 关系和最先进的星系形成模拟的预测。致密的 HI 气体似乎也驱动了这些星系偏离基本金属丰度关系，尽管其尘埃与气体比率看似与本地星系的值一致，但最低金属丰度视线方向除外。我们的结果为原始 HI 气体对早期星系聚集的影响提供了首个稳健的观测约束，并表明高效恒星形成与低尘埃消光的结合很可能可以解释宇宙黎明时期星系的紫外亮度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，高密度中性氢气体驱动了早期星系的高效恒星形成，结合低尘埃消光，可以解释宇宙黎明时期紫外明亮星系的成因，为早期星系组装提供了首个观测约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: Example of UV emission line and DLA fitting for JADES-GS-z13-0 (DJA ID 3215_20128771) at \(z=12.85\) . The NIRSpec/Prism spectrum and associated error are shown in green. The marked UV emission lines were modelled and then superimposed on the intrinsic spectrum before modelling the DLA (solid black line). In the inset, we show a zoom on the Ly \(\alpha\) region, with the DLA+IGM model as a solid line, and with 100% neutral IGM only ( \({x_{HI}}=1.0\) ) as a dashed line. Right: Corner plot of the posterior distributions for the DLA+IGM model, with median, 16th and 84th percentiles marked.
figures.caption_zh: 图 1：左图：对 \(z=12.85\) 处的 JADES-GS-z13-0 (DJA ID 3215_20128771) 的紫外发射线和 DLA 拟合示例。NIRSpec/Prism 光谱及相关误差以绿色显示。标记的紫外发射线被建模，然后在建模 DLA（黑色实线）之前叠加到本征光谱上。插图中，我们展示了 Ly \(\alpha\) 区域的放大图，其中 DLA+IGM 模型为实线，仅 100% 中性 IGM ( \({x_{HI}}=1.0\) ) 为虚线。右图：DLA+IGM 模型后验分布的角点图，标记了中位数、第 16 和第 84 百分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Calculated column densities across the redshift range of the sample, dark green squares are well-constrained column densities with values \(N_{HI}>10^{21}\,cm^{-2}\) . Upper limits are plotted as triangles, derived from the 95th percentile of the posterior distribution. The different shaded regions represent low column density ( \(N_{HI} 10^{21-22}\,cm^{-2}\) ) where neutral hydrogen exceeds abundance from a fully neutral IGM, and very strong DLAs ( \(N_{HI}>10^{22}\,cm^{-2}\) ) with an extreme over-abundance of neutral gas. Regardless of column density, all objects are optically thick with optical depths at the Lyman limit \(\tau>10^{3}\) , with the highest column densities \(N_{HI}=10^{22}\,{cm^{-2}}\) corresponding to optical depths \(\tau\approx 10^{5}\) . Medians of well-constrained column density binned in redshift ( \(z 12\) ) are shown as black triangles (with values \(N_{HI}=10^{21.71},10^{22.24}\) , and \(10^{22.37}\,{cm^{-2}}\) respectively). These are essentially upper limits, as the fraction of IGM-dominated galaxies/upper limits (which were not included in the median) in each bin is 0.42, 0.50, and 0.29 respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图 2：样本红移范围内计算的柱密度，深绿色方块是约束良好的柱密度，其值 \(N_{HI}>10^{21}\,cm^{-2}\) 。上限以三角形绘制，源自后验分布的第 95 百分位数。不同的阴影区域代表低柱密度 ( \(N_{HI} 10^{21-22}\,cm^{-2}\) )，其中中性氢超过完全中性 IGM 的丰度，以及非常强的 DLA ( \(N_{HI}>10^{22}\,cm^{-2}\) )，具有极端过量的中性气体。无论柱密度如何，所有天体在莱曼限处都具有光学厚度 \(\tau>10^{3}\) ，最高的柱密度 \(N_{HI}=10^{22}\,{cm^{-2}}\) 对应光学深度 \(\tau\approx 10^{5}\) 。按红移分箱（ \(z 12\) ）的约束良好柱密度中位数以黑色三角形显示（值分别为 \(N_{HI}=10^{21.71},10^{22.24}\) 和 \(10^{22.37}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ）。这些本质上是上限，因为每个分箱中 IGM 主导星系/上限（未包含在中位数中）的比例分别为 0.42、0.50 和 0.29。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Measured \(\beta_{UV}\) slope and column density \({log}(N_{HI}/cm^{-2})\) for the galaxy sample. The green squares and triangles again represent the well-constrained and upper limits for column density respectively, with the grey shaded region representing possible high nebular continuum where two-photon emission may be masquerading as a DLA (Katz et al. , 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图 3：星系样本的测量 \(\beta_{UV}\) 斜率和柱密度 \({log}(N_{HI}/cm^{-2})\) 。绿色方块和三角形再次分别代表柱密度的约束良好值和上限，灰色阴影区域代表可能存在的高星云连续谱，其中双光子发射可能伪装成 DLA（Katz et al. , 2025）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Top : Cumulative histogram of derived column densities for our sample in shades of green; separated for non-DLAs (column densities \( 10^{21}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ) for \(z=9-10\) and \(z>10\) . The full sample is shown as grey shaded region, comparing directly to the averages of SERRA -simulated galaxies \(z=6-9.5\) in blue (Gelli et al. , 2025 ) , showing that while the spread of observed DLAs is broadly consistent, there is a peak of extreme-DLAs ( \(>10^{22}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ) that are not represented in the averages of simulations, particularly for those \(z>10\) . Bottom: Similar to top panel, but for a normalised PDF, along with the fraction of galaxies with unconstrained DLAs shown as an IGM limit.
figures.caption_zh: 图 4：上图：我们样本推导柱密度的累积直方图，以绿色阴影显示；按 \(z=9-10\) 和 \(z>10\) 分为非 DLA（柱密度 \( 10^{21}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ）。完整样本以灰色阴影区域显示，直接与 SERRA 模拟星系 \(z=6-9.5\) 的平均值（蓝色，Gelli et al. , 2025）进行比较，表明虽然观测到的 DLA 分布大致一致，但存在一个极端 DLA ( \(>10^{22}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ) 的峰值，这在模拟的平均值中并未体现，特别是对于 \(z>10\) 的星系。下图：与上图类似，但针对归一化概率密度函数，同时将具有未约束 DLA 的星系比例显示为 IGM 极限。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Measured UV magnitude and column density. Halo masses for our objects are derived from UV magnitudes (Mason et al. , 2023 , no dust model) . The well-constrained column densities of our sample are consistent with results from SERRA simulations (Gelli et al. , 2025 ) . The grey contours represent the average column density of 100 galaxies over random sight-lines, with the 1 \(\sigma\) error region also shown, representing the scatter across sightlines in simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图 5：测量的紫外星等和柱密度。我们天体的晕质量源自紫外星等（Mason et al. , 2023，无尘埃模型）。我们样本的约束良好柱密度与 SERRA 模拟的结果一致（Gelli et al. , 2025）。灰色等高线代表 100 个星系在随机视线方向上的平均柱密度，同时显示了 1 \(\sigma\) 误差区域，代表模拟中不同视线方向的弥散。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Left : Upper limits for the dust-to-gas ratio \(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) against redshift, for the subsample of DLAs with \(N_{HI}>10^{21}\) cm -2 . Here, \(A_{V}\) are derived from the assumed reddening of the \(\beta_{UV}\) slope, and so are taken to be upper limits. The majority of the sample are consistent with being dust-poor, lying below 10% solar metallicity. Right : The trend of \(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) against gas-phase metallicity 12+log(O/H), compared to values from the Milky Way, Large and Small Magellanic Clouds, and 10%, 5%, and 1% metallicities (metallicity for each represented with a star). The black line shows the relation for local galaxies and gamma-ray bursts (GRBs) (Heintz et al. , 2023a ) . The method for calculating metallicity for each object is represented by different symbols; each still represents an upper limit in \(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) , and is colour-coded with lensing-corrected UV magnitude.
figures.caption_zh: 图 6：左图：对于 \(N_{HI}>10^{21}\) cm \(^{-2}\) 的 DLA 子样本，尘埃与气体比率 \(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) 随红移变化的上限。此处，\(A_{V}\) 源自 \(\beta_{UV}\) 斜率假定的红化，因此被视为上限。样本中的大多数天体与贫尘埃一致，低于 10% 太阳金属丰度。右图：\(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) 随气相金属丰度 12+log(O/H) 的变化趋势，与银河系、大麦哲伦云、小麦哲伦云以及 10%、5% 和 1% 金属丰度（每种金属丰度用星形表示）的值进行比较。黑线显示了本地星系和伽马射线暴 (GRB) 的关系（Heintz et al. , 2023a）。每个天体金属丰度的计算方法用不同符号表示；每个符号仍代表 \(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) 的上限，并根据透镜修正的紫外星等着色。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Offset from the Fundamental Metallicity Relation (FMR, Curti et al. , 2020 ) as a function of the H i column density for the sample of constrained DLAs. Binned averages for \(N_{{HI}}=10^{21-22}\) cm -2 and \(N_{{HI}}>10^{22}\) cm -2 are shown as black diamonds, with \(1\sigma\) error bars. The average offset from metallicity measurements at \(z=9-10\) (Pollock et al. , 2025 ) is shown in light green. There is only a moderate correlation, with Spearman rank \(\rho\approx-0.4\) , however the strongest DLAs tend to show large offsets from the FMR, as would be expected from pristine gas inflow dilution.
figures.caption_zh: 图 7：对于受约束 DLA 样本，偏离基本金属丰度关系 (FMR, Curti et al. , 2020) 的程度作为 H i 柱密度的函数。\(N_{{HI}}=10^{21-22}\) cm \(^{-2}\) 和 \(N_{{HI}}>10^{22}\) cm \(^{-2}\) 的分箱平均值以黑色菱形显示，并带有 \(1\sigma\) 误差棒。\(z=9-10\) 处金属丰度测量的平均偏移（Pollock et al. , 2025）以浅绿色显示。仅存在中等相关性，Spearman 等级相关系数 \(\rho\approx-0.4\) ，然而最强的 DLA 往往显示出与 FMR 的较大偏移，正如原始气体流入稀释所预期的那样。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Atomic Kennicutt-Schmidt relation of \({log}(\Sigma_{HI})\) and \({log}(\Sigma_{SFR})\) , coloured with column density values. As previously, we plot non-constrained values as upper limits (95%). We compare to the canonical Kennicutt and De Los Reyes ( 2021 ) (K21) relations for starburst and main sequence galaxies, as well as various gas consumption depletion times corresponding to global star-formation efficiency in grey (Kennicutt, 1998 , \(N=1.0\) ) . All galaxies lie above the empirical law, with some scatter, and the low column density (non-DLA) objects are extremely offset, even when plotted as upper limits. The binned means for \(\Sigma_{gas}=10^{1}-10^{2}\) , and \(10^{2}-10^{3}\,M_{\odot}\,pc^{-2}\) are shown as black diamonds, both consistent with \(\sim 10\,\) Myr. In shades of blue we compare to simulation predictions from THESAN-ZOOM at \(z=10-12\) (Shen et al. , 2026 ; Kannan et al. , 2025 ) , SERRA at \(z=7\) (Pallottini et al. , 2022 ) , and H i -only gas surface density from COLIBRE at \(z=8\) (Lagos et al. , 2025 ) . Various literature measurements are shown in grey: from ALMA detections of [O iii ] 88 \(\mu\) m and [C ii ] 158 \(\mu\) m (Vallini et al. , 2024 ) at \(z\approx 7\) , CO-based measurements for starburst ULIRGs at \(z\sim 0\) (Bouché et al. , 2007 ) , and SMGs at \(z\sim 2\) (Bothwell et al. , 2010 ; Tacconi et al. , 2008 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图 8：原子 Kennicutt-Schmidt 关系 \({log}(\Sigma_{HI})\) 和 \({log}(\Sigma_{SFR})\) ，按柱密度值着色。如前所述，我们将未约束值绘制为上限 (95%)。我们与典型的 Kennicutt and De Los Reyes (2021) (K21) 星暴星系和主序星系关系进行比较，以及与对应于全球恒星形成效率的各种气体消耗消耗时标（灰色，Kennicutt, 1998, \(N=1.0\)）。所有星系都位于经验定律之上，存在一些弥散，低柱密度（非 DLA）天体即使绘制为上限也极度偏移。\(\Sigma_{gas}=10^{1}-10^{2}\) 和 \(10^{2}-10^{3}\,M_{\odot}\,pc^{-2}\) 的分箱平均值以黑色菱形显示，两者均与 \(\sim 10\,\) Myr 一致。以蓝色阴影显示，我们与来自 THESAN-ZOOM 在 \(z=10-12\) 的模拟预测（Shen et al. , 2026；Kannan et al. , 2025）、SERRA 在 \(z=7\) 的模拟预测（Pallottini et al. , 2022）以及 COLIBRE 在 \(z=8\) 的仅 H i 气体面密度模拟预测（Lagos et al. , 2025）进行比较。各种文献测量值以灰色显示：来自 ALMA 探测到的 [O iii] 88 \(\mu\) m 和 [C ii] 158 \(\mu\) m（Vallini et al. , 2024）在 \(z\approx 7\) 处，基于 CO 的测量值用于 \(z\sim 0\) 的星暴 ULIRG（Bouché et al. , 2007），以及 \(z\sim 2\) 的 SMG（Bothwell et al. , 2010；Tacconi et al. , 2008）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用光度学中波段发射线测量，约束了宇宙正午时期恒星形成星系的星云消光曲线，并研究了尘埃几何结构。我们测量了MegaScience/UNCOVER中209个恒星形成星系（红移1.2<z<2.4，恒星质量范围$7.85<\log_{10}(M_*/M_\odot)<11.0$）的H-α发射线流量。其中66个星系还测量了Pa-β流量。我们发现，在整个质量范围内，Pa-β/H-α线比随恒星质量和恒星形成率（SFR）显著增加，表明大质量星系尘埃更多。我们将结果与MOSDEF巡天中通过光谱测量H-α/H-β的星系样本（在质量、SFR和红移上匹配）进行比较，发现Reddy等人（2025）提出的浅星云消光曲线比通常假设的Cardelli等人（1989）消光曲线更符合我们的观测，尤其对于大质量星系。这种浅消光曲线可能由恒星形成区域中较低的尘埃覆盖比例解释。通过与其他研究比较，我们表明采用这种更浅的消光曲线可使高质量星系推断的A_Halpha,neb增加多达1个星等。我们未观察到A_Halpha,neb与轴比之间存在趋势，表明星云消光可能局限于小团块。总之，我们的结果强烈表明尘埃几何结构呈斑块状且非均匀，尤其在大质量星系中。我们的结果凸显了JWST中波段探测大样本星系发射线的能力，并可在未来大型项目中统计约束尘埃性质。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：尘埃几何结构呈斑块状非均匀分布，特别是在大质量星系中。浅的星云消光曲线能更好地描述观测数据，使用该曲线可使高质量星系的A_Hα,neb增加达1个星等。JWST中波段数据为大规模研究星系尘埃性质提供了有力工具。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Prospector SFR vs stellar mass for the 66 galaxies in our sample with both \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) and \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) measurements (circles, colored by redshift, green histogram), the 143 galaxies with \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) detections and \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) upper limits (squares, black histogram), and the full UNCOVER sample (gray hexagons, gray histogram). Histograms for SFR and stellar mass for the three populations are also shown. Our sample captures galaxies down to \(\log_{10}(M_{*}/M_{\odot})=7.85\) . They span the full range of redshifts from \(1.2<z<2.4\) , and do not exhibit mass or SFR trends with redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：Prospector SFR与恒星质量的关系，针对我们样本中同时具有\(\textrm{H}\alpha\)和\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\)测量的66个星系（圆圈，按红移着色，绿色直方图）、143个具有\(\textrm{H}\alpha\)探测和\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\)上限的星系（方块，黑色直方图）以及完整的UNCOVER样本（灰色六边形，灰色直方图）。还显示了三个群体的SFR和恒星质量直方图。我们的样本捕获了低至\(\log_{10}(M_{*}/M_{\odot})=7.85\)的星系。它们覆盖了\(1.2<z<2.4\)的完整红移范围，且未表现出质量或SFR随红移变化的趋势。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Measured \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) line ratio plotted against stellar mass (left) and SFR (right). A larger line ratio implies a more dusty galaxy, although the exact conversion depends on the assumed attenuation curve. The intrinsic \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) ratio assuming Case B recombination is 1/18 (0.056). Medians and uncertainties (orange) are computed in bins with equal numbers of galaxies from the fully-detected sample using the Turnbull ( 1976 ) estimator that accounts for the upper limits in each bin. As expected, we see a clear trend of increasing dust attenuation with increasing mass and increasing SFR.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：测量的\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\)线比与恒星质量（左）和SFR（右）的关系。较大的线比意味着星系尘埃更多，但精确转换取决于假设的消光曲线。假设Case B复合，本征\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\)比为1/18（0.056）。中位数和不确定性（橙色）是在完全探测样本中按等数量星系分箱，使用Turnbull（1976）估计量（考虑每箱中的上限）计算的。如预期，我们观察到尘埃消光随质量和SFR增加而增加的趋势。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Average mass, SFR, and redshift for the MegaScience data in this work with \(\log_{10}(M_{*}/M_{\odot})>9\) and the MOSDEF sample. Minima and maxima for each property are shown in small font.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中MegaScience数据（\(\log_{10}(M_{*}/M_{\odot})>9\)）和MOSDEF样本的平均质量、SFR和红移。每个属性的最小值和最大值以小字体显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: MegaScience \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) line ratio vs. the \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) / \(\textrm{H}\beta\) for a comparable sample of MOSDEF galaxies (see Section II.2 ). We present median line ratios from four mass bins that contain roughly equal numbers of MOSDEF galaxies, and their uncertainties are computed from bootstrapping. Predicted line ratios from the Reddy et al. ( 2025 ) and Cardelli et al. ( 1989 ) nebular attenuation curves are shown. The data are consistent with the Reddy et al. ( 2025 ) attenuation curve, particularly at high stellar masses. This consistency suggests that a shallower slope than Cardelli et al. ( 1989 ) is required at this mass and redshift regime.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：MegaScience的\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\)线比与MOSDEF星系可比样本（见第II.2节）的\(\textrm{H}\alpha\) / \(\textrm{H}\beta\)的关系。我们展示了四个质量箱（包含大致相等数量的MOSDEF星系）的中位数线比，其不确定性通过自举法计算。显示了Reddy等人（2025）和Cardelli等人（1989）星云消光曲线预测的线比。数据与Reddy等人（2025）消光曲线一致，尤其在高恒星质量时。这种一致性表明，在此质量和红移范围内，需要比Cardelli等人（1989）更浅的斜率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Median inferred \(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\) values for MegaScience (orange) compared to similar studies of star-forming galaxies at cosmic noon (CANUCS, MOSDEF, and Blue Jay). All other works use \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) / \(\textrm{H}\beta\) line ratios, while MegaScience uses the redder \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) line ratio. The \(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\) are calculated assuming the Cardelli et al. ( 1989 ) attenuation curve (left) and the Reddy et al. ( 2025 ) attenuation curve (right). The green shaded region shows the 1 \(\sigma\) fit to the comparison samples. We see that the Cardelli et al. ( 1989 ) attenuation curve causes our MegaScience measurements to be biased systematically high (median offset: 0.50mag), while the Reddy et al. ( 2025 ) has a smaller median offset (0.34mag), especially at higher masses. We note that the different attenuation curves can cause wide variations in inferred \(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\) for the Balmer decrement samples, with over 1 magnitude of difference in the highest mass Blue Jay bin.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：MegaScience的中位数推断\(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\)值（橙色）与宇宙正午恒星形成星系的类似研究（CANUCS、MOSDEF和Blue Jay）的比较。所有其他工作使用\(\textrm{H}\alpha\) / \(\textrm{H}\beta\)线比，而MegaScience使用更红的\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\)线比。\(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\)分别假设Cardelli等人（1989）消光曲线（左）和Reddy等人（2025）消光曲线（右）计算。绿色阴影区域显示对比样本的1\(\sigma\)拟合。我们看到Cardelli等人（1989）消光曲线导致我们的MegaScience测量系统性地偏高（中位数偏移：0.50mag），而Reddy等人（2025）的中位数偏移较小（0.34mag），尤其在高质量端。我们注意到，不同的消光曲线可导致Balmer减缩样本推断的\(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\)产生很大差异，在最高质量的Blue Jay箱中差异超过1个星等。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Measured \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) line ratio vs axis ratio, as determined by Pysersic fits to the photometry. We do not find a trend between the line ratio and axis ratio as measured in F150W (shown), F444W, or the medium band containing \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) . Medians including the upper limits are shown in orange, with uncertainties measured through bootstrapping. The absence of any trend between dust content and inclination indicates that edge-on galaxies show similar nebular dust attenuation to face-on galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：测量的\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\)线比与轴比的关系，轴比由Pysersic对测光数据的拟合确定。我们未发现线比与F150W（所示）、F444W或包含\(\textrm{H}\alpha\)的中波段测量的轴比之间存在趋势。包含上限的中位数以橙色显示，不确定性通过自举法测量。尘埃含量与倾角之间缺乏任何趋势表明，侧向星系显示出与正面星系相似的星云尘埃消光。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 尽管致密的恒星形成星系被认为在宇宙再电离中扮演关键角色，但使电离光子能够穿过星系星际介质的物理机制仍不清楚。超新星反馈是清除中性气体通道以允许莱曼连续谱光子逃逸的可能机制之一。在此，我们利用在高红移恒星形成星系的低红移类似物——绿豌豆星系及其更低红移对应体蓝莓星系——中发现的超新星，来理解超新星如何塑造其宿主星系在高红移下的性质。我们将1242个蓝莓星系与瞬变发现报告进行交叉匹配，识别出11颗超新星，其中10颗很可能是核坍缩超新星，并将其宿主星系与更大的蓝莓星系群体进行比较。我们发现，拥有超新星的蓝莓星系表现出更高的恒星形成率、在过去约50 Myr内更剧烈的恒星形成历史以及更高的恒星质量。我们估算了蓝莓星系中超新星的发生率，发现与质量相似的场星系相比，蓝莓星系中的超新星率可能略有抑制，但我们无法完全控制观测不确定性。最后，超新星宿主星系显示出比非宿主蓝莓星系更蓝的紫外斜率（显著性为2.1σ）和更低的电离光子产生效率（显著性为7.9σ）；前者结果为超新星驱动反馈在促进电离光子逃逸中起作用的假设提供了适度支持，而后者可能意味着在再电离时期，超新星驱动的淬灭降低了致密恒星形成星系中电离光子的产生速率。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：紫外斜率的结果为超新星驱动反馈在促进电离光子逃逸中起作用的假设提供了适度支持，而电离光子产生效率的降低可能意味着在再电离时期，超新星驱动的淬灭降低了致密星暴星系中电离光子的产生速率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Three-color stamp images of the BB SN hosts in our sample, using grz filters from the DESI Legacy Imaging Survey (Dey et al. , 2019 ; Levi et al. , 2019 ) . The images are centered on the host galaxies, while the red crosses mark the coordinates of each SN. Redshifts are derived from SDSS catalogs, which include spectroscopically derived parameters for each host galaxy (York et al. , 2000 ) . The scale bar is given in angular size in the top left panel, where 3” corresponds to \(\sim 3\) kpc at \(z=0.05\) and \(\sim 5.5\) kpc at \(z=0.1\) . Classification information is from the Transient Name Server (TNS) when available; some SNe in our sample were never spectroscopically classified.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们样本中蓝莓星系超新星宿主的三色拼接图像，使用DESI Legacy巡天（Dey等人，2019；Levi等人，2019）的grz滤镜。图像以宿主星系为中心，红色十字标记每颗超新星的坐标。红移来自SDSS星表，其中包括每个宿主星系的光谱导出参数（York等人，2000）。比例尺以角大小显示在左上角面板中，其中3"对应于\(\sim 3\) kpc（在\(z=0.05\)处）和\(\sim 5.5\) kpc（在\(z=0.1\)处）。分类信息来自瞬变名称服务器（TNS）（如可用）；我们样本中的一些超新星从未进行光谱分类。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Sizes of the LAMOST and SDSS GP samples and the SDSS field-galaxy sample. We include the size of the full sample of galaxies and the filtered \(z<0.12\) subsets, which we address as BB galaxies and their field counterparts in this study.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：LAMOST和SDSS GP样本以及SDSS场星系样本的大小。我们包括完整星系样本的大小以及过滤后的\(z<0.12\)子集，在本研究中将其称为蓝莓星系及其场对应体。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: ZTF, ATLAS, and Pan-STARRS light curves for all SNe in our matched sample, with SN 2010ay from Sanders et al. ( 2012 ) including synthetic photometry from Gemini observations. SN candidates 2024ruy, 2020adtl, and 2023oou are excluded from our analysis. We show the best-fit STARDUST2 model for each bona fide SN (Rodney et al. , 2014 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们匹配样本中所有超新星的ZTF、ATLAS和Pan-STARRS光变曲线，其中SN 2010ay来自Sanders等人（2012），包括来自Gemini观测的合成测光。候选体2024ruy、2020adtl和2023oou被排除在我们的分析之外。我们展示了每颗真实超新星的最佳拟合STARDUST2模型（Rodney等人，2014）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: BB-hosted SNe, including their respective hosts, redshifts, spectroscopic classifications, and approximate absolute magnitudes at peak. The absolute magnitude for 2010ay is taken from Sanders et al. ( 2012 ) , while all others are measured from our lightcurve data. SN 2010ay, 2020aavr, and 2022emj are spectroscopically classified. The unclassified SNe are likely core-collapse SNe, which we determine using photometric classification in Section II.2 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：蓝莓星系宿主超新星，包括各自的宿主、红移、光谱分类和峰值近似绝对星等。2010ay的绝对星等取自Sanders等人（2012），而所有其他绝对星等均来自我们的光变曲线数据。SN 2010ay、2020aavr和2022emj已进行光谱分类。未分类的超新星很可能是核坍缩超新星，我们在第II.2节中使用测光分类确定。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: SN event frequency ( \(N_{SN}/N_{total}\) ) as a function of mass for the SDSS field galaxy sample (green), the color-filtered SFG sample (blue), and the BB sample (pink). Error bars are derived from Poisson statistics for galaxies in the given stellar mass bin. The BB sample shows a lower frequency of SN events.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：超新星事件频率（\(N_{SN}/N_{total}\)）作为质量的函数，分别针对SDSS场星系样本（绿色）、颜色过滤的SFG样本（蓝色）和蓝莓星系样本（粉色）。误差线来自给定恒星质量区间内星系的泊松统计。蓝莓星系样本显示出较低的超新星事件频率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: SN frequency for the SDSS field galaxy sample (green) and the BB sample (pink). Each sample is binned by FUV-calculated SFR, and frequency is calculated by \(N_{{SN}}/N_{{total}}\) in each bin. See the Figure 3 caption for additional details.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：SDSS场星系样本（绿色）和蓝莓星系样本（粉色）的超新星频率。每个样本按FUV计算的SFR分箱，频率由每个箱中的\(N_{{SN}}/N_{{total}}\)计算。其他细节见图3说明。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Corner plot showing galaxy properties of BB galaxies and BB SN hosts, measured from the SDSS spectroscopic pipeline. Properties include the H \(\alpha\) -inferred SFR, electron density, metallicity, and stellar mass. The contours displayed correspond to the \(0.5,1,1.5,2\sigma\) levels. The unclassified SNe are marked with brown “x” markers, while the classified Type Ia and Type II SNe are marked with orange and pink stars, respectively. Dotted lines represent the population means. Top labels give the medians of each property for the BB galaxies, with error bars corresponding to the 16th and 84th percentiles.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：角点图显示蓝莓星系和蓝莓星系超新星宿主的星系性质，来自SDSS光谱管线。性质包括H \(\alpha\)推断的SFR、电子密度、金属丰度和恒星质量。显示的等高线对应于\(0.5,1,1.5,2\sigma\)水平。未分类的超新星用棕色“x”标记，而分类的Ia型和II型超新星分别用橙色和粉色星形标记。虚线表示总体均值。顶部标签给出蓝莓星系每个性质的中位数，误差线对应第16和第84百分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: The UV slope, \(\beta\) , for GPs (green), BBs (blue), and BB SN hosts (pink). The mean UV slope of SN hosts is lower than that of other BBs at 2.1 \(\sigma\) significance. SN 2022emj (SN Ia) and SN 2020aho (blended photometry) are excluded from this figure.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：绿豌豆星系（绿色）、蓝莓星系（蓝色）和蓝莓星系超新星宿主（粉色）的紫外斜率\(\beta\)。超新星宿主的平均紫外斜率低于其他蓝莓星系，显著性为2.1 \(\sigma\)。SN 2022emj（Ia型超新星）和SN 2020aho（混合测光）被排除在此图之外。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 高红移类星体被认为存在于大质量暗物质晕中，这表明它们位于星系过密区域。然而，先前的观测显示它们周围的环境存在多样性。以往的目标仅限于明亮类星体（$M_{1450}\lesssim-25$），其光蒸发效应可能阻碍其邻近区域的星系形成。在此，我们报告了使用斯巴鲁望远镜/超主焦点相机对四个低光度类星体（$-24<M_{1450}<-22$，红移$z\sim6.18$）周围环境的观测，这些类星体的光蒸发效应预期较小。我们通过窄带NB872成像探测了它们周围的莱曼α发射体，并测量了局部LAE过密度。一个类星体（J0844$-$0132）位于过密区域（$δ_\mathrm{LAE}=3.77\pm0.97$），而其他三个天区与正常天区一致。该结果在每个类星体的邻近区域都得到确认，表明类星体周围环境的多样性独立于光蒸发效应。我们发现LAE过密度与宿主星系及超大质量黑洞的性质之间没有显著相关性。我们的类星体拥有来自JWST的宿主恒星质量测量值，这使我们能够将其与具有相当恒星质量但无类星体活动的星系周围的LAE过密度进行比较。我们发现J0844$-$0132天区的LAE过密度强于红移$z\sim6$时具有相似恒星质量的星系，而其他类星体天区则显示出相当的LAE过密度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：低光度类星体周围环境存在多样性，其中一个位于显著过密区，其他环境正常。这种多样性独立于光蒸发效应，且与宿主星系性质无显著相关性。部分类星体可能确实位于星系过密区，但并非所有类星体都如此。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Overview of the physical properties of the target quasars and the effective area of our HSC observations for the individual objects. All of the quasar redshifts are the systemic redshifts determined by the [ O iii ] \(\lambda 5007\) line (Onoue et al. in prep.).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：目标类星体的物理性质概览以及我们针对各个天体的HSC观测有效面积。所有类星体红移均为由[O iii] \(\lambda 5007\) 谱线确定的系统红移（Onoue等人，准备中）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Filter transmission curves in this study. The red and blue dashed lines represent the transmission curves of HSC- \(i2\) and HSC- \(z\) , respectively. The green solid line is the transmission curve of NB872. These transmission curves include the atmospheric absorption. The grey line shows a model spectrum of an LAE at \(z=6.18\) generated by the procedure in Sec. 2.2 with \(\alpha=-2\) and \({EW_{0}}=15\) Å. The upper \(x\) -axis displays the redshift of Ly \(\alpha\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：本研究中的滤光片透射曲线。红色和蓝色虚线分别代表HSC- \(i2\) 和HSC- \(z\) 的透射曲线。绿色实线是NB872的透射曲线。这些透射曲线包含了大气吸收。灰色线显示了通过第2.2节中步骤生成的、红移\(z=6.18\)处LAE的模型光谱，其中\(\alpha=-2\) 且\({EW_{0}}=15\) Å。上方的\(x\)轴显示了Ly \(\alpha\) 的红移。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Summary of the new observations obtained for this study. The seeing is the median value of the observations, and the \(5\sigma\) depth is the median value of the patches.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：为本研究获得的新观测结果总结。视宁度是观测的中值，\(5\sigma\) 深度是各区块的中值。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Summary of the applied flags.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：所应用标记的总结。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: \(5\sigma\) depth maps of the individual fields. The colour of each patch shows the limiting magnitudes of the NB872 image. The \(x\) -axis and \(y\) -axis represent the offset from the quasar coordinate. The black solid line displays the diameter of HSC ( \(45\arcmin\) ). The grey solid line shows the observed field by NB872, taking the dithering into account.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：各个天区的\(5\sigma\) 深度图。每个区块的颜色显示了NB872图像的极限星等。\(x\)轴和\(y\)轴表示相对于类星体坐标的偏移。黑色实线显示了HSC的直径（\(45\arcmin\)）。灰色实线显示了NB872的观测天区，考虑了抖动效应。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Colour-colour diagram of the simulated spectra. The solid and dashed lines represent the redshift evolution of the simulated spectra from \(z=6\) (squares) to \(z=6.25\) (triangles) with a step of \(\Delta z=0.001\) . The legends display the assumed UV continuum slopes, \({EW_{0}}\) , and the redshift range falling within the selection box. The circles show the colour of LAEs at \(z=6.174\) , whose Ly \(\alpha\) emission lies at the centre of NB872. The dotted lines show the colour criteria to select LAEs with \({EW_{0}}>15\) Å.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：模拟光谱的颜色-颜色图。实线和虚线表示模拟光谱从红移\(z=6\)（方块）到\(z=6.25\)（三角形）的红移演化，步长为\(\Delta z=0.001\)。图例显示了假设的紫外连续谱斜率\({EW_{0}}\)以及落在选择框内的红移范围。圆圈显示了红移\(z=6.174\)处LAE的颜色，其Ly \(\alpha\) 发射位于NB872的中心。虚线显示了选择\({EW_{0}}>15\) Å的LAE的颜色判据。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Colour-magnitude diagrams in the individual quasar fields. The grey points show the detected objects. The red points represent the selected LAEs, and the yellow diamonds indicate the quasars’ colours. We replace the \(z\) -band magnitude with its \(2\sigma\) limiting magnitude for the objects whose \(z\) -band magnitudes are fainter than the \(2\sigma\) limiting magnitude. This gives the diagonal envelopes on the right of each panel. The red dashed lines denote the narrowband excess threshold of equation ( 5 ). The black solid lines represent the narrowband excess parameter of equation ( 7 ) with the median \(1\sigma\) flux errors. The black dashed lines are the \(5\sigma\) limiting magnitudes of NB872.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：各个类星体天区的颜色-星等图。灰点显示探测到的天体。红点代表选定的LAE，黄色菱形表示类星体的颜色。对于\(z\)波段星等暗于其\(2\sigma\)极限星等的天体，我们将其\(z\)波段星等替换为\(2\sigma\)极限星等。这给出了每个面板右侧的对角线包络。红色虚线表示方程（5）的窄带超出阈值。黑色实线表示方程（7）的窄带超出参数，带有中值\(1\sigma\)流量误差。黑色虚线是NB872的\(5\sigma\)极限星等。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Detection completeness as a function of narrowband magnitudes. We calculate the detection completeness of patches within a FoV of HSC (black circles in Fig. 2 ). The median detection completeness of the patches and the scatter in the individual quasar fields are plotted. For visibility, the plots for individual fields are slightly offset.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：探测完备度作为窄带星等的函数。我们计算了HSC视场内各区块的探测完备度（图2中的黑色圆圈）。绘制了各区块的中值探测完备度以及各个类星体天区的弥散。为清晰起见，各个天区的图略有偏移。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 参数 \(S_8 \equiv σ_8 (Ω_m/0.3)^{0.5}\) 量化了物质密度涨落的幅度。早期宇宙的宇宙微波背景（CMB）观测与晚期宇宙探针之间存在持续差异。本综述基于新的2026年基线评估了“\(S_8\) 张力”：一个统一的“组合CMB”框架，整合了Planck、ACT DR6和SPT-3G。该组合分析得出 \(S_8 = 0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\)，与单独Planck相比提供了更高的中心值和更小的不确定性。汇总2019–2026年的测量结果，我们揭示了一个显著的分叉：DES第六年结果显示出统计显著的张力，为 \(2.4σ\)–\(2.7σ\) \citep{DESY6}，而KiDS Legacy结果则显示出统计一致性，低于 \(1σ\) \citep{Wright2025}。我们考察了这种二分法的系统起源，包括光度红移校准、本征对齐建模和剪切测量流程。我们进一步将这些发现与星系团计数（其中eROSITA倾向于高值，而SPT倾向于低值）、星系-星系透镜和红移空间畸变联系起来。这种异质性图景表明，特定巡天的系统效应在很大程度上导致了观测到的差异，尽管不能排除ΛCDM之外的新物理。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，观测到的差异主要源于特定巡天的系统误差，但ΛCDM模型之外的新物理可能性仍不能排除。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Compilation of \(S_{8}\) measurements from major cosmological surveys (2019–2026). The horizontal gray band represents the \(1\sigma\) confidence interval of the Combined CMB baseline (Planck + ACT DR6 + SPT-3G), centered at \(S_{8}=0.836\) with asymmetric width \({}^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) . The dashed gray line indicates the central value. Note the systematic offset between DES results (red circles), which lie consistently below the CMB band, and KiDS Legacy results (blue circles), which have migrated upward into consistency with the CMB. The eROSITA cluster count measurement (orange triangle, upper region) uniquely favors a clustering amplitude exceeding the CMB baseline. Error bars represent \(1\sigma\) uncertainties as reported; asymmetric uncertainties are shown faithfully.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：主要宇宙学巡天（2019–2026）的 \(S_{8}\) 测量汇编。水平灰色带表示组合CMB基线（Planck + ACT DR6 + SPT-3G）的 \(1\sigma\) 置信区间，中心值为 \(S_{8}=0.836\)，非对称宽度为 \({}^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) 。灰色虚线表示中心值。注意DES结果（红色圆圈）与KiDS Legacy结果（蓝色圆圈）之间的系统偏移：DES结果始终低于CMB带，而KiDS Legacy结果已向上移动至与CMB一致。eROSITA星系团计数测量（橙色三角形，上部区域）独特地支持聚类振幅超过CMB基线。误差棒表示报告的 \(1\sigma\) 不确定性；非对称不确定性已如实显示。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Comprehensive compilation of \(S_{8}\) measurements and their tension with the Combined CMB baseline ( \(S_{8}=0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) ). Tensions are computed using the uncertainty in the direction of the discrepancy for asymmetric errors. Negative values indicate \(S_{8}\) above the baseline.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：\(S_{8}\) 测量及其与组合CMB基线（ \(S_{8}=0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) ）张力的全面汇编。对于非对称误差，张力使用差异方向上的不确定性计算。负值表示 \(S_{8}\) 高于基线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Weighted mean \(S_{8}\) per year of publication (blue squares) computed from all late-universe measurements in Table LABEL:tab:s8_measurements , excluding CMB baselines. Individual measurements are shown as gray points. The red band denotes the \(1\sigma\) interval of the Combined CMB baseline ( \(S_{8}=0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) ). For asymmetric uncertainties, the symmetrized error \(\sigma_{sym}=\sqrt{(\sigma_{+}^{2}+\sigma_{-}^{2})/2}\) is used to compute inverse-variance weights. The number of measurements per year is indicated below each point, and the tension with the Combined CMB baseline above. The high 2024 mean ( \(0.3\sigma\) ) is driven by the eROSITA cluster count result ( \(S_{8}=0.86\pm 0.01\) ), which dominates the inverse-variance weighting; the 2026 mean is dominated by the DES Y6 results. Correlations between measurements sharing underlying data are not accounted for.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：每年出版物的加权平均 \(S_{8}\)（蓝色方块），基于表LABEL:tab:s8_measurements中所有晚期宇宙测量（不包括CMB基线）计算。单个测量值以灰色点显示。红色带表示组合CMB基线（ \(S_{8}=0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) ）的 \(1\sigma\) 区间。对于非对称不确定性，使用对称化误差 \(\sigma_{sym}=\sqrt{(\sigma_{+}^{2}+\sigma_{-}^{2})/2}\) 计算逆方差权重。每年测量次数在每个点下方标出，与组合CMB基线的张力在点上方标出。2024年的高平均值（ \(0.3\sigma\) ）由eROSITA星系团计数结果（ \(S_{8}=0.86\pm 0.01\) ）驱动，该结果主导了逆方差加权；2026年的平均值由DES Y6结果主导。共享底层数据的测量之间的相关性未予考虑。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 通过将哈勃前沿场（HFF）的观测扩展到F225W波段，利用HST WFC3/UVIS，我们测量了红移0.4 < z < 0.7处星系的静止帧紫外光度函数（LF），并深入研究了低光度星系区域。在本系列的第一篇论文中，我们描述了HST Cycle-27 GO-15940 F225W观测和数据处理，并提供了Abell 2744场（数据最丰富的HFF星团场）的相应星表。结合深近紫外成像和前景星团强引力透镜产生的高放大率，我们通过混合测光-光谱红移选择，从Abell 2744 F225W星表中识别出152个暗弱星系，其M_{UV}范围为-19.5 < M_{UV} < -12.1，红移为0.4 < z < 0.7。利用由50%完备性截断定义的样本，并应用最大似然估计，我们推导出z ~ 0.55处、M_\text{UV} < -13.5星等以下的紫外LF的最佳拟合Schechter参数，包括暗端斜率α= -1.324^{+0.072}_{-0.074}。我们在参数估计中引入曲率参数δ，以考虑紫外LF暗端可能的拐点，并利用样本探测到的极低光度。我们的结果在3σ置信水平上排除了M_{UV} = -15.5以上亮度的拐点。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该研究成功探测到红移0.4-0.7的低光度星系，为理解星系形成和演化提供了重要约束，特别是排除了紫外光度函数暗端在较亮光度处存在拐点的可能性。

figures.caption_zh: 表1：HFF Abell 2744场的观测与图像深度

figures.caption_zh: 图1：HST-GO-15940的F225W观测与Abell 2744场中F160W观测的相对覆盖范围，叠加在F606W镶嵌图上。F160W和F606镶嵌图由HFF科学产品团队提供（Lotz et al., 2017）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: SExtractor Parameter Configuration for WFC3/UVIS F225W Photometric Analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：用于WFC3/UVIS F225W测光分析的SExtractor参数配置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Redshift distribution of the selected 152 sources from the Abell 2744 photometry catalogs, with \(0.4<z<0.7\) and \(S/N\geq 3\) in the F225W band.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自Abell 2744测光星表的152个选定源的红移分布，红移范围为\(0.4<z<0.7\)，且在F225W波段信噪比\(S/N\geq 3\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Magnification (in units of magnitude) distribution of the selected 152 sources from the Abell 2744 photometry catalogs, with \(0.4<z<0.7\) and \(S/N\geq 3\) in the F225W band.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：来自Abell 2744测光星表的152个选定源的放大率（以星等单位表示）分布，红移范围为\(0.4<z<0.7\)，且在F225W波段信噪比\(S/N\geq 3\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Distribution of intrinsic absolute UV magnitude (corrected for the lensing magnification effect) of the selected 152 sources from the Abell 2744 photometry catalogs, with \(0.4<z<0.7\) and \(S/N\geq 3\) in the F225W band. The faintest magnitude reaches \(-12.1\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自Abell 2744测光星表的152个选定源的内禀绝对紫外星等（经透镜放大效应校正）分布，红移范围为\(0.4<z<0.7\)，且在F225W波段信噪比\(S/N\geq 3\)。最暗星等达到\(-12.1\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Completeness as a function of absolute magnitude \(M_{1500}\) , with color-coded curves representing different redshifts. Here the magnification is marginalized over. The horizontal gray dashed line indicates our \(50\%\) completeness threshold.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：完备性作为绝对星等\(M_{1500}\)的函数，不同颜色的曲线代表不同红移。此处放大率已被边缘化。水平灰色虚线表示我们的50%完备性阈值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Rest-frame UV LF for galaxies at \(z\sim 0.55\) in the Abell 2744 field. The best-fit Schechter function from our MLE is plotted as a black solid curve, with the surrounding gray band indicating its \(3\sigma\) uncertainty range. For reference, a black dashed line extends our best-fit model to brighter magnitudes, where direct constraints from our data are absent, to aid comparison with other studies. The observed, binned LF (shown as black squares) is provided for visual assessment only. Various literature measurements at similar redshifts are overplotted as colored lines, as detailed in the legend. The inset panel presents the joint constraints on the Schechter parameters, the faint-end slope \(\alpha\) and the characteristic magnitude \(M^{*}\) . Green lines mark the median (best-fit) values reported in Table 3 , while the black contours enclose the \(1\sigma\) (0.393) and \(2\sigma\) (0.865) confidence regions.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：Abell 2744场中红移\(z\sim 0.55\)处星系的静止帧紫外LF。来自MLE的最佳拟合Schechter函数以黑色实线绘制，周围的灰色带表示其3σ不确定范围。作为参考，黑色虚线将我们的最佳拟合模型延伸到更亮星等（我们的数据缺乏直接约束），以便与其他研究进行比较。观测到的分箱LF（以黑色方块显示）仅供视觉评估。不同红移处的各种文献测量结果以彩色线条叠加，详见图例。内嵌面板展示了Schechter参数（暗端斜率α和特征星等M^{*}）的联合约束。绿色线标记了表3中报告的中位（最佳拟合）值，而黑色等高线包围了1σ（0.393）和2σ（0.865）置信区域。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 恒星形成的淬灭是星系演化的关键阶段。尽管活动星系核反馈被认为是这一转变的关键驱动因素，但邻近淬灭星系中缺乏强活动星系核的现象对其有效性提出了质疑。本研究利用eROSITA/eFEDS（X射线）、WISE（中红外）和FIRST（射电）的多波段数据，研究了红移$z<$ 0.2的后星暴星系、恒星形成星系和宁静星系中的活动星系核活动。我们评估了不同阶段的活动星系核发生率与强度，并对未探测到的星系应用叠加技术以恢复平均活动星系核性质。观测光度与恒星形成预期光度（L$_{\rm obs}$/L$_{\rm SF}$）的比较表明，后星暴星系的射电和X射线辐射主要由恒星形成主导。尽管后星暴星系的中红外活动星系核发生率是恒星形成星系的两倍，但其估计的活动星系核光度与文献中的中红外活动星系核相比很小。总体而言，后星暴星系相对于质量和红移匹配的恒星形成星系和宁静星系，并未表现出显著增强的活动星系核辐射。虽然不能排除后星暴星系中存在被遮蔽的低光度活动星系核，但此类活动星系核（如果存在）可能由先前星暴的残余气体提供燃料，并且在淬灭过程中可能不起主导作用。我们的发现表明，在低红移下，活动星系核在淬灭中的作用比剧烈移除气体更为微妙——反馈更可能是“预防性”而非“喷出性”的。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：后星暴星系中可能存在被遮蔽的低光度AGN，这些AGN可能由先前星暴的残余气体提供燃料，但在淬灭过程中可能不起主导作用。研究结果表明，在低红移下，AGN在淬灭中的作用比剧烈移除气体更为微妙——反馈更可能是"预防性"而非"喷出性"的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: The distribution of SFGs, PSBs and QGs on the H \(\delta_{A}\) vs. Dn4000 plot. Middle: [O III]/H \(\beta\) vs. [N II]/H \(\alpha\) BPT diagram. The dashed and solid lines are demarcation lines for SF and AGN ionization, from Kauffmann et al. ( 2003a ) and Kewley et al. ( 2001 ) , respectively. Only galaxies with SNR \(\geqslant\) 3 for all four emission lines are shown. QGs are selected to have minimal emission (Section II.1.2 ) and therefore not plotted here. Right: Stellar mass vs. redshift for the PSB sample and mass- and redshift-matched comparison samples of SFGs and QGs. The vertical and diagonal aggregations of QGs in this panel are not biases introduced by the matching process. See Section II.1.2 and Appendix A for more details.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：SFGs、PSBs和QGs在H \(\delta_{A}\) vs. Dn4000图上的分布。中图：[O III]/H \(\beta\) vs. [N II]/H \(\alpha\) BPT图。虚线和实线分别来自Kauffmann等人（2003a）和Kewley等人（2001）的恒星形成和活动星系核电离分界线。仅显示所有四条发射线信噪比\(\geqslant\) 3的星系。QGs被选为具有最小发射（第II.1.2节），因此未在此绘制。右图：PSB样本以及质量和红移匹配的SFGs和QGs比较样本的恒星质量与红移关系。此图中QGs的垂直和对角聚集并非匹配过程引入的偏差。详见第II.1.2节和附录A。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Detection rates at different wavelengths for our samples. Counting errors following Poisson statistics are included for reference (N \({}^{+\sqrt{N+0.75}+1}_{-\sqrt{N-0.25}}\) for N \(\lesssim\) 10; N \({}^{+\sqrt{N}}_{-\sqrt{N}}\) for N \(>\) 10, see Gehrels 1986 ).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：我们样本在不同波段的探测率。为参考，包含了遵循泊松统计的计数误差（对于N \(\lesssim\) 10，为N \({}^{+\sqrt{N+0.75}+1}_{-\sqrt{N-0.25}}\)；对于N \(>\) 10，为N \({}^{+\sqrt{N}}_{-\sqrt{N}}\)，见Gehrels 1986）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Median stacked radio images (2′ \(\times\) 2′, 1.8″/pixel) in mJy for undetected SFGs, PSBs, and QGs. The white circle represents the 10″ diameter aperture used to measure the stacked signal (Table 2 ). All three samples show SNR \(>\) 2 signals in the stacks.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：未探测到的SFGs、PSBs和QGs的中值叠加射电图像（2′ \(\times\) 2′，1.8″/像素），单位为mJy。白色圆圈表示用于测量叠加信号的10″直径孔径（表2）。所有三个样本在叠加中均显示信噪比\(>\) 2的信号。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Open points are galaxies detected in the FIRST catalog and filled points are measurements from stacking only undetected galaxies. The horizontal bar on the stacked points shows the 16th and 84th percentile range of the M ∗ and the vertical bar shows the luminosity error from the bootstrapping method. Luminosity errors for individually detected galaxies (from the RMS in the catalog) are plotted though the error bars are smaller than the marker size.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：空心点为FIRST星表中探测到的星系，实心点为仅对未探测星系进行叠加的测量结果。叠加点上的水平条显示M ∗的第16和84百分位范围，垂直条显示自举方法得到的光度误差。单个探测星系的光度误差（来自星表的均方根）已绘制，但误差棒小于标记大小。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Flux and luminosity measurements from stacked FIRST cutouts of undetected galaxies. The luminosity is converted from the flux using the median redshift in the stack. The median SFR is the median of the values for galaxies that are included in the stack.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：未探测星系叠加FIRST切片的流量和光度测量值。光度使用叠加中的中值红移从流量转换而来。中值恒星形成率是包含在叠加中的星系的中值。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Median luminosity [10 9 L ⊙ ] and flux density [mJy] for our samples of SFGs, PSBs, and QGs in the four WISE bands. Median SFR in the corresponding samples are also included. Numbers in the subscripts and superscripts are the 16th and 84th percentiles.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：SFGs、PSBs和QGs样本在四个WISE波段的中值光度[10 9 L ⊙ ]和流量密度[mJy]。同时包含相应样本的中值恒星形成率。下标和上标中的数字为第16和84百分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The composite MIR SED for SFGs, PSBs, and QGs in the 4 WISE bands: W1 (3.4 \(\mu\) m), W2 (4.6 \(\mu\) m), W3 (12 \(\mu\) m), W4 (22 \(\mu\) m). Each symbol represents the median luminosity of the corresponding sample converted from nanomaggies, with the vertical bars showing the 16th and 84th percentiles. All samples are detected with SNR \(>\) 3 in W1 and W2 bands, and we overplot in gray open points the medians and percentiles of the subsamples with SNR \(>\) 3 in W3 and W4 bands.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：SFGs、PSBs和QGs在4个WISE波段：W1（3.4 \(\mu\) m）、W2（4.6 \(\mu\) m）、W3（12 \(\mu\) m）、W4（22 \(\mu\) m）的复合中红外光谱能量分布。每个符号代表相应样本从纳莫吉转换的中值光度，垂直条显示第16和84百分位数。所有样本在W1和W2波段均以信噪比\(>\) 3被探测到，我们以灰色空心点叠加了在W3和W4波段信噪比\(>\) 3的子样本的中值和百分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Mean stacked count rate X-ray images (2′ \(\times\) 2′, 4″/pixel) from eROSITA for undetected SFGs, PSBs, and QGs. The white circle represents the 30″ radius aperture used to measure the stacked signal (Table 4 ). We detect signals with SNR \(>2\) in the SFG and PSB stacks, while no significant signal is detected in the QG stack.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：来自eROSITA的未探测SFGs、PSBs和QGs的平均叠加计数率X射线图像（2′ \(\times\) 2′，4″/像素）。白色圆圈表示用于测量叠加信号的30″半径孔径（表4）。我们在SFG和PSB叠加中探测到信噪比\(>2\)的信号，而在QG叠加中未探测到显著信号。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了在121个大质量恒星形成团块中发现了超过323条超细的尘埃纤维结构（纤维），这些团块位于银河系内广泛不同的环境中（银心距约为0.5-12.7 kpc）。这些纤维是利用ALMA-QUARKS巡天中1.3毫米连续辐射识别出来的，该巡天对于距离约3 kpc的源具有约900 AU的线性分辨率，识别过程使用了FilFinder软件。利用RadFil软件，我们发现这些纤维的典型宽度约为0.01 pc，比赫歇尔空间天文台在邻近云中发现的尘埃纤维窄约十倍。这些纤维的质量（M）与长度（L）关系遵循M∝L²，类似于在空间（如赫歇尔）和地面单口径（如APEX）巡天中识别出的银河系纤维。然而，这些纤维的密度（N_{H_2} = 10^{23}-10^{24} cm^{-2}）显著高于先前赫歇尔巡天中发现的纤维（N_{H_2} = 10^{20}-10^{23} cm^{-2}）。这项工作提供了大质量团块中超细纤维的大样本，继在邻近分子云中识别出0.1 pc宽的纤维及相关内部速度相干纤维之后，进一步强调了纤维结构在不同物理尺度恒星形成中的关键作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这项工作提供了大质量团块中超细纤维的大样本，强调了纤维结构在不同物理尺度恒星形成中的关键作用，与先前在邻近分子云中发现的0.1 pc宽纤维和速度相干纤维的研究相呼应。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Multi-wavelength picture of the exemplar source I12320-6122. Left Panel : Spitzer three-color composite (blue: 3.6- \(\micron\) ; green: 4.5- \(\micron\) , red: 8.0- \(\micron\) ) image overlaid with the ATLASGAL 870- \(\micron\) data shown by white contours and the MeerKAT Galactic Plane Survey (MGPS) 1.28-GHz data shown by yellow contours (see also in Xu et al. 2024 ). The field of view (FoV) of the combined ATOMS (12-m + ACA) 3-mm continuum data ( \(\sim\) 80 ′′ ) and the QUARKS (12-m C2 & C5 + ACA) 1.3-mm data ( \(\sim\) 40 ′′ ) is shown by the red and cyan circles, respectively. The atlas for all sources are shown in a companion work (Jiao W.-Y., et al. 2026, in preparation). Right Panel : the 1.3-mm continuum emission, for the same region, as detected from the QUARKS survey is shown as the background with fibrils appearing as red structures according to the intensity scale on the right. The spines of fibrils are shown with sky-blue curves, the branches are shown with gray curves, and the purple circles mark locations of cores or condensations identified by using getsf (Jiao W.-Y. et al. 2026, in preparation). For the lime-green contours representing the H40 \(\alpha\) line emission detected in the ATOMS survey, the start, step and end levels are 0.025, 1.520 and 13.500 Jy beam -1 km s -1 , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：示例源I12320-6122的多波段图像。左图：斯皮策三色合成图（蓝色：3.6- \(\micron\) ；绿色：4.5- \(\micron\) ，红色：8.0- \(\micron\) ）上叠加了ATLASGAL 870- \(\micron\) 数据（白色等高线）和MeerKAT银道面巡天（MGPS）1.28-GHz数据（黄色等高线）（另见Xu et al. 2024）。ATOMS（12-m + ACA）3毫米连续辐射数据（ \(\sim\) 80 ′′ ）和QUARKS（12-m C2 & C5 + ACA）1.3毫米数据（ \(\sim\) 40 ′′ ）的视场分别用红色和青色圆圈表示。所有源的图集见配套工作（Jiao W.-Y., et al. 2026, 准备中）。右图：同一区域的1.3毫米连续辐射，来自QUARKS巡天，显示为背景，纤维根据右侧强度标尺显示为红色结构。纤维的脊线用天蓝色曲线表示，分支用灰色曲线表示，紫色圆圈标记了使用getsf识别的核或凝聚物的位置（Jiao W.-Y. et al. 2026, 准备中）。对于代表ATOMS巡天中探测到的H40 \(\alpha\) 谱线发射的石灰绿等高线，起始、步长和终止水平分别为0.025、1.520和13.500 Jy beam^{-1} km s^{-1}。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left panel : The grey background shows one of the fibrils identified in the I12320-6122. The blue points mark the location of the peak sampling points along the fibril in RadFil , while the thick red curve represent the sampling path that is rouphly consistent with the sampling points. The thin red lines that are perpendicular to the thick curve and across the points are the paths where the profile data were extracted. Right Panel : The black points outline the profiles along the different lines perpendicular to the spine of the main fibril (i.e., the thin red lines). In the upper panel, the shaded green areas show the regions where the data are used for extracting the baseline that is indicated by the thick green line. In the middle panel, the shaded blue area and curve show the data used for obtaining the parameters of the Plummer profile and fitting line. The magenta and cyan dashed lines are the averaged mean and median curves, respectively. The meaning of the shaded blue area, blue line, the dashed magenta and cyan lines in the lower panel are the same as that in the middle panel, but for fitting the Gaussian profile.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图：灰色背景显示在I12320-6122中识别出的一条纤维。蓝色点标记了RadFil中沿纤维的峰值采样点位置，而粗红色曲线表示与采样点大致一致的采样路径。垂直于粗曲线并穿过这些点的细红线是提取剖面数据的路径。右图：黑点勾勒出沿垂直于主纤维脊线的不同线（即细红线）的剖面。在上图中，绿色阴影区域显示用于提取基线的数据，基线由粗绿线表示。在中图中，蓝色阴影区域和曲线显示用于获取Plummer剖面参数和拟合线的数据。品红色和青色虚线分别是平均和中位曲线。下图中蓝色阴影区域、蓝线、品红色和青色虚线的含义与中图相同，但用于拟合高斯剖面。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Left Panel : a histogram of the FWHM in the Plummer profile fitting for prominent fibrils identified by using FilFinder . The pink (red), yellow (green) and skyblue (blue) bins (curves) are the Kernel Density Estimation (KDE) curves for fibrils within sources containing H II regions, without H II regions traced by H40 \(\alpha\) emission, and for the whole sample, respectively. The dashed blue line marks the location where the blue curve peaks. Right Panel : the same as the figure shown in the left panel, but for statistical results from the Gaussian profile fittings.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左图：使用FilFinder识别的显著纤维的Plummer剖面拟合中半高全宽的直方图。粉色（红色）、黄色（绿色）和天蓝色（蓝色）的柱（曲线）分别是包含H II区的源内纤维、未包含由H40 \(\alpha\) 发射示踪的H II区的源内纤维以及整个样本的核密度估计曲线。蓝色虚线标记了蓝色曲线峰值的位置。右图：与左图相同，但针对高斯剖面拟合的统计结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Mass-Length relations among the H I filamentary clouds ( Clark et al. 2014 ; Hacar et al. 2023 ; Putman et al. 2026 ), the dusty filaments detected in the Hi-Gal project ( Schisano et al. 2020 ), and the superfine fibrils detected in the QUARKS survey. The colored and open contours are used to present the Mass-Length distributions of the H I clouds and the dusty filaments, respectively. The fitting results of their distributions are shown by the solid and sky-blue lines, correspondingly. The non-circled red and green crosses represent the common filaments and giant filaments detected in the ATLASGAL survey ( Li et al. 2016 ), respectively. In addition, the blue squares represent the hub-filament systems compiled in Hacar et al. ( 2025 ) . For the QUARKS sample, we use dotted red and green lines to indicate the fitted Mass-Length relation of superfine fibrils within clumps/protoclusters that correspondingly are and are not found to emit H40 \(\alpha\) line emission, while the solid blue line are used to indicate the overall Mass-Length relation of superfine fibrils.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：H I纤维云（Clark et al. 2014；Hacar et al. 2023；Putman et al. 2026）、Hi-Gal项目探测到的尘埃纤维（Schisano et al. 2020）以及QUARKS巡天探测到的超细纤维之间的质量-长度关系。彩色和开放等高线分别用于表示H I云和尘埃纤维的质量-长度分布。其分布的拟合结果分别用实线和天蓝色线表示。未圈出的红色和绿色十字分别代表ATLASGAL巡天中探测到的普通纤维和巨纤维（Li et al. 2016）。此外，蓝色方块代表Hacar et al.（2025）汇编的枢纽-纤维系统。对于QUARKS样本，我们用红色和绿色虚线分别表示在发射和不发射H40 \(\alpha\) 谱线辐射的团块/原星团内超细纤维的拟合质量-长度关系，而蓝色实线用于表示超细纤维的整体质量-长度关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Panel (a) presents the numerical simulation result for the L1495 cloud. The colored background presents the column density distribution of the H 2 . The gray curve marks the typical filamentary structure that is used for checking the physical reality of fibrils. Panel (b) presents the identification result of the fibril marked by the grey curve in panel (a), where the meaning of red curve/segments or blue points are the same as that shown in Figure 2 . Panel (c) presents the Plummer and Gaussian fittings in RadFil for the (column) density profile of the fibril marked in panels (a) and (b). The meaning of the curves and datapoints are the same as that shown in Figure 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：图(a)展示了L1495云的数值模拟结果。彩色背景呈现了H_{2}的柱密度分布。灰色曲线标记了用于检查纤维物理真实性的典型纤维结构。图(b)展示了图(a)中灰色曲线标记的纤维的识别结果，其中红色曲线/线段或蓝色点的含义与图2所示相同。图(c)展示了图(a)和(b)中标记的纤维的（柱）密度剖面的Plummer和高斯拟合。曲线和数据点的含义与图2所示相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure B.1: Part of the atlas of the fibrils found in the QUARKS sample. The backgrounds show the 1.3-mm continuum emission detected in the 139 proto-clusters. The sky-blue and light-grey curves are used to present the spines and branches of the skeletons in fibrils, respectively. The blue and yellow numbers are used to correspondingly present the indexing of fibrils processed in RadFil and FilFinder . In addition, we present the H40 \(\alpha\) emission detected in the ATOMS survey with limegreen contours, and cores found in Jiao et al. (in preparation) with purple circles.
figures.caption_zh: 图B.1：QUARKS样本中发现的纤维图集的一部分。背景显示了在139个原星团中探测到的1.3毫米连续辐射。天蓝色和浅灰色曲线分别用于表示纤维骨架的脊线和分支。蓝色和黄色数字分别用于表示在RadFil和FilFinder中处理的纤维的索引。此外，我们用石灰绿等高线呈现ATOMS巡天中探测到的H40 \(\alpha\) 发射，并用紫色圆圈表示Jiao等人（准备中）发现的核。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Prameters Measured for Superfine Fibrils
figures.caption_zh: 表1：超细纤维的测量参数

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个完全贝叶斯框架，用于类星体光变曲线的时间延迟推断和平稳性检验，该框架使用边缘化高斯过程。该模型将确定性、非平稳漂移（分段线性均值）与平稳随机变异性（Matérn和谱混合核）分开，并联合建模多个图像及其每个图像的微引力透镜效应。通过嵌套采样获得贝叶斯证据和参数后验，并在模型选择上进行边缘化。应用于类星体WFI J2033 - 4723、B 1608 + 656和HE 0435 - 1223，我们发现B 1608 + 656和HE 0435 - 1223存在非平稳性的强证据，而WFI J2033 - 4723与平稳性一致。随机成分倾向于B 1608 + 656的马尔可夫指数核，以及WFI J2033 - 4723和HE 0435 - 1223的非马尔可夫Matérn-\frac32核。多尺度谱混合核不被支持。时间延迟对模型假设具有稳健性，并且在误差范围内与先前工作一致。我们进一步识别并缓解了一种偏向大延迟的似然函数病理问题，提供了一个实用的嵌套采样收敛协议。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：该贝叶斯框架能有效识别光变曲线的平稳性特征，提供可靠的时间延迟估计。通过解决似然函数病理问题并建立嵌套采样收敛协议，提高了推断的准确性。方法适用于引力透镜时间延迟宇宙学应用。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Priors set on the parameters of the flux variability model. All priors are uniform in the ranges shown. “Sorted” indicates that a sorted-uniform prior [ 90 , 91 ] was used. The top set of parameters corresponds to the time delays, the middle set to the mean function and the bottom set to the covariance matrix. The prior on the time delay \(\Delta t\) was set differently for the WFI J2033 – 4723 and B 1608 + 656 \((1)\) and HE 0435 – 1223 \((2)\) data sets, respectively. The range of \(t\) -values of the light curves is denoted by \(\Delta t_{{range}}=t_{n_{{data}}}-t_{1}\) , mean and std denote the mean and standard deviation of time delays reported in Hojjati et al. [ 22 ] , \(\bar{\mathbf{y}}_{{A}}\) is the average of the magnitudes \(\mathbf{y}_{{A}}\) of light curve A and \(f_{{Nyquist}}\) is the Nyquist frequency computed from \(t_{1},\dots,t_{n_{{data}}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：通量变异性模型参数设定的先验。所有先验在所示范围内均匀分布。“排序”表示使用了排序均匀先验[90, 91]。顶部参数集对应时间延迟，中间参数集对应均值函数，底部参数集对应协方差矩阵。时间延迟\(\Delta t\)的先验分别针对WFI J2033 – 4723和B 1608 + 656 \((1)\)以及HE 0435 – 1223 \((2)\)数据集设定。光变曲线\(t\)值的范围记为\(\Delta t_{{range}}=t_{n_{{data}}}-t_{1}\)，mean和std表示Hojjati等人[22]报告的时间延迟的均值和标准差，\(\bar{\mathbf{y}}_{{A}}\)是光变曲线A的星等\(\mathbf{y}_{{A}}\)的平均值，\(f_{{Nyquist}}\)是根据\(t_{1},\dots,t_{n_{{data}}}\)计算的奈奎斯特频率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Evidence \(\log Z\) , posterior-averaged log-likelihood \(\langle\log L\rangle_{P}\) and KL -divergence \(D_{{KL}}\) for the three quasar light curve data sets. The three quantities are related by Occam’s razor equation, \(\log Z=\langle\log L\rangle_{P}-D_{{KL}}\) . Each coloured square in a subplot corresponds to a GP fit, performed with a given number of knots \(n_{{fk}}\) in the flexknot mean function and a given GP kernel. Zero and one knots correspond to a fixed and constant mean (with the constant a parameter), respectively. Note that the numbers in brackets denotes the standard deviation on the last digits. As shown by the KL -divergence, model complexity increases roughly from the top left to the bottom right corner. The goodness of fit, \(\langle\log L\rangle_{P}\) , roughly shows the opposite trend, with more complex models producing better fits. As the balance of these two, the evidence \(\log Z\) shows an overall preference to the E and M32 kernels. Non-stationarity (more than one knot) is preferred for B 1608 + 656 and HE 0435 – 1223 , whereas there is no clear indication of non-stationarity for WFI J2033 – 4723 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：三个类星体光变曲线数据集的证据\(\log Z\)、后验平均对数似然\(\langle\log L\rangle_{P}\)和KL散度\(D_{{KL}}\)。这三个量通过奥卡姆剃刀方程\(\log Z=\langle\log L\rangle_{P}-D_{{KL}}\)相关联。子图中的每个彩色方块对应一个GP拟合，该拟合使用flexknot均值函数中给定数量的节点\(n_{{fk}}\)和给定的GP核进行。零个和一个节点分别对应固定均值和常数均值（常数作为一个参数）。注意，括号中的数字表示最后一位数字的标准差。如KL散度所示，模型复杂度大致从左上角到右下角增加。拟合优度\(\langle\log L\rangle_{P}\)大致呈现相反趋势，更复杂的模型产生更好的拟合。作为这两者的平衡，证据\(\log Z\)总体上倾向于E和M32核。对于B 1608 + 656和HE 0435 – 1223，非平稳性（多于一个节点）更受青睐，而对于WFI J2033 – 4723，则没有明确的非平稳性指示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: GP (left column) and mean function (right column) posterior predictive distributions for the three quasar light curve data sets, each consisting of a number of light curves: A, B, C and (if existing) D. The GP is the sum of the deterministic mean function and the stochastic contribution from the GP kernel, which are fit jointly to the data. Plotting just the mean function therefore extracts the non-stationarity of the GP . The fits are marginalised over all choices in Figure 1 . Visually, the mean function of WFI J2033 – 4723 is consistent with a constant, whereas for B 1608 + 656 and HE 0435 – 1223 , the mean function is clearly non-stationary. Note that the full GP on the right reverts to the mean function outside the observation window, i.e. extrapolation is dictated by the mean function. The time axis is set to zero at the first observation.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：三个类星体光变曲线数据集的GP（左列）和均值函数（右列）后验预测分布，每个数据集包含若干条光变曲线：A、B、C和（如果存在）D。GP是确定性均值函数和来自GP核的随机贡献之和，两者联合拟合数据。因此，仅绘制均值函数可以提取GP的非平稳性。拟合是在图1中所有选择上边缘化的。从视觉上看，WFI J2033 – 4723的均值函数与常数一致，而对于B 1608 + 656和HE 0435 – 1223，均值函数明显是非平稳的。注意，右侧的完整GP在观测窗口之外回归到均值函数，即外推由均值函数决定。时间轴在第一次观测处设为零。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Corner plots of the time delay posteriors for the three data sets. The posteriors are marginalised over all model choices in Figure 2 . For comparison, the inferred values (mean and standard deviation) from Hojjati et al. [ 22 ] are overplotted. All posteriors are unimodal and well-constrained, with the exception of \(\Delta t_{{AB}}\) of B 1608 + 656 , which displays a weakly protruding secondary peak. The numerical means and standard deviations are also shown in Table 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：三个数据集的时间延迟后验的角落图。后验是在图2中所有模型选择上边缘化的。作为比较，还叠加了Hojjati等人[22]的推断值（均值和标准差）。所有后验都是单峰且约束良好的，除了B 1608 + 656的\(\Delta t_{{AB}}\)，它显示出一个微弱突出的次峰。数值均值和标准差也显示在表2中。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Comparison of the time delay posterior values for the quasars WFI J2033 – 4723 , B 1608 + 656 and HE 0435 – 1223 (Figure 3 ) with those from Hojjati et al. [ 22 ] . The values were calculated by marginalising over the model choices in Figure 2 . The results in Hojjati et al. [ 22 ] were obtained for the exponential (DRW) and Matérn-3/2 kernels. All time delays are in units of days.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：类星体WFI J2033 – 4723、B 1608 + 656和HE 0435 – 1223（图3）的时间延迟后验值与Hojjati等人[22]结果的比较。这些值是通过在图2的模型选择上边缘化计算得出的。Hojjati等人[22]的结果是针对指数（DRW）和Matérn-3/2核获得的。所有时间延迟的单位为天。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Scatter of the light curve data points around the mean function of the GP fit in units of magnitude. The distribution of the residuals is expected to follow a normal distribution. For comparison, a Gaussian distribution with the same mean and standard deviation is shown as well. For WFI J2033 – 4723 and B 1608 + 656 , the agreement in the tails is better than in the bulk. For HE 0435 – 1223 , the observed deviation from the exact Gaussian on the left half is attributed to a mis-fit resulting from lack of permutation-invariance of the GP model.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：光变曲线数据点围绕GP拟合均值函数的散点图，单位为星等。残差的分布预期遵循正态分布。作为比较，还显示了具有相同均值和标准差的高斯分布。对于WFI J2033 – 4723和B 1608 + 656，尾部的吻合度优于主体部分。对于HE 0435 – 1223，左半部分观察到的与精确高斯的偏差归因于GP模型缺乏置换不变性导致的拟合不佳。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 大幅度的原初曲率扰动坍缩成行星质量原初黑洞，会在μHz频率范围内产生一个标量诱导的引力波背景，未来的月球激光测距和卫星激光测距数据可能探测到该信号。我们推导了在这些实验对随机引力波背景的零探测情况下，对原初黑洞群落的投影约束，包括电弱相变对行星质量原初黑洞丰度的影响。我们还讨论了所获得的投影约束与HSC合作组最近对仙女座星系的微引力透镜观测之间的联系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：月球激光测距和卫星激光测距数据有望为行星质量原初黑洞的丰度提供重要约束，这些约束与微引力透镜观测相互补充，有助于深入理解原初黑洞的形成机制和早期宇宙物理。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left Panel : Threshold \(\mathcal{C}_{th}\) (red solid) and shape parameter \(\alpha_{s}\) (blue dashed) values for different widths \(\Delta\) of a log-normal power spectrum. Right Panel : The corresponding evolution of the threshold \(\mathcal{C}^{ew}_{th}\) during the EW phase transition for different values of the shape parameter \(\alpha_{s}\) , normalised with respect to the value of \(\mathcal{C}_{th}\) in the standard radiation dominated era.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：对数正态功率谱在不同宽度 \(\Delta\) 下的阈值 \(\mathcal{C}_{th}\) （红色实线）和形状参数 \(\alpha_{s}\) （蓝色虚线）值。右图：在电弱相变期间，阈值 \(\mathcal{C}^{ew}_{th}\) 对于不同形状参数 \(\alpha_{s}\) 值的相应演化，并以标准辐射主导时期 \(\mathcal{C}_{th}\) 的值进行归一化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Power-law-integrated sensitivity curves (solid lines) of LLR, eLO and eSLR Foster et al. [ 2025a ] . We also show the first 14 bins of NANOGrav 15 yrs experiment Agazie and others [ 2023a ], Afzal and others [ 2023 ] and future sensitivity (dashed lines) for planned experiments like SKA Zhao et al. [ 2013 ], Babak et al. [ 2024 ] and LISA Arun and others [ 2022 ] and AION-km Badurina and others [ 2020 ], Badurina et al. [ 2021 ], Abdalla and others [ 2025 ] . For completeness, we also show in black the SIGW spectra for two benchmark scenarios, with \(A=10^{-2}\) , \(k_{\star}=10^{9}\) Mpc -1 , \(\Delta=0.1\) (solid) and \(\Delta=1\) (dashed).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：LLR、eLO和eSLR实验的幂律积分灵敏度曲线（实线）Foster et al. [ 2025a ]。我们还展示了NANOGrav 15年实验的前14个频段Agazie and others [ 2023a ], Afzal and others [ 2023 ]，以及计划中的实验如SKA Zhao et al. [ 2013 ], Babak et al. [ 2024 ]和LISA Arun and others [ 2022 ]及AION-km Badurina and others [ 2020 ], Badurina et al. [ 2021 ], Abdalla and others [ 2025 ]的未来灵敏度（虚线）。为完整起见，我们还用黑色显示了两个基准情景的SIGW谱，参数为 \(A=10^{-2}\) , \(k_{\star}=10^{9}\) Mpc -1 , \(\Delta=0.1\) （实线）和 \(\Delta=1\) （虚线）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Prospects from LLR, eLO and eSLR experiments based on the predicted sensitivity, which provide an upper bound on the power spectrum amplitude \(A\) in case no signal is observed for different spectral shape \(\Delta\) in the case of a log-normal power spectrum.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：基于预测灵敏度的LLR、eLO和eSLR实验的前景，这些实验在未观测到信号的情况下，为对数正态功率谱的不同谱形状 \(\Delta\) 提供了功率谱振幅 \(A\) 的上限。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Left Panel : The implied upper limits on PBH abundance using the threshold statistics formalism. The orange and pink regions are respectively the 95% CL allowed region of PBH abundance, obtained by microlensing events in the OGLE+HSC Niikura and others [ 2019 ], Mroz and others [ 2017 ], Niikura et al. [ 2019 ] (orange) (see also Sugiyama et al. [ 2023 ] ) and in the HSC Sugiyama et al. [ 2026 ] (pink) data due to the potential existence of PBHs. Right Panel : As in the left panel, but with PBH abundances calculated via the peak theory formalism.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：左图：使用阈值统计形式学推导的原初黑洞丰度的隐含上限。橙色和粉色区域分别是OGLE+HSC Niikura and others [ 2019 ], Mroz and others [ 2017 ], Niikura et al. [ 2019 ]（橙色）（另见Sugiyama et al. [ 2023 ]）和HSC Sugiyama et al. [ 2026 ]（粉色）数据中由于原初黑洞可能存在而获得的95%置信水平原初黑洞丰度允许区域。右图：与左图相同，但原初黑洞丰度是通过峰值理论形式学计算的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Left panel : Evolution of the squared sound speed, \(c_{s}^{2}\) , and the equation of state parameter \(w(T)\equiv p/\rho\) during the EW phase transition as a function of the cosmological horizon mass \(M_{k}\) in units of a solar mass. Right panel : Evolution of the degrees of freedom, \(g_{*}\) , and entropy degrees of freedom, \(g_{s*}\) , as a function of \(k\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：左图：电弱相变期间，声速平方 \(c_{s}^{2}\) 和状态方程参数 \(w(T)\equiv p/\rho\) 作为宇宙学视界质量 \(M_{k}\) （以太阳质量为单位）函数的演化。右图：自由度 \(g_{*}\) 和熵自由度 \(g_{s*}\) 作为 \(k\) 函数的演化。
