artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们通过多时期测量由轴子类似粒子（ALP）与电磁场之间的耦合（$g_{aγ}$）引起的微分双折射，提出了对超轻轴子类似粒子的新约束。在跨度三个月的五个时期（间隔约20天）内，对引力透镜系统CLASS B1152+199进行了2-8 GHz范围的宽带偏振观测，并估计了透镜图像之间的微分双折射角（$Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}$）。我们还结合了一次档案观测，有效将时间跨度延长至9.5年，以探测振荡ALP场随时间在${Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}}$上留下的印记。这里我们提出了一种新技术，通过考虑ALP场的相干性来组合${Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}}$的多时期测量值，使得这些观测中的${Δ\,θ_{a,{\rm lens}}}$相互关联。相干时间尺度取决于ALP场的质量（$m_a$）。通过这些新观测，我们将$g_{aγ}$约束在$g_{aγ} \leq 9.0\times 10^{-12} \,\left( {ρ_{a,\text{em}}}/{20 \text{ GeV cm}^{-3}} \right)^{-1/2}\;\mathrm{GeV}^{-1}$到$\leq 3.5\times 10^{-8} \,\left( {ρ_{a,\text{em}}}/{20 \text{ GeV cm}^{-3}} \right)^{-1/2}\;\mathrm{GeV}^{-1}$之间，对应$m_a$范围为$1.6\times 10^{-22}\;\mathrm{eV}$到$3.8\times 10^{-18}\;\mathrm{eV}$，其中$ρ_{a,{\rm em}}$是发射处ALP场的密度。这比CERN轴子太阳望远镜在$m_a$范围$1.6\times 10^{-22}\;\mathrm{eV}$到$3\times 10^{-21}$ eV内提供的约束提高了最多一个数量级。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，多时期引力透镜偏振观测为探测超轻ALP提供了有效方法，新开发的相干性分析技术显著提高了对ALP参数的约束能力，为暗物质探测开辟了新途径。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : Epoch of observations of B1152+199 taken with the VLA used for searching for ALPs in this work. The five epochs labelled 1–5 were analysed for this work, and their combined analyses are referred to as ‘5-Epochs’. The combined analyses performed by combining ‘5-Epochs’ along with the archival data at epoch 6 is referred to as ‘6-Epochs’. For the purpose of computing time intervals, we use modified Julian date (MJD).
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于本工作中搜索ALP的VLA对B1152+199的观测时期。标记为1–5的五个时期为本工作分析所用，其组合分析称为“5时期”。将“5时期”与时期6的档案数据结合进行的组合分析称为“6时期”。为计算时间间隔，我们使用修正儒略日（MJD）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Summary of the observations taken with the VLA for the 5-Epochs listed in table 1 . The rows are listed in time-order from the start of observing session, and the bands in each row are also in time-order.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：表1所列5时期VLA观测的总结。各行按观测开始时间顺序列出，每行中的波段也按时间顺序排列。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : Hubble Space Telescope image of CLASS B1152+199 observed using the F814W filter is overlaid by the VLA total intensity radio contour at 4.5 GHz. The resolution of the radio image is 0.5 arcsec shown as the white circle, and the blue contours are at 2, 10, 18, 26 and 34 \(mJy\,beam^{-1}\) . The two lensed images A and B are observed in both radio and optical frequencies whereas the lensing galaxy is only visible in the optical observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用F814W滤镜观测的CLASS B1152+199的哈勃空间望远镜图像，叠加了4.5 GHz的VLA总强度射电等高线。射电图像分辨率为0.5角秒，以白色圆圈表示，蓝色等高线位于2、10、18、26和34 \(mJy\,beam^{-1}\)。两个透镜图像A和B在射电和光学频率下均被观测到，而透镜星系仅在光学观测中可见。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Left panel shows the Stokes \(I\) spectra averaged over 20 MHz for the lensed images A and B in B1152+199. At all the epochs, the Stokes \(I\) flux densities are within the 5% flux scale uncertainty of the VLA. Right panel shows the lens magnification factor, \(\mu=S_{A}(\nu)/S_{B}(\nu)\) , of the lensed images as a function of frequency for the five epochs. To avoid overlap, each epoch is plotted with an offset shown in the right-hand \(y\) -axis. The grey lines are the corresponding best-fit \(\mu\) , again plotted with an offset. The shaded region in both the panels covering 1–2 GHz shows significant fluctuations due to blending of image A and B and the data in that frequency range were not used in our analyses.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：左图显示B1152+199中透镜图像A和B在20 MHz上平均的斯托克斯\(I\)谱。在所有时期，斯托克斯\(I\)流量密度均在VLA的5%流量标度不确定度内。右图显示五个时期透镜图像的透镜放大因子\(\mu=S_{A}(\nu)/S_{B}(\nu)\)随频率的变化。为避免重叠，每个时期以右\(y\)轴所示的偏移量绘制。灰色线是对应的最佳拟合\(\mu\)，同样以偏移量绘制。两个面板中覆盖1–2 GHz的阴影区域显示由于图像A和B混合导致的显著波动，该频率范围内的数据未用于我们的分析。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Flux density of image A \(S_{0,A}\) [mJy] at 4.5 GHz, the spectral index \(\alpha\) and magnification ratio \(\mu\) of image A with respect to image B computed by modelling the total intensity spectrum as a power-law.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：图像A在4.5 GHz的流量密度\(S_{0,A}\) [mJy]、谱指数\(\alpha\)以及图像A相对于图像B的放大比\(\mu\)，通过将总强度谱建模为幂律计算得出。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Faraday depth spectra of the two lensed images in B1152+199 for the 5-Epochs obtained from RM synthesis. The two peaks correspond to Image A (dashed lines) and B (solid lines).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：通过RM合成获得的B1152+199中两个透镜图像在5时期的法拉第深度谱。两个峰值对应图像A（虚线）和B（实线）。

figures.caption_en: Table 4 : Stokes \(Q\) and \(U\) parameters at \(\nu_{eff}\) for Image A and B in B1152+199 obtained from the technique of RM synthesis. The uncertainties correspond to \(1\sigma\) values.
figures.caption_zh: 表4：通过RM合成技术获得的B1152+199中图像A和B在\(\nu_{eff}\)处的斯托克斯\(Q\)和\(U\)参数。不确定度对应\(1\sigma\)值。

figures.caption_en: Table 5 : Rotation measure obtained from RM synthesis for lensed images A ( \(RM_{A}\) ) and B ( \(RM_{B}\) ), and the observed polarisation angles, \(\theta_{A}\) and \(\theta_{B}\) at \(\nu_{\text{eff}}\) in B1152+199. The last column is for the differential birefringence angle ( \({\Delta\,\theta_{a,{lens}}^{(n)}}\) ) where we quote the median value obtained from the distributions in figure 4 . The uncertainties correspond to \(1\sigma\) values and to the 68% confidence interval for \({\Delta\,\theta_{a,{lens}}^{(n)}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表5：通过RM合成获得的B1152+199中透镜图像A（\(RM_{A}\)）和B（\(RM_{B}\)）的旋转测量值，以及在\(\nu_{\text{eff}}\)处观测到的偏振角\(\theta_{A}\)和\(\theta_{B}\)。最后一列为微分双折射角（\({\Delta\,\theta_{a,{lens}}^{(n)}}\)），其中我们引用从图4分布中获得的中值。不确定度对应\(1\sigma\)值，对于\({\Delta\,\theta_{a,{lens}}^{(n)}}\)对应68%置信区间。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 基于AS1063的深场高分辨率JWST图像，在仔细掩蔽伪影、星系团扩展特征以及背景星系（包括已知的透镜星系）后，我们在星系团中心区域识别了数万个未分辨的点源。利用第二个模块的数据，我们将这些点源的识别范围扩展到距星系团中心1.18 Mpc。这些源中大部分预计是在星系团深势阱中运行的球状星团，但也包括卫星星系幸存下来的致密核。我们研究了球状星团的分布，并将其与基于相同JWST数据推导的透镜模型的质量分布进行了比较。我们发现这两个分布之间存在非常紧密的相关性，但也存在一些差异，包括球状星团的分布比暗物质更集中。我们探索了利用球状星团分布作为透镜质量代理的可能性。我们发现，一个简单的平滑核可以将点源的离散分布转换为一个与透镜会聚度匹配良好的连续二维分布。这表明，在其他大质量星系团中，当引力透镜约束稀缺但球状星团更容易被探测到时（例如在低红移星系团中），球状星团可以作为暗物质分布的示踪剂。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，球状星团可作为暗物质分布的示踪剂，特别是在引力透镜约束稀缺但球状星团易于探测的低红移星系团中，为研究暗物质分布提供了新方法。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Color image of AS1063 combining 12 HST and JWST filters (range 0.4–5 micron). Three critical curves from our lens model are shown at \(z=0.73\) (cyan), \(z=1.23\) (yellow), and \(z=3\) (red). The yellow arrows mark two families of lensed galaxies at \(z\approx 1.23\) intersected by the critical curve at that redshift, while the cyan arrows mark one family of lensed images from a galaxy at \(z=0.73\) intersected by the cyan critical curve. White circles mark the position of prominent elliptical galaxies. The small panels A, B, D and E show zoomed-in regions of a filtered version of the sum of JWST’s SW filters. Yellow circles mark the position of automatically detected point sources in the filtered images. The white contours show the masked regions where no point source detection is performed except for the very central region (panel D) where identification of point sources is done visually inside the 1” radius masked region. The mask of the full region containing bright and/or extended sources as well as artifacts is shown in panel C (bottom right).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：结合12个HST和JWST滤光片（范围0.4–5微米）的AS1063彩色图像。来自我们透镜模型的三条临界曲线显示在\(z=0.73\)（青色）、\(z=1.23\)（黄色）和\(z=3\)（红色）。黄色箭头标记了在\(z\approx 1.23\)处被该红移临界曲线相交的两组透镜星系，而青色箭头标记了来自\(z=0.73\)处一个星系的一组透镜图像，被青色临界曲线相交。白色圆圈标记了显著椭圆星系的位置。小图A、B、D和E显示了JWST短波滤光片之和的滤波版本的放大区域。黄色圆圈标记了滤波图像中自动检测到的点源位置。白色轮廓线表示不进行点源检测的掩蔽区域，除了最中心区域（图D），在该区域内在1角秒半径的掩蔽区域内通过目视识别点源。包含明亮和/或延展源以及伪影的整个区域的掩模显示在图C（右下角）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Map of GC distribution obtained from the data (red points, 28026) and inpainted (black points, 3501) in the masked regions. Some artifacts (diffraction spikes) and large lensed galaxies (giant arcs) are obvious in the distribution of inpainted points. Big blue circles mark the position of prominent members (white circles in Fig. 1).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：从数据（红点，28026个）和掩蔽区域内的修补（黑点，3501个）获得的球状星团分布图。一些伪影（衍射尖峰）和大型透镜星系（巨弧）在修补点的分布中很明显。大蓝色圆圈标记了显著成员的位置（图1中的白色圆圈）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Number density of GCs vs mean convergence computed in boxes of \(3\) . The dashed line corresponds to \(y=0.4x^{0.7}\) and fits reasonably well the observed correlation.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：球状星团数密度与在\(3\) 的盒子内计算的平均会聚度的关系。虚线对应\(y=0.4x^{0.7}\)，与观测到的相关性拟合得相当好。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Map of GC density after inpainting the masked regions (gray). The green contours are for the GC density map (gray scale image) while the cyan contours are for the lens model convergence map from paper-I. The two thicker cyan contours correspond to \(\kappa=0.3\) and \(\kappa=1.8\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：修补掩蔽区域后的球状星团密度图（灰色）。绿色等值线对应球状星团密度图（灰度图像），而青色等值线对应来自论文I的透镜模型会聚度图。两条较粗的青色等值线对应\(\kappa=0.3\) 和\(\kappa=1.8\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Scatter plot of convergence vs GC density maps. The solid line is the \(x=y\) model. The GC density, \(\rho_{gc}\) has been re-scaled by the factor \(\beta\) that minimizes the variance of the difference map \(r=\kappa-\beta\times\rho_{gc}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：会聚度与球状星团密度图的散点图。实线是\(x=y\) 模型。球状星团密度\(\rho_{gc}\) 已按因子\(\beta\) 重新缩放，该因子使差异图\(r=\kappa-\beta\times\rho_{gc}\) 的方差最小化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Mask (black) and detected GC (red dots, 5327) in the second module. The cyan dots are the inpainted GCs in the masked region (804). The orientation is the same as in Fig. 1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：第二个模块中的掩模（黑色）和检测到的球状星团（红点，5327个）。青色点是掩蔽区域中修补的球状星团（804个）。方向与图1相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Profiles of AS1063 centered on the BCG. The projected mass from the lens model is plotted as dark blue (in units of \(\Sigma/\Sigma_{crit}\) ) with the two blue vertical dotted lines marking the range of distances with lensing constraints. The light profile (including the intracluster light) in the filter F444W is shown as an orange line. The map of the light is masked and only the unamasked pixels are used for the profile. The masked BCG results in a nil light profile at the very center. The number density of GCs is shown as a thick black line that is re-scaled by a factor four to match the convergence profile for easier comparison. The gap in the profile corresponds to the gap between the two modules where no GCs are detected. The GC number density profile at large radii ( \(100\) ), is computed in the second module. After subtracting the estimated level of contamination from background objects (horizontal dotted line), the resulting corrected profile is shown in black as a thin solid line.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：以最亮星系团星系为中心的AS1063的轮廓。来自透镜模型的投影质量绘制为深蓝色（单位为\(\Sigma/\Sigma_{crit}\) ），两条蓝色垂直虚线标记了具有透镜约束的距离范围。滤光片F444W中的光轮廓（包括星系团内光）显示为橙色线。光图被掩蔽，仅使用未掩蔽的像素绘制轮廓。被掩蔽的最亮星系团星系导致中心处的光轮廓为零。球状星团数密度显示为粗黑线，为便于比较，已按因子四重新缩放以匹配会聚度轮廓。轮廓中的间隙对应于两个模块之间的间隙，其中未检测到球状星团。大半径（ \(100\) ）处的球状星团数密度轮廓在第二个模块中计算。在减去估计的背景天体污染水平（水平虚线）后，得到的校正后轮廓以黑色细实线显示。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 主要目标是校准类星体的光学-红外光度关系，重点在于精确估计尘埃环和吸积盘的光度。我们分析了与宿主星系相关的污染，特别是来自极向尘埃、星际介质和恒星辐射对光学和红外波段的影响。我们使用了近400个具有光度观测和光谱红移的类星体样本，将其分为四个红移区间（0.7-2.4）。利用CIGALE代码进行了全光谱能量分布（SED）拟合，并将结果与简化的光度估计进行了比较。评估了非活动星系核成分的影响以及极向尘埃在拟合过程中的作用。我们表明，对于盘光度高于10^45 [erg/s]的源，光度估计与基于SED的值一致。虽然极向尘埃对光度的贡献很小，但其存在显著改变了SED拟合，特别是尘埃环张角和冷尘埃性质。在光学波段，恒星辐射是主要的污染源。在红外波段，盘辐射和冷尘埃起主要作用。我们提出了两个光学-红外关系的经验校准。我们得出结论，光学波段在光度高于10^45或10^46 [erg/s]（取决于红移）时由吸积盘主导，而红外光度在光度高于1.6 × 10^45或2 × 10^46 [erg/s]（取决于红移）时由尘埃环发射主导。在这个高光度区间，简化的光度方法能够可靠地估计盘和尘埃环的光度。我们提出的分析旨在测试参数空间，以构建一个行为良好的、可作为宇宙学探针的类星体非线性光学-红外光度关系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：在特定光度阈值以上（取决于红移），光学波段由吸积盘主导，红外光度由尘埃环发射主导。在高光度区域，简化的光度测量方法能够可靠估计吸积盘和尘埃环光度。该研究为建立作为宇宙学探针的类星体OPT-IR非线性光度关系奠定了基础。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Flowchart showing the data selection process as described in Sect. 2 . The \(\chi^{2}\) values were calculated for the best-fit SED in CIGALE. The L disk values are from the best-fit estimation of the SKIRTOR model, as described in Sect. 3.2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：流程图展示了第2节所述的数据选择过程。\(\chi^{2}\)值是根据CIGALE中最佳拟合SED计算得出的。L disk值来自SKIRTOR模型的最佳拟合估计，如第3.2节所述。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: CIGALE modules and input parameters used for all the fits.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：所有拟合中使用的CIGALE模块和输入参数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Comparison of luminosities estimated from 1) our photometric method (presented on X-axis) and 2) CIGALE estimates without and with contaminations for 4 redshift bins. The dashed line represents the 1:1 relation, while the solid black line corresponds to the best fitted OLS regression. In the fourth row, outliers were identified as objects lying below the \(1\sigma\) threshold (indicated by green lines) and are marked with star symbols. These outliers were excluded, and a second OLS regression was fitted to the remaining data points (gray dash-dot line). Additionally, in the fourth row, the red dashed line indicates the luminosity cut described in Section 4.2 . The \(\sigma\) is the spread of the relation.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：光度比较：1）我们的光度方法（X轴所示）与2）CIGALE在4个红移区间内无污染和有污染情况下的估计值。虚线表示1:1关系，实黑线对应最佳拟合的OLS回归。在第四行中，异常值被识别为低于\(1\sigma\)阈值（由绿线指示）的物体，并用星号标记。这些异常值被排除，并对剩余数据点进行了第二次OLS回归（灰色点划线）。此外，在第四行中，红色虚线表示第4.2节所述的光度截断。\(\sigma\)是关系的离散度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The OPT-IR relation for all redshift bins through different estimates of luminosities. The black solid lines are the OLS regressions. In the first row the \(L_{IR}\) and \(L_{OPT}\) are estimated with the photometric method. The legend is explained under previous plot.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：所有红移区间内通过不同光度估计得到的光学-红外关系。黑色实线是OLS回归线。在第一行中，\(L_{IR}\)和\(L_{OPT}\)是通过光度方法估计的。图例在前一张图中解释。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Comparison of SKIRTOR model parameters derived from two independent SED fitting runs: 1) With polar dust, and 2) without polar dust ( \(E(B-V)_{PD}=0\) ). The X-axis shows values from the fit including polar dust, while the Y-axis corresponds to the fit without polar dust. The plotted parameter is indicated in the panel title. The black dash-dotted line represents the 1:1 relation.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自两次独立SED拟合运行的SKIRTOR模型参数比较：1）包含极向尘埃，2）不包含极向尘埃（\(E(B-V)_{PD}=0\)）。X轴显示包含极向尘埃的拟合值，Y轴对应不包含极向尘埃的拟合值。绘制的参数在面板标题中指示。黑色点划线代表1:1关系。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Relation between OA on X axis and inclination on Y axis for fit with polar dust (diamonds) and without (circles). With grey arrows the shift for each object for both fits is marked.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：X轴上的OA与Y轴上的倾角之间的关系，分别针对包含极向尘埃（菱形）和不包含极向尘埃（圆形）的拟合。灰色箭头标记了每个对象在两次拟合之间的偏移。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Median values of ratios of different estimations of luminosities for objects with L \({}_{disk}^{OPT}>10^{45}\) [erg/s]. The errors are the MAD errors. The particular luminosities estimates are described in section 4.3 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：对于L \({}_{disk}^{OPT}>10^{45}\) [erg/s]的物体，不同光度估计值之比的中位数。误差为MAD误差。具体的光度估计在第4.3节中描述。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Median values of ratios of different estimations of luminosities for objects with L \({}_{disk}^{OPT} 4.3
figures.caption_zh: 表3：对于L \({}_{disk}^{OPT} 4.3节中描述。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 结合深度哈勃空间望远镜（HST）图像和多单元光谱探测器的广泛数据，我们提出了星系团MACS J1149.5+2223的新质量模型，该星系团对超新星（SN）Refsdal产生强引力透镜效应，首次充分利用了SN宿主星系的面亮度分布。具体而言，我们在建模中纳入了77,000个HST像素以及已知的106个点状多重像。我们考虑了四种不同模型，以探究点状多重像位置的相对权重和SN宿主星系通量分布对模型优化的影响。当包含SN宿主星系的延展像时，我们发现所有34个自由模型参数的统计不确定性相比仅基于点状像的模型降低了1到2个数量级，且与所采用的不同图像权重无关。我们量化了星系团总质量和SN Refsdal多重像位置预测时间延迟重建精度显著提升的程度。我们还展示了SN宿主星系（一个红移zSN = 1.49的旋涡星系）在多个HST波段中的去透镜像。在所有应用中，我们均获得了统计不确定性的显著降低，现已低于甚至可通过不同方法评估的质量模型微小系统不确定性。这些结果表明，利用透镜星系团的延展像模型，能够以前所未有的精度测量星系团的总质量分布、宇宙学参数值以及高红移源的物理性质，使得通常未被量化的系统不确定性现在变得至关重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，扩展图像模型能够以前所未有的精度测量星系团总质量分布、宇宙学参数值和高红移源物理性质，使得通常未被量化的系统不确定性现在变得至关重要。这种方法为引力透镜研究开辟了新的精度时代。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Color-composite image (F435W for blue, F606W + F814W for green, and F105W + F125W + F140W + F160W for red) of the cluster core with the SN Refsdal and its host. Shown are the cluster members (red triangles for photometrically selected members and red circles for spectroscopically confirmed members) and the multiple image systems (blue squares for SN Refsdal and the host and blue pentagons otherwise). We indicate the regions (in orange) used for the SN host reconstruction and extended image model.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：星系团核心的彩色合成图像（蓝色为F435W，绿色为F606W + F814W，红色为F105W + F125W + F140W + F160W），显示了SN Refsdal及其宿主星系。图中标出了星系团成员（红色三角形为测光选成员，红色圆圈为光谱确认成员）和多重像系统（蓝色方块为SN Refsdal及其宿主，其他为蓝色五边形）。我们标出了用于SN宿主星系重建和延展像模型的区域（橙色）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Overview of the considered mass models and their chi-square values for the corresponding best-fit models. We note that only \(\chi^{2}_{\text{img,S24,w}}\) , \(\chi^{2}_{\text{ext,orig}}\) , and RMS (w) can be fairly compared across different models, as they are computed assuming the same observational uncertainties.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：所考虑的质量模型及其对应最佳拟合模型的卡方值概述。我们注意到，只有\(\chi^{2}_{\text{img,S24,w}}\)、\(\chi^{2}_{\text{ext,orig}}\)和RMS (w)可以在不同模型间公平比较，因为它们是在假设相同观测不确定性的情况下计算的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Surface-brightness reconstruction from model Ew (top row), showing the best reconstruction, and from the point-like model S24 (bottom row), which was not optimized on the extended image. We show, from left to right, the observed image, the model-predicted image, the normalized residuals, and the reconstructed source (the SN host galaxy). We illustrate the sizes of the images and of the reconstructed sources with green bars of 5″and 1″, respectively. We again note that the Ew model is optimized with an approximate point spread function (see Sect. 2.3 for details), which slightly affects the final appearances of the reconstructed image and source.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：模型Ew（上行，显示最佳重建）和点状模型S24（下行，未针对延展像优化）的面亮度重建。从左到右依次显示观测图像、模型预测图像、归一化残差和重建源（SN宿主星系）。我们用绿色条标出图像和重建源的大小，分别为5″和1″。我们再次指出，Ew模型使用近似点扩散函数进行优化（详见第2.3节），这略微影响了重建图像和源的最终外观。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Comparison of normalized residuals (NRes) of the model Ew and the point-like model by S24 , as an absolute ratio (left) and absolute difference (right). The bottom panels show the 1D histograms, and the top panels show the corresponding 2D image color-coded in the same way as the histograms.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：模型Ew与点状模型S24的归一化残差（NRes）比较，以绝对比率（左）和绝对差值（右）显示。底部面板显示一维直方图，顶部面板显示相应的二维图像，颜色编码与直方图相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Relative errors of the 34 free parameters (left) and of the magnification factors at the model-predicted positions of the point-like multiple images (right) from the five different models (indicated by different colors and symbols). For the definition of the individual model parameters, see Sects. 2.1 and S24 . While the 106 multiple images are, for simplicity, not labeled, we highlight those belonging to the SN and its host (and thus excluded in models Ewo and Swo ; white background), those with variable redshift (since no spectroscopic redshift is known; light gray), those belonging to the northern galaxy group (see Fig. 2 of S24 ; medium gray), and those from additional sources in the cluster core (dark gray). We observe a significant reduction in the statistical uncertainties of the model parameters (left) and magnifications (right) when we include the 77,000 HST pixels as direct constraints in the strong lensing model.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：来自五个不同模型（以不同颜色和符号表示）的34个自由参数（左）和点状多重像模型预测位置处的放大因子（右）的相对误差。关于各个模型参数的定义，见第2.1节和S24。虽然为简洁起见未标注106个多重像，但我们突出显示了属于SN及其宿主（因此在模型Ewo和Swo中被排除；白色背景）、具有可变红移（因无光谱红移已知；浅灰色）、属于北部星系群（见S24图2；中灰色）以及来自星系团核心其他源（深灰色）的多重像。我们观察到，当将77,000个HST像素作为直接约束纳入强透镜模型时，模型参数（左）和放大率（右）的统计不确定性显著降低。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Cumulative projected total mass profile \(M( (see G16 , ) . The plotted bands correspond to the \(1\sigma\) intervals obtained from 100 random iterations of the final sampling chains. We compared our four new extended image models with the point-like model from S24 and found significantly smaller statistical uncertainties for the extended image models. The positions of the multiple images are marked with small dashes on the lower \(x\) -axis and color-coded according to their redshifts. The bar lengths reflect the positional uncertainties (a small dash corresponds to an HST identification, while a long dash corresponds to a MUSE-only identification; see S24 for details). We further show the positions of the 77,000 HST image pixels used in the extended image models with a gray histogram, where the height (in log-scale) corresponds to the number of pixels per radial bin.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：累积投影总质量轮廓\(M( (见G16 ) 。绘制的带对应于从最终采样链的100次随机迭代获得的\(1\sigma\)区间。我们将四个新的延展像模型与S24的点状模型进行比较，发现延展像模型的统计不确定性显著更小。多重像的位置在下\(x\)轴上用小短划线标记，并根据其红移进行颜色编码。条的长度反映了位置不确定性（短划线对应HST识别，长划线对应仅MUSE识别；详见S24）。我们进一步用灰色直方图显示延展像模型中使用的77,000个HST图像像素的位置，其中高度（对数尺度）对应于每个径向区间内的像素数量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Median values and \(1\sigma\) uncertainties of time delays obtained at the model-predicted positions of the multiple images of the SN with fixed (flat \(\Lambda\) CDM) cosmology. The four new extended image models and the two previous point-like models by S24 and G16 are shown with different colors. We notice the significantly lower statistical uncertainties for the extended image models compared to the point-like models. We note again that the extended image models are constructed with an approximate point spread function (see Sect. 2.3 for details), which slightly affects the exact values of the predicted time delays.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：在固定（平坦\(\Lambda\) CDM）宇宙学下，在SN多重像模型预测位置处获得的时间延迟中值和\(1\sigma\)不确定性。四个新的延展像模型和S24及G16的两个先前点状模型以不同颜色显示。我们注意到，与点状模型相比，延展像模型的统计不确定性显著更低。我们再次指出，延展像模型是使用近似点扩散函数构建的（详见第2.3节），这略微影响了预测时间延迟的精确值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Color composite image of the SN host reconstruction from the Hubble Frontier Field HST bands F814W (red), F606W (green), and F435W (blue), using the Ew model. The mapped region was slightly modified compared to that used in the model optimization (shown in Fig. 2 ) to minimize light contamination from some cluster members and the SN images. This figure underscores our ability to directly model the SN host in multiple bands. The image has an extension of 2 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 05 and 2 \(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\) 27 along the \(x\) and \(y\) axes, which correspond to 17.84 kpc and 19.75 kpc, respectively, at a redshift of \(z_{\text{SN}}=1.49\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图7：使用Ew模型，从哈勃前沿场HST波段F814W（红色）、F606W（绿色）和F435W（蓝色）重建的SN宿主星系彩色合成图像。映射区域与模型优化中使用的区域（图2所示）相比略有修改，以最小化来自某些星系团成员和SN图像的光污染。该图强调了我们在多个波段直接建模SN宿主星系的能力。图像沿\(x\)和\(y\)轴的延伸分别为2\(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\)05和2\(\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}\)27，在红移\(z_{\text{SN}}=1.49\)处分别对应17.84 kpc和19.75 kpc。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 后星暴星系（PSB）最近经历了星暴并随后快速淬灭，是研究驱动星暴和停止恒星形成的物理机制的理想实验室。积分场光谱揭示了星系的空间分辨特性，其中观测到的方向性模式可与星系的过去演化相联系。我们利用分层贝叶斯模型，在$0.5$角秒分辨率（$\sim0.3\,$kpc）下，测量了MaNGA巡天中三个本地PSB星系的空间分辨恒星形成历史（SFH）、恒星金属丰度演化和尘埃特性。局部参数与描述空间趋势的参数同时被约束。我们发现，所有三个星系首先经历了一次外部较弱、较慢的淬灭星暴，随后是一次中心较强、较快的淬灭星暴，后者在第一次星暴后约$\sim 1\,$Gyr达到峰值。中心星暴引起的恒星金属丰度上升显著强于外部星暴。这些结果与近期富气（湿）并合的影响一致：第一次近心点通过触发了外部区域的星暴，而随后的并合则触发了更强的中心星暴。我们在所有星系的星暴质量分数和尘埃消光图中发现了非轴对称特征，这可能是近期并合过程中潮汐效应造成的。与文献中的双星并合模拟比较表明，星系的快速淬灭是由气体消耗和增长中的球状体对气体引力坍缩的稳定化作用驱动的，而活动星系核反馈不一定是主要原因。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，观测结果与近期富气（湿）并合的效应一致：第一次近心点通过触发外部星暴，而随后的并合触发更强的中心星暴。快速淬灭主要由气体消耗和增长球状体对气体引力塌缩的稳定化驱动，而不一定需要活动星系核反馈作为主要原因。

figures.caption_en: Table 1 : The basic properties and binning configurations of the three post-starburst galaxies in this study: (1) MaNGA Plate-IFU identifier; (2) MaNGA identifier; (3) R.A. (J2000); (4) Declination (J2000); (5) Redshift; (6) \(\log_{10}\) total stellar mass fitted from elliptical Petrosian photometric fluxes in GALEX/SDSS FNugriz bands from the NSA catalogue, adjusted for \(h=0.7\) ; (7) Half light radius (along major axis) from 2D Sersic \(r\) -band fits from the NSA catalogue, adjusted for \(h=0.7\) ; (8) Threshold on \({SNR}_{g}\) during Voronoi binning; (9) Number of Voronoi bins.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本研究中三个后星暴星系的基本性质和分箱配置：(1) MaNGA Plate-IFU标识符；(2) MaNGA标识符；(3) 赤经（J2000）；(4) 赤纬（J2000）；(5) 红移；(6) 从NSA星表中GALEX/SDSS FNugriz波段的椭圆Petrosian测光流量拟合的\(\log_{10}\)总恒星质量，已针对\(h=0.7\)进行调整；(7) 来自NSA星表二维Sersic \(r\)波段拟合的半光半径（沿主轴），已针对\(h=0.7\)进行调整；(8) Voronoi分箱期间\({SNR}_{g}\)的阈值；(9) Voronoi箱的数量。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : The morphological properties of the three post-starburst galaxies in this study measured by vazquez-mata2025 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：由vazquez-mata2025测量的本研究中三个后星暴星系的形态性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : SDSS 3-colour images ( left ), the PSB spaxel selection ( middle ) and the Voronoi bin distribution ( right ) of our sample of three PSBs. Each galaxy’s Plate-IFU is marked on the top right corner of the SDSS images. The MaNGA field of view is marked as the pink hexagon. In the middle column, we divide the spaxels into regions with no/faulty observations (not coloured), median spectral \({SNR} 3 \({SNR}_{g}=10\) and accounting for spatial covariance. The colours in the right column are used to differentiate between spaxels in a given Voronoi bin. The magenta crosses in the top panels mark the location of the spaxel discussed in detail in Fig. 9 and Section 6.1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们三个PSB样本的SDSS三色图像（左）、PSB空间像素选择（中）和Voronoi箱分布（右）。每个星系的Plate-IFU标记在SDSS图像的右上角。MaNGA视场标记为粉色六边形。在中列中，我们将空间像素分为无/错误观测区域（未着色）、中位光谱\({SNR} < 3\)的区域（灰色）和\({SNR}_{g}=10\)并考虑空间协方差的Voronoi箱（彩色）。右列中的颜色用于区分给定Voronoi箱中的空间像素。顶部面板中的洋红色十字标记了图9和第6.1节中详细讨论的空间像素的位置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : The probabilistic graphical model of the full hierarchical model. Open, shaded and closed nodes correspond to unknown (free), observed and fixed parameters, respectively. Nodes inside the rectangle are parameters unique to each individual Voronoi bins (Section 4.2 ). Nodes outside the rectangle are hyper-parameters of the population model (Section 4.3 ). The stellar portion of the model is marked with green rims, where the population model describes radial dependencies for the local stellar mass ( \(M_{*}\) ), burst age ( \(t_{{burst}}\) ), and the pre-burst metallicity ( \(Z_{{old}}\) ). Parameters related to dust attenuation, velocity dispersion and redshift are marked with orange rims, where the population model describes radial dependencies for the \(V\) -band dust attenuation strength ( \(A_{V}\) ) and velocity dispersion ( \(\sigma_{{disp}}\) ). The additive Gaussian Process (GP) noise component is marked with magenta rims. Each Voronoi bin’s \(M_{*}\) , \(t_{{burst}}\) , \(Z_{{old}}\) , \(A_{V}\) and \(\sigma_{{disp}}\) have dependence on the bin’s radial distance from the galaxy centre ( \(R\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：完整分层模型的概率图模型。开放、阴影和封闭节点分别对应未知（自由）、观测和固定参数。矩形内的节点是每个单独Voronoi箱特有的参数（第4.2节）。矩形外的节点是总体模型的超参数（第4.3节）。模型的恒星部分用绿色边框标记，其中总体模型描述了局部恒星质量（\(M_{*}\)）、星暴年龄（\(t_{{burst}}\)）和星暴前金属丰度（\(Z_{{old}}\)）的径向依赖性。与尘埃消光、速度弥散和红移相关的参数用橙色边框标记，其中总体模型描述了\(V\)波段尘埃消光强度（\(A_{V}\)）和速度弥散（\(\sigma_{{disp}}\)）的径向依赖性。加性高斯过程（GP）噪声分量用洋红色边框标记。每个Voronoi箱的\(M_{*}\)、\(t_{{burst}}\)、\(Z_{{old}}\)、\(A_{V}\)和\(\sigma_{{disp}}\)都依赖于该箱到星系中心的径向距离（\(R\)）。

figures.caption_en: Table 3 : Model priors used in stage 0 and stage 1 fitting globally stacked spectra and Voronoi bins individually. The parameter symbols are described in Section 4.1 , or otherwise have their usual meanings. Global priors : Prior shape \(\log_{10}\) uniform indicates a flat prior in uniform space \(\log(X)\sim U(\log(min),\log(max))\) . The redshift prior is uniform ranging from 80 per cent to 120 per cent of the target’s MaNGA redshift ( \(z\) ). Individual priors : Prior shape triple Gaussian is an approximation of the parameter’s posterior distribution from the galaxy’s global fit. \(t_{{burst,84}}\) is the 84-th percentile value of the global fit’s \(t_{{burst}}\) posterior distribution. The upper limit of \(t_{{burst}}\) is 2 Gyr or \(t_{{burst,84}}+1.5\;\) Gyr, whichever one is higher, with an upper prior limit of 4 Gyr. The dust birthcloud factor ( \(\eta\) ) is fixed at the maximum a posteriori (MAP) value of the global fit. Redshift is given a uniform prior centred at the MAP value of the global fit, with a range equivalent to \(1000\;{km/s}\) difference in line of sight velocity on both sides of the MAP value. Note that \(\sigma_{disp}\) is not the intrinsic velocity dispersion, as it does not account for the finite resolution of the spectral templates or instrument.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：在第0阶段和第1阶段全局堆叠光谱和单独Voronoi箱拟合中使用的模型先验。参数符号在第4.1节中描述，或具有其通常含义。全局先验：先验形状\(\log_{10}\)均匀表示在均匀空间\(\log(X)\sim U(\log(min),\log(max))\)中的平坦先验。红移先验均匀分布在目标MaNGA红移（\(z\)）的80%到120%范围内。单独先验：先验形状三重高斯是来自星系全局拟合的参数后验分布的近似。\(t_{{burst,84}}\)是全局拟合\(t_{{burst}}\)后验分布的第84百分位值。\(t_{{burst}}\)的上限为2 Gyr或\(t_{{burst,84}}+1.5\;\) Gyr，取较高者，先验上限为4 Gyr。尘埃诞生云因子（\(\eta\)）固定为全局拟合的最大后验（MAP）值。红移以全局拟合的MAP值为中心给出均匀先验，范围相当于MAP值两侧视线速度差\(1000\;{km/s}\)。注意\(\sigma_{disp}\)不是本征速度弥散，因为它未考虑光谱模板或仪器的有限分辨率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Fitting results of 7965-1902 from the non-hierarchical stage 0 and stage 1 models. The left panels plot the posterior burst age (top left) and burst mass fraction (bottom left) against radial distance from the galaxy centre for individual Voronoi bins in blue and the global fit as a gray horizontal line and shaded band. The right panel compares the SFH obtained from stacking the fitted SFH of all Voronoi bins (blue) to the fitted SFH from the global fit (black). The shaded regions denote 1 and \(2\sigma\) uncertainty regions. The SFHs of 10 randomly drawn posterior samples are also shown as dashed curves. We observed the galaxy underwent two distinct starbursts, with the earlier one occurred predominantly in the outer regions, while the later, stronger one occurred predominantly in the centre. This is not captured by the global fit.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：来自非分层第0阶段和第1阶段模型的7965-1902的拟合结果。左图绘制了单个Voronoi箱的后验星暴年龄（左上）和星暴质量分数（左下）相对于星系中心径向距离的关系，蓝色点表示，全局拟合结果以灰色水平线和阴影带表示。右图比较了堆叠所有Voronoi箱拟合SFH得到的SFH（蓝色）与全局拟合得到的SFH（黑色）。阴影区域表示1和\(2\sigma\)不确定区域。还显示了10个随机抽取的后验样本的SFH（虚线曲线）。我们观察到该星系经历了两次不同的星暴，较早的一次主要发生在外部区域，而较晚、较强的一次主要发生在中心。全局拟合未捕捉到这一点。

figures.caption_en: Table 4 : Model hyper-priors of the population model used in stage 2 described in Section 4.3 .
figures.caption_zh: 表4：第4.3节描述的第2阶段中使用的总体模型的模型超先验。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : A visualization of the logistic function used to model the radial dependence of the galaxies’ burst age in our population model. The right hand side y-axis shows a normalized view of the logistic function, which better determines the scale width \(R_{w}\) . For this example, the burst age at the centre is \(t_{0}=0.5\;\) Gyr, the burst age at the outer edge is \(t_{\infty}=1.2\;\) Gyr, the radial distance of the curve’s inflection point is \(R_{c}=2.5\;\) kpc, and the scale width of the transition region is \(R_{w}=0.8\;\) kpc.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：用于模拟星系星暴年龄径向依赖性的逻辑函数可视化。右侧y轴显示逻辑函数的归一化视图，能更好地确定尺度宽度\(R_{w}\)。在此示例中，中心的星暴年龄为\(t_{0}=0.5\;\) Gyr，外边缘的星暴年龄为\(t_{\infty}=1.2\;\) Gyr，曲线拐点的径向距离为\(R_{c}=2.5\;\) kpc，过渡区域的尺度宽度为\(R_{w}=0.8\;\) kpc。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 沃尔夫-拉叶星最近作为早期化学增丰的可能驱动因素引起了关注，包括氟的产生，其核合成起源仍存在争议。为了检验大质量恒星在早期宇宙中对氟产生的贡献，我们利用阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列第5波段对一颗红移为$z=6.024$的尘埃星暴星系进行了HF(1-0)吸收线的光谱观测。该星系的已知气相金属丰度较低，且其年龄过小，低质量AGB星尚未有显著贡献，这为分离大质量恒星产额提供了干净的环境。我们未探测到显著的HF吸收（$\sim2σ$），并推导出一个保守的5$σ$上限：$N_\mathrm{HF}/N_\mathrm{H_2} < 2.2\times10^{-9}$。该上限比典型的本地测量值低约一个数量级，表明在大爆炸后约0.9 Gyr时氟增丰效率较低。与化学演化模型的比较显示，我们的约束与该时期没有沃尔夫-拉叶星产额的场景一致。扩展具有良好表征金属丰度的高红移星系HF吸收测量样本，对于追踪宇宙时间尺度上沃尔夫-拉叶星增丰和氟产生的起始至关重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，早期宇宙中氟的富集效率较低，不支持沃尔夫-拉叶星在该时期对氟产生有显著贡献。未来需要扩展具有良好表征金属丰度的高红移星系HF吸收测量样本，以追踪沃尔夫-拉叶星富集和氟元素产生在宇宙时间尺度上的起始。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: ALMA continuum and velocity-integrated (moment-0) maps of G09.83808. From left to right: dust continuum at \(\sim 170\) GHz, HF(1–0) absorption, CO(10–9), and H 2 O( \(2_{20}\) – \(2_{11}\) ) lines. White contours indicate the clean mask. Red crosses mark the two continuum peaks used for line spectrum extraction and photometry. The synthesized beam is shown as a white ellipse in the lower left of each panel. White scale bars indicate 1″, which corresponds to 5.7 kpc. The colorbar units are mJy beam -1 for the continuum and mJy beam -1 km s -1 for the lines.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：G09.83808的ALMA连续谱和速度积分（零阶矩）图。从左到右：在\(\sim 170\) GHz处的尘埃连续谱、HF(1–0)吸收线、CO(10–9)线和H 2 O( \(2_{20}\) – \(2_{11}\) )线。白色等高线表示清洁掩模。红色十字标记用于线谱提取和测光的两个连续谱峰值。综合波束在每个面板左下角以白色椭圆显示。白色比例尺表示1″，对应5.7 kpc。色标单位：连续谱为mJy beam -1 ，线为mJy beam -1 km s -1 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Continuum-subtracted spectra centered on the systemic velocity. The HF(1–0) absorption line (red) is shown with \(1\sigma\) error bars and binned to 50 km s -1 . For comparison, the CO(10–9) (blue) and H 2 O( \(2_{20}\) – \(2_{11}\) ) (orange) lines from the same dataset are overlaid. We note that the positive feature near \(+800\) km s -1 in the HF spectrum is the adjacent H 2 O( \(2_{20}\) – \(2_{11}\) ) line.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：以系统速度为中心的连续谱减除后的光谱。HF(1–0)吸收线（红色）以\(1\sigma\)误差棒显示，并合并为50 km s -1 的宽度。作为对比，来自同一数据集的CO(10–9)（蓝色）和H 2 O( \(2_{20}\) – \(2_{11}\) )（橙色）线叠加显示。我们注意到HF光谱中靠近\(+800\) km s -1 的正向特征是相邻的H 2 O( \(2_{20}\) – \(2_{11}\) )线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: HF column density versus H 2 column density. Literature measurements of HF in absorption and emission (circles; Neufeld et al. 2010 ; Phillips et al. 2010 ; Sonnentrucker et al. 2010 ; Monje et al. 2011a ; Emprechtinger et al. 2012 ; Kamenetzky et al. 2012 ; Indriolo et al. 2013 ; Pereira-Santaella et al. 2013 ; Kawaguchi et al. 2016 ; Lu et al. 2017 ; Kavak et al. 2019 ) are color-coded by redshift, and the new measurement from this work is shown as a star. Arrows indicate upper and lower limits. The red dashed line denotes the fluorine abundance in the solar neighborhood ( \({F/H}=2.5\times 10^{-8}\) ; Maiorca et al. 2014 ), and the black dotted line shows the typical \(N_{HF}/N_{H_{2}}\) value found in Galactic diffuse molecular clouds ( \((1-2)\times 10^{-8}\) ; e.g., Sonnentrucker et al. 2010 ). Three high-redshift sources are highlighted for comparison: the DSFG NGP-190387 at \(z=4.4\) (Franco et al. , 2021 ) , the QSO BR1202 \(-\) 0725 at \(z=4.7\) where HF is detected in emission (Lehnert et al. , 2020 ) , and the QSO Cloverleaf at \(z=2.56\) (Monje et al. , 2011b ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：HF柱密度与H 2 柱密度的关系。文献中HF吸收和发射的测量值（圆圈；Neufeld et al. 2010；Phillips et al. 2010；Sonnentrucker et al. 2010；Monje et al. 2011a；Emprechtinger et al. 2012；Kamenetzky et al. 2012；Indriolo et al. 2013；Pereira-Santaella et al. 2013；Kawaguchi et al. 2016；Lu et al. 2017；Kavak et al. 2019）按红移着色，本工作的新测量值以星形显示。箭头表示上限和下限。红色虚线表示太阳邻域的氟丰度（ \({F/H}=2.5\times 10^{-8}\) ；Maiorca et al. 2014），黑色点线表示银河系弥散分子云中典型的 \(N_{HF}/N_{H_{2}}\) 值（ \((1-2)\times 10^{-8}\) ；例如，Sonnentrucker et al. 2010）。突出显示了三个高红移源以作对比：红移\(z=4.4\)的DSFG NGP-190387（Franco et al. , 2021）、红移\(z=4.7\)的QSO BR1202 \(-\) 0725（其中HF在发射中被探测到；Lehnert et al. , 2020），以及红移\(z=2.56\)的QSO Cloverleaf（Monje et al. , 2011b）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Predicted evolution of the oxygen abundance A(O) (left) and fluorine abundance A(F) (right) for chemical–evolution models constrained to reproduce the observed metallicity of G09.83808 ( \(Z\approx 0.5\) – \(0.7\,Z_{\odot}\) ; Tadaki et al. 2022 ), shown as the gray band in the A(O) panel and its gas fraction ( \(f_{gas}=0.2\) ; Zavala et al. 2022 ). (Top) Fiducial models, all of which assume a Kroupa IMF with slope \(x=1.3\) . WR–included cases adopt a stellar rotation velocity of \(v_{rot}=300~{km\,s^{-1}}\) except for the thin line. Blue and orange curves denote models with and without WR yields, respectively. The solid curves show the model with \(\tau_{SF}=0.37\) Gyr and \(\tau_{in}=1\) Gyr, while the dashed curves adopt \(\tau_{SF}=0.3\) Gyr. A slower–rotation WR model ( \(v_{rot}=150~{km\,s^{-1}}\) , blue thin curve) is shown for comparison and differs only slightly from the \(300~{km\,s^{-1}}\) WR model. The vertical dotted line marks \(z=6.024\) . In the A(F) panel, the gray horizontal line shows the solar abundance (Maiorca et al. , 2014 ) , and the red star marks our \(5\sigma\) upper limit. This limit is consistent with models without WR enrichment and with longer star-formation timescales. (Middle) Models with different star-formation and infall timescales. The bold curves show an alternative SFH ( \(\tau_{SF}=0.18\) Gyr, \(\tau_{in}=0.5\) Gyr) that also satisfies the observed metallicity and gas–fraction constraints, while the faint curves are the fiducial models. To satisfy the constraints, the models yield nearly identical A(F) regardless of the adopted timescales. (Bottom) Models exploring variations in the IMF slope. The dotted lines adopt IMF slopes of \(x=1.1\) (red) and \(x=1.7\) (blue) while keeping all other parameters at the fiducial values; these models fail to reproduce the observed metallicity. The solid red and blue curves retune the star–formation timescale to \(\tau_{SF}=0.45\) and \(0.32\) Gyr, respectively, so that the model
figures.caption_zh: 图4：为再现G09.83808观测到的金属丰度（ \(Z\approx 0.5\) – \(0.7\,Z_{\odot}\) ；Tadaki et al. 2022）及其气体分数（ \(f_{gas}=0.2\) ；Zavala et al. 2022）而约束的化学演化模型预测的氧丰度A(O)（左）和氟丰度A(F)（右）的演化，A(O)面板中的灰色带表示该金属丰度范围。（上）基准模型，均假设Kroupa IMF，斜率\(x=1.3\)。包含WR产额的模型采用恒星自转速度\(v_{rot}=300~{km\,s^{-1}}\)，细线除外。蓝色和橙色曲线分别表示包含和不包含WR产额的模型。实线曲线表示\(\tau_{SF}=0.37\) Gyr和\(\tau_{in}=1\) Gyr的模型，虚线曲线采用\(\tau_{SF}=0.3\) Gyr。作为对比，还显示了一个慢自转WR模型（ \(v_{rot}=150~{km\,s^{-1}}\) ，蓝色细曲线），它与\(300~{km\,s^{-1}}\) WR模型仅有微小差异。垂直虚线标记\(z=6.024\)。在A(F)面板中，灰色水平线表示太阳丰度（Maiorca et al. , 2014），红色星形标记我们的5\(\sigma\)上限。该上限与没有WR增丰且恒星形成时标较长的模型一致。（中）不同恒星形成和下落时标的模型。粗曲线表示另一种SFH（ \(\tau_{SF}=0.18\) Gyr，\(\tau_{in}=0.5\) Gyr），它也满足观测到的金属丰度和气体分数约束，而细曲线是基准模型。为满足约束，无论采用何种时标，模型产生的A(F)几乎相同。（下）探索IMF斜率变化的模型。点线采用IMF斜率\(x=1.1\)（红色）和\(x=1.7\)（蓝色），同时保持所有其他参数为基准值；这些模型未能再现观测到的金属丰度。红色和蓝色实线曲线分别将恒星形成时标调整为\(\tau_{SF}=0.45\)和\(0.32\) Gyr，以使模型

artifacts.abstract_zh: 下落和外流与磁场耦合，迅速塑造新生原恒星周围的气体结构。来自相互作用成分的激波编码了温度和密度分布，为最早的演化历史提供了直接探针。然而，利用高激发谱线表征温暖包层的高分辨率干涉观测仍然稀少。我们展示了针对金牛座致密核MC 27/L1521F（其中包含一颗Class 0原恒星）的ALMA Band 9观测，以角分辨率约2角秒（约300 au）探测CO(J=6-5)谱线。我们检测到一个直径约1000 au的偏心环状结构，这在之前的低J CO数据中无法识别，因为接近系统速度的发射受到光学深度的强烈影响。该环在我们的分辨率下显示出典型的峰值亮温度约3 K。激发条件表明，探测到的CO(J=6-5)发射很可能来自嵌入在周围冷致密核内的相对温暖（T ≳ 20 K）和稠密（n(H₂) ≳ 10⁵ cm⁻³）气体。形态学和运动学表明存在一个高能且局域的激波加热事件，可能与最早原恒星阶段的气体-磁场动力学相互作用有关。我们的结果证明，高J CO观测为温暖和稠密气体成分提供了强大的新窗口，能够更直接地观察恒星形成起始阶段运行的物理过程。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，高J CO观测为温暖和稠密气体成分提供了强大的新窗口，能够更直接地观察恒星形成起始阶段运行的物理过程，特别是与气体-磁场相互作用的动态过程相关的激波加热事件。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top: Mean CO( \(J\) =6–5) spectra extracted from a circular aperture of radius \(5\arcsec\) centered at (ICRS) \(\alpha=04^{h}28^{m}39\fs 97\) , \(\delta=+26^{\circ}51^{\prime}21\farcs 5\) . The systemic velocity of the core, \(V_{sys}=6.5\) km s -1 , is indicated by the vertical dotted line. Bottom: Mean CO( \(J\) =3–2) spectrum obtained with the previous study K. Tokuda et al. ( 2018 ) , averaged within a circular aperture of radius \(10\arcsec\) centered at the same position. The black histogram shows the Total Power (TP) spectrum, while the blue histogram shows the ALMA 12 m array spectrum. Both spectra are displayed at a velocity resolution of 0.85 km s -1 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部：从以(ICRS) α=04^{h}28^{m}39\fs 97, δ=+26^{\circ}51^{\prime}21\farcs 5为中心的半径5角秒的圆形孔径中提取的平均CO(J=6–5)光谱。核的系统速度V_{sys}=6.5 km s⁻¹由垂直虚线标出。底部：先前研究K. Tokuda等人(2018)获得的平均CO(J=3–2)光谱，在相同位置为中心的半径10角秒的圆形孔径内平均。黑色直方图显示总功率(TP)光谱，蓝色直方图显示ALMA 12米阵列光谱。两个光谱均以0.85 km s⁻¹的速度分辨率显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Velocity-binned intensity maps comparing the previously obtained CO( \(J\) =3–2) and HCO + ( \(J\) =3–2) emission with new ALMA Band 9 CO( \(J\) =6–5) and continuum data. (a–c) CO( \(J\) =3–2) intensity maps (K. Tokuda et al., 2018 ) shown in color, with white contours showing the CO( \(J\) =6–5) averaged over the same velocity intervals. The velocity ranges are indicated at the top of each panel. The middle-velocity panel (b) corresponds to the range where the CO( \(J\) =3–2) emission is strongly suppressed by self-absorption; the blueshifted and redshifted components relative to this interval are shown in panels (a) and (c), respectively. The CO( \(J\) =6–5) contour levels are [0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0] K. (d–f) CO( \(J\) =6–5) intensity maps are shown in color. White contours show the HCO + ( \(J\) =3–2) emission (K. Tokuda et al., 2014 ) , while yellow contours in panel (e) indicate the ALMA Band 9 continuum emission. The velocity ranges are shown at the top of each panel; the intermediate velocity interval in panel (e) is defined based on the HCO + data. The HCO + contour levels are [0.5, 2.0, 3.0] K, and the Band 9 continuum contour levels are [11, 22, 33] mJy beam -1 . In all panels, the cross marks the protostellar position. The synthesized beam in the color-scale data is shown in the lower-left corner of the relevant panels. The reduced ALMA Band 9 continuum 2D image and the CO( \(J\) =6–5) data cube used to generate the results shown here are available as Data behind the Figure in the FITS format.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：速度分档强度图，比较先前获得的CO(J=3–2)和HCO⁺(J=3–2)发射与新的ALMA Band 9 CO(J=6–5)和连续谱数据。(a–c) CO(J=3–2)强度图（K. Tokuda等人，2018）以彩色显示，白色等高线显示相同速度区间内平均的CO(J=6–5)发射。速度范围在每个面板顶部标出。中间速度面板(b)对应CO(J=3–2)发射因自吸收而强烈抑制的范围；相对于该区间的蓝移和红移分量分别显示在面板(a)和(c)中。CO(J=6–5)等高线水平为[0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0] K。(d–f) CO(J=6–5)强度图以彩色显示。白色等高线显示HCO⁺(J=3–2)发射（K. Tokuda等人，2014），而面板(e)中的黄色等高线指示ALMA Band 9连续谱发射。速度范围在每个面板顶部标出；面板(e)中的中间速度区间基于HCO⁺数据定义。HCO⁺等高线水平为[0.5, 2.0, 3.0] K，Band 9连续谱等高线水平为[11, 22, 33] mJy beam⁻¹。在所有面板中，十字标记原恒星位置。彩色数据中的合成波束显示在相关面板的左下角。用于生成此处所示结果的简化ALMA Band 9连续谱2D图像和CO(J=6–5)数据立方体以FITS格式作为图后数据提供。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Channel maps of the CO( \(J\) =6–5) emission at the native spectral resolution ( \(\Delta v=0.12~{km~s^{-1}}\) ), shown as a \(3\times 3\) panel. All panels are displayed in brightness temperature units (K). The central velocity channel is shown in the upper right corners of each panel in km s -1 unit. The beam size of \(1\farcs 8\times 1\farcs 3\) (P.A. \(=-6\fdg 1\) ) is shown in the ellipse at the lower left corner in the lower left panel. The red cross shows the position of the protostar.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：CO(J=6–5)发射在原生光谱分辨率（Δv=0.12 km s⁻¹）下的通道图，显示为3×3面板。所有面板以亮温度单位（K）显示。每个面板的右上角显示中心速度通道，单位为km s⁻¹。左下角面板左下角的椭圆显示波束大小为1\farcs 8×1\farcs 3（位置角=-6\fdg 1）。红色十字显示原恒星的位置。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: (a) Integrated-intensity (moment 0) map of CO( \(J\) =6–5) integrated over \(V_{LSRK}=4.4\) – \(8.6~{km~s^{-1}}\) . The beam size ellipse is shown in the lower left corner. The cross mark shows the protostar position. (b) Intensity-weighted mean velocity (moment 1) map computed over the same velocity range. (c) Same as panel (a), but for the integrated velocity range of \(V_{LSRK}=6.3\) – \(6.7~{km~s^{-1}}\) . (d) Same as panel (b), but the velocity range as same as in panel (c).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：(a) CO(J=6–5)在V_{LSRK}=4.4–8.6 km s⁻¹范围内积分的积分强度（矩0）图。波束大小椭圆显示在左下角。十字标记显示原恒星位置。(b) 在同一速度范围内计算的强度加权平均速度（矩1）图。(c) 与面板(a)相同，但积分速度范围为V_{LSRK}=6.3–6.7 km s⁻¹。(d) 与面板(b)相同，但速度范围与面板(c)相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: (a) The background image is constructed from Spitzer bands with \(4.5~\mu\) m shown in green and \(3.6~\mu\) m shown in blue (T. L. Bourke et al., 2006 ) . Orange color shows the integrated intensity (moment 0) of the CO( \(J\) =6–5) emission integrated over \(V_{LSRK}=6.2\) – \(6.9~{km~s^{-1}}\) . (b) The colored ring indicates the qualitative line-of-sight velocity pattern, with red/magenta and blue/cyan denoting redshifted and blueshifted emission, respectively. The star marks the position of the protostar, which is associated with a spike-like protostellar disk structure (K. Tokuda et al., 2024 ) . The arrows highlight the characteristic sense of motion discussed in Section IV.2 . The black solid lines indicate the adopted orientation of the magnetic-field direction on the plane of the sky, guided by single-dish dust polarization measurements (S. Fukaya et al., 2023 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：(a) 背景图像由斯皮策波段构建，4.5 μm显示为绿色，3.6 μm显示为蓝色（T. L. Bourke等人，2006）。橙色显示CO(J=6–5)发射在V_{LSRK}=6.2–6.9 km s⁻¹范围内积分的积分强度（矩0）。(b) 彩色环指示定性的视线速度模式，红色/品红色和蓝色/青色分别表示红移和蓝移发射。星号标记原恒星的位置，该位置与一个尖峰状的原恒星盘结构相关联（K. Tokuda等人，2024）。箭头突出显示了第IV.2节讨论的特征运动方向。黑色实线指示在天空平面上采用的磁场方向取向，由单碟尘埃偏振测量引导（S. Fukaya等人，2023）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了星系团MACS J1931.8-2635（$z_l = 0.35$）的参数化强引力透镜模型，该模型伴随光谱证认的红移$z = 5.13$的超新星Eos（Coulter et al. 2026）的探测。我们在最近的VENUS JWST/NIRCam成像中识别出10个新的多重成像系统，因此该模型由总共19个稳健的多重成像系统约束——其中9个还具有光谱红移。对于对应SN Eos的点源，我们的模型预测共有五个像，其中观测到的径向像对具有相似的放大率$\mu\simeq 25 - 30$和小于5天的小时间延迟，这与它们的同时观测一致。根据模型，其他三个预测像到达更早，时间延迟分别比两个观测像早$3.7 \pm 0.7$、$3.5 \pm 0.7$和$54.0 \pm 10.8$年，放大率分别为$12.9 \pm 2.6$、$13.0 \pm 2.9$和$2.2 \pm 0.4$。在预测位置（宿主星系的像也可见）未探测到，证实了该源的瞬变性质。SN Eos及其宿主星系在单独的文章中研究，我们在此聚焦于透镜模型。最终模型在模型与观测之间达到了非常好的$r.m.s.$距离$0.44''$。我们展示了透镜建模结果，包括新识别的系统，例如一个红移$z \simeq 3.65_{-0.09}^{+0.04}$的三重成像宏大设计旋涡星系候选体，并简要讨论了利用高红移透镜超新星进行宇宙学测量的潜力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该强引力透镜模型成功描述了SN Eos的多重成像特性，预测图像的时间延迟和放大率与观测一致。未在预测位置检测到超新星图像进一步证实了其瞬变性质。高红移透镜超新星在宇宙学测量方面具有重要潜力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Composite color image of MACS J1931.8-2635, using the summed VENUS-collected JWST NIRCam bands F115W and F150W for the blue channel, F200W and F277W for the green, and F356W and F444W for the red channel. All 20 strongly-lensed systems are represented with a unique shape-color couple. This includes candidate system 18, although it is not used as a constraint. We show the Eos galaxy host and the SN (respectively, systems 100 and 101) in a zoomed-in image on the top-left corner. The blue lines represent the \(|\mu|>100\) critical lines for SN Eos, i.e. a source redshift of \(z_{s}=5.13\) . In the lens plane, \(50^{\prime\prime}\) represent \(248.1\) physical kpc.
figures.caption_zh: 图1: MACS J1931.8-2635的合成彩色图像，使用VENUS收集的JWST NIRCam波段F115W和F150W作为蓝色通道，F200W和F277W作为绿色通道，F356W和F444W作为红色通道。所有20个强透镜系统用独特的形状-颜色组合表示。这包括候选系统18，尽管它未被用作约束。我们在左上角的放大图像中展示了Eos星系宿主和超新星（分别为系统100和101）。蓝线代表SN Eos的\(|\mu|>100\)临界线，即源红移\(z_{s}=5.13\)。在透镜平面中，\(50^{\prime\prime}\)代表\(248.1\)物理kpc。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Best-fit parameters of the strong-lensing mass model. Columns are as follows: (i) Component name; (ii) and (iii) Displacement, in arcsec, in respectively R.A. ( \(\alpha\) ) and declination ( \(\delta\) ) from the cluster center \(\boldsymbol{\theta_{c}}=(292.957083,-26.576100)\) deg (J2000); (iv) Ellipticity \(e=1-r_{b}/r_{a}\) (= flattening \(f\) ), where \(r_{a}\) and \(r_{b}\) are respectively the semi-major and minor axes; (v) Position angle, \(\theta\) , in degrees, oriented directly from the astronomical west; (vi) Core radius, \(a\) , in kpc; (vii) Cut radius, \(s\) , in kpc; and (viii) Velocity dispersion, \(\sigma\) , in km s -1 . Errors include only the statistical uncertainties, and values without error bars were kept fixed.
figures.caption_zh: 表1: 强引力透镜质量模型的最佳拟合参数。列如下：(i) 分量名称；(ii) 和 (iii) 位移，以角秒为单位，分别相对于团中心\(\boldsymbol{\theta_{c}}=(292.957083,-26.576100)\) deg (J2000)的赤经(\(\alpha\))和赤纬(\(\delta\))；(iv) 椭率\(e=1-r_{b}/r_{a}\) (= 扁率\(f\))，其中\(r_{a}\)和\(r_{b}\)分别为长轴和短轴；(v) 位置角\(\theta\)，以度为单位，从天文西方向直接定向；(vi) 核半径\(a\)，以kpc为单位；(vii) 截断半径\(s\)，以kpc为单位；(viii) 速度弥散\(\sigma\)，以km s^{-1}为单位。误差仅包括统计不确定性，无误差棒的值保持固定。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Left: Convergence \(\kappa\) map; Right: Magnification \(|\mu|\) map, both for the best-model at redshift \(z_{S}=5.13\) , corresponding to the Eos system.
figures.caption_zh: 图2: 左图：红移\(z_{S}=5.13\)（对应Eos系统）的最佳模型汇聚度\(\kappa\)图；右图：放大率\(|\mu|\)图。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Summary of the main properties of the lens model of MACS J1931.8-2635. Columns are: (i) Redshift of the source; (ii) Effective Einstein radius (arcsec); (iii) Projected mass contained within the area enclosed by the critical lines ( \(10^{14}M_{\odot}\) ); (iv), (v) and (vi) Area in the field for which the magnifications are resp. \(|\mu|\geq 3\) , \(|\mu|\geq 5\) and \(|\mu|\geq 10\) (in arcmin 2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 表2: MACS J1931.8-2635透镜模型主要性质总结。列如下：(i) 源红移；(ii) 有效爱因斯坦半径（角秒）；(iii) 临界线所围区域内的投影质量（\(10^{14}M_{\odot}\)）；(iv)、(v) 和 (vi) 场中放大率分别满足\(|\mu|\geq 3\)、\(|\mu|\geq 5\)和\(|\mu|\geq 10\)的面积（以平方角分为单位）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Image reconstruction of the quadruply-lensed System 1 (left) and triply-lensed System 2 (right), at respective redshifts \(z_{1,spec}=1.178\) and \(z_{2,spec}=1.835\) . The first row presents the extracted images from Fig. 1 ; the second row the image reconstruction. All insets are \(4^{\prime\prime}\times 4^{\prime\prime}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3: 四重成像系统1（左）和三重成像系统2（右）的图像重建，红移分别为\(z_{1,spec}=1.178\)和\(z_{2,spec}=1.835\)。第一行展示从图1中提取的图像；第二行展示图像重建。所有插图均为\(4^{\prime\prime}\times 4^{\prime\prime}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Reconstruction of System 14 Charybdis, the triply imaged spiral galaxy at redshift \(z\simeq 3.5\) , from our lens model. The first row presents the extracted observations from Fig. 1 ; the second row the image reconstruction from the averaged source, for a redshift \(z_{14,model}=3.65_{-0.09}^{+0.04}\) ; the third row presents the source plane reconstruction for each individual image. The three images 14.1, 14.2 and 14.3 (first row, of respective magnifications \(5.5\pm 1.1\) , \(2.9\pm 0.6\) and \(2.4\pm 0.5\) ) are projected in the source plane (third row) and averaged (see Fig. 5 ), and then reprojected in the lens plane (second row). The reproductions demonstrate the quality of the lens model.
figures.caption_zh: 图4: 系统14 Charybdis（红移\(z\simeq 3.5\)的三重成像旋涡星系）根据我们的透镜模型的重建。第一行展示从图1中提取的观测；第二行展示来自平均源（红移\(z_{14,model}=3.65_{-0.09}^{+0.04}\)）的图像重建；第三行展示每个单独像的源平面重建。三个像14.1、14.2和14.3（第一行，放大率分别为\(5.5\pm 1.1\)、\(2.9\pm 0.6\)和\(2.4\pm 0.5\)）投影到源平面（第三行）并平均（见图5），然后重新投影到透镜平面（第二行）。再现结果证明了透镜模型的质量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Averaged source reconstruction of the spiral galaxy Charybdis at redshift \(z_{14,model}=3.65_{-0.09}^{+0.04}\) , i.e. the triply-lensed System 14. This image was obtained by centering and averaging the source reconstruction from each individual image (and is thus effectively smoothed; cf. third row in Fig. 4 ). The source WCS coordinate position is at \((292.9579,26.5768)\) J2000 degrees. A physical scale bar is overplotted, where at the presumed redshift of the source of \(z=3.65\) , \(1^{\prime\prime}\simeq 7.2\) kpc.
figures.caption_zh: 图5: 红移\(z_{14,model}=3.65_{-0.09}^{+0.04}\)的旋涡星系Charybdis（即三重成像系统14）的平均源重建。该图像通过居中并平均每个单独像的源重建获得（因此实际上是平滑的；参见图4第三行）。源WCS坐标位置为\((292.9579,26.5768)\) J2000度。叠加了物理比例尺，在源假定红移\(z=3.65\)处，\(1^{\prime\prime}\simeq 7.2\) kpc。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Summary of detected and predicted images of SN Eos. Predicted images are preceded with a ‘p’. Columns are: (i) Object Id; (ii) & (iii) R.A. and Dec. in degrees; (iv) Lensing magnification \(\mu\) for the best-performing model; (v) Relative time delay \(\tau\) in the observer frame, measured from the observation of image 101.1, in years for the best-performing model. Image 101.2 is the last one to arrive. The \(\mu\) and \(\tau\) values were computed at the predicted position. We take the systematic errors to be \(\sim 20\%\) for both \(|\mu|\) and \(\tau\) . The model variability on the time delay between the observed images 101.1 and 101.2 is larger, however, and we infer a \(\pm 5\) days systematic. We here present the cumulated uncertainties, where the systematic dominate statical errors.
figures.caption_zh: 表3: SN Eos的探测和预测像总结。预测像前加‘p’。列如下：(i) 目标ID；(ii) 和 (iii) 赤经和赤纬，以度为单位；(iv) 最佳模型的透镜放大率\(\mu\)；(v) 观测者框架中的相对时间延迟\(\tau\)，以像101.1的观测为基准，单位为年，针对最佳模型。像101.2是最后一个到达的。\(\mu\)和\(\tau\)值在预测位置计算。我们取\(|\mu|\)和\(\tau\)的系统误差均为\(\sim 20\%\)。然而，观测像101.1和101.2之间时间延迟的模型变异性更大，我们推断系统误差为\(\pm 5\)天。此处展示累积不确定性，其中系统误差主导统计误差。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们基于106个具有背景类星体的星系尺度强引力透镜系统（所有系统均有光谱红移），对早型星系（ETGs）的内部质量结构进行了系统研究。从该母样本中，我们选取了24个具有高质量辅助数据的系统，用于强透镜几何与恒星运动学的联合分析。一项关键贡献是通过迭代光谱拟合程序（该程序可减轻类星体污染）推导出11个透镜星系的新单孔径恒星速度弥散，提供了此前无法获取的数据。我们将总质量密度轮廓建模为幂律形式 $\rho\propto r^{-\gamma}$，并将其对数斜率参数化为 $\gamma= \gamma_0 + \gamma_z \cdot z_l + \gamma_s \cdot \log \tilde\Sigma$，其中 $z_l$ 是透镜红移，$\tilde\Sigma$ 是表面质量密度。在平坦 $\Lambda$CDM 框架内，并以 DESI BAO 测量作为先验，我们通过蒙特卡洛嵌套采样将参数约束为 $\gamma_0 = 1.62^{+0.11}_{-0.12}$，$\gamma_z = -0.35^{+0.08}_{-0.09}$，$\gamma_s = 0.37^{+0.08}_{-0.07}$（$68\%$ 置信区间）。我们的结果有力地表明，$\gamma$ 随表面质量密度增加而增大（$\gamma_s > 0$），随红移增加而减小（$\gamma_z < 0$）。这意味着，在固定红移下，恒星核心更密集的星系具有更陡的质量轮廓；而在固定密度下，高红移星系的轮廓变得更平缓。通过成功地将透镜-动力学联合方法应用于一个规模可观、独立获取的透镜类星体样本，本研究为先前在星系-星系透镜系统中观测到的结构趋势提供了关键验证，强化了已建立的大质量早型星系演化图景，并将透镜类星体确立为研究星系结构的有效探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，研究验证了早型星系结构演化趋势：在相同红移下，恒星核心更密集的星系具有更陡的质量剖面；在相同密度下，高红移星系的剖面更平缓。这确立了透镜类星体作为研究大质量早型星系结构的强大探针。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Redshift distributions of the lens and source samples. Left panel: distribution of lens galaxy redshifts ( \(z_{l}\) ). Right panel: distribution of background source (quasar) redshifts ( \(z_{s}\) ). The black bars represent the Parent Sample of 106 systems, and the black shaded region represents the Analysis Sample of 24 systems used for the joint analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：透镜和源样本的红移分布。左图：透镜星系红移（ \(z_{l}\) ）的分布。右图：背景源（类星体）红移（ \(z_{s}\) ）的分布。黑色条形代表包含106个系统的母样本，黑色阴影区域代表用于联合分析的24个系统的分析样本。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Observational properties of the 24 lensed quasar systems used for the joint lensing and dynamics analysis.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于透镜和动力学联合分析的24个透镜类星体系统的观测性质。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Stellar velocity dispersion measurements for the four lensing galaxies, derived from SDSS-III BOSS spectra. Each system is displayed in two panels. Upper panel: The black line shows the extracted and smoothed one-dimensional spectrum of the galaxy, with the wavelength range adjusted to emphasise absorption features. The red line indicates the best-fitting model obtained from the pPXF software applied to the unsmoothed spectrum. Grey bands mark regions masked during the fitting process owing to contamination by quasar emission lines. Lower panel: The normalised residuals.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：四个透镜星系的恒星速度弥散测量，源自SDSS-III BOSS光谱。每个系统显示在两个面板中。上图：黑线显示提取并平滑后的星系一维光谱，波长范围已调整以突出吸收特征。红线表示对未平滑光谱应用pPXF软件获得的最佳拟合模型。灰色带标记了由于类星体发射线污染而在拟合过程中被遮蔽的区域。下图：归一化残差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Stellar velocity dispersion measurements for the seven lensing galaxies, derived from DESI DR1 spectra. The layout follows that of Figure 2 , showing the results of pPXF fitting to the DESI spectral data for velocity dispersion.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：七个透镜星系的恒星速度弥散测量，源自DESI DR1光谱。布局遵循图2，显示了针对速度弥散对DESI光谱数据进行pPXF拟合的结果。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Half-light radius fitting results. Each row corresponds to a lens system. Columns show (from left to right): (1) the original DESI-LS image; (2) the model for the lensed quasar images; (3) the quasar-light-subtracted data used for fitting the galaxy light; (4) the best-fitting de Vaucouleurs galaxy light model; and (5) the normalised residual map.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：半光半径拟合结果。每一行对应一个透镜系统。列从左到右显示：(1) 原始DESI-LS图像；(2) 透镜类星体图像的模型；(3) 用于拟合星系光的类星体光减除后的数据；(4) 最佳拟合的de Vaucouleurs星系光模型；(5) 归一化残差图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Posterior probability distributions for the mass density slope parameters \(\gamma_{0}\) , \(\gamma_{z}\) , and \(\gamma_{s}\) . Diagonal panels show the one-dimensional marginalised posterior distributions, with dashed lines indicating the 68% credible intervals and the mean value. Off-diagonal panels show the two-dimensional joint posterior distributions, with contours marking the 68% and 95% credible regions. The constraints, derived from the joint analysis of 24 lensed quasar systems, reveal the dependence of the slope on redshift ( \(\gamma_{z}\) ) and surface mass density ( \(\gamma_{s}\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图5：质量密度斜率参数 \(\gamma_{0}\) 、 \(\gamma_{z}\) 和 \(\gamma_{s}\) 的后验概率分布。对角线面板显示一维边缘化后验分布，虚线表示68%置信区间和均值。非对角线面板显示二维联合后验分布，等高线标记68%和95%置信区域。这些约束来自24个透镜类星体系统的联合分析，揭示了斜率对红移（ \(\gamma_{z}\) ）和表面质量密度（ \(\gamma_{s}\) ）的依赖性。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: The parent sample of 106 confirmed galaxy-scale strong gravitational lenses with background quasars.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：包含106个已确认的具有背景类星体的星系尺度强引力透镜的母样本。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在低红移处，羟基巨脉泽已被证明可以示踪星系合并、遮蔽星暴、高分子气体密度以及候选双超大质量黑洞系统。鉴于这种天体物理学效用，探索这些源在更大宇宙学回溯时间下的情况因此具有关键意义。虽然之前的羟基巨脉泽巡天仅限于红移 $z \lesssim 0.25$，但利用诸如MeerKAT等新型高灵敏度射电设施，拓展羟基巨脉泽前沿的能力得到了显著增强。在本快报中，我们报告在引力透镜系统HATLAS J142935.3-002836中于 $z = 1.027$ 处发现了一个羟基巨脉泽，这是迄今探测到的最遥远的羟基巨脉泽源。其光谱具有混合的1667和1665 MHz发射，并展现出高度复杂的轮廓，光谱成分的宽度范围从 $<8$ km s$^{-1}$ 到 $\sim300$ km s$^{-1}$。积分（未修正放大效应）光度为 log($L_{\rm OH} / L_{\odot}$) = 5.51 $\pm$ 0.67，使其成为迄今已知的表观最亮的羟基巨脉泽。在同一宽频数据集中，我们还探测到一条先前未知的 ${\rm H I}$ 吸收线。仅用4.7小时观测就获得了超过150的信噪比，突显了MeerKAT以及未来的平方公里阵列中频阵列在探索高红移羟基巨脉泽宇宙方面的潜力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这项发现证明了MeerKAT和未来平方公里阵列中频阵列在探索高红移羟基巨脉泽宇宙方面的巨大潜力，为研究早期宇宙中的星系合并、星暴活动和超大质量黑洞系统提供了新的观测手段。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: Hubble Space Telescope near-infrared (F160W) image of H1429-0028, including the foreground disk lens. Right: Calanog et al. ( 2014 ) lens model of H1429-0028, oriented with north at the top and east to the left. The orange and black lines denote the critical and caustic curves, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：H1429-0028的哈勃太空望远镜近红外（F160W）图像，包括前景盘状透镜。右图：Calanog等人（2014）的H1429-0028透镜模型，方向为上北左东。橙色和黑色线分别表示临界线和焦散线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Observed OHM emission spectrum of the lensed system, HATLAS1429-0028. The 16.6 kHz resolution spectrum shows a complex emission profile with remarkably high integrated SNR. Bayesian model selection prefers the 5-Gaussian component model (blue curve). The residuals (data - model) are shown in the bottom panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：透镜系统HATLAS1429-0028的观测羟基巨脉泽发射光谱。16.6 kHz分辨率光谱显示出一个复杂的发射轮廓，具有非常高的积分信噪比。贝叶斯模型选择倾向于5-高斯成分模型（蓝色曲线）。残差（数据 - 模型）显示在底部面板中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The relationship between magnification and radius for hypothetical OH maser components centred on the three NIR components identified in the Calanog et al. ( 2014 ) lens modelling with Keck K s Adaptive-Optics imaging data. We centre circularly symmetric Gaussian components on these three locations and compute the magnifications for each. The dashed horizontal line shows the total NIR magnification derived from Calanog et al. ( 2014 ) , which is consistent with the value derived in Messias et al. ( 2014 ) . See the main text for the full discussion.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：以Calanog等人（2014）使用凯克K s自适应光学成像数据进行的透镜建模中识别的三个近红外成分为中心的假设羟基巨脉泽成分的放大率与半径之间的关系。我们将圆对称高斯成分置于这三个位置，并计算每个成分的放大率。虚线水平线显示了源自Calanog等人（2014）的总近红外放大率，该值与Messias等人（2014）推导的值一致。完整讨论见正文。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Far-infrared and OH luminosity correlation (data points from Glowacki et al. , 2022 ; Jarvis et al. , 2024 ; Zhang et al. , 2024 ) . The three MeerKAT-discovered OHMs (blue, green, red) have doubled, tripled, and quadrupled the previous OHM redshift record held for almost two decades, respectively. The MIGHTEE (green) and highest redshift source (red) reported in this work are both strongly lensed, suggesting untargeted OHM searches as a way of identifying lensed systems (see, Button and Deane, 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：远红外与羟基光度相关性（数据点来自Glowacki等人，2022；Jarvis等人，2024；Zhang等人，2024）。三个由MeerKAT发现的羟基巨脉泽（蓝色、绿色、红色）分别将此前保持了近二十年的羟基巨脉泽红移记录翻倍、增至三倍和四倍。本工作中报告的MIGHTEE（绿色）和最高红移源（红色）均受到强引力透镜效应，这表明非定向羟基巨脉泽搜索可作为识别透镜系统的一种方法（参见Button和Deane，2024）。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Median posterior parameters of the five-component Gaussian OH spectral line model, where each component’s mean, FWHM, integrated flux, integrated apparent luminosity, and 1667-to-1665 line ratio is denoted by \(\nu_{\text{obs}}\) , \(\Delta v_{\text{rest}}\) , \(F_{\text{line}}\) , log \((\mu L_{\text{OH}})\) , and \(R^{1667}_{1665}\) , respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：五成分高斯羟基谱线模型的中值后验参数，其中每个成分的平均值、半高全宽、积分流量、积分表观光度以及1667与1665线比率分别由 \(\nu_{\text{obs}}\) 、 \(\Delta v_{\text{rest}}\) 、 \(F_{\text{line}}\) 、 log \((\mu L_{\text{OH}})\) 和 \(R^{1667}_{1665}\) 表示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The H i absorption spectrum (light blue), which is centred on the systemic redshift ( \(V=0\) km s -1 ), as derived from optical and low-J CO lines. The OH emission spectrum (dark blue), scaled by 0.04 for comparison, appears blue-shifted, potentially indicating a molecular outflow.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：中性氢吸收光谱（浅蓝色），其中心位于系统红移（ \(V=0\) km s -1 ）处，该红移由光学和低J CO谱线推导得出。羟基发射光谱（深蓝色），为比较而缩放0.04倍，显示为蓝移，可能指示一个分子外流。

artifacts.abstract_zh:
尘埃颗粒的磁性在其与环境磁场的对齐以及磁偶极辐射中起着基础性作用。在辐射转矩（RAT）范式中，嵌入尘埃颗粒中的超顺磁夹杂物（SPIs）预计会显著增强磁化率和对齐效率。以往的研究通常假设SPIs具有单一特征尺寸。在本工作中，我们开发了一个有效超顺磁性模型，明确考虑了SPIs的幂律尺寸分布。我们表明，有效零频率磁化率可以用均匀尺寸夹杂物在临界阻塞尺寸下的超顺磁化率来描述，并乘以一个约$F_{m eff}\sim 0.1$的缩减因子。它随尘埃温度$T_{d}$略有增加，这与单尺寸SPIs情况下磁化率快速下降形成对比。对于以角频率$\omega$旋转的颗粒，我们识别出一个主导磁响应的SPIs特征共振尺寸，$N_{m res} = (T_{d}/T_{m act}) \ln (
u_{0}/\omega)$，其中$T_{m act}$是激活温度，$
u_{0}$是SPIs的特征尝试频率。频率相关的有效磁化率可以很好地用$N_{m res}$处的最大磁化率$\chi_{m eff}^{m max}(\omega)$来描述，并乘以一个约$G_{m eff}\sim 0.1$的缩减因子。与假设均匀尺寸夹杂物的模型不同，我们发现有效磁化率在低于$
u_{0}$的频率范围内表现出近乎平坦的谱，这是由于在较低频率下较大夹杂物的逐步激活所致。这种基于SPI尺寸分布的有效超顺磁性模型对不同环境中的磁颗粒对齐、尘埃偏振和磁偶极辐射具有重要影响。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该有效超顺磁性模型基于SPIs尺寸分布，对磁颗粒对齐、尘埃偏振和磁偶极辐射有重要影响，提供了比单尺寸假设更准确的物理描述。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left panel: The variation of the critical blocking size of SPIs and the effective reduction factor with \(T_{d}\) for the standard slope of \(q=11/6,13/6,15/7\) . Right panel: The variation of the zero-frequency susceptibility with the dust temperature for the single-size SPIs compared to the effective susceptibility and the maximum susceptibility at the blocking size \(N_{cri}\) . The maximum and effective susceptibility increase with \(T_{d}\) , in contrast to the decrease as \(1/T_{d}\) for the single-size SPIs.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：对于标准斜率\(q=11/6,13/6,15/7\)，SPIs的临界阻塞尺寸和有效缩减因子随\(T_{d}\)的变化。右图：单尺寸SPIs的零频率磁化率随尘埃温度的变化，与阻塞尺寸\(N_{cri}\)处的有效磁化率和最大磁化率进行比较。最大和有效磁化率随\(T_{d}\)增加，这与单尺寸SPIs的\(1/T_{d}\)下降形成对比。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: List of symbols and meaning
figures.caption_zh: 表1：符号及其含义列表

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Variation of the resonance SPI size ( \(N_{res}\) ) and reduction factor \(G_{eff}\) as a function of the grain rotation rate for the different dust temperature. For realistic rotation rates of \(\omega<10^{6}\,{s}^{-1}\) , \(N_{res}\) increases from \(10^{4}\) to the maximum SPI size of \(N_{max}=5\times 10^{5}\) for \(T_{d}\) increases from \(15\,{K}\) to \(500\,{K}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：共振SPI尺寸（\(N_{res}\)）和缩减因子\(G_{eff}\)作为颗粒旋转速率的函数，针对不同尘埃温度。对于实际旋转速率\(\omega<10^{6}\,{s}^{-1}\)，当\(T_{d}\)从\(15\,{K}\)增加到\(500\,{K}\)时，\(N_{res}\)从\(10^{4}\)增加到最大SPI尺寸\(N_{max}=5\times 10^{5}\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: The imaginary part of the magnetic susceptibility, \(\chi_{2}(\omega,N_{cl})\) , for superparamagnetic grains with uniformly sized SPIs as a function of grain rotation rate for different values of \(N_{cl}\) and dust temperatures \(T_{d}=20,50,200,500\,{K}\) (thin solid lines). For comparison, the maximum susceptibility at the resonance size (thin dotted line) and the effective susceptibility (thick solid line) are also plotted. As the rotation rate decreases from the characteristic \(\nu_{0}=10^{9}\,{s}^{-1}\) , the peak of \(\chi_{2}(N_{cl},\omega)\) shifts toward larger \(N_{cl}\) due to the resonance effect, while both the maximum and effective susceptibilities slightly increase.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：具有均匀尺寸SPIs的超顺磁颗粒的磁化率虚部\(\chi_{2}(\omega,N_{cl})\)，作为颗粒旋转速率的函数，针对不同的\(N_{cl}\)值和尘埃温度\(T_{d}=20,50,200,500\,{K}\)（细实线）。作为比较，还绘制了共振尺寸处的最大磁化率（细虚线）和有效磁化率（粗实线）。当旋转速率从特征值\(\nu_{0}=10^{9}\,{s}^{-1}\)降低时，由于共振效应，\(\chi_{2}(N_{cl},\omega)\)的峰值向更大的\(N_{cl}\)移动，而最大和有效磁化率均略有增加。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Variation of \(\chi_{2}(\omega,N_{cl})\) and effective susceptibility as functions of \(T_{d}\) for different iron clusters, assuming the grain rotation rate of \(\omega=10^{4}\,{s}^{-1}\) (left panel) and \(10^{6}\,{s}^{-1}\) (right panel). As the temperature increases, the peak of \(\chi_{2}(N_{cl})\) shifts toward larger \(N_{cl}\) due to stronger thermal fluctuations. The effective susceptibility slightly increases with \(T_{d}\) , in contrast to the resonant behavior at \(T_{d}=T_{res}\) in the case of the uniform-sized SPIs.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：\(\chi_{2}(\omega,N_{cl})\)和有效磁化率作为\(T_{d}\)的函数，针对不同的铁簇，假设颗粒旋转速率为\(\omega=10^{4}\,{s}^{-1}\)（左图）和\(10^{6}\,{s}^{-1}\)（右图）。随着温度升高，由于更强的热涨落，\(\chi_{2}(N_{cl})\)的峰值向更大的\(N_{cl}\)移动。有效磁化率随\(T_{d}\)略有增加，这与均匀尺寸SPIs情况下在\(T_{d}=T_{res}\)处的共振行为形成对比。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Magnetic dissipation strength \(K=\chi_{2}(\omega,N_{cl})/\omega\) as function of the grain angular frequencies for different dust temperatures from \(20-500\,{K}\) . The effective strength in the thick solid line is shown for comparison.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：磁耗散强度\(K=\chi_{2}(\omega,N_{cl})/\omega\)作为颗粒角频率的函数，针对不同尘埃温度从\(20-500\,{K}\)。粗实线中的有效强度作为比较显示。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 射电波传播可能受到致密电离气体团的扰动，通过等离子体透镜效应产生频率相关的放大，并可能扭曲背景源的观测计数。类星体（QSO）数密度是理解中介物质影响的有力探针。QSO光谱中的吸收线揭示了星际和星系际气体的存在，这些气体可能通过尘埃消光和等离子体透镜改变观测流量。通过结合射电（VLASS）、红外（WISE）和光学波段（DESI）的观测，我们构建了一个QSO样本：约4000个含有MgII吸收体的源，以及约12,000个非吸收体源。在射电波段，MgII样本在流量分布的亮端显示出适度的超出，这与等离子体透镜的预测大致一致。在光学波段，MgII样本在更高的g波段流量处发生转折，并在暗端比非MgII样本表现出更陡的下降。通过红移、红外（W1）和光学（g）光度匹配构建了对照样本。在这些比较中，射电超出变得不那么显著，表明表观放大可能不是等离子体透镜的稳健证据。尽管如此，不能排除微弱的贡献，特别是考虑到相对于非MgII样本在亮端观察到的残余超出。视线方向的尘埃消光仍然是一个合理的替代机制。无论主导机制如何，多波段差异为研究中介介质的物理状态提供了有价值的探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，观测到的射电超量可能不是等离子体透镜的强有力证据，但微弱贡献不能排除，尘埃消光是可能的替代机制。无论主导机制如何，多波段差异为研究介入介质的物理状态提供了有价值的探针。

Vertical lines in the left panel present the median redshifts of the initial MgII and non-MgII samples. In the middle and right panels, the shaded histogram represents the initial MgII sample before matching.

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The heat map of redshift vs flux in radio (left), redshift vs infrared Vega-magnitude (middle) and redshift vs optical \(g\) -band AB-magnitude (right). figures.caption_en: Table 1: The numbers of QSOs from DESI DR1 at each stage of selection. The number of sources in control samples is 3477 (control-W1), and 2127 (control-W1-g). The MgII samples are matched in number correspondingly.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：DESI DR1中每个选择阶段的QSO数量。对照样本中的源数量为3477（control-W1）和2127（control-W1-g）。MgII样本的数量相应匹配。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Histograms of radio flux (top), infrared W1 (middle), and optical \(g-\) band (bottom) for the three samples. Open circles indicate flux bins with fewer than 25 sources. The analytical curves (cyan) follow a broken power law with indices \(a=1.2\) , \(b=2.3\) (top), \(a=1\) , \(b=2.8\) (middle), \(a=0.4\) , \(b=2.4\) (bottom) respectively. A modest excess at the bright end can be seen in radio band for both the MgII-W1 and control-W1 samples.

figures.caption_zh: 图4：与图3类似，仅针对使用control-W1-g样本的射电流量。与MgII-W1和control-W1样本相比，亮端超出不那么显著。

artifacts.abstract_zh: JWST对AS1063的深度图像揭示了该星系团中数以万计的球状星团。当与基于相同JWST数据的透镜模型进行比较时，球状星团的分布与透镜质量（主要由暗物质组成）的分布紧密吻合。有趣的是，暗物质和球状星团的分布都具有大的中心核。然而，球状星团分布的核心尺寸约为暗物质分布核心尺寸的一半。我们认为，标准冷暗物质和模糊暗物质模型难以解释这些大核心。同时，具有速度依赖截面的自相互作用暗物质，结合核心停滞效应，为这些核心的存在提供了自然的解释，前提是对于星系团晕，$σ_{\rm SI}\approx 0.3$ cm$^2$ g$^{-1}$。但我们也讨论了缺乏能够解析星系团尺度晕中球状星团的流体动力学N体模拟，如何阻碍了排除标准非碰撞暗物质场景的可能性。未来对星系团的高分辨率流体动力学模拟，包含数万亿粒子和超过十万个球状星团，将提供所需的洞察力，将暗物质的认识论本质转化为本体论本质。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，自相互作用暗物质模型能更好解释观测到的核心尺寸差异，但缺乏能解析星系团尺度晕中球状星团的高分辨率流体动力学N体模拟，限制了排除标准非碰撞暗物质场景的可能性；未来万亿粒子级的高分辨率模拟将有助于将暗物质的认识从认识论层面提升到本体论层面。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Comparison of the lensing mass and GC profiles with analytical models. The dark blue (lensing mass) and black (GCs) lines are from paper-I and paper-II respectively. For the GC, the profile is corrected for background contamination. The solid black curve is re-scaled by a factor 4 to visually match the lensing profile. The green curve is an NFW profile that matches the lensing profile in the region constrained by lensing (blue vertical dotted lines). The green line is a PIEMD profile fitting the lensing mass from alternative lens models (see text). The red line is a Burkert profile fitting the lensing mass profile while the orange line is a different Burkert profile fitting the distribution of GCs. The dashed-black is the number density of the brightest GCs in the full sample obtained after increasing the detection threshold by one order of magnitude (and containing 4061 GCs, or one seventh the total number in the full catalog). The dashed black line includes the same factor 4 as the black solid line. Finally, the dashed orange line is the same Burkert profile shown as a solid-orange line with \(r_{b}=70\) kpc but divided by a factor seven.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：透镜质量与球状星团（GC）轮廓与分析模型的比较。深蓝色（透镜质量）和黑色（GC）线分别来自论文I和论文II。对于GC，轮廓已校正背景污染。黑色实线曲线按因子4重新缩放，以在视觉上匹配透镜轮廓。绿色曲线是NFW轮廓，在透镜约束区域（蓝色垂直虚线）内匹配透镜轮廓。绿色线是拟合替代透镜模型透镜质量的PIEMD轮廓（见正文）。红色线是拟合透镜质量轮廓的Burkert轮廓，而橙色线是拟合GC分布的不同Burkert轮廓。黑色虚线是完整样本中最亮GC的数密度，通过将检测阈值提高一个数量级获得（包含4061个GC，即完整目录总数的七分之一）。黑色虚线包含与黑色实线相同的因子4。最后，橙色虚线是与橙色实线相同的Burkert轮廓，其中\(r_{b}=70\) kpc，但除以因子七。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Central \(3\) region of AS1063 (filtered). The image is obtained after two high-pass filters are applied to the F090W, F115W, F150W and F200W images (see Diego et al. , 2026b , for details) , and combining the four filtered images into a single one. Many GCs can be seen in the image with an almost uniform number density. The yellow and cyan solid lines are the light contours in the raw F356W image at \(50\%\) and \(25\%\) , respectively, of the maximum intensity in the center. The yellow and cyan dashed curves are ellipses fitting the corresponding solid lines. The small yellow and cyan circles near the bright central source are the corresponding centers of the two ellipses. The bright source near the center is at the position of the peak emission in the raw images and it is likely the central SMBH.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：AS1063的中心\(3\)区域（滤波后）。该图像是通过对F090W、F115W、F150W和F200W图像应用两个高通滤波器（详见Diego等人，2026b），并将四个滤波图像合并为一个而获得的。图像中可以看到许多GC，其数密度几乎均匀。黄色和青色实线是原始F356W图像中分别位于中心最大强度\(50\%\)和\(25\%\)处的光轮廓。黄色和青色虚线是拟合相应实线的椭圆。靠近明亮中心源的小黄色和青色圆圈是两个椭圆的对应中心。靠近中心的明亮源位于原始图像中峰值发射的位置，很可能是中心超大质量黑洞（SMBH）。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 暗物质和暗能量的本质是宇宙学中的核心问题之一。具有多个源平面的强引力透镜提供了宇宙学的几何探针：不同红移处的偏折角之比仅取决于角直径距离，从而约束物质密度 $Ω_m$ 和暗能量状态方程 $w$。然而，历史上该技术给出的约束落后于CMB、Ia型超新星和重子声学振荡。本文展示了来自Carousel透镜的新宇宙学约束，该透镜是一个星系团尺度透镜，包含来自11个光谱确认源的超过40个延展像。其松弛的核和主晕后方丰富的延展像使其特别适合宇宙学推断。利用GIGA-Lens流程，我们构建了一个像素级透镜模型，包含六个HST探测到的源和四个质量分量。基于该模型，仅从Carousel透镜我们得到 $w$CDM约束 $Ω_m = 0.34^{+0.16}_{-0.13}$ 和 $w = -1.31^{+0.35}_{-0.32}$，同时考虑了统计和系统不确定性。我们进一步预测，纳入四个已知的更高红移源（假设类似的不确定性分数）可将约束能力提高约80%，使精度接近CMB和Ia型超新星。对于演化暗能量模型（$w_0w_a$CDM），仅Carousel透镜就能给出与CMB相当的约束，为SN Ia和BAO提供了独立且互补的探针。虽然目前系统不确定性占主导（我们通过模拟量化了这一点），但我们的结果表明，松弛的多源平面星系团透镜能够提供有竞争力的宇宙学约束。通过减少系统误差以及纳入更高红移源（已知和新发现的）的高分辨率成像，有望进一步改进。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用总结：松弛的多源平面星系团透镜能够提供有竞争力的宇宙学约束，作为超新星和BAO的独立互补探针。虽然目前系统不确定性占主导，但通过减少系统误差和纳入更高红移源的高分辨率成像，有望进一步改进约束能力。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: All currently known lensed sources in the Carousel Lens system. The images of the same source galaxy are labeled with the same number and color, with the letters indicating the image multiplicity of each source family. 7d ∗ is the suspected radial image, but it has not been spectroscopically confirmed. Sources with Ly \(\alpha\) emission detected in the MUSE data are shown with contours. The most prominent cluster members are labeled in red. This figure is reproduced from Paper I.

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Critical curves and predicted source positions. The image is an RGB composite of the cluster core, constructed from HST observations, where the F140W filter is mapped to the red channel, the F200LP filter to the blue channel, and the average of the two filters to the green channel. Colored curves indicate the critical lines of the best-fit lens model for the different source planes. Colored circles mark the model-predicted positions of multiple images for each source. Cluster member galaxies included in the lens model are labeled in red. The inset shows a zoomed-in view of the region around images 4c and 6c, highlighting a foreground galaxy at \(z=0.09\) whose light was not modeled in this work (see Section VI.1 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：临界曲线和预测的源位置。图像是星系团核的RGB合成图，由HST观测构建，其中F140W滤光片映射到红色通道，F200LP滤光片映射到蓝色通道，两个滤光片的平均值映射到绿色通道。彩色曲线表示不同源平面的最佳拟合透镜模型的临界线。彩色圆圈标记每个源的多重像的模型预测位置。透镜模型中包含的星系团成员星系用红色标记。插图显示了像4c和6c周围区域的放大视图，突出显示了红移 \(z=0.09\) 的前景星系，其光在本工作中未建模（见第六节A部分）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Convergence ( \(\kappa\) ) contours of the best-fit lens mass model overlaid on the RGB composite image of the cluster core.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 受JWST观测证据和宇宙学模拟理论结果的启发，我们使用一个简单的参数化现象学模型来检验，在标准初始质量函数、无连续恒星形成、无并合、无尘埃的条件下，爆发式恒星形成在多大程度上能够解释红移z>5星系在M_UV vs M_*平面上的观测性质。我们发现，拟合数据的最简单模型要求爆发之间的静默期Δt ∼ 100 Myr，并且每个星系的恒星质量从z=12到z=5随时间线性增长（即每个星系中的重复爆发产生大致相等的恒星质量）。不同星系间爆发质量的分布遵循幂律dN/dM_* ∝ M_*^α，斜率α∼ -2。在z>9-10时，观测到的星系群通常只经历了一次或两次恒星形成爆发，因此这些红移处观测到的恒星质量（达到M_* ∼ 10^10 M_⊙）大致代表了单次爆发中形成的质量分布。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，简单的爆发式恒星形成模型能够解释高红移星系的观测特征，表明早期宇宙中星系的恒星形成可能主要通过离散的爆发事件实现，而非连续过程。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The cyan points show \(M_{UV}\) vs \(M_{\star}\) for a model with \(\xi=1\) , \(\eta=1\) , and \(\Delta t=100Myrs\) (Model A in Table 1 ). Blue is for \(\xi=1\) , \(\eta=0.5\) (Model B, displaced by -0.05 in log M for visibility purposes), and magenta for \(\xi=0.5\) and \(\eta=1\) (Model C, displaced by +0.05 in log M). Green is for with \(\xi=1\) , \(\eta=1\) , and \(\Delta t=50Myrs\) (Model D). We are only plotting models with apparent magnitude \(m_{UV}\leq 30\) to simulate an observational limit. Each vertical line corresponds to a given number of bursts and the number of bursts is related to redshift but is not a one-to-one function of redshift because of the random distribution of starting redshifts. The vertical extent of each line is related to the burst length \(\Delta t\) . The observational points in red are from Morishita et al. ( 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：青色点表示模型在\(\xi=1\)、\(\eta=1\)、\(\Delta t=100Myrs\)（表1中的模型A）下的\(M_{UV}\) vs \(M_{\star}\)。蓝色表示\(\xi=1\)、\(\eta=0.5\)（模型B，为便于观察在log M中偏移-0.05），品红色表示\(\xi=0.5\)、\(\eta=1\)（模型C，在log M中偏移+0.05）。绿色表示\(\xi=1\)、\(\eta=1\)、\(\Delta t=50Myrs\)（模型D）。我们仅绘制视星等\(m_{UV}\leq 30\)的模型以模拟观测极限。每条竖线对应给定次数的爆发，爆发次数与红移相关，但由于起始红移的随机分布，并非红移的一一对应函数。每条线的垂直范围与爆发时长\(\Delta t\)有关。红色观测点来自Morishita等人（2024）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: \(M_{UV}\) vs \(M_{\star}\) for the galaxies in Morishita et al. ( 2024 ) compared to a model with a random distribution of \(\xi\) and \(\eta=0\) as described in the text (Model 20 in Table 1 ). The redshift bins in each panel have the same cosmic volume.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：Morishita等人（2024）中星系的\(M_{UV}\) vs \(M_{\star}\)，与文本中描述的\(\xi\)随机分布且\(\eta=0\)的模型（表1中的模型20）进行比较。每个面板中的红移区间具有相同的宇宙体积。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: \(M_{UV}\) vs \(M_{\star}\) for the galaxies in Morishita et al. ( 2024 ) compared to a model with \(\eta=0\) and \(\xi\) randomly distributed with \(\alpha_{\xi}=-2\) . Details are described in the text (Model 19 in Table 1 ). The slope of luminosity function for this model is compatible with the observed one.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：Morishita等人（2024）中星系的\(M_{UV}\) vs \(M_{\star}\)，与\(\eta=0\)且\(\xi\)随机分布（\(\alpha_{\xi}=-2\)）的模型进行比较。详细描述见文本（表1中的模型19）。该模型的光度函数斜率与观测结果一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: log counts vs \(M_{UV}\) for the models with \(\eta=0\) and a random power-law distribution of \(\xi\) (Model 1). The slope break around \(M_{UV}\simeq-21\) is due to the adopted \(\Delta t=0.1\) and the dimming of a burst over the time \(\Delta t\) . The red lines show a broken power low fit to the LF with \(\alpha_{faint}=-0.2\) and \(\alpha_{bright}=-0.5\) at \(z=5-6\) , \(\alpha_{faint}=-0.19\) and \(\alpha_{bright}=-0.27\) at \(z=6-8\) , and \(\alpha_{faint}=-0.2\) at higher z.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：\(\eta=0\)且\(\xi\)随机幂律分布（模型1）的模型的对数计数 vs \(M_{UV}\)。\(M_{UV}\simeq-21\)附近的斜率转折是由于采用的\(\Delta t=0.1\)以及爆发在时间\(\Delta t\)内的变暗。红线表示对LF的分段幂律拟合，在z=5-6时\(\alpha_{faint}=-0.2\)、\(\alpha_{bright}=-0.5\)，在z=6-8时\(\alpha_{faint}=-0.19\)、\(\alpha_{bright}=-0.27\)，在更高z时\(\alpha_{faint}=-0.2\)。

figures.caption_zh: 表1：模型属性总结

artifacts.abstract_zh: 欧几里得星系巡天将为宇宙学提供前所未有的约束，但实现无偏结果需要最佳的表征和缓解系统效应。其中，星系的内禀排列（IA）是弱引力透镜（WL）和星系-星系透镜（GGL）探针的主要污染物之一。在这项工作中，我们通过比较两种最常用的IA模型——非线性排列（NLA）和潮汐排列潮汐转矩（TATT）及其多种变体，评估了欧几里得DR1 3x2pt分析的IA建模选择。我们的分析结合了三个视角：i) 每种IA模型对IA和宇宙学参数的约束能力，ii) 当IA分析模型与用于生成合成数据向量的模型不同时产生的偏差，以及iii) IA与光度红移（photo-z） nuisance参数之间的简并性。在所分析的IA模型中，红移依赖的TATT模型（zTATT）提供了最灵活的IA描述，且与更简单的IA模型相比具有相似的约束能力，使其成为欧几里得DR1 3x2pt分析的一个充分动机的选择。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，红移依赖的TATT模型（zTATT）是Euclid DR1 3x2pt分析的一个有充分动机的选择，因为它能灵活描述IA现象且不损失约束能力。
